Skye took a look at Xingxing, then Chen Rui, and finally nodded, “Alright, then as a trusted friend, I should also confess something. Skye is not my real name, my name is Fonsaq.”

Chen Rui didn’t feel much about the name, but Master Xingxing was taken aback, “It turns out that you are Master Fonsaq who is known as top leather master in the Demon Realm! Aren’t you already dead?”

In addition to the newly emerged “Master Arthur”, Demon Realm’s original top mechanic master was the chairman of the Mechanic Association of the Bloody Empire, Nate. However, Nate had that title because he was duo-specialized, not because he was top in one category. He could use the rules to win every master competition.

When it comes to single specialization, it is the three strongest top masters who truly made it to the top.

Master of metal-Master Anderson; the current chairman of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanical Association.

Master of leather-Master Fonsaq; former senior master of Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association, “deceased”.

Master of jewelry-Master Tetanus; the free master not belonging to any empire; whereabouts unknown.

Fonsaq was originally the top mechanical master of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association besides Nate. He was highly respected. However, unfortunately, he died a dozen years ago. He unexpectedly changed his name to Skye and came to Dark Moon, and he was cursed too. There must be an unknown secret behind all these!

“Aguile, your teacher sacrificed himself and passed everything to you unreservedly in order to nurture you into a grand master. In contrast, Nate is unscrupulously trying to seize others’ skills through the so-called shortcuts in order to improve his level!” Skye’s words surprised Xingxing and Chen Rui at the same time.

What is the concept of seizing skills? Xingxing asked in shock, “Master Nate…”

“That despicable villain is not worthy of being called a master!” Skye gritted his teeth, “The hatred between me and him is deeper than the sea of death!”

Chen Rui thought of Horford, the disciple of Nate in the mechanical contest, and Izola behind Horford which was the force at the Crystal Valley. He started thinking quickly.

“Nate is the mutated bloodline of the Mammon Royal Family. He has a strange talent where he can use dark magic to cast a secret technique to devour the consciousness of others and absorb their memory!”

“Devour the consciousness!” Xingxing said shockingly, “Is he turning others’ knowledge into his own?”

“Something like that, but it takes a considerable price to perform this secret technique. The stronger the opponent’s will, the more difficult it will be. It might even repulse unless the subject is willing.” Skye gritted his teeth, “He secretly poisoned and imprisoned me. He tried to cast the secret technique on me, but it was repulsed by my will and he was heavily injured. In an attempt to force me to give in, he even held my wife and daughters hostage and cast a curse on them. My wife committed suicide and died to prevent me from being threatened. If it was not for a few of my disciples who risked their lives to save me, my two daughters and I will either still be in captivity or dead.”

“Damn!” Master Xingxing slapped the table, “I didn’t think that Nate is such a vicious and shameless guy! I must expose this and let all the mechanics of Demon Realm know what this so-called top mechanical master is like!”

“It’s useless, Master Xingxing. Nate’s power is huge. Since he dares to do this, he must have done complete preparations. Plus, it has been so long… Don’t act rashly so that you won’t be affected.” Skye shook his head, “In the beginning, Nate sent people to chase me all the way. As a result, I took my daughters and fell into the abyss of the dead zone,Poison Cloud. He declared that I was dead. Firstly, he could not confirm my life or death. Secondly, the strong curse in my body has greatly reduced my spirit and reaction. I am unable to recover to my past state. Even if I expose his true colours, no one will believe me. It’s just that Nate will never predict that I can escape the Poison Cloud abyss and get the antidote to lift the curse!”

Upon saying this, Skye showed a grateful expression to Chen Rui. He and his daughters were able to recover due to the kindness of “sir leader”.

“Master Fonsaq,” Chen Rui comforted, “You can stay here with a peace of mind. Use the flower of mist to completely remove the curse first. Don’t worry about the rest. We all need to be patient now. When the time is right, we will find the so-called top master of Demon Realm and get even with him!”

“Call me Skye then. Fonsaq has been ‘dead’ for many years.” Skye nodded, calmed his emotions, smiled and bowed to Chen Rui, “From now on, I will be an official member of the Cloak Gang, I will leave the other matters to sir leader.”

Chen Rui also returned a salute. After the dark goblin master muttered a few words, “the plan succeeded,” he looked at Skye with a happy smile.

Wasn’t the forces behind Nate destroyed in the Crystal Valley? Could there be another force?

chapters.title: Chapter 317: Fly! A Loli Over The Dark Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 317: Fly! A Loli Over The Dark Moon

The encounters of Skye (Fonsaq) made Chen Rui be vigilant and suspicious of the Demon Realm’s top mechanical master who used despicable means. The life and death of the suspected Nate disciple, Horford, was missing after experiencing Crystal Valley’s chaos, but the relationship between Horford and Crystal Valley should not be as simple as hiring or recruiting. Relating to Nate’s means and the huge force behind him, Chen Rui had every reason to doubt Nate was also a member of that mysterious force.

In any case, Chen Rui’s own power and the power in his hands were far from enough. He couldn’t compete with that force, so now he could only endure for the time being.

The problem of this force was a far-flung worry while the problem of Dark Moon Estate was a near one. It was a matter of immediate concern. It was imperative to act immediately, but he had to wait 2 more days because it was Athena’s 20th birthday a few days later.

Athena just reminded him casually. In fact, Chen Rui always kept that in mind. When she saw the “I understand” expression on her man’s face, even the representative madam sheriff was blushing.

In fact, Chen Rui always remembered this day.

Alice also remembered Athena’s birthday, and she voiced out in advance to celebrate it nicely. Although little loli’s purpose was likely to be the much-craved delicious cake that Kia brought last time, she was quite good to remember her good friend’s birthday.

Athena was very touched by this. When Kia brought the cake previously, the little loli knew that Chen Rui had come back from the outside. Unfortunately, she went to Bailing Estate and did not encounter him during his return. This time, while Athena was in a good mood, she took the opportunity to make a small request.

When Athena accompanied Chen Rui to Mountain Xilang earlier, Alice was very envious of her riding the wyvern. Alice’s request was to ride the wyvern once to experience being a dragon knight.

Chen Rui did not want to cause unnecessary trouble initially, so he had always used the excuse of unqualified strength to fool the little loli, saying that there was no antidote to completely eliminate the toxicity of wyvern at the moment. So, she must reach the Higher Demon to be able to ride it. As dragon knights needed to constantly deal with toxins, it was easy to be disfigured and the like. This problem had made the little loli be afraid for quite some time.

However, as the time passed, even Chen Rui himself was about to forget the excuse for delaying, but the little loli always remembered this matter. She finally learned from Athena about the news that the “antidote” had been successfully researched this time.

In fact, Athena once heard Chen Rui said that Alice, like her, had consumed the essence of Jade Pearl, which was condensed only after hundreds of years on the tip of the poison dragon’s horn. Ithad a strong permanent anti-toxic ability. A wyvern’s toxin couldn’t harm her at all. Besides, Chen Rui didn’t hide his awakening from Alice. Alice also kept his secrets dearly. It was not a big deal to take her “fly” once.

“I’m going to the barrack today to organize the final selection of the battle ball team members, so I won’t go.” Athena said generously in front of the little loli and Chen Rui, “Alice, I’ll lend Chen Rui to you for a day.”

Lend? Chen Rui’s expression was stunned , a boyfriend should not be easily transferred like this! Alice’s big eyes were shimmering: Athena is not going? So me and Chen Rui… are going alone? Is this creating opportunities for me? ——Athena, you are such a good, good, good friend! A good thing should be shared with friends! “Make Alice truly happy today.” Athena uttered the sentence and gave Chen Rui a “must do” look before she headed toward the barrack.

This loli’s happiness is probably built on the pain of others… Someone who had been reduced to “a good thing” saw the little loli’s eyes lit up, and he inexplicably thought of the stick which was specially used to knock people in the back of their head; he suddenly shivered.

If this day is all arranged by Alice, I’m afraid that she will fly the wyvern with an anti-radar low altitude in Dark Moon City; it will be a terrible ordeal. Chen Rui made an excuse that the wyvern was in the black rainforest. It would take at least half a day to summon it. He took Alice to stroll around in the city. In order to prevent little loli from protesting, he also bought something for her. However, Alice’s mood and patience seem to be particularly good today. She was very obedient. Her face was always smiling, and there was no slight objection.

At this moment, Chen Rui almost thought that it was an illusion. Is this obedient cute loli really that weird, blackhearted and greedy loli? Could it be that after being trained in the Princess Retail Store these days, she has recovered her normal attributes? According to someone’s mantra, the great Demon God has finally opened his omnipotent left eye! However, there was a stark difference between ideal and reality. The fangs of the blackhearted loli quickly appeared, and some strange ideas made Chen Rui flee instantly. In the simplest case, Alice very “smartly” suggested that he use [Transformation] to become a female figure in order to “cover” that sheriff’s true face and to match her princess’s identity. Then, she “very kindly” took him to select lingeries…

Fully aware of the cruel reality, Chen Rui finally understood how unwise it was to walk around with little loli in the crowded Dark Moon City. He immediately took her all the way to escape from the Dark Moon City and came to a place in the suburbs with a tri-horned rhino.

Without waiting for little loli to have a new “good idea.” Chen Rui had secretly summoned a wyvern- As he would soon rush to the Red Spirit Estate to execute his plan, this wyvern was prepared a few days ago. Because he couldn’t withstand Alice’s “attack,” he had to reveal the wyvern in advance.

According to Athena, Alice’s beast taming skill was very awful, so it was too dangerous to fly the wyvern in the air alone. Despite [Analytical Eyes] communication, Chen Rui got on the wyvern with her just in case.

The wyvern did not have any protective gear like saddles, nor the restriction of the cage chains. Perhaps due to the fact that she had seen Athena flying plus her trust on Chen Rui, Alice was not afraid in the face of the ferocious aerial demonic beast. Instead, she looked excited.

Chen Rui’s “beast taming skill” did not disappoint Alice. The wyvern leaned down quite gently and allowed the two to ride on its back. As Chen Rui instructed, Alice held the protruding bone behind the wyvern. The wyvern did not need to have a run-up like a griffin. Its powerful feet kicked, and its wings flapped directly into the air.

Apart from the tilted center of gravity when taking off, the wyvern flying in the air was much steadier. Alice’s early Intermediate Demon power was enough to control it.

Alice was still a little nervous when she took off, but now she was completely relaxed. This wyvern is huge. It is not the two young dragons that Chen Rui and Athena rode to Mountain Xilang last time. This should be an adult wyvern with Higher Demon power. At the thought of this, Alice couldn’t help being excited.

In fact, little loli had estimated wrongly. The real strength of this wyvern was the later stage of Demon King-level. Its stamina and flying ability were very outstanding. It used to carry Chen Rui between Silent Night Wetland and Dark Moon Estate. It could be considered an old mount.

Under the instruction of Chen Rui, the wyvern began to make various changes in direction and height under Alice’s poor beast taming skill. Little loli was extremely excited. If she was not in the sky now, she would directly jump with joy.

“Left full rudder, second into the left. Launch the plasma cannon!” Little loli had stood up boldly, but she hooked the protruding bone with her foot to stabilise her body. She released a slight power in her hands, launching a small black fireball forward. Although the power of this small fireball was not worth mentioning, the mysterious law contained in it was indeed something that even Chen Rui couldn’t ignore now; the bloodline talent of the Lucifer Royal Family, [Dark Flame].

[Dark Flame] was not entirely a fire element power or a dark element power. It had only one kind of law that was destruction. A destruction which ignores everything. Its attributes were completely opposed to Nirvana flame.

“Turn on the photon shield protection!”

“Prepare for a space leap!”

Little loli had now fully immersed herself in the role of story which Chen Rui told her last time. Fortunately, Chen Rui had talked about the agreed rules with her early in the morning. They could not be close to the Dark Moon City area. Otherwise, little loli would have been a guest star in Eagles Over London [1] … Uh , A Loli Over Dark Moon.

After she got bored of playing the space fortress role, little loli suddenly had a pair of furry black ears on her head. It turned out to be a strange cat ears hat appearing out of the blue. There was a small bell hanging on her neck, which made crisp sounds with the blowing wind.

“Meow!” Little loli called mischievously. Chen Rui seemed to see an invisible tail wagging behind her skirt, but this time it was not the tail of the little devil, but… some kind of cat?

Hold on! This is a cat… cat ears loli? Chen Rui was shocked, Perhaps the little loli is going to create a new “genre” in the Demon Realm?

At this moment, little loli pointed one finger at the sky. The invisible little tail behind her butt wagged, and she made an arrogant sound which even crossed the whistling airflow. It seemed domineering, “Humans can’t stop the cat anymore!”

(Chen Rui:…)

Maybe this is little loli’s true happy look. The role of the money-minded Princess Retail Store boss is more for her sister, Shea. It is really hard for her to manage the business all day indeed. After all, she is just a child who has not grown up. As Athena said, let Alice be truly happy today. After playing tirelessly for a while, the little loli seemed to have lost interest in the one-man show. Her hands stretched open with her shoulders flat, making a cross pose.

“Jack!”

Chen Rui didn’t respond for a moment. Is there a person with this name? Wyvern’s name is not this right? “Jack! Hurry up!”

“Alice, are you calling me?”

“Don’t call me Alice, my name is Rose! Do you understand now?” Little loli looked expectant, but unfortunately Chen Rui did not see it in the back.

Chen Rui was puzzled, “Rose?”

“Jack and Rose! Don’t you remember? It’s the story of the Titanic that you said!”

Titanic? Chen Rui suddenly understood and was speechless. Erm-thief and shredded meat [2]? Are you sure I pronounced it this way when I was telling the story? Feeling helpless, Chen Rui had to help hold up the two arms of little loli, but it was the copycat version no matter how you see it. Even if the difference between the ship and the demonic beast was ignored, the difference in height between the two people was relatively large.

But Alice didn’t care about this. After “flying” for a while, she leaned her body back. Chen Rui was afraid that she would fall and quickly stabilized himself. However, little loli turned back notoriously and seemed to want to peck on his face “conveniently”. Fortunately, due to the gap in height, and little loli couldn’t stand while tiptoeing, her attempt could only fail.

Chen Rui pretended not to see it on the surface, but his vest was soaked in sweat- She was a little more subtle last time by knocking me off, then kissing me. This time she is bold. She actually goes too deep in the role play. Alice’s first plan didn’t work out, so she made another plan. She shouted, “I’m exhausted” and fell backward. Chen Rui was already prepared, so he gently supported her shoulders with his hands. Little loli immediately felt that the other party was actively avoiding it, so she pouted immediately with dissatisfaction.

“Since you are exhausted, let’s get back to the ground,” said Chen Rui. The wyvern had begun to slow down and slowly landed.

This action made Alice even more upset. Her wronged look seemed like she was about to cry. Chen Rui knew that little loli’s acting was superb, but he would tolerate her today.

While little loli was depressed, suddenly her nose smelled a tantalizing scent, and she saw a small cake on a plate appearing in front of her. No, this should not be a cake. It seemed to be solidified, somewhat similar to crystal. Plus, it is more delicate and cute. The fragrance is also very unique. Little loli’s eyes were fixated on it for a moment. She forgot to pretend to be pitiful and swallowed her saliva secretly, “What is this?”

“This is called pudding,” Chen Rui had a small spoon in his hand, and he handed it to her together. “I just made it successfully last night. You’re the first person to taste it. Even Athena hasn’t tried it yet.”

This sentence made little loli’s eyes glimmer. Holding the spoon and looking at the translucent delicate pudding, she felt reluctant to eat it for a while. After a long time, she finally carefully scooped a little into her mouth and tasted it. Then, she couldn’t hold it anymore. The entire pudding was wiped out completely in a flash.

After playing for most of the day, Alice also felt hungry. Her taste buds were hooked by this pudding. After eating, she still felt that it was not enough, “Give me 2 more, and I can forgive your impolite action of taking advantage to hug me when we were flying just now.”

Chen Rui immediately rolled his eyes. You are obviously the one who wanted to play the “Titanic”. Being a man… Even if you are a demon, you can’t distort the truth like this! “If you don’t give it to me, I will tell my sister and Athena that you touched me…”

“Stop!” (Cry without tears)

“…” (Some loli chews comfortably)

“I want cakes, barbecues, hot pots… Don’t look at me like that, human brother. I know you will find a way…”

“……” “…”

(Alice: A happy day)

(Chen Rui: A miserable day)

[1] A war film by Enzo G. Castellari.

[2] Similar Chinese pronunciation as Jack and Rose.

The one who could ‘defeat’ Chen Rui could only be the little loli 😶

chapters.title: Chapter 318: Birthday
chapters.body:
Chapter 318: Birthday

Finally, Chen Rui finished his day escort work with great difficulty. He felt a particular kind of exhaustion. Sometimes, it felt harder to face Alice than the first sage of Demon Realm.

Although he was very tired as some eccentric details appeared endlessly in between, it was still pretty worthwhile to see the pure and cheerful smile on the little loli’s face. It might take a long time to see this cute face again.

The time before leaving was always very fast. The sheriff house which seemed very quiet on the surface was actually very lively tonight. In the courtyard, Chen Rui, Paglio, Roman, Delia, Kia and Alice gathered together. Dodo and the little black horse were also there, but the main character tonight was Athena.

“Let’s have a toast with Athena!” The little loli raised her glass high.

The people stood up together and raised their glasses to Athena. Due to her height, the little loli had only one hand left to raise the cup, but the girl immediately stood on the stool and seemed to be a bit higher than the rest. No one would blame her, nor did Chen Rui prevent her from drinking as he usually would, because today was Athena’s birthday.

The yard was filled with the aroma of various foods. The sizzling sound of the oil dripping from the barbecue on the charcoal made people salivate, and some were done directly on an iron plate. In addition to meat, there were vegetables and fish. The food that Chen Rui called “Teppanyaki” was “revealed” for the first time in Demon Realm, and the people were full of praise. Barbecue was just one of the delicacies today. For this sumptuous dinner, Chen Rui had made a special preparation for two days.

The environment was the best to train people. In fact, he was originally an otaku who was able to take care of himself, but he barely knew how to cook. After coming to the Demon Realm, he passed a series of events of “honing”, besides warriors, mechanical master, magician and such, the chief could also be regarded as one of his “professions” too.

The laughter and merry atmosphere reminded Chen Rui of the time when he was in college where he was celebrating his birthday with three or five friends in the small restaurant near their college. A few bottles of beer, a few snacks, and a few barbecues were a sumptuous meal. At that time, there were several close single “gay friends” buddies. Now, the hand in his palm was so gentle and “real”. This was the most important woman in his life who was irreplaceable. Even the first beauty of Demon Realm in the Dark Shadow Empire or the charming succubus maid beside him couldn’t replace her.

Athena also recalled a scene where her father celebrated her birthday at Warlock Fortress. The difference was that there were only a dozen aunties and her father at that time, but now, although her most respected and beloved man was not around, there were so many true friends with her. Most importantly, there is him. (Thank you Demon God for bringing him to me.) “Athena, you should cut the cake.” Alice’s voice interrupted Chen Rui and Athena’s reminiscence. Although she had been pigging out, the little loli still did not give up her craving for the three layer giant cake in the center. At that moment, she forgot the caution someone told her that “eating too much dessert will make you fat”.

Chen Rui lit the twenty candles on the cake. At this moment, the flashing warm candlelight was no dimmer than the purple glow of the moon in the sky.

Athena glanced at the friends around her, and then at Chen Rui. The crystal light gleamed in her eyes, and she blew the candle gently. Then, she closed her eyes and made a wish.

Everyone already knew the meaning of this “rule” during Alice’s “fake birthday” previously. When Athena opened her eyes, Alice could not help but asked, “Athena, what did you wish for?”

Alice knew that she asked a little rashly. For example, the last time she went on an outing, she made a small secret wish. As for Athena, it must undoubtedly be related to that guy. “My wish is to be with everyone forever.”

This was Athena.

Delia looked at Roman and the two smiled at each other, holding their hands together lightly. This time, Demon God finally opened his left and right eyes at the same time.

Paglio’s wine glass took a slight pause before he tilted his head to drink again. It was the same bottle of wine, but this glass felt particularly warm in his belly.

“Athena!” Alice hugged her best friend tightly. Tears were streaming down her face.

Kia was in awe, but she was relieved that she also slowly became a member of “everyone”. (Mom, did you see it?) Chen Rui looked at his beloved woman with a smile with deep affection in his eyes, “This wish will be fulfilled. I will assure you that.”

It was already late at night when they finished partying. The crowd did not party all night, but left the time to Chen Rui and Athena in an understanding manner.

Chen Rui took Athena’s hand and walked upstairs. Although this kind of holding was already a very common intimate gesture for the two now, Athena still seemed a little flustered as if it was the first time she was held by him.

The first time should be in the black rainforest with the devil fruit. At that time, he took her and stepped through the dangerous Dragon Inscription traps step by step. That hand was so warm and assuring.

While Athena was lost in her thoughts, she had already come to the room. Watching Chen Rui quickly activating the soundproof magic circle outside and carefully closing the door, her face suddenly turned red. This guy seems to have prepared for it for a long time. He had waited a long time for this day.

Chen Rui decorated everything before turning around, looking at Athena who was at a loss on the bedside. He smiled gently and came over. Athena lowered her head and dared not look at him.

In fact, both of them had been waiting for a long time for this moment, but when it really came, Athena still felt nervous. At the moment when he picked her up and placed her on the bed, Athena’s body was already tense.

“Well, don’t be so nervous. Let me take off your shoes first.”

“I… I will do it myself.” Athena flicked in a panic, and a small leather boot flew out violently, hitting the magic lamp on the opposite wall. With the power of a peak Demon King-level plus the quasi-legendary grade boots, the magic lamp shattered instantly.

“ Ah … sorry…”

Chen Rui remembered that when he was not as powerful as her, she shyly and subconsciously smacked him on the opposite wall when he kissed her. As a result, Kia wickedly asked Slee to help demolish the wall, making Athena blush.

Her face was red again now, but it was so cute.

“Okay, listen.” Chen Rui laid on the bed and forcibly hugged Athena in his arms, “I think this kind of thing is not a program. Erm, I mean it is not a task to be accomplished. We don’t necessarily have to do something at some point. I just want to talk to you now.”

However, it seemed that there were many synonyms for this sentence, such as “remove the bra, I just want to see”, “I just put it outside and not inside”, and so on…

Chen Rui secretly added another sentence, “I will leave Dark Moon in a few days, and it will be hard for me to hear your voice.”

Athena’s body gradually relaxed, Yeah, he is leaving again soon. The stronger his power, the shorter the time we can be together. When he was still a weak man with no strength, he could accompany me every day. I still remember those wonderful stories he told at that time. Is this what my father said – the greater the power, the greater the responsibility? “How long will you be gone this time?” Athena asked while leaning on his chest.

“I don’t know either.” Chen Rui stroked her hair, “This step is very important, but it must be inseparable from the military power if the Princess Royal wants to defeat Obsidian to take the throne. If this step can succeed, the impact should minimize Obsidian’s support and power.

This period of time is also very valuable to the Dark Moon. We must seize the time to recuperate and strengthen our power. We only need to delay a certain duration. The enemy’s loss is our gain. The winning rate should increase greatly when Princess Royal and Obsidian fight against each other. Of course, the plan will never catch up with changes, so I can’t guarantee the final outcome. ”

“You’re already amazing.” Athena’s eyes showed admiration, “Originally, Dark Moon was in a precarious and hopeless situation. With your hard work and planning, at least Princess Royal has the power to truly compete with Obsidian. No wonder my father is full of praise for your wisdom.”

Chen Rui smiled, “Of course, who am I? If I don’t have the ability, your father would have sliced and diced me long ago. How could I hug his beloved daughter like this?”

“It’s just cunning plus sweet talks.” Athena’s heart was sweet, “You have spared no effort on the Princess Royal’s matter. Tell me honestly, what is your relationship with her?”

“You’re doing it again. My relationship with her is lord and subordinate. What are you thinking?” Chen Rui added another sentence secretly, at most is holding her hand with arms around her shoulder while doing a few small dances. It’s just a dance, but if this matter is divulged, everyone in the Dark Moon will definitely worship my extreme boldness. “Hmph! Don’t treat me like a fool.” Athena snorted with dissatisfaction, “But I have said before, as long as you really have the ability to attract the Princess Royal, I will never mind.”

If you never mind it, why “investigate”? Chen Rui shook his head, “Don’t overthink about it, if my plan succeeds, she will eventually be the empress of the empire. I dare not court death. It’s better to keep my little life to be more intimate with my future female general for a few more years.”

“Who is your future female general?” Athena grabbed the bad hand that was doing naughty things on her chest. “Aren’t you recently hooked up passionately with your maid?”

“…” Chen Rui was speechless. These days Kia, who had recovered her seductive nature, exchanged flirty glances with him from time to time. It was like an illicit and passionate love affair, but it was Athena herself who offered to take Kia back previously…

In fact, the relationship between Kia and Athena was quite good. The maid’s humble attitude of following the lead of the heroine improved Delia’s, who was a little indignant initially, impression of her.

Athena looked up at Chen Rui and suddenly smiled, “This is what Delia taught me. I must first ring the alarm for you, lest you become a womanizer like a Roman.”

Chen Rui was secretly ashamed. Roman has been stared closely by Demon God’s right eye now, so he seems to be very “loyal.” “Actually, as long as I know you are good to me, I don’t care about the rest.

While Athena said that, she let go of the clasped hands. The consequence of this acquiescence was that the fullness of the chest was grasped by someone. By the way, one palm was not enough to grasp one side.

When his fingertips twirled at the top of the plump, the blushed future female general gasped lightly. Although it was not the first time he had taken advantage of her like this, her whole body was roused and became soft every time. Fiery passion surged in her heart, and her body became piping hot.

“Can you change into a transformed look later?”

“Asshole… Is this some kind of dark humor?”

“Every look of Athena is mine” (Cunningly changing his words)

“Thud…” (Sure enough)

Chen Rui turned over and pressed Athena underneath. Soon, the female swordsman, whose eyes were blurred, was already naked by him. Speaking of it, this man had endured for a long time. Aside from the one with Christina at Silent Night Wetland that time, it was only officially the second time now… Of course, some other “solutions” from Athena and Kia were not included.

“It’s past 12 o’clock now. Will it really not affect you?” Chen Rui asked vaguely. Of course, his words were ambiguous because he was busy.

“En,” Athena bit her lip, and answered via her nose. She clasped his head and her shivering body twitched slightly while she endured waves of intense stimulation.

As long as she was over 20 years old, the Wales Family’s “automatic advancement” mutated bloodline would be activated. As for something… there was no need to wait until after advancement.

“……………” “…”

“Wait… You and Kia really didn’t…”

(Didn’t you say you don’t mind?) “Kia said that she won’t surpass you…”

This sentence made the woman who had been confused and engrossed in love to utterly abandon her last line of defense, leaving only a heavy gasp and a tempting low moan in the room.

At noon next day, the man and woman who went upstairs to complete some matter after the birthday celebration last night did not show up in the courtyard.

“Really? So aggressive?” Roman was a bit dumbfounded.

“Jealous? If you are capable, go and sign a symbiotic contract with a great dragon yourself.” Paglio said proudly.

Delia frowned. It is Athena’s first time. Chen Rui is too ignorant to cherish people. When the night fell, Chen Rui walked down with a tired face.

“Sir leader, you are too powerful. One time for one day!” Roman walked over while looking at Chen Rui with endless admiration. “This is beyond the scope of the dragon power. There must be some secret technique. Sir leader, please teach me!”

“Screw secret technique. Athena automatically advanced last night! I have been helping her to stabilize her strength!” Chen Rui replied with frustration. He spoke to Delia who wanted to go up and visit Athena, “Don’t disturb her first, she’s in deep sleep. She can fully adapt to the power of the Great Demon King level after waking up.”

Honestly, it was Chen Rui who caused the “disaster”. The two had been very smooth and in complete harmony. Their body and mind were ecstatic. However, when Athena couldn’t resist someone’s persistent request and turned into her battle form. Perhaps because it was too “sexually pleasing”, unexpected signs of a breakthrough emerged.

Generally, breakthroughs were completed in the peak state, but because Athena’s physical condition was “poor” at the moment, Chen Rui did not dare to neglect. He carefully helped her to complete the transition of the advancement power, and she finally completed the advancement of the Great Demon King perfectly.

“It turns out that the leader is so pitiful. It reminds me of a story about kangaroos and frogs going to date beautiful women.”

“Tell me about it.” Paglio had been eavesdropping the updates in the distance and immediately asked.

“The frog and the kangaroo each dated a beautiful woman. The kangaroo finished its business quickly and heard the frog next door all night, One two three three hey ! One two three three hey ! The kangaroo expressed his envy, but the frog’s answer is, fuck, I couldn’t jump on the bed all night!”

“Get lost!” Delia’s voice had already sounded before anyone else.

What an ‘unfortunate’ advancement timing 🙁

chapters.title: Chapter 319: Mysterious Guest Of Town Moling
chapters.body:
Chapter 319: Mysterious Guest Of Town Moling

Although a brief interlude appeared on the perfectly planned birthday night, in the next few days, the female sheriff who had her first taste of the experience and the male sheriff who was a strong in theory but a rookie in practical experience could be described as joined at the hip.

However, happy days always seemed exceptionally short. Finally, it was time to part again.

Perhaps the more painful the parting is, the more precious it will be.

“Relax everyone. As long as my plan takes a successful step, there will be plenty of chances to come back in the middle.” Chen Rui looked at Paglio and others who came to see him off and waved his hand.

“Stop being self-sentimental.” Roman, who rode on a horse, gave him a contemptuous glance. “They’re here to send me.”

Roman also intended to leave for a while this time. His destination was the Fallen Angel capital. He wanted to meet Isabella to see if she was his father’s sister, but the main goal was to explore the whereabouts of the artifact, Breeze Shadow Boots, of the Belphegor Royal Family.

Delia smiled brightly, showing a rare charm. Roman was stunned seeing that, “Are you shouting the words “freedom at last” in your heart?”

Roman shook his head quickly, “I am thinking that I must finish this matter as soon as possible and rush back to see my beloved Delia sooner.”

As Isabella was likely to be related to the secret force, which also involved Broc, Roman’s trip was not easy. Due to this reason, Delia did not go with him, so as not to expose her whereabouts which would in turn attract Broc or even Jacob and the others. Roman had the Evil Blue Tear which suppressed breath, plus a certain degree of disguise skills. Therefore, even if Broc was in front of him, he might not be able to see through Roman.

“Don’t try to hide it from me!” Delia sneered, “Anyway, remember to keep your cheap women-seducing life and come back…”

Despite the two seemed to be happy enemies on the surface, especially the guy with the foul mouth was the “receiver” [1] in front of Delia, both of them regard the other as more important than their lives. This was a tacit understanding of experiencing life and death together.

Chen Rui and Athena also had this kind of tacit understanding, so he felt very happy. This life would be worthwhile if one could meet each other like this in their lifetime even though it was full of hardships. However, Athena gave Kia some parting time at this moment. Chen Rui had been with her these days, and did not have the time to spend alone with Kia. Although it was requested by the succubus maid, Athena felt unfair to her.

In fact, this was where Kia was smart. She was very lucky to encounter a “first wife” like Athena. It was undeniable that the two women who were sharing a man at the same time would inevitably be a bit competitive in certain aspects, but Athena’s generosity and friendliness make Kia feel a genuine warmth in her heart. If her mother, Freya, saw this in another world, it would be enough to make her smile.

“You must be careful.” Kia’s attractive eyes were glittering. In fact, she didn’t know this “master” for a long time, but she really gave her heart to him.

“ En .” Chen Rui kissed her forehead gently.

“The next time you come back, you can wear ‘that’…” Speaking of this, a trace of blush flicked across the succubus’s face. Her sound was nearly inaudible as she retreated behind Athena.

‘That’ was naturally Dark Will. Kia remembered that she was extremely shocked after learning from Athena that when the two went to Mountain Xilang, Princess Royal Shea had given Dark Will to Chen Rui.

All along, she dared to tease that “human master” because of her special physique. Unexpectedly, the other party already had the “ultimate killer” to restrain this aspect much earlier.

Dark Will was the secret ring made by the Lord of Midnight Sun, Lucifer’s favorite concubine, Belphegor, using the strongest [The Eye of Evil] power and the blood of the Lucifer Royal Family. It had a strange power which could suppress any engulfment power. It was a rare nemesis of Kia’s Devour Physique.

The human had been given this ring secretly by the Princess Royal when he went to Mountain Xilang as a mining officer. This meant that Kia’s occasional seduction and teasing after she became Chen Rui’s maid was like playing with fire; she might get into trouble any time.

However, this fire didn’t really burn. He really is a silly man, but also a persistent man at the same time. Or should I say he is a patient wolf? Anyway, I like him. Chen Rui was not stupid. He surely understood the message between the lines, and his eyes suddenly lit up. Kia’s message is very clear. I must come back safely, and the reward is herself. This “reward mechanism” is really tempting. Chen Rui’s eyes fell on Athena. The female swordsman who completed the transformation from a girl to a woman was more mature and charming. He walked over and hugged Athena before hugging Kia, “Wait for my return.” ”

His tone was firm and strong.

After nodding at Paglio and Delia, Chen Rui rode on the wyvern. As he was about to bid farewell to Roman, the guy spoke first, “ Hey , sir leader, this time when you go out, will you bring another woman back?”

Chen Rui took back his farewell, and he grinned while glancing at Delia, “I will tell Delia that you have an old acquaintance in the capital.”

“Ah?” Before Roman had the time to refute, the wyvern had already taken off, and flew forward with Chen Rui’s long laugh.

“He’s really a guy who isn’t willing to suffer a loss at all.” Roman felt Delia’s cold eyes. He had a chill and urged the horse to run away.

“Let’s go, teach the guy a lesson slowly when he is back.” Paglio smiled while glancing into the distance before turning away.

On the hillside in the distance, Alice put her hands in front of her eyebrows and stared at the figure flying away. It took her a long time to recover.

“He left again…”

“He will be back.” A cold voice sounded; it was Shea.

Alice thought that when she was flying in the sky with Chen Rui the other day, the human had implicitly hinted that he wanted to be her good friend forever. At that time, the little loli pretended not to understand, but she knew in her heart: Am I really worse than Athena? Is it because of my disappointing chest? Or…

In Chen Rui’s view, Alice was just a young girl under the age of 14 after all. It was just a little youthful enthusiasm or curiosity about the opposite sex which could not be considered as a liking; not to mention love. It was totally different from the unforgettable love of Athena who went through life and death together.

“Sister, how does it feel to like someone?”

Shea was slightly distracted. Liking a person is wanting to see him often even though he is super annoying at times? And when you can’t see the person, you will keep thinking about him? Alice didn’t seem to wait for her sister’s “answer” deliberately, and murmured again, “What about loving someone?”

“Alice, what nonsense are you thinking about it?” Shea’s voice became colder. In fact, she couldn’t provide the “answer”, even if it was only in her heart.

Thinking of a famous quote (a dragon motto) once spoken by a friend who loved drinking, Alice was suddenly rejuvenated.

“It’s okay, let’s go, sister!”

Town Moling.

Kanita was taking a report while frowning tightly. In recent days, this expression was almost solidified on his face. The content of this report was the financial revenue and expenditure of the last quarter. This was a real internal account, and not the kind of public account book set up to cope with inspections.

To be honest, Town Moling’s economic situation was better than Joseph’s Town Mordo, but the economic source was relatively less. The military spending had become tighter recently. Originally, the military strength of a town was strictly limited, but Joseph and Kanita each had their own private soldiers which had far exceeded the normal number.

The Red Spirit Lord, Josh, knew that the two boys were fighting each other, and he just turned a blind eye, but he never lost his vigilance. As a lord, he had more and stronger troops in his hands. Even if his sons had any irregular actions, he still had absolute control over them.

Just like the emperor and the Crown Prince, he hoped that the Crown Prince would excel and be able to inherit his own country. On the other hand, he must beware of his son’s influence becoming too big and revolting in advance to take over his power.

In the power struggle, there were no father, son and brothers; only opponents.

The fiscal deficit was getting bigger and bigger, but Kanita already felt it was difficult to stop halfway. It was impossible for him to give up. Currently, he could only grit his teeth and keep walking forward. Between him and Joseph (even adding Josh), whoever holds on to the end would be the winner.

It was a long-term problem to knock down his father, Josh, so he didn’t have to think too much about it now. His main opponent for the time being was his brother, Joseph.

In terms of combat, Joseph had a breakthrough to the Demon King level, but Kanita had a great chance to win whether it was in the aspect of personal strength, military or military talent. However, Kanita was indeed inferior in terms of financial strength. Joseph also served as the financial officer of the Dark Moon, receiving strong support from the Mellon Family and other forces. Joseph’s foundation was much greater than him, so what he urgently needed to solve was the financial problem.

Everyone had their strong and weak points. While Kanita’s training talent was far superior than Joseph, his economic talent was much inferior. His investments in other estates and the Dark Shadow Empire had mostly failed, and the tax rate of Town Moling could no longer be raised. Therefore, the economic problems were getting serious. Due to this, Kanita was very aggressive to Joseph some time ago. Joseph was deep-minded and understood this, so he attacked by evading it. On the surface he was weak, but he actually played the stall tactics, intentionally using a protracted battle to bring down Kanita.

Kanita was well aware of this. He was anxious in his heart as he had no plans at all. If he continued according to this momentum, there would be no other way than weakening himself by cutting the military budget. Each of those private soldiers was infused with Kanita’s efforts, and they were definitely the elite among the elites. Asking him to give up was more painful than cutting his flesh. This kind of self-weakening is equivalent to strengthening the other party. Moreover, the short moment of relief can bring endless suffering which will intensify over time. After losing my strengths and advantages, how am I going to compete with Joseph? At this moment, the bodyguard came to report, “Sir Samuel is back, and he brought a man, saying there are important things to meet you.”

“Let them come in now.” Kanita kept the report in the Space Ring. During this time, under his various means to win over Samuel, the powerful human trainer gradually lowered his pride and vigilance. The two sides had established a stronger friendship.

A few days ago, Kanita was assassinated. Samuel appeared in time and killed the assassins. Then, Samuel took the initiative to ask for his permission to secretly burn Joseph’s granary in Town Mordo. Samuel even severely injured the veteran, Freddy, who had always supported Joseph. It was somewhat a little comfort with his predicament now.

Samuel walked into the hall and brought a man in a cloak whose true face couldn’t be seen. Samuel looked at the guards next to Kanita. Kanita understood and ordered them to step back. In case Samuel revolted, these few people couldn’t stop it. Not to mention that this was Kanita’s place, so he naturally had life-saving items with him.

“Mr. Samuel” Kanita stood up as a sign of respect, “Welcoming your victorious return, I’ve received information from Town Mordo that Joseph is jumping upright now!”

“It’s not a problem at all.” Samuel shook his head casually, “Mr. Kanita, this time I brought back a person to introduce to sir specifically.”

Kanita glanced at the man in cloak, and was secretly surprised. Samuel has always been proud, but when referring to this man, he has an unprecedented respect. It seems that this person’s identity is quite extraordinary. “This is my elder brother, Charles, the true successor of the Kemplot Family. He just arrived at Demon Realm. He came for a very important matter this time.” Samuel showed a respectful face, “Brother, this is the new friend I met at Demon Realm, Sir Kanita, the controller of Town Moling.”

A human who just arrived at Demon Realm? Plus, he is Samuel’s elder brother? Kanita noticed Samuel’s words and address. His pupils contracted slightly. The arrogant Samuel’s respect of his brother was not fake at all. This was different from Kanita’s attitude toward Joseph which was the complete opposite.

The mysterious human had slowly taken off his cloak. The man was not very tall, with blonde hair, fair skin, golden pupils, and a tough face. The breath of power exuded from his body gave Kanita a shiver. This human is at least a Great Demon King level powerhouse. From Samuel’s attitude, I’m afraid that Charles’s strength is far better than his brother. Could it be that he has reached Demon Emperor level? “Mayor?” The blond human frowned, “Samuel, the one you recommended to me is actually just a mayor? I thought he would be at least a lord. What the hell are you doing?”

There were countless thoughts in Kanita’s heart in an instant. Charles’s unkind questioning did not make him angry, but he smiled instead, “My father, Sir Josh, is the owner of this Red Spirit Estate and one of the four major lords of the Fallen Angel Empire. However, he happened to be in closed training in the previous days and would not meet any visitors. So, it was the wisest decision for Sir Samuel to come here.”

Kanita did not know to what extent the two humans had colluded in advance. Charles’ behaviour might be deliberately pretended. Kanita just gave an explanation to enable Samuel to step down, so that this conversation could continue in a friendly atmosphere.

Samuel nodded thankfully to Kanita. “Charles” looked slightly relaxed while he said, “Since Sir Kanita is the son of the lord and a friend of Samuel, then I hope to get help from Sir to arrange my meeting with the lord. ”

Although demons and humans were implacable enemies, it was not uncommon for humans to come to Demon Realm for training over the years. Many of them would temporarily join Demon Realm forces. However, on the first meeting, Charles wanted to approach a Demon Realm lord. The situation seemed to be somewhat fishy. Plus the “important matter” Samuel mentioned earlier made Kanita full of doubts.

What is the actual purpose of “Charles”? [1] The man who plays the role of girlfriend in a homosexual relationship.

One thing for sure that he wasn’t here to help you…

chapters.title: Chapter 320: Kanita'S Light Of Hope?
chapters.body:
Chapter 320: Kanita'S Light Of Hope?

Kanita thought quickly and said, “My father was training behind closed doors. Unless there was a very urgent military situation, otherwise, even I can’t meet him. I would like to ask sir first, what is the matter actually?”

Kanita’s sentence was not completely perfunctory. Josh was indeed training a while ago, but it was now over. This human came very strangely. Despite Samuel’s relationship, it is only a one-sided story. It is impossible to bring “Charles” to Josh without making things clear first. In case of any wrongdoing, wouldn’t it implicate me and give Joseph a chance to defeat me completely? However, the war between Demon Realm and the human world would not begin until 200 years from now. The probability of a human coming to assassinate a Demon Realm lord was very small. Kanita was more concerned about what he could gain in this matter.

“This is something that benefits both parties, and the benefits are huge.”

Benefits? Kanita was immediately focused, but he was emotionless on the surface, “Huge benefits? Please forgive me, Mr. Samuel comes from the human world and this is Demon Realm. I really can’t think what huge benefits sir can bring us.”

“Charles” was naturally Chen Rui who activated the [Camouflage] technique. In the face of Kanita’s doubts, he shook his head, “I’m sorry. I can’t disclose it too clearly, but what I can tell you is how to cooperate successfully. The gain will be twice, three times or more of the input. Of course, this input must reach a certain amount. Otherwise, it will not be able to meet the needs to generate revenue.”

Hearing this huge return, Kanita’s heart skipped but remained calm, “It really is a huge benefit, but I can’t think of why is there such an enormous benefit?”

“Don’t question the power of Kemplot who is the first commercial family of human! Human economy and commerce are by no means comparable to your barren Demon Realm!” Chen Rui exuded a terrifying momentum. Similarly, Samuel’s face showed a proud smile.

Kanita once heard Samuel occasionally mention that his family was the first commercial family in the empire, and their financial resources were quite strong. It was far better than the Demon Realm family. He frowned and said, “If so, why did sir come to Demon Realm? You can find a bigger and safer collaborator in the human world. As far as I know, coming here through the space channel alone will take a great risk, let alone the hostility of demons to the human race.”

Samuel interjected, “Sir Kanita, you have no idea that my family recently…”

“Samuel!” Chen Rui stopped what Samuel was about to say. “We don’t have much time. You have been in Demon Realm for some time. You should have a certain understanding of the situation here. I order you to leave this place immediately, and look for a truly capable collaborator with me.”

Samuel hesitated a little and replied affirmatively, “Yes!”

“Please wait a moment!” Kanita quickly digested what was revealed in just a few words. The Kemplot Family has a certain situation, and Charles has a relatively tight time to complete this matter. In any case, this may be my crucial opportunity to reverse my current predicament. “Demons,” Chen Rui looked at Kanita lightly, and a fierce murderousness slowly radiated out, “Want us to stay?”

Samuel said, “Sir Kanita, thank you for taking care of me during this time. I don’t want to have any conflict with you, please let us leave.”

“If Sir Samuel wants to go, there is no one in Town Moling who can stop you, let alone Sir Charles.” Kanita quickly shook his head, “Currently, my father has the strongest power among the four lords of the Fallen Angel Empire. With my relationship, I am the most suitable partner for cooperation. If Mr. Charles wants to turn to other collaborators, I’m afraid you will take a lot of detours. There should not be too much time for the two of you to waste right?”

“Your observance of details impresses me, Sir Kanita.” Chen Rui put aside his murderous aura at Samuel’s signal.

“As a possible collaborator, I just want to be able to learn more about it.” Kanita seemed calmer, and he slowly let go of his hand. That was his life-saving item when his life was in a crisis.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Collaborator? Can your words represent the sir lord?”

“No, father’s training will take a while to end.” Kanita shook his head, “I mean sir can try to cooperate with me for a while before that. When father ends the training, as long as there is something solid as proof, I can guarantee that I can definitely persuade my father to agree.”

“This suggestion sounds good.” Chen Rui revealed a pondering look, “I need a large number of light crystal coins now… Oh , it should be called magic crystal coins here. Do you have the capability to supply this?”

Crystal mines were non-attribute energy resources. Both humans and demons could directly absorb the power to assist in training, so they were universal currencies in both worlds. Although there were many human or demon kingdoms and empires in history who issued their own exclusive currency, it had been eliminated with the passage of time. Only this hard currency crystal coin had been used up till this day. It was just like the gold which Chen Rui recognized in another world.

Kanita was currently short of money, so he frowned and did not speak when he heard a lot of money was needed.

“This supply is not free, and you can get a very generous return. The sooner you invest, the higher the return. It is the initial period now, so the return rate can be doubled. When everything is stable, the return rate will decline. For example, if you invest 10 million light crystal coins now, you can get at least 20 million returns during the start-up period. But when all projects start to continue to operate, this return rate will stabilize at about 10% to 20%. You can only get a return of about 12 million.”

Kanita was taken aback. This was equivalent to a loan. He had tried several times to invest, and the rate of return could reach 200% in a short period of time. It was absolutely profitable. Even in the later period, as long as the funds accumulated to a corresponding extent, he could continue to obtain 10% to 20%. It was also a stable and abundant economic source.

The question is, how can I believe an unfamiliar human? “Brother, let me briefly explain to Sir Kanita!” Samuel said, “To be honest, something happened to my family after I came to Demon Realm. My family has suffered from the second prince, Garfield’s, conspiracy sanctions because we are in different forces. As the funding sources of all parties are frozen, the Crystal City constructed by the order of His Majesty Lex is stuck in the final stage of completion. At the same time, many investment projects are forced to suspend because of the cash flow problems in the start-up funds. In addition, due to the enemy family’s interference, previous allies either wait-and-see or turn their back against us. We can’t get enough funding… Let’s just say that it is a more critical moment now, so my brother took the risk to venture into Demon Realm to seek a partner.”

Kanita nodded. The Kemplot Family is probably at the critical juncture of life and death, but all parties are suppressing and watching indifferently. Before that, Samuel had always seemed proud and self-sustaining without any slight nervousness or uneasiness. It seems that as he said, the family’s sanctions should have happened after he came to Demon Realm. Otherwise, Samuel would never stay in this little Town Moling. He would have gone to the estate directly to contact the lord. “Samuel, you have said enough!” Chen Rui frowned, “Mr. Kanita, with your wisdom, you should be able to judge that this is a thing that is beneficial to both parties. As long as you can get enough start-up funds, the Kemplot Family can make a comeback in one fell swoop. After completing Crystal City’s construction and maintaining the operation of investment projects, we will regain the right to speak in front of Lex the Great. The benefits that can be obtained are naturally huge by then. This is the reason for what I proposed earlier. The return rate will be in folds during the start-up stage, but when everything is stable, this return rate will definitely decrease.”

Kanita carefully calculated for a while. After relating to Samuel’s performance, he felt that this matter might really be real. However, he needed to take some risk: First, the situation of the Kemplot Family must be very critical, so it is unknown whether they can turn the table; Second, the Kemplot Family was in the human world after all. Even if there is really a profit, he may not be able to obtain the benefits from Demon Realm faraway as there is no corresponding guarantee.

Chen Rui seemed to see through his concerns and said in a timely manner, “In order to show sincerity and ensure the smooth progress of the cooperation, I’m willing to provide treasures of equal or super value as collateral for the first batch of funds.”

Super value treasures as mortgage? Kanita’s eyes brightened. This way, those two concerns were gone. For him, it was a godsend opportunity. If he could grasp it, he could certainly get rid of the biggest financial predicament now and gain the upper hand in his competition with Joseph.

“What I want to know is the amount of the first fund you need?” Kanita thought about it and asked, “When can I get a return?”

It seemed that the fish had begun to take the bait. Chen Rui immediately answered this question, “The most urgent task was to unfreeze the most important investment projects as soon as possible, and return some of the precious funds as soon as possible. The second step is to gradually start activating the remaining projects to ensure the operation and profit of the huge commercial system recovery. After all the conditions are complete, the last will be to complete Crystal City’s construction.”

“The first step to unfreeze is the most important. The first batch of funds that needs to be invested is at least 40 million black crystal coins. At present, I’m still 7 million short, and it will be returned in installments. The first phase is 3 million; the second phase is 5 million; the third phase is 6 million with a total of 14 million. The first and second phases are the fastest, and the money should be fully refunded in 1 month. In the third phase, it is necessary to wait for the profit to reach the corresponding number, so the time taken will be longer. I estimate it to be within three months.”

7 million black crystal coins! Kanita gasped. As one of the four major estates, the Red Spirit Estate was already rich, yet the tax for the entire estate was only about 5 million black crystal coins, with no additional expenses included.

This number was astounding. However, he could make a net profit of 1 million in the second period. This profit was indeed very high and worthy.

“To be honest, 7 million was just a fraction to me in the past. Last year, our Kemplot Family paid 4 billion black crystal coins to Dragon Bright Empire. This is just the result of being suppressed by the second prince. The amount was not this little in the past years.”

This number was not made up. Moreover, the taxation of a building in a developed city could be equal to that of a city in the mainland of that world.

Chen Rui sighed, “The world is unpredictable. I didn’t expect that one day I would come to Demon Realm for an adventure because of the mere 7 million black crystal coins.”

“Mere” 7 million… Kanita swallowed hard in his throat. I have long heard the prosperity of the human world, but I did not expect it to reach this level. A family pays 4 billion black crystal coins tax! If this 4 billion, no, even if only 7 million is given to Town Moling, it is definitely not just what it is now. It will at least be double in terms of prosperity or personal strength, and my financial condition will be wealthy. The most important thing is that this is only the first step! As long as I participate, the financial resources will be surging in. As long as I have sufficient financial support, it is definitely not a problem to defeat Joseph at that time.

This is a great opportunity, and it is too timely! It is simply the light of hope in the darkness- if everything is true. Kanita was not blinded by huge profits. After all, Samuel and Charles were humans, “If I can provide this fund, how can you ensure that the return will reach Demon Realm safely?”

“I did take a lot of risks this time, but as long as the plan is confirmed, I can use the secret treasure to establish a fixed space coordinate here. Half of this secret treasure is in the human world. We can use some precious materials as a safe energy to transmit to and from. It’s a pity that there can only be one person at a time. Plus, Demon Realm’s magic crystal coins have a certain dark elemental aura, so we need to think hard of a way to remove it…” Chen Rui said in a deep voice, “Up till now, sir should understand why I came here. You should also know that my time is very precious. Should you let me meet with Sir Lord as soon as possible to discuss cooperation matters?”

Kanita’s thought quickly and replied, “Why do you have to see the lord? I think sir needs the funds most, instead of the identity of the partner.”

Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed, “You mean…”

Kanita had decided. He took a deep breath and replied, “I can provide 7 million.”

Even after 100 years of accumulation, it was quite difficult to collect the money in this difficult period. It could be said that Kanita had exhausted everything, but he could not let go of this opportunity or it would not come again. If Charles went to find other collaborators, then he would miss this great opportunity.

“This is just the first batch of capital invested in the first step. A far greater amount is needed in the later stage. The goal of the Kemplot Family is not only to lift the crisis, but also to completely overturn it.” Chen Rui did not easily agree, “Are you sure that you have this capability?”

The more he had such an attitude, the more reassured Kanita was. If there is such a profit, of course, I can’t manage it alone, but the most profitable first phase investment must not be missed.

“As long as you can prove the feasibility of this plan, I can introduce and guarantee you in front of my father. A solid reality is the best reason to persuade.” Kanita said confidently, “But to prove your sincerity, I want to see your mortgage treasures.”

Verbal statements cannot be taken as proof; the most important is the actual thing. The mortgage displayed by the human was some equipment, and all of them were actually of legendary grade! The brilliance of the equipment alone almost blinded Kanita’s eyes. He was sure that he had never seen so many legendary grade items in his life. Moreover, these were only a part of it.

Kanita had a discerning eye for goods. Some of the precious value of these equipment couldn’t be measured by money at all. He was firmly determined on the spot as a smile carved on his face.

Similarly, Kanita’s new collaborator, “Charles”, was also smiling.

Shouldn’t Chen Rui deal with Joseph first? Why was he ‘helping’ Joseph to weaken Kanita?

chapters.title: Chapter 321: Destruction
chapters.body:
Chapter 321: Destruction

Mobilization, conversion and collection… Kanita worked extremely hard to gather 7 million.

More than a dozen space rings were loaded.

As “Charles” said, his time was very precious. After getting the money, he launched the secret treasure in front of Kanita to open a strange space door, and he hurriedly left Demon Realm.

Samuel did not leave, but volunteered to stay, making Kanita more reassured.

Kanita deliberately took out a couple of the human’s mortgage equipment for mechanical identification. Sure enough, it was legendary grade equipment. If something happened, at least he would not suffer a loss for these things.

After providing the 7 million, the following days would be tight. Kanita adopted Solana’s proposal to remain a tough attitude toward Joseph’s forces on the surface. The effect of this bluff was not bad. Joseph really used the tactic of avoiding Kanita. He didn’t mention a word about the fire of Town Mordo’s granary and the veteran, Freddy as though nothing happened. Joseph was attempting to knock off his opponent by playing safe.

Only Kanita and a few people knew that Town Moling was just an empty shell. In the case of a shortage of funds, this kind of momentum by putting a front wouldn’t last long. The key depended on whether Charles’ promise could be fulfilled.

Sometimes, the more hopeful the wait, the more painful it was. When discussing the situation with Samuel alone, Kanita couldn’t help but ask, “Aren’t you worried at all?”

“Worried about Charles? Or worried about myself?” Samuel shook his head, “I have absolute trust in my brother as always.”

This kind of unhesitating trust and sincere respect made Kanita a little jealous. He never had such an elder brother in his life. Even since he grew up, he and Joseph were sworn enemies.

“Relax.” Samuel smiled slightly, “If my brother can’t come back, it’s definitely not a trust problem, but a real difficulty. If there is such a day, I will never run away, but will continue to stay here to help you.”

“Not to mention 7 million, it is way worthwhile to be able to get help from Sir Samuel even if it is 10 times or 100 times more than this value,” Kanita rejoiced. Samuel was now his most powerful fighting force. If Samuel could help him for a long time, plus those mortgage legendary grade equipment, he already made a fortune even if Charles really did not return.

Of course, Kanita didn’t know that Samuel’s absolute trust was built on the Blood Oath of Light. Meanwhile, the “brother” whom Samuel absolutely trusted did not go to the human world at all, but to Town Moling which was just under Kanita’s control. However, he changed his location and moved into the hotel.

Chen Rui did not waste time in the hotel and directly entered the Super System. The powerful strength was the real guarantee. His enemies were many and powerful. To contend with those enemies and even win, he must seize the time for training.

The most important thing about Megrez state was training the power of the “world”. Chen Rui had tried before. As long as the power of the “world” could make a substantial breakthrough, there would be a leap in strength, speed, spirit and other aspects. If he did not train the “world” and simply improved his personal attributes, he would not be able to advance after reaching a certain degree. It seemed that training “Megrez” was the only way.

Chen Rui came to the training ground. He just chose the 100 fold time rule. He meditated and focused while sitting down cross-legged. Stars appeared around his body; it was the [Galaxy Territory].

Skill in the training ground had no time limit. Chen Rui sat in the middle of the [Galaxy Territory], quietly experiencing the rhythm and power of the stars. He secretly matched with the solar system’s consciousness state in the Super System. However, compared with the “real” galaxy in the Super System, [Galaxy Territory] was just like a body with no real soul. In other words, it was just an illusion with some special power. There was no real texture.

Even after integrating the power of the spiritual imprint from Shura into the [Galaxy Territory] to become the [Dark Star Territory], the feeling of this empty shelf was still the same. What is actually missing? Is it the so-called rule? Or the rhythm? Anyway… I don’t understand. The present [Galaxy Territory] could barely be called a pseudo-territory. It was already very impressive that a Great Demon King level power could use the pseudo-territory that could only be understood by the Demon Emperor level. But Chen Rui did not have the slightest complacency because he, who had the Super System, had taken a completely different path from demons or humans from the beginning.

This “Megrez” in the Megrez state training method represented the real world or the real territory. Then the only way to understand the true truth of the real territory was to break through “Megrez” and reach the next level of state.

For now, it’s still far away. Chen Rui put away his thoughts and began to meditate. Gradually, wisps of dark silk-like smoky mist appeared from the [Galaxy Territory], blinking all over the galaxy. The entire [Galaxy Territory] became gloomy and terrifying.

This was no longer the appearance of [Dark Star Territory], but Chen Rui was still very steady and calmly said, “You’re here.”

A gruesome laughter came from the dark mist, “It seems that you deliberately let me out?”

It was Shura.

Shura, also known as inner demon, was a strange conscious body derived from Chen Rui’s [Refined Mind] test. It should be annihilated with the passing of [Refined Mind], but Shura had not disappeared. Not knowing why this happened, it seemed to have become an independent life. According to his words, as long as the darkness in Chen Rui’s heart remained, Shura would never really perish.

Shura’s appearance within Chen Rui’s expectation because he had eaten a realm king fruit before entering the Super System. This was the last one and it was the last day of the realm king fruit’s validity.

There were three realm king fruits in total. The spiritual imprint produced by the realm king fruit’s “illusion” had a very strong stimulating and strengthening effect on the pseudo-territory of the Demon Emperor level, but its validity was only three months. After he ate the first one in the Crystal Valley and obtained the spiritual imprint of Shura’s dark power, he combined it with the [Galaxy Territory] to comprehend the [Dark Star Territory]. He ate the second one after returning to the Dark Moon. When Shura appeared again at that time, it surprised Chen Rui, but he finally defeated Shura with his will, making the imprint of dark power deeper.

At that time, Chen Rui faintly felt that the imprint with this power seemed to have a deeper mystery.

Therefore, even after knowing that eating the realm king fruit might be accompanied by the appearance of Shura, he still ate the realm king fruit without hesitation.

The real gains were often accompanied by costs and dangers. Overcoming challenges and not retreating was the reason why Chen Rui eventually had his power today.

“You seem to have mastered the way to make me appear?” Shura asked with an evil smile without attacking in a hurry.

Chen Rui said lightly, “Even if I don’t get you out, you will come out sooner or later.”

Shura pondered, “You have the potential, wisdom, perseverance and determination to pursue power. Why don’t you accept my power? Is it for some ridiculous reason to exclude the existence of darkness?”

“I can’t deny the existence of darkness. Just like the change of yin and yang in the world, which are contradicting and opposing, constitute the root of this world. However, I have my own persistence. I will not give up on some things. I will pursue power in my own way, and my determination is greater than you think.” Chen Rui suddenly smiled, “As for accepting your power, am I not doing it now?”

“Stubborn!” Shura’s face was even more ruthless, and he sneered, “Want to use me as a whetstone? Your knife will break in just a few moves.”

“It’s not the first time I heard this.” Chen Rui recalled his memories, “But the truth is that this knife is getting sharper now.”

“You seem to be quite confident? Hmph! Don’t think that I can’t exert power beyond you just because I’m limited to some symbiotic rule. It’s not only you who keeps improving!” Shura’s dark breath slowly changed. “During this period of time, a strange power in me has gradually recovered. Although I don’t know where this power comes from, I’m certain that this is the ultimate power. The dark power in the past cannot be compared with this. You took the initiative to call me out this time; you’re courting death! I’ll take over your consciousness and all of you today!”

The ultimate strength? Chen Rui looked solemn. Judging from Shura’s appearance, he is not bragging. The dark breath which could have caused various negative debuffs gradually changed and merged into one breath.

This breath was vast and far-reaching. It was filled with an inexplicable sense of immensity, as if it had existed in the world since ancient times. Chen Rui only glanced once at it, but he felt an irresistible feeling in his heart.

Although limited to a certain rule, the level of power displayed by Shura couldn’t surpass Chen Rui’s “actual body”, the “quality” contained in this breath of power far exceeded Chen Rui. It even exceeded all the powers he recognized. Even Catherine, the second strongest powerhouse in the Demon Realm, was uncomparable.

What kind of power is this? Chen Rui had no time to think about it. He took a deep breath, and suppressed the fear in his mind. His hands released rays of black qi, and the surrounding galaxy suddenly turned into black gem-like [Dark Star Territory] which quickly spun along with his thoughts.

Shura didn’t move while a strange smile appeared at the corner of his mouth. His breath suddenly increased. The planets in the [Dark Star Territory] exploded, and the whole [Galaxy Territory] immediately showed signs of collapse.

Chen Rui was very shocked. The [Dark Star Territory], a skill formed purely with conscious energy, was actually broken apart by that horrifying force as if it was an entity.

It could be said that the “unreasonable” and powerful rule had already surpassed the “consciousness” category. Upon a contact, Chen Rui knew that he could not take it. The skill in the training ground had no time limit, but his strongest [Dark Star Territory] was already at stake in just the blink of an eye. I will definitely be defeated very soon. I wanted to use Shura’s power to improve myself initially. I never thought I’d encounter such a huge risk ! Will my consciousness and body really be swallowed by Shura? In the moment when the [Dark Star Territory] was about to collapse, Chen Rui immediately withdrew from the training ground without any hesitation and appeared in the Super System’s [Sun Territory].

In the test of [Refined Mind], Shura was defeated in this place, so his memory was still fresh. With a sneer, Shura fully stimulated the breath of his body and spread it to the Super System’s solar system.

The [Dark Star Territory]’s power was far inferior than the real “territory” of Super System (Chen Rui understood it this way). He was frightened by this breath at the training ground just now, so his fighting spirit was suppressed to the lowest point. He didn’t have time to make more judgments. In the Super System’s solar system, Chen Rui finally had a taste of the real feeling of this breath now. There was actually a hint of familiarity.

Destruction.

Although this breath was not particularly powerful, it was an unparalleled pure power of destruction.

There were too many immortal beings in the universe with trillions of years of life or glory, but these couldn’t escape the end of destruction after all. Death was an unchanging universal truth, as was creation. The cycle of life and death was originally the simplest and most profound eternal truth.

When Shura’s destructive breath had completely dissipated, the Super System’s solar system began to shake, and there was a sign of collapse in space. Chen Rui was taken aback. When he was first promoted to Alioth State, it was probably equivalent to the early stage of Demon King. The Demon Overlord-level Glorfin invaded the solar system by relying on the power of the artifact, God-Eating Mask, to shake this solar system.

Chen Rui already had the power of the Great Demon King level now, and Shura couldn’t use a stronger level of power than him, but he could even affect and destroy the Super System’s solar system. This was the “qualitative” difference.

Chen Rui, whose spirit was integrated with the solar system, was badly hit. He was quick-witted and immediately responded. The space of the solar system began to distort, and the planet disappeared suddenly, forming a strange black hole.

A black hole was a kind of celestial body which had strong gravitational force. It was a bottomless hole in the universe. Once any substance fell into it, it could no longer escape. Even light was of no exception. However, the power of this destruction actually disappeared as expected, and even the black hole began to twist strangely.

However, Chen Rui could already feel that the black hole, which evolved from the Star Devouring mode, was gradually absorbing the destruction power. Shura’s facial expression finally began to look panicked.

The energy devoured by Star Devouring could be absorbed and converted for its own use by Star Conversion. This was the case with the conscious power swallowed by Glorfin last time, but the power absorbed this time did not appear in Star Conversion. Instead, it seemed to be absorbed by the Super System itself.

When Chen Rui was unleashing Star Devouring, he also experienced the familiar destructive power, and he suddenly remembered something.

“Shura, I know where you came from!”

Shura himself said that he was originally just a trace of energy that was about to fade away. He gained strength and consciousness from the darkness of Chen Rui’s inner world and became the so-called inner demon. When Chen Rui passed the [Refined Mind], not only Shura did not disappear, but the independence of his consciousness became stronger and stronger. He could even exert such a terrifying power now.

However, Shura didn’t know where he came from.

This was a mystery.

Chen Rui couldn’t help saying this. It shocked Shura who was already unable to sustain it, “I’m…”
