At this moment of distraction, the remaining power which was running out was suddenly swallowed up. Before Shura finished speaking, he had vanished into thin air. This short but thrilling battle was finally over.

Shura just disappeared, but he would appear again next time. Similarly, he would be back with this terrifying force.

The black hole faded away, and the solar system regained its original brilliance and beauty. It seemed to be the same as usual on the surface, but Chen Rui could feel that there was some additional mysterious breath. It seemed to be the kind of… destruction?

He exposed Shura’s origins just now not as a battle strategy, but because he really recalled his memory.

Shura exuded a somewhat familiar destruction breath which he once felt in one place.

To be precise, it was a thing.

A box.

Silver box.

The silver box that could even terrify the mighty dragon?

chapters.title: Chapter 322: Josh
chapters.body:
Chapter 322: Josh

2000 years ago, the poison dragon Paglio and fairy dragon Zola jointly defeated the crystal dragon Jacob and blue dragon Ranieri to obtain the silver box. Then Paglio was tempted by the valuables. He plotted against Zola and took away the treasure, but he was finally sealed by a mysterious powerhouse.

The root of the battle between the Demon Overlord level powerhouses, some even above the Demon Overlord level, was the mysterious silver box.

Chen Rui opened the silver box twice in the Silent Night Wetland. Once the silver box was opened, the power of the Demon Realm royal family would be greatly suppressed, and it would devour vitality. The most important thing was that when the Fountain of Vitality was first opened, Chen Rui felt that a trace of the vast force of destruction which seemed to be the power of the most origin rule in the universe.

Although the purity and level of Shura’s breath was far weaker than the vast power felt in the silver box, the two should be from the same source.

Shura was supposed to be only the inner demon of Alioth State, who existed before Chen Rui touched the silver box. There was only one reason this inner demon could have this kind of origin power which was far superior to Alioth State – When Chen Rui opened the silver box in the Silent Night Wetland, the trace of strange energy that leaked out had invaded his consciousness and merged with the inner demon to make a certain change or so-called evolution. It had been preserved until now!

The mysterious silver box was still immersed in the Fountain of Vitality in Mountain Xilang’s underground, but Paglio had repeatedly warned that at least a Demon Overlord level was required to understand this greatest secret. Before that, he could not act impulsively.

Chen Rui withdrew from the Super System and drank a bottle of potion to recover his spirit. He didn’t stay in the training ground for a long time, and he only had a short confrontation with Shura, but he felt more tired than training consecutively for 100 days.

To his surprise, due to the miraculous effect of the realm king fruit, a trace of the destructive breath released by Shura in the battle just now actually remained in the spiritual imprint. In other words, this kind of breath had been imprinted into his memory. As long as he could understand the mystery of it, then he could have the most powerful origin power!

But this kind of breath was ancient and profound. It seemed to be a simple destruction, but it contained endless mysteries. It was very difficult to comprehend. Fortunately, it had been left in the spiritual imprint. As long as Chen Rui wanted to, he could ponder on it at any time. This was a great opportunity and the only way to truly subdue Shura in the future.

10 days had passed in the blink of an eye. “Charles” finally appeared in front of Kanita who had been eagerly waiting. The space “travel” made the human’s tough face look a little tired, but his eyes were still gleaming. The most relieving thing for Kanita was that the human had brought approximately 3 million as promised.

Kanita, who received 3 million, was more reassured. “Charles’” claimed that everything went smoothly according to the plan, and the first income was successfully obtained. However, time was precious, so he could not stay here. He just briefly encouraged Samuel before leaving in a hurry.

After another 10 days, the uplifted Charles came again with another 5 million. For Kanita, this was already a profitable business. At least 1 million net profit had been made. Although it was risky, he still returned the mortgaged legendary grade equipment to the human.

In Kanita’s more than 100 years of experience, it was the first time he made such a large amount of money easily, and this big deal was just beginning.

As the human said, the breath of dark elements on the black crystal coin had been eliminated, but the money was real, so it could definitely be circulated normally. This made some of Kanita’s original doubts disappear.

“The first step of the startup has been successful. In order to unfreeze the investment projects one by one, we will need to add more investment later. I believe that you, a visionary collaborator, are not planning to let go because of this short-term and meager income. If you want to get the return of the third period, you must ensure that there is continuous inflow of funds. In the second step, the funds are still lacking 50 million black crystal coins. This rate of return is 70%, which is still a three-phase return. For businessmen, time is money, so I hope this fund will be available as soon as possible.”

“50 million?” Kanita was taken aback. This fund is far beyond my capacity. It seems that I can’t supply it alone. Anyway, the net profit of 1 million black crystal coins is now available, and there will also be a whopping 6 million coming into the account. If I recommend “Charles” to my father now, not only we make a profit together conditionally, but I can also make a great contribution. “Coincidentally, my father had finished training a few days ago. I will take you to the Red Spirit City and guarantee you in front of my father, but the prerequisite is that the 6 million in the third phase should be counted in my second investment fund.”

Kanita’s calculated nicely. Anyway, he had already earned back his cost and made a small amount of profit. The rest of the money could be used to make more money, which could avoid risks as well. Since the human was asking a favour from him, it was an opportunity to raise the conditions.

Chen Rui resolutely replied, “This will not work. In order to honor your first investment, I gave you all the initial profit of the principal. The remaining 6 million will have to wait for 3 months to earn. These 50 million black crystal coins are a solid investment, and cannot be any less.”

“There is an old saying that there is no incentive to do something with no benefits. I have dealt with businessmen many times, I believe sir will never do something with no profit. This money could earn the most important trust. I believe sir should know better than me. Besides, 6 million is nothing but a fraction of sir’s grand plan.”

After Chen Rui pondered for a moment, he still insisted that the current solid investment of 50 million must not be any less, but he promised to return the 6 million in the third period with an additional 20% to Kanita. Kanita implicitly tried out the other party’s bottom line. It seemed that it was a big transaction indeed. He made another 1.2 million anyway, so he finally nodded contentedly.

Then Chen Rui and Kanita rode on the mutated griffin’s mounts and reached the Red Spirit City at the fastest speed.

The Red Spirit City was slightly smaller than the Dark Moon City, but the Dark Moon City was mostly an empty shell left over from the most prosperous period hundreds of years ago. There were not many families or buildings with real power. The Red Spirit City was much more prosperous. However, compared with the Dark Shadow capital, it could only be regarded as a slightly attractive medium-sized city.

Contrary to the barrenness of the Dark Moon, the Red Spirit Estate was fertile, rich in food, and had abundant magic stone mines as well as forestry resources. As one of the richest estates of the Fallen Angel Empire, the Red Spirit Lord position was definitely lucrative.

Alvin Family had been operating in the Red Spirit Estate for thousands of years and had a profound foundation. Grimm Crown Prince’s descendants who were temporarily “sent” to the Dark Moon were far incomparable to them. Especially when the current Red Spirit Lord Josh resolutely chose the right decision to support Regent Obsidian after the death of Lord of Midnight Sun, the development of the Red Spirit Estate had been smooth sailing.

As the most important pawn of the Regent Obsidian to monitor and control the Dark Moon Estate, Josh also completed his task very well. Over the years, no matter how hard Grimm Crown Prince or Shea tried, it had always been impossible to change the worsening situation of the Dark Moon Estate.

Although there were some problems in Mountain Xilang a while ago, the two lifelines of the Dark Moon, economy and food, were still firmly grasped in the hands of the Red Spirit in any case – He had strangled the throat of the other party, and he was just waiting for Obsidian’s instruction to kill them.

Kanita led Chen Rui to the lord’s mansion without stopping. He directly asked to meet his father, Josh. Soon, Chen Rui met the Dark Moon Estate’s biggest neighbour and enemy.

Josh’s appearance was a middle-aged man with a medium-sized body and a ruthless face. His eyes were as sharp as a knife, imposing an intimidating presence without being furious.

Race: Great Demon (mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-. Physique: B+, Strength: B, Spirit: A-, Agility: B+.

Josh’s human form was already the power of the early stage of Demon Emperor level. According to Athena, the Great Demon family maintained human form in order to reduce consumption and preserve the power gained through training. Once transformed into thye combat form, the combat power would increase in great magnitude. The higher the level, the more so.

If Athena didn’t use Paglio’s convergent combat skills, her human form was just at the peak Demon King level, but once transformed, she could reach the early stage of the Great Demon King level. Although the Demon King and Great Demon King were only a single word difference, there was more than 10 times difference in power.

Before coming to the Red Spirit, Chen Rui had personally experienced that Athena’s post-transformation “combat power” was much stronger. Of course, it was in another “battlefield.”

Therefore, when Josh transformed to his combat state, he might climb to the middle stage of Demon Emperor. At that time, Chen Rui killed Sabrina, who was at the early stage of Demon Emperor level, after plotting against her when her combat power fell to the lowest point, yet he almost failed. He was now facing a powerhouse who had firmly mastered the Demon Emperor level and pseudo-territory power. Even though Chen Rui’s current power had advanced a lot compared to when he was at the Crystal Valley, there was still no possibility of winning in a head-on battle.

It was not only due to the huge power level difference, but also the enormous gap between the “quality” of the middle and upper levels.

Facing his father Josh, Kanita did not have the usual perfectly composed speaking confidence, but he showed a lot of respect and fear. After asking Josh to send away his servants, Kanita bowed down to salute before relaying Chen Rui’s “identity” and intention in the human world.

Josh seemed a little surprised. While listening, his eyes flickered to examine Chen Rui as if to see him through.

Kanita only described the relevant experience in detail, but did not add his own subjective will because he knew that his father, Josh, had always been suspicious and would have his own judgment on this matter. If he described it as too ideal, it would cause unnecessary suspicion.

Josh began to think about it. His eyes never left Chen Rui. An invisible sense of oppression overshadowed him. For Chen Rui who had experienced the Demon Overlord level test of Manu and Jacob, this oppression was nothing. Furthermore, he had encountered more daunting scenes when facing Shura in [Refined Mind], so Chen Rui seemed calm and unhurried.

“Demons have an old saying, there is never reaping without sowing.” Josh frowned slightly as he turned his eyes to Kanita, and said coldly, “I’m very disappointed with you. You actually believe in a human’s little trick. A mere 1 million black crystal coins is enough to make you lose your usual calmness? You can’t even see through this little trick? Just go to the corner of the city to find an imp. His trick is better than this guy!”

Kanita was drenched in cold sweats while he bowed his head, not daring to explain.

Chen Rui had been mentally prepared for Josh’s attitude. After all, he was an old guy who has lived for hundreds of years. His mind was definitely not simple. Otherwise, he would not hold the Dark Moon’s lifelines for so many years.

“I’m also very disappointed with you, Sir Kanita” Chen Rui sighed, “You keep telling me how wise your father lord is. I never thought his reputation is not as good as meeting him in person. I have to admit that this meeting is a failure. I must change to a more reliable partner as soon as possible.”

“Your biggest failure is to choose me, Josh. Alvin, as the object of deception.” Josh stood up slowly, and the murderous vibe in his eyes became stronger. “You have no chance to change any so-called partners. Your head will be my wine container!”

The force of the violent elemental power was like a huge wave, shrouding Chen Rui in an instant. The power of the Demon Emperor level was not trivial. Although his power had been compressed, the whole hall began to tremble slightly. Kanita’s face was pale. I initially wanted to make a big contribution this time, but I never thought this would be the result. “Short-sighted demons!”

Despite the strong pressure, Chen Rui unexpectedly showed a strong attitude. For him who had experienced surfy sea training, this kind of “huge wave” type of oppression was easier to deal with. He just slightly changed the power in his body, and the pressure from Josh was reduced to the lowest level. Despite that, the Demon Emperor level power still made him feel strenous.

In Kanita’s eyes, this human could actually compete with his father’s Demon Emperor level momentum, and it was even comparable. No wonder Samuel respects him so much. “Have you ever seen the prosperity of the human world? Do you know what the top business family of the Holy Empire represents? With just one day of working capital, we can buy a few of your small estates!” Chen Rui’s body faintly exuded a kind of faint breath. Although it was incomparable with the power of Josh’s giant waves, the almost pure and ultimate destructive power secretly shocked Josh- This human power is not at the early stage of the Great Demon King as seen on the surface. Is it possible that he is also a Demon Emperor powerhouse? “Not to mention 1 million or 10 million, even if it is hundreds of millions or billions, my Kemplot Family won’t even hesitate!” Chen Rui’s tone seemed like he had been greatly insulted, “If it is not because I urgently need funds to activate and unfreeze to prepare for the counterattack power, why would I, the next patriarch of the Kemplot Family, take the risk at Demon Realm for this little money!”

Josh sneered, “No matter how interesting your reasons are, it is useless. Humans and demons are originally sworn enemies. Since you have the courage to come here, you should have the preparation to die!”

“If it is now the holy war period 200 years later, then my motive of coming to the enemy’s site may be fraud or destruction, but now… Don’t you think this sentence is ridiculous? As far as I know, even your empire’s regent king also has a trusted human friend!”

“So what if you are right? The rule of Demon Realm is that the strongest becomes the ruler. I don’t need to explain any reason to kill you. “Josh’s glare became colder, and his body was illuminating in light blue flame. The temperature in the room suddenly dropped to an extremely low level, and the weaker Kanita had begun to tremble.

“You can’t kill me, demon!” Chen Rui sighed, “Plus, you don’t know how great the benefits you have given up! By then, you will regret it even without my revenge!”

Josh remained unmoved. When he put his index finger up, a mark wrapped in blue light popped out of his fingertips, and the whole room began to flash in crystal lights. The seemingly beautiful crystal lights were filled with extremely dangerous breath.

Even Kanita could see that his father’s murderous intention was by no means a bluff.

What tricks did Chen Rui have? Did he even predicted this?

chapters.title: Chapter 323: Big Fish
chapters.body:
Chapter 323: Big Fish

Facing the countless crystal lights full of horrifying chill, an object in Chen Rui’s hand shone radiantly. A strange blue light door appeared in the air. Kanita recognized that this light door was the space door where “Charles” traveled between the Demon Realm and the human world. He immediately exclaimed, “He is going back to the human world!”

There was viciousness in Josh’s eyes. When the runes wrapped in the blue flame on his finger suddenly exploded, the room became an ice world instantly. Chen Rui, who was in the middle, was surrounded by a compressed mini snowstorm. Surprisingly, the snowstorm was accompanied by strange electric rays.

Chen Rui faintly felt that the water and wind elements seemed to blend together perfectly.

It was the power of compound elements! Normally, a magician could only use 1 elemental power at a time, but there were also very few people with exceptional talents who can use 2 or more elements at the same time. These originally hard to combine elements were merged into one with special techniques, unleashing extraordinary power.

This was the power of compound elements. The compound magic power was not as simple as 1 plus 1 equals 2. It was enough to cause multiple effects. However, this compound process was full of danger. If one was not careful during the training process, he might hurt himself. If one was not someone who had a profound understanding and control of magical elements, he wouldn’t succeed.

Of course, not all elements could be merged together, such as water and fire elements; wind and earth elements; light and dark elements, which were “sworn enemies” of each other. They couldn’t be combined under normal circumstances.

Josh was able to be one of the four major lords not only by acting pragmatically and supporting the right side. His own power was also an important factor.

When Chen Rui moved his mind, a translucent blue shield appeared around his body. He was actually not affected by the snowstorm as he walked towards the light door step by step. The blue shield quickly began to crack under the power of the snowstorm, but according to the progress of his steps, he could walk into the light door before the shield shattered.

Josh immediately changed his tactics and waved toward the light door. Numerous ice crystals with sizzling sound poured into the light door, but they just passed through as if the door was just a non-existent illusion. Chen Rui had walked to the front of the light door and took a step. What surprised Josh was that half of the human foot was in the door. It did not pass through like the ice crystal. This bizarre “door” is not an illusion at all! Josh frowned, if it is a water element “space door”, my ice crystals combined with the power of territory should be able to interfere or eliminate this door, but it was not affected at all. I did not even feel any fluctuations in the water element. Could it really be the space power that has been lost? Chen Rui had a quick change of his mind. He took back the foot that stepped into the door and pointed at the space door. The door actually disappeared.

The move was beyond the expectation of Josh and Kanita. Chen Rui extended his fingers, and the shield that originally protected him disappeared.

Giving up a chance to escape? Is this human being crazy? What is he planning to do?

After removing the protective shield, a thin layer of ice formed at Chen Rui’s feet, but his fiery eyes fell on Josh’s face. “We humans also have a saying, there is no free lunch in the world. I hope to use this near-death demonstration to prove my sincerity in cooperation.”

Josh’s eyes narrowed slightly. The snowstorm did not immediately wrap up nor did Josh say anything.

“As an heir to a family, I must take the responsibility, so I’m here now, suffering from your magic.” Chen Rui’s voice was firm and resolute, “I believe that any liar will not use his own life to take this risk.”

Josh snorted, and the snowstorm immediately wrapped up. Interspersed with flashing electric rays, it was wreaking havoc toward the human in the center. Even Kanita, who was watching from the side, was frightened.

As the snowstorm gradually dissipated, the crystal lights in the room extinguished one by one. The human in the center had frozen into an ice sculpture. All body parts except his head were frozen firmly.

A [Thunderball] which made buzzing sounds rose in Josh’s hand, “As long as this [Thunderball] hits you, your body will turn into a mass of powder. However, I have deliberately left your head to have your final words. ”

Demon Emperor-level power was by no means a child’s play, especially the terrifying power of compound elements.

Chen Rui’s lips had turned purple while his skin had turned to bluish white due to the freeze. These were only physical symptoms. The power of the elements that broke through the defense of his body’s surface defence were rampaging in his body. The wounds and pains almost exceeded his limit of endurance.

In the eyes of Josh and Kanita, the muscles of the human face were distorted due to the pain, and even his voice was a little trembling, but his eyes were still firm, “I only say one last word, sincerity.”

There was a surging murderous look on Josh’s face, and the [Thunderball] flew toward Chen Rui’s body. As it struck directly, there were cracking sounds suddenly.

However, it wasn’t Chen Rui’s body that shattered, but the solid ice that wrapped around him. This blow was very precise, showing that Josh’s magical control had reached the peak.

“No matter in which world, power and courage are aspects which are worthy of respect. Human, I have to say that you have successfully demonstrated your sincerity.” As Josh’s murderousness gradually faded, he returned to the throne and sat down. At the end of this sentence, the snow world in the room had disappeared as if nothing had happened.

Chen Rui secretly breathed a sigh of relief. My bet just now seems to have the right outcome. Josh didn’t show any real killing move; it was more like a test. Moreover, when Chen Rui judged that the opponent had a compound magic of wind and water elements, there were already items that could resist wind and water elements and reduce magic power in his armor. Additionally, he had two passive attributes of [Damage Absorption], which would reduce damage by 30%, and [Anti-Magic] which halved the magic damage, so the magic damage just now had been minimized. Even if [Thunderball] really carried a killing intent, it would not shatter his body because he could still summon [Star Gate] to escape again.

It was just that if he did that, he would waste his previous efforts.

Josh was really not easy to deal with, but fortunately, the self-injury strategy was successful. The most difficult part was over.

“Sir lord’s powerful compound magic, especially the control of the elements, is absolutely wonderful!” Despite this, Chen Rui suffered a lot of trauma, so he immediately drank the cold resistance and recovery potions before praising, “Even the Saint mage in the Holy Empire mage tower is a bit inferior.”

Josh accepted this compliment, “Your power should have reached the early stage of Demon Emperor… Oh , according to your human way of saying, you have already reached the edge of Saint.”

Kanita nodded secretly, this powerful human has really reached the Demon Emperor level. Josh’s judgment was based on the pure destruction breath exuded by the human just now as well as this human power’s adaptation to the territory and the head-on endurance of magic. Yet this well-thought judgement was an overestimation of the opponent.

The previous destructive breath was what Chen Rui realized in his spiritual imprint. At present, he was only able to barely make the breath outflow. It was actually an empty bluffing. As for the adaptation of the territory and the head-on endurance for magic could only be said to be the Super System’s attributes plus the magical use of equipment.

“Sir has a good judgement.” Chen Rui also didn’t explain, and slightly nodded, “But I can feel that sir just used a little bit of power. If you exert real power, I would be completely dead just now.”

Josh smiled without commenting, “Please sit down.”

Since this human is also at “Demon Emperor level”, at least he has the power to talk to me on an equal basis. Chen Rui sat down, “I understand sir lord’s feelings. I’m a human, and I want sir to provide a lot of money this time. However, as sir said earlier, one can never reap without sowing. Without giving something, how can there be any gains? To be honest with sir, with my Kemplot Family’s financial resources, tens of millions or hundreds of millions of black crystal coins are really nothing. It’s just a particularly difficult period now. I need funds to unfreeze those restricted investment projects…”

Josh didn’t wait for him to finish and interjected, “Mr. Charles, your words are too vague. I hope to understand every segment detail that you said. This is the most basic prerequisite for our cooperation.”

Chen Rui thought for a moment, and outlined the general situation of the Kemplot Family. He first introduced the family’s financial resources, industry, and huge influence, then he mainly highlighted the grudges with the second prince, Garfield.

Under Garfield’s means, the Kemplot Family was suddenly and completely restricted. The family’s various funding sources were frozen, and the investment projects were forced to stop operating. The most important thing was that the Crystal City, which Lex the Great had ordered the Kemplot Family to complete, had also stopped progressing. Once it was unable to be completed within the stipulated time, the second prince would take advantage of the situation to let the Kemplot Family to be doomed eternally.

Under such adversity, the original “friends” had adopted a wait-and-see attitude and even turned their backs on them. The fund liquidity which sustained the huge business system was becoming tight. They even wanted to sell real estate or commodities for cash, but no one was willing to buy them. They couldn’t even accumulate a few million differences for the fund start up. If this continues, the Kemplot Family would collapse before the Crystal City completion date was due.

In this most difficult period, Patriarch Carlo thought of Samuel, his other son who went to Demon Realm for training. Demon Realm might be the only hope that could help the family to overcome the difficulties. As the heir of the family, Charles volunteered to come to the Demon Realm and successfully established a connection with Kanita.

After Kanita’s first investment of 7 million, the deadlock was finally opened. Then through a series of means such as the return of funds and so on, the situation was greatly alleviated, and the benefits obtained were handed over to Kanita. There were still many investment projects in urgent need of capital activation currently. The Kemplot Family had already gathered nearly 200 million funds, and it was estimated that they were still short of 50 million black crystal coins. Since Kanita couldn’t solve it, he came to seek help from Lord Josh.

Chen Rui’s remarks were seemingly true. The Crystal City was indeed the task of the Kemplot Family, and Carlo was suffering from this problem, but the situation was not as bad as Chen Rui said. In the elaboration, Chen Rui added some economic management terms such as marginal cost, risk of morality, and supply law from time to time. Even if Josh was cunning and seemed to understand a bit, he was also confused while listening. He just felt that human business methods were truly extraordinary. No wonder the human world was much more prosperous than the Demon Realm.

After beating around the bush, Chen Rui finally turned back, “There is still a shortage of 50 million black crystal coins, and the return rate is 70%, so the total is 83.5 million. Just like what I promised Mr Kanita previously, it will be returned in three installments. My brother, Samuel, will remain at the Demon Realm as a sign of sincerity.”

Josh did not immediately agree, but said indifferently, “In any case, Demon Realm and humans are enemies after all. If Mr. Charles deals with the enemy like this, aren’t you afraid that this matter will be divulged in the future and implicate your entire family?”

“This ‘future’ is at least two hundred years later. This is my personal action. I will bear all the responsibilities alone. As long as the Kemplot Family can maintain its value to the empire, it will last forever.” Chen Rui shrugged nonchalantly, “Furthermore, our human lifespan is not as long as the demons. In 200 years, even if there are no accidents, I’ll be almost dead. This is not a problem. ”

“It is undeniable that your proposal interests me, but…” Josh nodded, “Firstly, I still can’t trust you. Even if you leave your brother in Demon Realm, he still can’t be a real guarantee for this cooperation; secondly, assuming what you said is true, then our cooperation is effective. However, even if 50 million can get 83.5 million, I think it is still not enough in return for saving your family.”

“If sir lord is willing to cooperate, then 50 million is just the beginning. You will get more benefits later, but the prerequisite is that you must invest. This is equal to Sir Lord taking advantage of my Kemplot Family’s operational capabilities and the huge business system in the human world to earn profit. After this difficulty, the subsequent rate of return will be stable, and it is expected to be around 10%. Our cooperation time can be longer, but for the sake of the holy war time, the time cannot exceed 100 years.”

Josh seemed thoughtful. In fact, he had actually begun to be interested in his mind. Although the Red Spirit Estate belongs to the richest estate in the Fallen Angel Empire, it cannot be compared with the rich human world. If I can cooperate with the largest business family in the human world, the benefits will be unimaginably huge. Even if the estate encounters poor harvest or some changes, it will also ensure the continuous flow of wealth. With money, there will be a stronger army and combat power. Perhaps some wild ambitions that I dare not think previously can be realized… The most important thing is that given such favorable conditions, the other party does not have to rely on the Red Spirit. Even the Blue Lava Estate or White Feather Estate or even a major force other than the Fallen Angel Empire will also choose to cooperate. It seems it is absolute good luck that Kanita happens to accept that Samuel. “As for the issue of trust,” a light appeared in Chen Rui’s hands, “This cooperation contract is an equality contract. As long as both of us sign this contract, even if my brother Samuel leaves the Demon Realm, it will not have any effect on the trust in our cooperation. Sir lord, what do you think?

The equality contract was a high grade contract. Generally only the Demon Emperor level could produce it. Josh felt the power of that kind of contract, so he no longer had any doubts. He showed a rare smile, “I think we can discuss the cooperation details next.”

Chen Rui also smiled because this “contract” was made by him using the spiritual link, and the attributes could be cancelled.

It was really not easy to earn Josh’s trust, and he even paid a great price for it, but the result was very satisfactory because this big fish finally got hooked.

The fisherman is just too strong 🎣…

chapters.title: Chapter 324: The Treasure Map Of The Dead Sea?
chapters.body:
Chapter 324: The Treasure Map Of The Dead Sea?

In Josh’s view, “Charles” was resolute and firm. He was even willing to die for the family; it was not comparable to those scammers. With Kanita’s earlier “test” and Samuel as the hostage, more importantly, the two parties also signed an equality contract. For this reason, Josh killed his former servant without hesitating to void the master-servant contract in order to sign a new contract.

With this contract, both parties would have an equal cooperative relationship within 100 years. If “Charles” failed to repay according to the contract, he would be severely punished by the rule.

Therefore, Josh provided the funds with confidence. As the lord, he controlled the Red Spirit Estate for many years. His accumulation was by no means comparable to that of Kanita. Without having to sell his possessions, he easily prepared 50 million black crystal coins in front of Chen Rui’s eyes.

Seeing these hefty, shiny coins, Chen Rui wanted to tell the sir lord that sometimes it was easier for experienced people to make mistakes. He would use the fact later to give this lesson to Josh.

Kanita took an additional 5 million and continued to participate in the shares. Chen Rui insisted on only 50 million to avoid losing more “profits,” but under Kanita’s repeated requests, he reluctantly agreed. Chen Rui brought 55 million away this time with monthly rebates. 20 million rebates in the first phase, 40 million in the second phase, and 33.5 million in the third phase; totaling 93.5 million black crystal coins.

After receiving the money, Chen Rui opened the door to the “human world” in front of Josh with “item”. He walked in and disappeared.

Josh watched closely. This space door is what the human summoned when the two of us battled. It’s very mysterious. The human has given up the opportunity to escape previously. With this kind of sincerity, plus the contract, there should be no problems. I can wait slowly with a peace of mind now. Chen Rui actually returned to Town Moling through [Star Gate]. At the verge of life and death under Josh’s strong pressure, he seemed to have a little more understanding of the use of the destruction power. He urgently needed to find a quiet place to realize it.

He wanted to go back to the remote hotel to train immediately, and he saw that the hotel had more guests. These days Chen Rui had reserved a room where he stayed in for training all the time. He even set up soundproofing methods, and he hardly went out. When he left the hotel in the morning to find Kanita, he noticed this lively scene, but he didn’t ask about it because he had an important matter to attend at the time. He wanted to know about it now so that he would not be unnecessarily disturbed during his training.

“2 days later, it’s the Red Spirit trade fair that holds every 3 years.” The hotel’s succubus waitress winked at this Great Demon, inadvertently showing him her deep grooves exposed by the bulging V-neck, but unfortunately, she was just offering a treat to an unappreciative audience. He didn’t even look at it.

“Trade fair? This is the first time I heard that. Tell me what is going on?”

This weird man, who is hiding in his room every day, has no male Great Demon romance. Is he something wrong in some part? Succubus maliciously guessed for a while, but did not dare to offend this Higher Demon easily, so she explained with a smile.

The Red Spirit Estate trade fair had a long history. It would be held every 3 years. One could trade or exchange commodities including specialty products, materials, equipment and other types. It could attract a large number of outsiders every time. It was originally held in the Red Spirit City. Due to Kanita’s endeavour, it had been held in Town Moling since 20 years ago.

This was considered Josh’s care for the youngest son he most valued. It was also a balancing method for Joseph who was more economically powerful.

The trade fair was a centralized commodities trade fair. It was a relatively grand form of trade in the Demon Realm. The Demon Realm had no auction house or auction events. Chen Rui had long planned to set up an auction house in the Dark Moon. All preparations had been completed. He was just waiting for the right time.

Chen Rui thought of one thing. Last time, he swindled a lot of good stuff in the Crystal Valley. The materials of the second “Thunderous Sound” was basically complete except for 2 scarce materials. He also intended to make a scale armor that needed a lot of complementary materials. He wanted to see if he could gather all of them at this trade fair. Initially, he could go to the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanical Association to receive the master’s “benefits” or he could use the reward points of the last solved magic circle to redeem it, but “Master Arthur” was “missing” now. So, it was temporarily not suitable to reappear.

This scale armor was a last-minute idea after he had previously encountered Josh. The main material was the best crystal dragon scales from the crystal dragon, Jacob. Jacob even voluntarily gave these excellent dragon scales to Chen Rui at the time. If the crystal dragon thought of it now, he must be fuming with anger. Of course, compared with ancient runes slabs and the Fountain of Resurrection, the crystal dragon scale was nothing.

The crystal dragon had a unique talent of being immune to all magical powers. The nature of this scale armor had the effect of greatly reducing the power of magical elements. If it could be successfully made, plus his own [Anti-Magic] and [Damage Absorption] attributes, his winning rate against magicians like Josh would be greatly improved.

The trade fair would start 2 days later. For now, he better seizes the precious inspiration to realize the power of that destruction breath. After instructing not to be disturbed, Chen Rui went straight into his room, ignoring the intentional seduction of the waitress, which caused the succubus to scold “incompetent man” in her heart.

2 days later, Chen Rui walked out of the room, appearing energetic. Pressure was sometimes the best motivation. His gain was not small this time as his understanding of the destruction power was further improved.

Due to the trade fair, the people moving around in Town Moling suddenly increased. The streets became very lively. Chen Rui came to the trade fair venue. It was a huge open space. From a distance, it was full of people. There were four passages for entry and exit. There were soldiers guarding the entrance and exit. There were also patrolling guards inside to maintain the order.

This situation was somewhat similar to Chen Rui’s hometown on Earth. Every year, the trade fairs were held in the stadium. The merchants were foreign vendors, but most of them were selling fake goods and counterfeit items. Chen Rui once helped his grandpa to buy a pair of “Inner Mongolian yak leather shoes,” but the sole broke in less than 2 months.

When he walked into the trade fair, there were a lot of vendors indeed. Some were selling loudly, while some were hanging on a signboard to promote the goods sold or the items to be exchanged.

As Chen Rui walked for a while, he exuded a little breath to scare the two little thieves who messed with the wrong guy. He stopped in front of a deserted booth. The owner of this booth was a dark goblin. There were a lot of things, and some of them still look like historical antiques. Chen Rui had no interest in these so-called antiques. He was interested in a bottle of Bauhinia gum, which could be blended into the adhesive needed to make the scale armor.

“Sir is really discerning. This bottle of Bauhinia gum is from the best Bauhinia tree. It is 50 years old. It costs only 3 black crystal coins.”

The longer the Bauhinia year was, the stronger its adhesive. For Chen Rui’s usage, 50 years was enough, but the proposed price of this dark goblin was quite high. Although the 2 black crystal coins were really nothing Chen Rui, he suddenly missed the days when he bargained for a cabbage in that world. So, he shook his head, “3 black crystal coins are too expensive. I can pay at most 1 black crystal coin.”

The dark goblin suddenly widened his eyes, “Sir, this price is too low. The best offer can only be 10 purple crystal coins cheaper; this is already a regular customer price.”

“With 3 black crystal coins, it should include the snake tendon of that black spirit snake.”

“That is a rare complete snake tendon! The toughness is even stronger than that of a hydra! If you take both, I’ll give you a cheaper price. That will be 7 black crystal coins in total, no less!”

“4 black crystal coins. If you don’t want to sell them, then fine. I’ll go to other booths.” While Chen Rui said that, he looked like he was about to go.

“Wait! Sir, I’ll sell it to you!” The dark goblin sighed, “Sir is smarter than the smartest dark goblin!”

When Chen Rui took out 4 black crystal coins and saw the dark goblin’s gleaming eyes, he knew that he still paid more. In fact, his bargaining skill was not high. The one with great skill was the girlfriend of his university’s roommate. If she crossed over, she could probably buy them with 2 black crystal coins at most.

However, not to mention 4 black crystals, even if 4 or 5 zeros were added to the back, it was just a small case. Storage warehouses could categorize and “compress” similar items, plus the 4-star warehouse space was already huge, but only half of the space was left after storing the poison dragon’s treasure, the crystal dragon’s crystal mine plus Josh and his son’s “investment.”

If Chen Rui ran away now, he could freely corrupt himself for hundreds or thousands of years without a problem, but his goal was beyond that. If he wanted to get involved, he must be involved in a big game this time.

“Sir, what else do you need? Some good things are too inconvenient for me to display…” This profiteer already made a fortune with the black spirit snake tendons and Bauhinia gum, but he recommended some valuable antiques to Chen Rui. For example, the utensils used by some emperor and such, but Chen Rui was not really interested, so he stood up.

“Please wait! Sir!” Dark Goblin did not want this rare patron to leave. He revealed a mysterious look and carefully looked around before he took out a box from his pocket with three walnut-sized balls in it.

“These are called a ‘burst bombs’. They are said to be antiques found in a ruin. As long as the yellow crystal is activated with power, a terrible burst can occur. The person who sold me these had tested once and it could blow the ground out, forming a large pit of tens of meters. It is more powerful than ordinary magic. 3 bombs for a total of 10 black crystal coins only.”

An enhanced version of a grenade? However, in this world, this thing does not have much effect. A real powerhouse only needs one energy bomb or a magic to far exceed the effect of this thing. After the dark goblin repeatedly reminded him not to trigger the yellow crystals, Chen Rui picked up one and looked at it. Suddenly, his gaze was fixated.

On top of this ‘burst bomb’, countless tiny inscriptions were engraved on it; these were Dragon Inscription!

The effect of the inscription is actually multi-suppression. In other words, “a large pit of tens of meters” is the effect after the strong suppression by the inscription! This is not a burst bomb. According to the name on the inscription, it should be called ‘Zeray.’ If all the power is activated according to the context of the inscription, the power will be increased by at least 10 times! I don’t know which dragon family made this terrifying thing when they are bored, nor how many bombs has been wasted by those ignorant guys, but if this thing is used properly, it may become a life-saving treasure. Chen Rui’s eyes fell on a folded leather scroll at the bottom of the box again. The year looked relatively old. When he opened it, a strange expression flashed through his gaze, but he put it back to its place. The dark goblin quickly introduced, “This treasure map was handed down from my ancestors. It is said to record the location of the secret treasures of the Dead Sea. This secret treasure was left by the famous Dark Dragon Emperor in the Demon Realm hundreds of thousands of years ago. There are countless treasures and artifacts…”

Chen Rui showed a disapproving look, “It’s just an incomplete and broken map. Even if it is true, if you look at this, you need to get at least 5 or 6 more pieces to make it complete. If you make it complete, maybe you can also bluff people.”

The dark goblin smiled awkwardly, “This is indeed true, but a complete one… If I had one, do I still have to come here to set up a booth?”

Chen Rui nodded, “Are there any more burst bombs?”

“When I received it, there were only the last 3.”

“Well, I want the 3 burst bombs, together with this box and the incomplete map at the bottom. A total of 3 black crystal coins.”

The dark goblin was anxious. He reached out to grab the box, “This is definitely not enough! I spent more than 3 black crystal coins to collect these three things, not to mention the ancestral treasure map. If you sincerely want them, 10 black crystal coins. It must be no less than that.”

Chen Rui sneered when he demanded an exorbitant price, “This kind of alchemist’s stuff is extremely unstable, even if it is not triggered, it may explode! In case of any problems, the entire trade fair will be chaotic because of the explosion! You are selling this dangerous thing; as long as I shout, the patrolling guards will immediately arrest you.”

With that, Chen Rui glanced at the patrolling guards who were heading towards this side. The dark goblin was taken aback and quickly grabbed toward the box, but his attempt failed.

The profiteer looked disheartened, “Sir, 3 then! How unlucky am I? I have been attending trade fairs for more than 10 years, but it’s the first time I meet a customer like sir.”

“Stop pretending. I know you are not losing money.”

Chen Rui closed the box emotionlessly and left the booth, but there was a burst of ecstasy in his heart- This time I surely earned a lot. As long as the inscription restrictions of the 3 “Zeray” are unlocked, the power must be quite amazing. Even a Demon Emperor or Demon Overlord will be afraid of it. Not only that, the incomplete map was also a pleasant surprise because he already had 2 of this map. 1 was obtained from Dodo in the black rainforest, which should be left by the dead dragon, while the other was presented by Kanita a while ago when he met the little black horse. Plus this, it was 3 pieces.

The Dead Sea was in the extreme north of the Demon Realm. The sea was vast and dangerous. It was a well-known dangerous place. He wasn’t sure if the Dark Dragon Emperor’s treasure was true or not, but the map he got today seemed to be the middle part. In the storage warehouse, when the 3 incomplete treasure maps were put together, they actually merged into a whole, and even the edges of the seams were gone. Judging on its size, it seemed that there were still two pieces to complete it, but Chen Rui had no energy to focus on this now. Besides, there were some things that would not appear when you looked for it deliberately, but if you were lucky, it would automatically appear in front of you sometimes.

Chen Rui strolled one round at the trade fair, bought some materials, and returned to the hotel. The materials needed for “Thunderous Sound” were too scarce to be found at the trade fair, but the scale armor materials were complete. He needed to design it someday before starting.

The next was… still training.

Training, eating, sleeping, training… This cycle, although boring and monotonous, he did not intend to give up at all.

Josh was right in saying that, there was never reaping without sowing; especially power. In order to obtain it, he must be capable of something that others couldn’t.

No pain, no gain. This was true in any world.

Well, Chen Rui was kind of lucky to get the Super System, but I guess he still put some effort in gaining strength.

chapters.title: Chapter 325: Ally'S Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 325: Ally'S Decision

In the Dark Moon City’s arena.

The ancient arena was brightly lit, and the original broken parts had also been repaired. It was filled with people. Even in the strongest battle of the Higher Demons, Aguile vs Arux, there were not so many audiences.

Since the battle of the Dark Moon 400 years ago, this arena was full for the first time. Perhaps this lively scene which was full of vitality was a sign that the Fallen Angel Empire’s once most prosperous and largest estate had begun to recover?

The field was not a one-on-one contest as in the past, but a battle ball with a group of people.

About 2 months ago, a free battle game was held in the arena between the imperial guards and the garrison guard. From that time onwards, the Dark Moon people began to fall in love with this passionate and exciting sport. There was teamwork, personal glory and all kinds of splendor in the battle ball.

In that battle, the underdog garrison guard team actually defeated the imperial guards team by just one goal, and they were rewarded with 50 sets of high-quality armor. Since then, the arena had held a game once a week. Both sides had a fair share of victory and loss. Almost every game was full house. The battle ball had also become popular throughout the entire Dark Moon. Princess Royal Shea had deliberately used several abandoned areas on the corners of the city to build simple fields with basic magic circles setup for residents to use for free.

In addition to the large scale 11-player battles, the battle ball could also be used for 3-player and 5-player small-scaled competitions. In a flash, it became the most popular sport in the Dark Moon. There were even fights breaking out due to fighting for the use of the arena, so Shea had to send garrison guards to maintain order and act as a referee. For some time, the battle balls could be seen in all the streets.

The Princess Retail Store and the Cloak Gang’s magic store also launched several deluxe and ordinary versions of the battle ball. There were competition editions and popular versions which were sold at a reasonable price, so they sold like hot cakes. The battle ball was easy to learn, but it was not easy to master it. Particularly because the ball would absorb the power, kicking it was extremely laborious. It had virtually trained the combat power and the physique of the Dark Moon residents.

When the garrison guard’s dark elf striker received a header from his teammate across, he tapped his feet and leaped into the air. With a spin in the air, he shoved his leg, and a beautiful bicycle kick sent the ball rushing toward the top right corner of the goal. The imperial guard’s Great Demon goalkeeper’s reaction was slowed by half a beat initially, but he launched his talent skill in time. He teleported in front of the ball, and he hit the ball away to a distance in time.

Watching the ball fly away from the goal with an arc, a regretful voice sounded in the stands, especially the spectators who bet the guards to win. They clenched the tickets in their hands, wishing they could pinch the ball into the goal. At this time, a minotaur in the garrison guards’ frontcourt supported the feet of his Great Demon teammate with both hands and threw him up with all his strength. Then Great Demon jumped high with the power of his companion. This jump was more than 3 meters high. If it was not for the gravity magic circle in the field, he would have jumped higher. The Great Demon launched a whip leg in the air, and volleyed hard on the high-flying battle ball.

The flying battle ball dashed in a straight line under the 2 blows, and whizzed toward the goal like a meteor. The opposing goalkeeper just used up his teleportation, so it was on cooldown for a short time. He tried his best to save the ball, but he was a step slower. The goal was penetrated by this powerful supplementary shot. When the battle ball crossed the goal line, it burned like a flame and dazzled brightly. This meant that the garrison guard team finally led by 5-4 points.

This goal excited the audience. Claps, sighs, cheers and even scolding sounds were intertwined. The entire arena was filled with a fanatical atmosphere.

On the VIP table, Joseph frowned after watching all of this: The battle ball is really a troublesome thing. It could actually cause such a craze. Judging from the performance of the garrison guard today that is different from the past, their combat power has greatly increased under Athena’s training. During the period of the fight with Kanita in Town Mordo, Dark Moon’s changes seem to be quite large. Not just the battle power, the economic strength is also growing rapidly. This is a big problem for the Red Spirit Estate, which is tasked with the mission of weakening and controlling the Dark Moon. Not only that, due to the intervention of the Shadow Empire’s Custer Family, the Fallen Angel Empire’s food sanction that was initially enough to put the city in dire situation had little effect on the Dark Moon. The Custer Family is the top business family in the Dark Shadow Empire, so this move is likely to be approved by the Dark Shadow Empire’s Empress Catherine. On the surface, the regent King Obsidian who is less powerful than her really can’t do anything about it. However, it is impossible to truly get rid of the dependence on food with the inherited barren land of the Dark Moon. Moreover, with Shea’s wisdom and talent, she should know that the Dark Shadow Empire’s trade or “assistance” to the Dark Moon will also have a far-reaching purpose; these should be expedient measures… While thinking about it, a soft voice suddenly came to his ears, “My friend, you seem to be troubled by something?”

The long-lost familiar voice made Joseph startled slightly. His eyes flashed in horror as he looked around, but he didn’t find a figure wearing a cloak.

Joseph thought for a moment and did not continue to watch the game. He stood up and left.

Getting out of the noisy arena, Joseph turned here and there all the way to a deserted alley. He didn’t feel anyone behind him, but under the purple moonlight, he could clearly see an elongated shadow behind him- Illusion? Or… As soon as Joseph turned around without warning, he saw a black figure wearing a cloak behind him. Joseph tapped his feet and jumped into the air. A fiery flame lit on his fist as he rushed toward the black figure like lightning.

The black shadow didn’t evade or give in, but he stretched out a finger toward Joseph’s fist. Joseph seemed shocked for a moment, and he suddenly changed into a combat form. His body was covered in flames while the power of his fist suddenly doubled.

Facing Joseph’s changes, the black figure didn’t react to it. He still pointed a finger toward him. In the blink of an eye, when the fist and finger made contact, a figure flew out suddenly, staggering a few steps before standing firm. The person was surprisingly Joseph.

Joseph’s face showed unbelievable shock. I’ve changed into combat form and punched with all my might, yet I was repulsed by just the power of the opponent’s finger! Joseph’s punch wasn’t meant to kill this guy wearing a cloak. He had the intention to test and show his power, but he was unexpectedly shocked by the opponent.

“Who the hell are you?” Joseph showed a vigilant look. This man’s strength far exceeded my expectations. In this secluded place, if he has any evil intentions, I’m afraid that I’m in great danger. “My friend, have you forgotten me?” The familiar voice came from the cloak. “This is really a sad thing.”

“Aguile!” Joseph was shocked, It really was him! However, this Beelzebub Royal Family was only the power of Demon King level previously, which is similar to me, but now… “The peak of Demon King level. You really improved a small realm.” The man in cloak praised, “It seems that the effect of a devil fruit is not bad, but its benefit is more importantly the breakthrough in the large realm. I believe that you can further advance in the future.”

This compliment sounded more like a sarcasm to Joseph, but the other party quickly explained, “Compared with my readily-available power from awakening, your progress is already quite fast. ”

Joseph soon recovered his calmness and showed a habitual smile, “It seems that sir’s awakened power has reached the Great Demon King level. This is really worth congratulating. ”

“It’s more difficult to have an awakening as I go to a higher level. I’m stuck on the Demon Emperor seal now.” Chen Rui sighed and diverted from the topic, “You have been a very busy man in Town Mordo during this time. You haven’t been back to the Dark Moon for a long time right? What do you think of the Dark Moon changes? I have used some small tricks. Even if someone passes by, they can’t hear our conversation.”

Joseph heard that the level of “Aguile” had reached the peak of the Great Demon King and was hitting the Demon Emperor level seal. Once he reached the Demon Emperor level, he was equivalent to stepping into the ranks of real powerhouses. His father, Josh, was now just a Demon Emperor only. It seems like I have found a great ally in the first place; Aguile can definitely be put into good use. However, Joseph was self-aware that his current strength had fallen by a big margin from that of the opponent. Once the opponent reached the Demon Emperor, Aguile might not acknowledge a weak ally like him, so he must ensure himself to be of great value to the opponent when Aguile had a good value so that he could get more benefits.

“Whether it is combat power or economic strength, the Dark Moon’s improvement is quite rapid. Fortunately, the historical problem of barren land cannot be solved. Otherwise, even my father’s Red Spirit Estate cannot control it.” Joseph showed doubts, “As far as I know, the Dark Moon’s most popular night market currently comes from the Cloak Gang. My friend, may I ask what is your plan? I don’t want our plans to clash with each other.

“I once said that the first step is to get the Dark Moon. Of course, I don’t want a barren and broken place as the foundation for my own start! The stronger and more prosperous it is, the better for me.” Chen Rui’s voice was full of confidence, “Although the ownership of the Princess Retail Store and the night market is still under the control of the Princess Royal, as long as the time is ripe, I have full confidence to take over all the resources in Shea’s hands, perhaps even including the proud Princess Royal herself.”

“It’s just that my identity is the leader of the Cloak Gang to the outsiders. I shouldn’t easily expose it for the time being. I need a spokesperson who can do all this on the surface. My friend, I think you are the most suitable candidate. ”

Spokesperson? Joseph’s eyes lit up, but the other party’s next words made his heart race, “But before that, there is a very important information that I must tell you. As my ally and perhaps also the future controller of the Red Spirit, one of the biggest difficulties is already in front of you now. If you don’t solve this problem… I’m afraid you will lose your competitiveness to Kanita completely.”

“Wasn’t Kanita particularly flamboyant some time ago? Meanwhile, you have repeatedly adopted an evasive strategy, even tolerating the granary fire. The purpose of this is to use your own economic strength to knock down your opponents step by step, right?” Chen Rui looked at the irregular changes on Joseph’s face as he said with confidence, “Don’t question my intel ability. As a bystander, I’m more sober than the two of you who are immersed in the situation. I’ll say it frankly, your biggest crisis is coming, my friend.”

Joseph was secretly startled as he asked, “I admit that I used delaying tactics, but is your biggest crisis a bit exaggerated?”

“Not at all!” Chen Rui’s voice became solemn, “The cause of this incident was a human who came to the Demon Realm! This human brought an important opportunity for Kanita, which would allow him to obtain a steady stream of wealth. According to my intel analysis, Kanita’s income may exceed 1 million black crystal coins in the first month alone. This is just the beginning as this figure will increase exponentially in the future! If this continues, you should know better than me about the consequences.”

“1 million in a month! It will increase exponentially in the future!” Joseph was much more sensitive in this regard, so his complexion suddenly changed. In fact, Joseph was also skeptical of Kanita’s recent movements, and he also had a lot of clues. “Aguile’s” information should not be false. It also confirmed some vague speculations in his heart; the were shocking speculations.

The other party was right. If it continued to develop like this, his greatest financial advantage would become worthless in the face of Kanita. It was almost equivalent to losing the ability to compete with Kanita for the lord position.

Joseph managed to calm himself down and asked, “What is the origin of this human? Why would he help Kanita?”

“I’m not very clear, it should not be a simple help, but a kind of mutually-beneficial trade between the two parties. The worst thing is that when I confirmed this information, Kanita had already taken this human to the Red Spirit City, and it seemed that he even got your father’s support. I have no doubt that your father has also become a beneficiary of this transaction. Your current situation is quite dangerous.”

These news were like a series of heavy punches which almost stupefied Joseph. With his wisdom, he would never realize the crisis only when he was doomed. In fact, it was now a very critical juncture. Kanita unexpectedly obtained a massive financial source, and it was even shared with his father, Josh. No matter in terms of benefits or the contribution, it almost forced him to the edge of the cliff.

“That human seems to have the ability to shuttle between the Demon Realm and the human world. I once approached him secretly, but unfortunately, with my current status and position, I cannot gain the trust of the other party, nor can I get more relevant information. Moreover, I dare not act rashly because of the power of that human. He should have reached Demon Emperor level. ”

Demon Emperor! This disappointed some of the last assassination thoughts that Joseph had, and there was a desperation in his heart.

“I think there is only one way to get rid of this dilemma now.”

“What’s the solution? Please tell me!” The words of his “ally” gave Joseph a little hope.

“The Red Spirit Lord collaborates with a spy from the human world. If the capital knows about this, it should be a crime that can’t be ignored.” The laughter behind the cloak sounded evil, “Even if the crime can be explained clearly, the benefits within will definitely not be exclusively enjoyed by Josh and Kanita. If 2 people share a bottle of wine, each person can get two glasses. If it is 20 people, then everyone cannot even get a small cup. Not to mention, the Regent Obsidian will definitely drink the most while you may be able to get a small cup too. Even if it is not shared with you, it is also a great merit. If you can get the recognition and support of Prince Obsidian, with your identity as the eldest son of the Red Spirit Lord, in the future… Anyway, if you can control the Red Spirit, it is also very beneficial to my plan. ”

Joseph’s eyes became brighter and brighter, and a decision was finally made in his heart.

Using Joseph to go against his father! And Chen Rui just had watched them crumble on their own…

chapters.title: Chapter 326: The Maid'S Seduction
chapters.body:
Chapter 326: The Maid'S Seduction

In the air.

A graceful figure stood on the back of a flying wyvern, closing her eyes and spreading her arms as she seemed to enjoy the feeling of being blown by the wind in the sky.

Kia was a Demon King-level magician with wind and fire element specializations, so even if she lost her balance and fell down, she could rely on flying skills or [Feather Fall] to be safe. Despite knowing this, Chen Rui carefully supported her waist.

Nobody knew if this careful measure had any ulterior motives.

In fact, the most important purpose of Chen Rui’s return to the Dark Moon this time was to use Joseph to complete an important part of the plan. Also, he wanted to have an intimate time with Athena, who was newly married to him, but Athena said, “it’s not possible for her body these few days.” As a wet blanket was thrown to him, his enthusiasm was dropped by half. Then Athena inadvertently proposed to “take Kia with him” when he said he was going to Mountain Xilang.

Chen Rui vaguely understood that Athena was taking this opportunity to match him and Kia. Watching her put on a generous front yet unable to hide her jealousy, he couldn’t help but to hug her in his arms while comforting her for a while.

Is a woman who is not jealous still considered a woman? No matter how generous a woman is, she is also a woman. Jealousy means care. In any case, I shouldn’t waste Athena’s kind intention. Therefore, Kia took a few days off for the reason of not feeling well. Alice was very considerate to her subordinates, so she agreed without hesitation. The most important thing was that little loli didn’t know that Chen Rui was back. Otherwise, there would definitely be a third wheeler in this trip.

“Master, your hand… is misbehaving?” The little tail at Kia’s buttocks under her maid’s attire suddenly hit Chen Rui’s hand. It turned out that the hand holding her waist moved unconsciously down a distance.

“Well, I’m distracted.” Chen Rui grinned. I was a little distracted indeed, but this part was more convenient also. Both of them were quite powerful. Although they were flying at a high altitude, their speech was still very clear, and they were not affected by the wind at all.

“Can you stand up?” Kia stretched her arms out. “The little princess told me that when you took her to fly last time, you accompanied her to play a very intimate game of the Titanic… I also want to be that ‘Rose’.”

When she mentioned the Titanic and Rose [1], Chen Rui was speechless. It seemed that little loli also deliberately showed off in front of Kia. From the word “intimate”, it was likely that she exaggerated the facts.

However, Chen Rui would definitely not refuse Kia’s request. He stood up, supported her shoulders while maintaining a distance. He chuckled and said, “This is how Alice played that day…”

“Then, this is with my Kia today…” As he said it, he stuck up close and hugged the succubus’ waist, “This is true intimacy.”

“You don’t have to explain it deliberately,” Kia said with a chuckle, “There is a saying that says the explanation is to cover up. In fact, I can see that the little princess likes you very much.”

“She’s still young, so she doesn’t understand anything. She’s just fooling around.” Chen Rui’s face was suddenly bitter.

“Little princess is not young anymore. In fact, according to her age, it is already possible to marry someone.” Kia leaned on him gently, “Little princess is a very good person. She has been very nice to me all these years…Alright, let’s not talk about this , Jack?”

“Can you not say the word Jack [2]?” Chen Rui almost wanted to roll his eyes, but he still hugged Kia’s waist anyhow. The wind in the high air was cold and breezy, and the two people who were close to each other could feel each other’s warmth and even heartbeat.

Kia turned around, and Chen Rui wouldn’t evade this time like how he did with little loli. Instead, he stepped up and met the attractive red lips of the succubus. It was just a brief moment but Kia’s body was fiery.

After flying for only a moment, the succubus leaned gently in Chen Rui’s arms. To prevent his little maid from falling, some unscrupulous master’s hand responsibly “protected” her chest. The maid’s face suddenly turned red, but she didn’t resist; just giggling. At this height and riding on the wyvern’s back, it was obviously not suitable to have further progress, but it was certainly indispensable to take advantage of the opportunity.

“It’s getting late, let’s rest in the green leaves forest in front tonight.”

Chen Rui made the wyvern slow down and landed in front of a small house.

Kia showed a strange expression, “Someone lives in this remote woods? Why did we land in front of this house?

Chen Rui looked at the humble log cabin, and his heart filled with warmth, “This is the small house I built with Athena when I came to Mountain Xilang previously. At that time, she didn’t know my power, and she only treated me like a powerless ordinary human…”

Kia looked at the tenderness on his face as a hint of envy flashed in her eyes, biting her lips gently, “You really love Athena. I… can’t help being jealous.”

“You don’t know what happened to me and her in Mountain Xilang.” Chen Rui shook his head, “ Oh , we have been flying for so long today, you must also be hungry. Let’s eat something first.”

“Yep…” Chen Rui did not enter the small room belonging to him and Athena, but took out a tent instead.

When Chen Rui and Christina were in the Silent Night Wetland, he was impressed by her magical tent. Later, after Chen Rui became a trio-specialized master, he referred to the precious notes obtained from the Mechanical Association and mastered the method of making this small living space. Later in the Crystal Valley, he used those “free” rare resources and spent a lot of effort to create a tent by himself. The function of this tent was more complete, the space inside was larger, table and chair beds were available and one could observe the external environment clearly. It also had the effects of soundproof, self-camouflage, warning magic circle, and so on. It could be regarded as the best prop to sleep outside.

When Kia walked into the tent curiously and looked at the situation inside, she looked amazed. Chen Rui made the food and juice that she likes on the table like a magic trick; they even looked very fresh. This was attributed to the wonderful function of the storage warehouse.

After enjoying a romantic candlelight dinner, Chen Rui cuddled Kia on the carpet. As he turned on the observation function of the tent, they could directly see the sky from the inside as though the top was transparent.

“It’s beautiful.” Kia lay comfortably in his arms while looking up at the moon and stars. “This is the most beautiful night view I’ve ever seen since I was born.”

“Don’t comment too early,” Chen Rui caressed the succubus’ hair lovingly. “There will be more beauty in the future.”

“I know. Because my ordeal is over.” Kia’s eyes flashed with tears, “I believe if my mother knows about this, she will be very happy too.”

“Yes, have you seen the stars in the sky? She has become one of them, watching and guarding you forever.”

Kia stared at the stars in the night sky, seemingly looking for the one belonging to his mother, Freya.

“We humans have a lot of legends about the stars. That one looks a little like the Perseus constellation. The story goes like this, there is a brave man named Perseus…”

Chen Rui, the human being, actually referred to the Earth. He had no memory of the legends about the human world. The so-called constellations were also directly copied or even indiscriminately adapted, but Kia listened to it eagerly. Unconsciously, her sorrow just now has quietly subsided.

“Perseus dares to fight the gods for his beloved woman…” Kia’s tone seemed very surprised. In this world, the gods were almighty. Even the strongest Demon Overlord must creep and tremble under the will of God, but it had gradually become a legend because it had appeared for a long time, but no one doubts their existence because in the eternal life of the gods, it was not surprising to sleep for tens of thousands or hundreds of thousands of years.

“For me, I will do it without hesitation. Do you believe me?”

“I believe.” Kia looked into his eyes. “The reality is the best proof, and you don’t need to prove anything anymore. I know… you will face many dangers next, and I may not be able to help you ,but I hope you can take good care of yourself for Athena and for me. Promise me, you will always accompany me to see more beautiful night views in the future. Always, okay?”

“I promise you.”

Kia’s eyes twitched, revealing a charming smile, “I know that master is a very clever imposter. A little trick almost deceived everyone, but you must not lie to Kia about this. Otherwise, even if you go to another world, I will also find master to get even with you.”

“Sure…” Chen Rui clearly felt the sentiment in Kia’s words. Compared with Athena’s last symbiotic contract which directly proposed life and death together, this expression was more subtle and tactful, but the strong emotions were the same.

“The story just now is so nice…” Kia turned sideways and changed to a more comfortable posture. “However, I still want to listen to your story with Athena… Just the last one tonight, okay?”

That coquettish tone had a strange seduction force which made Chen Rui’s heart burning, and a certain part suddenly erected and he almost couldn’t hold it. He slapped the high buttocks of the succubus gently, “You actually used your charm talent!”

“Master, I’m wrong.” Although Kia begged for mercy verbally, her tempting body wriggled gently in his arms like a seductive and beautiful snake without any signs of repentance, “Master, when you finished the story, you can… punish me anyway you want, alright?”

Still using her talent. She is really a demon that seduces people without compromising… Chen Rui had to use the calmness he trained in [Refined Mind]. After taking a deep breath and suppressing the idea of punishing the demon girl on the spot, he told everything that happened to him and Athena in Mountain Xilang last time.

At first, Chen Rui was also distracted by Kia’s seduction, but he was later devoted to the role. Kia listened attentively, and had already put away her charm talent. When she listened to the thrilling part, although she knew that it would be fine later, she still could not help holding Chen Rui’s hand tightly.

“I really can’t compare to Athena,” Kia said after hearing Chen Rui’s story. “I now understand why she is unique in your heart.”

“You’re also a unique Kia in my heart.” Chen Rui sighed, “You two are excellent and attractive women just like treasures, but I’m greedy and still uncontent with having one… wronging you two.”

“Master…” Kia stared into Chen Rui’s eyes, “You’re really a fool… but a really reassuring and attractive fool.”

“Don’t call me master, you are your real master. I won’t force you to do anything.” Chen Rui stroked the delicate curved horn on her head. The pair of curved horns, the small wings and tail behind added a different kind of charm to the succubus.

“You don’t understand that my heart is truly peaceful and free only by your side. Otherwise, as before, even if I leave faraway, my soul will still be imprisoned by the shackles. I don’t want to compete for attention and status with anyone. I just want to be a little maid who is always by your side, enjoying this tranquility and freedom.” Kia’s eyes was blurry, “No matter how many wives you have, you only have one maid, Kia, okay?”

“You don’t have to be like this, I said you are also unique.” Chen Rui looked at Kia’s persistent expression and sighed, “Since you are free, then follow your wishes. Anyway, you and Athena are my wives in my heart.”

Kia had an unprecedented satisfaction upon hearing the word ‘wife’. She chuckled, “It’s just me and Athena? Master seems to be not honest enough, I heard Athena say… You seem to have a close woman in the Dark Shadow Empire…”

Chen Rui sweated secretly, Athena even told this to Kia, is it a united front in advance? It seems that any woman becomes smarter when she encounters this kind of thing. “This is another story.” Kia’s eyes became charming, and Chen Rui felt that the beauty in his arms began to wriggle again. “I am not a greedy person. The story time tonight is over. Next… it seems like I have to accept punishment from the master.”

Just as she finished saying that, a male part that was just calmed down soon was full of strength suddenly. Chen Rui could be sure that the succubus did not use her charm talent, but… men were indeed creatures that couldn’t withstand seduction.

In the midst of his wild thoughts, the beautiful snake in his arms had gradually moved to the rapidly expanding part. She gently untied the restraint, and the objects exposed in the air was more high, and the two groups of plump white weapons tightly clamped the object. The end was even wrapped in a stream of warmth. This wonderful feeling could hardly be described by words, and Chen Rui almost had a kind of indisputable feeling to groan.

It took a long time for Kia’s “Woo” sounds to become a gasping, charming voice, “Master, did i do better than Athena?”

At this time… she stil didn’t forget to compare this kind of thing? Chen Rui was a little speechless, but it was undeniable that although Kia had only accumulated several relevant experiences with him, the special talent inheritance of the succubus family had made little maid’s skill improved fast. Not to mention, this service, Athena… seems to haven’t tried it yet. Of course, Chen Rui would not belittle Athena in front of Kia, and he did not want to explore this kind of question at such a critical moment. He answered vaguely, “Athena also did well, and you two… did well.”

“Praising another woman in front of a woman? Master is really foolish…”

Kia’s was short of breath and flushing, apparently in an extremely emotional state as well. After confirming that the ring on Chen Rui’s finger had been put on, she asked with a charming gaze, “Speaking of that, Kia is not a real woman yet… Can master help Kia?”

Patreon community goal report: 32% 🎉

As a man, besides the words ‘beast burning desires’, what else could be said at this moment?

[1] Chinese pronunciation is equivalent to shredded meat.

[2] Chinese pronunciation is equivalent to thief.

chapters.title: Chapter 327: For Future Happiness
chapters.body:
Chapter 327: For Future Happiness

The next day, when the faint cold glow of the two moons became the warmest, Chen Rui opened his eyes and looked at the still-sleeping stunner in his arms. The scene of indulgence last night appeared in his mind once again.

As the only all-female family of the Demon Realm, the succubus family’s talents and physique couldn’t be compared with even the royal family women in terms of men and women’s intimacy. However, Chen Rui, who had gained the power of the dragon, was obviously more powerful in certain aspects. It was the succubus maid’s first time, so she was conquered several times in a row. Finally, she couldn’t take it anymore and laid in his arms.

Despite this, Kia’s first time left a deep impression on Chen Rui. The unrelenting service and pleasing made Chen Rui felt especially pitiful.
