Although your level of physical strength can only barely be regarded as early of the Demon Emperor.” The fairy dragon explained in detail, “You must remember that a real territory is not an illusion state or force field created by your own power. It is a “world” that is self-centered, uses natural power, and combines various qualities such as will, strength, and spirit. It is a ‘world’ perfectly structured with various qualities. Every territory is a unique piece of art no matter how strong or weak it is…”

“Okay, slowly launch your territory now. Then use my elemental pressure to feel the existence of that kind of space.”

As the true powerhouse at peak of the Demon Overlord and the top magician of the Demon Realm, Zola’s views on the territory were naturally unique. Some explanations were similar to those of Paglio, but some had taken a different approach by depicting the territory’s mystery more clearly from a research perspective. Coupled with the special magic circle effect, Chen Rui had a new understanding and knowledge on the [Autumn Territory] especially in terms of control.

Zola was very satisfied with Chen Rui’s progress. She then said, “Through some rare ancient data and my understanding of ancient runes, the God powerhouse’s territory is different from Demon Overlords and Demon Emperors. It’s not just the use of nature’s power to structure a scene. It’s the existence of life instead. This kind of life can provide a powerful power of faith. It is called the [Kingdom of God]…” Faith life? God’s Kingdom?

Territory? World?

Chen Rui seemed to faintly grasp some keywords, but was unable to determine what it was specifically. He fell into deep thought suddenly.

After a long while, he finally shook his head. However, he believed that after these inspirations slowly gather and accumulate, some kind of epiphany will eventually arise. By then, he could truly master a higher level of realm and power.

Chen Rui dissipated the territory power and walked out of the magic circle tiredly. Seeing the faint fatigue on the face of the fairy dragon, he couldn’t help saying, “Ms. Zola, thank you.”

This sentence was the most genuine and sincere sentence he had said since he came to the Rainbow Valley. Whether it was the knowledge of ancient runes, or the experience of space magic and territory, Zola had taught him unreservedly. At least she treated him as a real assistant at these moments.

“I just want to get a territory experiment subject…” the fairy dragon whispered.

“What?” Chen Rui did not hear clearly.

“What?” The same sentence copying started again. She was a pro in faking daze.

“Although Chen Rui did not hear what she said just now, he could infer from Zola’s expression that it was definitely not a good thing.

“Ms Zola.”

“ Huh? “

“Can the demon-breaking test be cancelled for a while? I really can’t bear it…”

“ Huh? ” (Continue staying, pretending not to hear)

“Why are you so enthusiastic about the devil-breaking experiment? You must conduct an experiment every day?”

The fairy dragon did not pretend to be foolish this time. Instead, she said seriously, “Because I have a fatal enemy who is immune to magic. I must try to crack his immune physique.”

Chen Rui knew that she was talking about the crystal dragon Jacob. His thoughts shifted, “Immune to magic? It is a very troublesome enemy indeed, especially to you. However, even if the enemy is immune to magic, you can also use magic to cause physical damage to deal with him. For example, explosion, impact, collapse, and other effects. The more I learn the ancient runes, the more I feel that the mysteries are endless. Once I can master these mysteries, it is equivalent to cracking the physical power of God-level powerhouses. I’m pretty confident to deal with your enemy. So now the focus should be on the ancient runes. If you trust me, then I hope to help you deal with him by then.”

The sentence behind ‘so’ were his true intentions of beating around the bushes. There were no lack of attempts to take advantage of the opportunity to gain benefits.

The fairy dragon was not a fool. She nodded initially, but then she frowned slightly. Recalling Chen Rui’s recent words kept mentioning the ancient runes, she couldn’t help showing a hint of suspicion.

Chen Rui vigilantly discovered the different expression of the fairy dragon. Originally, the origin of the 2 ancient runes stone slabs was very “coincident.” If the fairy dragon connected and thought about it, she might follow it all the way and feel something fishy.

In order to divert Zola’s attention, Chen Rui immediately showed a frustrated look, “I knew I was useless, I was just doing my best for you. In fact, in your eyes, I’m just a weak fool… who can’t do anything.”

“I have actually considered a question for a long time. I want to leave here for a while. I will come back to study after I regain my confidence.” (Playing cat-and-mouse game shamelessly. However the capital’s plan almost succeeded and I have to go, so I better set the stage for a future show.)

It was an important juncture for the experiment now, especially in the aspect of the ancient runes. The insights raised by Chen Rui from time to time had also benefited Zola. Of course, she refused to give up Chen Rui who carried the title of good assistant which came with a series of part-time jobs.

Seeing the depression of her sir assistant, Zola blinked. Unexpectedly, she did not activate the usual fake daze attribute. Instead, she said with certainty, “You’re wrong!”

“You’re by no means a fool who can’t do anything, but a… uhm …very good man” In order to make her assistant recover his fighting spirit, Ms Fairy Dragon thought for a while and used all the rare words of praise that were hidden. “Loves knowledge; have wisdom and ability; have the spirit of research; takes care of people…”

Did I hear that right? This is talking about me? Chen Rui looked at Ms Fairy Dragon with some surprise.

After listing the advantages of the sir assistant who was also a chef, handyman and experiment subject, Ms Zola changed her tone, “It can be said that you are the most suitable long-term experiment subject… Uh , no, an ideal life partner. You once said that you admire my knowledge and beauty. In fact, I feel good about you too. Unfortunately…”

Speaking of ‘unfortunately’, the fairy dragon shook her head regretfully and did not go on. There are many reasons behind ‘unfortunately’. For instance, too short lifespan, too weak power, not being a dragon, and so on. Without these ‘unfortunately,’ this man should be a long-term experiment subject… uhm, a suitable candidate as a husband. For the first time in so many years, I have met such a like-minded (self-assumption) man.

Although there was an ‘unfortunately’ in the end, the words in front were enough to make Chen Rui stunned.

What?

What?

Why?

Illusion? Hallucination? Is my auditory parts broken today?

After carefully discovering a fascinating blush on Ms Zola’s face, Chen Rui suddenly felt dizzy.

Not an illusion!

Has cupid struck? Or the power of the protagonist’s halo?

Wait! Calm down! Analyse it calmly!

There seems to be a keyword in those words just now?

Unfortunately? No! Marry you? No! There is a more critical keyword!

Right… It’s “long term experiment subject”!

Chen Rui suddenly shuddered. These 4 words were enough to make Ms. Zola’s other moving words turn into ashes.

It turns out that the criteria for choosing a spouse for the fairy dragon is actually a long-term meal ticket, a long-term servant and a long-term experiment subject!

If she really fell for me, wouldn’t my whole life…

Damn! Let’s hurry up and finish the ancient runes!

Ms Fairy Dragon’s remarks were intended to inspire the fighting spirit of her sir assistant. In the end, she blushed faintly. She actually said her life partner… However, unfortunately it was impossible indeed.

Well, this passage can be considered as my sacrifice for future experiments and research.

Next, this man’s response should be uplifted? Touched? Obsessed? Intoxicated?

For some reasons, although her subjective consciousness had decided it was impossible, she was secretly looking forward to seeing the man’s touched expression.

Some females had common problems regardless of race or power.

However… this guy’s reaction was dumbfounded, “What?”

“……”

“…”

(Asshole man, how dare you imitate me! How dare you ignore me!)

“Zig zig zig…” (Sound of manic electric current)

(Screaming)

“ Zig zig zig …”

(Weak scream)

“ Zig zig …”

(The coke-shaped man was been unable to scream)

At this time, Shea of the Dark Moon City was quietly listening to the report of the imperial guard commander, Kaguron. What Kaguron reported was a new magical message from the capital. Old Gauss, who represented the Dark Moon Estate at the lord meeting, was refused attendance. He was expelled from the capital by the regent.

This should have been bad news, but Shea did not panic at all as if everything was expected. However, Kaguron was surprised that a trace of joy seemed to flash past Princess Royal’s face. There were some other emotions that he couldn’t understand, but he didn’t dare to ask more. He bowed and retreated.

The emotions that Kaguron couldn’t understand were a mixture of exhilaration, high-spirited, excitement. There was also admiration, appreciation and a little longing for someone.

In addition to Chen Rui himself, the person who knew the plan most clearly was Shea. Old Gauss was refused from participating in the lord meeting. This meant that Obsidian had fully believed Chen Rui. Obsidian publicly proposed a large-scale fundraising plan at the lord meeting and the Dark Moon would not get any “benefits”.

Although the capital’s restrictions on the Dark Moon were becoming stronger, the current situation of the Dark Moon’s rapid development could no longer be suppressed by simple sanctions. Under the transformation of the magic powder, the crop problem that had plagued the Dark Moon for thousands of years had been successfully resolved. The barren land had been transformed into a high-yielding and efficient “magic land”. The amount of food accumulated at present would be enough to sustain for 2-3 years even if there was a war. The problem was, it still claimed to rely on the Red Spirit’s “aid” and the Dark Shadow Empire’s Custer Family’s food trade.

These magic lands were only in secret food bases. Once the time was right and the magic lands spread throughout the Dark Moon, then the Dark Moon Estate, which had always been short of food, would become the largest food production base of the Demon Realm.

Economically, a series of carefully prepared facilities and measures had come in handy due to the treasure hunting boom. After the Dark Moon’s various favorable policies such as abundant resources and low tax rates were widely known to the Demon Realm via free marketing, more and more merchants appeared in the Dark Moon. Not only the Custer Family, but also business families from other empires. There were also numerous individual merchants. Even if the treasure craze faded, the Dark Moon was still a favorable place in the eyes of the merchants.

As a brand, the Princess Retail Store’s business was very prosperous. It had signed agreements with many places, so more and more branches had begun to appear. The momentum of the night market had maintained a high standard of steadily rising, while other shops had gradually stabilized. Only the auction house was still very popular. Each auction item was spontaneously inflated to a rocket-high price by the competitive demons. According to Chen Rui’s previous speculation, it would probably take some time before it could gradually become rational.

The situation of the Dark Moon was no longer like the time when the economic lifeline was fully controlled by Red Spirit Estate’s representative, Joseph. On the contrary, after the defection of the Mellon Family, Joseph’s chamber of commerce had been completely suppressed. According to someone’s strategy, the power in Joseph’s hands would also be taken over by the Dark Moon sooner or later.

As long as she cooperated with the Cloak Gang’s Aguile in a play, the entire Dark Moon’s economy would be completely in her hands.

Compared with the economy, the development of military power was also very smooth. The garrison guards, which was originally a weak spot, had seemed to be a completely different team after Athena’s training. The battle ball had also played a big role. Not only was the arena a full house on every game, the garrison guards and imperial guards competed against each other. Shea took the opportunity to launch an internal military-style exercise competition. As a result, the imperial guards who were overwhelmed on the battle ball severely abused the garrison guard once. The garrison guard naturally refused to admit defeat. Under the leadership of Athena and Arux, they trained fiercely. In this healthy competition, the army’s combat power was increasing day by day.

Last time Chen Rui brought a large amount of high-quality iron ore from Mountain Xilang. The Cloak Gang’s craftsmen had created a very sophisticated equipment, especially the 7-shot crossbow newly invented by the Cloak Gang’s craftsman, minotaur Tonk. After being enchanted with a certain magic effect, it had astonishing lethality. It was one of the Dark Moon’s secret weapons.

Of course, the biggest secret weapon was the wyvern legion in the black rainforest. The area had long been blocked by various magic circles as a military restricted area. Everything was proceeding suspensefully and orderly according to the plan.

According to Chen Rui’s plan, the strength of the army was still in its infancy. It would take quite a while to lay the groundwork and then grow further. As that the biggest plan was approaching success now, the capital would be greatly injured by the time, and all the estates would attack Obsidian. The Dark Moon could use the precious time to continue its rapid development in order to grow stronger while the enemy became weaker. At that time, they could unite with various estates to launch a real challenge to the capital.

This was Chen Rui’s original plan. Although numerous adjustments had been made so far, the general direction remained the same. Moreover, Obsidian had been successfully lured into the trap. All these were the human’s contribution.

Shea could imagine how much effort and rish he had faced. Even though he made her unconsciously “angry” almost every time they met, there was an uncontrollable yearning when she couldn’t see him.

In fact, I miss the duo waltz under the moonlight…

Actually, I’m looking forward to those 3 words…

Actually, I really want to see that guy.

This is… how it feels to like someone?

chapters.title: Chapter 366: The Most Expensive Longevity Potion In The History
chapters.body:
Chapter 366: The Most Expensive Longevity Potion In The History

In contrast to Shea’s self-confidence, Joseph’s mood was gloomy.

His chamber of commerce had been continuously pushed aside by the joint chamber of commerce represented by the Custer Family. The Mellon Family suddenly defied him. Coupled with the suppression of Shea, there was less and less room of development for him in the Dark Moon Estate. Not only that, on the Red Spirit Estate side, he was almost unable to ward off Kanita’s various methods. These methods should be instructed by his father, Josh. It was obviously a punishment for him for divulging the secret to the capital.

The bad internal and external situations made Joseph lose his appetite and sleep restlessly. If this continues, the foundation that took years of painstaking management would become weaker and weaker. It would collapse sooner or later. The only hope of turning over now was the plan of his ally, “Aguile”.

Joseph had stimulated the conflict with Shea gradually according to the plan of “Aguile”. He even deliberately showed a stance of being forced to the edge. This had also made many small families who had seen the bad situation to follow the example of Mellon Family. They openly or secretly began to show goodwill toward Princess Royal.

Of course, the real foundation that Joseph had accumulated over the years was far from this level. If he was determined to fight a protracted battle with Shea, he could last for at least 10 years. However, this kind of passive situation of dying in a struggle was obviously not what Joseph wanted to see. Not only did he have to survive this difficulty, but he also had to turn the tables.

The problem is that so far, the Cloak Gang still has no movement.

Am I being tricked? Am I being used by “Aguile”?

However, after thinking about it, “Aguile”, who was the heir of the Beelzebub Royal Family, had no reason to watch the Dark Moon power completely fall into Shea’s control. As the other party said, the Dark Moon was the most important foundation for the revival of the Beelzebub Royal Family. The previous series of plans were precisely for this purpose. Meanwhile, Joseph, the future Red Spirit Lord, was a unique spokesperson.

At this time, Royce came to report that the Cloak Gang began to gradually gather funds for the night market and arena. It seemed that there was something going on. Joseph was a thoughtful person who would not easily trust others. Considering Vasasha’s past, he did not reveal “Aguile’s” plan to Royce, lest it was exposed.

Now that he heard Royce’s report, Joseph felt confident in his heart. It was as if he let go of a large burden in his mind — “Aguile” has already begun to act. Every step is unfolding according to the plan. With an all-in bet with Shea in the end, I can truly control the Dark Moon.

At that time, even if I lose my position in the Red Spirit temporarily, it does not matter because that ally has a series of follow-up measures against my father, Josh. Together with

the capital’s Regent Obsidian’s appreciation, defeating my father and younger brother, as well as ascending the throne of the Red Spirit Lord is not a dream.

Joseph who recovered his calmness finally showed a rare smile. He felt that the haze in his heart was swept away. He began to order Royce to arrange everything so that he could prepare to officially launch it at the next regular meeting. However, he didn’t know that Royce was the spy “Aguile” placed beside him long ago. As for Vasasha, he was already Royce’s real wife.

Chen Rui’s plan was actually to let Joseph dig a hole and jump down by himself. Now that the hole was gradually digging, he just waited for Joseph to make a highly difficult action to jump in. Moreover, it was voluntary.

The Fallen Angel capital.

The lord meeting finally came to an end. After the lords returned to the estate to prepare funds, Obsidian convened the capital’s families to hold a similar meeting. The elder families had long known some inside information about “Charles”. They had guessed that this kind of fundraising was related to the benefits brought by that mysterious human, so it would definitely be a big deal that was surely profitable.

Despite the failure to win over “Charles”, the majority of benefits would be taken by Regent Obsidian, but the benefits were shared now. Everyone could get a huge profit. It was a pretty good result. Under the response of the elder families, the families worked together, and Obsidian once again raised a huge sum of money. Of course, the biggest “shareholder” was the regent himself.

Day by day, the estate and family funds had been collected. This was an astonishing astronomical figure. The people who own this money could truly deserve the words “super rich”. Even Obsidian couldn’t help but to feel tempted.

However, the Regent Royal Highness wanted not only wealth, but power and more. Although the amount of money was astonishingly huge, it was only a small amount compared with the future profits.

As a person in power, one must not be deceived by the immediate interests, but he must look further.

His ally, “Charles”, should be the same kind of person. As the illegitimate son of the royal family with the [Body of Light Blessing], he ventured to the Demon Realm for the sake of a great cause. This was in itself a great courage. Regardless of the success of the “Charles” human world’s succession plan, this cooperation would bring unparalleled benefits to Obsidian and the Fallen Angel Empire controlled by him.

Furthermore, the 2 parties also signed an equality contract. It was absolutely foolproof.

In Obsidian’s eager anticipation, the figure of “Charles” finally appeared at the palace gate more than a month later. Obsidian was overjoyed when he heard the news. He hurriedly went out of the palace to personally greet him and welcomed this ally all the way into the hall.

“Sorry, Your Highness, I’m a few days late for some special reasons.” Chen Rui bowed and smiled.

“It’s okay!” Obsidian nodded in return. The two were now in the “honeymoon period” in which they were allies, so there was no need to be too courteous.

“Your Highness, how was the fundraising?”

“It’s all in place. It even greatly exceeded the expected part. I, as your ally, didn’t disappoint you right.” Obsidian said lightly and humbly but with a touch of complacency. It was really not easy to collect so much funds from so many sources, counting and gathering them in such a short period of time. He had exerted great efforts.

“The efficiency of Your Highness is really admirable.” Chen Rui exclaimed, “I’m also fortunate enough to bring a precious gift to Your Highness.”

Obsidian had been waiting for him to say this. When he saw Chen Rui take out a box, his eyes couldn’t help but gleamed. Sure enough, a bottle of black potion was lying quietly in it, next to the delicate label. The words “longevity potion” were engraved on it.

There was a hint of light in Obsidian’s eyes. As he opened the cork to smell it, he felt a strange sense of vitality in his heart as if he was instantly 10 years younger.

Yes, this must be a longevity potion! Obsidian suppressed the excitement in his heart. This time, he would never waste this precious potion that could prolong life as he did with the super resurrection potion last time. For him, who was dying, it was impossible to buy the black potion that had been lost for many years in the Demon Realm with any amount of money.

“This bottle is a longevity potion that my teacher has recently produced successfully with 100% purity!”

“It’s 100% again! Grand Master Sun Simiao really has unfathomable skills!” Obsidian exclaimed sincerely. A type of black potion can only be taken once in a lifetime. Naturally, the higher the purity, the more rare it is. After taking longevity potion, I can extend my life to the maximum.

“Even a grand master like my teacher has experienced many failures and consumed a lot of mental and financial resources to produce such a super black potion of the highest level. Alas, he finally succeeded. This is equivalent to adding the most significant support to our side… Your Highness, since you have opened the cork, it is best to take it immediately, otherwise the effect of the medicine will decrease over time. It happens that I’m here. If there is something abnormal, you can catch me, the liar, and punish me severely.”

In fact, this sentence… was the truth. Sometimes the more truthful one was, the less people would believe in it.

“Honesty, reliability, and a good sense of humor. Charles, you are such a man. No wonder the capital’s most beautiful Devil’s Snare flower has been a little bit distracted after you left. It turns out that a liar has stolen her heart. “Obsidian made a joke. He looked at the potion bottle in his hand, pondered for a moment, and finally raised his head to drink it.

After a while, Obsidian’s half-squinted eyes slowly opened. There was a great shock in his purple pupils. At his level of power, he had a certain sense of vitality, but now he could clearly feel that the subtle changes in his body functions and many small old wounds seemed to heal automatically. More importantly, the strange feeling of… should be longevity, has increased by at least 200 years. Then, it means that I’m able to grasp the Fallen Angel Empire for another 200 years! Power is a good addictive thing. Once you hold it, you never want to let it go.

However, Obsidian never thought – If everything is lost, what is the use even if he gets another 20,000 years?

“It’s a 100% pure super longevity potion! Once this kind of potion appears in the Demon Realm, it will definitely make everyone crazy!” Originally, Obsidian thought that the huge sum of money raised was so large that it would shake the entire empire. Now it seemed to be a little smaller. With this super potion that was the finale, there was almost no risk. No matter how big the investment was, it was definitely worth it.

“Seeing Your Highness’ appearance now, I think I don’t need to worry about going to the secret prison anymore.” Chen Rui responded to Obsidian confidently and said with a leisurely smile.

“Charles, maybe our cooperation will be the luckiest thing for each other. As long as the plan is successful, we will be put into the history of our respective races and passed on through generations. I firmly believe that this day is not far away.” Obsidian’s entire mental outlook seemed to have undergone a qualitative change. He had an unprecedented high spirit.

Chen Rui looked like he was smiling, but secretly mocked in his mind: Not the “luckiest” but the “unluckiest.” Of course it is to you. Besides… the bottle of longevity potion should be the one recorded in history. Although the value of some things cannot be measured by money alone, this should be the most expensive bottle of black potion in the Demon Realm history…

He knew clearly in his heart that the root of Obsidian’s enthusiasm was that the 2 parties mutually used each other in the relationship. “Charles” turned from a prisoner to become an important guest precisely because of benefits.

Now that the interests of the two had been “tied” together. Prosperity and loss would affect both of them. Therefore, Obsidian also hoped that allies could succeed and become a source of long-term supply of black potions. Otherwise, Obsidian would not bother to care about the success or failure of “Charles”.

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled slightly. “There is another news that should be quite good. The reason why I was late this time is because I went to follow the teacher to visit his close friend who is the mechanics grand master. The grand master showed considerable interest in a certain ‘disobedient’ artifact.”

The “good news” piqued Obsidian’s interest. Mechanics grand master? Is today really a lucky day? There is even hope for the problem of the Sword of Fallen Angel to be solved?

chapters.title: Chapter 367: Ancient Runes! Sword Of Fallen Angel'S Mysterious Seal
chapters.body:
Chapter 367: Ancient Runes! Sword Of Fallen Angel'S Mysterious Seal

In fact, the reason for Chen Rui’s late arrival was due to Ms. Fairy Dragon whose experiment was in a vigorous stage, so she refused to let him go. However, the capital’s plan had reached the most critical moment at this time and he must leave, so he tried his best to find a way. Finally, he sneaked out to come to the Fallen Angel capital.

Seeing Obsidian’s surprised look, Chen Rui said calmly, “Your Highness, don’t be happy too early. Although the mechanics grand master has the same level of strength as my teacher, your situation that is just a verbal description is certainly not enough. Specific observations must be made to find the crux.”

“You mean you need to take the Sword of Fallen Angel away?” Obsidian frowned slightly and asked calmly.

Chen Rui knew that the other party would definitely doubt it, but his most important purpose this time was the huge sum of money. The Sword of Fallen Angel was just an item he could get along the way, but he would never let the trifles to disturb the core plan. He shook his head and gave Obsidian a reassurance, “Although the grand master wants to study the artifact of the Demon Realm, but the Sword of Fallen Angel is the artifact of the Fallen Angel Empire. How can it be taken away by outsiders from the human world? That grand master specially gave me a magic detector to record and detect some appearances and changes in the artifact. Then, I only need to bring the magic detector back in hope of finding the crux.”

When Obsidian heard this, his heart suddenly settled down. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Once the artifact’s “crux” can be found. Then… The human’s continued, “Of course, provided that Your Highness must trust me and let me use the detector to observe the artifact.”

“I naturally have unreserved trust in Charles.” Obsidian said without hesitation, “Before treating my most trusted friend in the most welcoming way, I think we should first complete the transfer of funds. We can take a look at the highest artifact of my Lucifer Royal Family on the way, the Sword of Fallen Angel.”

Chen Rui quickly got up, “After you, Your Highness.”

Obsidian took Chen Rui through numerous levels to the secret vault of the palace.

In the largest secret vault, Chen Rui saw a big mountain.

As a secret vault of a country, it is not surprising if this is a mountain of black crystal coins, but it is a mountain of space bracelets and space rings!

An unimaginably huge amount of them! Chen Rui looked at the list in his hand and the “big mountain.” For a moment, he was dumbfounded. When he was in Paglio’s treasure, he felt that it was the most money he had ever seen in a lifetime. However, only now did he realize that this “lifetime” was just the beginning.

“Pardon me. I was a bit gaffe just now. Even if I bring this amount of money to the Kemplot Family, no, even the entire Dragon Bright Empire, it is a huge sum of money that is earthshaking!” Chen Rui quickly recovered. He suppressed his pounding heartbeat and smiled somewhat self-deprecatingly.

This kind of “frankness” has won Obsidian’s trust and favor, “Not to mention you, even if I as the Regent, can’t help but be tempted when I see this amount of money. With this money, the first batch of black potions can be manufactured smoothly.”

“Our plan will also take the most successful step!” Chen Rui added, and the two smiled at each other.

As Chen Rui spoke, he walked to the front of the mountain. A faint light glowed in his hands. He seemed to be silently chanting some kind of incantation, then he waved his hands. The mountain gradually flattened and shrunk mysteriously before finally disappearing.

“Great skills indeed!” Obsidian was full of praise. A space equipment generally couldn’t store space equipment, but the power of “Charles” should be some kind of space magic that has been lost in the Demon Realm. He is worthy of being the elite of the human world. An almost unstoppable excitement surged in Chen Rui’s heart. This long-planned biggest plan has gone through countless twists and turns. It is now finally coming to an end successfully! After receiving this huge sum of money, Obsidian took him to another secret vault. He unlocked a complex magic circle. The protection of this secret vault was more powerful than the previous “big mountain.” There was only one thing in it which was the sword floating on the stone platform.

The hilt of the sword was fine and delicate with a purple gemstone at the end. The sword’s eye was 2 back-to-back angels. The body of the sword was white and was engraved with 2 strange marks. Its simplicity was full of mysterious power.

The highest artifact of the Lucifer Royal Family – the Sword of Fallen Angel.

Under Obsidian’s gaze, Chen Rui walked slowly toward the Sword of Fallen Angel. He stretched out his hand and turned his head to Obsidian with a seeking permission gesture.

Obsidian nodded. The legend of the 7 artifacts are super artifacts created by Demon God himself. Unlike ordinary artifacts, it cannot be incorporated into the space. Even space magic will not work. Even if, just in case, Charles misbehaves, it is impossible for something to happen with me, a Demon Overlord, watching by.

Chen Rui touched the divine sword. As soon as he touched the blade, he felt a strange repulsive force. With a shift of thought, he increased his output power. However, the repulsive force from the sword increased as well. When he tried harder, the Sword of Fallen Angel’s light flashed. Chen Rui was very shocked. His hand was withdrawn with the shock. He felt invaded by a strange force as his arm trembled slightly.

This situation was not out of Obsidian’s expectation because he had hit the wall countless times over the centuries. Seeing “Charles” failed, he felt a sense of gloating while empathizing Charles. Obsidian shook his head and sighed, “This is my Lucifer Family’s artifact, but unfortunately, every time I try to control it, I will always be rejected by this unnamed powerful force. This should be due to the fact that I cannot be recognized by the artifact. I don’t know if the mechanics grand master has a solution for this.”

Chen Rui felt strange because he had come into contact with the seven artifacts of 2 royal families. Putting aside the Demon Shield, the God-Eating Mask was a complete artifact that had been fused by the Super System to become an inseparable part. None of the 2 artifacts showed the strange repulsive force as this. Chen Rui adjusted his power, turned on the [Deep Analysis] skill, and tried again. It was still the same result of being rejected. The more force he applied, the stronger the resistance. It even came with a strange recoil power.

When he was “rejected” by the artifact, Chen Rui felt an inexplicable familiarity in his heart.

Very familiar.

He immediately took out an item and split it into several parts. He placed it around the Sword of Fallen Angel. The items gradually shone with a faint color light, echoing each other to form a strange formation. As the light changed, the Sword of Fallen Angel finally reacted and began to glow a little bit of fluorescent light.

Obsidian’s pupils suddenly shrank. I have tried countless methods, but none of them can make the Sword of Fallen Angel be in a special state. Now, “Charles” can create such abnormality with just a few fiddling! If it wasn’t for the identity of “Charles” that came from the human world and had the [Body of Light Blessing] of the human royal family, Obsidian really doubted whether he was from the royal bloodline of the Lucifer Royal Family.

Obsidian was more surprised at this time. He held his breath, lest he disturbed “Charles”‘s attempt- It is definitely the mechanics grand master’s items that have some key effect! This way, perhaps there is really hope to crack the secret of the Sword of Fallen Angel! Obsidian was actually half right. Chen Rui did detect an unexpected secret with the magic items. The familiar feeling from the power of the Sword of Fallen Angel… is the power of ancient runes!

To be precise, it is a seal! If Chen Rui did not go to the Rainbow Valley and follow Zola to learn the ancient runes, he would never discover this secret.

It seems that Obsidian has been unable to be recognised by the Sword of Fallen Angel, not just because of his own qualifications and bloodline strength, but the main reason is that this artifact has been sealed with ancient runes! The God-Eating Mask and Illusive Demon Shield do not have similar seals. The Sword of Fallen Angel fell into Obsidian’s hands after the Lord of Midnight Sun died, then the seal of these ancient runes was cast by the Midnight Sun? At that time, the Lord of Midnight Sun was the number one powerhouse in the Demon Realm. He was infinitely close to the Demon Supremo of the Demi-God realm. His strength was far better than the current number one, Raizen. According to the fairy dragon, ancient runes were called the language of the gods. Very few people in the Demon Realm could master it and it is almost lost. Unexpectedly, this Lord of Midnight Sun was still proficient in the lost ancient runes? As we all know, in the war between the Demon Realm and the human world 300 years ago, the Lord of Midnight Sun commanded the coalition of demons and marched all the way, causing severe damage to the human by killing 3 Saints human powerhouses. However, he accidentally encountered a mysterious human powerhouse. He was defeated and died. This caused the demons army who had no leader to be defeated and retreated to the Demon Realm. So, why did the Lord of Midnight Sun seal his weapon before he died? No! Chen Rui shook his head. Judging from his current knowledge of the ancient runes, this seal was complicated and powerful. It was better than the seal on Paglio. It was absolutely not what a Demon Overlord-level could perform. Reminiscing of the scene of the poison dragon being sealed by a mysterious powerhouse, Chen Rui was shocked. Demi-God! This seal is at least cast by a Demi-God-level powerhouse! So the real cause of the death of the Lord of Midnight Sun is not that he was killed by an ordinary powerhouse in the human world, but a Demi-God-level powerhouse!

If a Demon Overlord is an upper-level powerhouse, then a Demi-God-level is a top-level powerhouse. Even if one is a peak-stage of the Demon Overlord, he can only bow his head in front of this kind of super-level powerhouse who is already close to the gods. Demi-God-level powerhouses are an independent realm. Although they do not show their might by displaying miracles like the gods, they mostly exist in legends and rarely show traces. Under normal circumstances, they will not interfere with the normal world order.

Assuming that the Lord of Midnight Sun was indeed killed by a Demi-God powerhouse, how many Demi-Gods participated in the war between the Demon Realm and the human world? Or maybe the power of the Demi-God powerhouse is the key to victory between the 2 worlds? Why has the Demon Realm been unable to beat the human world? Will it be related to this aspect?

Chen Rui was full of suspicions. Although he touched the outline of an earth-shaking secret, he still couldn’t come up with a clue. Moreover, compared with this super powerhouse, his current strength was simply not enough. If his strength could reach that level, then only he could unlock the unknown secrets hidden behind the fog, including the silver box, step by step.

Chen Rui’s current level of ancient runes couldn’t decipher the seal on the Sword of Fallen Angel. What he needed to do was to observe and record the changes in these runes, and then try to crack the seal with the help of Zola. It might become an opportunity for Shea to control the Sword of Fallen Angel and Fallen Angel Empire in the future.

This way, it exactly matches the excuse I said to Obsidian before, but I really got lucky this time. Chen Rui’s thoughts turned. He stood up without keeping away the items.

“How? Charles, is there a way?” Obsidian asked expectantly.

“Your Highness, I’m a complete layman in mechanics. I only know how to use items according to the instructions of the grand master.”

Obsidian thought about it. He laughed secretly that he was too impatient. Everyone specializes in something . If I am asking about business or politics, this person may be knowledgeable. With his grand master teacher, he may also know a little about pharmacy. At most he is half knowledgeable. As for mechanics, of course it is impossible for him to truly master it. Obsidian didn’t know that the “ally” in front of him was the trio-specialized mechanic master and magic circle master who shook the Demon Realm. At the same time, he was also praised by the mechanics industry as the most likely person to become a grand master. However, speaking of it, this guy knew not only mechanics, but also some conspiracy and tricks learned in novels and TV. He honed some cooking skills in his daily life, a little economics learned in books and practice, as well as a little bit of military knowledge from the internet and so on…

Chen Rui’s previous career was actually an otaku.

The environment trained him. If the target of his crossover was just a second generation of comfortable and rich person who was waiting to die, perhaps these potentials and abilities would not be forced out.

(Chen Rui: Don’t say that I’m badass. In fact, every otaku has the power to save the world. It depends on whether the Space-Time Administration gives a chance.)

Chen Rui noticed the subtle changes in Obsidian’s expression, and he was secretly amused. He said, “In my opinion, according to the reaction of the magic items, there should be quite some hope. The grand master once said that in order to obtain complete information, it will take at least 3 days to continuously collect the artifact data. I also need to make adjustments and operations on the magic items every day. I’ll place the items here. For these 3 days, I will operate according to the time and steps required by the grand master every day. I have to trouble Your Highness by that time.”

“I am the one troubling you, Charles, but… I won’t be polite to you.” Obsidian showed the generosity of an old friend as if he had turned to another person who did not order Chen Rui to be imprisoned in the secret prison.

“After recording some features of this artifact as required, I will leave. I hope that when I bring the first batch of black potions next time, I will also bring good news related to the Sword of Fallen Angel.”

Obsidian would definitely keep a close eye on the Sword of Fallen Angel in these 3 days. The possibility of abducting the artifact was too small. However, Chen Rui had another idea. He must use some tricks on it. It might be able to play an unexpected miraculous effect at critical moments in the future.

Obsidian nodded, and then he smiled, “3 days… I should have arranged a comfortable house for you, but I believe you have a more charming and wonderful place, don’t you? My friend.”

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, showing an expression as though Obsidian knew him well, but he was indifferent in his heart- Now that this huge sum of money is in my hand, the value of Isabella… is maybe only Breeze Shadow Boots. Besides, “Charles” will disappear forever in 3 days, so there is no need to play any fake games. However, what surprised Chen Rui was that when Obsidian personally sent him out of the palace, a luxurious carriage was waiting for him outside the carriage. Outside the carriage was a woman in a long skirt with curly hair and blue eyes. She smiled gently. It was bright and charming. It was the capital’s famous Devil’s Snare Flower.

Obsidian showed a smile that all men knew. He patted Charles on the shoulder encouragingly. Chen Rui lamented his bad luck secretly. Since he could not escape from the misfortune anyway, he showed a surprised look in his eyes as he strode forward.

How would Obsidian end up in Chen Rui’s plan? Would he die? Or he would just lose everything he owned now?

chapters.title: Chapter 368: Poisonous Devil'S Snare! The Scam Was Exposed
chapters.body:
Chapter 368: Poisonous Devil'S Snare! The Scam Was Exposed

Chen Rui bid farewell to Obsidian, followed Isabella into the carriage, and came to the residence of the capital’s flower.

Compared with the estrangement last time, Isabella seemed to be a lot more enthusiastic. She held his arm as they walked all the way in. It was the same kind of public intimacy. There was no senseless brat like Lordan who dared to harass him. All major families of the capital, including the elder families, had included “Charles” on the list of those who must not be provoked.

“You haven’t eaten lunch yet.” Isabella took him to a seat. “I have asked the maid to prepare your favorite grape wine and a small steak. Take a rest and eat later.”

“Miss Isabella.” Chen Rui seemed overwhelmed by the treatment, “I… I’m not dreaming, right? You didn’t even want to see me last time…”

“Last time you said that we are going to start again…” Isabella answered. She suddenly let go of her arm and gave him a bitter look, “Can Sir Charles give me this opportunity?”

Chen Rui looked at Isabella’s somewhat thinner face. She imagined the scene of facing Shea last time, and he sighed softly, “You have lost weight.”

This sentence contained a touch of affection and pity. Isabella’s eyes trembled. She looked down as if to conceal. She touched her face, “Is it ugly?”

“That term has never been suitable for you. Although I cannot deny that I still have my wife in my heart, in any case, you are always the most beautiful and most charming fresh flower. Am I a very unfaithful man?”

“You’re a liar.” Isabella bit her lip and said, “You have a wife, but you still steal other women’s heart out here. But you are also a fool, mentioning another woman in front of a woman who wants to be courteous. Don’t you know that women are jealous?”

Being jealous… Is it the story of a master from the Demon Realm? Fang Xuanling. Lucifer? Chen Rui’s thoughts wandered away, but he helplessly sneered.

“However, there is this kind of foolish woman who knows that this man has another woman, and she knows that they are from 2 worlds… but she can’t restrain herself.” Isabella’s eyes flushed suddenly as her hands clenched tightly on her skirt. Her body trembled slightly as if she was trying to suppress her emotions.

If there is a Demon Realm’s Oscars Award… this woman is definitely a favorite to win the first prize. This kind of acting can almost reach the point of being real. Chen Rui secretly praised her. He was very cooperative as he “emotionally” held her hand, “Miss Isabella…”

“Don’t move.” Isabella said, breaking free of his hand, but she gently leaned her forehead on his shoulder… Closing her eyes, a drop of tear fell on the sofa and fell on Chen Rui’s arm.

After a long time, her slightly red and swollen eyes slowly opened.

“Charles, I’m tired.”

“I’m such an ambitious woman.”

“But, after all, I’m just a woman.”

There were only 3 intermittent sentences. It seemed out of the blue.

Chen Rui felt a strange feeling in his heart. He could hardly tell whether this woman’s feeling was real or she was acting.

Perhaps an excellent actor… has to be really focused in acting. In any case, acting is just acting… It is not real. “Miss Isabella…”

“Call me Yini…” Isabella raised her head lightly as if she had made up a certain determination. Her face lightly raised as it slowly moved toward him. Her reddish blue eyes were a little blurry.

If it was Athena, Kia or Shea, Chen Rui would take the initiative to kiss without hesitation, but this was Isabella… As the faint flower fragrance was getting closer and closer, Chen Rui couldn’t help but to feel a little rippling in his heart. Her lavender lips had touched his mouth.

Forget it, I’ll just make a full set of play. Anyway, I still have 3 days… It’s not my first kiss anyway, I won’t suffer any loss… The moment their lips met, Isabella, who took the initiative, seemed to tremble a little. Then she kissed heavily on his lips.

It started with a light kiss, then their tongues intertwined. Chen Rui was a little surprised to find that Isabella’s kissing skills were actually much more unskilled than he imagined… It seems that she has very little experience. That’s not right. Isn’t she a well-known social flower?

The breathing of the hugging two people gradually became heavier. Chen Rui felt the two large balls squeezed on his chest, and he gradually lost control of the certain body part. He shamelessly had a normal man reaction. This is not good! We are playing normal script, not a X-rated script

You really don’t want to? Isabella’s beauty is comparable to Shea, especially her unique style of maturity and seduction Which was very charming. Now that she offers herself… Although Chen Rui despised his own hypocrisy as if he was the poignant Liu Xiahui [1], he still decided to interrupt this passionate scene. It was undeniable that men tend to rely on the lower body part to think, but it was not all the time, or not all men.

At this moment, the prompt of the discovery of poison from the Super System suddenly made Chen Rui’s mind awake. His lingering thoughts suddenly disappeared.

Poison? In terms of the amount of continuous aura conversion, this poison is quite venomous!

It turns out her purpose is… She actually uses this method to poison me? What a Devil’s Snare! Sure enough, it poisons while enchanting someone. As Chen Rui’s thought moved, the transformation of poison was temporarily suspended. He suddenly felt a strong weakness with a series of paralysis. He couldn’t gather his strength. He actually couldn’t move.

Isabella slowly loosened her “affectionate” hands around his neck. Chen Rui’s body suddenly lost support and fell uncontrollably on the sofa. From the very beginning when Isabella held Chen Rui’s arm into the hall, all the maids had retreated. There was no one nearby.

When Chen Rui fell, he had quickly activated the [Automatic Aura Absorption] to automatically absorb the poison. His weakness quickly faded away, but he still pretended to be poisoned on the floor so that he could launch the most fatal blow at the right time.

“Why do you do this?” Chen Rui “couldn’t move”, but he could still speak. His expression was naturally in disbelief.

Isabella didn’t have the triumphant expression. Instead, her blue eyes showed a faint indifference, “Because I want your life.”

“Why?” Chen Rui really couldn’t understand her motives for killing him at this time. Even if it was the force behind, she should first attempt to recruit “Charles” rather than killing him.

Isabella gave him a deep look, “Because you are a liar.”

Chen Rui’s heart was shocked. This is not a joking or flirting tone. Could it be that she really noticed any flaws? No, even Obsidian didn’t notice it… There were no abnormalities in the palace just now. I even took the huge sum of money. Isabella shook her head again and sighed, “It would be great if you are just a simple liar, but unfortunately… you are not just a liar. It is really unfortunate…”

A liar and not a liar? Chen Rui was confused as he listened, so he had to ask, “I don’t understand what you are talking about. If you really want me to die, dying in the hands of a woman I like is a luxury. But… can you let me know the cause of my death?”

“Your acting skills are quite good. Even if I know you are acting, I still follow you into the play step by step. I was really close to being moved by you. Unfortunately, many years ago, I had already been cheated once. Now, I can’t always fall down in the same place, right?” Isabella smiled slightly… The smile seemed as cool as water. There seemed to be a hint of chill in the indifference.

“This is my fourth time trying to kill you. The first 3… all failed.” Isabella was quite confident in the poison, so she frankly confessed the previous events.

“The first time was in Trevante. I wanted you to die in the hands of the evil eye. Unfortunately, you are too lucky. Not only did you not die, but you also saved my rogue nephew. Anyway, I was the capital’s envoy at that time, so just one sentence is enough to make you, a human spy, more guilty of charge. Besides… you also killed my coachman, Jardel… I can blame this matter on my enemy, Rommel.”

Chen Rui was slightly surprised, “We… only then met for the first time.”

She has this killing intent at the first encounter? Isabella said indifferently, “Because you are a human man and I’m not a good character, but a poisonous flower. Do I need more reasonable reasons?”

Chen Rui sneered secretly. She is indeed a vicious woman. Even when she faced the powerless “Chen Rui” in the Dark Moon… she also used a killing move like “evil voodoo”. “Don’t try to delay time to resolve the poison. This poison is secretly made by me at a great price. The more you resist, the more aggressive it is. You can’t get rid of it. It’s like the Devil’s Snare Flower. Gradually, you will lose all your power. Your soul will also be annihilated…” Isabella seemed to see through his “intention” and went on saying, “The second time, I used Lordan to ambush you. Originally, I didn’t want to kill you again since you rescued my nephew, but you have to court your own death. You want to make use of my relationship to achieve a certain goal. You can only say that you were digging your own grave. But to my surprise, you killed all 4 of them even though your strength clearly did not reach the Demon Overlord. Oh, Lordan should be trying to say something, but he was exploded by the the secret medicine that I combined with evil voodoo.

Chen Rui had a sudden realization. No wonder Lordan was full of confidence when he pointed out that my strength has not reached the Demon Emperor. It turns out that Isabella “inadvertently” revealed it. Lordan’s death after that is also Isabella’s method. “The third time, it was when you were taken away by Doren. Because at that time, I had already determined that you were a liar. A real liar!” Isabella sighed, “Your wealth game for collecting money is simply unheard of, especially when it works in an unfamiliar place like the human world. Although my intuition tells me that there may be a problem, I can’t find any loopholes.”

Chen Rui finally showed his surprise. His plan referred to an ancient scam on the earth, the “Ponzi scheme”. Even in the modern age, many illegal MLM groups used this principle to amass money. It was invented by an Italian American, Charles Ponzi, This was also why he faked his name as “Charles”.

In short, a Ponzi scheme was to use the money of new investors to pay interest and short-term returns to old investors in order to create the illusion of making money and defraud more investment. If his objective was purely making money, he could use the Ponzi scheme to slowly swindle wealth step by step, but his ultimate goal was political, so he added the variable of black potions.

Chen Rui could be sure that it was the first time such a huge scam had appeared in the Demon Realm. As it was the first time, so cunning people such as Obsidian and Josh had been fooled. Unexpectedly, Isabella noticed the problem of it!

“Your courage is extraordinary. Your whole plan is clever and careful. The high profit is even more tempting. Especially in the early stage when Josh and his son also succeeded in getting a large return. It is very convincing. However, there is one thing you may have neglected, or perhaps this overthinking woman used a mindful eye, and then she discovered the flaw.”

Isabella stood up and took a few steps, “You should know that my job is financial assistant. In fact, as rumored, I have actual control over the finances of the empire. The 1 billion black crystal coins investment that the Regent gave you back then was released from the vault through me. You may not think that I will use a lot of manpower to make a unique mark on each black crystal coin. When you come to the capital again, you even brought back 1.2 billion with profit. I also carefully monitored the money. Although the money has been processed by methods similar to Holy Magic, the mark still exists. Then, the 1.2 billion you gave is simply the original 1 billion capital, plus an additional 200 million. I shouldn’t have to explain more at this point… This is actually the most stupid method, but it has expose your smartest game. ”

Chen Rui didn’t expect to be seen through in this way. He secretly sighed at his carelessness. This is not a stand-alone game. Apart from me as the “protagonist”, everyone else is just NPCs who provide dialogue. I am not the only smart person in this world. There are also many more smarter people than me. He did not make a pointless defense. He asked, “Then, why didn’t you report to Prince Obsidian? Expose me as a liar?”

“Anyway, you are about to die, so I will tell you the truth. I’m not from the Fallen Angel Empire. The so-called regent king confidante is just a chess piece placed by a force called ‘Bloodfall’ beside Obsidian.” Isabella showed a faint sneer, “What does the survival or the crisis of the Fallen Angel Empire have anything to do with me?”

Bloodfall? It’s the first time Chen Rui had heard of the name of this force. It was also his biggest potential enemy of the Demon Realm. The battle in the Crystal Valley had undoubtedly severely damaged the layout of this force. The “Bloodfall” was quite large. There were spies placed in the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire. Their wild ambitions could be imagined. I don’t know if the Bloody Empire has spies? If not, does it mean that the Bloodfall is the work of the first powerhouse emperor of the Bloody Empire? Is he using this method to slowly erode the opponents as they are unable to start a war at the moment of the “Era of Peace”, then he will launch an all out invasion to defeat the 2 empires and unify the Demon Realm? Or perhaps they are the secret alliances of the fallen royal families such as Beelzebub and Leviathan, wanting to make a comeback and subvert the 3 empires in one fell swoop? In any case, judging from the ambitions of “Bloodfall”, there would definitely be another “intersection” with this mysterious force in the future. However, now was not the time.

[1] A man in Chinese history who remained unmoved by beauty seduction. Isabella was once cheated by a human? How did he turned a beautiful flower into a poisonous flower?

chapters.title: Chapter 369: Years Ago Today! Common Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 369: Years Ago Today! Common Enemy

Isabella continued to talk. Perhaps because she had full confidence in that kind of poison, or perhaps Chen Rui was almost a dead person, so she unhurriedly confided the secret in her heart.

“Actually, I deliberately let Rommel realize that I instigated Lordan. When you gave me the black potion before being taken away by Doren, I knew that the maid beside me was Rommel’s spy, but I didn’t kill her. No matter whether you succeed in coming back or not, I have another plan. I’ll use another person to fake my death in order to escape from the capital and the ‘Bloodfall’.”

Chen Rui’s lips moved, but he didn’t ask because he knew Isabella would go on.

“Want to know why I want to leave? One of my relatives, who is also my enemy, has finally died. As long as I hide in the dark and kill another enemy, then I can find a secluded place and change my appearance; or I can live until I die of old age alone; or just find a man who is more honest to marry because I’m really tired…” Isabella sighed. She seemed to have removed her usual fake charm. There was only exhaustion and boredom remained on her face.

Chen Rui listened silently. This enemy of her family should be Sabrina. Why did the sisters turn into enemies? “But even this plan failed because of you.” Isabella looked at Chen Rui with a complex look in her eyes. “What I can’t understand is that after Rommel’s lobbying, it was impossible that you couldn’t tell that the previous things were planned by me with your wisdom. Why do you have to be soft-hearted for a woman who tried to kill you several times? Why did you get rid of Rommel in turn? What is your purpose?”

Chen Rui still did not speak. What Isabella saw through should be a “liar” from the human world, but she did not discover my deeper purpose. My real purpose is not for money, but to destroy Obsidian for the Dark Moon. “Saving” Isabella is just to further deepen the conflict between Obsidian and the elder families. It is also for the purpose of seeking the Breeze Shadow Boots in the future. However, Isabella actually wants fake death to escape from the Bloodfall organization. This is something I didn’t expect. I didn’t expect that I actually ruined her plan by mistake. Could this be the reason why she personally kills me this time? Isabella smiled self-deprecatingly, “In fact, we all know that from the beginning, we are just putting up a show to each other. You should know very well what kind of woman I am. I have been married many times. I’m just a slutty and vicious woman. Don’t tell me that you really fall for me in this fake show. This joke is not funny at all.”

“Since you think it’s a joke, then there is no need to explain it.” Chen Rui shook his head reluctantly. “I just don’t understand 1 thing. The slutty woman’s skill in kissing is so unskilled? Let’s assume that those men you married were bewildered by some kind of illusion all day long.”

Roman once said that once the power of the evil eye could be truly integrated, [The Eye of Evil] could be described as infinitely mysterious. In terms of illusion alone, it was by no means inferior to [The Eye of Incubus] of the Leviathan Royal Family. The reason Isabella knew about Trevante’s evil eye lair was probably because she had trained before in it. She might even have obtained an evil eye lifelong companion beast.

Moreover, most of her marriage partners were just high-powered people who were not really powerhouses, so this speculation was very possible, but perhaps that no one would believe it. According to the capital’s rumours, this Lady Devil’s Snare was a slutty and social flower who had experiences with countless men.

Isabella sneered coldly, “These are not the main points. If it is 200 years ago, maybe I would have been moved by you, but now… no matter what flirty words you used today, you can’t escape death.”

“You just said… that people can’t always fall in the same place.” Before launching his attack, Chen Rui intended to uncover more secrets, especially about the Breeze Shadow Boots. “As my last request before death, I want to know, back then… it should have been 200 years ago… what happened?”

Isabella was dumbfounded for a while, and she said faintly, “In fact, it’s nothing. It’s just that an ignorant girl met a honey-tongued human man. He said that she was as pure and beautiful as Snow Dallet from Holy Light Mountain. He wanted to personally pluck the flower for her. The ignorant and stupid girl believed this man. She even forged a feud with her sister. As a result, the man deceived the girl’s most precious things and never returned. As time passed, the stupid and ignorant Snow Dallet becomes the highly poisonous Devil’s Snare. It’s just such a simple cliche story.”

Isabella spoke extremely calmly as if she was telling a story about someone who had nothing to do with her, but Chen Rui could feel that there was a deep numbness which was more painful than pain in the calm tone. He had seen this kind of numbness in Kia back then.

That’s why. This poisonous Devil’s Snare was also a girl like Snow Dallet long ago. No wonder there was that kind of reaction when I mentioned Snow Dallet. She must have remembered her hateful past. Chen Rui smiled bitterly in his heart. He didn’t think that the holy flower, which he thought was a breakthrough, turned out to be a fatal trigger. The reason why he was murdered at the first meeting should be at least 3 key words: human, man, Snow Dallet.

“But, this is not the main reason why I want to kill you this time. If you are just simply a liar, I’m just a woman who is too tired to find support. If we go on this way slowly, maybe our ending will be different. Unfortunately, you are not.”

Isabella’s tone changed as she slowly shook her head, “You’re the royal family of the human world with the [Body of Light Blessing] and great ambitions. You are an illegitimate prince! I thought the bottle of eternal potion was fake; I didn’t expect it to be real. I believe you have changed your original plan to flee after getting the money and want to truly rely on the power of the Demon Realm to seize the throne in the human world. Your cooperation with the Demon Realm will continue for a long time…”

“Bloodfall is an organization with equal power and ambitions. The conditions they can give you are much better than those of Obsidian, who has many scruples. For you who are deliberately trying to win the throne, you definitely cannot refuse it. In fact, I did not report the black potion incident to the Bloodfall, but this organization has many spies inside of the Fallen Angel Capital. It is surely not just me. They have learned about your secret cooperation with Obsidian. From your appearance in the Fallen Angel Capital today, the magic message has quickly reached the Bloodfall. The person sent by this organization to recruit you is already halfway to the capital. He will arrive in 2 days at most.”

At this time, Isabella no longer needed to lie. Chen Rui was secretly surprised. He even guessed wrongly last time. Isabella did not reveal the secret of the black potion, but it was someone else. The problem should be with Obsidian. It was probably someone close to him.

“Once you can obtain the unique resource of the Demon Realm, the black potion, the strength of ‘Bloodfall’ will be greatly enhanced. When they cause a disaster, the Demon Realm will fall into complete chaos. I can’t just sit back and watch this happen… This is one of the reasons why you are dying. However, I’m not so noble. The ambition to save the Demon Realm doesn’t match a selfish woman like me.” Isabella laughed self-deprecatingly, “I was forced to join this organization. Both my father and brother died because of this organization. I just wanted revenge. The other most important reason is that according to my intel, the person who is sent to the capital this time to contact you in multiple days is precisely my other enemy. I must kill him!”

The death of his father and brother? Another enemy? Chen Rui seemed to think of something。 An enemy’s name faintly appeared in his mind.

“This enemy is very powerful. I’m not his opponent. I can only use you… In the next few days, your soul power will gradually dissipate and become a puppet under my control. Your body will also have the terrifying energy of self-explosion like Lordan. At that time, I will control you to meet that enemy, and then I’ll wait for the opportunity to launch the explosion. However, his strength is the peak of the Demon Emperor, so the danger of my attack this time is also very high. It is very likely that I will die. Take it as… dying together with you.”

After Isabella finished speaking, she glanced at him faintly, “Now, do you regret that you met a selfish and vicious woman like me?”

Chen Rui looked at Isabella quietly. He did not feel fear or anger because of her words. This should be the most true side of this Devil’s Snare flower now. The reason she wanted to kill him was to prevent the black potion from falling into the hands of the Bloodfall organization as well as avenging her enemy.

In fact, everyone is self-centered. Isabella’s experience was worthy of sympathy, but it did not mean that it was completely forgivable. From the point of view of “Charles”, he was just an innocent person, and even “did” a lot for her, but he was treated like this.

“Before my soul dissipates, I have one last question. What is your enemy’s name?”

Isabella was a little surprised that he was still raising such unnecessary questions at this time, but she still said, “Broc. Leviathan, the current patriarch of the Envy Royal Family. He is officially the head of the 3 generals of the Dark Shadow Empire and an elite member of the Bloodfall. My only dearest brother died in his hands.”

It really is Broc! He actually climbed to the position of Leviathan’s patriarch. Could it be that Manu…

In this way, even though Isabella had a bad attitude toward Roman, she still kept in mind the kinship of Roman’s father. The finest diamond must be cut. She was probably not trying to kill Roman at the Trevante’s evil eye cave at that time, but to test or train him…

“Ms. Isabella, there is such a sentence – Sometimes we may not be able to choose to start, but we can choose our end. Our own end.”

With that said, Chen Rui stood up slowly. Isabella’s pupils contracted, and she was in disbelief – According to the toxicity and the time, “Charles” should not have this strength. From the calm look and faint power breath, he doesn’t look like he is deeply poisoned! As Isabella’s left eye suddenly turned golden, a powerful aura burst out. She was ready to respond to the attack from the opponent.

“If I really want to attack you, a sneak attack is easier than a blatant attack in the situation just now.” Chen Rui shook his head, “For a woman who wants to kill me 4 times, I definitely can’t let her go. However, I only think of one thing now, and that is to kill the man named Broc!”

Isabella shook. She almost couldn’t believe what she heard.

“In the end… we may part ways or even become enemies; or, the next time we meet, we are just a stranger who passed by… But before that, I will do this thing for you. Maybe this is the last thing.”

This sentence was actually a pun. After speaking, Chen Rui glanced at her profoundly, “I swear by the [Body of Light Blessing] that I will kill Broc. Leviathan!”

Killing Broc was actually Chen Rui’s oath long ago. Now that he heard the news of Broc’s arrival, he would never let go of this opportunity, so he decided to temporarily put aside his grievances with Isabella and join forces with her to deal with their biggest enemy.

Hearing these words, Isabella had another incredible feeling. Although in the past courteous and insincere encounters, she could always feel that ingenuity, but this oath was sonorous and powerful. It was not at all artificial.

It is my first time seeing such a foolish man.

However, this man is not really foolish. His plan almost fooled the entire Demon Realm. He is a terrifying sage and a politician who desperately needs the Demon Realm’s help in seizing the throne. Doesn’t killing Broc completely sever the hope of joining forces with Bloodfall? It will also attract the revenge of that huge force. There will be endless troubles. Why? Is it really because of that funny “joke”? Isabella’s eyes were intertwined with complex expressions. For the first time, the lake that had been silent as stagnant water truly began to ripple.

“Charles…” Isabella’s lips opened, seeming to want to ask, but finally she didn’t have the courage to do so.

(If only this was the man that I met back then… Unfortunately, there is no “if” in this world. Now… I’m just a sinister and vicious woman…) In fact, Chen Rui’s real intention was only to stabilize Isabella. Even if I really want to deal with her, putting victory or loss aside, now is not the time. I must first deal with that more important common enemy. Isabella is decisive, and her means are fierce and vicious. She is definitely not an innocent and kind woman, but… maybe her essence is not bad. It is considered excusable, but even if those old grievances are not pursued for the time being, the Dark Moon’s affairs are too important to be disclosed even a little.

As for Broc, it is absolutely necessary to kill him. It is certainly not for Isabella, but also for Delia and Roman. “Okay, we don’t have much time left.” Chen Rui looked solemn as if nothing happened just now. “I need to master the accurate intel of Broc. Then we will discuss how to deal with this guy. As for other things, put it aside for now, okay?” Isabella took a deep breath. In any case, Broc was the biggest enemy at the moment. She immediately suppressed the distracting thoughts and finally nodded, “Okay!”

With the “empowered” sword, Broc should be powerful foe right? 🙃

chapters.title: Chapter 370: Broc
chapters.body:
Chapter 370: Broc

Broc, who was rushing to the Fallen Angel Capital, didn’t know that the recruit target, “Charles” had already learned of his arrival this time. Charles had also prepared a special “welcome ceremony”. In fact, Broc’s situation had been pretty good recently.

The last time when Broc took the risk to kill Manu, he was severely injured, but his gain was not small. Although he had not completely digested the power of flesh and blood of Manu, a Demon Overlord, absorbed using the secret technique, his pure strength was very close to the Demon Overlord level. He only needed to break through territory.

As long as he could comprehend the Demon Overlord-level territory, he could enter the level of the peak powerhouse (not the ordinary category of Demi-God). Furthermore, with his powerful bloodline talent, he must be the elite among the Demon Overlords in the same level. At present, he was only one step away from this highest level.

Through a series of vicious methods, Broc wiped out Manu’s confidant, controlled the remaining power of the Leviathan Royal Family, and obtained the official approval of the Bloodfall. He successfully took over the power from the “seriously injured” Manu.

However, Broc was more afraid of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Catherine the Great who severely inflicted Manu and defeated the combination of 3 powerhouses with the crystal dragon and Azgalor. He acted extremely low-key in the Dark Shadow Empire. He was the first to respond to the call of empress in many resolutions, including some military reforms. He showed a kind of loyal appearance which earned him a good reputation.

Broc did so just to keep a low-key and pretend to surrender. He also knew that his forces were deeply entrenched. In particular, his father-in-law was the biggest contributor to the empress’ accession to the throne. Although he had “retired”, his influence in the military and politics was still huge. Her Majesty would not do anything to him yet. He just used this precious time to quickly increase his strength and strive to break through Demon Overlord as soon as possible.

In the unlikely event that he failed in lurking in the Dark Shadow Empire, he could still get the highest treatment and be respected when he returned to the Bloodfall. This was the importance of power.

As for Empress Catherine’s military restructuring measures, Broc was not worried because the Fire Blade Legion was being controlled by him firmly. Plus, he guarded the Jergal Fortress on the border with the Bloody Empire, which belonged to the entrance area. No matter how she reformed it, as long as he, the legion leader, was still in the position of the supreme commander, she couldn’t cause any great changes. In this regard, Broc was quite confident.

His only regret was the loss of the Illusive Demon Shield. The Illusive Shield fell into Delia’s hands. He had not been able to find out the whereabouts of this sister. Meanwhile, the Demon Shield was likely to be swindled by the trio-specialized genius master, as Manu said before dying. For this reason, Broc had a lot of spies under the Mechanic Association. The hateful thing was that this guy had never showed up as if he evaporated into thin air.

Going to the Fallen Angel Capital this time to recruit the human with black potion resources was the first important task that Broc had won after taking over from Manu. After learning about all the intel, Broc had full confidence to persuade this human “prince” who was somewhat similar to his own experience. Not only that, the rare black potion resources also made Broc yearn for it. Maybe this was an important opportunity for him to break through to the Demon Overlord. Therefore, he was confident to succeed this time.

In case he failed to win this human over, he had to take this human back and try to control him. In any case, the black potion would be in Broc’s hands.

Chen Rui completed his last “examination” of artifacts. He bid farewell to Obsidian and walked out of the palace. In the past few days, Royal Highness Regent had shown great enthusiasm. There were banquets and balls held for him every day, making Chen Rui tired of handling it. Fortunately, after staying at most this night, he would leave the capital and return to the “human world” the next day.

Every time when he was “observing” the artifact, Obsidian was always present. Although the 2 had become stable allies, and although “Charles” had no motivation to run away with the artifact, Obsidian still showed considerable caution. He didn’t give Chen Rui a chance to steal the sword at all. Therefore, Chen Rui could only record the ancient runes of the artifact according to the most unsatisfactory plan. He also applied a little trick on the Sword of Fallen Angel just in case.

There was a carriage parked outside the palace. As we all know, this was the carriage of the capital’s flower, Isabella. These days Isabella and the palace high rank consultant were very intimate as though they were sticking together like glue. They had trips during the day, and at night, “Charles” stayed at the home of the Devil’s Snare. You would know what they were doing without even thinking. There were already rumors beginning to describe how good this Sir Charles was in a certain way, how he would toss around the Devil’s Snare flower on the bed crying for mercy.

However, the truth and appearance were often inconsistent. Sometimes, the inconsistency was quite big. The poisonous “death kiss” was actually the most intimate act of the 2 so far. There had never been a second time.

Approaching the carriage, a line of eye-catching data suddenly appeared in the [Analytical Eyes]. Chen Rui’s brows raised slightly. He is finally here . He adjusted his breathing, calmed his mind, and walked into the carriage without stopping.

There was a faint fragrance in the carriage. It was the smell of Isabella’s favorite black tulip, but besides Isabella, there was another person. He was dressed in a robe with a big beard. The man had an unfamiliar face. The man had the demeanor of an ‘uncle’ in another world.

However, Chen Rui recognized this person at a glance. Let alone the familiar facial features, just the faintly visible potholes and spots on his face was the masterpiece of Chen Rui when he was in Silent Night Wetland. At that time, he was still just the strength of a Higher Demon.

Broc!

Race: Envy Royal Family (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A+.

Strength: A+, Physique: A+, Spirit: A+, Speed: A+.

Every quality had reached the peak level of the Demon Emperor and it was quite balanced. Chen Rui had also experienced the mutated talent, [The Eyes of Incubus] of his. It was very powerful.

“Who is this person?” Chen Rui’s tone was unabashedly disgusted. On the surface, he was naturally upset with the strange man who appeared next to his woman.

“I’m Isabella’s friend.” Broc spoke first. “Sir Charles, my name is Broc. I came to visit Sir from a long distance. In order to express my apologies for coming here, please accept it.”

When Chen Rui looked at a space ring handed over by Broc, he frowned and looked at Isabella on the side. Isabella looked a little cold, but she still nodded. This reaction was also normal. She had a bad relationship with Broc in the organization. This time, it was only for the sake of the “bigger picture”.

Chen Rui took it and took a careful glance at Broc. He used his spirit power to see inside the space ring. It was full of the rarest gold crystals. It seemed that the Bloodfall had spent a lot on this “gift” alone.

Although Chen Rui wanted to pit a lot more from this guy, with the lessons learned from Isabella, he put away his complacency. Demon Realm had many sages, especially this ambitious mysterious organization. His flaws might be exposed again. In this plan, the Dark Moon’s follow-up actions were interlocking, so there was no room for deviation.

The Bloodfall organization was not controlled by the lord and the elder families like Obsidian. It could be said to be fearless in dealing with matters. Once he outsmarts himself, he would be in trouble too. Don’t be too greedy. Complete the current plan in the Fallen Angel Empire first. I believe in the future, there will be opportunities to fight.
