It was not that Chen Rui’s power had far surpassed Josh, but because this blow happened to activate its “breaking aura”, a defense-piercing attribute.

Josh’s complexion changed drastically. [Aura Blade’s] momentum couldn’t be reduced. It hit right on the top of his head. Josh’s whole body was strangely distorted like something had exploded. He was instantly moved by a mysterious force, tearing apart and gushing out of the tent.

The eyes of Josh, who had escaped death twice, were full of horror. As a lord who trained magic for his whole life, there were always 1 or 2 life-saving things on his body to guard against close attack. The 2 abrupt attacks just now had actually scrapped his 2 magic items completely. The degree of horror was evident.

There were no other similar life-saving items. If he was hit by the opponent again, his head would definitely end up in a different place. Josh dared not slack off at all. His whole body exuded an astonishing white mist. One after another bouncing symbols appeared. He was obviously going all out.

He only used [Aura Blade] for the first few moves, and it had already forced Josh in such a desperate situation. There was no way Josh wouldn’t die here…

chapters.title: Chapter 386: Fight For You
chapters.body:
Chapter 386: Fight For You

Although the battle between Chen Rui and Josh in the tent was short, their movements had already alarmed the nearby guards. Many guards rushed in and blocked in front of Josh. Not far away, Rus also came quickly.

Chen Rui failed the assasination. Seeing that it was impossible to do anything, he lamented the miss. His mind turned quickly, then he controlled Kanita to show a sober appearance and shouted, “Help! There is an assassin!”

His call immediately caused a large number of soldiers to come. Chen Rui laughed heartily before rising into the air. As he waved both his hands, several huge light balls appeared and blasted the surroundings. Suddenly, the ground shook, and there was a series of bombing sounds. The nearby soldiers were either dead or wounded. There was chaos all of a sudden.

Before Chen Rui landed, a black flame containing terrifying destructive power flew toward him from the side. It was the [Dark Flame] cast by Rus. Chen Rui didn’t dodge. A little bright starlight appeared in his hand. With a lead, the [Dark Flame] flew toward the soldiers that were charging at him. Wherever the flame passed, the soldiers were all turned to ashes.

Rus was horrified and shocked. It was the first time anyone could solve the bloodline talent skill of the Lucifer Royal Family with the strongest attack power. This was Chen Rui’s new skill, [Star Diversion].

However, Chen Rui’s original intention was to lead the [Dark Flame] to Josh, but he couldn’t seem to control this skill well yet, so it was led to the soldiers.

This move stunned Rus. A great sword appeared in his hand. He had a solemn expression.

Chen Rui saw more and more soldiers rushing toward him, but he did not want to fight anymore. He tapped his feet, and he floated in the air. Under Kanita’s order, all the soldiers pulled their bows. When they were prepared to release the arrows, they suddenly heard an explosion sound. Amongst the blurry vision, the floating figure suddenly disappeared into the sky with an incredible speed like a cannonball.

Josh and Rus looked at each other. They saw the shock in each other’s eyes. Poisoning and burning, controlling Kanita with secret techniques, assassinating the head of the army, and then retreating in front of the two Demon Emperors and the thousands troops! When did the Dark Moon have such a terrifying character? After counting the losses, Josh flashed a vicious light in his eyes. He ordered the army to set off immediately and head to Town Leith- The army’s morale has been damaged currently. If I avoid fighting now, I’m afraid that it will get worse. As long as I defeat the main force of the Dark Moon, no matter how strong the mysterious assassin’s personal strength is, he cannot change the overall situation! Besides, Krobelus happens to be away. Otherwise, she can definitely catch this assassin! He is not that terrifying! Krobelus was rushing to the Blue Lake Mountain Range impatiently now. In order to arrive at the “real entrance” of the treasure before it was closed, she had turned into a dragon to fly there.

The emerald dragon was good at poison and water element power. Although she did not have the strongest body among dragons, her flying ability was far better than pseudo-dragons like wyvern. If wyvern was the strongest air combat force, then dragons were the real air overlords. With Krobelus’ Demon Overlord level power, she did not take a long time to reach the Blue Lake Mountain Range.

Chen Rui also considered this before. Since Paglio’s strength had not recovered, if he was facing Josh, he definitely would not be able to kill Josh in one blow. Once Krobelus knew that she was being fooled, she would quickly rush back to the Red Spirit army. With her ability, the round trip would not take too much time, so the mission of the poison dragon was to delay her. Even if the poison dragon couldn’t wait for the arrival of the Earth Elemental King, he must also delay her until the end of the battle between the two armies. This was to ensure that the emerald dragon, the Demon Overlord powerhouse, who could affect the entire battle, couldn’t appear at a critical moment.

After Krobelus landed at the entrance of the Blue Lake Mountain Range, she recovered to her human form. Holding the “treasure map,” she walked step by step toward the entrance of the “treasure”.

“The entrance is just ahead, but these inscriptions are really troublesome… How do I get in?”

“ Sigh , if I knew this earlier, I shouldn’t have slipped away the Dragon Inscription class back then…”

“ Sobs … My treasure. I don’t care, even if I have to barge in, even if it breaks my newly bought clothes, I must get the treasure today!”

Ms. Emerald Dragon tried to dispel the Dragon Inscription while thumping her chest with remorse. ‘It is only when it comes time to applying knowledge that one regrets not acquiring enough of it.’ At the same time, the Red Spirit army had reached the outskirts of Town Leith. They happened to meet face-on with the Dark Moon army who was rushing there.

The two armies faced each other at an effective distance. Almost all of the Dark Moon soldiers were deployed this time. Under the Red Blood Royal Flag inherited by the Lord of Midnight Sun, Shea personally led a cone-shaped formation of imperial guards. She wore a silver-white armor with a long sword on her waist. She was sitting on a white demon horse. Her long golden hair fluttered gently with the wind, and she looked very heroic.

The 2 wings were the garrison guards led by Arux and Old Ford respectively. The whole formation was like an arrow.

However, the Dark Moon only had imperial guards and garrison guards. The West Road army was nowhere to be seen. The total number of the 2 armies was barely close to 40,000, whereas the exact number of the Red Spirit army in a 3 semicircle formation was 83,000. This was excluding the soldiers who remained wounded by the poisonous fog and chaos.

One could clearly see the momentum of the less people at a glance.

The Dark Moon’s formation made Josh frown secretly. Didn’t they say that the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal is calm, wise, and she has the demeanour of Lord of Midnight Sun, how come she set up a charging formation upon arrival? Does she really plan to fight desperately in this place today? As the saying went, those who were cruel were afraid of the desperate ones. If Shea really planned to perish together, the loss of the Red Spirit army would probably be greater than Josh imagined.

“Red Spirit warriors, look at the poor Dark Moon army. Their armors are ragged, their swords are crooked, their spears are slanted, and the number of soldiers is pitiful. Their faces are clearly marked with fear and panic. What’s more, their commander is clueless about the art of war! Considering the ratio of the current military strength, if the timid Dark Moon insists on defending, perhaps they can cause us a little hindrance. However, they take the initiative to attack now. What should we do with the ants who come to die?”

“Kill! Kill! Kill!” The Red Spirit army thumped the ground with their weapons. The neat sound echoed in the entire wilderness. Faced with the enemy troops who were multiple times higher in number and with a high fighting spirit, the Dark Moon’s army seemed to be even more nervous. Some mounts had begun to retreat restlessly.

Pre-war encouragement was something every commander would do. Josh was worthy of being the lord who understood his army. His few words had greatly boosted the morale of the soldiers. It seemed to have greatly reduced the effects of the previous poisoning and the burning of food.

At this time, Shea’s firm voice sounded, “Dark Moon soldiers, this is the land where we grew up; our most precious home. The Red Spirit Lord Josh allowed his son to do evil things, and he acted perversely by rebelling against his superiors. He invades our home shamelessly. If we take a step back, the wealth that we have accumulated through hardship will be plundered; our relatives will be humiliated and killed; and the home we built with much difficulty will be destroyed and wiped out. Can we retreat?”

“No!” Dark Moon’s soldiers replied simultaneously, but they were slightly inferior in terms of momentum. After all, their enemies were higher in number.

“The royal flag on my head is the Red Blood Flame Flag of the Lord of Midnight Sun. Once upon a time, this flag stood on the peak of the Demon Realm, accepting everyone’s admiration. No one can shake its majesty! Remember the Warlock Battle? The Lord of Midnight Sun, with 7,000 people, smashed the Bloody Empire with 30,000 people! Today, under the guidance of the royal flag, we will pierce the enemy’s throat with the sharpest sword and high spirits to revive the glory of the Lord of Midnight Sun!”

Shea’s voice resounded throughout the audience, “In the name of Shea. Lucifer, in the name of Lord of Midnight Sun’s grandchild, I now bestow the title of “Red Blood” to the imperial guards, and the title of “Flame” to the garrison guard. The glory of the Red Blood Flame will reappear in the Demon Realm!”

The Dark Moon army suddenly became high-spirited and vivacious. They yelled out the slogan of the Midnight Sun army of the Demon Realm back then – “Red Blood Flame, triumph in every battle!”

Although the Lord of Midnight Sun had died for 400 years, the prestige of the top powerhouse and the military god of the Demon Realm was still deeply rooted in people’s hearts. Even the Red Spirit army couldn’t help but be afraid. With Josh’s identity, he took the initiative to defeat the Lord of Midnight Sun’s bloodline, Princess Shea’s estate. He couldn’t dispel the rebel reputation for going against his superiors even if he had the capital’s special permission.

Feeling that his army’s morale was suppressed, Josh turned his mind and used another move.

A rider in the Red Spirit army went out a few steps, and his voice sounded, “Brothers of the Dark Moon! I’m Karl, the mechanic master of the Mellon Family. I currently serve under Sir Josh. At present, Patriarch Sukh of the Mellon Family is already attacking the Dark Moon City. He has controlled the entire Dark Moon City. Your relatives and friends are already under Sir Josh’s control! As long as you put down your weapons and surrender, not only you, your dearest ones will also be spared death!”

Cutting off retreat route was a taboo for soldiers. As soon as these words came out, the Dark Moon army suddenly made a commotion. Fortunately, another voice sounded, “Sukh. Mellon rebelled and caused chaos in the Dark Moon, and he was killed by me,Ford. Saiful. The whole army of the Mellon Family was wiped out. Their entire family was also annihilated. Princess Royal has ordered the deprivation of the Mellon Family’s surname. Sukh’s head is here!”

A person’s head was thrown out from a distance. Some sharp-eyed Dark Moon soldiers recognized that it was Sukh’s head. Karl. Mellon who was at the opposite actually fainted in exasperation when he heard that his whole family had been annihilated.

Shea received a hint from Old Gauss beside her. She took advantage of the high morale, held her long sword firmly, and pointed at the enemy. Rows of cavalry appeared at the front of the team. They were ready to charge.

Although it was Shea’s first time on the battlefield; even though her palm was already sweating; even though she could feel her violent heartbeat, she still looked calm and firm. She knew that she was the core of the Dark Moon army. If she showed cowardice first, the whole army would be defeated without a fight.

That man… should have evacuated safely with Alice… Perhaps this is really my last battle!

Please bless me, father! Lord of Midnight Sun! Josh didn’t expect his opponent was prepared long ago. His move was actually self-defeating instead. With a wave of the flag in his hand, the front army raised their spears, and they were prepared to fight.

“Dark Moon military officers! Soldiers!” Josh’s figure slowly floated up. He was surrounded by a few strange symbols, and a powerful aura was dispersed, “I, Josh. Alvin, was once entrusted by the regent king of the capital to promise to give you one last way to survive before destroying you all! The official position of the military officers who surrender remains unchanged. There are also rewards. Soldiers who surrender and their family members will be spared death. If you are stubborn, I will purge the Dark Moon with blood! Ford. Saiful, if you come out and surrender now, I can promise publicly that I won’t hold you accountable for your faults in destroying the Mellon Family. I will continue to reuse you and your son, Tim. Also… that human financial officer, Chen Rui, you can continue to serve as the financial officer in charge of the economy in my Red Spirit Estate to maximize your talents…”

The Dark Moon was already ready to attack initially, but Josh suddenly made this move. Those who were pointed out showed a little hesitation. Old Ford took the lead to yell, “Don’t bother about this scam!”

At this moment, a figure riding a horse in the Dark Moon formation stepped out of the team.

Shea hadn’t officially ordered the cavalry to charge, yet this man took the lead to step forward. Obviously, after hearing Josh’s “call,” he wanted to be the first to surrender.

At this critical moment on the verge of breaking out, a traitor actually appeared first!

Great! Josh was secretly overjoyed in his heart, and he made a hand gesture. The herald understood Josh, and he immediately ordered the front army to prepare for the assault. They were ready to make a move when the Dark Moon’s army spirit was most wavered.

Seeing this figure, Shea’s pupils suddenly shrank.

Chen Rui!

Shouldn’t he leave with Athena, Alice and the others already? Why is he here? There was a commotion in the Dark Moon’s army. The Princess Royal’s most trusted financial officer is actually preparing to surrender to the enemy? Some soldiers had aimed their stretched bows at Chen Rui, awaiting Princess Royal’s order to immediately shoot the traitor.

Chen Rui took a few steps forward on his horse and stopped. Suddenly, he turned around, and he took a look.

He was not looking at those bows and arrows, but he was looking at Shea under the Red Blood Flame flag.

That beautiful princess with white armor and fluttering blonde hair.

The woman who gave him the last “order”.

Although it was just a glance, Shea sensed a lot from it. She had never felt some of them before. Perhaps this was a kind of tacit understanding.

Chen Rui smiled slightly at Shea, then he turned his head to face the Red Spirit army. He drew his sword and pointed it at the Red Spirit army. This was not what a person who surrendered should do. One after another Dark Moon’s army relaxed their breath. The human’s strength was very weak. He could hardly hold his sword with one hand, but no one laughed at him.

“For Princess Royal!”

The human’s voice was not loud, but it was firm and powerful. He rode a horse to rush forward first.

One person facing the enemy’s army of nearly 100,000.

In an instant, the spirits of Dark Moon’s cavalry and everyone in the Dark Moon soared. A weak human actually rushed to the front! Shea’s eyes had already shed tears uncontrollably. She felt an unprecedented firmness from the long sword in her hand. In this battle, she had no regrets regardless of life or death.

Seeing Shea waving her sword, Old Gauss immediately yelled, “For Princess Royal!”

This voice became louder in an instant. Almost everyone in the Dark Moon army yelled out. The wave-like roar resounded throughout the battlefield. Their powerful momentum far surpassed the Red Spirit army that had an absolute number advantage.

In the sound of the charging horn, the human’s “poor” horse-riding skills had long been surpassed by his surging comrades. One after another troops of the Dark Moon cavalry rushed toward the Red Spirit like an unstoppable tide.

The Dark Moon actually has such a force of cavalry! Facing the powerful momentum and charge of the Dark Moon cavalry, Josh did not expect that his last trick would turn out to be his biggest failure. He immediately gritted his teeth with hatred. Their momentum was firmly overwhelmed by the opponent now, so he hastily ordered the army reorganized to face the enemy.

All of Josh’s tactics failed; the defeat of the Red Spirit Army was imminent despite the number advantage. What was the Blue Lava army doing now?

chapters.title: Chapter 387: Three Words
chapters.body:
Chapter 387: Three Words

Although Josh was shocked, he did not panic. The mobility and impact of the cavalry could be fully unleashed in the wilderness, but the cavalry in this team was only about 3,000 at best, so the threat was limited. Not to mention, the Red Spirit also had cavalry. Josh immediately gave an order, “Magicians, prepare magic! Archers, shoot!”

Rows of archers held up their longbows and shot arrows into the sky. However, the loss of the cavalry was not heavy. They were all equipped with shiny silver light armor and shields. The powerful maneuverability and effective defensive devices greatly reduced the arrows’ lethality. At this time, Kaguli, who rushed to the front, screamed. All the cavalry took out a strange bow. To be precise, it was a crossbow. They fired crossbow arrows toward the sky on top of the Red Spirit army.

The Red Spirit army showed disdainful laughter. The range of crossbow arrows are much shorter than that of bows, and it is difficult to reload. What’s the use of shooting arrows into the sky from such a distance? At this moment, the almost declining crossbow arrow suddenly exploded in the sky, ejecting countless smaller arrows like second-level fire arrows. They shot toward the Red Spirit front army.

With this sudden change, the Red Spirit’s front army hardly had the time to raise their shields. What was more frightening was that these small arrows would explode. They were equivalent to small magic bullets, but the range of attack was very wide. In the midst of continuous explosion sounds, there was a horrifying chaos with heavy casualties all of a sudden.

Josh’s face was pale. At such a long distance, the crossbow is actually better than the bow! It simply subverts the conventional law of long-range warfare. When did this kind of weapon appear in the Demon Realm? When the front army was in chaos, the cavalry had already narrowed the distance. If the Red Spirit cavalry were dispatched now, they might be able to entangle and delay the opponent’s advancement, but Josh did not do so because the magician team had finished their preparation. The dense magic bombardment would become a nightmare for these strange cavalry.

Suddenly, wind blades, fireballs, icicles, and thunder poured down like rain. They intertwined to form a splendid and colorful death web.

Under the leadership of the cavalry leader, Kaguli, the cavalry of the Dark Moon immediately dispersed, but many of them were still affected. Several galloping figures disappeared in the light of magic.

“Cavalry brigade, dispatch!” Josh spotted the opportunity, and he gave an order. The most elite cavalry brigade of the Red Spirit rushed out of the formation, trying to annihilate all the remaining Dark Moon cavalry. However, the Dark Moon cavalry was very counterintuitive. They did not confront it. Before the opponent approached, they turned around and left. However, while running back, they fired crossbow arrows backward.

It was still the strange crossbow arrow that split and exploded. It had a wide range of damage. Amid the sound of the explosion, the Red Spirit cavalry fell off their horses. Obviously, the Dark Moon cavalry didn’t load the crossbow arrow just now. It seemed that the crossbow could be shot more than once.

Seeing their companions fall down one by one, the Red Spirit cavalry chased in rage. They wanted to catch up with the enemy and chop them into pieces, but the Dark Moon’s style of fighting was very obvious. They only fight in long-range, so they would not give the enemy a chance to approach.

Josh’s heart was bleeding for miscalculating his move. These cavalry are the elite of the Red Spirit. They are built with large amounts of black crystal coins! Now, facing the Dark Moon army whose strength is clearly weaker than my army, I actually lost so much! In desperation, Josh had no choice but to order the cavalry to return. Although the cavalry of the Red Spirit was in a fit of rage, they loyally executed the order. There is nothing much that can be done. We can neither chase them nor attack them. We only suffer from their attack. What can we do other than returning? At this moment, the Dark Moon’s cavalry detestably turned back. They actually took the initiative to shoot the Red Spirit. It was that crossbow arrow again. They improved a lot by dispersing the formation wide open. Even the magicians could hardly cause such mass destruction effectively.

Another large number of Red Spirit cavalry fell off from their horses. Not only the soldiers were in rage, even Josh himself almost yelled out— This is too much! These magic crossbows were a result of research by Tonk of the Cloak Gang under the guidance of Master Xingxing. Each could be fired 5 times. Every Dark Moon cavalry was equipped with 2 of these crossbows. However, due to the high cost and limited amount, they could only be equipped with this cavalry currently.

“Sir Josh.” Rus frowned, “The opponent is very cunning, so let’s order the whole army assault. In the face of pure power, all tricks are just illusory.”

Josh gritted his teeth and nodded. He was secretly regretful. If I didn’t plan to preserve my strength, I wouldn’t have caused the cavalry brigade to suffer such a heavy loss. Just now, at least 2,000 elite cavalry are injured.

Although the Dark Moon is able to win a small victory with the power of the strange crossbow, the difference of strengths of the 2 sides are still obvious. Even if we did not seize the first opportunity, even if we suffered unexpected losses, we will kill all the damn guys in the Dark Moon! The heavy horn sounded, and the Red Spirit army quickly adjusted its formation to prepare for an assault.

While paying attention to the battle, Shea kept looking for Chen Rui who rushed out just now. The strange thing was that she never found him. Hearing the horn of the other party, she knew that the real test was coming. Meanwhile, the magic crossbow of the cavalry was almost used up, so she immediately ordered the cavalry to retreat quickly.

With the sound of the horn, the Red Spirit army charged like a tide. Although the Dark Moon’s morale had been greatly encouraged in the previous small victory, it was inevitable to show a trace of anxiety when they faced an assault of the enemy which was twice the size of their own.

At this moment, Josh suddenly sensed something, and he looked into the air. In his sight, a group of black spots were rapidly expanding. They were densely packed. There were actually nearly a thousand of them. Josh and Rus were both extremely shocked. They exclaimed in unison, “Wyverns!”

So many wyverns? Could it be… the air legion of the Dark Moon?

Impossible! It is impossible for a typical estate to have so many wyverns. Let alone the Red Spirit, even the only dragon knight legion in the capital is only 1000 people! How can there be a whole dragon knight legion in a poor place like the Dark Moon? Could it be that the battle between the 2 armies alarmed a secret large group of wyvern? “There are people on wyvern!” With an eyesight beyond Rus, Josh exclaimed.

The wyvern quickly proved the suspicion of the 2 Demon Emperors with their actions. Strange objects fell from the back of the wyverns and landed in the assault formation of the Red Spirit army. The objects suddenly exploded.

This was not the drizzle like the previous bursting arrows, but a magic storm with a large killing scale. All of a sudden, there were flames everywhere, and the ground was shaking. The whole Red Spirit army, who were charging densely, were heavily injured or died in just a few rounds. The wyverns’ speed and height made it impossible for archers to effectively kill them.

The magician team immediately launched an attack on the wyverns, but the wyverns’ strength was extremely strong. A few dives caused the magician team to be in disorder. Some magicians were scratched by their poisonous claws, and they were killed on the spot. Some were caught and thrown down from a high altitude, causing their tendons to break and fracture.

The air legion and the ground army were indeed not on the same level.

However, no matter how strong the wyverns were, their number was limited after all. In the face of the Red Spirit’s tens of thousands of troops, in addition to killing and wounding, it even caused deterrence. The Dark Moon army never thought that there was still such a powerful air force hidden in their own side. All of them were excited.

When the Red Spirit army fell into chaos and panic, and the morale on Shea’s side rose to its peak, she finally issued a decisive order to charge. The Dark Moon army’s arrow formation began to charge forward.

The previous battles still contained skill and testing. The next step was the real hand-to-hand combat. Red Spirit’s morale was continuously diminished. Especially when the air was constantly being attacked by the wyvern intrusion, the army’s spirit was shaken. On the other hand, the Dark Moon’s morale was surging. Coupled with the exquisite equipment which Shea made at all costs, they gained the upper hand.

Josh never imagined that the scene would be completely out of his expectation. Knowing that the biggest hidden danger of the wyverns in the air must be solved, he immediately rose into the air. Just as a wyvern swooped over, the mark wrapped around Josh flashed a strange light. It exuded a terrifying chill which swept past the wyvern.

The wyvern and the knight on its back froze at a speed visible to the naked eye. The wyvern could no longer flap its wings, so it fell to the ground from mid-air. Its body shattered like an ice sculpture.

The powerhouse in the Demon Emperor realm had the ability to fly without any magic support. On the other side, Rus had the bloodline talent [Holy Wings] to fly. He waved his greatsword wrapped in flames in the air. The black flame hit one flying wyvern. It wailed and turned to ashes instantly.

Shea had been paying attention to Josh’s actions. Seeing that the 2 Demon Emperors, Josh and Rus, finally took action, she knew that there was no other Demon Emperor besides her on her side. If this persisted, the wyvern legion would be wiped out, and the battlefield would also be reversed. She didn’t have the time to consider the danger at the moment. 2 pairs of black wings emerged behind her, emitting a faint light. She flew toward Josh.

Josh had already been prepared for it. With a point of his finger, a cloud of [Ice Flame] flew toward Shea. Shea’s purple pupils instantly turned black and white. There was a snow-like long sword in her hand. She drew a sharp light arc and cut the [Ice Flame] into half.

“ Oh? ” Josh was slightly surprised, and then he showed a determined expression, “I didn’t expect the Princess Royal Highness to have reached the Demon Emperor realm, but unfortunately, you are only the early stage of the Demon Emperor. Moreover, your actual combat experience is too poor. You’re not my opponent.”

This sentence was not bragging. After Shea used the power of [Heart of Light and Dark] and [Holy Wings] to cut apart the ice flame, her hand, which was holding the sword, was slightly trembling because of the [Thunder] power contained in the ice flame. However, she didn’t hesitate at all, and she flew straight to Josh.

Josh’s flying ability was a combination of the Demon Emperor and magician, but it was not as fast as [Holy Wings]. Once Shea came close, even if her strength was far weaker, he would be in an extremely passive position.

Josh had abundant combat experience, so he certainly would not let Shea approach him so easily. The rune light in his hand was shining brightly. Shea felt an intangible shock approaching her. After she blocked with her sword, she was blown away by the powerful shock wave. She managed to stabilize herself with much difficulty in the air.

At this time, Rus’ figure appeared ghostly behind her. He was carrying the greatsword of horrifying [Dark Flame], and he beheaded immediately. Meanwhile, Shea had just used up her power, so she could not seem to avoid it.

At this moment, a figure appeared beside Shea instantly. This powerful sword slashed on the blue light shield that appeared at the same time. It actually only left a faint crack. Most of the [Dark Flame] seemed to be absorbed by the light shield as well.

This was a man in a cloak with a strange mask faintly visible on his face. One couldn’t see his true face.

Rus was taken aback. He slashed again, but he was still unable to break the light shield. He saw that the man in the cloak opened his hand and aimed at him. Rus secretly knew that there was danger, so he quickly backed away.

3 huge light balls fired one after another, flying toward Rus. If he didn’t notice it earlier, he would have been hit.

It’s him! The mysterious powerhouse that did the assassination earlier! Seeing the familiar light ball, Rus and Josh understood at the same time. Then, the figure pulled Shea with [Teleportation] to avoid the [Ice Storm] sent by Josh.

The blue transparent shield seemed quite familiar to Josh, but he still didn’t think of a certain human. Not to mention that it was impossible for the human to appear here, even if he was really here, it was impossible for him to resist the 2 slashes from Rus which contained [Dark Flame].

However, Shea’s eyes widened instantly. [Double Teleportations]! Protective shield! I have a deep impression! It’s that guy! The enemy who once sneaked into the Dark Moon Palace, stole the fragments of the God-Eating Mask, and got a glimpse of my biggest secret. He’s also the biggest enemy of the Lucifer Royal Family- Beel! Ze! Bub! This disappeared enemy unexpectedly appeared at this time. He even saved her somehow.

Shea’s eyes showed a strong murderous intent. The long sword in her hand stabbed at the cloaked man without thinking.

Although Josh and Rus are also enemies, the battle with them is only within the Fallen Angel Empire. The Beelzebub Royal Family is the biggest hidden danger of the entire empire. As a descendant of the Lord of Midnight Sun, I will never betray the entire empire for certain benefits. Even if he saved me just now, he must have a conspiracy. No matter what, this worst enemy must die! The long sword in Shea’s hand tightened. It was grabbed by the opponent empty-handedly, and it was unable to thrust forward. Shea’s eyes quickly began to turn into black and white. She obviously wanted to use the strongest power of the [Heart of Light and Dark].

“A foolish woman!” The man in the cloak said, “Remember these 3 words?!”

Shea heard this familiar voice like a thunder sound. “A foolish woman” was what she said to herself previously in the council hall of the palace…

This was one of her secrets. Only the man knew and understood.

It! Is! Impossible! “A few hours ago, I thought I had forgotten these 3 words, but now my memory is clearer than ever. Anyway, you should remember a certain promise, right?”

——When I say these 3 words next time, you can’t kill me. This was her promise back then.

“If you want to know the truth, just survive this battle, then I will wait for you at a place that only you know.” Shea heard a whispering voice. As soon as the cloaked man said this, he turned into a plume of smoke and flew toward Josh.

Shea took a deep breath as she forcibly suppressed the shock and doubt in her heart. Yes, survive! Then wait for him to answer in person! In any case, I must know the answer! The determined Princess Royal put aside all the distracting thoughts. She stood in the air, and she pointed the long sword at Rus in front of her. An unprecedented powerful aura burst out.

Both Rus and Shea were early stage Demon Emperors. Although Rus had more experience and strength, he didn’t dare to let his guards down. 2 pairs of black wings also appeared behind him. He blew the greatsword in front of him, and the [Dark Flame] started burning.

Without the disruption from Rus and Josh, the wyverns began to attack the Red Spirit’army frantically again. The Red Spirit rear army and the middle army became the targets of the intensive strikes. The battle situation entered a stalemate.

Judging from this situation, the outcome of the battle in the air between the leaders from both sides would determine the outcome of the entire battle.

Foolish woman, even if everyone betrays you, he wouldn’t…

chapters.title: Chapter 388: The Defeat Of The Red Spirit
chapters.body:
Chapter 388: The Defeat Of The Red Spirit

The wilderness of the Town Leith.

On the ground, 2 troops were fighting dauntlessly.

Everyone could hardly hear any other sound. There were only each other’s enemies in the bloody sight. The individual strength of ordinary soldiers was insignificant in this kind of war, but when the individual was integrated into a huge collective group, their momentum and actions would give rise to a feeling of invincibility. This was morale.

Although the Red Spirit’s strength and combat strength gradually manifested over time, the Dark Moon continued to fight persistently with this brave morale.

In the air, besides the howling wyverns, four wisps of smoke-like shadows were constantly teleporting, colliding, and changing forms.

A cold sweat broke out on Josh’s face. The strength of this cloaked man is obviously just at the early stage of the Demon Emperor, but I, who is at the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, am restrained tightly. I have powerful compound magic, but I cannot maximize its power. Moreover, if I am slightly distracted, the opponent can kill me with a blow. Who is this guy? Why does he want to help Shea? There seems to be some strange entanglement between him and Shea just now…

In any case, this dangerous enemy must be killed today. Otherwise, I’m afraid that this sure-win war will be unbelievably reversed. Josh yelled out loud. His voice overwhelmed the noisy clamor of the entire battlefield. Several blue runes surrounded by flames violently jumped. Amid the white mist, a thrilling coldness dispersed rapidly in all directions.

With Josh as the center, the soldiers of both sides who were within 100 meters were instantly frozen into ice sculptures, and the soldiers nearby fled. No one dared to approach this area.

Chen Rui did not act rashly. He calmly watched Josh in the white mist. He had already seen this kind of magic territory with the combination of water and wind elements when he was disguised as “Charles” previously. However, it was obvious that Josh only launched a little power at that time to test him; he didn’t really launch the killing move. Josh was already going all out now.

When the several blue runes burst together, the battlefield disappeared. Chen Rui’s vision appeared in a snowy space filled with wind, snow and mist.

Josh’s figure disappeared, but a large group of huge figures loomed in the white fog. When Chen Rui looked closely, they were a group of hideous demonic beasts. Their 2-meter body was very strong. Their claws were sharp, and they had wings. Their bodies shone with a faint crystal light as if they were formed by some kind of ice and snow crystals. They rushed toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui punched, and he hit the beast at the front. A large area of cracks appeared on the demonic beast’s body. Half of its body was shattered, but it was still waving its paws like it was never hit. It did not seem to feel any pain.

Chen Rui frowned, and he punched again. He completely turned the demonic beasts into powder. He opened his hand, and he fired a huge [Aurora Shot]. With his current strength, the power of the [Aurora Shot] had been improved. Coupled with the enhanced power characteristics of [Dual Training], wherever the [Aurora Shot] passed, the demonic beasts were destroyed upon contact. Soon, this group of strange demonic beasts was completely wiped out.

However, the demonic beasts in the white mist began to appear again as if they were inexhaustible. If this went on, even if Chen Rui’s endurance was strong, he would exhaust his strength eventually.

Chen Rui only attacked to test just now. This time, he didn’t fight with the ice beasts. His figures appeared here and there, constantly dodging the attacks of the demonic beasts. Suddenly, his hands formed a blade form, and he slashed toward the white mist on the side.

The white mist was originally an intangible thing. When it was cut by his blade, it actually made a substantial cracking sound. Josh’s surprised voice sounded, “How do you know I’m here?!”

“You used those ice beasts to attract my attention just now, but you have been changing directions to attempt a sneak attack…” Chen Rui sneered. He did not say anything more, and he slashed with his [Aura Blade] once again.

Josh’s figure was looming in the white mist, and a strange mark appeared on the center of his eyebrows. It emitted many strands of white mist. The slash split his body into 2, but there was no sign of blood or injury. Instead, he quickly combined into a complete physical form again.

His intangible state was a bit similar to Broc’s [Incubus Territory], but Chen Rui instinctively felt that Josh’s mystery was different.

“A very powerful secret technique attack. It can even destroy my soul power. Unfortunately, my power is endless in this territory, including my soul power.”

Josh waved his hand, and a thundercloud storm struck toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui launched [Sonic Boom] of the [Flying] skill. His floating figure suddenly accelerated and avoided the storm, but he fell into the besiege of the ice beasts.

Chen Rui frowned. He defeated the demonic beasts that were approaching. At the same time, a white light shone brightly in his hand. He fired continuous [Aurora Shots] toward Josh.

Josh didn’t dodge it. The light imprinted in the middle of his eyebrows luminated brightly as if he was planning to perish together. Countless of terrifying [Thunder] with crystal sparks hit toward Chen Rui.

The [Aurora Shot] hit Josh, and his body suddenly fell apart, but he recombined again like he was unharmed. Chen Rui could no longer avoid the [Thunder]. He was struck straight, and he suddenly flew out.

Josh succeeded with a blow. He felt that the winning ticket was in his hand, so he laughed triumphantly, “I’m immortal in here. You have no chance of winning…”

Before he finished speaking, his voice stopped abruptly. He saw the enemy stabilized his inverted figure as he stretched his neck without any injury. Chen Rui shook the remaining sparks in his hands as if the powerful [Thunder] attack just now was just a mere lighting magic.

Josh couldn’t believe his eyes. This man in the cloak is obviously weaker than me. It’s just that his strange talent and secret skills put me in a passive situation previously. However, it’s not outside now. Instead, it’s my [Icy Snow Territory]! In this territory, he was directly struck by my strongest compound magic, [Ice Thunder Flash], but he is totally fine! Chen Rui had fought with Josh before, so he knew that his opponent was proficient in the 2 elements of water and wind. He had earlier prepared anti-wind and anti-water element equipment under the cover of his cloak. Plus his own [Anti-Magic] characteristics, he was really “bullying” Josh.

Moreover, after the strongest Demon Overlord level [Thunder] technique’s “baptism” from the fairy dragon, Josh’s attack of this level was just drizzle.

However, Chen Rui couldn’t crack the opponent’s territory at that moment, especially the special characteristics of splitting and recombining. Josh’s so-called “immortality” did not seem like bragging.

Chen Rui once realized a trace of basic law in the space of the Demi-God territory, so his understanding of territory had reached an unprecedented height. It was even beyond some Demon Overlords.

Everything in the world was a masterpiece of nature. It could be said to be perfect, but it was not the flawless kind of perfect. The same was true for territory.

Territory power was actually the power of nature and the world. Any territory was a perfect work of art, but they all had flaws. The so-called “flawless” was contrary to nature. That was a flaw itself.

I must find out the flaw in this territory! Just when Chen Rui’s mind was highly concentrated, the [Analysis] of the [True Analytical Eyes] began to gleam. The surrounding territory became another kind of sight. Josh, the ice beasts, and white mist all became translucent with outlines. There was also a layer of strange objects that were constantly changing. Judging from the fluctuations and changes, they should be invisible energy forms.

This was like an analysis chart of some kind of instrument, and it was three-dimensional.

Chen Rui encountered this situation for the first time since the five-star evolution. It turns out that [Analysis] is the ultimate mystery of the [True Analytical Eyes]! He dodged the attack of Josh and the ice beasts while feeling the brand new [Analytical Eyes]. Unfortunately, this focused state seemed to consume a huge amount of spiritual power, and it couldn’t last. Soon, the normal display was restored.

Although it was not maintained for a long time, Chen Rui had a clear understanding of Josh’s “immortality” secret in the territory. It turned out to be a magic skill similar to countless mirrors. In fact, he couldn’t really be reborn, but the [Mirror Image] was recovered. It was different from Sabrina’s [Clone Territory].

The most straightforward way was to destroy all the [Mirror Images], but that kind of “mirror” had a lot of layers. Besides, it could automatically recover. With the power of [Aura Blade] and [Aurora Shot], perhaps it would not be possible to destroy all of them in a short time.

Chen Rui didn’t want to delay too much time because this place was not his only battlefield. In the Blue Lake Mountain Range, the poison dragon with the Demon Emperor’s peak strength was still fighting against the Demon Overlord emerald dragon alone.

The fight on the battlefield was still intensive. The battlefield between Shea and Rus had changed from the air to the ground.

“Ding! ” Shea blocked a sword attack, and she involuntarily stepped back. The armor on her right shoulder was torn apart and blood was flowing out. Rus was about to chase her when a strange spiritual impact suddenly came in his mind. He had a severe headache suddenly.

At the same time, a figure wearing a cloak and a mask appeared behind him. The 2 blue lights in his hand quickly swirled toward Rus.

With a roar, Rus beared the pain and waved the greatsword backwards. A strong energy wave smashed several innocent soldiers in the distance. However, the figure holding the blue light was already prepared, so he dodged at an incredible speed.

Rus was infuriated- This is not the first time. If it wasn’t because this insidious guy suddenly appeared, with my strength, I would have taken down Shea long ago. Although Rus only awakened 2 bloodline talents, [Dark Flame] and [Holy Wings], which were less than Shea’s [Heart of Light and Dark], his experience and combat power were far better than Shea. She was just a “rookie” who had just been promoted to the Demon Emperor.

Shea seized the chance and stood firm. With a clear chirp, the long sword gleamed sharply. She slashed toward the ground. The ground shook violently, and then the whole place was shaking. The ground around Rus was erupting like volcanoes. Countless white rays broke out of the ground. Rus finally dispelled the influence of the spiritual impact. He immediately felt the crisis, and he parried with his sword. A strange arc of light blocked the numerous rays, but the black armor on his body still couldn’t bear the strong impact. Cracks had begun to appear.

At this moment, Rus, Shea, and the mysterious man holding dual blades all sensed something different in the battlefield in the air. They all looked up simultaneously.

The territory filled with white mist and cold aura was shining like stars at first, then suddenly a strange color appeared – Red.

The fierce, manic destruction breath contained in this red color, even Shea and Rus, who possessed the strongest destruction flame of the Demon Realm, [Dark Flame], couldn’t help but to be stunned. The white mist territory began to twist continuously just like the water of a lake being stirred up by a giant dragon. In the midst of the shake, it unexpectedly boiled.

“ Boom! ”

It seemed that something exploded, and the white mist dispersed all over. A figure fell from mid-air like a broken kite. Rus’s facial expression suddenly changed. This person… is Josh. Josh’s breath of life had dropped to his lowest point. The armor on his body was horribly twisted and damaged. Shocking scars were faintly visible. There was only one look in the eyes of the Red Spirit Lord – Fear.

A middle stage Demon Emperor was actually defeated by an early stage Demon Emperor, and he was completely defeated- Josh’s strongest territory was completely and directly torn by that indescribable terrifying force. It was an utter defeat! The extremely weak Josh’s vision gradually dimmed. He seemed to vaguely see Kanita’s figure approaching.

Josh was actually defeated! Rus in the air showed an unbelievable look. As soon as he reacted, a red light in the white mist had rushed toward him at an unimaginable speed.

Rus instinctively swung his sword. There was a clear sound. The greatsword in his hand was broken into 2 segments. Rus himself was also dumbfounded by a terrifying force. In shock, 2 pairs of black wings immediately appeared behind him. With the help of the inertia, he fled into the air.

This kind of power is so terrifying that even Josh was defeated. I am definitely not his match! In any case, I should run for my life first! The strange sound of [Sonic Boom] sounded. The red light-wrapped figure instantly caught up with Rus in the air. There was only a flash of light, and Rus’ head had fallen off. His body was still flying in the air because of the speed. It only dropped to the ground after a while.

“Josh and Rus are dead! The Red Spirit who surrenders will not be killed!” The powerful voice resounded throughout the battlefield.

Shea looked at the man wearing a strange mask in the air wrapped in red destruction flames. He held the enemy’s head high with an overwhelming Demon God-like demeanour. Suddenly, there was a strange throb in her heart.

She was not fearful, but throbbing instead.

Is it really him? He… also has such a strong and brave side? The Red Spirit army suddenly panicked. Where is sir lord? Is he really defeated? That head… At this time, Kanita had found Josh who fell to the ground, and he shouted, “Sir lord is seriously injured! The capital envoy is dead! Retreat quickly!”

This shouting further aggravated the situation. Even sir lord was defeated! Without a leader, the Red Spirit army was not in the right mind to fight. In an instant, the soldiers were defeated like a collapsed mountain.

Chen Rui slowly landed on the ground, and he threw Rus’ head on the ground. The gaze behind the mask glanced at Shea’s complicated gaze, and he said, “I must go to another place right now. Krobelus, the biggest enemy this time, is there. If I can come back alive, you will know the entire truth.”

It turns out that he held back Krobelus with some sort of strategy! Shea was shocked. He even wants to deal with that terrifying enemy of the Demon Overlord level? In fact, Shea really wanted to go with him, but she knew that she couldn’t be a burden to him. Furthermore, as the commander, she must stay to chase down the defeated soldiers and preside over the overall situation.

“Don’t forget your promise.” Shea glanced at him deeply without saying anything more. She flew toward the Dark Moon’s army.

Chen Rui understood in his heart that the so-called promise was to “wait for her in a place that only she knows”, so that she could understand everything.

Of course, he must come back alive first.

She didn’t say this sentence, but he and she understood it.

“All army, pursue! Do not kill those who surrender!” Shea’s grim voice resounded across the battlefield. The Dark Moon army was full of momentum under her command. Many Red Spirit soldiers dropped their weapons and surrendered.

After the baptism of this war, not only the quality of the Dark Moon army, even Shea’s own strength and command ability had reached a new level.

“It’s not fair! Another…” The man in the cloak who helped Shea deal with Rus just now shook his head as he said in a sighing tone.

“I said, jealousy is not a virtue. Anyway, a poor left eye of Demon God has been stared firmly by the right eye, but I have no time to accept your worship now. I’m going to help that dead duck dragon.” Chen Rui grinned, and he made a long whistling sound. Wyvern King Gade, who was initially carrying wyvern legion commander Kaguron in the air, suddenly shook its body and threw Kaguron off.

There was no warning. Kaguron was shocked, but fortunately, he also had Demon King’s peak strength, so he launched [Teleportation] and landed safely.

The Wyvern King flew straight toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui soared into the air, and he landed on Wyvern King’s back. He flew south at full speed.

Could he deal with the emerald dragon without fighting? Maybe with carrot and stick?

chapters.title: Chapter 389: Poison Dragon Vs Emerald Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 389: Poison Dragon Vs Emerald Dragon

Dark Moon.

Blue Lake Mountain Range.

The location of the treasure.

Krobelus was in extreme irritation.

It had been 4 full hours. Apart from the few gems discovered earlier, she did not find anything. Moreover, she was currently in a terrifying crisis. If it were not for her Demon Overlord-level strength and the full body crystal jade armor she was wearing which protected her head and body, the explosion of the inscription just now was enough for her to be fatally and seriously injured.

However, this beloved set of full body crystal jade armor was severely damaged in the continuous bombardment. Cracks appeared in several places. Damn it! This is a very, very, very expensive magic armor! No doubt, the main reason for the severe damage was caused by Ms. Emerald Dragon’s failure in Dragon Inscription knowledge. She just ran into many dangers that could otherwise be clearly avoided or cracked.

By now, Krobelus finally felt it faintly. These inscriptions and magic circle traps seem to be controlled secretly. This treasure is simply a trap. That damn Diak! Damn undead magician! The beautiful eyes behind the cracked visor flashed a furious light. Little Betty, you have to calm down. Don’t you have the mutated emerald dragons’ [Eyes of the Heart]? You must fully focus to feel the enemy’s location, then tear him into pieces! Ms. Emerald Dragon took a deep breath, and she entered a special state. Her sense of feeling was fully expanded to sense abnormal fluctuations nearby.

Finally, she vaguely felt a figure in a certain corner. That’s right, it is this cunning guy that caused my new clothes to be torn and my crystal jade armor to be damaged too… Also, I almost died! I must not let him go! Krobelus was determined. She completely ignored the changing scenes around her and the impact of the inscription burst. She unleashed all her strength to rush straight toward the direction sensed by the [Eyes of the Heart]. Although she was almost teleported out several times, she forcefully rushed all the way through based on her Demon Overlord-level tyrannical power. The opponent was very cunning. He was changing positions continuously, but his power seemed to be inferior. In addition to the miraculous effect of the [Eyes of the Heart], he could never escape Ms. Emerald Dragon’s senses.

Not long after, she was quite close to her target.

When Krobelus screamed, the sky was filled with shining green light, and the enemy was instantly wrapped in it. This was the emerald dragon’s expertise in the water and poison element power. Krobelus attacked with [Toxic Tooth] hatefully. She had already used all her strength. Even a metal would be instantly turned into smoke with this toxin.

The man couldn’t dodge. He screamed as he was poisoned. He suddenly collapsed on the ground. Just as Krobelus approached, she felt that the entire sky seemed to have an extra layer of dark green color. The surrounding scenery began to twist as if some kind of abnormal change occurred in the space.

The “corpse” that fell to the ground suddenly rose violently, and he punched toward her chest. Ms. Emerald Dragon was taken aback, but she was still able to react. She blocked the punch with swift movements.

The moment the 2 touched, Krobelus felt a high heat flowing through the crystal jade armor on her arm into her body. She actually started to heat up like a fire— Spreading across objects… Poison! Krobelus suddenly felt dizzy. She couldn’t help but to be shocked. With my poisonous physique, I am still affected by this poison. Moreover, judging from the symptoms, the toxicity is extremely strong! As a dignified emerald dragon, I have been proficient at using poison all my life, but I am poisoned by someone today? If this news goes out, I’m afraid those dragons would laugh ridiculously at me! This man has a strange attire. He is wearing a torn cloak and a mask. Obviously, the [Toxic Tooth] just now has no effect on him. Even his clothes are a little corroded only. Although Krobelus was poisoned, her body was quite resistant to the poison. She did not lose her combat power because of this. The power of the water element suddenly evaporated from her hands like mist. She blasted out with all her strength.

However, the opponent’s combat experience was extremely rich. Before she could exert any strength, he quickly withdrew. This gave her a suffocating feeling because her power could not be put into use. Then, her dizziness became stronger and stronger, and her power seemed to be weakened.

Krobelus keenly felt that this effect was not only the power of the poison itself, but also the effect of the territory. Her whole body was full of blue light. She knelt on one knee, and she punched the ground.

In the blink of an eye, with Krobelus as the center, a circle of blue ice crystals spread rapidly. A certain intangible force that distorted the vision in the original space was frozen into a tangible object. Krobelus suddenly felt that the poison in her body had weakened a lot. She transferred her strength to her fist and shook. The entire dark green space and the surrounding ground were actually shattered. A vast semicircular pit appeared as if a meteorite fell from the sky.

The man in the cloak staggered back a few steps. Before he stood firm, his feet were already entangled with ice crystals, and he was frozen in place. He was unable to move for a while.

Krobelus’s breathing was a bit short behind the visor. Although the opponent’s territory had been cracked, she was still unable to resolve the poison. I didn’t expect that there is even such a poison and poison cultivator in the Demon Realm! The man said, “Who are you? Why are you here to snatch my treasure?”

The man in this cloak was naturally Paglio. Unlike Krobelus who wore full body armor including a hood and visor to protect herself, the reason the poison dragon wore the cloak was that he killed Ranieri, the man of Ms. Emerald Dragon. In order to prevent being recognized by the enemy’s widow, he deliberately concealed his true face.

At present, due to the seal problem, his power had always been stuck at the peak of the Demon Emperor. He exhausted all traps and tactics, but he still failed to suppress this opponent of the early stage Demon Emperor, so the cunning poison dragon immediately asked this sentence. He intended to buy more time.

“Treasure?” Krobelus’s eyes glowed a little, but she would not forget the poison crisis in her body. She looked doubtful, “Who are you? Why are you attacking me?”

“My name is… Jacob. This is the treasure that I discovered first, so naturally I won’t allow others to snatch it! Even if you are stronger than me, you won’t get anything as long as I explode the trap at the entrance!”

“Is there really a treasure?” Krobelus rolled her eyes, and she temporarily put away her murderous intent, “It looks like you are also an insider. According to the rules, finders keepers. As long as you get rid of the poison in my body, I can let you go. We can discover the treasure together.”

If there really is a treasure, I won’t evenly divide it with this weak person. When the time comes, I can barely spare his life. It can be considered a little compensation for finding the treasure. However, the emerald dragon also knew that the poison in her body was not trivial. It must be removed as soon as possible.

Paglio naturally knew what she was thinking. Furthermore, the treasure was just a cover, so he hesitated at the moment, “If I get rid of your poison, you will surely kill me. I’m not that stupid.”

Ms. Emerald Dragon raised her hand without thinking, “I can swear by the name Nero. If I break my promise, I will die tragically!”

“Nero? Your name?” Paglio narrowed his eyes. It seems that I have really encountered a “peer”. This Krobelus actually knows my tactic too. Just when the 2 of them pretended to comply with ulterior motives in their mind, an anxious voice sounded, “Paglio, where are you?”

The voice was from Chen Rui. When he saw that the “treasure” of the Blue Lake Mountain Range was ruined so badly, he was worried about the safety of the poison dragon, so he yelled immediately.

This scream didn’t matter. Behind the visor and in the cloak, Ms. Emerald Dragon and Master Poison Dragon changed their facial expression at the same time.

“Paglio?” Krobelus was stunned. The name of an enemy suddenly appeared in her mind. The poison in my body… If it isn’t the poison from that enemy, how could I not be able to restrain it myself? No, that enemy’s strength should be the peak of Demon Overlord. Why this guy… No matter what, I shall catch him back first to interrogate further!

Paglio knew that the other party was already suspicious, and she even saw through his true identity. He immediately charged his remaining energy and stomped on the ground with full strength. The ice crystals under his feet suddenly shattered. He escaped and then fled toward Chen Rui’s voice.

This escape further confirmed the suspicion in Krobelus’ heart. She immediately seemed vengeful. She couldn’t be bothered about the poison. White mist immediately released from her body. She stomped her feet and chased the poison dragon amidst the violent shouts.

Paglio seemed to have eyes behind him. At a turning point, he suddenly changed his position. At the same time, with a wave of his hand, a cluster of dark green mist wrapped around Krobelus. This cluster of mist was Paglio’s strongest poison. Even though Krobelus had reached the Demon Overlord level, she would inevitably die once she was invaded by the poison.

Unexpectedly, Krobelus was determined to kill him, so she actually didn’t evade. Being wrapped in the poisonous mist, she punched Paglio’s back with all her strength. Paglio turned with all his strength, but he was still hit by the remaining force. He groaned, and his whole body flew out. He fell flat on his face from a distance, and he couldn’t get up for a while.

There was a dark green layer on Krobelus’ face. The crystal jade armor on her body was shattered by the poison and dropped to the ground. Fortunately, her short shirt inside was specially made according to her poison physique, so it was not corroded at the moment.

Ms. Emerald Dragon walked a few steps staggeringly. She tried to step forward to kill her enemy, but she couldn’t hold it finally. She panted with her hands on her knees. The poison just now had just started to disperse throughout her body.

“Paglio!” Chen Rui rushed over as he heard the sound. He just happened to witness this scene, and he quickly stepped forward to help the poison dragon.

“ Hehe , I’m fine. I just broke a few bones. This woman has been poisoned by me. Even if she is a Demon Overlord, she won’t live long…”

“Die!” Krobelus gritted her teeth. She straightened up again, and she rushed toward Paglio.

Paglio was very clear of the power of his toxins. He couldn’t help but to feel surprised when he saw Ms. Emerald Dragon rushing over desperately without bothering the spreading of the poison, “ Oh no, run! This woman is crazy. She is going all out!”

“Stop it!” Chen Rui yelled. The emerald dragon is currently poisoned. She is facing a life threatening situation. No matter what, we know each other. I should try to turn this hostility into friendship. As Chen Rui used Charles’ voice to shout, Krobelus was surprised. She raised her head and looked at Chen Rui, but it was an unfamiliar face.

The moment she raised her head, Paglio seemed taken aback.

“Whoever you are, get out of my way” Krobelus gritted her teeth as she asked, “I only want that guy’s life!”

Before Chen Rui spoke, Paglio actually spoke first, “Little… Little Betty?”

Not Betty, but Little Betty.

This private title shocked Krobelus. Her voice trembled slightly, “You… Jacob. No! Who are you…”

Paglio pulled off his cloak and mask, “It’s me! Don’t you remember?”

“You… Impossible!” Krobelus showed an unbelievable look, “Aren’t you killed?”

Chen Rui was also dumbfounded. Didn’t Paglio say that he didn’t know Krobelus? Judging from the situation, they seemed very close? Which drama is playing now?

Okay, wudefuq? Don’t tell me they were actually couple…..

chapters.title: Chapter 390: The “Retribution” Of The Poison Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 390: The “Retribution” Of The Poison Dragon

Paglio was taken aback, “Ain’t I doing good? Why do you say I am killed? By the way, Betty, why are you called Krobelus?”

“I only used the name Krobelus in recent years. Didn’t you say that only you can call me Little Betty…” A blush flashed across Krobelus’ face. Thinking of the name Paglio had just called, she felt that the poison in her body became more and more intense. She felt dizzy suddenly, “No! Aren’t you killed by the poison dragon, Paglio and fairy dragon, Zola 2000 years ago? You’re not Ranieri. Who are you…”

“I… Um . Ranieri is just my pseudonym,” Paglio finally remembered something, and he was unusually blushing, “I’ll help you get rid of the poison first.”

“You bastard… I have been fooled by you all this while! What about the treasures you took back then?”

“ Ah? What?” (Using fairy dragon’s tactic shamelessly)

“Where is my treasure?”

“ Uh , that… Little Betty, let’s detoxify first, then we talk about it…”

“ Oh , it turns out that…you are a liar…”

Hearing the dialogue between the 2, Chen Rui finally understood the truth of some so-called grievances. Damn! I even rushed desperately here. At the end of the day, it turns out to be the biggest misunderstanding! It turns out that everything is a silly fraud that Paglio committed in the past! More than 2000 years ago, Krobelus was still an innocent girl who just embarked on the path of the dragons’ crime to rob foreign goods. When she earned her first profit in her career… Erm, when she robbed her first batch of treasures, she met a cunning… dead duck dragon.

As a result, the young girl, who just started to have interest in the opposite sex, was attracted by someone’s powerful strength and flauntying wealth. She had a crush on him. Both of them got along well very quickly. They had an illicit and passionate love affair. Ms. Emerald Dragon fell deeper and deeper uncontrollably, and her final defense failed. She had the most intimate relationship with the man who claimed to be “Ranieri”. She even handed the treasure that she robbed to him. When “Ranieri” was excited at that moment, he once vowed that he would rob the most precious treasure as a gift to propose to her. As a result, in the future days, the girl was full of expectations for that so-called gift every day. She even… urgently rushed him.

Soon afterwards, Ranieri suddenly disappeared one day. When the longing girl was searching everywhere, there was news that “Ranieri” was killed by 2 enemies.

This was a bolt out of the blur for the girl who was foolishly waiting for her lover. However, the 2 enemies were both at the peak of Demon Overlords. They were very powerful, and their whereabouts were uncertain.

The girl vowed to avenge her lover. Therefore, she began the human (dragon) life of arduous training and… also earning money.

Chen Rui glanced at the dragon with contempt. This guy actually cheated money and sex. He even reported the enemy’s name as a scapegoat. He is so shameless! He deserves to suffer from those broken bones! Paglio exerted a lot of effort, and he finally helped Krobelus to get rid of all the poison. However, the angry Ms. Emerald Dragon immediately exuded a strong aura with murderous eyes as if she was about to dissect this ungrateful male creature.

Paglio knew he was wrong. Moreover, he was weaker than her now, so he could only smile apologetically.

Chen Rui fully understood the mood of Ms. Emerald Dragon. He also supported Ms. Emerald Dragon to chop that nasty man into pieces. However, with the symbiotic contract, he couldn’t let Krobelus really tear the dragon into dragon meat shreds.

However, since this was the case, the initial “husband-killing vengeance” between Krobelus and Paglio no longer existed. If he could resolve the grudge between them, he could also bring Ms. Emerald Dragon to his side.

During the days when we got along in the capital, Krobelus, filtering out some common problems of the dragons, actually values relationships a lot. She actually lived as the wife of the scapegoat blue dragon for more than 2000 years… She even vowed to take revenge. She is a very good candidate to be a friend. Forget it. For the sake of the symbiotic contract, and also for the sake of “Charles”, I’ll just help the bastard dragon this time! Just as Ms. Emerald Dragon was about to attack, a voice sounded, “So this is Ms. Betty! What a big misunderstanding!”

Krobelus glanced at Chen Rui without saying anything. Her eyes showed strong hostility. Although she was a little suspicious of his familiar voice, her human friend should have died with Isabella already. She just misheard him just now.

“I’m the best friend of this bastard beside you. No wonder this guy keeps thinking about you. You are a beautiful and moving lady indeed.” Chen Rui was full of praise.

“Keeps thinking?” Ms. Emerald Dragon snorted coldly. Her murderous intent was targeted at Paglio again, “For 2000 years, I once kept thinking about this liar too, but what I’m thinking now is how to remove his bones one by one! ”

“Ms. Betty, before you remove his bones, please listen to my story.” Chen Rui glanced at the dragon, who was unusually begging for help. “Have you not discovered that there is a problem with his power?” If he was of the strength 2000 years ago, would he be beaten so badly by you?”

Krobelus was stunned. He is right, if it were 2000 years ago, even if I have broken through to Demon Overlord, this guy only needs to wave his hand to make me completely lose my resistance. Could it be something that has happened? Chen Rui sighed heavily. He finally told a “story” against his conscience after some preparation.

2000 years ago, a man who was about to face a terrifying enemy, resolutely left without saying goodbye and embarked on a journey of battle in order not to involve his beloved woman. As a result, he was sealed by that terrifying enemy for 2000 years. He had only recently regained consciousness, and his power was limited to the Demon Emperor realm. Unfortunately, he was unable to find his lover’s whereabouts all this while.

This story was described very vividly. Especially some plots that were almost exactly out of a textbook. Even the poison dragon had goosebumps after listening to him. Meanwhile, Krobelus was really moved. Thinking of the poison dragon’s strength and the lack of news in these years, her murderous aura became weaker and weaker. Finally a little tear appeared in her eyes, “Ranieri… No, Paglio, why don’t you tell me the truth? We can face any enemy together!”

Paglio shook his head, “It’s useless for you to go. That enemy is too powerful. He should be Demi-God. He easily sealed me and caused me to sleep in the Blue Lake of the Dark Moon for 2000 years.”

This was a rare truth. Chen Rui saw that Krobelus was moved, and he suddenly pointed to Paglio’s nose, “It’s this man! Once, when he was dying, he was still calling the name Betty. He begged me to find that lady who he has always been thinking about and must hand over the most precious treasure to her as a belated proposal gift!”

“Me? Proposal?” Paglio pointed to his own nose. His eyes widened.

“The most precious treasure?” Krobelus blushed as she thought of the promise made by a certain bastard back then. Her eyes exuded strong eagerness.

“Don’t be embarrassed!” Chen Rui patted Paglio’s shoulder generously. He said while hinting, “Ms. Betty has been waiting for you for 2000 years. What else can you say?!”

Paglio was stunned for a while, and he saw Chen Rui then took out a fist-sized gem. This gem was entirely crystal clear, and it had a mysterious structure which was like the eyes of a certain creature. No matter which side you looked at, it seemed to be watching you. Besides, the pupils would also automatically zoom, and it emitted shining starlight which would give people a peace of mind feeling.

“The Stardust Eye!” Paglio blurted out. This thing was the secret treasure of the Leviathan Royal Family 20,000 years ago. It was also one of the most beloved collections of the poison dragon. Last time, when he divided the treasures with Chen Rui, he also deliberately divided this gem.

“This is the Stardust Eye!” Ms. Emerald Dragon naturally heard of this treasure before. Her eyes were almost flashing stars, “Paglio, I have fully felt your sincerity, I… I’m willing to accept your proposal!”

“I’m not willing!” The poison dragon was so reluctant that he blurted out immediately in a state of desperation.

Krobelus was stunned, thinking that she had heard it wrong. For a while, her murderous aura began to permeate. Chen Rui secretly had the urge to tie up this dragon and give it to Zola to experiment. Did “Ranieri” leave Betty back then just because he was stingy? “Of course he’s not willing!” Chen Rui said rushingly, “Because it doesn’t represent all his sincerity! He wants to give not just this gift to Ms. Betty, but also another one called the Snow Crown!”

The Snow Crown? It is another very famous treasure!

These 2 gifts are too precious! The sharpness that had just risen in Krobelus’s eyes instantly turned into waves of tenderness. She took the initiative to hold Paglio’s hand, and she felt the hand tremble slightly as if he was emotional for her agreeing to marry him.

As everyone knew, this was because a certain dragon’s heart was dripping blood. Another favorite treasure! Seeing the threatening gaze of the human, Paglio understood that if he disagreed, perhaps all his treasures would be “sold” to Krobelus!

When I put my treasures in this guy’s “talent space”, I thought that no one would steal it anymore. It was considered foolproof, but I didn’t expect this day would come! If a dragon lost all his treasures and became a pauper with nothing, then it was better to commit suicide and break up.

(By the way, it seems that this girl is very suitable for my taste. I cheated all of her treasures back then, yet she is still willing?) (Besides, I didn’t want to really dump this girl when I left, but because I was urged by the forced marriage. Also, I have to deal with the crystal dragon and the blue dragon… Then, I was really sealed…) (However, this girl is barely regarded as 1 of my infinite concubine plans. I will also bring a group of female dragons to show off at this damn human’s house. How can I commit to 1 person so quickly?)

(Anyway, I must try to cheat those 2 favorite treasures back! A good dragon does not fight when the odds are against him. I better pretend to agree… Maybe, in the past 2000 years, Little Betty has saved a lot of wealth? ) After the dragon’s eyes kept rolling round and round, he squeezed Ms. Emerald Dragon’s hand firmly. Chen Rui finally breathed a sigh of relief. Judging from this, perhaps Earth Elemental King will come in vain. C’mon just let Paglio break a few more bones. He deserved it…

chapters.title: Chapter 391: The Man And Woman In The Secret Room
chapters.body:
Chapter 391: The Man And Woman In The Secret Room

Just when the quarrelsome but loving couple, Master Poison Dragon and Ms. Emerald Dragon, finally “reunited”, the Dark Moon had completely defeated the Red Spirit Army and pursued them all the way to Town Dico. They captured and imprisoned countless soldiers, not to mention seizing various weapons and so on.

The defeated Red Spirit Army fled and discarded their helmets and armor. They suffered heavy losses. Finally, under the leadership of Kanita, they gathered the remnant formation, crossed Town Dico, and fled into the Red Spirit territory at full speed.

40,000 armies actually defeated nearly 100,000 enemies. Furthermore, they were fighting head-on!

The Dark Moon won such a big victory for the first time in hundreds of years. The morale of each soldier was boosted. Every soldier’s face was filled with excitement and pride. Although the Dark Moon Army also suffered a lot of casualties, the entire army had been qualitatively sublimated after this fierce battle. A truly strong army began to form.

After leaving a part of the army to defend Town Dico, Shea led the army back to the Dark Moon. Someone had spread the news of the Dark Moon’s victory against the Red Spirit. The people of the Dark Moon who had been worried about being looted, humiliated or even massacred after the defeat were all excited, so they all cheered. They took the initiative to organize a long line of people outside the city to welcome Princess Royal and the army’s victorious return.

“Red Blood Flame, triumph in every battle!”

“Long live Princess Royal!”

“Long live!”

Hearing the neat slogans of the army and the cheers of the people, Shea acted very calmly. After giving a morale-boosting public speech, she began to orderly arrange post-war affairs.

The Red Spirit Estate’s defeat this time was mostly due to Josh’s underestimation of the enemy. Besides, if we don’t consider the man’s unexpected help, I’m afraid it is the Red Spirit Army standing here to celebrate. We need to be vigilant because defeating the Red Spirit is only the first step. There is also the equally powerful Blue Lava Army later. The power of our light cavalry team and wyvern legion has been exposed, and nearly a thousand people of the light cavalry have been injured or dead. The wyverns also have a dozen casualties. With the cautiousness of the Blue Lava Lord Titan, he will definitely be on guard, so we must not be carried away by victory. I must calm down and pay close attention to the movements of the Southern Blue Lava Army. Be ready for the second fierce battle at any time. Back in the palace, Shea removed her broken armor, simply treated her wound, and changed into a long white dress. After experiencing the excitement of the victory, she felt an unprecedented exhaustion.

It’s time. Where is Alice now? Why is Athena or Kia not here? He must have arrangements. He went to deal with Krobelus… I don’t know how he is doing.

There are too many mysteries to be solved… You must come back alive, no matter what your identity is! Unconsciously, Shea had already walked to the pool deep in the inner courtyard. It had always been her forbidden area, so there was no maid nearby.

Involuntarily, the scene of the first encounter with her old enemy here appeared in her mind. She still felt extremely angry that her biggest secret was discovered. Unknowingly, hatred rose in her heart.

However, some unrelated scenes emerged in front of her at the same time. For example, the dual dance under the moonlight; every time when she saw that person, she couldn’t help being angry, but she really wanted to see him.

Also, his statement that made the entire Dark Moon army high-spirited on the battlefield.

“Shea, you are such a foolish woman. A foolish woman. Yes, it is these 3 words.” Shea only felt that her mood was unprecedentedly more complicated and contradictory than ever. She lowered her head gently, sighed, and walked toward the pool under her feet.

I’ll wait for him here. No matter what his purpose is, no matter what is the end result for both of us, I’ll just wait for him like this. Shea walked into the pool. After a strange space distortion, she came to the secret room under the pool.

This used to be the secret place where the God-Eating Mask fragment was sealed. Only the lord knew about it.

The biggest secret in her heart was here. It recorded her true pleasure, anger, sorrow, and joy that she did not show in front of anyone including Alice. Only in this small and secret room could she truly have the freedom to laugh or cry.

As soon as Shea entered the secret room, her pupils suddenly shrank because there was already a person in the room.

With his back against her, he gently moved the memory wind chime.

Within the tinkling sound, familiar sounds came from time to time. It was hers.

There were relaxing humming sounds, crying, laughing, and low longing whispers.

As the greatest privacy in the bottom of her heart was seen through, Shea couldn’t restrain her anger.

He turned his head slowly. It is really this face. Not only this face, but also the familiar feeling from my heart, which is definitely not what ordinary transformation techniques can disguise. Although she had a thousand words to ask and say, she uttered a cold sentence with killing intent even in this most authentic secret room.

“Where’s… your mask?”

“Here.” A strange mask appeared on his familiar face, and Shea’s heart suddenly tightened.
