Apart from his relationship with Lisa, he owed “Aguile” a favor for saving him and his daughters, so he had to do his best. Master Xingxing made a resolute decision to stay too.

In the end, the result of the war of lords was beyond everyone’s expectations, so the 2 masters were finally relieved.

As the new financial officer, Chen Rui had been very busy these days for the water system transformation, the reorganization of the shops, the management of Cloak Gang, the start of Delia’s ”Dark Demon”, and the affairs of the joint chamber of commerce… He was very busy all day. For this reason, Shea also set up the Ministry of Finance with Chen Rui as the top officer. He was equipped with many capable subordinates, but because it was just getting started, he still couldn’t be entirely discharged from the tasks.

Of course, no matter how busy he was, it was definitely indispensable to “train” together with Athena and Kia at night. The fully moisturized sheriff and maid looked glorious and amazing.

Although the characteristics of [Dual Training] could refine strength, it had no effect on Phecda’s experience. His experience was still 0. Although Phecda happened to be upgraded during mating, mating couldn’t provide real improvement in this realm.

Megrez trained “law” while Phecda needed “dissolve”. This level was a bit puzzling. The Super System didn’t have very clear hints. There was only a vague sense of mystery in his heart like Megrez previously. Once he mastered this feeling, he could truly understand the mystery of Phecda.

In addition to the newly acquired skills and buildings, a series of good items had been added to the Royal Spirits category and Blueprint Formula category of the exchange center.

The exchange center already had 4 categories: Pharmacy, Plants, Royal Spirits and Blueprint Formula.

1. Pharmacy category: In addition to ordinary medicines, there were a full set of black medicines including resurrection potion and longevity potion.

2. Plants category: Pivotal seed, aura gathering flower and others were the main source of aura and the driving force of the entire Super System. Among them, the pivotal fairy was the soul of the Star Garden.

3. Royal Spirits category: Stridebug, Gluttonous Vine, Guardian Vines and Winged Butterflies. The first 2 were used more in actual combat, and they have a time limit. Guardian Vines was the treasure to guard the house. Chen Rui also planted Guardian Vines in the inner courtyard of the palace now to protect Shea and her sister. As for the winged butterfly, there was nowhere to be used at the moment.

There were 2 types of Royal Spirits added this time. 1. Yuan Recovery Tree – Attributes: Recovers at a fix interval. Restores the physical and magic power within the range of effect. The action can be timed. The longest lifespan is 1 month. 1000 auras per plant.

Since he had the passive characteristics of [Astral Form], the Yuan Recovery Tree should not be very useful for him, but he could provide recovery to his companions. It also had a very active role in military training or combat.

2. Bestow fruit – Attributes: [Royal Spirits Bestow]. A medium used to bestow others to use the Royal Spirit plants. The longest duration is 1 day. 1000 auras per plant.

The appearance of Bestow fruit had brought about a qualitative change in the functions of Royal Spirits. For example, the winged butterfly, which was never used before, could now allow an ordinary person who had not reached the Demon Emperor to have the [Flying] ability. Although there was a time limit, it could play an unexpected role in a certain environment.

4. Blueprint Formula category: The original artifact, “Thunderous Sound”, had always been an indispensable treasure in Chen Rui’s battle. Now the artifacts had increased radically to 6 now.

The first 3 were weapons, and the blueprints were all sold for 30 million auras.

Northsea (long sword)- Particularly sharp, speeds up the attack, doubles the proficiency of swordsmanship, halves the damage of water element and light element magic. It can absorb the strength of the person being attacked during the attack; charge skill [Flow Back to Origin]; water and light element double attribute sword qi damage. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the owner.

Judgment (greatsword)- Doubles the attack power, doubles the defense power, quickly recovers physical strength, and there is a chance to stun the opponent when attacking. Supplementary skill: [Judgment]. 50% chance of ignoring the opponent’s defense; greatly increases crushing damage; can only be used once per hour. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the owner.

Secret Shadow (wand)- Doubles the magic power of all elements, doubles the casting speed, and immunes to soul attacks. Supplementary skill: [Limit Break Territory]. There is a chance to ignore the opponent’s magic defense or immunity; can only be used once per hour. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the owner.

The last 3 were armors, and the blueprints were all sold for 20 million aura.

Overlord Armor (heavy armor)- Greatly increases strength and defense; weakens, absorbs and turns damage into physical strength. Supplementary skill: [Overlord Armor Reduction]. Greatly weakens the defense power of all enemies within the range; can lock the target. Can only be used every 6 hours; the effect lasts for 1 hour each time. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the owner.

Mystic Jade Armor (light armor)- Increases movement speed and halves long-range damage. Supplementary skill: [Hot Blood Halo]. Increases the speed of comrades within 100 meters, increases attack power, and is able to lock support units. Can only be used every 6 hours; the effect lasts for 1 hour each time. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the owner.

Magic feather tulle (tulle)- Increases move speed, quickly restores physical strength, spirit power and magic power, as well as greatly increases magic resistance. Supplementary skill: [Lightweight]. Automatically triggers [Teleportation] during a fatal attack to get out of danger. Can only be used twice per hour. Automatically repairs the damage. Must recognize the master.

Each of these 6 artifact-level weapons and armors made him salivate. Each weapon had its own characteristics, especially the Overlord Armor and Mystic Jade Armor which actually had halo skills. Although the price was expensive, he currently had 160 million aura. The price of the blueprint was not a problem, but it was impossible for him to gather a lot of rare materials completely at once. He hoped that he could gain something from the trade fair this time.

In addition to the exchange center, the “spiritual link” related to the contract had also undergone new changes, but the enhancements and other functions also required faith crystals. At present, he could only wait to reap from the Tower of Faith.

On this day, Chen Rui returned to the office building of the Ministry of Finance after handling some trivial matters at the joint chamber of commerce. Unexpectedly, Kia was waiting for him in the office. It should be the busiest time for Kia in the Princess Retail Store now. She also brought a person.

This man was tall, and he seemed unfamiliar. It was just that the fierce aura hidden in his eyes gave Chen Rui a vaguely familiar feeling.

Kia bowed and said, “Master, Kia has a request.”

“ Oh? ”

Chen Rui and Kia were already very close, but Kia seemed a bit overly polite now. With the degree of spiritual communication between the 2, Chen Rui felt something amiss. He shifted his mind, and the [Analytical Eyes] was on.

Race: Gluttony Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S-(S+)

Physique: S-(S+); Strength: S(S+); Spirit: S-(S); Agility: S-(S)

[Analysis]: Earth element.

Beelzebub Royal Family! Peak stage of Demon Overlord! Chen Rui was secretly shocked. The man who could fulfill the conditions, and Kia had such an abnormal expression and address, the true identity of this Beelzebub Demon Overlord was fairly obvious!

Kia’s father, one of the heads of the Bloodfall organization and the King of Beelzebub, who I once met in the Crystal Valley – Azgalor. Beelzebub! Azgalor, actually came to the Dark Moon personally! The Demon Overlord’s sensing ability was quite sensitive. Although Chen Rui’s mood swings were very subtle, Azgalor still noticed them. A hint of doubt appeared in his eyes.

“That’s why!” Chen Rui yelled, as if he suddenly thought of something. He shouted to the outside, “Grasa, give me the layout of the trade fair immediately!”

Grasa who was outside responded, and she hurriedly walked toward another office. Chen Rui muttered something as if he had just remembered something. He said to Kia, “Kia, don’t disturb me. I just thought something about the trade fair.”

“Yes, Master.” Upon hearing Chen Rui’s somewhat direct tone, Kia secretly understood and was relieved. She bowed respectfully.

Chen Rui turned a blind eye to Kia and Azgalor as he walked in the hall while making a contemplative look. This pretentiousness was just to cover up his shock just now. What is Azgalor’s purpose in coming to the Dark Moon? Although Azgalor, Jacob and Manu were defeated after besieging Catherine, his power of the peak stage Demon Overlord is evident. In the entire Dark Moon, only the Earth Elemental King and Krobelus are Demon Overlords. After the return of the earth elemental heart, the Earth Elemental King Moore’s power has improved, but he has only reached the apex of the intermediate stage Demon Overlord. There is still a small gap from the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Even among the peak stage Demon Overlords, the gap between each other is not small. Even if the Earth Elemental King breaks through to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, he is not Azgalor’s opponent. Unless Paglio can recover his power, no one in the Dark Moon can beat this King of Beelzebub.

When Chen Rui was thinking about it, Grasa quickly brought over the venue layout of the trade fair. Chen Rui pretended to make some marks on it. After taking a long time to complete, he nodded with satisfaction. He ordered Grasa some things and said to Kia, “By the way, Kia, you seem to have something to say?”

Kia nodded and said, “I’m sorry to disturb Master working. I brought a guest today, and I want to introduce him to Master.”

Chen Rui set his gaze on the disguised Azgalor. Azgalor really was not suspicious just now, and he had been waiting patiently without showing any impatience. He politely said, “Sir financial officer is dealing with many matters every day. You are really a busy person. Please forgive me for the interruption.”

“This guest is…”

Kia intervened, “Master, he… is Kia’s long-lost father.”

“Father?” Chen Rui was taken aback. He didn’t expect Azgalor to actually appear with this “real” identity. He deliberately asked, “Didn’t you tell me that your parents have passed away a long time ago?”

There were tears in Kia’s eyes. It was more for her dead mother, Freya, “This was what happened. Back then, my parents and I encountered a group of bandits. My father and mother stayed behind to hold the bandits in order to cover my escape. I thought my parents were all sacrificed, but my father still survived.”

Kindness appeared in Azgalor’s eyes, and he said quite emotionally, “My name is Galor. I have been searching for Kia’s whereabouts all these years. I happen to come to the Dark Moon for some matters this time. As a result, thanks to Demon God’s blessing, I actually found my long-lost daughter.”

Chen Rui sneered secretly in his heart. I didn’t expect Azgalor to have such talent for acting. He is Kia’s father indeed, but for Azgalor, family affection is not much thicker than a piece of paper. If it is necessary, he can kill his biological daughter without hesitation. Fatilu is the best example.

“I see, but regardless of Kia’s past, she is now a slave given to me by the Princess Royal Highness. Even if you are her father, I will not let her go.”

Chen Rui deliberately emphasized the word slave to pull apart the distance between Kia and him by highlighting their hierarchical relationship. This was his bottom line. He could play tricks with Bloodfall, but he would never let Kia take the risk by returning to Azgalor.

“Sir has misunderstood. Kia is better off here than wandering with me. I even have to ask sir to take care of her in the future.” Azgalor smiled and said, “Apart from reuniting with Kia, my purpose of coming here today is to give a great benefit to sir financial officer.”

“Benefit?” Chen Rui knew that the show was coming. He frowned and looked at Kia. Kia understood him, and she deliberately nodded affirmatively in front of Azgalor.

Chen Rui looked at Azgalor a few times before he finally nodded and said, ” Sir Galor, please have a sit.”

Azgalor hinted Kia, and Kia said, “Master, I came out of the Princess Retail Store temporarily. There are still a lot of things on the little princess side. You can talk with my father here. I will leave first. ”

Chen Rui nodded, and he thought for a moment.He asked everyone in the office to retreat, leaving only him and Azgalor.

Azgalor used Kia to find him. He shouldn’t have any malicious intent for the time being. Otherwise, with the power of the peak stage Demon Overlord, if he directly assassinated, even Chen Rui, who had reached the Demon Emperor level, couldn’t stop him.

“Sir Galor, there are no outsiders now. You can just say it.”

“Before this, pardon me for asking, is sir from the human world?”

Chen Rui shrugged, “Yes, as everyone knows, I’m a human. However, as far as I know, I’m not the only human in the Demon Realm.”

“Sir has misunderstood. Whether it is the human world or Demon Realm, talented people are the real powerhouse.” Azgalor smiled, “Sir Chen Rui is absolutely the key reason for the current brilliant situation of the Dark Moon’s economy. The auction house alone is a precedent.”

This was no secret. Many of the Dark Moon innovations were unprecedented by the Demon Realm. Many people attributed this to the human. This should be the real reason why Shea placed great importance on the human.

Weak in strength, but smart mind, especially in economics. This was the outsiders’ evaluation of the human financial officer.

He had ability, but lacked power, so there was no need to worry about rebellion. Such a person was the most ideal subordinate. Even Josh had publicly expressed his intention to solicit Chen Rui in Town Leith’s wilderness battle.

“Actually, I just copied some things from the human world.” Chen Rui shook his head lightly. “It’s not considered a talent. I’m very content to be recognized by Princess Royal and get the status now.”

“Sir is too modest.” Azgalor took a deep look at Chen Rui, and he suddenly asked calmly, “Sir, have you thought about progressing a step further?”

Chen Rui frowned. Is this solicitation? Azgalor came to the Dark Moon personally, and appeared as Kia’s father with the purpose of solicitation? Isn’t he thinking too highly of a “mere” human!? This father-in-law is not General George. Since he has come, no matter what, I must try to “entertain” him.

Would his meeting with ‘father-in-law’ turn into a battle? Or he could even trick this ‘father-in-law’?

chapters.title: Chapter 397: Acquaintances? The Distinguished Guests Of The Dark Moon Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 397: Acquaintances? The Distinguished Guests Of The Dark Moon Palace

“Sir Galor.” Chen Rui frowned, “I’m not a fool, but I still don’t understand what you mean.”

Azgalor still had a radiant smile, “With sir’s talents, it is enough to be the financial minister of an empire. It is a waste of talent to be the current financial officer.”

“I’m just a weak ‘outsider’. Furthermore, the current financial officer is already a high position. Could it be that I can even be a lord?”

Azgalor looked mysterious, “There is a saying in the Demon Realm, nothing is impossible. It is not impossible to be a lord as long as sir wants to.”

“I have also heard an old saying from the Demon Realm, there is no reaping without sowing.” Chen Rui deliberately asked, “So… which empire does Sir Galor represent? What is your true purpose for coming to the Dark Moon?”

“My purpose is closely related to Sir Chen Rui’s needs. I can give as many conditions as sir wants.”

Judging from Azgalor’s tone, does he really want to recruit me? Or he wants to use me, the financial officer, to subvert the Dark Moon? Chen Rui kept feeling that something was wrong. In the Town Leith battle, I showed the fearless spirit of defending Shea to the death. I certainly wouldn’t “rebel” easily now. Moreover, the identity of Chen Rui involves too much. Chen Rui is not like Master “Arthur” who can disappear quickly at any time, so I can’t do infernal affairs temporarily. “If you are not Kia’s father, you may have been imprisoned now.” Chen Rui stood up and said indifferently, “Since you are Kia’s father, I will also make it clear that I will never betray Princess Royal. I have self-knowledge of my abilities and identity. I’m definitely not qualified to be a lord or financial minister. The current financial officer is the most suitable position for me. It allows me to display my real talents. If the purpose of sir coming is just for this unfruitful solicitation, then you can return now. Considering Kia’s usual care, I can let you leave the Dark Moon safely.”

Although Chen Rui said that, he was still a little nervous. After all, the opponent was at the peak stage of Demon Overlord. Once Azgalor turned hostile, the consequences would be unthinkable. Even if Azgalor just wanted to take Kia away, no one in the Dark Moon could stop him.

Azgalor stared at Chen Rui for a moment, and he suddenly burst into laughter. After a while, he changed to a satisfied look, “Yes! Regardless of humans or demons, the rarest thing is self-knowledge. Sir Chen Rui is indeed a persistent and wise man. I can also be rest assured to keep Kia by your side.”

Chen Rui looked confused, but he was relieved. At the very least, it would be a gain for Kia to stay “undercover” by his side.

Although Chen Rui had broken through to five-star evolution, there was still a considerable gap from the Demon Overlord realm, especially the strongest peak stage of Demon Overlord.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, and he became more determined.

Power. I still need stronger power! I must guard every person I cherish! “I was so rude just now. Please accept this little gift as an apology. Take it as a gratitude to Sir Chen Rui for taking care of Kia. Please continue to take care of her in the future.” As Azgalor said, he handed Chen Rui a space ring.

Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, then he took it. There was a large amount of black crystal coins and a magic bracelet inside the ring.

“That bracelet is a magical equipment of quasi-legendary grade. It can automatically release protective magic and teleportation magic. Pardon me, but Sir Chen Rui’s weakness is power. Be careful of your own safety. If I have malicious intentions, sir will be in danger today.” Azgalor pretended to say frankly. The role of this quasi-legendary grade equipment was actually limited, but it could be said as tailor-made and very practical for the human financial officer.

“Sir Galor, don’t beat around the bush anymore,” Chen Rui did not refuse and kept the gift. He said a lot more politely, “Although I don’t have much power, I can see that sir is definitely not an ordinary person. Just speak out what is on your mind.”

Azgalor nodded, “Sir Chen Rui is a smart man. You should know that although the Dark Moon has defeated the Red Spirit Estate and Blue Lava Estate, and the economy and military are developing rapidly, it does not mean that they are far away from the crisis. On the contrary, the Dark Moon’s hidden power has been exposed to the Fallen Angel Capital’s spies. It’s just a brief silence before the storm. The Fallen Angel Capital’s strength is by no means comparable by the 2 mere estates. The Regent Obsidian alone is at the peak stage of Demon Overlord. The situation of the Dark Moon at that time…”

“What does this have to do with the intention of sir’s visit today?”

“My true identity is the vice president of the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce of the Bloody Empire. The controller behind the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce is Royal Highness Aleus, the eldest prince of the Bloody Empire. I was ordered by Royal Highness Aleus to come and meet the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal Highness in order to discuss the cooperation between the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce and the Dark Moon. This kind of cooperation is not only in business, but also in all aspects. Royal Highness Aleus is outstandingly talented. He has reached the Demon Overlord realm, and he is recognized as the most promising person to inherit the throne of Bloodfall. If the Dark Moon can become a partner of the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce, then even Prince Obsidian will be somewhat fearful. He will absolutely not dare to act rashly.”

Hearing Azgalor’s words, Chen Rui thought quickly in his heart. The so-called Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce is most likely to be the power of Bloodfall. Then the prince of the Bloody Empire, Aleus, is actually a member of the Bloodfall! Could it be that the real mastermind of Bloodfall is Aleus? Or it is above him… Raizen the Great? Perhaps only the top powerhouse of the Demon Realm can control the people like the crystal dragon and Azgalor. After the 3 empires have signed the truce contract, they used the Bloodfall organization to perform this trick that is developed from the peaceful situation? Chen Rui felt that something was not right. Azgalor, Manu and others have wild ambitions. Obviously, they want to restore the lost royal family glory. “Bloodfall” gives me the impression of trying to subvert the existing power of the Demon Realm and then re-establish the regime. So leaving Raizen aside, if Aleus is really the head of Bloodfall, then his purpose is… Does he want to rebel against his father? In any case, Azgalor’s visit here means that the Bloodfall has fixed their gaze on the rising Dark Moon. They want to take advantage of the current crisis the Dark Moon is facing and Shea’s intention to revive her position to incorporate the Dark Moon into the power of Bloodfall. Then they will use the identity of Princess Royal Shea to subvert and control the entire Fallen Angel Empire step by step. His attempt to win over me, the financial officer, just now was just to test me.

Azgalor saw Chen Rui falling into contemplation, and he thought that the other party was already tempted. Little did he know that this insignificant human was actually the culprit who destroyed his base, Crystal Valley, and Chen Rui had already seen through his identity and true purpose.

“The identity of Sir Galor surprised me.” Chen Rui finally said, “If it’s just a business cooperation, I can just make a decision now. However, in this case, I have to report it to Princess Royal Highness before I can give sir a reply. By then, it is up to Princess Royal Highness to decide whether or not she will meet sir. Royal Highness seems to be training behind closed doors today, so she will not meet any foreign visitors. Can Sir Galor stay for a few days in the Dark Moon? I will introduce sir to meet Princess Royal by then.”

With Azgalor’s power, if he really wanted to meet Shea, even if Chen Rui obstructed him in all possible ways, it would still be useless. At the moment, Chen Rui could only delay him to buy more time.

“Of course.” Azgalor nodded in satisfaction, and he then handed out another space ring. “The previous small gift represents my personal gratitude to sir for taking care of Kia. This gift represents the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce’s appreciation for sir’s introduction. This cooperation has an extremely huge impact for the benefits of both parties. Sir’s right to speak in front of Princess Royal is quite substantial. Once the cooperation is successful, I will present more rewards.”

The black crystal coins in this space ring are 10 times more than the previous one. Bloodfall is really generous. Without being courteous, Chen Rui accepted the ring. He rolled his eyes, “Well, I will go to the palace now to see if Princess Shea has completed the training. If she has not, then please wait a day or two, sir.”

“No problem, thank you so much, sir.” Azgalor’s smile was even broader. After stating the hotel he was staying in, he got up and bade farewell.

Chen Rui sent Azgalor to the door, then he quickly walked toward the palace.

As soon as he walked to the gate of the outer courtyard of the palace, he saw Kaguli walking out. After the war of lords, some adjustments were made to the Dark Moon’s internal duties. Kaguli was named the deputy commander of the Red Blood imperial guards for her outstanding performance in the wilderness of Town Leith. She was responsible for the palace guards. Her brother, Kaguron, focused on recruiting and training new troops. As for Alice of the Princess Retail Store, not only Kia was present, but there was also Chen Rui’s carefully designed magic circles. Delia’s Dark Demon members were also watching and protecting Alice, so the safety factor was much higher than before.

Kaguli and Chen Rui were old acquaintances. Kaguli was stunned when he saw Chen Rui coming. She called Chen Rui aside and whispered, “Sir Chen Rui, you came at the right time. Princess Royal Highness just summoned you just now. Royal Highness is meeting with 2 important guests in council hall now. Please go quickly.”

Chen Rui looked at Kaguli’s mysterious and cautious appearance. He nodded, walked all the way into the council hall, and found that there were no guards around the council hall. It seems that the origins of these 2 distinguished guests are not simple. Since Bloodfall has already come to see me just now, and I have also agreed, they will definitely not meet Shea so quickly. Otherwise, Azgalor will not use Kia to meet me. Chen Rui walked into the council hall all the way, and he saw Shea talking with them.

Both of them were women with attractive postures. The one in the blue robe was sitting opposite Shea, and there was a woman in black standing behind her. Both women were covered with veils.

This outfit seemed a little familiar to Chen Rui. It seemed to be the outfit used by Dark Shadow Empire’s women.

A prompt appeared in his [Analytical Eyes]. The race of the woman in the blue robe was the Lust Royal Family, and her comprehensive strength had reached A- (A-) which was the early stage of the Demon Emperor.

No doubt, she is from the Asmodeus Royal Family of the Dark Shadow Empire. It seems that all the talented and powerful people are gathered in the Dark Moon this time. What really shocked Chen Rui was the woman in black who looked like a bodyguard behind her.

Race: Lust Royal family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A (S+).

Physique: A (S+), Strength: A (S+), Spirit: A (S+), Agility: A (S+).

[Analysis]: Currently unavailable.

This modest woman in black is actually at the peak stage of Demon Overlord! I actually met the 2 strongest peak stage Demon Overlords in a row in the Dark Moon today! Chen Rui suddenly felt his heart racing. How many peak stage Demon Overlords are there in the Asmodeus Royal Family? How many of them are women? The black-clothed woman seemed to keenly feel this subtle emotion. When she glanced at him, Chen Rui felt a strange sensation inexplicably. She seems familiar. Illusion? Impossible! The woman in black also showed some doubts in her eyes. She looked at him for a moment before looking away.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and bowed to Shea, “Princess Royal Highness, I have an important matter to report, and I ran into Sir Kaguli at the door. I just learned that Your Highness summoned me.”

When there were outsiders, Chen Rui did the complete set of etiquette. Shea nodded, “No wonder you came so fast. You can report the matter later. Come and meet these 2 distinguished guests. This is a Lady Liliz, and the one behind her is Commander Isis. These 2 ladies are members of the Asmodeus Royal Family of the Dark Shadow Empire.”

Isis? A very unfamiliar name. Chen Rui had calmed down, and he bowed to the 2 women, “The Dark Moon Sheriff, Chen Rui, pays respect to the 2 distinguished ladies.”

Liliz said, “I have long heard about Sir Chen Rui’s reputation as a capable officer. After meeting you today, your demeanor is indeed extraordinary. Just now, I happened to talk to Princess Shea about sir’s deeds. Sir Chen Rui has an immense contribution to the great achievement of the Dark Moon today.”

Chen Rui said a few humble words quickly, and he walked over to stand behind Shea.

Liliz said straightforwardly, “Princess Shea, Her Majesty Catherine has commissioned me to come to the Dark Moon this time. We hope to establish a close cooperative relationship with the Dark Moon.”

Chen Rui thought. The empress also wants to use the Bloodfall’s method? Indifferently support Shea, then use peace to subvert and control the Fallen Angel Empire? With Catherine’s wisdom, such a strategy is possible. There was a glimmer of light in Shea’s eyes when she heard Catherine’s name, “Please tell me more.”

“The cooperation between the Dark Shadow Empire and the Dark Moon actually started a long time ago. Custer Family and the Dark Moon formed a joint chamber of commerce, and the Princess Retail Store opened branches in the Dark Shadow Empire, in which the business is booming. The capital and surrounding estates began to imitate the Dark Moon to establish night markets, auction houses and other facilities. Her Majesty Empress is very interested in the Dark Moon’s battle ball and the latest magic soil improvement technology. She hopes to establish an informal cooperative relationship with the Dark Moon.”

There were also many barren and backward estates in the Dark Shadow Empire. Catherine obviously wanted to use this kind of cooperation to introduce soil improvement technology to make the empire stronger. The battle ball could enhance the physique, and it was very entertaining. It had long been imitated everywhere, but the ball was very special. It seemed to be made of dozens of top-quality materials, so it couldn’t be imitated. The Dark Moon also sold a fixed quantity only, so it hadn’t become popular yet.

Perhaps the Empress also has the ambition to be dominant. Judging from their current strategy toward the Dark Moon, Catherine and Bloodfall are still two different concepts. 1 is an overt plot to strengthen itself, and the other is an evil plot to subvert the other side. Shea pondered without speaking, and Chen Rui said, “Ms. Liliz, please pardon my frankness. What are the benefits that your empire’s so-called ‘informal’ cooperation can bring to the Dark Moon?”

As Azgalor said, the current situation of the Dark Moon was really not optimistic. In addition to Obsidian, Bloodfall was also watching them closely for opportunities. The Dark Shadow Empire personally came at this time, so they absolutely must grasp this key opportunity.

Was the black-clothed woman his woman? 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 398: Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 398: Cooperation

Liliz had long expected the question raised by Chen Rui. She replied, “Our empire will deepen the cooperation with the Dark Moon from multiple aspects like the Custer Family. The Dark Moon can become the best ‘port’ for the business cooperation between our empire and your empire. I believe that with the vision of Princess Royal Highness and sir sheriff, you should be able to see that this is definitely beneficial to the long-term stable development of the Dark Moon.”

“I have to admit that what Ms. Liliz said is reasonable, but the prerequisite is that the Dark Moon can truly prosper and develop stably in the current environment. I believe that with your talent and wisdom, you should know that the war of lords previously was the scheme of the Fallen Angel Capital’s Regent Obsidian. This time he failed, but the backstage culprit will surely not give up. The Dark Moon will encounter the crisis of destruction at any time. What we need most at present is more substantial cooperation, more open and formal cooperation such as military assistance, public consensus support and so on.”

Military assistance? Publicly support Princess Royal Shea? Liliz frowned for a while, and she glanced at Isis behind her. They seemed to be exchanging opinions quickly. When she was about to answer, Shea spoke, “Ladies, please forget what Chen Rui said just now.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, and Shea continued, “Although I also hope to establish a more formal cooperative relationship with Her Majesty Catherine, I only represent an estate of the Fallen Angel Empire now, and not the entire Fallen Angel Empire. It is impossible for me to establish a formal relationship between both empires.”

Chen Rui thought of the situation in which Shea directly attacked “Aguile.Beelzebub” regardless of his “saving grace” when she was facing powerful enemies like Josh and Rus in the wilderness battlefield. Princess Royal Highness had her bottom line of never splitting the entire empire because of personal interests, gains or losses.

In fact, Chen Rui’s idea of “borrowing power” also had a limit in it. Otherwise, they would be controlled like the Bloodfall scheme and become a tool to subvert the entire empire. Then, it would be self-defeating.

Liliz’s eyes showed admiration, “Princess Royal Highness is worthy of being a descendant of the Lord of Midnight Sun. It is admirable. Since this is the case, then…”

“Wait a minute” Chen Rui’s mind shifted, then he said, “Princess Royal Highness, I think my intention may have been misunderstood. Although it is a bit rude, I hope Your Highness can give me a chance to explain.”

Shea naturally knew that Chen Rui would not harm her, so she nodded, “Go ahead.”

“The formal cooperation I mentioned is not in the form of empire-to-empire. The Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire are already good neighbours and allies. This cooperation is actually between the estate and the estate. Your empire can use the name of an estate to form a public twin town with the Dark Moon. We can visit each other and carry out some friendly cooperation and exchanges including some form of friendly competition between the military as well as technical complementarity. For example, the Dark Moon currently needs to introduce a large number of high-quality meat and seedlings, while the estate of your empire needs the Dark Moon to assist in land improvement and so on. Ms. Liliz, what do you think of this proposal?”

Chen Rui’s last minute idea originated from the creativity of the international twin towns and friendly exchange areas in his previous life. At the side, Shea’s eyes were shining when she heard him. This is quite a clever idea. It does not impact the sovereignty of the Fallen Angel Empire, and it is able to reach a cooperative relationship with the Dark Shadow Empire. Once this relationship is stable, then even Obsidian needs to think twice if he wants to attack the Dark Moon publicly. “This is a good idea.” Shea said, “What do you think, Ms. Liliz?”

This was the first case of such friendly cooperation between the towns in the Demon Realm. Liliz was obviously lost in thought. A hint of splendor was revealed behind Isis’s veil, and she began to reexamine this human financial officer.

Liliz glanced at Isis, and she said, “I have to say that Sir Chen Rui’s idea is quite clever, but I can’t call the shots. I have to ask Catherine the Great. Sir Chen Rui still has something to report to Princess Royal? We shall leave first.”

“Okay.” Shea nodded, “If the 2 ladies don’t mind it, please stay at the royal inn. I’ll wait for your good news at any time.”

Liliz got up to leave the palace with Isis.

“They have already left.” Shea’s cold voice sounded because Chen Rui had been staring at the back of the black-clothed woman, Isis.

Although it was only half a sentence, he could sense her jealousy.

When Shea was alone with him, that cold mask seemed to be getting thinner. Moreover, they were not even in the secret room now.

“What are you thinking?” Chen Rui wanted to take advantage of the situation to tease his female boss, but there were important matters right now. He shook his head, “This Isis is not simple. Her true power is at the peak stage of Demon Overlord.”

Peak stage of Demon Overlord! Shea couldn’t help being surprised. Apart from the legendary Demi-God powerhouse, this level of powerhouse had already stood at the top of Demon Realm. Their existence was almost unrivaled. She did not expect such a powerhouse to appear in front of her as a guard commander.

“This is not the first peak stage Demon Overlord I saw today. Before coming to the palace, I have met another one…”

Shea was surprised. Chen Rui told her the story about Bloodfall and Azgalor.

It was already evening when Chen Rui left the palace to return to his residence. He told everyone about the appearance of the powerful enemy. He gave some instructions to Kia, asking her to delay Azgalor as much as possible and try to stabilize the opponent.

Azgalor suddenly appeared in front of Kia today. Kia naturally could not resist him with her power. Moreover, Azgalor could not be stopped even without her, so she took her “father” to Chen Rui. Fortunately, Chen Rui sensed her hints. He had recognized the true identity of the other party long ago, and he dealt with Azgalor skillfully.

Paglio was a little resentful. If his power was not sealed, even if he might not be able to defeat the mysterious Isis, it was not difficult to beat Azgalor down. Now his power was still at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He felt very aggrieved.

Chen Rui never had the right opportunity to confess to Athena and Kia about Zola. Naturally, he couldn’t tell Paglio further at the moment. The agreement between him and Zola was around 1 to 3 months at most. After this auction and trade fair was over, he planned to go to the Rainbow Valley to confess many things to Ms. Fairy Dragon. First, he had to resolve the grievances back then, and then ask her to help Paglio to lift his seal personally.

Last time, Chen Rui used the faking death tactic to make his enemies fight amongst themselves at the capital’s Leisure Moon Inn, enticing Obsidian and Broc to fight fiercely. He initially expected Broc to die, but he didn’t expect that Broc escaped alive. This could be inferred from the existing [Soul Shackles] of Delia. However, Broc must have suffered a lot, so he wouldn’t cause any trouble for the time being. Since Broc was also a member of Bloodfall, it was better to be cautious just in case. Especially Delia and Roman, they should stay out of the crowd and disguise themselves properly during this time so as not to reveal their whereabouts.

The next day, Chen Rui was summoned by Shea to the Dark Moon palace early in the morning. Liliz and Isis were already waiting in the council hall.

“Princess Shea, I contacted Her Majesty Empress by communication skill yesterday. Her Majesty Empress has agreed to Princess Shea’s terms. As long as the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire maintain their alliance and friendship, our Bloody Vine Flower Estate will become the permanent twin town with the Dark Moon Estate. What does Your Highness think?”

The Bloody Vine Flower Estate was one of the 3 major estates of the Dark Shadow Empire. It was where the Crystal Valley was located. Lord Eddie was killed by Manu of Bloodfall, and now the third general of the Dark Shadow Empire, Crawford, took over as the lord.

Shea’s eyes lit up. She nodded and said, “It’s awesome! Whether it’s for the Bloody Vine Estate or the Dark Moon, it will be an important cooperation of mutual benefit.”

Liliz smiled behind the veil, “Since Princess Shea has no objection, in order to show our sincerity, the new lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, General Crawford, will officially visit the Dark Moon Estate during the auction next month.”

This was a visit of great significance. Not only could it create momentum for the 2 events, but it also demonstrated the friendly and cooperative attitude of the 2 estates in a high-profile manner. For Obsidian of the Fallen Angel Capital, it was definitely a wonderful “gift”. Besides, dark forces like Bloodfall, who had a covetous heart for the Dark Moon, would also be greatly deterred.

Shea smiled with joy, “General Crawford will receive the warmest welcome from the people of the Dark Moon.”

Liliz smiled gently, “Then, can we discuss the preliminary plan of our cooperation now? Her Majesty Catherine is looking forward to both the magic land and the battle ball.”

Shea glanced at Chen Rui, and Chen Rui said, “The Dark Moon will send someone to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate to improve the barren land. We will also give a batch of battle balls to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, help the estate build more than 20 standard fields, and provide regular and systematic training to referees and athletes.”

Liliz frowned, “Just send someone there and give battle balls? This makes it easy to misunderstand the sincerity of the Dark Moon. What we need is the land improvement technology and the craftsmanship of the battle ball, not the ready-made… ‘finished product’.”

Chen Rui shook his head and said, “True sincerity is the friendly cooperation that does not compromise the core interests of both parties. The secret technique of land improvement is the Dark Moon’s greatest treasure. If we want your country to present the Dark Shadow Cape as a gift of sincerity, I believe Her Majesty Empress would not agree. We can help the Bloody Vine Flower Estate for free, but we will definitely not reveal the secret technique. As for the craftsmanship of the battle ball, it is an unspoken secret carefully researched by the Dark Moon’s Master Xingxing. Even Princess Royal doesn’t have the formula.”

The so-called land secret technique was basically something made by the Super System. Even Chen Rui didn’t know what the ingredients were. The battle ball was made with refined materials, so he couldn’t provide the so-called formula.

Moreover, technology is the most precious resource, and it must not be sold. This is the bottom line. Imagine how many patents and technologies have Japan shamelessly stolen from China in the 1980s and 1990s? Cloisonne, rice paper… and countless examples. They are the most painful lessons.

Liliz stood up and paced back and forth as if she was pondering, but Chen Rui, who had been observing secretly, discovered that Liliz was actually exchanging opinions with the Isis with her eyes. It seemed that Ms. Isis who pretended to be the guard commander was the real decision maker.

Isis was keenly aware of Chen Rui’s observation, and she glanced at him lightly. The silent deterrent gaze made him feel dizzy in an instant. When he was awake, Liliz had already sat down.

“We can take one step back on the land improvement secret technique, but in addition to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, we hope that the Dark Moon can also help other barren estates in our empire.” Liliz paused, “As for the battle ball… I hope that both sides can truly be sincere and cooperate further.”

Chen Rui squinted his eyes slightly. Although it is a friendly and cooperative negotiation, the other party is fighting for every inch. Liliz and Isis must have noticed that the magical land is the biggest bottom line of the Dark Moon, so they shift their intention on the battle ball instead. I believe that many mechanics, including those in the Dark Shadow Empire, have researched the battle balls. By right, this kind of ball should be made of several top-level magic materials with extremely high purity. The cost is high, but the price is far from reaching the height of this cost, it must be the result of a certain secret technique formula. In a way, the long-term value of this formula is not even inferior to the land improvement secret technique. Chen Rui’s thoughts changed, “The battle ball is not only very entertaining and brings great commercial value, it also has a very positive effect on military training. It can greatly improve their physical fitness in the gravity field and cultivate the most valuable spirit of cooperation. I very much agree with the in-depth cooperation in this area.”

Shea completely trusted Chen Rui, and she added, “Chen Rui’s words represent my intention.”

“With this promise, I believe Her Majesty Empress will be very happy to hear it.” There was a hint of joy in Liliz’s voice. She didn’t know that a certain guy was actually secretly thinking, If it is to cooperate “in-depth” with your majesty empress again, I will be more than happy to agree with it. “The Dark Moon is planning to create the ‘Battle Ball Association’ to take charge of a series of affairs such as battle ball competition, naming, equipment venues, and personnel. The association will invite Bloody Vine Flower Estate to join. Not only will we provide a series of resources such as battle ball and training, teams from the 2 places will also visit each other to compete. This kind of exchange will be long-term, and it will become the unprecedentedly most exciting grand occasion…”

Chen Rui excitedly described the popular scenes of the two homes and away games, “How about naming the first cup match as the ‘Nirvana’ Cup? This is to pay tribute to your empire’s empress, the first beauty and the first sage of the Demon Realm.”

“Of course…” Liliz was involuntarily attracted by the competition scene described by Chen Rui, and then she recovered again. She showed a slightly surprised expression. I didn’t expect my original intention of seeking the secret formula is actually diverted away by the opponent to become a cooperation in this sense. This human financial officer cannot be underestimated. Then came another bargain-like negotiation. Chen Rui was actually a novice in this respect. He just accidentally let the other party miss the opportunity just now, but he always adhered to the 2 bottom lines of the battle ball and land improvement. After the discussion, he felt even more exhausted than intensive fighting or training. Finally, the 2 sides finally reached a consensus.

Although the magic contract that represented the formal cooperation would not be publicly signed until the current lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, Crawford, visited the Dark Moon, the current mutually beneficial cooperation relationship between the 2 parties had been officially determined. Their relationship was much closer.

“I have the honor to live up to my mission this time, and I have completed the mission assigned by Her Majesty Catherine. I can finally relax.” Liliz exhaled, “Princess Shea, the noon banquet is unnecessary. After all, our cooperation still needs to be kept secret for the time being. Isis and I would like to visit the Dark Moon and also taste the special snacks. I wonder if Your Highness is willing to ‘borrow’ Sir Chen Rui as a guide for us?”

Chen Rui was stunned. Why is it me again? It is a marvellous thing to go shopping with beautiful women, but I promised Athena to go back and cook steamed vegetables for her today… Men were a bit lustful under normal circumstances. Even when shopping for vegetables, they would inevitably stop and look at the passing beauties. However, after seeing the beauties, they still carried the vegetable basket back to help their wife to cook.

Shea saw his pleading expression, and a hint of playfulness flashed across her eyes.

“Of course, it is his honor.”

Although Princess Royal Highness could understand his thoughts, she didn’t give this nasty man an excuse to reject her. She directly sold the sir financial officer with the tone of “use him as you wish”.

(Don’t you want to see that black-clothed Isis? I’ll fulfill your wish!) With the current closeness of the 2, they could communicate with their gazes. Chen Rui clearly understood the meaning within Princess Royal Highness’ gaze. He sighed secretly. Is there no real generous woman in the world? Without any other choice, Chen Rui bowed politely to the 2 women, “As Princess Royal Highness said, this is my honor.”

A few hours later.

Dark Moon City, southwest block.

Chen Rui wandered all the way with Liliz and Isis. Although the 2 women were covered with veils, their beautiful figures and elegant temperament still attracted the attention of many demons. When they saw the human sheriff trying his best to please the 2 mysterious beauties, many demons couldn’t help but to whisper.

The human financial officer was now one of the famous figures of the Dark Moon. He possessed the terrifying poison technique taught by Master Aldas, and he had an extraordinary mind. The reason Dark Moon was in its current development situation was very much due to the painstaking management of the human. This former mining officer and sheriff was a loyal officer of the Princess Royal Highness. Especially in the Town Leith’s wilderness, when facing the 100,000 army of the Red Spirit Estate, he took the lead in shouting the high-spirited slogan. He was the first to rush to the enemy. This kind of courage made people respect him involuntarily.

However, the most enviable thing was that this human actually got the damn favor of Athena, the daughter of the first general of the empire. Princess Royal even granted him the charming succubus, Kia, as his concubine. Rumours had it that the human had always admired Princess Royal. However, with Princess Royal’s arrogant and cold personality, this kind of admiration was obviously just an illusion; there would be no results between them.

This financial officer is openly hooking up with two beauties now. This kind of ability is really enviable. It is strange that with the power of Athena, the sheriff and commander of the Flame Army, she actually can’t control this playboy human?

Dear Light God, hurry up and cast down the damn glory, and take this enviable man back to the human world! At this moment, many demon males had secretly changed their beliefs.

This damn man could even make his enemy become his woman, what else he couldn’t do?

chapters.title: Chapter 399: Isis
chapters.body:
Chapter 399: Isis

Chen Rui didn’t know his influence was so great that the male demons temporarily betrayed their faithful belief in the Demon God while he still absentmindedly accompanied the 2 ladies strolling on the street.

“The hot pot just now is really delicious.” Liliz praised, “I have tasted it before in the Dark Shadow Empire, but the taste is far from the authentic one here. I wonder if I should use my power for personal gain to include the authentic Dark Moon hot pot recipe into our cooperation plan?”

Chen Rui laughed and said, “Miss Liliz is really humorous. This hot pot is a masterpiece of the Cloak Gang leader, Aguile, but it is basically no secret, mainly because there are some subtle differences in the base ingredient. Since Ms. Liliz likes it, I can make the decision to add a hot pot branch with excellent chefs in your empire’s capital. I guarantee you can taste all flavours of the authentic Dark Moon hot pot anytime.

“Thank you so much, sir.” Liliz switched the subject, “Speaking of the leader, Aguile, I heard that he is very mysterious. No one has ever seen his true face? As far as I know, many people are speculating that the one who defeated the Red Spirit Lord Josh and capital envoy, Rus, in Town Leith’s wilderness was the leader of the Cloak Gang?”

This speculation did exist in the minds of many soldiers and civilians of the Dark Moon, but Aguile and the Cloak Gang did not receive special rewards after the war. Besides, it seemed that Aguile was just a Higher Demon when he fought against Arux a year ago? How could he soar to the level of Demon Emperor all of sudden?

“I also have such speculation too, but Princess Shea once revealed that even she has never seen the true face of Aguile.” Chen Rui was telling outright lies, “However, Princess Shea is very courageous. She dares to employ him. I, a foreign human being, am able to serve as a sheriff and then a financial officer is the best example.”

“Princess Shea is indeed a strong, courageous, and respectable female lord. She worked hard secretly in adversity, and she managed the dilapidated Dark Moon to the vibrant situation it is today.” Liliz praised sincerely, and she glanced at Isis, “I’m a little tired. I’ll go back to the royal inn to rest first. I still have to report to Her Majesty Empress about the details of this cooperation. I also want to buy some special gifts this time, and Isis also knows about it. I will have to trouble Sir Chen Rui to accompany her.”

Then, Liliz returned to the royal inn to rest, while Chen Rui continued to shop with Isis.

When Liliz was there, Isis seldom spoke. She took the initiative to speak now, “Sir Chen Rui, have all the residents of the Dark Moon City used the new type of water system in the royal inn?”

“Almost, this system is the masterpiece of Master Xingxing. Didn’t we talk about it in our cooperation? We will help the Bloody Vine Flower Estate to build the same water supply and sewage system. I believe this kind of facility will soon be popularized throughout the Demon Realm.”

Isis nodded, “This is really an amazing and great creation. It is almost comparable to the grand master-level invention of the magic lamp. That Master Xingxing will be included in the history of the Demon Realm and become one of the most amazing mechanics.

It’s just that I have a doubt. Master Xingxing is just an independent senior mechanic master before this. Why does he start to shine so brightly after coming to the Dark Moon? I’m not questioning the master’s ability, but I’m just thinking that things like the battle ball and water system are never seen in the Demon Realm before… It seems that before the master came to the Dark Moon, some novel things have also appeared in the Princess Retail Store. For instance, burr puzzle, demon-fighting chess, Huarong Dao and so on. I’m thinking whether these factors can be linked?”

Terrifying inference power! Chen Rui was secretly shocked, and he asked, “Ms. Isis, do you believe in coincidence?”

Unlike Liliz, Isis’s face was covered with a thin veil. A clear outline could be seen in the ambiguity, but he could not see her real face. She said lightly, “I believe it, but too many coincidences… or it could be said the combination of coincidences shows a certain truth. With the wisdom of Sir Chen Rui, you should understand what I mean.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “The little products in the Princess Retail Store previously were the works of some masters that I copied from the human world. However, due to the lack of mechanics, I could only make things that look impressive without real worth. It is more for entertainment purposes. When Master Xingxing came to the Dark Moon later, he was very inspired when he saw these things. As the miss says, this may be the truth in the conincidences.”

“Really?” Isis asked again, “I also know a human in the Dark Shadow Empire capital, but it is strange. Whether it is Huarong Dao, demon-fighting chess, burr puzzle, Peg’s Solitaire, Rubik’s cube, flying chess… as well as the rules of the battle ball, these should be phenomenal creations that have been widely circulated, but they have not appeared in the human world! I don’t know where did Sir Chen Rui copy these strange things?”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. For the first time, his background was seen through. Perhaps when he faced a noble lady of amazing wisdom a long time ago, he also had this feeling of being seen through.

However, his “Master Arthur” identity should not be exposed yet. He was exposed in the Dark Shadow Palace last time mainly because he mentioned Christina’s name in the mechanic contest, and then the empress tentatively exposed him.

Isis listed almost all the “new things” in the Princess Retail Store, and she also sought confirmations from the humans in the Demon Realm. It seemed that she had deliberately spent a lot of effort to research and analyse this mere human. This also sounded a wake-up call for Chen Rui. I have gone from obscurity to the stage now. I must properly conceal some things. Otherwise, if Isis can see the flaws today, then Bloodfall or other people will also notice it in the future. Chen Rui thought quickly, and he said, “Miss, have you ever thought about why I, a powerless human, came to the Demon Realm? When I first came here, I was captured and became the experiment subject of Master Aldas. If I didn’t come out with something novel that touched the master, I would be dead by now. Demon-fighting chess and others are the things I obtained in another world’s very special territory, and this is also my secret. Miss, the so-called humans in the Demon Realm may be far more powerful than me, but they shouldn’t belong to the territory where our kind of people are located. It’s not surprising that they don’t know these things that only circulate in a certain territory. It’s like I don’t understand the power in the territory of powerhouses like you… Actually, what I want the most now is to return to the human world to get back all the things that belong to me from a person.”

“It turns out that you came to the Demon Realm after being framed,” Isis said in a slightly surprised tone, “Then battle ball and all others…”

“Unlike the demon-fighting chess and Peg’s Solitaire that I copied over, what I brought to some people like Master Xingxing was just a broader vision expansion or key inspiration. The battle ball was a research outcome by Master Xingxing and Aguile. I fell into a deep sleep because of someone’s plot at that time. If it wasn’t because Athena found the Fountain of Resurrection, I might still be lying in bed like a walking dead.” Chen Rui calmly pointed out the “facts” that he was in crisis and sleeping for months Isis had researched him, so she naturally knew this. She thought about it and nodded slightly, “If Aguile can create the rule of battle ball, can we assume that he is also somehow involved in the production process of the water system and battle ball? Perhaps he even has extraordinary talents in mechanics?”

“Only he knows it, but a lot of what we talked about just now are the secrets of the Dark Moon. I accidentally divulged some today. Miss, please give me a chance to survive.” Chen Rui looked a little nervous. He was secretly more suspicious of Isis’s identity. It seems that her reasoning is directed toward a certain mechanic master… or even a genius mechanicmaster. Fortunately, I have the mysterious identity of Aguile as a scapegoat to shift her focus to the leader of the Cloak Gang. I almost showed my flaws in just a few questions. A terrifying wisdom coupled with the true strength of the peak stage of Demon Overlord, the identity of this Isis… Chen Rui’s heart was beating uncontrollably. The faintly familiar feeling in his mind seemed to grow stronger.

Could it be that many new things in the Dark Moon attracted her attention, that’s why she came here to observe and learn? Fortunately, he was at the moment when his appearance was tense. Even if Isis detected his accelerated heartbeat, he wouldn’t show any flaws.

Isis’s voice was a little friendlier, “Sir is too worried. With sir’s talent, even in my Dark Shadow Empire, it is enough to become a really important talent. If you have this intention, I can recommend sir to Her Majesty Empress.”

Perhaps it was a psychological effect, but even this “solicitation” gave Chen Rui a familiar feeling.

Whether Isis is “she” or not, I can’t agree to it now. Athena, Kia, Shea, and my friends are in the Dark Moon, and the situation I have worked so hard to manage, so I can’t leave. She is the empress of an empire. She has more helplessness, worries, and restrictions than the lord Shea. Moreover, she has her own great ambitions. Unless I have the power to ignore all of this one day, then only I can appear in front of her with my true appearance and identity in order to give myself and her the right to choose. In a sense, the difficulty of this task is S grade.

Before that, I better stay in the Dark Moon to help Shea manage this thriving estate. Chen Rui looked surprised, “It is not easy for the Dark Moon to have the present situation. I have no plans to leave here for the time being. Chen Rui appreciates the kindness of Ms. Isis.”

This answer did not surprise Isis. She nodded and said, “Sir Chen Rui’s morals are admirable. This is a magic badge that is a special token of my Asmodeus Royal Family. If there is any unexpected change in the Dark Moon in the future, sir can look for me. The door of the Dark Shadow Empire is open for sir at any time.”

“Then I would like to thank you first.” Chen Rui knew that it would be unkind to refuse, so he kept the badge immediately. In order to divert Isis’s attention from “Aguile”, he immediately resorted to a trump card, ” I don’t know if Ms. Isis has ever heard of the name Bloodfall?”

No doubt, Isis’s attention became highly concentrated, and she asked, “Sir Chen Rui also heard about it?”

“Similar to the intentions of the 2 young ladies’ visit, Bloodfall is very interested in the Dark Moon. They even proposed a series of cooperation terms that are difficult to refuse. In the end, Princess Royal chose to cooperate with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, which is actually cooperating with the Dark Shadow Empire. As Ms. Isis saw, Princess Shea is a firm and persevering lady.” Only half of Chen Rui’s words were true. Actually, Azgalor had not met Shea yet.

Isis nodded approvingly, “Princess Shea is indeed an admirable princess.”

Chen Rui looked worried, “However, since we choose your empire as our partner, Bloodfall, a dark force with vicious means, will never let us go. If possible, I hope that you can try to call upon your empire’s powerful strength to help the Dark Moon to give a definitive blow to Bloodfall. This will make our cooperation more stable and safe without any worries.”

Isis shook her head, “The Dark Moon’s power is obvious to all. Even Lord Josh was defeated by your mysterious powerhouse. Naturally, there is no need for outsiders like me to intervene. This is not in line with the initial intention of non-interference in internal affairs in our cooperation.”

Obviously, Isis saw through Chen Rui’s plan to start a fight between Dark Moon’s enemies in view of the interest, so she was unwilling to be used as a scapegoat. Chen Rui sighed, “If he is just an ordinary member, naturally we don’t need the power of your empire, but according to the latest intel, the one coming to the Dark Moon this time is one of the heads of Bloodfall. His name is Azgalor.

As soon as Isis heard Azgalor’s name, a sharp qi faintly appeared in her eyes behind the veil. Chen Rui remembered that when he was in the Crystal Valley, Manu, who thought he was winning, once introduced the name of Azgalor in front of the empress. He immediately said, “The Dark Moon’s most powerful guest, Krobelus, has tested this person. She actually feels that she is not his opponent at all. I’m afraid that this person’s strength has reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord or even higher. That is why we are desperately asking your empire for help. Otherwise, if Azgalor launches a deliberate sabotage or assassination, the consequences will be disastrous. No one in the Dark Moon can stop him.”

Isis was silent for a moment, and she finally said, “I can ask Her Majesty to mobilize the powerhouse to help the Dark Moon solve this hidden danger. However, I have 1 condition. When I was strolling just now, I saw that the Dark Moon’s urban reconstruction and planning are quite organized. The future development prospects are very broad. This should be Sir Chen Rui’s contribution. The Bloody Vine Flower Estate is my hometown. The new lord has just taken charge, and there are many things to be done. I hope that sir will provide a set of overall plans according to the local conditions. This is in line with our spirit of mutually beneficial cooperation.”

Didn’t you talk about non-interference in each other’s internal affairs? Chen Rui smiled bitterly as he shrugged, “Miss really knows how to take advantage of the predicam… Uh, make use of the opportunity. I can’t seem to find a reason to reject.”

In fact, the so-called planning was actually just copying some of the existing urban facilities in his previous life.

Seeing Chen Rui subconsciously shrugging his shoulders, a strange expression flashed through Isis’s eyes. She asked faintly, “Do you believe in coincidence?”

“ Huh? ” Chen Rui was puzzled for a while.

“It’s nothing. It’s just a small hypothesis,” Isis took a deep look at him, then she changed the subject, “Back to the subject, I need all your intel of Azgalor.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. In any case, the crisis of the Dark Moon was truly resolved.

‘Her’ disguise was truly amazing, even Chen Rui couldn’t see through it without the [True Analytical Eyes]. By the way, Azgalor really had no way to run this time…

chapters.title: Chapter 400: The Woman He Feared Most! The Regretful Azgalor
chapters.body:
Chapter 400: The Woman He Feared Most! The Regretful Azgalor

Azgalor lived in a low-key hotel on the outskirts of the city, quietly waiting for the news from the human financial officer. Judging from the intel provided by Kia and the Dark Moon, this human is quite significant to Shea. He should be able to play a positive role in this matter. Whether it is Aleus, the eldest prince of the Bloody Empire, or the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce, Shea should have no reason to refuse directly. At least she will summon me to discuss the specific conditions. Judging from the current situation of the Dark Moon, this matter is quite certain .

I just need to make good use of Shea’s eagerness to fight against the capital and even regain the throne. Coupled with my puppet secret skills, it is not difficult to control the Dark Moon. Back then, my brother, Glorfin, rebelled against the Dark Moon, but the Lord of Midnight Sun personally led the army. He disappeared when his army was defeated. The current Fallen Angel Empire is not what it used to be. As long as I can control the Dark Moon as a springboard, and subvert the Fallen Angel Empire step by step, then the glory of the Beelzebub Royal Family will once again descend on this piece of land that once belonged to the Gluttony Royal Family. As long as I control enough strength, I can gradually get rid of or even destroy Bloodfall… I, Azgalor, am not a character who is controlled by people! The only pity is that I didn’t get the strongest artifact, God-Eating Mask, of the Beelzebub Royal Family from “Arthur” last time. I lost the Crystal Valley, my hard-earned land, in vain. I even sacrificed my 2 wives and 1 daughter. However, whether it is women or a child, it is not something that I cannot give up when I am gaining power. Sometimes they are even a burden. As long as I can accomplish my matters and control the power, I will have plenty of these. However, the woman who fought with 3 peak stage of Demon Overlords on her own is really terrifying. She actually defeated the joint forces of me, Manu and Jacob. In the end, Manu died due to serious injury. Before I get the God-Eating Mask, I never want to face this woman again. 2 days later, the human financial officer finally arrived at the hotel. Unlike what he had imagined, the human’s expression was strangely solemn.

“Sir Galor, I’m very sorry to tell you that things often develop beyond our imagination.”

“Sir is saying that… Princess Royal is not interested in the cooperation with the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce?” This news was really beyond Azgalor’s expectation, and he was suddenly full of doubts. Shea doesn’t even want to see me? Or this human financial officer did something in it between? Or maybe he wants more bribes?

“It’s hard to tell you everything in a few words. I have already taken a big risk by coming here today. It was completely out of Kia’s plea.” Chen Rui took out a space ring. It was the “gift” that Azgalor had previously given him to thank him for introducing, “I better return this ring to Sir Galor. Sir better leave the Dark Moon as soon as possible.”

Azgalor was really taken aback. He returned the ring again, and he added another ring after thinking about it, “I came with true sincerity this time. If I go back like this, I’m afraid it will be difficult to explain. Please tell me the reason, sir.”

Chen Rui showed hesitation, and he finally accepted the 2 rings, “There are many things that I never knew previously. It was only when I tried to seize the opportunity for sir in front of the Princess Royal yesterday that I learned some insider information. Sir should have heard of the war of lords not long ago? The reason the Dark Moon could defeat the Red Spirit Estate and wipe out the Blue Lava Estate is due to the support of some kind of force. This force is very powerful. It does not allow any external forces to interfere with the Dark Moon… I can only say this much. You are Kia’s father. For Kia’s sake, you should leave here quickly. Otherwise I can’t guarantee sir’s safety.”

Azgalor frowned. The insider information that this human revealed is worth looking into. Analysing from the previous intel, the Dark Moon does not have the power to defeat the 2 estates, but they suddenly won the victory with great power now. It almost surprised everyone. The mysterious powerhouse that defeated Josh and killed Rus, and the mysterious force that killed the Blue Lava Army silently without mobilizing the Dark Moon’s local forces are all mysteries. Now that the human said that there is a powerful force behind the Dark Moon that is supporting it, it makes sense. The question is, what is the origin of this mysterious force? It actually ‘conquered’ the Dark Moon first!? “Sir Galor, I can’t stay here. I’ll have to leave first.” After speaking, Chen Rui left hastily without giving Azgalor a chance to consider it.

Azgalor thought suspiciously for a while. No matter what, it is impossible to give up after only a few words from the human. What he said is not necessarily true; seeing is believing. Later, I better go to the Dark Moon palace once to spy. It’s a pity that without the God-Eating Mask, my puppet skill is still flawed. It is easy to be seen through. Otherwise, as long as Shea’s mind is controlled, the rest will be easy to handle. Just after Azgalor made up his mind, the spy in the Dark Moon sent a note with only 1 strange mark on it. This was a mark unique to Bloodfall, representing 1 word- “Danger”.

Azgalor frowned more tightly. This note should be written by Kia. Although the [Soul Shackles] on this “daughter” disappeared because of Sabrina’s death, Kia did not know the news of Sabrina’s death, let alone the death of her birth mother, Freya. In order to better control this daughter, during the secret contact with Kia these 2 days, Azgalor only said that Sabrina unlocked her shackles. Kia naturally also showed gratitude in cooperation, but she was very clear in her heart.

Since even Kia had sent a warning message, it seemed that what the human said just now was not an exaggeration, but Azgalor didn’t think anyone in the Dark Moon could do anything to him as he was at the peak stage of Demon Overlord. Out of caution, Azgalor left the hotel calmly. On the surface, he was going out of the city, but in fact he was going around. Finally, he transformed his face, and he appeared in the Dark Moon palace.

At this time, the night had come, and the 2 moons turned purple. Azgalor’s figure appeared creepily in the corner of the palace’s inner courtyard. It was as if he was blending with the surrounding environment, even the guards passing by nearby were unaware of him.

As the Beelzebub Royal Family who started the rebellion and once occupied the Dark Moon, Azgalor was no stranger to the palace. After a few turns, he went directly to the inner courtyard.

In the council hall, the light of the magic lamp was on. Azgalor had a sharp vision, he vaguely saw a woman’s figure standing inside.

He teleported and appeared silently behind a pillar in the council hall. The woman who was wearing a white robe did not notice him at all. Her back was facing him. There was no other person by her side. It seemed that the one who could stand here and think was definitely Princess Royal Shea.

Just as Azgalor was about to take some action, he suddenly had a sense of crisis instinctively. It was as if he was targeted by some terrifying power, and the source of this power was actually “Shea” with her back facing him.

“Shea” slowly turned around. It was a woman with a veil on her face. The 2 eyes behind the veil looked at Azgalor’s hiding place like laser rays. Azgalor was in a trance for a moment as if her gaze penetrated the pillar and shot directly into his eye socket. He suddenly felt a painful sensation.

She actually has such a mysterious power! Before fighting, Azgalor already felt the terrifying strength of the opponent, and he was secretly shocked. When does the Dark Moon have such a powerhouse! Could it be everything the human said is true? What is the origin of the force supporting or controlling the Dark Moon? Azgalor knew that he was not confident in defeating this woman alone, not to mention that the other party must also have more arrangements. At the moment of a thought, he jumped up without hesitation, and he disappeared from the council hall in the blink of an eye. He appeared in the air, flying outward.

Although he decisively left at full speed, the uneasy sense of crisis in his heart did not diminish, but it became stronger and stronger instead.

At this moment, Azgalor’s stature suddenly stagnated in the air. He seemed to be blocked by some intangible barrier. At this moment of delay, the figure of the woman in white already appeared behind him.

Somewhere in the palace below, Chen Rui, Paglio, Krobelus, and Roman were watching the 2 figures in the sky.

“It has begun,” said Chen Rui. He was the one who activated the magic enchantment that had been set a long time ago to block Azgalor. This created the best opportunity for Isis.

Azgalor reacted very quickly. A blood-red lightning appeared on his body, making a buzzing sound. When he suddenly turned around, a huge dark yellow stone flower flew toward the woman. It was the single powerful earth magic, “Death Stone Flower”. However, when the woman raised one of her hands lightly, the stone flower disappeared without a trace, just like a snowball facing a fire, before it could explode.

“[Element Weakening]!” Azgalor immediately recognized the bloodline talent skill of the Lust Royal Family. [Element Weakening] was the nemesis of all magic powers.

The woman didn’t speak, and she pushed her palm toward the air. Her seemingly gentle movements actually drove a tide-like force. This power was beyond Azgalor’s expectation. He blocked with his bloody lightning power hand, but he actually couldn’t resist the vast power. His body involuntarily flew backward. It was unknown whether this woman was intentional, this power actually cracked the barrier.

Although it was only a swift close combat, Azgalor had already judged that the opponent’s power was slightly above him. Besides, there must be other ambushes here. He could not deal with it, so he immediately took advantage of the opponent’s great strength to fly back with all his strength.

The 2 figures moved extremely fast. They instantly turned into 2 small black dots which were almost not visible under the moonlight.

“It seems she doesn’t want us to see the battle,” Roman interjected.

“How can I miss this battle of powerhouses?” As soon as Krobelus had just finished speaking, she had disappeared with Paglio.

“Wait for me!” Seeing that Chen Rui had also disappeared, Roman hurriedly called out and activated the [Flash] talent with all his strength to chase after the direction where the black shadows disappeared in the air.

Chen Rui used the power of Stridebug and Thunderous Sound to dash for a distance. After a while, he left the Dark Moon City and chased all the way to the north. He saw strange flames and explosion sounds in the distant air. “Isis” had caught up with Azgalor, and they were fighting fiercely.

The horror in Azgalor’s heart at this time had reached its maximum. Previously, he thought that the strength of this lady from Asmodeus Royal Family was only slightly higher than him. With his rich combat experience, the outcome of an individual battle was still unknown. Now that they really fought against each other, he knew that the strength of the opponent was far above his expectation. If he didn’t go all out on his power, perhaps he would be in a great danger!

Azgalor yelled and launched his territory power. Isis felt that her vision changed. The sky was full of flying demonic flies like a gray screen covering the sky. Even the color of the 2 purple moons had faded.

When Isis punched in the air toward Azgalor, Azgalor’s body suddenly split. His body also turned into countless demonic flies. They flew toward her overwhelmingly, instantly surrounding Isis.

Isis waved her hand, and a circle of light flew toward the demonic flies. The demonic flies were dispersed around by the light. However, they seemed to have a powerful devouring force as they swallowed the light in the blink of an eye. Isis frowned slightly. She opened her palms, and nearly thousands of demonic flies were frozen in the air. When she abruptly shook her bare hands, the frozen demonic flies exploded and turned into powder.

However, the demonic flies that turned into powder did not actually die, but they scattered to become more demonic flies instead. They seemed to be immortal, and they could also swallow energy endlessly with almost no flaws.

The woman snorted coldly, and the dense demonic flies nearby suddenly ignited inexplicably. The flame was black. It was filled with an extremely powerful vitality.

However, this kind of vitality was the most terrifying poison for the demonic flies that could devour everything. The demonic flies in the flames made an eerie “sizzling” sound. They actually turned into ashes which dissipated. They could no longer regroup into the form of a demonic fly.

The scattered ashes reintegrated into Azgalor’s figure, but his complexion was extremely pale. He was obviously severely injured. He gritted his teeth and waved his hand. The remaining tens of thousands of demonic flies turned into red rays and charged toward Isis from all directions. Suddenly, there were continuous explosion sounds.

The successive explosion sounds gradually subsided. The graceful figure in the sky was still floating in the air, but there were extra 4 golden figures around her .

Azgalor did not hesitate to use up his aura just now to burst his territory, but it was completely blocked by these 4 golden figures, and the woman in white was unscathed.

Azgalor’s heart trembled as if he had seen the most terrifying thing.

Gold class [War Puppet]! 4 of them! Also… they are very familiar. Last time, he also fought with these 4 golden puppets in the Crystal Valley. With 1 against 4, he was at absolute disadvantage, but he managed to escape from the hands of these 4 puppets after fighting desperately.

Azgalor’s heart trembled, and he had goosebumps— It is actually her! The woman I feared most! It’s true that what you fear most will manifest!
