It turns out that the one who secretly controlls the Dark Moon is actually the Dark Shadow Empire! Azgalor reminiscened the scene where a certain graceful woman fought against 3 enemies long ago. Even if he was determined, fear was inevitable. I can’t even beat these 4 puppets, let alone the most terrifying woman in the Demon Realm! Only now he regretted that instead of escaping from the Dark Moon quickly, he took the initiative to go to the palace.

Just when Azgalor’s fighting spirit was greatly reduced and he wanted to flee desperately, the scene changed suddenly. It had become an ocean of black flames, and the 4 golden figures had surrounded him.

Chen Rui and others in the distance saw that the gray screen in the sky suddenly turned into a sea of black flames. There was faint distortion and turbulence in it. After a while, the sea of flames disappeared without a trace. They only ambiguously saw a graceful figure standing in the air. A strong body was floating in front of her. He seemed to have completely lost the ability to resist.

Behind the veil, the woman’s star-like eyes glanced lightly at the direction of the crowd watching the battle, then she instantly disappeared with the captive man.

He even planned to be on top of the Bloodfall 🤣. Couldn’t even defeat his nemesis on the second encounter 🥱

chapters.title: Chapter 401: The Two Young Ladies Visiting The Dark Moon
chapters.body:
Chapter 401: The Two Young Ladies Visiting The Dark Moon

Although everyone couldn’t see the specific scene of the fight between “Isis” and Azgalor in the territory, they could still feel the overwhelming and terrifying power even when they were watching the battle from a distance.

Krobelus was the strongest among the 4 people who watched the battle. When comparing it with themselves, Krobelus was also the most shocked. The power of these 2 people is amazing. I am not even an opponent of the defeated Azgalor, not to mention the power of that woman. However, as long as my Paglio recovers, he will definitely defeat her! Paglio would be ashamed if he knew Little Betty’s thoughts. Although his strength was sealed at the peak stage of Demon Emperor, his vision was the highest among the 4 spectators. Azgalor’s methods were strange, but the poison dragon was confident in defeating Azgalor as long as his strength was restored. However, the woman’s power was too shockingly amazing. He might not be able to match her strength even if he was in his optimal state. Perhaps he needed to use the most poisonous talent in order to barely contend with her.

There is actually such a strong woman in the Demon Realm! Although Paglio vaguely knew that Chen Rui had a woman from the Asmodeus Royal Family who had the Nirvana power, he did not relate it to this powerful woman at all.

Even Athena and Kia didn’t know that the Dark Shadow Royal Lady who had an affair with Chen Rui was the first sage and the first beauty of the Demon Realm, Catherine.

Master Poison Dragon suffered a setback of confidence, and his eagerness to dispel his seal became stronger. He was the first to drink the black potion. As long as I can regain my strength, my power will surely increase! As for Master Roman’s mind- The strength of these 2 peak stage Demon Overlords is not what I can reach for. Regardless of Paglio, his wife or the leader, although their strength is much greater than me, aren’t they just an insignificant spectator like me too now? Chen Rui once saw Christina’s [Black Phoenix Territory] in the Crystal Valley, so he was now 100% sure of the identity of that “Isis”. It is her. Did she recognize me? I do not know. So what if she does recognize me?

I do not know either.

Maybe both sides had a lot of words in their hearts, but they were just in their hearts.

Under the same moonlight, even if they saw each other, they would just pass by each other.

“Let’s go.”

When Krobelus said so, the 4 figures disappeared into the night like a light smoke.

On the second day, the Dark Moon still had a bustling and lively scene as always. No one knew that last night, 2 peak stage Demon Overlords fought fiercely in the northern suburbs.

After taking down Azgalor, Liliz and Shea formally confirmed a series of cooperation terms including Chen Rui’s assistance in the planning of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. Liliz left the Dark Moon City with a gift from Shea.

As for “Isis”, Liliz said that she had returned to the Dark Shadow Empire urgently last night due to the need to report to the empress.

“Isis” should have captured Azgalor. With such a leader in the hands of the Dark Shadow Empire, Bloodfall would definitely suffer a considerable blow.

As long as General Crawford of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate officially visited the Dark Moon, then Bloodfall and Fallen Angel Capital would definitely “understand” that the supporting force behind the Dark Moon was the powerful Dark Shadow Empire. Even if they wanted to retaliate, they would have to think twice. This way, the Dark Moon could successfully take advantage of this opportunity in order to get valuable time for development and growth.

It was impossible that “Isis” did not understand this, but there were many barren lands in the Dark Shadow Empire. The improved technology of the Dark Moon alone could turn waste into treasure and greatly increase the overall empire strength. Both sides could get what they needed.

Kia’s mood was a bit depressed. In any case, Azgalor was her father after all. She felt more sad about her late mother, Freya, but she finally recovered with Chen Rui’s consoling words.

Azgalor’s matter temporarily came to an end, and the auction date was approaching. Although more and more people poured into the Dark Moon, everything was proceeding in an orderly manner with the efforts of Shea, Chen Rui and others.

On this day, 2 eye-catching figures suddenly appeared on the streets of the Dark Moon.

They were 2 women.

A woman seemed to come from the Dark Shadow Empire. She had a veil on her face, and her body was tightly wrapped in a loose and long robe. Her graceful figure could only be seen when she was walking.

There were so few things that were attractive about the woman with veil. She could only serve as a contrast to the eye-catching beauty next to her.

This young woman had a very beautiful appearance in an elegant long dress. She had a curvy, perfect and slender figure. Her long lavender hair was carefully placed behind her head. 2 strands of slightly curly hair hung down from her temples. She did not wear any jewelry, but she wore a pair of exquisite glasses which showed her unique beauty.

If Chen Rui, who was busy in the financial officer office, saw this beautiful woman with purple hair and glasses appearing in the Dark Moon, he would surely be extremely stunned.

Almost every demon, including women, passing by would look sideways at the purple-haired woman. Of course, the female gazes were more of envy and jealousy.

The beauty in glasses didn’t bother about the gaze of others. She only talked to the veiled girl beside her. These 2 people seemed to be extraordinary. Sometimes, ignorant people would flirt or harass them. The veiled girl just waved gently, and these guys were either thrown several tens of meters in the sky or passed out of electrocution.

Seeing this, many lustful guys put away their guts. They just watched them from a distance.

“Yini, how about this skirt?” The beautiful woman in glasses asked the veiled woman while holding a skirt.

Yini shook her head slightly, “The color is not nice. I think Sister Zola should mainly use plain colors. It can be matched with some floral prints. En … In terms of jewelry, you don’t need too much, a necklace is enough.”

“Okay, I’ll listen to you.” Zola followed her advice and nodded.

It was less than a month since Chen Rui left the Rainbow Valley last time. Ms. Zola should be waiting for Chen Rui in the Rainbow Valley initially, plus she had already collected all the stone slabs, so she should spend a lot of time and energy to research them.

For some reasons, Ms. Fairy Dragon was unable to calm down and devote herself to research. Even if gathering the stone slabs was her biggest, long-cherished wish, she kept feeling like something was missing.

Is the experiment subject missing? Is the chef missing? Is the assistant missing? Or… the man is missing?

Maybe all of the above, or maybe just the last one… Damn man, what kind of magic spell did you cast on me? I’m just thinking of that guy all day long! Even if he said that he would come back in at least a month, but as the impulse to see him immediately became stronger, Ms. Fairy Dragon, who had always been patient, couldn’t hold back anymore. She finally left the Rainbow Valley.

The 6-yuan tracking rune on this guy had disappeared automatically, but Ms. Fairy Dragon had her own way. When that guy came back previously, he was anxious to leave, until that… embarrassing thing happened. He seemed to have gone to Fallen Angel Capital last time… Ms. Fairy Dragon came to the bar where someone was “caught” last time. She hypnotized the succubus with magic, and asked her about the Dark Moon’s war of lords that day. When Zola recalled that someone had said that his woman was in a huge danger, she suddenly understood a little.

At this time, the war of lords had ended. The Dark Moon won unexpectedly. By right, that man should be back soon, but Ms. Fairy Dragon couldn’t wait for so long.

Moreover, Ms. Zola still had a strong desire in her heart which was to meet the woman of that guy. What kind of beauty is she, so much so that he disregards my charm and desperately rushes back? On the way, Zola met Ms. Yini by chance. Although Ms. Yini was not very powerful (in Zola’s opinion), she was a great expert that Zola admired in terms of clothing, hairstyle, dressing skills, and so on.

Ms. Yini did not want to show her true face, but Zola liked her demeanour and personality. When she heard that Zola was going to the Dark Moon, she offered to go with Zola.

Along the way, Ms. Yini gave Zola a lot of tips on women’s dressing and daily life, including how to attract men. Ms. Zola had actually never heard of some of them for thousands of years. She was benefited a lot, and she was surprised at the same time. The knowledge between men and women is actually so profound? Before having an intimate relationship with that man, Ms. Zola didn’t really care about this aspect, but it was different now- I no longer want to pretend to be an ugly woman anymore. I want to appear in my most beautiful posture in front of him and his woman! Ms. Yini came to the Dark Moon to search the whereabouts of a certain friend. This friend was initially the capital envoy who should conquer the Dark Moon, but she unexpectedly took refuge in the Dark Moon in the war of lords. Based on Yini’s knowledge of that friend, she wouldn’t switch sides so easily. She was probably under some kind of control, so she wanted to find out and help her if possible.

At first, Ms. Yini was purely displeased at the short-eyed rascals who secretly followed the glasses lady and sent them away. However, as the 2 of them became acquainted, Ms. Zola casually pointed out that she needed improvement in some areas of the wind magic, and every one of them was on point. Ms. Yini was truly shocked. It turns out that I am the one who “does not have a good vision”. This beautiful Ms. Zola is actually unfathomable. Even I have to look up to her. Coincidentally, Ms. Zola actually also wanted to go to the Dark Moon. She also faintly revealed that she was looking for a man. Ms. Yini suddenly became concerned. My only friend, Betty, seems to be captured and controlled by the Dark Moon. If this is the case with Betty’s strength, then my early stage of Demon Emperor power alone is even more ineffective. If I can use this Ms. Zola’s powerful strength, she may be the most critical factor to rescue Betty. Therefore, the 2 young ladies walked together all the way to the Dark Moon. After strolling leisurely for a while, they found a relatively quiet hotel to stay in.

“Sister Zola, I have to leave for a while for an urgent matter. I may come back at night” Yini was not in the mood to stroll around. She wanted to find out the whereabouts of her close friend, Betty, as soon as possible. “By the way, there is a famous Princess Retail Store in the Dark Moon. There are a lot of high-quality clothes. If Sister Zola can’t wait for me to come back, you can go there and choose a few clothes by yourself.”

“Go ahead.” Zola nodded. Although she got along well with Yini, it was just a coincident meeting after all, so she wouldn’t reveal much. Ms. Fairy Dragon was also planning to find out the whereabouts of a guy named “Richard”.

Right, I’ll go to the Princess Retail Store to buy some fine clothes first, dress up beautifully, and then find that guy and blind his eyes! “ Achoo !” In the financial officer’s office, someone sneezed out of the blue. He looked at the dense clouds outside the window. It seemed like a wind was about to blow.

Wait… the author didn’t seem to explain how glasses appeared in the Demon Realm 🧐🧐🧐

chapters.title: Chapter 402: The Fight In Princess Retail Store! Enemies Of Millennia Met
chapters.body:
Chapter 402: The Fight In Princess Retail Store! Enemies Of Millennia Met

After Yini left, Ms. Zola walked out of the room upon taking some rest. She came to the counter downstairs, and she asked the waiter, “Do you know how to get to the Princess Retail Store?”

The waiter looked at Zola blankly. He was stunned by her beauty for a while that he was unable to speak. Zola frowned and asked him again.

At this time, a few people walked in, and they happened to hear these words. The leader laughed out, “This lady is going to the Princess Retail Store? It’s just right that I’m on my way to there. I can take you there.”

Zola looked back, and she saw a sharp-looking and thin Great Demon male with triangular eyes which were brawdy.

When the man saw Zola’s face, his eyes lit up suddenly. He said to the imp on the side, “She is really a gem! I will reward you this time when we return!”

“Thank you, young master!” The imp hurriedly thanked him with a flattering smile. They must be following her all the way here.

The man bowed to Zola, “Dear Demon God, it’s the first time that I, Brue. Roco, have met a beautiful lady like miss. The beauty of the lady is really beyond words. Even the double moon in the sky looks dull…”

Hearing these words, Zola only felt like he was a buzzing fly. She felt disgusted in her heart. Of course, if it was that guy, the effect would be completely opposite.

“Do you know how to get to the Princess Retail Store?” Zola interrupted the compliment from Brue. Roco impatiently.

“Of course! Miss is from another town right? I can take miss there.” Brue’s eyes rolled around. The imp said that this beauty initially came with a veiled female guard. The guard seems to be away, just nice… However, having said that, even if the female guard is here, I will still do what I want to do. This is the Dark Moon! Although the Roco Family is not a giant like the Saiful Family, we were the first to surrender to Princess Royal after Joseph was defeated. Our credit is quite large. Even if there is any trouble, Princess Royal will also save us some face! “Okay.” The beautiful lady responded dazedly as if she was not experienced in the society, and she couldn’t see the intent of this wretched and thin man.

Both Brue and his father loved beauties. In fact, the entire Roco family’s misdeeds were well-known in the Dark Moon. When Joseph took control of the Dark Moon, more than 100 innocent women were harmed by Brue; some of them ended up tragically. After Joseph collapsed, Brue was forced to hold it in, but he was gradually reverting to his old ways now. Particularly after seeing Zola’s stunning beauty, it was naturally difficult for him to suppress. However, he didn’t know how dangerous such a stunning and seemingly dazed woman was.

The waiter, who recollected his mind, wanted to say something, but Brue’s triangular eyes stared at him, so he suddenly dared not speak and lowered his head.

Just like that, the beautiful lady wearing glasses followed the wretched thin man with triangular eyes out of the hotel. She even walked all the way to a remote alley without noticing the great danger approaching.

To be precise, it was the thin wretched man with triangular eyes who was unaware of the danger.

After a while, the beautiful young lady walked out of the remote alley, shook her head, and muttered, “This place is really troublesome. Even asking for directions requires magic.”

In the Princess Retail Store head office, the little loli, Alice, was daydreaming.

As the top brand store of the Dark Moon, the current Princess Retail Store had undergone further expansion and refurbishment. Many capable shop assistants were added. As the auction approached, more and more people came to the Dark Moon. The guests of the Princess Retail Store surged and the business was unprecedentedly bustling. By right, Alice should be very busy, but the little loli was daydreaming.

Although the present income was completely different from when the Princess Retail Store was first founded, and the daily income was more than the previous monthly income, the little loli couldn’t seem to find the original excitement by just looking at the rise in numbers that represented money.

The most important thing was that the human brother rarely came here anymore. In fact, the little loli understood that he had now become the highest officer in charge of the economics and finances of the estate. Especially during this period, he was almost too busy, but the little loli wanted to see him. She liked to daydream when she couldn’t see him.

Young ladies’ feelings were always poetry.

In fact, her heart had always been full of illusions about the future, and she had always looked forward to the appearance of someone who would love her.

Now that person had really appeared, of course she hoped his eyes would be on her every time he came, and she hoped he could always be by her side.

Kia noticed Alice’s looks, and the maid succubus suddenly understood a lot in her heart. The little princess has really grown up. Kia was actually very clear of the person that the little princess was thinking about. Athena mentioned it to her more than once.

However, even if she considered Alice to be one of her most important friends, the succubus maid did not want to further share her beloved man. Even Athena, who intends to matchmake them, must have this feeling in her heart, right? Therefore, the little maid did not mention someone’s affairs to the little princess very strategically, but Kia didn’t want to see her depressed daydreaming look all day. This time, she purposely went back to her house to get the little loli’s favorite strawberry pudding.

The little loli was still daydreaming—— (I really envy Athena and Kia. Even if they don’t have the time to see him during the day, they can accompany him every night. By the way, what will they do at night?) (The book seems to say… that it is very… embarrassing…) (But Kia seems to be getting more and more beautiful, and her breasts are more… Is it because… at night?) (Previously, I actually saw him and my sister walking out of the inner courtyard side by side in the palace late at night. They looked a bit close. Why did I feel so uncomfortable in my heart?)

(Sigh, why I have to wait 3 years…) (Sigh, I really want to grow up quickly…) (Sigh, I really want my chest to be bigger…) (Sigh……) At this time, a figure in a pale red dress appeared in front of the little loli, and a pleasant voice sounded.

“Excuse me, are you the owner of Princess Retail Store?”

This question brought the little loli back to reality from her illusion. After seeing the figure asking the question in front of her clearly, her eyes suddenly lit up, “ Wow , sister is so beautiful!”

Indeed, the beauty of this stunner with glasses was almost the same as that of her sister- In fact, strictly speaking, Zola’s beauty and temperament were comparable to Catherine. Shea’s unique temperament was not inferior to Zola, but her appearance was still slightly inferior. However, in the little loli’s heart, her sister was the most beautiful.

Being able to get an evaluation of “almost” similar to that of her sister was already the greatest affirmation of Zola.

This kind of heartfelt admiration sounded very pleasurable to Zola. It was much better than the previous guy called Brue. At the same time, the fairy dragon was also surprised at the age of the little loli. The Dark Moon’s most famous and most upscale boutique is actually managed by such a young little girl. The little loli’s gaze fell on the proud upper circumference of Zola’s chest. The admiration in her purple eyes was stronger, “Yes, my name is Alice. Sister should be from a foreign city? Do you want to buy anything?”

Zola pointed to a high-hanging white and blue floral dress in the VIP area, “Why can’t that dress be sold to me?”

The little loli looked in the direction where Zola was pointing. She vaguely remembered that it was a new outfit designed by Kia for her friend.

Kia had a special talent in costume design. She designed many popular costumes. Although they were expensive, each time they were launched, the upper-class nobles would scramble for it. They were gems that were sold in limited volume.

“That one has been booked by a guest, but I think sister is so beautiful that everything you wear is very beautiful.” Although the little loli was absent-minded during this period, she still had the eloquence that she cultivated over such a long time. “That is a masterpiece from our Princess Retail Store’s ace designer, Kia. However, the most suitable dress should be tailor-made according to one’s own characteristics to show the most beautiful side. Kia just went out to help me get some things. Can sister wait for a while? When she comes back, I will let her design the most suitable and beautiful dress for you.”

Zola felt comfortable listening to her, so she nodded. It is worthy of being the most famous boutique. The service and demeanour are quite good. It is much better than the one at the Fallen Angel Capital last time. Alice’s cute appearance was quite lethal, plus the slightly good impression just now, the fairy dragon’s gaze toward the little loli was more friendly. The little loli’s eyes turned, and she took advantage of the situation to be closer with Zola. However, it was not just because she wanted Zola to buy more products, her main purpose was to ask for some kind of “secret recipe.”

Some kind of secret recipe to become…the “big chest alien”.

Didn’t Brother Chen Rui say that “I can improve myself by accepting advice from others”? The formulas provided by Kia and Athena are not very useful. Maybe I will receive unexpected effects by asking this big-breasted sister for advice?

After beating around the bush to ask for Zola’s name, the little loli finally revealed her true intentions of “breast enhancement?” Ms. Fairy Dragon was stunned and seemed surprised. She recalled her memory, “There really is no secret recipe… It seems that since I learned magic, it has been so big…”

Magic? So magic still has this effect?

The little loli thought quickly, and her purple eyes brightened as if she had seen another path to becoming a **star, “What magic element did sister learn?”

Could it be… big breast magic? Zola thought for a while. I know too much magic, and many of my own compound magic has exceeded the ordinary 6 elements. She answered truthfully at that moment, “It seems that it’s not just 1 element… All in all, it’s very complicated.”

The little loli bit her lip and asked tentatively, “Sister Zola… Can you teach me magic?”

(I shall work hard this time to get bigger breasts.)

Zola was surprised. It is the first time someone offers to be my… experiment subject. Uh, no, apprentice? Facing the cute little loli, even if Zola couldn’t bear it, she shook her head and said, “Learning magic is too hard and too toilsome.”

“Alice is not afraid of hardship.” The little loli said firmly. Seeing Zola still shaking her head, she rolled her eyes, “If Sister Zola is willing, in addition to the reward for learning magic, I can make the decision to give you the floral dress that you chose just now, then ask Kia to help sister design new styles of clothes every month. Do you know the clothes designed by Kia are exquisite products that can make the Dark Moon crazy?”

Want to be an apprentice so desperately? Even giving away clothes for free? Plus someone to design customized clothes? If it weren’t for Alice’s innocent eyes, Ms. Fairy Dragon would have suspected some scheme. Just as the deal was about to be closed, a familiar female voice sounded, “Where’s Kia? By the way, give me the hanging floral dress. I pre-ordered this dress!”

Is it her? Zola narrowed her eyes and looked toward the source of the voice. No doubt, it was the green-haired woman in a silver-white dress with a green crystal in between her eyebrows. She also had a slender figure and beautiful features.

Zola had also met this green-haired woman in the Fallen Angel Capital. She seems to be called shredded radish [1] or something. The most hateful thing is that the skirt I fancy back then was actually snatched by this woman. Besides, that hateful man actually paid for this woman! Why did this hateful woman appear in the Dark Moon again?

Oh! Didn’t the man say he is coming here to save his beloved wife? Could it be…

An inexplicable anger rose in Zola’s heart, and she ignored the little loli’s “temptation.” She stood up and walked straight to the woman, “ Hey , you! I have already ordered this dress! The shop owner even personally agreed.”

“The hateful green-haired woman” was exactly the “controlled” Ms. Emerald Dragon whom Ms. Yini was looking for. She was taken aback when she heard someone interfered her rudely- Kia clearly designed this dress for me. How come it is ordered by someone else? This woman with glasses… is beautiful. I am even a little jealous of her, but she seems to have a strange feeling of familiarity? Where have I seen her before? As dragons, how could Krobelus allow her own things to be robbed by others. She sneered, “You! Why don’t you look at your face in the mirror! My friend clearly designed this for me. If you wear it, I’m afraid you are no better looking than a cow! How dare you snatch my things?”

“You are the cow! I haven’t snatched anything for a long time. I am definitely snatching it this time!”

“……” “…”

On the street outside the Princess Retail Store, a cow which was being led let out an innocent moo : Even being a cow provoked you? The little loli wanted to speak, but she was caught in the powerful aura of the 2 women, and she couldn’t interfere. The customers on the side were also a little dumbfounded as they stared blankly at the 2 beautiful women arguing. Many people began to whisper.

If those people knew that the 2 bickering ladies were Demon Overlord-level powerhouses, they would be frightened and flee. In case of any energy shock wave, the surrounding people would suffer.

At this moment, a carefree man’s voice sounded from downstairs, covering everyone’s whispers.

“Who dares to snatch things from my Little Betty?”

The sound of footsteps came upstairs step by step.

Zola turned her head and directly faced the person who had just walked upstairs.

In an instant, both their eyes seemed to be frozen.

In an instant, the entire Princess Retail Store felt a piercing chill.

[1] Similar pronunciation as Krobelus.

Hahahahaha , I can even imagine Paglio pissed in his pants 😂🤣…

chapters.title: Chapter 403: Zola'S “Misunderstanding”
chapters.body:
Chapter 403: Zola'S “Misunderstanding”

One extra chapter for today! Community Goal 1 Accomplished🎉🎉🎉

The terrifying murderous aura permeating the Princess Retail Store solidified almost everyone’s blood. Then, in the blink of an eye, the figure of the man who went upstairs disappeared, the beauty with glasses disappeared, and then, the green-haired beauty also disappeared.

The people in the store looked at each other. Kia, holding a small bag of pudding, rushed upstairs desperately. When she was approaching the Princess Retail Store just now, she instinctively felt the strong danger, but she couldn’t move due to the fear of the terrifying power.

After the power disappeared in an instant, the succubus rushed into the store. She was finally relieved when she saw that the little loli was safe and sound. After asking about the incident just now, she was shocked, “You mean that beautiful sister with glasses is called Zola? Did she exude the aura just now? And Paglio disappeared as soon as he saw her?”

The little loli nodded, and Kia’s relieved heart raced again. Although she did not know the true relationship between Zola and Chen Rui, she knew that Chen Rui was studying ancient runes in the Rainbow Valley, and she also knew some of the grievances between Zola and Paglio.

The fairy dragon is not the emerald dragon. She and Paglio are real enemies. More importantly, Paglio and Chen Rui have a symbiotic contract! As soon as Kia thought of this, her figure disappeared instantly. The little loli was stunned. Why is this move so popular today? Paglio had no other thoughts at this time. He didn’t have the time to be horrified or think of tricks. He only had 1 word- Run! He was very clear about Zola’s character, and she would not give him any opportunity to explain it. Furthermore, the matter back then was crystal clear. He wanted to dominate the silver box, so he abandoned their alliance and attacked Zola to snatch the silver box.

Even if he didn’t make a move, Zola might betray him too, but it was a fact that he made the move first.

The most important thing was that Master Poison Dragon couldn’t beat Zola. Let alone his current sealed state, even if he was at the strongest peak stage, he was not an opponent. He was not the crystal dragon Jacob who was naturally immune to magic. Besides, after so many years, with the madness of this madwoman, perhaps she had already overcome the innate defects and developed various methods to restrain Jacob.

For a madwoman, nothing was impossible.

There were only a few people who could stop Zola in the entire Demon Realm. These people might include the mysterious powerhouse who captured Azgalor a few days ago, but that woman had already left the Dark Moon.

Therefore, Master Poison Dragon had no choice but to escape. Once I fall into the hands of this madwoman, the consequences will be disastrous. It will even be difficult to die quickly! What’s worse is that even Little Betty will be implicated and become the experiment subject of this madwoman. Master Poison Dragon was unprecedentedly noble. He was not just escaping for his own sake! Although Paglio’s reaction was quick and his estimation was also very precise, his strength was the most critical weakness after all. Even back then, the poison dragon was not the opponent of the fairy dragon, let alone the state of being sealed now?

Paglio fled the city in a flash, and he went all the way west. He was planning to go to the Blue Lake to use the poisonous water as a cover to stop Zola’s pursuit. However, after he ran for a while, he slowly realized something amiss. Although the scenes on both sides were swiftly moving, not even a tree was changing. It turned out that he was actually disrupted by the strange space despite running for a long time. He kept spinning around in place and wasted a lot of effort.

“Run huh ?” Ms. Fairy Dragon’s voice sounded, “Keep running. If you run out of this space, I will let you go.”

Let go of your ass. I know your morality! The poison dragon cursed in his heart, but his face looked surprised, “Who are you? Have you recognized the wrong person!”

Ms. Fairy Dragon was not Ms. Emerald Dragon. She was not long-winded. She only asked in a daze, “What?”

Although it had been 2000 years, this familiar phrase still sent chills to the poison dragon. Back then, when the blue dragon, Ranieri, begged for mercy after all his tricks were ineffective, Ms. Fairy Dragon also asked this question with a seemingly dazed expression. As a result, Ranieri turned into a puddle of ashes in 10 seconds.

Paglio knew he was going to die, so he quickly added, “If you want the silver box, let me go!”

Speaking of the silver box, Zola’s eyes lit up, but there was more of a cold intent, “Compared to the silver box, I’m more interested in dissecting a poison dragon… Maybe during this experiment, someone will not be able to help himself but to tell me the whereabouts of the silver box?”

Dissect? Master Poison Dragon’s goosebumps were evident, “At most, I will explode myself now! You can’t get anything!”

“Really?” Ms. Zola smiled creepily. Her tone made Paglio’s back cold. “You can try. In this space, you can’t even pinch a demonic ant to death, let alone self-explode… By the way, your strength is regressing so fast. Wait… What am I feeling? These are ancient runes? I happen to have all the stone slabs and need to study these things… I now officially announce that you will be a very valuable long-term research topic.”

I can’t even die now. Hearing the vengeful voice of Ms. Fairy Dragon, Paglio’s pitiful heart completely sank- Wait, stone slab? “Do you know Chen Rui?! I’m his symbiotic contract partner…”

“Chen Rui? Don’t know! So you still have an accomplice. As long as I kill you, even your accomplice will die.” Ms. Fairy Dragon said coldly, shattering Paglio’s last hope.

It’s over! Even that cunning human will be killed this time. “Paglio! Where are you?”

The emerald dragon’s voice echoed in the air. The poison dragon really found his conscience this time. He didn’t answer, but Ms. Zola helped him speak, “He is here!”

Hearing this sound, Krobelus flew over in the blink of an eye, but when Zola merely pointed her hand, the emerald dragon felt that the surrounding elements fluctuated differently. Her body actually fell involuntarily in front of this “bad woman” who wanted to snatch her clothes and perhaps even her man.

“Is this your woman?” Zola asked Paglio.

Paglio knew that he couldn’t hide it, so he gritted his teeth and said, “This matter has nothing to do with her. Let her go, I will take you to find the silver box now.”

When Ms. Fairy Dragon heard that “the hateful woman with green hair” was the woman of this poison dragon, and she had nothing to do with “Richard”, Zola felt better inexplicably. Even her hatred for the poison dragon had faded a little bit. For the first time, she nodded, “Alright, for the sake of the silver box, I will spare her!”

Krobelus had already seen that the situation was wrong. This woman should not be a rival in love, but an enemy of Paglio, and Paglio was still controlled by her.

Adversity tests relationships. When Krobelus heard what the poison dragon just said, it moved Ms. Betty more than thousands of sweet talks. She immediately ignored the woman’s terrifying power and shouted. The sky lit up with green light, and she flew toward Zola with her killing move, [Toxic Tooth].

“Stubborn woman.” Zola snorted coldly. Krobelus felt that the [Toxic Tooth] in the sky was suddenly solidified by something, and it instantly turned into countless falling powders. The power of the water elements contained in it recoiled uncontrollably and wrapped her up instead. Her feet started to freeze, and she couldn’t move.

The emerald dragon, known for her toxicity and water element, was actually frozen by the opponent’s water elements!

No, this is not just water elements, but also the burning heat. This is a compound magic that actually combines the incompatible water and fire elements!

Powerful reversal of elements! Strange and terrifying compound magic! Precise magic control! Ms. Emerald Dragon was secretly shocked. She suddenly thought of one of the “enemies” she had misunderstood back then, and she blurted out, “Fairy Dragon Zola!”

It was not a misunderstanding this time. The enemy had really arrived.

“Nasty little emerald dragon,” Zola smiled, “You recognize me? But you should have forgotten that about 3 months ago, you snatched my clothes in the store of the Fallen Angel Capital! However, I have no interest in that poor funeral dress. You just put it on for this poison dragon’s funeral!”

Ms. Emerald Dragon was taken aback. 3 months ago? Such a distant hatred? By the way, the funeral dress… “You are that fat ugly woman?” Krobelus blurted out.

Zola smiled confidently, “ Hehe! I just don’t want to make you, cow, feel ashamed with my real beauty.”

Ms. Emerald Dragon said angrily, “You are the cow! The clothes were given to me by your husband, Simon, voluntarily!”

Paglio on the side was stunned. Zola actually has a husband? There is actually a man who wants this madwoman? That poor dragon named Simon is worth worshipping… At this moment, a distant voice came from afar, “Zola!”

Hearing this familiar voice, the 3 of them were shocked at the same time.

Both Paglio and Krobelus seemed nervous, while Ms. Fairy Dragon’s expression was even stranger. She was completely dazed. It was not fake daze, but really dazed.

The voice quickly moved from far to near. In the blink of an eye, a figure appeared before the 3 dragons.

The person who came was Chen Rui. After hearing the news from Kia, he rushed over in a hurry. After the five-star evolution, his spiritual link had the function of sensing the link object. Finally, he made it to the scene in time.

Although Chen Rui didn’t use Richard’s face, the fairy dragon recognized him immediately with strong telepathy. She had a lot to say in her heart initially, but she was speechless now. She was utterly surprised.

(You are finally here? Damn… man!) Chen Rui was relieved when he saw that Paglio and Krobelus were all right, and he said, “Zola! You let Paglio and Betty go first. There are many things that I want to discuss with you.”

( Hmph! Unromantic man. I travelled far to see you, and your first sentence is like this? Can’t you say something that makes me feel comfortable?)

Zola suddenly narrowed her eyes. Huh? How did he know this damn poison dragon? Chen Rui saw her pretending to not hear him, so he said sternly, “Zola, listen to me. Paglio is my best friend and my symbiotic contract partner. If you want to kill him, I will die too. Do you really want to kill me?”

“Symbiotic contract? So you are Chen Rui!” Zola was surprised. No wonder this man said that he has a lifespan of tens of thousands of years. It turns out to be like this… Hold on! Since he can become Paglio’s symbiotic contract partner, their relationship must be extraordinary, so he knew from the beginning… Zola still looked dazed, but countless thoughts turned in her mind. She shook suddenly, showing a more horrified expression.

“You said you left to save your most beloved person last time. Could it be… this guy?” Ms. Fairy Dragon’s trembling fingers crossed Ms. Emerald Dragon, and finally locked on Master Poison Dragon.

“Me?” Paglio pointed to his nose in disbelief. Beloved person? Krobelus was dumbfounded.

Chen Rui was dumbfounded.

This is just too absurd!

“I don’t have that kind of relationship with him! I only like chicks, not man!” Despite being in danger, Master Poison Dragon still clarified his innocence angrily.

“Do you think I will still believe you?” Zola directly slammed the Master Poison Dragon into the abyss of gay men. He opened his mouth, and he couldn’t say a word to counterattack.

What to do? Who asked him to have a previous criminal record?

“By the way, ancient runes! The runes on this guy feel so familiar!” Zola finally reacted and her gaze became furious. “It turns out that the real purpose of you coming to the Rainbow Valley is for the seal on this guy! For this guy, you actually… don’t hesitate to do that… that kind of thing!”

That kind of thing? What kind of thing is it? Is it because of that damn gay dead duck guy, I did not hesitate sacrifice my body to seduce a certain lady? Chen Rui found that he was completely unable to tease under Ms. Fairy Dragon’s creative thinking.

He knew that Ms. Fairy Dragon was in anger and misunderstanding, so he couldn’t explain it clearly in words for the time being. Therefore, the human stepped forward and hugged Zola’s petite body tightly while Master Poison Dragon and Ms. Emerald Dragon watched dumbfoundedly, then… he kissed her.

Paglio rubbed his eyes desperately, then he pinched his thigh fiercely. Am I seeing this right?! My dog eyes [1]… Uh, dragon eyes are blinded by the magic of the madwoman? Am I hallucinating? What made Paglio and Krobelus even more in disbelief was that Zola seemed to have lost her power of the peak stage of Demon Overlord. She struggled just like an ordinary woman, and she finally managed to move his face away. She blurted out a few words vaguely, “You liar…”

Before she finished speaking, her mouth was sealed again.

“Asshole… Mhmm …”

“…”

In the end, Ms. Fairy Dragon gave up her stubborn resistance. She hugged Chen Rui back, and the 2 kissed intimately.

The space magic around Paglio had been lifted long ago, but the poison dragon still seemed to be in a trance. His jaw was about to drop as he stood dumbfoundedly in place with Ms. Emerald Dragon. They even seemed to have forgotten to escape.

It turns out that Zola’s so-called husband is actually…

For the first time, Master Poison Dragon had an impulse to worship his symbiotic contract partner.

[1] Blinding dog eyes is the literal translation of a chinese phrase which means extreme shock.

Hahahahahhaahahhaha , I couldn’t help giggling while translating this ‘beloved person’😂…

chapters.title: Chapter 404: The Unwelcomed Ms. Zola
chapters.body:
Chapter 404: The Unwelcomed Ms. Zola

Location- The Dark Moon City, financial officer sheriff residence.

Characters- Chen Rui, Zola, Kia, Paglio, Krobelus, Roman, Delia. (Note: All were present)

Pet- Little black horse. (Note: Dodo’s whereabouts was unknown)

Plaintiff- Ms. Zola, the fairy dragon.

The defendant- Everyone. (Remarks: Athena, Kia, Roman, and Delia belonged to consecutive seats.)

The defendant’s representative, Chen Rui, had been stating, “This is what happened. Please forgive me, Zola. As the Dark Moon was in danger at that time, I was eager to leave, and I didn’t have time to explain these things to you. Time can change many things. The grievances back then have passed for 2000 years. We are all close friends now. Zola, for my sake, will you forgive Paglio?”

“Oh?” Krobelus was not familiar with Ms. Fairy Dragon. Seeing Zola’s answer, her face suddenly showed joy, while Chen Rui and Paglio’s faces were bitter. For this lady, this typical fake daze answer was not reliable at all.

“Zola, I have stored the silver box in the Fountain of Vitality. You can retrieve it anytime for research as you wish…” Seeing Ms. Fairy Dragon’s eyes light up, Chen Rui took advantage to add another sentence, “Dead duck dragon… Uh, Paglio is my most trusted partner. His strength is sealed by the ancient runes now. Can you help him lift it?”

Upon hearing the last sentence, Ms. Fairy Dragon didn’t seem to hear clearly, “What?”

“I mean, can you help Paglio lift the seal for my sake?”

“What?”

“Lift the seal…”

“What?”

“……” “…”

Chen Rui saw that this was not working well, so his tone changed, “Paglio and I are in a symbiotic contract relationship. He is too weak now. If he meets an old enemy like the crystal dragon Jacob again, he will definitely die. Then I will have to die as well. You really want to see this happen?”

Zola finally stopped her fake daze, and a faint sharp gaze flashed from behind her glasses and fell on the poison dragon. Paglio knew that he was guilty, so he bowed his head, not daring to look at her.

In fact, Chen Rui was also very guilty, mainly to Athena and Kia. I wanted to confess to them about Zola several times. However, due to bad opportunities, or perhaps my intention to delay matters, I never said it. It’s even worse now. The Fairy Dragon came personally, divulging our “affair” directly. “These 2 are your women?” Zola did not directly respond to Chen Rui’s request, but she turned her attention to Athena and Kia.

(They are really pretty indeed, especially the charming succubus, but in terms of beauty, they are still not as good as me) “This is Athena, this is Kia.” Chen Rui forced himself to introduce the 3 to each other, “This is Zola.”

A very unskillful introduction.

“You’re Kia?” Zola’s eyes lit up. The little maid was frightened. When she recalled Paglio describing the terrifying extent of a certain research madwoman, she couldn’t help but to shrink to Athena’s side. When Athena looked at Zola, she slightly frowned, but did not say anything.

Zola looked at Paglio, and then at Chen Rui’s expecting look. She finally became a self-appointed judge to make the final judgment, “Your place is not bad, so I decided to stay! Kia will be my dedicated costume designer from now on. Every day… Uh, design a dress for me every week; Athena will be my handyman… Uh, personal life assistant; then cow… emerald dragon will be my maid, then maybe I will put aside the hatred with that guy. However, the silver box and half of that bastard’s treasure must be handed over! If I am in a good mood, maybe I can research how to lift his seal.”

(Hehe! I use this method to subdue those 2 women and spare that damn poison dragon too. It is considered giving face to this man, right…) Everyone was a little dumbfounded when these words came out. This miss is really being overly close. She actually considers herself the ‘master’ here? The problem is that in terms of power, everyone here is not her opponent.

“ Hmph! ” Delia was actually the first to speak. She disregarded Roman’s wink and stood up suddenly without even looking at Zola, “I’m not feeling very well. I’ll go back and rest first.”

“Who is that? Wait!” Zola narrowed her eyes and scanned Delia for a while. “You seem to have some powerful curse or control power right? Although I can’t eliminate this control, I have a way to isolate it so that you are not affected.”

Zola’s eyesight was indeed amazing. She could see through Delia’s [Soul Shackles] at a glance, and she actually proposed a way to isolate it. Despite the power of the IIlusive Shield, Delia suffered from the [Soul Shackles] attacks every few days because the root problem was not solved. It was aggravating.

When Roman heard that Zola had a way, he was about to speak, but Delia glared back.

“No need.” Delia left a cold answer and turned around; Roman quickly followed her.

As Zola looked at Delia who was not looking back, she frowned slightly.

(Hmph! Ungrateful woman! I am being kind!) Paglio frowned, and he finally said, “I can give you the silver box and all my treasures. This sets off our grievances back then. As for the removal of the seal… Little Betty, you still have some injury on your body, let’s go treat it first.”

Krobelus wanted to say that there was nothing wrong with her. However, seeing Paglio’s solemn expression, she nodded without talking.

The poison dragon and his wife also left. Seeing the awkward situation, the little maid also left with Athena. Even the little black horse felt that the atmosphere was not right, so it went back to its nest to eat fruit.

Only Chen Rui and Zola remained in the entire yard.

Chen Rui looked at the empty yard, and the countless thoughts that had been turning in his mind suddenly turned into a sigh. Zola said indifferently, “It’s okay that these eyesores left. It seems much more peaceful.”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment. He shook his head and said, “The eyesores you mentioned include my most beloved women and my most trusted partner. By denying them, I also lost my most basic value.”

Zola bit her lip gently and didn’t say anything.

“Didn’t we agree that I will return to the Rainbow Valley in 1 month at the earliest? The time was too hasty last time, so I didn’t have the time to explain to you. I didn’t mean to lie to you, but I didn’t expect you to look for me now.”

“ Oh, ” responded Zola.

(Can’t you see it? I… I missed you, liar, so I came to look for you…)

“Due to that accident, the relationship between us progressed a bit too quickly… but I was very delighted afterwards,” Chen Rui suddenly took Zola’s hand, making Ms. Fairy Dragon’s heart racing again unconsciously. “I am surprised that you came to look for me, but I’m still very happy. During this time, although I’m very busy, I think of you from time to time, thinking about your face. It’s true.”

“ Oh. ” Zola still responded like this, but her fake daze’s pretense had almost been completely smashed by the joy that couldn’t be concealed in her eyes.

(It turns out that I am not the only one who feels this way.) (Hehe! I will officially forgive you for being a liar.) “Actually, whether you, Athena, Kia, or the 2 other women, you all are the most brilliant and perfect treasures. Having 1 is already the greatest blessing in my life. I can sacrifice my life to protect you all, but I don’t know what I should do now… It’s because of my greed and discontent. It is my fault, it is all my fault.” Chen Rui let out a long sigh. Even Zola could feel his burden and frustration.

“I just want to calm down now to think about our relationship… and our future, if there is a future between us.” Chen Rui gently let go of Zola’s hand and turned around. He slowly walked toward the door.

Zola’s heart froze inexplicably as she watched the man’s decadent figure walk out the door. Her mouth opened, but she didn’t say a word in the end.

In front of the window of the room, a pair of eyes were staring at everything. Seeing Chen Rui’s leaving back, those red eyes gradually closed, as if thinking about something.

Ms. Fairy Dragon’s high spirit before coming to the Dark Moon or her hatred when she saw her old enemy suddenly disappeared; her heart was empty. In a trance, she seemed to have lost the most important thing. She had somehow returned to the hotel from the unwelcoming courtyard.

Zola’s mood was very down. Even if her most important experiment failed, she had never been so depressed as if she had been infected by the man’s heavy mood.

(What did I do wrong?) After some time, there was a knock on the door, interrupting Zola’s thoughts.

(Is Yini back?) Zola opened the door, and the person at the door surprised her. It was actually the one she had appointed as… her personal life assistant, Athena.

“Ms. Zola, can I come in?”

“Oh.” Athena walked into the room, and Zola closed the door.

The 2 were speechless for a while, and the atmosphere was a bit strange.

(Are you here to show off to me?) (I am at the peak stage of Demon Overlord. Once I move my fingers, you little Great Demon King will be dead. Who’s afraid of you?) “Ms. Zola, I’m not a woman who is good at talking.” Athena broke the silence, “It’s just that as the woman of that man too, I have a few words in my heart that I want to tell you.”

“Oh.” “Chen Rui has the inheritance of the ancient grand master. In just over a year, he has leapt from being completely powerless to Demon Emperor-level power. It is only a matter of time before he becomes a Demon Overlord. Moreover, he has various powerful inheritances such as mechanics, black potions, and so on. His future and power are limitless.”

“Oh.” “Although I met Chen Rui earlier than you, I can’t compare to you when it comes to beauty. It is even more impossible to compare with you in terms of strength…”

“Then are you willing to give him up? I can give you…” Zola knew she said something wrong as soon as she said it, so she suddenly stopped the rest of the words.

“Impossible.” Athena shook her head resolutely, “It is impossible to separate me from him at any price. If there is a stronger person who uses death or benefit to force you to give up on him, would you agree to it?”

“Of course not!” Zola blurted out, then she understood and remained silent.

“Then if a woman suddenly appears now and wants to snatch him away, what would you do?”

“Damn it! I will never… agree!” Zola’s voice had become very low when she said ‘agree’.

Obviously, she was now the woman who snatched Athena’s man.

(You said you’re not good at talking!) (Am I … Am I really so detestable?) Unconsciously, Ms. Fairy Dragon lost her confidence.

Was Chen Rui acting it or it was his true feeling?

chapters.title: Chapter 406: Yini'S Decision! Saving Private Betty
chapters.body:
Chapter 406: Yini'S Decision! Saving Private Betty

Chen Rui didn’t know that his beloved Athena had incredibly solved his biggest concern of Zola. He was currently walking down the street in frustration.

It was really frustrating. When he was otaku previously, he always envied the protagonist in the novel with 3 to 4 wives or even a harem. However, when he really crossovered to this world where polygamy was allowed, and he had more than one beloved woman were allowed, he realized the gap between ideal and reality. These women were not merely dolls who would only meet his physical needs, but they were partners who were sincere soulmates.

Why does the protagonist in those novels have no worries about conflicts at home? Zola’s matter is just a trigger. Athena and Kia usually have a good relationship that is enough to make the henpecked husband, Roman, jealous, but even conflicts happen amongst closest friends. Once there is a conflict, I am naturally the only peacemaker between them. Furthermore, there is Shea and Zola now, and there may be another one in the future.

Zola is actually not wrong; I am the only one who is wrong. It is just that men are insatiable and greedy. I have disappointed them. That’s right, I’m just a normal otaku. How would I have the halo and domineering spirit of the protagonist in the novels?

But I really disappointed them; I am unworthy of any of them. As Chen Rui thought guiltily for a while, suddenly there was a bad omen in his heart. It turned out that he had already unknowingly walked to a secluded neighborhood, and a person behind him was approaching silently. He could feel this person’s power was quite extraordinary by just judging from the approaching skill.

Race: Sloth Royal Family (mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B+ (A-)

Physique: B+ (A-), Strength: B+ (A-), Spirit: B+ (A-), Agility: B+ (A-).

[Analysis]: Wind attributes.

Belphegor Royal Family? The early stage of the Demon Emperor? His speed has even reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor? This data seemed to be a bit familiar. At this moment, a familiar voice sounded, “Sir financial officer, I’m sorry. For the sake of my friend, I have to mistreat you temporarily.”

Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He did not resist the assaulting force. He was immediately unable to move due to the deterrence, then he was immediately taken to another place with a sudden rush.

In fact, this deliberately weakened force was simply nothing to his current strength. Obviously, the other party’s knowledge of him still stayed at the level of the “human sheriff”.

After a while, a woman wearing a veil and a robe appeared in front of him, “I will only ask you a few questions. If you answer truthfully, I will never hurt you. Don’t try to play tricks. You can’t afford the price. Do you need me to cut off one of your fingers as a proof to make you believe me?”

Chen Rui shook his head quickly. The familiar data and voice made him recognize this veiled woman, and he muttered in his heart: Cut your ass. Return me my resurrection potion first! But having said that, unless he had the determination to kill her, he must not expose “Charles” identity, so he could only act weak in front of this powerhouse.

“The first question, is Krobelus, the capital envoy of the previous war of lords, imprisoned in your house by a powerhouse?”

Chen Rui finally understood the true intention of the veiled lady “capturing” him, and he nodded in his heart. It seems that Ms. Betty is a true friend in her heart. Ms. Emerald Dragon’s sadness for her was not in vain. “Yes. However…”

However, Krobelus doesn’t seem to be “imprisoned” by a certain powerhouse in my house, but she “imprisons” a certain powerhouse in my house instead. Since the appearance of Ms. Emerald Dragon, Paglio has reduced a lot of time to hang out outside; he is often sighing. Ms. Yini directly ignored the “however” that the human wanted to say and asked, “What is the name of the powerhouse?”

Chen Rui answered honestly this time, “Paglio.”

Paglio! Isabella was shocked. As Ms. Betty’s best friend, she naturally knew the identity of Krobelus as a dragon. She also heard the name of Ms. Betty’s enemy before. There are definitely many named Paglio in the Demon Realm, but the one who can subdue Krobelus, I’m afraid that… The poison dragon! The peak stage of Demon Overlord! Poor Betty. She has not avenged her greatest grievance yet, and she actually fell into the hands of her enemy this time! Ms. Yini could already imagine how Ms. Betty was tortured by her enemy. With Ms. Betty’s beauty, I’m afraid she will suffer… In the robe, she clenched her fist tightly.

Isabella seemed to be given a new lease on life since the previous resurrection. She never wanted to return to her previous life no matter how luxurious and rich it was. She had only one wish left in her mind which was to kill her enemy, Broc, who escaped by chance last time. Perhaps, she also had a small supplementary wish which was to meet the “liar” again regardless of whether he had the so-called Snow Dallet.

Isabella’s initial intention to come to the Dark Moon was to find ways to rescue Krobelus, and then leverage her power to deal with Broc. When she heard Paglio’s name now, she was suddenly stunned. I didn’t expect that the person who captured Krobelus is actually such a terrifying enemy! In any case, since I have come here, I have to somehow try to rescue Betty! Isabella hesitated for a while, and finally said resolutely, “Since Krobelus is imprisoned in your house, you should be familiar with Paglio. Tell me everything honestly about the situation in the house as well as Paglio’s habits and characteristics now. I have a way to distinguish the truth from lies. If you dare to tell any lie, I will cut off one of your arms immediately!”

Soon after, the human financial officer walked out of the secluded neighborhood again while intimately holding the hand of a veiled woman wearing a robe.

No one knew that this human financial officer who looked the same as usual… Uh , at most, hooked up a new woman, was actually “coerced” by the “new hookup” woman.

The “new hookup” woman didn’t know that she was actually tricked by the “coerced” guy.

The reason why she went with the human was because the human confessed that there were various magic circles in his house which changed every once in a while; outsiders couldn’t enter. This was consistent with the intel that Isabella found out, so she wanted to use the human to sneak into the house. Then when the alcoholic Paglio got drunk, she would rescue the poor Ms. Betty.

Therefore, in the midst of the jealous eyes of the demons along the way, the human financial officer and the mysterious beauty walked toward the financial officers and sheriff’s residence affectionately.

On the other hand, Athena had returned to the house with Ms. Fairy Dragon after resolving the Roco Family issue.

With Athena’s efforts to mediate, Delia finally shook hands with Zola to make peace. She accepted the 7 yuan runes necklace and successfully isolated the [Soul Shackles]. Although Delia still looked a little cold, there was a touch of warmth in her gaze toward Zola; not to mention Roman. She had solved their biggest problem.

The sensitive Ms. Fairy Dragon could naturally sense this, so she felt even more proud.

Ms. Zola was still unfriendly toward her old enemy, Paglio, but her attitude toward Ms. Cow had changed. The main factor was that Ms. Betty was not Chen Rui’s woman, and she had shown admirable courage in protecting her man.

At this moment, there was a sudden flash of light on Delia’s bracelet. This was a special communication bracelet which was a special facility organized by the Dark Demon. She looked at the message received and couldn’t help showing the look of anger.

That flirty leader actually hooked up with a new woman at this time! The announcement of this news caused a sudden commotion in the yard. The gloating and jealous nephew was also shouting the slogan of knocking down his sir uncle.

Soon after, Ms. Yini, who was holding the human financial officer, finally sneaked into this house full of magic circles.

To be precise, she “sneaked in” openly from the front door because this damn house didn’t even have a back door. However, there was no guard at the door, so it could barely be considered a successful sneak into the enemy’s house.

Ms. Yini carefully took the hostage into the house. Under the lead of the hostage, she came to “the most frequented place of Ms. Krobelus”.

No doubt, they saw a group of people in that wide courtyard from a distance.

Ms. Yini, who was holding her breath, saw her best friend, Betty, at a glance. However, to her surprise, Betty was holding the guy described as Paglio intimately. This guy seems to be talking about something and is scolded by Betty. He actually lowers his head dejectedly, not daring to make a sound. Does this look like being “held” by the enemy? It seems to be the other way round, right? The back of the other man looked familiar, and the beautiful woman with glasses beside Athena… is actually Zola! That’s right, Zola! Paglio! There were too many people with the same name in the Demon Realm. Isabella didn’t think too much initially, but now when these names were connected together, she suddenly understood. It turns out that Krobelus is actually held by another enemy- the even more terrifying fairy dragon, Zola! In fact, Paglio just said in a low voice that Chen Rui shouldn’t be like this, but he attracted a siege by the female group headed by Ms. Emerald Dragon and Ms. Fairy Dragon. As for Roman, who had become the Envy Royal Family, was naturally firmly standing on Delia’s side.

The poor poison dragon was used to worsening the situation. Today, his dragon eyes were blinded. It was rare that he found his conscience and spoke up for his flirty symbiotic contract partner (Master Poison Dragon really thought so now), but he actually was reprimanded by everyone.

In terms of power, he was weaker; In terms of numbers, he was at an absolute disadvantage. Master Paglio really hit a nerve this time.

At this moment, Zola glanced in this direction. A cold light flashed past Zola’s lens, and Isabella immediately felt her mind moving. When she was sober, she had appeared in front of everyone with Chen Rui involuntarily.

“[Space Compression]!” Although Isabella travelled with Zola, and she knew that Zola’s strength was unfathomable, she did not expect Zola to reach such a level that she could actually easily launch the lost space magic with a simple gesture.

Once Zola noticed the existence of Chen Rui and Ms. Yini, she immediately cast magic to catch the pair of “adulterer and adulteress” in front of everyone, but she was stunned, “Yini?”

As soon as she uttered this sentence, Ms. Emerald Dragon, the leader of the crusade group, was also taken aback. Krobelus looked at her a few times and said emotionally, “Yini?”

Isabella saw that the situation was different long ago, so she simply pulled off the veil. The expression on Krobelus’ face quickly changed from shocked to surprise. She hugged Isabella and yelled happily.

As Chen Rui’s gaze fell on Athena and Zola who were holding hands closely, he was dumbfounded, but his eyes lit up- It turns out that I have the protagonist’s halo too. Is my domineering spirit taking effect? Roman, who was at the side, was also stunned. He blurted out, “Aunt… aunty?”

Dear Demon God! It’s really aunty. That… asshole leader, does he really want me, Master Roman, to call him as uncle? Seeing this unscrupulous nephew, Isabella was also stunned, “Why are you here?”

“What the hell is going on?” Delia, who was also stunned, couldn’t help but to ask.

Chen Rui shrugged innocently, “It’s nothing. It’s just that… everyone is here.”

It’s nothing 🤷♂️. It’s just another woman I got 😘…

chapters.title: Chapter 405: The Incredible Athena
chapters.body:
Chapter 405: The Incredible Athena

Athena noticed Zola’s reaction, and she lamented, “Although he is often cunning and annoying, he is a very persistent, sincere and foolish man. He can sacrifice his life for the women he loves. Similarly, I can also face death without hesitation for him just like when we were facing a Demon Overlord powerhouse in the underground world of Mountain Xilang when we were just Higher Demon. Ms. Zola, if there is danger, are you willing to sacrifice your life for him?”

“I guess… I would?” Zola was a little lacking in confidence. She reminiscenced the scene of Chen Rui giving up his life to save her in the Demi-God space. Yes, this man can indeed sacrifice for me, but can I do the same for him? Actually… I don’t know. That incident had accelerated the relationship between the two of them by folds out of thin air. Zola was still slowly adapting and feeling now.

Although she didn’t know what exactly happened in Mountain Xilang at the time, her instinct told her that what Athena said was true.

The love that faced life and death together was not a legend or a story in her memory, but real life in front of her.

Zola was suddenly depressed. She had to admit that apart from appearance and power, she was far inferior to Athena in this most important aspect.

(I… Even if I have the strongest power, I still lose to this woman.) (I am so envious. I really want to have this kind of love too…) “Understood.” Zola put aside her arrogance for the first time. She was never like that even in front of Chen Rui. “I will leave this place and leave him.”

Speaking of this, Ms. Zola’s heart began to ache, and it was very painful.

(Never see that man again.)

(I feel very depressed and sad.) (Why did things turn out like this?)

(Now I just want to find a secluded place to cry my heart out, or unleash all my magic power.) (After that… I don’t know what to do…) “Ms. Zola, you misunderstood what I meant.” Athena gently held Zola’s hand. At this moment, she seemed to have forgotten to activate the defensive magic force. “Answer me first, do you like him?”

Ms. Zola nodded without thinking.

“Then do you love him?”

After a little hesitation, Ms. Zola still nodded. (Perhaps…) In her consciousness, many imprints in her memories overlap. The hazy feeling; the strong desire to see him. Maybe most of them were just liking; maybe some of them were more than just liking.

“Before I really loved someone, I didn’t know anything too. I only knew that everything revolved around me. As long as I’m happy, then it’s fine. So I understand some of your… feelings.”

(Yes, I am like this. What’s wrong with this?) Athena seemed to be reminiscing, “However, after I met him, I realized that love is mutual. What we need is mutual understanding, tolerance, change and dedication. Such love is true happiness. If it is self-centered, letting the other party constantly accommodate and give, then there will be more and more contradictions. In the end, it is just mutual harming. Perhaps if you really understand this, you will slowly start to shift from that pure passionate impulse to a true eternity of staying together. I have gone through many detours and conflicts with him, but I’m fortunate to be able to walk hand in hand with him until today. If possible, I hope we can continue to walk with him. Is that alright, Ms. Zola?”

Zola looked at Athena’s sincere eyes in surprise. She felt that the hands holding her was so warm, and it was the first time she had experienced this warmth in her nearly 10,000 years of life.

“Athena… thank you.” Ms. Zola felt her mood skyrocketed, and her life became full of hope and brilliance again. For the first time in her life, she thanked someone so sincerely.

“Actually, I’m also very jealous of you. I’m very angry that he never told me about you…” Athena shook her head, “I just want to continue to accompany him to live happily until the end of life. Unlike the long lifespan of Ms. Zola, the lifespan of ordinary demons is only a few hundred years. If one day… my life comes to an end, please take care of him for me, okay?”

Zola’s heart was touched again, and her eyes were a little red. She squeezed Athena’s hand back.

“Ms. Zola…”

“Call me Zola.” This sentence from Ms. Fairy Dragon truly represented her acceptance of Athena, instead of the so-called life assistant. “I want to say to you that I’m sorry…”

“This seems to be the first time I apologize to someone, and… a lot of special feelings of ‘first time’. It’s hard to believe that we only met for the first time. Athena, you are such an incredible… friend. Yes, that’s right, friend.”

The warmth from Athena’s hand was different from the man’s, but it also made her feel peaceful and warm.

Athena blushed, and she felt embarrassed, “I also feel that it is unbelievable. I actually came boldly and took the initiative to talk to a powerhouse of the peak stage Demon Overlord. Maybe everything is caused by that nasty man.”

“Yes, everything is that guy’s fault! He has a good woman like you, yet…”

Having said this, Zola couldn’t help but feel a little ashamed. She suddenly understood Athena’s feelings. If it was me, I’m afraid that I would have raged and started a fight long ago… It is utterly impossible to “compromise” and look for my love rival. This should be what Athena said; love is mutual tolerance and dedication. Ms. Zola felt that she had understood some key things, and she held Athena’s hand tightly, “Let’s work together to deal with… Uh, control that man. We must never let him continue to be a playboy!”

“Yes!” Athena nodded vigorously.

The 2 women formed a certain kind of alliance in an instant. Their relationship was one step closer due to the common man + imaginary enemies.

“By the way, you can give this 7 yuan rune necklace to that person. It can isolate some kind of curse power in her. At least she will not suffer for the time being.”

“No.” Athena smiled slightly and shook her head, “Let’s go back together, then you can give it to her personally. Delia is a good-hearted friend who has a cold appearance. She is also a true friend worthy of knowing. You can see it when she offended a Demon Overlord like you for me.”

“But… I don’t seem to be welcomed there.”

“Even good friends will have friction when living together. Besides, you should give everyone the time and opportunity to learn about you, including Paglio.”

“ Hmph , don’t trust that insidious guy too much!” Ms. Fairy Dragon was filled with outrage at the thought of the past. However, having said that, I also used to have the intention to take all the treasures alone. As for the removal of the seal… Maybe I had already agreed in my heart when the man requested, but my pride was at work. (Go back?) (Well, if Athena mentions it again, I will go back with her.)

(Athena?) (…) (Sigh… Let’s go back then.) At this moment, suddenly there was a rapid knock on the door as if something urgent had happened.

Before Zola opened the door, the door had already opened from the outside. It was the hotel waiter.

“Bad news!” The waiter hurriedly walked in. He was taken aback and bowed quickly when he saw that Athena was also there, “Madam Athena, why are you here?”

When Athena came to see Zola earlier, the waiter was not nearby. The female sheriff frowned, “What happened?”

The waiter glanced at Zola and said, “The patriarch of the Roco Family, Morten, came with a group of people, and he requested Miss Simon to go out. Otherwise, he will crash our hotel.”

“The Roco Family?” Athena frowned. The Roco Family was a medium-sized family who was far inferior to the elder families, Saiful and Mellon, in terms of power. It was originally the main force of Joseph’s side. Later, after Joseph was defeated, Patriarch Morten saw the situation and acted accordingly by defecting to Shea immediately. In order to appease the hearts of the people, Shea gave the Roco Family a lot of favorable policies. Now that their force was getting greater, their behavior had begun to restore the original bossy style.

Simon was Zola’s pseudonym. This name was taken from Chen Rui’s fake name. Zola looked puzzled, “Morten? Why I don’t recognize this guy? Oh , the Roco Family! Come to think of it, when I went to the Princess Retail Store in the morning, there was a nasty guy named Brue who wanted to take advantage of me. He seemed to be some young master of the Roco Family. In the end, I just taught him a little lesson and asked him to obediently tell me the whereabout of the Princess Retail Store. I didn’t expect it would provoke a group of ants to come. How dare he disturb our chat! Athena, will you wait for me for 3 seconds? I will go and eliminate these ants, then we can continue to talk.”

3 seconds? The ants? Eliminate all? The waiter was frightened after listening to her. Athena said, “I’m the sheriff here. Let me take care of it. Let’s go out and have a look. Don’t worry, I won’t let them leave easily.”

Zola thought for a while and nodded.

Outside the hotel, Morten was leading a group of fierce men to show off his demeanor.

The patriarch was very furious as he had only one son, Brue. This woman actually messed with him like this. It seems that someone dared to step on the head of the Roco Family immediately after we deliberately restrained our force a little while ago! I shall take advantage of the situation today to show the prowess of the Roco Family. I’ll let that beautiful woman know what is living death! At this moment, 2 women walked out of the hotel. Sure enough, there was a woman with glasses that was extremely beautiful. No wonder Brue that brat… I must catch this woman back to enjoy myself! Wait! The other one is not a female bodyguard. She is actually the daughter of the first general of the empire, the legion leader of Flame Legion, one of the 3 legions of the Dark Moon, and Sheriff Athena. Wales! Why is Athena here? She is even with this woman?

Athena spoke up, “Patriarch Morten.”

Morten rolled his eyes and spoke first, “Madam Athena, are you here to catch this culprit who seriously injured my son? That’s great. Just give her to me, and the Roco Family will remember madam’s help.”

“ Hmph! ” Athena sneered, “I’m not here to catch any culprit, but to visit my friend instead. It was obviously your son who had an ill intention for my friend. If it isn’t for my friend’s kindness to just teach him a lesson, he will be dead by now! I’m just about to go to the Roco Family to seek justice for her!”

This woman is a friend of Athena? Morten was startled, and Zola spoke indifferently, “Your son is not severely injured. He just has some minor bruises. However, he can no longer bully women in this life.”

Morten was utterly shocked. When Brue was carried home, he was still unconscious. His skin was burnt, and he seemed to have been hit by some magic. I didn’t expect him to have such a serious ‘internal injury’! He is my only son now, if I can’t give birth to a second… then I will not have future generations!

Athena was also a little surprised, but she was still secretly applauding. With all of Brue’s misdeeds, it could only be said that he deserved this consequence.

Morten was planning to use the situation to show his prowess previously, but he was really angry now. He gritted his teeth and said, “Madam Athena, regardless of the origin of this woman, she actually dares to mutilate my son like this. I must bring her back today! Even if this matter gets Princess Royal, I also want to…”

“What do you want to do?” A threatening expression flashed in Athena’s red eyes. “The whole Dark Moon knows about the bad deeds that you and your son have committed previously. I initially thought that you have changed for the better after surrendering to the Princess Royal. I didn’t expect that you actually got worse. You even offended me and my friends! I will take you down by myself today and pass you to the Princess Royal!”

As soon as she finished reprimanding, Morten felt a terrifying aura surrounding him. He had long heard that Athena was a genius female swordsman who had defeated Sergey, the son of the second general. She broke through to Higher Demon despite her young age. However, he didn’t expect her to have such a powerful aura that he who was a Higher Demon was almost horrified. He immediately yelled, “Toyak!”

Toyak was a foreign guest recently hired by the Roco Family. He had reached the early stage of the Demon King. However, Toyak, who should have responded and come out, stood still. Morten even realized his body was shaking slightly. The higher the grade, the more he could feel the terrifying aura which Athena exuded. Although Toyak was already an early stage Demon King, he didn’t have any courage to resist.

Morten was completely surprised. Could it be some secret treasure? Even the Demon King-level Toyak shows this kind of fear? Seeing Athena approaching step by step, Morten felt even more frightened. He hurriedly took out something, “Don’t come here! This is a top-quality thunderstorm ball. It is enough to turn everyone within 30 meters into ashes! If you dare to come one step further, everyone here will be buried with you!”

Before he finished speaking, Morten his hand emptied. The thunderstorm ball actually fell into the hands of the beautiful woman with glasses. The 2 sides were about 7 meters apart, and the woman didn’t even move. It seemed that the thunderstorm ball flew to her by itself.

“This inferior product is still called the top-quality?”

Zola disdainfully said. With a flick of her finger, the thunderstorm ball shone. Morten was so scared that he almost lost the strength to even dodge, “It’s going to explode!”

This sentence alerted many people around to lie on the ground. Athena did not seem afraid because even if it really exploded, she would not suffer any injury with her power.

At this moment, a translucent bubble-like force field appeared above Zola’s finger. It was about 1 meter in diameter. The thunderstorm ball emitted a bright light in the “bubble”, and the bubble was slightly distorted. Then the light disappeared as if it was just a beautiful fireworks of kid’s toys. It didn’t have any impact at all.

Only Morten knew best that the thunderstorm ball was definitely not a firework, but a real killing tool with terrifying destructive power. He had personally experimented with this. However, in the hands of this beautiful woman with glasses, it was no different from a child’s toy.

Dear Demon God! What kind of horrifying existence that this bastard boy, Brue, offended? When Athena came in front of Morten, she realized that the infamous head of the family in the Dark Moon City was trembling. He had completely lost the courage to resist or escape.

😭😭😭

chapters.title: Chapter 407: An Inch Of Blood For An Inch Of Harem
chapters.body:
Chapter 407: An Inch Of Blood For An Inch Of Harem

In the residence of the sheriff and financial officer, a new garden was added. Many beautiful flowers and plants were planted there. The faint mist floating in the early morning seemed mysterious and beautiful.
