Chen Rui didn’t pay too much attention to it. The [Aura Blade]’s sharp qi was slashing everywhere. Coupled with [Aurora Shot] whistling everywhere, he was invincible for a while.

These dark elemental strengths could only be considered low compared to him, but they surrounded from all directions, and the soldiers were not opponents at all. Under Sumen’s loud command, they barely maintained the defense line; the number of casualties increased rapidly.

To make matters worse, the eyes of the soldiers who killed the dark elementals gradually glowed strangely, then their entire eyes became jet black. It was somewhat similar to the Leviathan Royal Family when they launched [The Eye of Incubus]. Strangely, these soldiers had greatly increased their strength, and they had become crazy as they began to kill their own companions.

Different from the defense of the earth elementals, the speed of the wind elementals, and the attack characteristics of the fire elementals, the dark elementals had a very special attribute in addition to the corresponding debuff, which was [Punishment].

Killing the life form of the dark elementals would be eroded in revenge by the power of the dark element. Those who did not have a strong willpower would easily lose themselves. They would become a crazy killing machine and finally died in madness.

Soldiers whose morale was greatly reduced due to the negative power brought by the dark elementals were all discouraged when they encountered this situation. Fortunately, Sumen killed those soldiers who had gone mad, and he barely stabilized the situation.

If Chen Rui only needed to protect Sumen alone, even if there were more dark elementals like this, there should be no problem, but there were more than 1,000 soldiers here.

Although Chen Rui killed a lot of dark elementals, the amount of these enemies kept increasing, and the level of strength was gradually increasing. There were already dark elementals of the B-level, Great Demon Kings.

These Great Demon King-level elite dark elementals were quite intelligent. After discovering Chen Rui’s power, some launched long-range magic attacks, while others released a boosting magic like [Nightmare Enchantment] which greatly strengthened the dark elemental attacks. The number of soldiers’ deaths had risen again. In a short period of time, there had been hundreds of corpses of the Blue Lava Estate Army on the ground.

Even Sumen himself was seriously injured by a Great Demon King-level dark elemental who launched [Dark Blood Scythe]. If Chen Rui hadn’t arrived in time and beheaded the opponent, he would have died.

Chen Rui knew that the situation was critical. As he yelled, a long sword appeared in his hand. It was 3 feet 6 inches long and was glowing with a light purple color. The sword hilt was cyan. It was the artifact, “Northsea”.

When he channeled power into the sword, the purple light on the tip of the sword suddenly skyrocketed by 3 feet like an extended tail. This sword was extremely sharp; even beyond [Aura Blade]. Its slightest movement could tear apart the dark elementals nearby. “Northsea” had the feature of doubling the swordsmanship proficiency, making the control more handy.

Under the path opening of this fortified sword, the desperately escaping soldiers finally came to the exit of Town Lupin. At this time, there were only around 700 people left. However, the scene in front of them shocked everyone again. The exit point was being shrouded by dark elementals.

Chen Rui grasped the Northsea tightly. The dark elementals which had been hidden in the town, actually launched an attack to the outside. The Dark Moon Army and Athena are in danger! The protective magic of the exit point had been completely cracked. Behind the exit point, arrows were continuously shot and bursting sounds were heard, killing and injuring a lot of dark elementals- The unique explosive crossbow of the Dark Moon!

At this time, Northsea’s purple light suddenly began to flow. It turned out that this artifact had the special characteristic of [Energy Accumulation] which absorbed the enemy’s power. The [Punishment] characteristic of dark elements seemed to have a special effect on this [Energy Accumulation]. After an intense fight all the way, the energy had actually been charged. He could actually launch the attack technique, [Flow Back to Origin]!

In an instant, the dazzling brilliance in the sky attracted almost everyone’s attention.

The purple sword body exploded out countless meteor-like rays which formed a fan shape that spread forward. The rays penetrated one after another dark elementals. After the dispersed meteors drew a beautiful arc, they once again converged into a huge sword form. With a “ swoosh ” sound, the sword shape flew forward at a terrifying speed and momentum. Wherever it passed, everything turned into dust and disappeared.

A terrifying mark appeared on the ground. The entire dense lineup of dark elementals was cleared out. First, it was a big circle, then a wide and straight passage; there was no living enemy in it.

This magnificent and terrifying [Flow Back to Origin] made Sumen stunned, This… is this the power that a Demon Emperor can cast? Only at this point of time did he really understand why the 100,000 army of the Blue Lava Estate would be wiped out in the Dark Moon . A deputy legion leader of the legion, the nameless Aguile, has such power! This sword, not to mention Mallorca, the strongest Double-headed Dragon Legion leader of the Blue Lava Estate at the time, even the Blue Lava Estate Lord himself, Titan, can’t handle it! In fact, Sumen was wrong. This blow was not Chen Rui’s own power, but the artifact’s secret power, [Energy Accumulation].

The real destruction of the entire Blue Lava Army was a more “low-key” undead magic and… a sea of undead which was more than the dark elementals in front of them now.

Chen Rui himself was a little surprised. He didn’t expect [Flow Back to Origin] to be so powerful. The durability and power of this trick was inferior to that of [Scorching Dragon Kill], but it was an energy accumulation technique that could be used continuously. As long as the sword absorbed the opponent’s power to a certain extent, it could be launched again.

As Chen Rui had eliminated so many dark elementals, there was even more [Punishment] attribute accumulated. He had realized the black breath merged into his body, but unlike the anomalies of those soldiers, these black breath seemed to have no effect on him.

Chen Rui didn’t have the time to think about it. With the huge deterrent of this attack, he quickly rushed out with Sumen’s remaining soldiers and finally reunited with Athena.

Judging from the current situation, the dark elementals had faintly surpassed the number of the earth elementals in Mountain Xilang. Of course, the earth elementals had suffered extremely heavy losses in the fight against the various underground tribes due to the control of Glorfin 400 years ago. Even if the Earth Realm could condense earth elements to generate new elementals, its strength and quantity were far behind the loss.

Moreover, the creation time of the Earth Elemental King Moore in Mountain Xilang was not very long, and the elite elementals around him were far less than the dark elementals in front of them.

The dark elementals suddenly attacked the Flame Legion when the situation changed not long ago. Fortunately, the magic circles blocking in front of them gave Athena time to urgently deploy a line of defense. Due to the powerful strength of the enemy, she adopted the tactics of explosive crossbow and long-range strikes with bows and arrows. Although there were still casualties, it was much less than the Blue Lava Estate Army, which was far stronger in discipline and combat power.

However, the characteristic of the dark elementals’ [Punishment] was too special. Many of the soldiers who killed the enemy showed symptoms similar to the soldiers of the Blue Lava Estate previously. If they were not knocked out in time by Athena, they would cause more panic.

Even Athena herself, who had killed several high grade dark elementals, felt some discomfort. Fortunately, her consciousness was very strong, and part of her body equipment also had the function of calming her mind, so she was not really impacted.

Although the power of [Flow Back to Origin] was amazing, the dark elementals were not afraid. They continued to start a fierce siege, and the number was still increasing.

The situation in front of them seemed extremely dire.

Would Shura inside Chen Rui be affected by the [Punishment]?

chapters.title: Chapter 419: King! The Strongest Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 419: King! The Strongest Enemy

Chen Rui looked at Athena. Fortunately, there were no signs of injury, “Athena, you are fine!”

Athena shook her head, “The enemy’s strength is very strong, and they also have a kind of strange attribute. More than 100 of our soldiers are killed, and many of them are severely injured. The most important thing is that the escape road is also cut off by the strange power. If we are unable to retreat, it is equivalent to being trapped here. If this continues, I’m afraid the loss will get bigger and bigger. You try to treat these wounded soldiers first. I will lead some people to hold up ahead.”

These were the elites trained by her and Arux personally. Every death was distressed for her, but this was inevitable. In the true heads-on collective war, zero casualties were just a beautiful legend.

As Chen Rui’s mind shifted, a 3 meters tall tree appeared on the ground. It’s whole body was lush. The soldiers who were about 30 meters around the tree immediately felt that their recovery speed of physical strength and spirit power had greatly accelerated. Even the wounds seem to heal. It was the Yuan Recovery Tree of the Super System which could quickly restore physical strength and magic power. It could exist for up to a month. It was usually used for physical recovery for special training, but it came in handy now.

Chen Rui successively planted several Yuan Recovery Trees which enabled the soldiers including the Blue Lava Estate Army to quickly recover. At the same time, he exchanged a large batch of healing medicines and spirit potions in order to quickly treat the injuries and strengthen their resistance toward the dark elementals’ [Punishment ] attribute.

However, the dark elementals’ offense was still vigorous. Although the Flame Legion was well-trained and well-coordinated, Athena couldn’t seem to hold for long because of their weak overall strength.

Chen Rui arrived in time and used the Northsea sword to kill the B-level elite elementals who trapped Athena, then he charged into the enemy group alone. With a big aoe attack, [Destructive Aura Blow], countless slashing sword qi instantly cleared out the surrounding dark elementals. He finally stabilized the situation.

However, [True Destructive Aura Blow] could only be used once an hour. Although he could hold the battlefield temporarily, the next battle would be more difficult. Chen Rui suddenly slapped his forehead, I was eager to break out of the siege just now. How can I forget the treasure? It turned out that on the way to the Blue Lava Estate, Chen Rui had already used the yuan tortoise stone, obtained from the Chandler’s treasure trove, together with other materials to refine and craft a Mystic Jade Armor.

Mystic Jade Armor (light armor)- Increases movement speed and spirit power; halves long-range damage. Supplementary skill: [Hot Blood Halo]. Increases the speed of allies within 100 meters, increases attack power, and is able to target support units. Can only be used every 6 hours; the effect lasts for 1 hour each time.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui immediately equipped himself with the Mystic Jade Armor. The supplementary skill of Mystic Jade Armor didn’t need to be activated by absorbing the enemy’s power to accumulate power like Northsea; it can be activated directly. The only drawback was that it could only be used every 6 hours.

After the [Hot Blood Halo] was activated, mist with red light faintly appeared under Chen Rui’s feet. A similar red light appeared under the feet of all the targeted soldiers within 100 meters, but the color was much lighter. In an instant, their speed and attack power increased tremendously. Chen Rui also urgently used bestow fruit to bestow Stridebug’s power to Athena and several elite leaders.

His own combat power greatly increased, coupled with the unparalleled bravery of the leader, “Aguile”, and the Blue Lava Estate remnants, the army morale was greatly boosted instantly.

However, the number of dark elementals were significantly reduced, and their strength was still stronger. After a long time, it was still difficult to resist the enemy.

The biggest problem now was that the escape route was also blocked. Judging from the bone tower situation just now, they could only hold on until Paglio came over. Otherwise, even escape was a problem if they couldn’t crack this strange force field similar to the territory..

At this moment, Chen Rui sensed Paglio’s position again in his mind. As soon as he raised his head, he saw 2 smoke-like figures approaching here quickly. These 2 figures were extremely fast, and they were clashing and separating from time to time in the air. Each collision would cause a corresponding impactful shock on the ground. The dark elementals below had already taken the opportunity to retreat, and the offense had slowed down.

Chen Rui’s pupils contracted slightly. One of the 2 figures in the air is Paglio. In this head-to-head confrontation, the other party actually showed no disadvantage! Paglio is an outstanding peak stage Demon Overlord, who is far beyond Azgalor and others. Although he has been sealed for 2,000 years, he has made a great leap in strength due to the black potion and artifact equipment. Even if he is against Catherine, the winner is still unknown. Yet the opponent and him are in a stalemate! With Chen Rui’s eyesight, he barely saw the figure clearly when the 2 sides paused for a split second after the clashing. It was a tall figure with maroon light glowing in its eyes. There seemed to be bone spurs on its shoulders and elbows. Its body was wrapped in a faint black mist, but Chen Rui couldn’t see its face clearly.

This appearance was quite close to the dark elementals. Even if the 2 were outside the range of [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could still guess the identity of this terrifying powerhouse, which was exactly what he was worried about – Elemental King!

It turns out that the one that made Lupin a dead town is actually one of the 6 Elemental Kings, the Dark Elemental King! Elemental King was at the pinnacle of the elements pyramid and the top-level creature of the Demon Realm. It was already at the Demon Overlord level since it was born, and it had no life limit. The older it was, the stronger the accumulated power. Of course, they were not immortal, and they would also die for various causes.

The king was born with the might to govern the elementals of its own element, and the king of each element was exclusive. In other words, the most basic condition for the new Elemental King to be born was that the previous king had died.

Judging from the power displayed by the Dark Elemental King, he was far better than Earth Elemental King Moore and was comparable to Paglio. Therefore, he must be a veteran king with considerable years of existence.

Under normal circumstances, the Elemental King will not participate in the ordinary battles of the Demon Realm. Why is the Dark Elemental King related to Bloodfall? The battle between the 2 major Demon Overlords in the air was still intense, and it was difficult to tell the outcome depending on the situation. 3 “light smoke” fell from the air again, appearing in the dark elemental camp.

The attack of the dark elementals stopped immediately, and they stepped back behind the 3 figures in an orderly manner.

These were 3 dark elementals. Although the Great Demon Kings could already be called elite elementals, these 3 were the real elite.

The 3 figures’ comprehensive strengths were A+, A, and A-, which were exactly the 3 levels of the Demon Emperor.

Demon Emperor level elementals! The power of this group of dark elementals, both individually and comprehensively, far exceeds the earth elementals of Mountain Xilang! It was not that the earth elementals were weaker than the dark elementals. The environment of the Demon Realm was the most suitable for the development of dark elementals, but the most important thing was that the birth time of the Earth Elemental King was too short. There was once a Demon Emperor level elite under him, but it was killed in the battle with Glorfin 400 years ago.

Chen Rui hinted Athena to lead the army to retreat. The battle at this level was no longer what she and Flame Legion could cope with.

Although Chen Rui defeated the Red Spirit Lord Josh, the elementals had innate talents that ordinary trainers and even royal families couldn’t match. Their strength was generally better than that of trainers of the same level. Josh’s strength might only be equivalent to the dark elemental of the early stage of the Demon Emperor.

I must defeat these 3 dark elementals of Demon Emperors to have a chance of escaping! This should be the biggest test that Chen Rui encountered after he was promoted to the five-star Star Lord.

The facial features of the Demon Emperor level dark elementals were quite clear, but they didn’t have any gender distinctions. Their bodies were covered by black mist, vaguely revealing bone spurs which looked very spooky. The dark elemental at the early stage of the Demon Emperor stepped forward. Its gaze swept across the retreating soldiers at the back with disdain, and it finally locked his gaze on Chen Rui, who was standing still and dressed in a cloak. It simply said a word, “Die!”

As soon as it said it, its figure had appeared in front of Chen Rui. Its fingers, that exuded black smoke, showed sharp claws which were about half a meter long and grabbed toward Chen Rui with incredible speed and power.

Chen Rui, who was unable to deal with the situation at that instant, could only rely on Northsea’s sharpness to barely defend the claw. His arm was slashed by the claws when he was distracted for a moment. Blood spattered suddenly. Moreover, faint black smoke was coming out of the wound; he seemed to be poisoned. Athena and the soldiers were secretly worried in sight of that.

Chen Rui’s current show of power and breath was on par with the early stage of the Demon Emperor’s on the surface, so there was a flash of disdain in the eyes of the other 2 dark elementals of the Demon Emperor; they expected that their companion would surely win.

The dark elemental of the early stage of the Demon Emperor thought so too. It gradually increased the intensity of its attack, forcing Chen Rui to be breathless. It seemed that he couldn’t even use his territory.

In fact, Chen Rui had been estimating. Although the power of this dark elemental was powerful, he had a chance of winning. What he was estimating was the other 2 dark elementals at the Demon Emperor level.

This was not a contest field, but a battlefield of life and death. There was no fairness on the battlefield; only winners and losers. Once the opponent realized the threat he posed, it was very likely that they would join forces to kill him. If he fought against 3 at a time, it would be difficult to resist the enemy even if he used all his trump cards.

The show of weakness now made the other 2 refuse to take action. Chen Rui was just looking for a suitable opportunity to go all out in a surprise. It would definitely have a miraculous effect. This was the application of battle tactics.

By the way, there is also “that”. “ Bang! ” Chen Rui blocked his opponent’s punch, and he was knocked backward by the aftershock. The direction happened to be 2 dark elemental elites of the Demon Emperor level. The intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor frowned, and a huge scythe appeared in its hand. It was the strongest dark element single target magic, [Dark Blood Scythe].

It seemed that this intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor didn’t mind giving the last blow to the unlucky enemy who was knocked flying toward it.

The early stage of the Demon Emperor in front had also leapt over. Even if Chen Rui could dodge the [Dark Blood Scythe] behind him, he couldn’t escape this fatal blow.

Opportunity! Chen Rui’s mind shifted at that instant, and he had quickly activated the [Battle Enhancement] in the spiritual link.

[Battle Enhancement] required 100 faith crystals. Chen Rui’s current faith crystals were less than 400. He would use up a quarter of it. He initially wanted to save up to 1,000 to try [Royal Star Transformation], but it was a critical moment now. Obviously, it was not the time to consider this kind of issue.

In an instant, the bodies of Paglio and Chen Rui glowed with dark golden light at the same time. They felt their strength, speed, endurance and other qualities had increased by leapfold. Even the strongest true series black potions did not have this effect!

Almost in the blink of an eye, the situation in the field changed suddenly.

Chen Rui, who was about to be hit by the [Dark Blood Scythe], suddenly disappeared into the thin air. A bleak breath spread quickly and turned into a feeling of vitality. At the moment when 2 completely different breaths were converted, the people watching the battle around had an illusion at the same time; the movements of the 2 Demon Emperor dark elementals suddenly slowed down.

Even the peak stage Demon Emperor dark elemental who refused to make a move felt so. Immediately afterwards, countless stars suddenly appeared around. The 3 dark elementals all felt their power weakened, and they were all surprised: We, the dark elementals, who should be immune to the dark debuff magic like “weakening”, are actually weakened! In the next second, Chen Rui’s figure appeared ghostly behind the intermediate stage Demon Emperor dark elemental. His [Aura Blade] slashed toward the opponent like lightning. His movements did not seem to be affected by the “slow”. Instead, he was several times faster.

The dark elemental of the intermediate stage Demon Emperor was taken aback. It immediately turned into a light smoke and dissipated. Chen Rui’s blade only struck the light smoke.

Almost at the same time, the dark elemental of the early stage Demon Emperor who pounced over saw a purple ray flying toward its head at a terrifying speed. Its figure leaped forward was like sending itself forward, so it couldn’t avoid the purple ray. It was shocked. The dark element ripples condensed into a black shield in an instant. However, the purple ray’s speed suddenly skyrocketed at the end. It quickly penetrated the black shield that had not completely condensed yet, and it hit right at its forehead. The terrifying sharp qi made the entire head instantly turned into nothingness.

This series of changes all happened in a split second before the “slow” effect disappeared. The dark elemental, Helor, of the peak stage Demon Emperor did not have the time to rescue them, and he exclaimed, “Hesak! Hemos!” (The dark elementals were previously described as “it”, now that they had names, they will be referred as “he”)

As soon as he called out, a few huge white light balls flew toward him. The destructive power from the light balls made Helor dare not let his guards down. When he opened his palm, a faint light affected the [Aurora Shot] and quickly weakened and swallowed the power of the light balls.

2 black wings appeared on Helor at the same time. The wing flappings produced mysterious power fluctuations in an attempt to cancel this territory that could weaken him. However, the opponent’s strength was obviously not as good as Chen Rui; his territory was very strange. The peak stage of the Demon Emperor’s territory power actually couldn’t shake or interfere with it.

When Helor eliminated [Aurora Shot] and tried to crack [Galaxy Territory], Hemos who turned into the light black smoke returned to his original human form, but there was a huge crack in the middle of the human form’s chest. The crack could not heal and was overflowing with black smoke.

Hemos never expected that this early stage of the Demon Emperor enemy, who couldn’t even match Hesak, would burst out with such a powerful strength. Although he luckily escaped the previous blow, the defense force of the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor was useless under the opponent’s terrifying attack. Not only his body was hurt, even his soul was severely injured.

At this moment, a more dangerous feeling rose in his heart. He saw black flames emerging from the opponent’s body. The breath containing vitality made Hemos feel very uncomfortable, and the violent and turbulent power in the air almost suppressed the dark breath of the dark elementals to a low point.

Hemos was definitely not a weakling. With a shout, his body dispersed again, turning into a 4 meters tall beast exuding black smoke with 3 heads and 4 legs. It rushed toward the man in the cloak.

The man in the cloak had teleported behind Hemos in an instant. As Hemos turned his head, he saw red lights, and a spiraling huge beast exuding terrifying breath rushed toward him.

The strongest trump card, [Scorching Dragon Kill]!

He had already used a few of his powerful moves, but he still couldn’t kill any one of the dark elementals. Could he still win the battle on his own?

chapters.title: Chapter 420: Two Kings
chapters.body:
Chapter 420: Two Kings

In the eyes of the spectators, a ferocious black huge beast and an even more terrifying red beast that could no longer be described as “ferocious” entangled in an instant.

The ground was constantly undulating like waves as it was twisted and deformed by the foreign force.

Amongst the flying dust, one could vaguely see the huge black beast only persisted for a while before collapsing completely. After the giant snake-like red beast completely tore the huge black beast apart, its power did not weaken at all. It moved toward the Demon Emperor dark elemental with black wings.

If the body structure of the dark elementals had the concept of “nerve”, Helor’s nerves would be tightened to the maximum level now- This “weakling” who seemed weak and vulnerable previously has been hiding his power all the time. He killed Hesak and Hemos in a flash! What a cunning and vicious enemy! As Helor had just swallowed the [Aurora Shot] and was weakened by the [Galaxy Territory], he had no time to dodge the terrifying Scorching Dragon that was rushing forward; he had to take it forcefully.

The result of a peak stage of the Demon Emperor power taking on the trump card of an early stage of the Demon Emperor should have been expected. However, Helor’s instinctive sense of crisis told him: I may not be able to take this move, especially in the strange weakening territory of the opponent! Show weakness tactics, [Link Enhancement], territory, [Galaxy Territory], Northsea, [Aura Blade], [Scorching Dragon Kill]… Within just a few blinks of an eye, Chen Rui had already exploded with the strongest force that he could launch, even launching the hidden killing moves. He was mediocre at first, then he launched astounding killing moves.

As long as these 3 Demon Emperor level dark elemental elites were eliminated, and if Paglio who was empowered defeated the Dark Elemental King, the biggest crisis this time would be resolved!

At the moment, a figure appeared in front of Helor without warning. Due to the impact of a strange force, Helor’s defensive figure was irresistibly pushed back dozens of meters away.

Facing the oncoming Scorching Dragon with the fierce violent breath, this figure didn’t avoid. He stretched out a hand and instantly collided with the huge Scorching Dragon firmly.

In an instant, the whole ground seemed to shake violently, and countless shattered stones flew around. The dark elementals that were close by were hit by the shattered stones, and the weak ones were annihilated on the spot.

The moment the figure touched the Scorching Dragon, his body suddenly shook. There was already a faint red light. He began to slowly retreat; 1 step, 2 steps, 3 steps, and suddenly there was another hand which actually stabilized the figure. However, the ground could no longer withstand this terrifying pressure. Under the force field, countless shattered rocks defied gravity principles and rose one after another. Before they rose high, they were turned to powder.

“Open!” Hearing only a low voice, the Scorching Dragon quickly cracked open starting from the huge head and backwards. In a flash, the whole spiraling body was already torn apart by the terrifying power of the relatively small figure. The scattered red energy could no longer condense and disappeared completely.

Chen Rui felt the complete disappearance of Scorching Dragon, and he was secretly shocked. Besides the battle with Paglio and others in the usual training, it’s the first time someone forcefully tore apart my strongest attack! If that’s the case, even [Scorching Dragon Possession] is useless! Also, judging from the opponent’s strength, even if I use [Scorching Dragon Possession], I won’t be his opponent! Race: Wrath Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S. Physique: S-, Strength: S, Spirit: A-, Agility: S. [Analysis]: Fire attribute.

A Demon Overlord indeed! Although he is only at the early stage of the Demon Overlord, his strength has reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord . Chen Rui felt that the data of this man was a bit familiar, but he had no time to think about it. A terrifying impact was approaching at an extremely fast speed; there was no time to dodge it at all.

Chen Rui shuddered. He instinctively felt that he absolutely couldn’t withstand this blow. Even in this [Galaxy Territory] that weakened the opponent and strengthened himself and even if he used [Link Enhancement] and wore Mystic Jade Armor, he still couldn’t withstand it.

This blow contained extremely massive power. In fact, it almost reached the level of a “Rule”. Although it should not be able to destroy Mystic Jade Armor, the body in the armor would be completely destroyed just like the Scorching Dragon!

Chen Rui was completely targeted by this terrifying energy. He had used up the 2 teleports, and it was too late to use [Star Diversion]. He immediately launched a life-saving skill without thinking.

At the very moment, the blow hit Chen Rui’s body firmly and exploded. The violent aftermath blasted the ground behind him into a pit which was a dozen meters long.

Athena who was watching the battle trembled, and her heart almost stopped beating in an instant. However, it was not flesh and blood that burst apart, but countless flies. The scattered flies regrouped into the figure wearing the cloak.

The artifact, God-Eating Mask technique- [Demonic Flies Transformation]: The body can split into countless demonic flies; immune to all physical attacks. (Active; can only use it once every day. Current usage 1/1).

Athena’s almost gray eyes finally returned to the bloody color, but her heart was still tight. Although her power was not excellent, she could see that the power of this enemy was far better than Chen Rui.

Chen Rui himself was also in shock. The opponent only attacked in the air, and the power was already so terrifying. If he did not act decisively and used the [Demonic Flies Transformation] technique, perhaps his body would really be completely shattered. At that time, even with the special characteristic of [Regeneration], he couldn’t heal.

“The Beelzebub Family? This level of [Demonic Flies Transformation], is it mutated talent?” That man’s voice sounded slightly surprised. He could see Chen Rui’s “origin” at a glance, but he did not seem to link it to God-Eating Mask; the mask had been missing for many years after all.

The fierce battle in the air continued. Paglio, who received the [Link Enhancement], was clearly beginning to gain an upper hand. When the Dark Elemental King felt the disappearance of the Demon Emperor-level dark elemental elites, he was extremely furious, but he was firmly controlled by the enemy in front of him. He immediately channeled out his power and yelled, “Lambost!”

The sound spread afar, seeming to penetrate into the distance.

With this distraction, Paglio had already spotted a flaw in the opponent. His fist with a green flame struck the Dark Elemental King’s ribs like lightning, but this fist seemed to have fallen into a bottomless mud. It was clearly just a short distance, but he couldn’t hit the opponent even after exhausting all his strength. It was as if the short length had become a very long distance.

The Dark Elemental King took the opportunity to attack Paglio with a punch. Paglio was still stuck in the “mud”, so he couldn’t react in time. He was punched in the chest and flew backwards for several meters, but he was safe and sound. Those black smoke which tried to penetrate him were quickly swallowed by the green flame on his body.

There was a wave of twists and turns in the air, and a figure with fine features appeared. His whole body was blue and faintly translucent, wrapping in a faint icy breath, “Hegel, finally you need me to make a move?”

Paglio stared at the figure in front of him warily, and said coldly to Dark Elemental King Hegel, “Incompetent guy! Even if you have a helper, I am not afraid. Both of you can perish together!”

Even though Paglio said that, he was clear that the strength of this Lambost who suddenly appeared was by no means under Hegel; he was even stronger. The most troublesome thing was that Paglio’s most prideful poison had no effect on these 2 enemies. He could only rely on his own strength to fight. Even with the help of artifacts and that inexplicable strength, he still had no chance of winning by fighting against 2. The reason for his bragging was to use words to deter the opponent.

—— Once the 2 enemies join forces, let alone winning, it is quite difficult to escape with Chen Rui and Athena. I must find some way to get out. “Dragon! I admit that your strength is strong, but you are not worthy of the 2 Elemental Kings joining forces,” Hegel sneered, “Besides, my current strength is only barely restored through the secret method; it has not been fully restored. If I am in my peak state, it is not certain who will win!”

Chen Rui had been watching vigilantly at the face of the opposite Demon Overlord, whose face was covered up with an item. He was ready to launch the skill in his hand at any time, but he also paid attention to the battle in the air. As soon as he heard Hegel, he was utterly shocked.

If there is anything worse than meeting an Elemental King, it is meeting 2 of them at the same time! 2 Elemental Kings! That blue figure… By the way, the Earth Elemental King once said that the entrance to the water elementals’ nest should be in the Dead Sea area. Isn’t the Dead Sea at the south of Town Lupin? Then this Lambost should be the Water Elemental King! Judging from the strength of Hegel previously, he is almost on par with the poison dragon. With Lambost now, not only me and Athena, even Paglio is in danger!

“Help me to hold this dragon for a minute. I’ll go and settle the guy who dared to destroy Hemos!” As Hegel finished talking, he shouted to the guy on the ground, “Bridget! That guy is mine! Don’t you touch him!” After discovering that Chen Rui was “Beelzebub Royal Family”, Bridget hesitated for a while. When he was ready to attack again, he heard these words, and he stopped his action with a snort.

Paglio was shocked. As was about to go rescue Chen Rui, Lambost was already blocking in front of him, “Dragon, 1 minute. After 1 minute, I will never intervene.”

“Get lost!” Paglio knew how terrifying Hegel was. He could kill Chen Rui several times within 1 minute. This was not normal training, but a real life and death fight!

Lambost smiled slightly, and circles of water-like ripples moved toward Paglio. The ripples turned into ice-like crystals as they approached him. He yelled, and his body glowed with black light. With a punch, the crystal shattered like a ruin.

“Very strange skill, I feel my defense has been weakened a lot. No wonder Hegel can’t beat you in this dark area.” Lambost’s calm tone sounded, “It’s a pity that you are facing me. The defensive ability of water elementals may not be as good as earth elementals, but our endurance is the strongest. Your special poison will only increase my strength. As I said, 1 minute. There is still 52 seconds left.”

On the other hand, Chen Rui had been shrouded in the greatest crisis. The Dark Elemental King did not show mercy to this mere “early stage of the Demon Emperor” because of his identity. He started attacking with a heavy blow. He was determined to smash the damned enemy into pieces for killing his confidants.

The overwhelming manic power had already enveloped Chen Rui. The power of this blow was more powerful than Bridget’s attack just now. Under that terrifying pressure, Chen Rui didn’t even have the chance to launch [Star Gate].

He couldn’t teleport nor use [Demonic Flies Transformation] now.

Fortunately, he still had [Star Diversion].

In the overwhelming black manic power, suddenly there were sparkles of bright light like the starry sky in the dark night. The terrifying fist power was diverted by the strange rule of the starlight; it rushed toward Bridget.

The direction of [Star Diversion] had always been difficult to grasp. Chen Rui had tried many times in training, but he could only control the general direction in front of him. He seemed lucky this time as the target was very accurate.

If he could use the power of Dark Elemental King Hegel to kill that early stage of the Demon Overlord Bridget, it would definitely be the most ideal result.

Bridget’s body turned red, and his muscles seemed to swell in the blink of an eye. He actually parried the fist with a loud shout.

“ Boom !”

In the terrifying collision, Bridget’s whole body flew backwards. After landing, he stabilized himself by plunging his feet into the ground; he actually did not fall down. He reached out to wipe the blood from the corner of his mouth. He seemed to show a hideous smile, but it was not clear because of the magic item covering him.

Chen Rui was shocked in his heart. Bridget actually has this ability. The strength he has shown by withstanding this blow alone is far greater than the degree of tearing the Scorching Dragon just now! However, he had no time to think further right now because Hegel’s second punch had already arrived. After the second punch was diverted by [Star Diversion] again, Hegel finally showed a surprised look.

This weak man with only the strength of the Demon Emperor not only possesses a strange territory power, but he also has this kind of secret technique! Chen Rui secretly complained. Although [Star Diversion] is wonderful, the opponent’s power is too strong. Not only does the Star Power itself cost a lot, but also the 10-second usage time is about to end. There was a dragon roar in the sky, and the Dark Elemental King had a warning sign in his heart. He turned into a light smoke and flew backwards, avoiding this breath in time; the breath which missed corroded a black hole in the ground.

A huge body appeared in front of Chen Rui. It was a giant dragon. The snake pupils were dark gold, and the scales were tawny. There was a row of short horns on his head, and his 2 cheeks had fin-like things. His body was actually wrapped in a set of black armor, looking majestic. It was Paglio who had transformed into a dragon.

“ Hmph ! Can’t you hold him for even a minute?” The Dark Elemental King said in a dissatisfied tone.

As the ripples in the air twisted, the Water Elemental King appeared beside him and said calmly, “I just don’t want to be hurt unnecessarily. At most, I will help you deal with this dragon.”

Paglio turned back into demon form again, and there were still bloodstains on the corner of his mouth. He desperately used his own blood just now to activate a certain inscription power to force the Water Elemental King back and appear in front of the Dark Elemental King in time. However, this had seriously damaged his vitality.

Facing the Dark Elemental King Hegel, Water Elemental King Lambost, plus that strange Demon Overlord Bridget, Paglio was not an opponent even if he was not injured, unless Zola was here.

No one could have imagined that despite bringing a peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouse like Paglio during this trip to the Blue Lava Estate, they would still be in such a dangerous situation!

Maybe Zola, the powerful dragon magician, could appear magically in time…

Hey, we are starting two new novels <a href=”https://steambunlightnovel.com/the-fist-evolution/”>The First Evolution</a> and <a href=”https://steambunlightnovel.com/the-righteous-player/”>The Righteous Player(s)</a>, feel free to check it out 🤗!

chapters.title: Chapter 421: Turning Point
chapters.body:
Chapter 421: Turning Point

Chen Rui thought quickly, took a deep breath, and said to Paglio, “You leave with Athena first.”

The entire battlefield was surrounded by dark element forces now. The entire army was trapped here. Even if Paglio desperately held the 3 Demon Overlords, Chen Rui couldn’t lead others to break through the blockade with his current strength.

Perhaps [Star Gate] could let him return to the star point set at the Dark Moon, but only Chen Rui could pass through [Star Gate]; he couldn’t bring Athena along.

If no one held these enemies and let Paglio lead the people away, it would only add burden to the poison dragon, then everyone would be doomed.

Chen Rui already had 1 more thing in his hand; it was Zeray. Out of the 3 Zerays, 1 was used in Prison 13 of the Fallen Angel Capital, 1 was used to deal with Broc, and this was the last one.

How useful was Zeray for the peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouse?Chen Rui didn’t know, he only knew that the power gap was too big. This is the last resort. Maybe after covering Paglio and Athena to leave, I can seize some opportunity to activate [Star Gate] to escape. This chance of surviving may be zero; at most one in a billion. But in any case, I have to give it a try. “ Hmph! Now is not the time for a guy like you to act strong. You can’t die, otherwise I will…” Paglio wanted to say the symbiotic contract.

If Chen Rui died here, Paglio himself would not be spared.

However, before the poison dragon finished speaking, he suddenly felt that a certain subtle connection in his mind was cut off, and his facial expression suddenly changed.

The symbiotic contract has been terminated! Although he knew that his partner of the “grand master inheritance” had incredible abilities, he did not expect that Chen Rui already had the ability to terminate the contract. Only the legendary Demi-God-level powerhouse could have the power to overpower the contract, and they would still be subject to various restrictions. Yet, Chen Rui actually simply terminated the symbiotic contract!

Unfortunately, his power was not Demi-God.

“Leave.” Chen Rui didn’t have any impassioned words; he just said a word calmly. He didn’t know if he could see this partner alive again, but he would not regret what he did.

Now that there was no contract constraint, it shouldn’t be a problem with Paglio’s power to escape alone.

In Paglio’s mind, it was a conversation from the Blue Lake back then.

“When I was born, I saw nothing except the eggshells. In these years, I don’t have any relatives, but there are many enemies.”

“What about friends?”

“Dragons don’t need friends, especially poison dragons. Have you ever seen gods who have friends? They only need admiration and fear, not the unnecessary caring and understanding.”

“Perhaps it was like this before… Then, what about now?”

(Now……)

The scenes of the past flashed in Paglio’s mind. The shock in his eyes had gradually settled, and he suddenly grinned.

“You want to grab my limelight so much? In your dream!”

There were also no awe-inspiring words. He just expressed 2 words in his own way- Not leaving! This was in line with the stubborn style of the dead duck dragon.

“ Oh? ” The Water Elemental King said indifferently, “A very precious and enviable friendship.”

“Friendship or not, all of you are going to be buried here today anyway!” The Dark Elemental King’s voice sounded. The sky became darker, and the dark elementals gradually gathered from all sides, encircling the Dark Moon Army and the Blue Lava Estate Army. Hesak, whose head was initially exploded, and Helor, who had been pushed away by Bridget, appeared at the forefront of the team.

Although Hesak was only an early stage of the Demon Emperor, he possessed supernatural powers. At the moment when his head was pierced through by the Northsea, he activated the secret technique in time to replace his brain with his left arm. Now his left arm had disappeared, but his life was safe after all.

Facing the terrifying dark elementals in all directions, the soldiers of the Dark Moon and the Blue Lava Estate had expressions of horror and despair. There was no hope in this battle.

The soldiers suddenly heard a singing voice. The tune of this singing was sad and grief at first, but when they listened carefully, it had a hint of strength and persistence.

This was the famous Song of Essidor. Essidor was a small town that once stood in the former Wrath Empire. It was the last barrier of the Wrath King’s capital. The Bloody Empire Army invaded the Wrath Empire easily like breaking dry branches; they won all their way to the capital. However, they encountered an unprecedented setback in this small town. The first general of the Wrath Royal Family, Serei, incredibly blocked the onslaught of the 300,000 Bloody Empire’s main force with 10,000 people. He held on for 10 days without support. They finished up their food and all died in the end.

It was said that Serei. Samael still stood firmly on the last line of defense until his death. None of the passing Bloody Empire soldiers touched the courageous hero’s body; they all took a detour.

Even the Bloody Empire Lord back then was moved, and he personally cast a bronze statue for Serei. It was still stored in the small town of Essidor, which had become the territory of the Bloody Empire now.

A true hero was revered even by the enemy.

Later generations wrote a song called “Song of Essidor” to commemorate Serei’s bravery.

Athena was humming the song while watching the figure in the cloak. She was neither fear nor panic; there was only serenity.

She knew that the man would not give up on her. In fact, he even preferred to stay desperately to delay the enemy in exchange for her life, but she would not leave alone, let alone becoming his burden.

Athena was not a woman who would only talk. Whether it was affection or love, it was more in her heart. She spoke with her actions.

If it was not the point of life and death back then at Mountain Xilang facing Glorfin, she would not confess that way. As his woman now, she had no regret in dying for him or dying with him.

Facing life and death together; that’s all.

More and more soldiers began to sing along, including the soldiers of the Blue Lava Estate.

Chen Rui felt Athena’s heart, and his hand trembled while holding Zeray. Even on the verge of death and despair, he still had a lover and partner who shared life and death and would never leave him. Chen Rui, who had never believed in fate, suddenly thanked fate very much.

Bridget raised his head, staring at the singing voice in the bleak clouds above. He slowly closed his eyes. When the singing came to an end, the encirclement of the dark elementals had completely formed.

“Fight till death!” Nobody knew who was the first to shout it. The simultaneous voice suddenly surged like a sea tide as if there was something stirring out of everyone’s heart.

Chen Rui glanced back, and he imprinted the resolute and beautiful face into his heart. He turned his head and glanced at Paglio, seeing the firmness in each other’s eyes.

(Fight till the death then.) Paglio yelled, and several bloody Dragon Inscriptions rose up. His body glowed with green light, and the territory power spread in the blink of an eye. A strange space shrouded the 2 Elemental Kings and Bridget at the same time. He wanted to fight 3 Demon Overlords with his own power alone.

Chen Rui had retrieved the godly sword, Northsea. He turned into a ray of light and flew toward the dark elemental army. Behind him were Athena and the soldiers strengthened by the [Hot Blood Halo] and Royal Spirit.

After experiencing the previous danger, Helor, who was at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, no longer dared to underestimate the enemy. Hesak, who almost died in the hands of Chen Rui, was even more fearful.

Helor waved his hand and countless black spears appeared beside him, and they all flew toward Chen Rui. A strange sound sounded, and Chen Rui’s figure suddenly accelerated by several times. He escaped from the surrounding spears at an incredible speed and rushed toward Helor.

Helor was calm as his hands turned into 2 sharp long blades. He slashed toward the ray of light. There was an endless clashing sound. The 2 sides fought for some time, and the 2 figures suddenly moved apart. Helor’s hands, which turned into long swords, suddenly broke into several pieces and fell to the ground.

Chen Rui glanced aside, and Hesak, who was preparing for a sneak attack, was suddenly shocked and gave up his attempt- Helor is the most powerful among the dark elementals below the king. He is talented, and his hands can be transformed into the hardest weapon that is comparable to an average legendary grade weapon, but he actually is not the opponent of that light purple long sword! In fact, Chen Rui’s hand, which was holding Northsea, trembled slightly at this moment. In terms of strength, he did have a gap with Helor of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. Even if the [Galaxy Territory] weakening had been activated, he was just relying on the acceleration of [Sonic Boom] and the sharpness of Northsea to cut off Helor’s double swords. Helor had now regarded him as the strongest enemy and was going all out. Since the Scorching Dragon was no longer available, it was really difficult to defeat the opponent head-on.

Astonishment flashed across Helor’s eyes as his hands condensed into a sword shape again. 2 wings condensed from black smoke emerged behind him. The wings fanned out countless maroon lights, which intertwined into “mirrors”. He had already launched his territory.

Amongst the mirrors, Chen Rui saw various images of himself as if everything in the past appeared in it. With the changes in the images, various negative effects began to appear in his mind, and this effect was even expanding.

The behavior of the reflection began to intensify. Greed, killing, lust…

His entire mind was full of strong dark instincts. As this instinct grew stronger, his will collapsed step by step; it was completely destroyed by this terrifying desire.

The movements in the reflection gradually became unified. The reflection’s eyes seemed to have penetrated his mask, shooting out 2 ghastly black rays. However, in the next moment, all the mirrors shattered without any sign. The entire space was incorporated into a black pupil as if these scenes were just a moment in the pupil.

Chen Rui blinked his black pupil and stabbed the Northsea toward Helor at lightning speed. That vigorous momentum didn’t seem to use much power to crack Helor’s territory.

The black wings behind Helor withered, and 2 swords appeared in his hands to hold Chen Rui’s sword in time. His maroon eyes shot incredibly bright light. His [Death Mirror Territory] could use the power of the dark elements to induce and spread the opponent’s instinctive desire to completely destroy the opponent’s will. It was the nemesis of most demons which killed countless enemies for thousands of years. Unexpectedly, this mysterious opponent actually easily cracked the [Death Mirror Territory] and absorbed his purest dark power.

If it was another type of territory, even if Chen Rui could crack it, it would never be so easy. Chen Rui had passed the biggest test of Megrez, [Refined Mind], and defeated his inner demon for more than once. This kind of territory was simply a gift. He was just a little unexpected that the dark force was absorbed by his body.

While chasing Helor, Chen Rui wanted to take advantage of to kill him while he was weak. Suddenly, he looked up and saw Hesak appear in the air. Hesak drew strange patterns with 1 hand, and waves of dark ripples enveloped him. A protective shield appeared around Chen Rui’s body immediately. The magic of this death ripples could only make the protective shield tremble slightly, but it could not break the shield.

Chen Rui shifted his mind, and the [Gravity] obtained from the Earth Elemental King was instantly released. Hesak felt his body sink and fell involuntarily.

At the same time, in the hazy green space in the middle of the sky, a black light and blue light could constantly be seen. There was a hint of red light in between.

After the space was strongly distorted, the ground cracked apart with a sound. 4 light rays flew out of the collapsed green space and landed on the ground.

Paglio looked like he was in a tight spot. He was panting, and blood constantly flowed out from the corners of his mouth.

“Strong endurance and combat instinct, plus an incredible armor.” The Water Elemental King’s voice sounded.

Except for Bridget, the other 2 kings were really powerful, any one of them were comparable to the poison dragon. Paglio was battling 1 vs 3, so he couldn’t persist for long.. His territory power had collapsed, and he was seriously injured. Fortunately, the Overlord Armor’s protection and the ability to absorb damage was outstanding, so there was no fatal injury.

“ Hmph! ” The Dark Elemental King Hegel seemed to be dissatisfied with Lambost’s praise of the enemy. He suddenly sensed something. As soon as he turned his head, he saw Hesak plummeting to the ground under the influence of the [Gravity], while Helor was retreating in a stagger below. He seemed to have already suffered a serious injury.

The Water Elemental King Lambost also noticed the battlefield on Chen Rui’s side, and his gaze was full of surprise.

“Damn it!” Hegel roared. His figure flashed, and he appeared in the air above Chen Rui’s head. It seemed that he was completely unaffected by the [Gravity]. He punched in the air swiftly toward Chen Rui.

At this time, it was too late to stop Hegel’s attack as Paglio had exhausted too much energy. Just as Chen Rui was about to use his last item, Demon Shield, to defend, circles of light blue ripples appeared before him suddenly. Hegel’s punch hit the ripples, and it was scattered layer by layer by the rippling mystery rule. The punch was actually ineffective.

Hegel was taken aback and shouted, “Lambost?”

“You can’t hurt him.” Lambost’s figure suddenly appeared in front of Chen Rui to face Hegel.

Chen Rui was in disbelief of this change. He didn’t understand why the Water Elemental King, who had helped the Dark Elemental King to attack Paglio just now, had switched sides to prevent Hegel from attacking him instead.

“You should have sensed the [Gravity] just now, right?” Lambost said calmly, “The power of element blessing.”

Hegel’s gaze darkened, “So what?”

Lambost’s indifferent voice gradually changed, “Do you want to cause a war between the 3 kings?”

Chen Rui faintly understood a little bit. I never expect that the element blessing has actually become the biggest turning point. It seems that I can really escape the predicament today.

But since the Dark and Water Elemental Kings decided to wreak havoc in the Demon Realm, why would they still be afraid of the war between the elementals?

chapters.title: Chapter 422: Suspicion And Persuasion
chapters.body:
Chapter 422: Suspicion And Persuasion

“He killed Hemos! He severely injured Hesak!” Hegel’s maroon eyes carried an unabashedly terrifying murderous aura, “Not only that, many dark elementals also died in his hands!”

Lambost did not give in this time, “Elements are a part of nature. Life and death are nothing more than the change of existing forms. In order to restore power, didn’t you sacrifice more lives in the 3 dark places?”

“Those are just the lowly lives of demons. It should be an honor for them to be able to be a part of restoring my power.” Hegel showed a disdainful expression and looked directly at the Water Elemental King, “You really want to go against me to help these demons?”

“I can ignore those lives, and I can even use my own power to help you recover, but you should understand the most important point! The enemy of 3 Kings of Darkness should not be the 3 Kings themselves!” Lambost’s voice suddenly changed to a rarely dignified tone, “I’m not doing this for the sake of demons, but for the elemental covenant. If you risk disintegrating the elemental covenant because of your personal grievances, I will stop you at all costs!”

As he said, a horn appeared in front of Lambost. The horn was entirely blue and emitting a faint light, “Hegel, do you want me to blow it?”

Hegel’s eyes narrowed slightly. This was the blue horn that would summon the water elemental army. It seemed that Lambost was being serious. Hegel had not yet recovered to his peak state now, so he was not Lambost’s opponent. Besides, there was a powerful and hostile dragon next to him. Even with Bridget, he couldn’t win. Moreover, the elemental covenant mentioned by Lambost really made him have scruple.

The Dark Elemental King’s fierce glare finally gradually calmed down under the confrontation with the Water Elemental King. He said coldly to Chen Rui, “For the sake of the 2 kings and elemental covenant, I will let you go today. Elementals will not simply intervene in the dispute between you demons, but if you reappear in front of me as an enemy next time, I will never be merciful!”

Looking at the clouds gradually dissipating in the sky and the dark elementals beginning to retreat, everyone including Paglio and Chen Rui suddenly felt like they were in a dream.

In any case, the terrifying smoke finally dissipated. They only felt lucky and surprise for surviving a disaster.

“Is Azgalor in your hands?” A cold voice sounded; it was Bridget.

Chen Rui’s battle exposed his identity as the “Beelzebub Royal Family”, and Bridget’s question clearly showed that he was a member of Bloodfall.

Although Chen Rui had long guessed that the Town Lupin incident was related to Bloodfall, the power of Bloodfall was beyond his expectation. They were actually related to the Dark Elemental King.

Chen Rui thought, “Azgalor was taken away by one of my allies, we did not do it.”

The identity and power of the Dark Moon’s “Aguile” had basically been exposed in the eyes of Bloodfall, and Paglio’s strength was also exposed, but the “power” behind “Aguile” would make Bloodfall even more fearful. The so-called Cloak Gang or deputy leader should be a diversion; his real power was unfathomable.

There was at least 1 peak stage of the Demon Overlord dragon that could rival the Elemental King. Aguile himself was also the peak of the Demon Emperor powerhouse who was close to a Demon Overlord, plus a mysterious ally who could “take away” Azgalor. Perhaps there were even more unknown powerhouses.

Sure enough, Bridget remained silent. His ambiguous face seemed to be lost in thought.

After a while, Bridget raised his head, but he ignored Chen Rui and Paglio. Instead, he cast his gaze at Athena.

“Your name is Athena, right? I like your singing, this is for you.”

After speaking, a light red light slowly flew toward Athena. Paglio appeared in front of Athena in time, and he grabbed the thing vigilantly, but he frowned and handed it to Athena.

When Athena saw it, it turned out to be a pair of wristbands that exuded strange power fluctuations. She could not help but to reveal a surprise expression. She didn’t expect that the enemy would actually give her something. Just when she was about to speak, Bridget’s figure had disappeared.

Chen Rui set his sight on the Water Elemental King Lambost. If it weren’t for Lambost just now, Paglio might be able to escape by himself, but he, Athena and the others would be annihilated.

Lambost spoke, “I don’t know how you gained the trust and friendship of the Earth Elemental King, but there is no doubt that the element blessing on you has saved your life.”

“Is it because of the elemental covenant?” Chen Rui heard this term for the first time. And also the 3 Kings of Darkness. There are 6 kings in total. Could the 3 Kings of Darkness be earth, dark and water elements? Then there are 3 Kings of Light? Judging from the attributes of elements, it should be their mortal enemy, wind, light and fire element? “You don’t need to know this. Let me ask you, what is the name of the current Earth Elemental King?”

“Moore.”

“Go and tell Moore that I’m waiting for him in the Dead Sea. I have an important thing for him.”

“I will definitely tell him,” Chen Rui nodded and did not ask much in this regard. He changed the topic, “May I ask Your Highness Lambost, what is going on with Town Lupin? Have all the townspeople been killed?”

“In the Elemental War, the Earth Elemental King died and the Dark Elemental King was severely injured. He needs 3 sources of darkness and a large number of living beings sacrificed to recover his power. Town Lupin… is already the third place. There is a darkest source in the dark element underground, and there are dense living beings on the ground. With my help, Hegel has basically recovered, but he still needs to rest for a while to return to his peak state. Otherwise, the dragon may not be able to suppress him.” Lambost glanced at Paglio, and the poison dragon snorted coldly and did not refute. It could be seen that the Water Elemental King was not lying.

“Your Highness helped Hegel… sacrifice so many living beings?” Chen Rui frowned slightly. Judging from Lambost’s words, I’m afraid that there is no living person in the entire Town Lupin, including Chandler’s son whom Sumen is looking for. Lambost faintly replied, “We didn’t need so much initially, but at Hegel’s request, I helped another person who needs dark power to break through the bottleneck… For elements, any life or death is just a change of existence form. One day, you, me, and all living beings will face this moment.”

Chen Rui took a deep breath, “Those lives are not elementals.”

“I have been watching the battle just now. Although you are still quite far away from the level of Demon Overlord, your territory power is very peculiar. It seems to contain a trace of the rudiment of the rule of time. Even a real Demon Overlord may not be able to realize this rule. It seems that the Earth Elemental King Moore really has a unique vision for choosing you as the object of blessing. Then, for Moore’s sake, I would like to advise you one last thing. Weakness and innocence will only be a burden of a powerhouse. In the eyes of the supreme gods, all creatures are nothing but toys.” Lambost’s calm and peaceful voice revealed a kind of indifferent coldness. The space beside him gradually distorted, and Lambost disappeared without a trace.

Chen Rui was silent for a while. Paglio walked over and patted him on the shoulder, “It’s not the time to be in a daze, I’m leaving now.”

Chen Rui understood the meaning of the poison dragon and nodded. Since the crisis had passed, Paglio, the “dragon powerhouse”, should disappear and return to the identity of Aguile. Meanwhile, Chen Rui would appear as a financial officer who was “knocked off” by Athena before the war.

However, there were still many doubts in the mind of the financial officer who had just “woken up”.

The source of darkness is the root cause of the extinction of Town Lupin. This can be concluded, but what is the relationship between Bloodfall and the dark elementals?

And who is the “person who obtained the dark power and broke through” whom the Water Elemental King mentioned? What role does Bloodfall play in this? Who is Bridget? How much hidden power does Bloodfall have? The Dark Elemental King said that elementals will not simply intervene in the dispute of demons, then he vaguely stated in front of the Water Elemental King that he will not take the initiative to seek revenge from “Aguile”, so there’s no need to worry about it for the time being. Chen Rui was also doubtful of some details from the past to the present, but he could be sure that the focus of the Dark Moon now was the Fallen Angel Capital and Prince Obsidian. I will probably face Bloodfall again in the future. Therefore, I will once again encounter Bridget and Dark Elemental King Hegel. I must become stronger as soon as possible. Today’s scene of burdening friends and unable to protect my lover must never happen again! In this battle, the Flame Legion’s elite lost 361 people. 540 people were seriously injured, and there were more with minor injuries. As for the Blue Lava Estate Army, adding the original left-behind army plus the soldiers Sumen brought from Town Lupin, fewer than 800 soldiers survived.

After this fierce battle of life and death, both the Flame Legion and the Blue Lava Estate Army that luckily survived had passed a true battle test. If they were trained properly, their combat power and willpower would be improved in terms of quality.

When Chen Rui came to Athena as a “financial officer”, Athena was talking with Sumen. As for Paglio, after showing up as Aguile, he went to the tent to heal.

“Thanks to miss and Sir Aguile’s rescue this time, otherwise my soldiers and I will be buried in Town Lupin.”

The reason why Sumen called Athena “miss” instead of legion leader or madam was because he used to serve under Athena’s father General George, but he was transferred to the Blue Lava Estate 30 years ago; Athena was not born yet at that time.

With this relationship, plus the fight against the dark elementals just now, the Dark Moon Army and the Blue Lava Estate Army seemed to be very close.

“General Sumen is being polite. According to you, Lord Chandler is dead, and his only son, Tagow, was also killed in Town Lupin, so what are your plans?”

Sumen sighed, “I am incompetent. I have failed Sir Chandler’s last entrustment. The blood of the Abbas Family was cut off because of me. The people of the Blue Lava Estate have lost their true controller.”

“This must be General Sumen, right? Sorry, can I say a few words?” said Chen Rui.

Athena quickly introduced both parties. When Sumen heard that the powerless guy in front of him was Athena’s fiancé and the famous financial officer of the Dark Moon, he nodded slightly, “Sir Chen Rui, please go ahead.”

“Why does the general think that the Abbas Family must be the controller of the Blue Lava Estate? As far as I know, Lord Titan only began to serve as the Blue Lava Estate Lord because he accumulated military credit back then. As for Lord Chandler, he is only considered an acting lord. He has not been officially appointed by the capital, let alone the unfortunate Tagow.”

“As for the Lord Titan, he ignored Crown Prince Grimm’s life-saving grace. He was good to the Dark Moon on the surface, but he had been smuggling the Dark Moon’s resources and population secretly. When the Dark Moon was at the most difficult time, he even cooperated with the Red Spirit Lord to invade the Dark Moon! To put it bluntly, he can be described as ungrateful, despicable and shameless! Not only that, the lord is also aggressive, cruelly exploiting and suppressing the people in the estate. The Blue Lava Estate is full of complaints. The situation became even worse after Lord Chandler assumed the position. There were famines, and the people had no means to live in the estate. Can such a lord lead the people to stability and prosperity? Look at the current Blue Lava Estate, and then look at the Dark Moon. There are some words that I do not need to say further, the facts tell everything.”

Chen Rui’s remark made Sumen lower his head and sigh, “Lord Titan has a life-saving grace for me, so…”

“Along the way, I have heard about the deeds and prestige of the general. After you are declared a rebel, there are still such loyal soldiers following you. You are definitely a brave, upright and respectable leader. Then think about it, general. Because you want to repay the so-called life-saving grace, are going to put the entire people of the Blue Lava Estate in famine and ruin? What’s more, you have worked for the Blue Lava Estate for 20 years and loyally assisted his son, Chandler, after the death of Lord Titan. You also risked your life to come to Town Lupi. It was enough to repay him.”

Sumen was silent for a moment and looked up, “Then, Sir Chen Rui, please teach me what should I do?”

“First, you must expose the conspiracy of the fake lord, then a new lord must be promoted. As for the new lord… or the Young Master Tagow, I believe Lord Chandler will definitely have relevant proof before entrusting the general.”

When Sumen heard the last sentence, he was taken aback, “Sir means that…”

Seeing him understand the meaning, Chen Rui nodded, “We must first stabilize the situation of the Blue Lava Estate. We will provide the greatest assistance, and then let the people of the Blue Lava Estate gradually get out of famine and chaos. As for later… Sir Titan was able to rely on military credits to be the lord at the beginning, so General Sumen can rely on the credit of stabilizing and developing the Blue Lava Estate to go further.”

Sumen was suddenly shocked as he did not expect that the other party would say this. Chen Rui smiled and said, “The fact is that Abbas’ blood has been cut off. For the people of the Blue Lava Estate, general should also take your due responsibility, but these things should not be rushed. General can use Tagow’s name to control the power of the estate first. Everything is for the sake of the people of the Blue Lava Estate.”

Athena also said a few words on the side. When Sumen’s eyes were getting enthusiastic, Chen Rui and Athena looked at each other and smiled.

Would Chen Rui fight alongside the 3 Dark Elemental Kings one day? What would King Moore choose if he were to choose between Chen Rui and the elemental covenant (that had joined the Bloodfall)?

chapters.title: Chapter 423: Return
chapters.body:
Chapter 423: Return

Sumen was a capable person. He led the soldiers well, brave and strict without losing his generosity. All these characteristics won the support of soldiers. Due to his dissatisfaction toward some of Titan’s actions in the past, he had always been excluded. He even did not get to participate in the “nice task” like invading the Dark Moon.

However, blessing and misfortune were impermanent and unpredictable. The Blue Lava Army, which originally went to the Dark Moon to earn credit, was finally wiped out while Sumen escaped the disaster.

A capable person was always unwilling to be lonely. After Chen Rui inspired Sumen’s ambition, Sumen’s entire life had undergone an important turn. It was undeniable that this so-called ambition was actually a kind of wild ambition, but Sumen was very clear about his position. If his goal was to be realized, he couldn’t do without the power of the Dark Moon. The Dark Moon could support and help him rise, yet they could pull him down easily too.

In the current situation, he would choose this side without a doubt.

From the elite soldiers under Athena, one could see the combat power of the Dark Moon’s current army. Compared with it, even the Double-headed Dragon Legion or Azure Legion before the Blue Lava Estate Army’s defeat was not as good. Moreover, the equipment equipped by those soldiers was enough to make him, a deputy legion leader, jealous. There was not a legion in the Blue Lava Estate now that could compete with this elite army.

This is only 1 of the 3 legions of the Dark Moon. In terms of individuals, “Aguile” alone, who could rival with the 3 Demon Emperor dark elementals, can be considered the top person under the Demon Overlord, let alone the mysterious dragon whose strength can suppress the Dark Elemental King. The power I see now is probably only the tip of the Dark Moon’s iceberg, I don’t know how much power is still hidden. However, the real goal of the Dark Moon should be more than the surrounding estates. The Princess Royal Highness is the granddaughter of the Lord of Midnight Sun and the heir to the empire. She has such a powerful power in the Dark Moon and the foreign support of the Dark Shadow Empire. This “perfectly justifiable” has become more prominent. Coupled with the support of General George and others, maybe one day Princess Shea can really sit on the throne of the capital, then I am just following the empress in advance.

After Sumen made up his mind, he swept away his initial grief, ordered the soldiers to bury the remains of Town Lupin residents, dismantled the bone tower that had lost the support of the dark elements and arranged for the wounded soldiers to heal their injuries. He also sent people around to gather his previous subordinates. He looked vigorous and high-spirited.

With the help of Yuan Recovery Tree and the potion, the injuries of the Flame Legion and the Blue Lava Estate Army were well controlled, and the recovery speed was gratifying. As for the Flame Legion soldiers that died in action, their corpses were stored in a specific space ring to be brought back to the Dark Moon for burial.

Although Paglio injured his vitality by contending against 3 enemies, the protection and recovery effects of the Overlord Armor played a key role. In addition, dragons had amazing resilience. In just 3 days, he had basically recovered.

Speaking of which, although Paglio used equipment and strengthened power to suppress the Dark Elemental King who had not recovered to the peak stage strength, the poison dragon’s best talent was poison. Since the Dark Elemental King and Water Elemental King were not afraid of poison, Paglio’s true combat effectiveness couldn’t be fully utilized in the face of such a nemesis enemy.

Although the human financial officer was “knocked down” by Athena previously, he fell ill again these days because his physique was too weak and was eroded by the power of dark elements. So, he had been “resting” in Athena’s tent.

The reason why Chen Rui wanted to recuperate was because a strange thing happened in the Super System.

Originally, he had 385 faith crystals. The spontaneous [Link Enhancement] used in the battle used up 100 crystals. With the addition of the Tower of Faith’s automatically generated and newly collected crystals, there should be only 300 crystals left. However, the next day after the battle, the faith crystal miraculously grew to 350, and the growth rate was still rising.

Chen Rui’s consciousness entered the galaxies of the Super System. On the blue planet that provided the power of faith, he was surprised to find the second Pillar of Faith.

By right, his faith power had to reach a certain level before the Pillar of Faith could automatically generate. It was reasonable to say that it was not enough now, but he didn’t know why another pillar was added suddenly. No wonder the number of faith crystals had suddenly increased.

However, what this Tower of Faith believed in was not among the 10 qualities that Chen Rui entered as the source of faith. There was a word: War.

Chen Rui was taken aback, and Shura’s voice sounded from the bottom of his heart, “Are you surprised? Thanks to the dark elements you absorbed previously.”

Shura! It turned out that Shura absorbed those dark elementals’ [Punishment], including the dark elemental elite of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, Helor’s territory power of [Death Mirror Territory]. He actually created a Pillar of Faith with a belief in “war” on the blue planet! Chen Rui frowned. Shura seemed to see through his mind, and he said with a disdainful voice, “Actually, I didn’t use any special means, but some things can’t be suppressed. This is their true desire. No matter how you try to suppress it, it still truly exists. It’s like day and night coexist. If there is no darkness, how can you understand the light? Isn’t there a sentence in your memory that says, overly sacred gods are often worse than demons.”

Although these words had a strong inciting tone, Chen Rui was pondering about its meaning. The meaning of faith is not distortion and coercion. In particular, the “human” in Super System is not a puppet that has lost consciousness, but a true life that has his own will.

Light and darkness are originally twins. Only after experiencing darkness will I look forward to light more. Chen Rui seemed to realize something, and he gave up the urge to erase this new faith. There may be other Pillars of Faith in the future, and more people will choose these faiths. In a sense, life is the marionette of destiny, but life is not destiny. Just like my current choice, life has its own choice. That kind of choice should be true faith. Chen Rui ignored Shura’s other temptations and quit the Super System.

He was in the special magic tent now. The tent was set in Athena’s big tent. A magic lamp lit up the big tent. It seemed that it was night, and Athena was lying on the table covered with military maps; she seemed to be asleep.

Chen Rui got up, took a blanket and gently covered her. Athena’s long eyelashes moved slightly, and she woke up.

“Sorry, I woke you up.”

Athena rubbed her hazy eyes, then she stretched her waist and stood up, “I was studying the map according to the plan. I never thought I would fall asleep.”

“Do you want me to carry you to sleep in the magic tent?”

“No, I’m not so sleepy anymore. In the past few days, Sumen has gathered a lot of previous subordinates. He has about 15,000 troops in his hand now. By the way, there is an unexpected news from the intel staff from the front. The Blue Lava Estate Lord Chandler was bedridden for a long time and his body was weak, which caused his old illness to relapse and died. Will there be any conspiracy in this?”

“Chandler died of illness?” The news is indeed unexpected. I initially thought that it would take some time to expose the true face of the fake lord, but I didn’t expect him to “die of illness” in advance. Some prepared plans are wasted then. Chen Rui pondered for a moment and nodded, “There may be a conspiracy, but this move should mean that Bloodfall has decided to abandon the Blue Lava Estate, or that their biggest goal in the Blue Lava Estate has been achieved. With a powerhouse like Paglio here, I don’t want to lose more strength. The biggest purpose of Bloodfall is either the recovery of the Dark Elemental King or something else. I haven’t figured it out yet, but it’s good this way because Sumen’s ascending into lord and the control of the Blue Lava Estate will be even easier. Well, it seems that it will not be long until we return to the Dark Moon.”

“Really?” Athena’s forehead lightly leaned against his shoulder, “I suddenly don’t want to go back. You know, there are not many opportunities to be alone with you.”

Chen Rui kissed her guiltily on the forehead. He spread the blanket on the ground, hugged her and sat down.
