“It reminds me of our 2 days in Mountain Xilang.” Athena rested comfortably on his lap, “and our little house in the green leaves forest.”

Chen Rui’s heart surged warmly as he stroked her hair slowly. Those were some of his most precious memories.

Athena closed her eyes while enjoying his gentle movements, and she said dreamily, “Promise me that you will never leave me before the end of my life.”

“Our lives will come to an end together, trust me.” Chen Rui leaned down and hugged her shoulders, “You know? I can’t bear a life without you.”

“ En… ” Athena responded to his warm hug. The 2 were speechless for a long time. They were just feeling each other’s heartbeat.

It seemed as if there was no distance between the 2 hearts.

“…”

“Your singing is really melodious. Why haven’t I heard you sing before?”

“Because you have Kia’s charming voice in your ears. How can you hear my singing?” There was a little sourness in the tenderness and sweetness; this was woman.

“ Hehe! Didn’t someone say that he liked listening to you singing last time? He also gave you a pair of legendary grade magic wristbands very generously. That’s great stuff!”

Chen Rui was naturally talking about Bridget. The wristband given to Athena was actually legendary grade. It could increase the strength with fire attribute damage and reduce stamina consumption. The attributes were quite outstanding which made it a legendary grade item.

Athena smiled suddenly with a trace of joy and pride.

“Are you jealous? I’m not mistaken, right? Even you will be jealous?”

“Who said that men are not jealous? Even in the history of the Demon Realm, there are dozens of wars caused by jealousy.” Chen Rui said quietly, “Yes, that guy is stronger than me, and he is also generous…”

Chen Rui was just joking previously, but seeing Athena actually smiled and nodded, he was quite irritated secretly. He finally understood the feelings of those women in his house.

“There are many men who are better than you in the Demon Realm, right?” Athena said with a smile, “It’s just that we, Great Demon women, are stubborn. There is only you, bastard, in our eyes and hearts.

Chen Rui grinned, and Athena blinked her beautiful red eyes, “I suddenly want to go to sleep in the tent. Don’t you plan to carry me?”

Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly lit up, “Does Madam Legion Leader mean that…”

“There is a kind favorite song that only a bastard can listen to, isn’t it?” Madam Legion Leader’s face suddenly blushed. Why did I even say this? It’s all because of Kia, the perverted girl. She makes me start to be shameless too… This sentence was undoubtedly more powerful than some ancient runes. A certain bastard suddenly became energetic. He picked up Madam Legion Leader and hurriedly walked toward the soundproof magic tent.

In the quiet night sky, the purple double moon gently hid into the clouds.

Maybe Shu was helping him in the previous fight, he was just shy to admit it😳…

chapters.title: Chapter 424: Fertile Yuan Soil
chapters.body:
Chapter 424: Fertile Yuan Soil

As imagined, the Blue Lava Estate developments were going quite smoothly.

With Sumen’s prestige and military power, the 12-year-old “Tagow”, Chandler’s son who was promoted to the lord, was quickly recognized by the Blue Lava Estate. Sumen was appointed as the new legion leader of the Azure Legion. Due to the disappearance of the original Sheriff Varit, Sumen’s subordinate, Aglas, temporarily assumed the post. Sumen also appointed the financial officer. Since then, Sumen had controlled all the power of the Blue Lava Estate. Of course, all of this had been smoothly carried out with the “help” of the Dark Moon’s Flame Legion.

With the help of Chen Rui, Sumen reformed a series of the original Blue Lava Estate’s decree, including abolishing some of the exorbitant taxes, sending soldiers to eliminate bandits, and vigorously encouraging production, which won unanimous support from the public.

When Princess Royal Shea of the Dark Moon learned of the death of the Blue Lava Estate Lord Chandler, she specially sent an official representative to express her condolences and donated valuable supplies and food, effectively alleviating the famine in the Blue Lava Estate. Shea then sent a group of related talents to help the Blue Lava Estate to improve the land and reorganize the economy. This kind of repaying grievances with grace made everyone from the officers to the people of the Blue Lava Estate to be very grateful. Compared with Regent Obsidian who defrauded the hard-earned money from various estates, Princess Royal Highness was the real royal family.

Sumen and Tagow issued a public statement apologizing for some of the actions of the former Lord Titan. They claimed that the Blue Lava Estate would never forget the Dark Moon’s help.

After the replacement soldiers sent by the Dark Moon came, more than 9,000 elites of the Flame Legion returned to the Dark Moon under the lead of the legion leader, Athena.

Chen Rui did not follow Athena and Paglio back to the Dark Moon, but he went directly to Mountain Xilang instead.

The mining office in Mountain Xilang had been completely refurbished and the residential area had doubled. With the help of the earth elementals, many new mineral veins outside the main pit were explored, and the mining work was in full swing. The West Road army, renamed “Moon Shadow Legion”, was stationed in the newly constructed Xilang Fortress. Traders from the west came like an endless stream now, so the entire west road had been renovated and various checkpoints had been set up. It was mainly to clear the roadblock and protect business travellers.

The Moon Shadow Legion leader, Tim was not very powerful, but he was very intelligent and proficient in the art of war. In the war of lords, he attacked Town Dico and severely damaged the vanguard of the Red Spirit Estate, making his first contribution. Tim’s wife Lysa was the queen of the Medusa tribe who was a Great Demon King powerhouse (just advanced). There was a powerful Medusa guards by his side, so his overall strength was not inferior to the other 2 legions. Moreover, in a legion’s internal battle ball friendly match, Moon Shadow Legion’s team actually unexpectedly defeated the other 2 legions. The Red Blood Legion and Flame Legion felt that the excellent quality and perfect cooperation were very familiar as if they had encountered it somewhere. Some people had already guessed that the Moon Shadow Legion team was the “Red Cloak team” under Joseph that almost defeated the Red Blood Flame United back then. At that time, they intentionally performed poorly. They were really revealing their skills now.

Under this kind of “old scores”, the atmosphere of competition between the 3 legions was more intense. The strength of the legions grew methodically in a positive environment.

Chen Rui came to Mountain Xilang not to inspect Tim’s work, but to go to the Earth Realm of the earth elementals in the main pit.

In Earth Realm, Chen Rui received a warm welcome from the earth elementals. Although most of the earth elementals were not good at speech and had not learned the common language of the Demon Realm so far, Chen Rui could feel their sincere enthusiasm from the [Analytical Eyes] .

In the Earth Palace, Earth Elemental King Moore had a solemn expression in his eyes after hearing Chen Rui’s experience in Town Lupin, “My friend, I have to say that it is indeed very fortunate that you can escape from the Dark Elemental King this time.”

“The Water Elemental King Lambost asked me to tell you that he is waiting for you at the Dead Sea. He wants to give you something important.”

Moore nodded slightly, “It should be something left over from the last Earth Elemental King when he died. My memory tells me that this thing is very important, but I need to reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord to be eligible to accept it. Glorfin is the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Although I was already severely injured before I came here back then, I still couldn’t contend with Glorfin due to the limited time of my creation. It was only with the power of Earth Realm that I destroyed his body, but the 400-year battle with his soul had weakened my strength. The earth elementals also suffered heavy losses. Even if you later repaired the elemental heart that provides that special effect, I still cannot reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.”

Chen Rui once heard the Water Elemental King mention this, and he asked curiously, “Is it the Elemental War? Are you all called the 3 Kings of Darkness? What is the elemental covenant?”

“The 3 Kings of Darkness is the dark element, water element, and earth element. As for the 3 Kings of Light, they are naturally light element, fire element, and wind element. We are each other’s mortal enemies. As for the details of Elemental War and elemental covenant… I will tell you again in the future if I have a chance.”

Chen Rui knew that everyone had their own secrets, so he did not probe further. The Earth Elemental King said again, “The characters of dark elements are violent and fierce, and my strength is far inferior to Hegel. The element blessing can only help you this time. Before you have the corresponding strength, try not to conflict with the dark elementals.”

Chen Rui nodded and asked, “How long will it take from your current strength to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord? Are supplementary things like black potions and devil fruits useful for elementals?”

“Although the king is already at the early stage of the Demon Overlord and has the memory inherited from the predecessor king once created, the power of the elements is accumulated. It needs to be absorbed and converted for a long time. The black potion and devil fruit have miraculous effects on ordinary demons. Even it has extraordinary effects on tauren and Medusa, but it has no effect on elementals.”

From Moore’s tone, I could hear that he can’t reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, the Water Elemental King would not give that important thing to Moore. Chen Rui frowned and asked, “The Dark Elemental King can use darkness sources and living beings’ sacrifice to restore his power. In your inherited memory, do you have alternative methods for quick recovery or improvement?”

“There is a kind of rare Fertile Yuan Soil that can greatly increase the strength of Earth Realm. If I have this treasure, then not only can I recover the strength I lost over the 400 years and directly reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, even the strength of the entire earth elementals will have qualitative changes. The creation speed of the earth elementals will increase, and the number of earth elemental elites will also increase rapidly.”

“Fertile Yuan Soil? Where is this treasure?” Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly lit up. This “Fertile Yuan Soil” is also one of the materials used to make the artifact “Secret Shadow”. I can’t find it previously. I didn’t expect that the Earth Elemental King needs it too. “In my inherited memory, there is a Mountain Seckred in the far north, and Fertile Yuan Soil is there.”

Chen Rui’s heart moved, “Mountain Seckred? So, why don’t you go there to find what you need?”

“My memory tells me that the mountain seems to contain some kind of forbidden power that is untouchable. More importantly, due to the heavy losses of the earth elementals previously, the Earth Palace urgently needs my power to generate new earth elementals, so I cannot leave. ”

Chen Rui wrote down the name Mountain Seckred. The artifact “Secret Shadow” is secondary; Fertile Yuan Soil plays a key role in the Earth Elemental King and even the entire earth elementals. It seems that I must try to get this thing. The north land… should be within the boundaries of the Bloody Empire. At this time, it had been nearly 2 months since the Dark Shadow Empire’s Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s Lord, General Crawford, visited the Dark Moon. During this time, the Dark Moon and the Bloody Vine Flower Estate had developed close cooperation. The effect was very obvious, and both estates showed good response. Shea decided to visit the Bloody Vine Flower Estate at the beginning of next month after being invited by General Crawford. Chen Rui was likely to accompany him by then.

To the north of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate is the Bloody Empire. During the visit, if I have the opportunity, I might as well explore it. But for now, let’s use the intel network of the Dark Demon to find out the relevant news. After making up his mind, Chen Rui bade farewell to Moore and came to the tauren tribe. He discussed with Chief Tauren Delong about a plan they planned long ago, which was the relocation of the tauren tribe.

Now that the bloodline curse of the tauren tribe had been lifted, there was no need to rely on the Fountain of Vitality to stay underground, and there were tauren priests like Hart. As long as they constructed the tauren temple, they could complete the baptism of the birth of the tauren baby as usual.

The “new home” Chen Rui prepared for the tauren tribe was in the newly built military site of the Blue Lake Mountain Range where the original “treasure” was located. The terrain there was dominated by mountains and jungles, and the area was wide; it was very suitable for tauren life.

As soon as they heard that they could leave this dark, damp, moonless underground, almost all the tauren cheered and began to eagerly prepare to move.

For the Dark Moon, the relocation of tauren also had a very positive significance. This group of excellent craftsmen with the most fantastic metal smelting skills in the Demon Realm would be closer to Dark Moon City. It would be more convenient to smelt metals and produce equipment. Many new weapons could also be tested and put into the use of military equipment quickly.

Moreover, Chief Tauren Delong’s strength had reached the Demon Emperor level, and the other tauren who survived the 400-year underground war were all battle-tested and powerful. They could provide considerable combat power when necessary.

With Chen Rui’s storage warehouse, the most difficult task of the relocation, material transfer, was easily solved. However, the mines that the taurens insisted on taking away filled the storage warehouse. Under Delong’s organization, the tauren travelled minimally and followed Chen Rui away from the underground where they lived for hundreds of years.

As for the Medusa tribe, Chen Rui kept them in Mountain Xilang because of Tim. With protection of the magic circle set up by Chen Rui, plus the strongest support army of the earth elementals under the Mountain Xilang, there should be no problem on Tim’s side.

During the relocation of tauren, Chen Rui did not forget another important thing which was the Fountain of Vitality and the mythical silver box soaking in the Fountain of Vitality.

I believe that the fake daze dragon lady will smile with joy upon seeing this gift. Could Chen Rui take the opportunity to “further” develop his relationship with Shea when they were visiting Bloody Vine Flower Estate?

chapters.title: Chapter 425: Silver Box
chapters.body:
Chapter 425: Silver Box

In the Rainbow Valley, Ms. Fairy Dragon was in a daze in the laboratory.

That was right; just be in a daze.

To be precise, this was a habitual action. For Ms. Zola who had been immersed in experiments for thousands of years, being in a daze was equivalent to thinking, resting, and relaxing. This might be the origin of her fake daze attribute.

However, her daze currently was neither thinking nor resting, but she really was in a daze.

After a guy left, Ms. Fairy Dragon had often been in a daze like this for 2 months. Sometimes, she even couldn’t concentrate on the experiment.

Today, she didn’t go to watch the battle ball game with Athena and Kia. Instead, she returned to the Rainbow Valley through the garden’s space passage just to be in a daze.

(Without that guy, many experiments seem more difficult…)

(I really want to eat the fish soup he made…)

(I really want to hear those boring and nonsense stories…) (I miss that warm embrace…) (Hmph! Asshole man, he hasn’t seen me for almost 2 months, but he actually didn’t come back with Athena. He went to Mountain Xilang to meet some friends instead. I even happily greeted his return, but I was happy for nothing!) Just as Ms. Fairy Dragon was in a daze while thinking about how to fix a guy who placed more importance on friendship than romance, the crystal ball on the side began to emit a faint light suddenly. An intruder? Seeing the little red dot moving forward easily at an unimaginable speed in the magic circle and inscription, the eyes of Ms. Fairy Dragon suddenly lit up, and her heart began to throb violently. Her whole mental outlook completely changed.

(Asshole, are you finally willing to come back?) (You still have a bit of your conscience, coming to me first!) (You make me worry so much, I must punish you!) The little red dot suddenly slowed down as he seemed to encounter some obstruction, and he finally stopped. Ms. Zola showed a smug smile. That is the result of my recent runes experiment, 13 yuan inverted space. Even with this guy’s knowledge of ancient runes, he may not be able to crack it in a short period of time. (It’s the appetizer I’m giving you! If you can crack it in 10 minutes, I can consider forgiving you a little bit…) 10 minutes passed, and the little red dot did not move.

(I’ll give you the last 2 minutes…) (Just one last minute…) The red dot still didn’t move. Ms. Zola frowned. Something is wrong. What’s the problem? Or was he injured by the power of runes? I heard that he encountered a great danger of 3 Demon Overlords and the dark elemental army this time, but he finally escaped by luck. Could it be that he was injured at that time, and the old injuries have recurred now? Ms. Fairy Dragon’s mind became more complicated as she thought about it, and she could no longer take care of the so-called last time. She instantly left the laboratory.

In the area of the 13 yuan inverted space, she saw the familiar figure lying on the ground. His eyes were closed, and he seemed to have fainted.

Ms. Zola took a few steps forward cautiously, but the guy still didn’t respond. He also didn’t get up and hug her suddenly. It’s not like he’s pretending to pass out. Could it be that his old injury really recur? Zola’s heart suddenly tightened, and she hurriedly came to his side.

As Zola squatted down, the guy’s eyes suddenly opened, revealing a sly smile.

He’s really pretending to pass out! Damn!

Ms. Zola was furious, but she was already wrapped in his powerful arms, then her lips were sealed.

(Asshole, let me go!) (The last 10 seconds! Otherwise, I will turn you into a barbecue!)

One minute passed.

(I’ll give you the last 5 seconds!) 5 minutes had passed.

The passionate kiss was still in full swing, and a young lady’s mind was completely blank. She couldn’t think of the rice paste or barbecue. She was a little sober occasionally, and her thoughts changed, If you dare to let go of me, I will turn you into coke! After some time, the four lips slowly separated.

The punishment in Ms. Zola’s heart had long vanished into thin air, and she was tightly snuggled in his arms, feeling as if she was in the warmest place in the world.

There was no Demon Overlord powerhouse and no dragons, just a pair of happy man and woman.

“Zola.”

“ En. ”

“I miss you.”

“ En …”

“You know what, I have always been afraid of you, and I still do.”

“ Huh? ”

“Before this, I was afraid that you would really turn me into rice paste, coke or something, but now… I’m afraid that you will leave me.”

Although this sentence contained the typical sweet words used by men, it was reflective of the true feeling in his heart. Since that time, the terrifying experiment field of the Rainbow Valley had become a sweet gentle town.

The top powerhouse of the Demon Realm that even Paglio was afraid of was just his gentle little woman. Her gentleness was exclusive to him.

“ Oh. ”

Ms. Fairy Dragon replied dazedly, but her slightly squinted eyes couldn’t hide her happiness and joy.

“By the way, I brought you a gift.” Chen Rui lifted his body as he intended to sit up, but he was reluctant to move the Ms. Fairy Dragon who was lying on his body.

Ms. Fairy Dragon felt the hardness against her, and her heartbeat accelerated. She squeezed the thing lightly, bit her lip and said smugly, “Asshole who thinks with his lower body, is this considered a gift too?”

This action undoubtedly excited something even more, Chen Rui almost turned into a wolf immediately, but he finally resisted the impulse. He got to Zola’s ear and said 2 words.

“Silver box?” Zola was taken aback and sat up. Just now, she only had Chen Rui in her eyes, and she hadn’t noticed other matters at all. Now, she realized that not far from the 2 of them, there was a pool looming mist. To be precise, it was a stream of spring water.

The mist exuded a faint breath, giving the feeling of vitality in life.

“This is the Fountain of Vitality?” Zola approached and saw the silver box soaking in the spring water at a glance. Her spectacles suddenly glowed with a scorching light.

Chen Rui came to Zola’s back and touched her elastic buttocks. He laughed and said, “Beautiful lady, I would like to help you. I will help you to get it out now.”

“Don’t!” Zola ignored his joke, grabbed him, and said seriously, “Let’s store this box in the Fountain of Vitality for the time being. After I find the corresponding materials and make all the preparations, then only I can begin to experiment. You must not act rashly before this.”

Chen Rui asked curiously, “Back then, you and Paglio did not hesitate to fight the blue dragon and crystal dragon for the silver box. Later, Paglio was a step ahead to sneak-attack you and snatched it. He was searched by a Demi-God powerhouse and sealed. What is the mystery of this thing that makes all of you, the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and even the legendary Demi-God powerhouse, to fight against one another? I have opened it twice, and there seems to be a smaller box inside. It emits terrifying destructive breath, absorbs vitality, and seems to have a great suppressive effect on the royal family.”

Chen Rui opened the silver box in the treasure of Silent Night Wetland back then. The first time, he fell into Guradam’s tricks. Fortunately, he could escape because he was not a royal family. The second time was to suppress Broc and let Delia and Roman run away. After retrieving the silver box, he had not touched the mysterious box due to Paglio’s warning; it had been stored in the Fountain of Vitality in Mountain Xilang.

“You opened it before?! And even saw the small box?” Zola was taken aback, “You didn’t open the small box inside, right?”

“No,” Chen Rui shook his head. “When I opened it for the first time, I felt a terrifying destructive breath, and I almost died. Fortunately, the inheritance power of the grand master played a role, and I seemed to have absorbed a little of that breath. When I opened it again for the second time, I didn’t feel the destructive power anymore, but the suppression of the royal family still exists.”

The so-called absorption was the function of the Super System, and for some reason, that special destruction breath actually merged with the inner demon of the initial Alioth State. This gave birth to a more powerful and inextricable Shura, and it still existed in his consciousness till this day.

“Are you sure it is the destructive breath? And it was absorbed by the inheritance of the grand master?” Zola seemed contemplative, “In this way, the real power of the ancient grand master whom you inherit from may have reached God level… ”

God level? It is literally bullshit level?! Because Brother Sun does not exist in this realm at all, let alone inheritance. Chen Rui smiled bitterly and changed the topic, “Zola, can you tell me the real secret of the silver box?” “Fortunately you didn’t open the small box. Otherwise, even if you have the inheritance of the grand master, you will be unable to bear that power and be annihilated; that’s not an ordinary level of power,” Zola said solemnly, “A prohibited item is sealed in this silver box. Although this item is only a part of a whole, as long as one can unlock and understand the mystery in it, he will be able to glimpse God’s way, and even become one of the Gods!”

God? Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly widened. He finally understood why the 4 dragons of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, plus the Demi-God powerhouses, were all competing for this silver box. It turns out the item inside can actually make one become a God! God had an infinite life and power that was above everything. According to the Water Elemental King, all living creatures were nothing but toys in the eyes of the Gods.

So what if it is the Dark Elemental King and the powerhouse who sealed Paglio? Perhaps God can wipe them out with just one thought. If most Demi-God-level powerhouses were in legends, then God was equal to the supreme illusory existence. Chen Rui felt that the illusion that was originally high and distant suddenly became more realistic after hearing this amazing news; it seemed to be within his reach.

——In the Fountain of Vitality right in front; it was really within reach.

Chen Rui looked at the silver box and couldn’t help asking, “What is the sealed item in the small box?”

“It’s only one of the seven items. 7 pieces can be perfectly combined, even the Gods will be…” Zola suddenly paused, “You’re not strong enough at this stage, don’t ask too much and get distracted. First, concentrate on training to the Demon Overlord level. At that time, we will study this item together. The study of this item must use a lot of knowledge of ancient runes, and it takes a lot of time and effort. Based on my current knowledge of ancient runes, it is still not sufficient. I need to continue to study those stone slabs and make all preparations before we can start.”

Even the Gods will be… jealous? Or fearful? Although Chen Rui was curious, he knew that Zola was doing it for his own good. She didn’t want to affect his concentration in training, so he nodded immediately.

Zola glanced at Chen Rui with a faint gentleness in her eyes, “If there is a chance of success, I hope to join you to step into the God level, so that we can be together forever and ever.”

Chen Rui stared at the gentleness in the fairy dragon’s eyes, and a strong impulse suddenly surged. The two figures entangled together again and slowly fell to the ground.

“Then before that, you can accept another ‘gift’ that you want.” He was really going to be a wolf this time. His hands had “unknowingly” extended into her clothes, playing with the two plump and round things; The hardened lower part that was shamelessly pointing at her was even more high-spirited.

“I don’t want your damn gift…”

Even though she said that, the certain spot of her became wet and her breathing became hotter.

“ Hmph! You must be very happy to be alone with Athena this time…”

(Hehe, I will take all of you today, leaving nothing for Athena and Kia!) As Ms. Fairy Dragon thought to herself, her body was hot. She rolled over unceremoniously and straddled him, but she was turned over by the man who was unwilling to be at the bottom.

The 2 passionate men and women were tumbling and frolicking. Suddenly, there was a flash of light. Ms. Fairy Dragon, who was pressing on Chen Rui, suddenly reacted, “ Oh no! Teleportation point!”

The 2 felt a distortion of space at the same time. When they recovered, they had been teleported out of the Rainbow Valley and appeared in the courtyard of the sheriff and financial officer’s residence.

Around them were Athena, Kia, Paglio, and Roman. They seemed to have just returned from the game. They were staring dumbfoundedly at the disheveled “adulterers” who suddenly appeared in front of them.

By the way, it was the posture of the woman on top of the man now. The poison dragon and the nephew simultaneously showed weird expressions and looked at the guy who was pressed down. Their wretched eyes seemed to be gloating as they watched the poor boy who was raped by a female hooligan.

Even though Ms. Fairy Dragon had always pretended to be in a daze, she couldn’t help but blushed at this time. She disappeared instantly, leaving only the man with disheveled clothes.

Surrounded by the strange gaze, a guy with an arrow in his knee stood up pretending to be indifferent after a moment of embarrassment. He adjusted his wrinkled clothes and looked at the 2 moons in the sky covered by haze. It seemed like it was going to rain. (Acid rain?)

Chen Rui shrugged, and said shamelessly, “Everyone, the weather is good today, isn’t it?”

7 items again? Are there even 7 artifacts in the human world?

chapters.title: Chapter 426: Visit And Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 426: Visit And Request

Just as the situation in the Blue Lava Estate gradually stabilized, a piece of news came from the Red Spirit Estate.”

The Red Spirit Lord Josh, who was hit hard in the Dark Moon in the war of lords, suddenly started a battle. He subdued his son, Kanita, who attempted to murder him, and prevented a rebellion to seize power.

The Great Demon King Solana under Kanita, who had been recovering from his wounds, surrendered, Snowden died, and the rest of the party members surrendered. As for Kanita, Josh subdued him and controlled him with secret technique; he could no longer rebel.

This kind of killing and power struggle between father and son was not uncommon in the Demon Realm, but it was commendable that Josh could resist his son in this situation. No doubt, the older, the wiser.

In this incident, an unexpected person played a key role. It was Royce who was previously under Joseph’s command.

Royce was the heir of the Kunda Family, whose surname had been taken by Josh because his father, Khan, refused to hand over some treasures and was reduced to a slave by Josh. However, Royce actually endured the humiliation and was secretly ordered by Josh to spy by Joseph’s side. He had been monitoring Joseph’s actions and had the insight of all actions including Joseph’s whistleblowing to the capital. After Joseph’s collapse, Royce turned his side to Kanita, and he became the biggest contributor to Josh’s exposure of Kanita’s conspiracy.

Josh praised Royce for his contribution and named him the estate’s garrison guard deputy commander. The current commander was the subdued Kanita. The deputy commander Royce also had supervisory duties.

Not only that, Royce’s family members and descendants who lost their glory and became slaves were also pardoned and regained the Kunda surname. As for his illegitimate son, Ledo, who ratted and caused the destruction of his father and the entire Kunda Family; that was also Joseph’s “partner-in-crime”, was personally beheaded by Royce, who had become a Higher Demon.

After regaining power, Josh still used the name of recuperating his injuries to explain things in simple terms. Any matters were conveyed by Kanita or Royce. His occasional appearance revealed an ill look with severely reduced strength, but no one dared to underestimate this “seriously ill” old fox.

Some people even speculate that Josh, who had a scheming mind, used this kind of appearance so that the Dark Moon would overlook him, but he was secretly gathering his power to prepare for revenge.

As the first lord who actively responded and invested 1 billion black crystal coins at the lord meetings, Josh did not constantly ask the capital for the repayment of the fundraising funds like Kanita did. Instead, he showed a confident attitude towards the regent. He also did various propaganda to ask all estates to ignore the rumors and trust the promise of the regent. Such action had been highly appreciated by the capital.

However, in a sense, as time went by and the repayment date approached, this attitude of conviction was more terrible than direct reminders.

Chen Rui received the news in the Dark Shadow Empire because he was accompanying Shea to visit the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. Athena stayed in the Dark Moon this time. Zola, who got the silver box, was keener on studying the knowledge of the ancient runes slabs. She happened to preside over the Dark Moon with Krobelus. On the other hand, Alice went with her sister this time; this gave Kia the opportunity to accompany them.

(Little maid: Finally it’s my turn.) In order to get rid of the surveillance of the “Governance Association”, Paglio continued to accompany Chen Rui on the journey. Roman was forced to stay in the Dark Moon again for the simple reason that he lacked strength. However, under the guidance of Isabella, Roman was about to fully integrate the power of the evil eye tyrant. Once the integration completed, he could reach the Demon Emperor level. It was just that he relied on the power of his lifelong companion beast to reach the Demon Emperor level. Every step in the future would be quite difficult unless there was a miraculous encounter. This was equivalent to synchronous training of the lifelong companion beast and his body. The advantage was that his power would be better than opponents of the same level.

The Dark Moon’s friendly visit headed by Shea received the highest grade welcome and treatment in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. Since the cooperation between the 2 estates, the effect of land improvement in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate had been very obvious. There was a qualitative change in large areas of barren land, the crops could be planted smoothly, and the growth momentum was ideal. The residents of the estate all cheered joyfully.

In fact, in order to avoid exposing the secrets of magic dust, Old Gauss had developed a kind of magic fertilizer mixed with some dust. The formula of these fertilizers was extremely complex but it was for the purpose of concealing. Of course, it also had the effect of improving the land, but it was much inferior to the Dark Moon. In the Dark Moon’s secret food base, many top-quality plantations were made with Chen Rui’s refined magic dust in the Super System. The direct transformation effect was far more than that of ordinary magic dust.

Even so, it was enough to make the Dark Shadow Empire’s most barren estate, the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, had a complete turnaround. Chen Rui also fulfilled his promise to “Iciz” this time. He redesigned and planned the Bloody Vine Flower Estate City using the drawings provided by General Khan, including some special buildings and a magic water system. Of course, a considerable part of this “design” was copied from the floor plan of a familiar city in another world. These designs and plans amazed General Khan. The Bloody Vine Flower Estate probably would be greatly transformed in the next step.

The battle ball was naturally the most popular among the soldiers and civilians of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. The battle ball, which was once popular because of the rise of the Dark Moon, officially kicked off in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate now. The venue and the ball were of the most “authentic” specification. After the players and referees undergo professional training, they immediately gave people an amazing feeling.

The battle ball trend centered around the estate and quickly spread to the surrounding area. For this reason, Khan specially expanded the small arena of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate and added some temporary stadiums. Even so, it still could not meet the increasing demand. In Chen Rui’s blueprint for the future city of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, there were several stadium designs. Today was the third day of Shea’s visit to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. The most exciting battle ball game of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate was taking place at the arena. The Dark Moon’s Red Blood Team vs. Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s Wolf Fangs Team. General Crawford’s only son, Monroe, who used to study the battle ball at the Dark Moon and several accompanying learners appeared in the Wolf Fangs Team representing the Bloody Vine Flower Estate this time.

This was currently the strongest Higher Demon group. The Higher Demon’s competition was faster and more intense with relatively stronger control and technology. Of course, the magic circle of the stadium was also more restrictive. There would be no scenes that the audience couldn’t see clearly.

The friendly match was one of the exchanges of Shea’s visit. After the news spread, many capital fans, including some upper-class nobles, came to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate in advance, causing the local hotel to be almost full. The limited match tickets skyrocketed to a terrifying price.

A whistle sounded and the game started. Although there were several main players like Monroe, the game couldn’t be won by 1 or 2 people. Soon, the Red Blood Team of the Dark Moon had the upper hand. Whether it was individual or overall cooperation, their great strength amazed the audience. It turns out that the ball could still be played this way! As the birthplace of battle ball, it was reasonable for the Dark Moon to be superior in strength, but the audience of that Bloody Vine Flower Estate was still desperately cheering for their team. Even after the home team had lost 2 goals in a row, their enthusiasm did not dampen.

As a midfielder, Monroe shouted to remind his teammates while organizing an effective offense. He launched the most threatening defensive counterattack, but unfortunately, his teammate hit the goal post, and the audience suddenly bemoaned. The Dark Moon took the opportunity to counterattack and scored again. 3-0.

Monroe calmly organized his teammates to enhance compress the defense. After his tackle was successful, he drove the ball alone to surpass the opposing defenders. When several of the Dark Moon’s defenders quickly came back to cover the defense and pincered him, Monroe unexpectedly passed the ball to the teammate who got in. This time, his teammate lived up to Monroe’s pass and scored with a powerful shot.

In an instant, the entire arena was exhilarated. Almost all the audience cheered. Many people shouted the names of Monroe and the goal scorer. Some female fans even took off their shirts boldly to celebrate; the 2 bouncing balls became a beautiful sight in the arena. The fanaticism was no less than the fans in Chen Rui’s other world.

General Crawford nodded secretly as he watched. His eyes flashed with relief. There shouldn’t be much hope about the outcome of the game. The significance of the goal itself was actually limited. The calmness of his son in the field, his lack of greed for credits at the end, his trust in teammates and the teamwork spirit were commendable. If he was still the arrogant and prideful genius boy like before, Crawford would definitely not see this kind of situation. It seemed that he had indeed gained a lot in the past few months at the Dark Moon.

The game was finally over. The Dark Moon’s Red Blood Team intentionally gave some opportunities at the end, allowing the Wolf Fangs Team to score 2 more goals. The final result was still fixed at 7-3. Although their team lost, the audience of Bloody Vine Flower Estate was quite satisfied that they were able to score 3 times against the Dark Moon’s; they felt that it was a worthwhile trip. There would be a friendly match in the Intermediate Demon group tomorrow, and the excitement at that time could also be imagined.

A group of people returned to the lord’s mansion. Crawford specially invited Shea and Chen Rui to the council hall.

“Thanks to the Dark Moon players for bringing such a wonderful game to the people of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate.” Crawford said with a smile, “By the way, I specially invited a few royal chefs from the capital to the banquet tonight. Princess Shea and all the guests will taste the most delicious specialties of our Dark Shadow Empire.” Shea nodded politely, “Well, I look forward to it.”

“By the way, Your Highness has come to my Bloody Vine Flower Estate for 3 days and visited many places. Do you have any suggestions? Please don’t hesitate to advise.” Crawford said this, but he turned his gaze on that human financial officer. Princess Royal of the Dark Moon is indeed an excellent leader with talent and makes good use of people. The human financial officer is the most outstanding representative among the capable officers. Almost all of the Dark Moon’s economic development is due to his planning. “I don’t dare to advise. Chen Rui, if you have any ideas, you might as well share it.” Shea understood what Crawford meant and glanced at Chen Rui.

Seeing the expectant look of the 2 lords, Chen Rui smiled bitterly in his heart. I am just a crossover of another world. I’m a little clever at best. Most of the things are plagiarised. I’m definitely not the so-called capable officer. Okay, I’ll just keep plagiarising… “Actually, I have no good idea, but judging from the popularity of today’s event, the current battle ball has considerable influential power in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, even the surrounding estates and your empire capital are fascinated by it.

Then we might as well make the best out of this. We can use the battle ball to expand the influence of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. This influential power will drive rapid economic development. Didn’t the general notice that in the past few days of the game, people from all walks of life in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate seem to have benefited a lot?” “Sir Chen Rui’s meaning is to organize more games to promote economic development?” “It’s not about organizing more, but every game should be exciting. It can be a friendly match between civilians and the military, or contests between cities like ours today. When there are more cities with teams in the future, we can also host the most popular leagues, but it’s too early to talk about this now. What I mean is that you can now use the battle ball itself to increase considerable income. In addition to the income from tickets and gambling, you can also open a battle ball merchandise store.

Just before visiting your estate, the Dark Moon’s battle ball merchandise store has been completed and opened. It mainly sells team jerseys, team emblems, team flags, accessories, sculptures, and various cheering magic objects to all fans. We can also let the players who are loved by everyone to sign items and sell in limited quantities… This kind of battle ball merchandise store can be directly operated by the official or authorized to limited private chain stores. From the current situation of the Dark Shadow and Fallen Angel Empire, the popularity of battle ball is already a kind of trend. It is likely to spread to the entire Demon Realm in the future. I believe I don’t need to elaborate to the general about the direct income and huge economic benefits that will be brought by then.” Crawford listened carefully, and kept nodding. The secretary at the side was hastily recording. He showed admiration at the end and said, “If it weren’t for Princess Shea, I would like to win over Sir Chen Rui. Your Highness can have such internal talent, it is really enviable. Thank you sir for your valuable suggestions. I will start preparations for this battle ball merchandise store immediately!”

“General, you have overpraised me. Your courage is really admirable.” Chen Rui was a little embarrassed. I am just copying the ideas from the other world, it is indeed an exaggeration. The 2 parties exchanged some courtesies, then Crawford readily agreed to Shea’s various requests for further cooperation. After he gestured at the secretary, the secretary left with several officers.

Crawford seemed hesitant, “There is 1 more thing. It is a bit difficult to tell, but it is related to the most important interests of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, so I still plan to say it. Princess Royal Highness, please don’t hesitate to help.”

Shea and Chen Rui glanced at each other, and said together, “General, please go ahead. Whether it is the cooperative relationship between the 2 places or our personal friendship, I will try my best to help.”

“Your Highness, to be honest, at the north of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, there is a misty swamp in the Black Iron Mountain Range which stretches across the Dark Shadow Empire and Bloody Empire. There is a Crystal Valley in the swamp.” Chen Rui’s heart moved, and Crawford continued to say, “Under the Crystal Valley, there is a very large crystal ore vein. It was discovered only recently. This will become the most important resource of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate.”

Crystal ore vein? Shea was slightly intrigued. Crystal ore is the universal magic crystal coin of the Demon Realm. It can be used as general currency and high-end magic crystal material according to the purity. The mineral vein of crystal ore symbolizes abundant wealth. I never thought that there is actually a “large” crystal ore vein under the barren land like Bloody Vine Flower Estate! This crystal ore vein was the one Chen Rui told Catherine back then. He seemed to even cheated a kiss from the empress. However, crystal mine is the biggest secret of an estate and an important secret of the Dark Shadow Empire. Although the Dark Moon and Crawford have a close friendship now, he shouldn’t confide it. What is his request? Crawford sighed and said, “The devil fruit that Your Highness presented to me at the auction last time enabled me to finally break through the Demon Emperor intermediate stage after being stuck for many years. Moreover, my only son, Monroe, has made great progress in the Dark Moon thanks to Your Highness’ care. I’m a soldier, so I’m not good at expressing gratitude in words. I, Crawford. Tevez remembers this friendship of Your Highness. Crystal mine vein is one of the top secrets of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, and Her Majesty Catherine at the capital also attaches great importance to this resource. I have issued a military order to guarantee that the preliminary mining work will be completed within the specified time and hand in a certain amount of crystal ore. However, there are some difficulties in the mining process. If it cannot be solved, the empress request cannot be completed on time. According to the military order, I will resign from all posts in the estate and the military…”

Shea and Chen Rui were secretly surprised. Through this series of cooperation, Crawford was an important figure in the military. He had established a close friendship with the Dark Moon and Shea. Currently, he was the most suitable candidate for cooperation with the Dark Shadow Empire. Once he was forced to resign and someone else replaced him as the lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, perhaps unpredictable things would happen, which was naturally quite detrimental to the Dark Moon.

Shea nodded knowingly, “General, it’s only about our personal relationship now. If you need my help, just let me know.”

Crawford nodded, “Then I’ll make it clear. There seems to be a strange magic circle laid in the crystal mine vein, so we cannot mine it, and many miners have been lost. At that time, I sent many people to investigate, but we still couldn’t figure out the cause of it. Not long ago, I went to the capital to invite Master Rummenigge, my good friend at the Mechanic Association. However, after the master entered the crystal mine vein, he actually disappeared, and his whereabouts are still unknown. I can hardly tell his family about this. I am badly battered because of this crystal mine. I am really helpless, I wonder if Princess Royal Highness can find ways to help me?”

Chen Rui felt puzzled. By right, as one of the important bases of Bloodfall, Crystal Valley has completely collapsed after Catherine defeated the 3 Demon Overlords, so there should be no danger. Why is there such a strange incident? The Master Rummenigge mentioned by Crawford was Chen Rui’s old acquaintance. When Chen Rui was participating in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest as “Arthur”, he received a lot of care from Rummenigge. Rummenigge gave him basic mechanics books and a master-recommended badge to pass the preliminary contest. Later, Chen Rui was challenged by Master Leo during the contest. It was Master Rummenigge and Master Xhosa who came forward to thwart Leo’s challenge.

Even after Chen Rui officially became a mechanic master, Rummenigge took the initiative to give Chen Rui his time to study at the ancient magic tower.

Although Master Rummenigge also had the initial intention of drawing in talents for the Dark Shadow Empire, Chen Rui’s principle was to reciprocate kindness by folds. Rummenigge was missing in the crystal mine vein now, so Chen Rui should rescue him for both official and private reasons.

It seems like it’s time to revisit the old place, Crystal Valley. Who was setting up the magical circle there? Was Jacob sneaking back to his lair👀?

chapters.title: Chapter 427: The Little Secret In The Mind Of The Financial Officer
chapters.body:
Chapter 427: The Little Secret In The Mind Of The Financial Officer

Although Shea saw Chen Rui’s secret gesture, she did not immediately agree to Crawford but seemed contemplative instead- In terms of magic circles, only Chen Rui is the best at it, but the mineral veins of crystal mines is not trivial for an estate and even an empire. Moreover, it is directly linked to Crawford’s power and position. Crawford must have tried many times, and even invited the master of the capital. Finally, he made a request to the ally, Dark Moon, as a last resort. This crystal mine is likely to contain unknown great danger. Seeing that Shea did not say a word, Chen Rui took the initiative to speak, “Princess Royal, are you worried about the safety of the little princess after ‘that person’ leaves?”

Crawford quickly said, “Please be rest assured, this is the Dark Shadow Empire, the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. The empress also places great importance to this visit; even if there are Demon Overlord-level assassins coming, I can also protect the safety of the both Royal Highnesses.”

This implied that Empress Catherine had dispatched a Demon Overlord powerhouse to secretly monitor and protect the Bloody Vine Flower Estate. Therefore, even Obsidian or the people of Bloodfall would most probably not dare to cause trouble under their watch.

After Shea heard Chen Rui said so, she hesitated a while and finally nodded, “General is my friend and a friend of the Dark Moon people. I will definitely help you, but even a senior master like Master Rummenigge is missing. The problem of this crystal mine is not simple. We can guarantee to do our best. As for whether the problem can be solved, it depends on luck.”

Crawford seemed joyous, “Thank you, Your Highness! If you can help me solve this biggest problem… When Monroe returned, he once expressed to me that he wanted to officially join the Dark Moon legion with a personal identity. I will use the army’s resources to send a 1000-person magician guard team to accompany and protect Monroe by then.”

As soon as Crawford said so, Chen Rui and Shea’s eyes lit up at the same time.

The magician legion had a very powerful role in the battlefield. At present, the Dark Moon had 3 legions: Red Blood, Flame Light, and Moon Shadow, as well as the aerial legion of wyvern; only the magician legion was lacking. Although Shea had already made targeted efforts to recruit in this regard, the progress was far behind the ordinary troops.

Crawford’s meaning was obvious. The so-called guard team protection was actually to give the Dark Moon a 1000-person magician legion.

Sending out a 1000-person magician legion was a big deal, and it even exceeded the authority possessed by a lord. However, considering Crawford’s military status as the third general, he must have a special way. In any case, this sir general was planning to go all out now.

“We will surely do our best to not let the general down. That’s it then. I just received a message from Athena, and I need to go back to the Dark Moon to deal with some urgent matters. I will return to the Dark Moon secretly tomorrow morning, and invite a master to come here as well.”

Chen Rui had already planned to go to the Crystal Valley anyway. The so-called “that person” or “master” was simply a deception so that Crawford couldn’t figure out the reality of the Dark Moon. In fact, after the assassination of the last auction, the instantaneous killing of the 2 Demon Overlords had already made Crawford’s evaluation of the Dark Moon higher.

Shea understood what he meant. Since he was determined to take this trip, Chen Rui’s identity must disappear. She immediately followed up, “Then, let’s do it this way. By the way, General Crawford, I’m afraid our people will encounter some inconvenience when working in your estate…”

“This Bloody Vine Flower Estate magic badge represents the lord’s authorization which can provide a lot of convenience. The crystal mine has stopped mining and is heavily guarded now. If necessary, I can mobilize the army to assist.” Crawford handed over a magic badge which had the logo of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate.

Shea took the badge and nodded, “Then without further delay, I will go back now to arrange manpower and make some preparations.”

After Crawford sent Shea away, the doubts in his heart were revealed. In fact, he reported the difficulties of the crystal mine to the capital long ago. Catherine the Great attached great importance to it and sent an investigation team but to no avail. In contrast, more and more miners were missing. Later, he invited Master Rummenigge of the royal family, but Rummenigge disappeared strangely underground. Crawford immediately reported to the capital urgently. However, the strategist Catherine the Great did not send a new master, but she only gave a 6-word response.

Ask the Dark Moon for help.

Crawford felt unbelievable. The Dark Moon is just an estate after all. Can they solve the problem of an empire? Maybe Her Majesty empress has any special intentions? However, Crawford had always believed in Catherine the Great’s decision. Now that Shea has agreed, I’ll just wait and see the changes. There may be surprises. Shea and Chen Rui walked all the way out of the Lord’s Mansion. They got on the car, and returned to the house specially prepared by Crawford.

This was a luxurious mansion that was once the private property of a nobleman. Crawford purchased it and specially used it as a temporary residence for Shea and her people this time. It could be said to be a comprehensive etiquette.

“How much confidence do you have for the Crystal Valley trip this time?” Shea glanced at the lush flowers in the garden and asked faintly.

“I don’t know, I have to look at the situation there first.” Chen Rui shrugged habitually, “However, this is a 1000-person magician legion, and we can’t lose Crawford as an ally now. Even if I’m not sure, I will give it a try. I’ll leave early tomorrow morning.”

He only roughly mentioned about the Crystal Valley to Shea previously. Even Kia only knew that he could not save her mother, Freya, and escaped from the hands of the 3 Demon Overlords. After all, that “interesting” past involved Her Majesty of the Dark Shadow Empire.

“Then, let Paglio go with you.” Shea knew that Chen Rui had encountered a great danger in the Blue Lava Estate last time. After all, she would be more relieved if there was a peak stage of the Demon Overlord supporting him.

“There’s no need. Although Crawford said someone will secretly protect, it is not as reliable as our own people after all. Especially Alice, who likes to go out, must be secretly protected. I have been to the Crystal Valley, if there is danger, I will run away. It should be no problem. Paglio will stay with you temporarily. If there is any problem that can’t be solved, I will contact you in time.”

Shea was silent. Chen Rui knew she was worried about him, and he grinned, “At this time, as a lord, you should make a gesture of care and close concern to your subordinates. Let them feel touched to the extent of swearing to complete the task with the so-called full dedication till death.”

Shea glanced at him, “Then, I’ll just say as you wish… Value determines the meaning of existence, and your current value does not allow any accidents to happen.”

“This is too blunt, right?” Chen Rui was a little speechless, “If you didn’t win over your subordinates like this, you have to say something sensational at least…”

“Do you think it is necessary to say that to a wretched subordinate who often oversteps the rules?” Shea’s stern gaze turned to the paw that held her hand, and the owner of the paw was naturally the wretched subordinate.

Although her gaze was sharp, she did not withdraw her hand. The wretched subordinate knew in his heart and lamented, “Seriously, there must be danger in the crystal mine. Even the senior master of the Mechanic Association has disappeared. I actually have no expectation. But for the Dark Moon, for you, I must go. There is one more secret thing that I want to tell you before I leave.”

It seemed that there were many lies in this sentence. In fact, he already had to go for the sake of Master Rummenigge. However, when Shea and him first met, they started from such a “beautiful misunderstanding”.

Shea reminded herself that this guy might have a problem, but she involuntarily followed him for a few steps, and they came to the back of a tree. She was about to listen to his so-called secret, but this guy unexpectedly stepped forward and hugged her slim waist from behind. His whole body was very close.

“I wanted to hold my beloved Royal Highness outside like this a long time ago. This is the biggest secret in the mind of a little financial officer.”

“Asshole! What kind of secret is this?” Shea was shocked. This is not a secret room or even the Dark Moon Palace, but the Dark Shadow Empire! Although there are only 2 people now, there are maids and slaves not far away. This bastard is too daring! As she was struggling, she heard an annoying voice, “This is an absolute secret. Your Highness, be careful. It won’t be good if others discover us.”

Before she could break free, she shivered slightly when her white jade-like neck was kissed, then the guy kissed her earlobe, which was the sensitive zone of Princess Royal Highness, and her whole body suddenly softened.

The damn hands had reached the chest, wandering unscrupulously. He used a weird gesture to unbutton her bra. The white jade-like peaks became larger by the grasp of the man; the pink buds at the ends were also erected.

Sure enough, every good man had a pair of compassionate hands and superb massage techniques.

The roots of Shea’s ears were red, especially the intense exhilarating mentality that resembled an affair; it made her breathing more and more rapid.

At this moment, the little loli’s voice suddenly came from a distance, “Sister! Where are you?”

Shea woke up violently and pushed away the wretched subordinate with monstrous audacity.

Princess Royal Highness hurriedly sorted out her clothes, feeling a fire on her face. What happened to me? It would be troublesome if I were to be seen with him in such a place. After a while, the little loli and Kia appeared in front of Shea and Chen Rui.

Alice dressed up in fancy clothes and turned around, “Look at my new clothes! Is it pretty?”

The little loli bought a special costume from the Dark Shadow Empire. She even had a veil on her face which looked mysterious. Shea calmed her mind and nodded, “Not bad.”

The little loli looked at Chen Rui again. Someone who had molested her sister just now obviously felt guilty, but he was full of praise. Alice proudly struck a few poses and asked, “Sister, I heard from the maid that you came back early. Why couldn’t I find you just now?”

Before Shea spoke, Chen Rui spoke first, “As I plan to rush back to the Dark Moon tomorrow morning to deal with urgent matters, Princess Royal has confidential matters to tell me separately.”

As soon as Shea heard the word “confidential”, the scene of being hugged and kissed by him just now appeared in her mind; a blush flashed across her face. Alice pouted her lips in disappointment, “Why do you want to go back first?”

The little loli had been very excited previously, so she did not notice the strange expression of her sister, but the sharp-eyed little maid was different. She even carefully noticed the red mark on Princess Royal’s neck, then she looked at someone with a guilty heart. As someone who had prior experience, she suddenly understood something in her heart.

After the guy barely managed to deal with the little loli, he fled from Shea’s sight while pulling the little maid, but he was scratched severely by her nails. The little maid smiled and said, “Dear master, before you leave, should we discuss some… life secrets? If I am not satisfied, don’t you leave, okay?”

Chen Rui knew that the “confidential secret” had been revealed. Judging from the jealous smile of the little maid, if he didn’t make full dedication till death tonight, perhaps he really couldn’t leave.

chapters.title: Chapter 428: The Mystery Of The Crystal Mine
chapters.body:
Chapter 428: The Mystery Of The Crystal Mine

When Kia knew that Chen Rui was going to the Crystal Valley, she wanted to follow him to see where her mother died, but the Crystal Valley was obviously not safe now; Chen Rui barely managed to convince her.

Last time, Chen Rui cut off the spiritual link in Town Lupin and terminated the symbiotic contract with Paglio, but he adopted “cut” instead of “cancel”.

Cancellation implied elimination while cutting off implied retaining the attributes already obtained from the connection and forcibly cutting the link, but the cost was higher than the “cancel”. Chen Rui spent 1 million aura at the time to cut off the symbiotic contract.

It was not because he deliberately wanted to steal Paglio’s life, but because he spent hundreds of years in the training ground. He had far exceeded the lifespan of ordinary humans. If he cancelled, perhaps he would die out of lifespan depletion immediately; let alone cover Paglio and Athena to escape.

In this way, just like Manu last time, the characteristics provided by the symbiotic contract were preserved, including the powerful ability of mating. In fact, even if there was no power provided by the symbiotic contract, the wretched characteristics of the supplementary [Dual Training] of the Super System alone was enough for him to fight at another battlefield. Especially [Dual Training] could help to deal with the special Devour Physique of the succubus without Dark Will.

Early in the morning, Chen Rui sat up slowly, pulled the blanket, and covered Kia’s fair and attractive body.

Last night, the human spent all his effort on the little maid to get her to climax a few times; she almost enfeeble on the bed. Now, she was sleeping soundly.. He kissed the succubus’s forehead lightly, tiptoed up, got dressed, and walked out of the room.

The moment Chen Rui turned and walked out of the door, Kia’s beautiful eyes opened slightly as she watched his back disappeared quietly. The little maid understood that she was not strong enough, so she should not be a burden to him. The only thing that she could do now was to pray for him to come back safely.

Chen Rui bade farewell to Shea and her sister. He rode a wyvern and left the Bloody Vine Flower City straight away. He flew toward the Dark Moon at the south, but he actually detoured to the north. His destination was precisely the Black Iron Mountain Range at the north.

The rule of the contract was that the same contract could only be used once for the same object in a lifetime. Even if Paglio wanted to sign a symbiotic contract again, it wouldn’t work. Fortunately, there were other equality contracts. The quota of Chen Rui’s equality link was now 5. After re-signing a mutually beneficial equality link with Paglio, there were 4 remaining.

Since the temporary [Link Enhancement] effect was quite obvious, 2 of these 4 slots were given to Zola and Krobelus, who had the strongest combat effectiveness. 2 slots were temporarily vacant. Since Roman had signed some kind of spiritual contract with the lifelong companion beast, evil eye tyrant, he was unable to sign a second contract. Meanwhile, Delia, Athena and the others confessed that they were insufficient in combat power, so they did not want to waste the limited number of slots.

Chen Rui did not force them. His idea was to sign a contract with each of them when he had sufficient faith crystals. Then, he would use the [Star-level Enhancement] to permanently enhance their strength, but that price was not cheap. The first level of one-star enhancement alone required 100,000 faith crystals. It was completely different from the limited time [Link Enhancement] which required 100 crystals.

After Shura’s war faith was established, the generation speed of faith crystals really increased drastically. There were already more than 900 at present. It wouldn’t be long before he could test the strongest [Royal Star Transformation] skill.

The area of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate was very wide; it was only slightly smaller than the Dark Moon. Chen Rui was going to the northernmost of the Black Iron Mountain Range. Even though he was riding a wyvern, it took 5 days to reach the misty swamp where the Crystal Valley was located. This speed was already considered very fast. The last time when he followed Manu, they rode a mutated griffin which took 7 days.

As Crawford said, the area of the misty swamp was heavily guarded, and there were many protective magic circles, but this defense was specially for the “entrance” that Catherine forcefully opened previously. However, Chen Rui knew that there was also a special passage into the Crystal Valley through Dragon Inscription. No doubt, the hidden inscriptions were not destroyed, especially the 3-layer inscriptions in front of the waterhole. Through the transmission of the waterhole, Chen Rui successfully bypassed the defense forces and entered the Crystal Valley.

The scenery of the Crystal Valley was still breathtaking, but the original Devouring Hall, Nightmare Valley, Crystal Lair and other facilities were abandoned. Some had been transformed into mining facilities. Chen Rui reminiscenced the past where he became a spy in the Crystal Valley as if it was just yesterday. The death of Freya and Lafar had always been a pain in his heart.

Power. I still need stronger power to protect the people who are important to me. Chen Rui took a deep breath and turned his gaze to the entrance of the mine which was the former site of Crystal Lair where the crystal dragon Jacob was originally located. There was no one in the valley.

Chen Rui was still dressed in a cloak. He entered the mine and sneaked all the way under the lights of the mine according to the mining map provided by Crawford.

This underground mine was quite spacious and extended in all directions. It had the same style as Mountain Xilang. Strictly speaking, it was not built by Crawford or Catherine, but the original crystal dragon Jacob. Because the crystal dragon hadn’t been able to recover from the serious injuries caused by Paglio back then. Due to his special physique, the potion and the like had no effect. He needed to use the magic circle to absorb the power of the crystal to repair his body. However, before the poor crystal dragon fully recovered, he encountered another wretched Master Arthur. As a result, he was fortunate enough to have a friendly “match” with the Demon Realm’s first beauty.

As expected, the magic map was disrupted by some force and soon lost its function. Chen Rui continued to move on with the physical map provided by Crawford. Of course, this map also had considerable errors due to the illusion created by the interference of the magic circle, but Chen Rui was no longer a rookie in Mountain Xilang. He marked and corrected the map while venturing forward. Although this inch-by-inch search was slow and often led to a dead end, it could avoid errors to the greatest extent. The revised map was also of considerable value to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate.

Sure enough, after a while, Chen Rui keenly discovered the existence of the magic circle. Besides, it was also mixed with the breath of Dragon Inscription. Perhaps it was the trap left by the left by the crystal dragon at that time. It seemed that there was still a set of quite complicated traps.

It was not so easy to dispel Dragon Inscriptions. It was like mine clearance by engineers. Even with the corresponding knowledge and facilities, there was a great danger. With the help of the Super System, Chen Rui fully grasped Paglio’s knowledge. The crystal dragon also taught part of his own experience when he was at the Crystal Valley previously, and together with Zola’s wide inscription knowledge, Chen Rui’s current Dragon Inscription level even surpassed Paglio, second only to Zola. He didn’t spend a lot of time and effort to crack the inscriptions, but he cautiously detoured from the Dragon Inscriptions. He tried not to disturb or trigger those inscriptions just in case. Along the way, he searched for the whereabouts of Master Rummenigge.

About 3 hours later, Chen Rui finally figured out the pattern of the Dragon Inscriptions’ changes. It was indeed a large-scale and high-level inscription magic circle. He traced the origin step by step and approached the source carefully.

The scale of this mine was larger than Chen Rui imagined. It seemed endless. Besides, the topography and layout did not seem to be a mine, but a complicated and huge underground maze.

What surprised Chen Rui was that at a turning intersection after passing through several chain inscriptions, he actually felt the hint of ancient runes. He clearly knew that the crystal dragon was not familiar with ancient runes. When Jacob grabbed Zola’s stone slab back then, he just used the mysterious power of the stone slab to recover his injuries. Moreover, I have stolen the 6 stone slabs. With the level of the dragon, he is definitely unable to deploy this level of ancient runes. Could it be Bloodfall has an expert in this aspect?

Just as Chen Rui was surprised, he suddenly seemed vigilant; he hid in the shadows. Soon, a figure appeared in the faint light ahead.

The movement of this figure was a bit stiff, and the whole body was full of clear crystals, reflecting a strange light under the shine of the magic lamp.

Race: Crystal Man (Puppet). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C-. Physique: C, Strength: C, Spirit: F-, Agility: D-. Attribute: [Anti-Magic].

Demon King level… crystal man? This familiar crystal puppet made Chen Rui finally realize that the strange incidents that happened here were all caused by his “old friend”!

Although Chen Rui still had some doubts about the ancient runes, he didn’t think about it any more. He followed the crystal puppet all the way forward. The crystal puppet had no autonomous consciousness and only obeyed the master’s command. Despite having a certain sense of perception, it was still unable to sense the follower who had reached the Demon Emperor level.

As the light began to brighten, the crystal man came to a place and stopped. There were several identical crystal puppets inside. Many demons carried out the mined minerals from the surrounding mines from time to time.

These demons were sluggish and looked very tired. However, if they even paused slightly, they would be beaten or even killed by the crystal men. Judging from their attire, they should be miners who had disappeared from the previous mine. The role of the crystal puppets seemed to be to patrol and supervise them.

With a thought, Chen Rui approached them secretly. He turned into a miner’s attire calmly, then he walked forward in a magnificent manner. He took a basket of minerals and followed the miners to move forward.

The mined minerals were transported to a hall by the miners. The hall was surrounded by a circle of crystal puppets. It was tightly guarded. There was a portal or something like that at the front, and the minerals were poured into the portal.

There was a middle-aged man in his forties with extraordinary demeanour near the portal. He directed the miners to draw magic marks on the ground.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. This middle-aged man was one of his targets this time, Master Rummenigge!

The most dangerous place is the safest place? Did Jacob really return after the fall of Crystal Valley?

chapters.title: Chapter 429: Plan Set
chapters.body:
Chapter 429: Plan Set

While Master Rummenigge was setting up a magic circle, a miner suddenly attracted his attention. This miner did not draw the magic lines according to his instructions, but he was extremely skillful and produced another strange symbol. With Master Rummenigge’s eyesight, he actually couldn’t fully understand the meaning of it for a while. However, he was certain that its function was sound insulation.

Rummenigge knew there was something unusual, so he walked over calmly as he pretended to direct the miner. The surrounding crystal men had limited intelligence. They would only monitor the situation in the hall according to the order, so they did not notice anything unusual.

“Master, you can speak up now. Those crystal men can’t hear us for the time being, but you still need to act on the surface.” The miner was naturally Chen Rui’s disguise. As he was talking, he continued to squat down and pretend to draw magic patterns.

A surprised expression flashed in Rummenigge’s eyes, “You are…”

Of course, Chen Rui would not reveal the identity of “Arthur”. “I’m the person commissioned by General Crawford to save you. I must first thoroughly understand the specific situation here.”

Rummenigge was overjoyed, but he was also considered mature and experienced. He knew he needed to be calmer especially at this time. He still seemed to be instructing on the surface, as he replied, “I found a hidden magic circle while investigating the accident in the mining area. Then, while investigating deeply and trying to dispel it, I was captured by a terrifying powerhouse to this place. I was forced to complete the work of setting up the magic circle for him.”

“What does this powerhouse look like? What is the function of the magic circle here?” Chen Rui had already guessed a little bit, but he still asked in order to get confirmed news.

“The powerhouse is thin with white hair, but his strength is unfathomable. It is completely impossible for me with Demon King-level strength to resist him. Just a look in his eyes oppressed me and made me unable to move. He is currently in special training. You must be careful, if you are discovered, it will be over.” Rummenigge’s words also reminded this “ally” who came to his rescue. “If you are not confident, you must return and report to Crawford as soon as possible.”

Rummenigge actually knew very well that although the powerhouse said that he would be released when the work was completed, his fate by then was only to be killed. Now this person who had been sent here was his only hope of getting out, so they must be careful.

However, Rummenigge didn’t know that even if Crawford himself came here, it was still useless. That powerhouse was a powerful dragon at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord level strength!

When Chen Rui heard the appearance of the powerhouse, he was even more sure that it was the crystal dragon Jacob! The so-called most dangerous place is the safest place. I didn’t expect Jacob actually did a surprise comeback after being defeated. “The magic circle here is very profound. Even I don’t understand it very well. For example, the magic circle that is closely guarded by the crystal men leads to another cave. It seems to use the purest power of the underground crystal mine for some kind of training or recovery. The powerhouse will train for a period of time every day. Our current one is an extended one-way space transmission magic circle that continuously transports those high-purity crystal ores to a distant location. ”

Hearing Rummenigge’s words, Chen Rui finally confirmed the speculation in his mind. As expected, the crystal dragon Jacob is using the special power of these crystal mine resources to recover from the injury that was severely struck by Catherine last time. As for the one-way space transmission, it is obviously the greedy dragon’s habitual act of taking advantage of the opportunity to make money while healing his injuries. Due to Catherine’s deterrence, the Bloodfall force had abandoned the Crystal Valley. The crystal dragon’s recovery should be a personal act. Then the location of the transmission of the crystal should be Jacob’s private treasury or the location of the treasure. Jacob once killed the mad beast, Lafar, and Kia’s mother, Freya. Since I happen to be here at the right time, I must not let this enemy go. Chen Rui understood that he was not currently Jacob’s opponent. Even if he destroyed the recovery magic circle, he couldn’t really give Jacob a real fatal blow. Instead, he would alert the enemy. Although he was not the opponent of the crystal dragon, there was an “old friend” of the crystal dragon who should have enough power to defeat or even annihilate Jacob. Jacob was about to end his healing treatment now, and Paglio couldn’t come in such a short time, so he needed to be patient for the time being.

Chen Rui turned his mind quickly, and he already had an idea, “Master, can you please hold on for a while. At least a couple of days or several days. I must leave here first and go back to report to the top. I will save you when the time comes.”

This was exactly what Rummenigge hoped. The powerhouse’s strength was unpredictable. At least he had to successfully spread the news. Anyway, his work would take a long time to complete. He would be safe for the time being.

Before the crystal dragon awoke from the recovery magic circle, Chen Rui ended his brief meeting with Rummenigge. After changing his appearance several times, he left Jacob’s “domain” smoothly.

When returning to the intersection where Chen Rui met the crystal men, he once again felt the faint ancient runes breath, and could not help but be suspicious.

I didn’t sense this kind of breath in the secret mining area or hall just now. Obviously, it should have nothing to do with the crystal dragon. So, what is the source of the ancient runes power? Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He didn’t immediately return to the ground. Instead, he went in that direction. The terrain became more complicated as he went down. Without any lights, he could vaguely sense that this was a huge passage. Chen Rui was already certain that these were not made by the crystal dragon. In other words, the secret mining area temporarily established by the crystal dragon made use of the existing passage.

The faint ancient runes breath really began to become clearer. This kind of breath seemed to be more ancient and far better than the inscriptions that Zola had experimented with. With his current knowledge, he actually couldn’t distinguish the specific levels and attributes.

Could it be that some ancient treasures are hidden under this huge crystal vein? Or as Zola once said, 1 of the 7 things besides the silver box? Chen Rui was a little excited in his heart, but an unknown treasure was likely to come with unknown accidents or dangers. At present, he should solve the crystal dragon matter first.
