After all, Chen Rui had gone through so many incidents. After calming down and thinking about it, he suppressed his burning curiosity and impulsiveness; he didn’t continue to go any further. He turned back, bypassing the Dragon Inscription trap, and returned to the ground.

He did not need to ride the wyvern that would take about 5 days to return to the Bloody Vine Flower City. He could set 2 star points for the [Star Gate] now. Just in case, he had already set up a star point in the Bloody Vine Flower City. He only needed to go back to the Crystal Valley now to set up another one to realize the “two-way passage” so that he could go back and forth between the 2 places in the blink of an eye.

Of course, due to the upper limit of star points, he had cancelled the 2 star points originally set between the Dark Moon and the Red Spirit Estate.

The reason why he set up a star poin in the Red Spirit Estate was related to the disappearance of a slime. It was also the real inside story of Josh’s “unleashing his power” to stop Kanita’s rebellion.

The reason why he wanted to return to the Crystal Valley instead of the underground was to prevent alarming the crystal dragon or other accidents due to the automatic change feature of the Dragon Inscription. His purpose of returning to the Bloody Vine Flower City was to notify Paglio. Although Paglio couldn’t directly use the [Star Gate] to come here, with the flying power of dragons which was much faster than the wyvern, Paglio might only take a couple of days.

Before the poison dragon arrived, Chen Rui would not wait foolishly in the Crystal Valley. Instead, he had very important things to complete.

In the blink of an eye, 5 days had passed.

For dragons with a long life, these 5 days were just a blink of an eye, but the crystal dragon Jacob’s mood wasn’t very good during this period of time. Therefore, even he felt that time had slowed down.

The days of injury upon injury were naturally very unpleasurable. The crystal dragon’s physique was special and couldn’t use potions. He could only rely on the Fountain of Resurrection, the power of the crystal ore and the ancient runes stone slab to slowly recover. He was severely injured by the enemy 2,000 years ago. Just as his injury was about to heal, he was severely injured once again. The Fountain of Resurrection disappeared and the ancient runes slab was stolen. He was even forced to give up the Crystal Valley which he had managed for 2,000 years. The worst part was that he met the strongest woman in the Demon Realm at that time. He was actually defeated and fled despite fighting 3 vs 1. What’s more, his injuries were even more serious.

As dragons, the odd-tempered crystal dragon had always been arrogant and unkind. His interpersonal relationship in Bloodfall had been awful. When Jacob lost his base this time, he didn’t want to be like Azgalor, teaming up with those whom he disdained. Hence, he secretly came back. One reason was to use the power of crystal ore to heal his body, and the other was to gather the crystal ores madly. He used the transmission magic circle to transfer these wealth to his treasure hiding place.

Even if things were exposed and he had to leave, he could also use the massive crystal ores collected to treat his injuries in another place. It was a pity that after losing the ancient runes slab and Fountain of Resurrection, the progress of his injury recovery had been much slower. He did not know how long it would take to fully heal.

As the crystal dragon was absorbing the power of the crystal ore to heal his wounds in the Dragon Inscriptions, a crystal man suddenly reported: There seemed to be something wrong with the hall that transmitted the crystal ores.

Jacob frowned. Could it be Rummenigge playing tricks? I caught this ant when he touched my Dragon Inscription. Since he is a mechanic master, I spared his life temporarily and forced him to set up and expand the magic circle of transmission. This way, he can save me a lot of energy. Of course, as long as the transmission of crystal ore was almost completed in the future, the crystal dragon would not let Rummenigge live.

Jacob left the healing cave and went to the hall where the crystal ores were transported. He saw the entrance to the space that originally absorbed the crystal ore did not continue to absorb for some unknown reasons. Instead, it began to pour the crystal ore outwards.

The crystal puppet’s wisdom was limited, so they didn’t know what to do and just stood there blankly. Jacob was taken aback. He quickly stepped forward. He noticed that the magic circles around him were different at a glance. These magic circles were profound and mysterious. There seemed to be some Dragon Inscriptions, and the level was very high. Even Jacob who was proficient in this aspect had to look up to it.

Jacob’s facial expression suddenly changed. Even if he couldn’t understand the true meaning of these inscriptions or magic circles, he could guess that the original one-way transmission passage was changed to two-way! It was now in the state of flowing backwards to this hall. If this continued, not only those crystal mines, even the treasures he had accumulated so hard, would all flow backwards!

Wouldn’t this trigger Jacob even more?

chapters.title: Chapter 430: The Reunion Of “Old Friends” For Millennia
chapters.body:
Chapter 430: The Reunion Of “Old Friends” For Millennia

Jacob made a decisive move and punched the magic circle. However, under the punch of this Demon Overlord-level power, the magic circle only trembled slightly without destruction. Instead, due to this force, the speed of the crystal mine flowing out increased.

“Rummenigge!” Jacob gritted his teeth and yelled. A knife-like gaze glared at Rummenigge next to the magic circle. I didn’t think that this ant actually possessed such profound knowledge! However, the crystal dragon didn’t quite understand. This mechanic master is doing this kind of trick under my watch, is he courting death? If so, why did he succumb to my power in the first place? Rummenigge smiled slightly, appearing calm and composed, “What, Sir Jacob? Did you call me?”

The crystal dragon’s pupils shrank slightly, and his anger calmed down. This ant always called me sir, and he didn’t know my name. Why did he suddenly call out my real name? And that calm expression is not the temperament that an ant should have at all. Jacob was not a reckless person. He didn’t rush to stop the magic circle or make a move. He secretly ordered the crystal men to surround “Rummenigge”, “Who are you?”

“I was once a ‘friend of yours.’ However, compared with another ‘friend’, the relationship between you two is deeper.

“I don’t remember a friend like you.” Jacob snorted coldly. The crystal puppets suddenly made a move, and they all gathered around him. Before they got close, their bodies suddenly flashed in high speed like moving runes. When you look closely, countless sharp forces were making high-speed cutting.

In just a moment, not only the dozen or so crystal puppets that charged forward, but also all the nearby crystal men turned into scattered fragments at the same time. The miners who were close at hand escaped without any injuries. The whole hall was vacant in an instant. [True Destructive Aura Blow]~aoe attack. Within a radius of 30 meters, all hostile creatures are instantly cut half by the high-speed sword qi. Requires 1000 aura, and can exclude targets. Can only use it once an hour.

The speed of the crystal men was inferior, but their defense and magic defense were quite outstanding. Unexpectedly, they actually turned into powder in an instant. The crystal dragon’s eyes turned to the faintly radiant palm of “Rummenigge”. The fierceness in his gaze rose. I didn’t see how the opponent activated the special skill, but judging from the explosive power, he is only at the Demon Emperor level. Although Jacob sacrificed a large number of crystal puppets, he had already tested the opponent’s level of power. He was determined. He grinned and reached out to grab “Rummenigge”.

Suddenly, there was a strong warning sign in Jacob’s heart. His whole arm became crystal clear and transparent, and he used his full strength. At this moment, a hand appeared out of thin air and slightly shook the crystal clear palm which exuded terrifying breath. Almost at the same time, the whole hall seemed to shake.

Jacob retracted his arm and his crystal palm seemed to be trembling slightly. Not only was his arm trembling, when the crystal dragon’s disbelief gaze turned to the person who appeared beside “Rummenigge”, the corners of his eyes also began to twitch.

The man had jet-black hair and brown-yellow skin. He grinned and showed his sharp teeth.

“Why? Don’t you recognize your old friend?”

“Pa pa… Paglio!” Jacob’s trembling voice was mixed with hatred and fear. Rummenigge’s face also changed to a familiar face which greatly shocked the crystal dragon again, “You are… Arthur!”

If the person that the crystal dragon hated most was the Master “Arthur” who cheated him and stole the Fountain of Resurrection as well as the ancient runes slab, then the person he was most afraid of was the poison dragon Paglio who severely afflicted him on 2,000 years ago. His fear of Paglio was even more powerful than of Catherine the Great.

I didn’t expect these 2 people to appear in front of me at the same time today!

By the way, didn’t the madman named “Arthur” explode his heart for that woman… Wasn’t he dead? How come he appears in front of my eyes alive!

I remember that “Arthur” had revealed the hatred 2,000 years ago, and he even used Paglio’s name. It turns out that he is actually on the same side as the damn poison dragon!

“I want to see how much this crystal dragon, who will only run away, has grown 2,000 years later!”

Grow into your eggshell! Jacob stepped back slowly while cursing in his heart.

2,000 years ago, Paglio’s power was already beyond him, especially the terrifying power that blended with poison. He actually could destroy the crystal body that was not afraid of magic and negative states, not to mention that he had an old wound now plus the weak state of new injuries. Jacob’s strength did not increase but decreased instead. He was definitely not Paglio’s opponent.

“Want to run?” Paglio saw through Jacob’s intention at a glance, and he grinned. “You don’t want the treasures anymore?”

This sentence made Jacob’s footsteps pause. He almost vomited blood, and his eyes turned to the space entrance that continuously flowed out crystal ores. That space entrance flowed out not only crystal ore now, but also some black crystal coins and even the wealth and treasures toward the end. These were actually the accumulations of his years of hard work!

That “Arthur” waved his hands like he cast some space magic which instantly absorbed the massive treasures that flowed out. He was still making sarcastic remarks, “Paglio, it seems that his treasures are no less than yours. My space is going to be full again now; it’s really troublesome.”

Jacob shouted angrily and slammed his fist toward Chen Rui who was disguised as “Arthur”. However, a cloud of green smoke appeared instantly. The countless crystal light brought out by this punch in the air was quickly swallowed by the green smoke. Paglio’s voice sounded, “ Hey, remember to split it 50:50! Don’t swallow it all alone!”

Jacob tried to destroy the magic circle in the entire hall, but the magic circle seemed to be reinforced by a strange force. It was difficult to destroy in a short time. At this moment of distraction, Paglio’s punch had hit Jacob. This punch was even more powerful than 2,000 years ago. Especially when the chilling familiar poison invaded the crystal body, it caused considerable damage in an instant.

The pain was secondary. The key was that the crystal dragon was traumatized by the pursuit back then and almost lost his fighting spirit.

Although Jacob’s heart bleed as he watched his treasure being robbed by others openly, it was not as important as his life anyhow. The crystal dragon gritted his teeth and fled outward quickly, but Paglio did not stop him; he just followed behind him like a shadow.

Not long after, the crystal dragon escaped from the mine.

The purple moons were already in the sky at this time. Jacob flew into the night sky with a tap of his feet. His flying ability was slightly better than Paglio; it was the main reason why he could escape back then.

However, as soon as he was in the air, he immediately felt something was weird. According to his flying speed, he should have flown out a few kilometers at this moment, but the surrounding space actually seemed to move with him. This leap only freed up a distance of about 10 meters.

Jacob was taken aback. He leaped again into the air, but the result was still the same. The space around the Crystal Lair seemed to be set with a strange restraining power. The breath of this power made Jacob feel a little familiar. Before he could figure it out, Paglio’s attack arrived instantly. It was still that kind of fierce and unique attack method, but its power was even more strange and wild than 2,000 years ago. Not only was there a trace of thunder attribute from time to time, the speed that had always been Paglio’s shortcoming had actually increased a lot. Sometimes, there was a sudden boost in Paglio’s fist power which was difficult to resist.

In terms of power, although Jacob’s injury had not healed, the poison dragon had been sealed for 2,000 years. Despite the effects of the black potion, Paglio’s power was not as good as the normal growth rate. The difference between the 2 was not very large, but Jacob almost died in Paglio’s hands that year. Facing his old enemy again now, fear had greatly reduced his fighting spirit. In addition, the poison dragon was equipped with artifacts such as Overlord Armor and Thunderous Sound, so Jacob was suppressed at an absolute disadvantage for a time with almost no chance of fighting back.

“Bang!” Jacob was punched by Paglio, and he was blown away by the double damage attribute of Thunderous Sound. There were a lot of cracks in his crystal clear arms. When he approached the edge of that strange space, his flying speed slowed down again. It was like an endless quagmire.

This weird “quagmire” seemed to envelop the entire Crystal Lair area which prevented him from taking advantage of the speed to escape. Jacob finally remembered the breath of this weird space… it was actually quite similar as the power of those ancient runes slabs!

Could it be that madwoman? That’s not right! I heard that after Paglio and the madwoman teamed up to defeat Ranieri and I, they immediately turned against each other. The madwoman also hunted down the poison dragon. With the terrifying temperament of that woman, how could she join forces with Paglio again? However, besides that madwoman, who can lay down this kind of ancient runes power?

Nevertheless, Jacob couldn’t bother about it anymore. Facing the enemy, his life would be in danger if he was slightly careless. He immediately shouted, and all the cracks on his body healed. His original body appeared. This was a huge 10-meters long crystal dragon with a pair of wings on his back. His body was completely transparent, exuding magnificent power.

The crystal dragon shook his body, and the crystal light shone all over. Countless huge crystal pillars erupted out of the ground, refracting the moonlight into countless purple lights which looked mysterious and magnificent.

[Crystal Territory].

And it was the strongest territory activated in the dragon form!

Looking at this momentum, the crystal dragon was going to make a desperate move and go all out.

Paglio was waiting for this move and his body changed as well. He became a giant dragon whose size was larger than Jacob’s. His scales were tawny, with fin-like cheeks on both cheeks. There was a row of short horns on top of his head. He was equipped with a layer of black armor, and his dark golden snake eyes glowed with cold light.

The poison dragon screamed at the 2 moons in the sky, and the light of the 2 moons dimmed suddenly. A huge wisp of green mists shrouded all around. Even the moonlight refracted by the [Crystal Territory] turned monster green.

In the blink of an eye, the entire space became a world of water crystal pillars and highly poisonous mist.

Generally speaking, the powers of the territories interfere with each other. Many powerhouses’ usual fighting method was to enter the opponent’s territory. After finding out the flaws, one would burst out their own territory power in one fell swoop to corrode or disintegrate the opponent’s territory.

The poison dragon now directly activated his territory to confront the opponent head-on. It would consume more power, but once he won, he could cause more severe blows and damage to the crystal dragon. Facing the old enemy 2,000 years ago, Paglio was determined to win the battle today.

Maybe… Jacob still had the shot? Paglio was still recovering his strength…

chapters.title: Chapter 431: Flower
chapters.body:
Chapter 431: Flower

Outside the Crystal Valley, under the close protection of the army, Master Rummenigge looked at the changes in the sky in the distant valley. Like many soldiers, he couldn’t help to be surprised.

Even at this distance, when hearing the sound of interlaced screams coming from a distance, it still made people feel frightened. Those sensitive war horses seemed afraid. If they were not well-trained and under the soldiers’ control, they would’ve fled one after another.

In the distance, the purple light and green light were constantly changing. The ground was slightly trembling. Even the magic circle couldn’t hold it. One could imagine the intensity of the battle. But none of these troops acted rashly; they just stood by the defense line outside the Crystal Valley.

This was because when someone handed over Master Rummenigge to them a few days ago, the person had already shown the magic badge representing the Bloody Vine Flower Estate Lord. He ordered the army to protect the master and hold on to the position. No matter what happened, no action was allowed, and all outsiders were prohibited from entering or leaving, including Master Rummenigge himself.

In fact, what these troops saw was only the combat scene after the restrain of the ancient runes power. Of course, Chen Rui’s ancient rune power still had a considerable gap compared with Zola. If Zola set it, the effect would definitely be different, but the Dark Moon was too far away from the Crystal Valley. It would take too long to go back and forth, and the required time and material for Zola to build the space channel were quite complicated. Therefore, Chen Rui did not alarm the Ms. Fairy Dragon who was guarding the Dark Moon this time.

In the Crystal Valley, many of the crystal pillars that seemed to connect the sky and the ground had been broken; some of them were badly damaged. The crystal dragon was panting heavily. His huge body was full of cracks, and the crystal scales were scattered all over the ground.

Opposite him was Paglio in black armor, exuding green mist all over his body. Although he was also slightly panting, he was much more calm and relaxed. There were many scratches caused by the paws and teeth on the black armor, but it was not broken. Some bloodstains appear only in the insignificant parts that couldn’t be protected by the armor.

The translucent light blue snake eyes of the crystal dragon stared at the black armor on Paglio’s body. Since the dragons were mostly treasure collectors and connoisseurs, the crystal dragon could conclude that this armor was definitely not ordinary legendary grade equipment. It is not even the best elite legendary equipment. Could it be an artifact? It is at least a quasi-artifact? Most likely it is! This armor is unusually strong. It can cover his whole body after changing to the dragon form. The faint light that appears seems to have the special effect of weakening the enemy. Fortunately, the crystal body was immune to this hateful skill, otherwise Jacob’s injury would be more serious.

I haven’t seen him in 2,000 years, and this terrifying poison dragon actually got an armor artifact that dragons can wear! He’s stronger than me! His strange poison can restrain my crystal physique!

What’s more, he has an artifact! That’s too unfair! A strong sense of frustration surged in the crystal dragon’s heart. The poison dragon saw the chance, and his strong tail smashed the crystal dragon’s left wing to pieces. Under the strange force of the territory, the broken wing instantly recovered its skeleton form. It was recovering at a speed visible to the naked eye, but in return, those crystal pillars shattered into pieces. His territory power was suppressed to even lower. Many crystal pillars disintegrated into liquid due to the effect of the green mist, and the liquid quickly evaporated into a new mist that filled the entire space.

The sharp drop in territory power coupled with serious injuries made the crystal dragon staggering; he was almost unable to support it.

No way, if this continues, I will definitely be killed by the enemy!

At this point of time, I can only use that thing. Although I can’t control the true strength of that thing and will pay a considerable price, it is my only hope to knock down the opponent!

I do not care anymore!

The crystal dragon gritted his teeth and made up a certain determination.

Paglio had always had the upper hand. Just as he was feeling proud and about to take advantage of the victory to attack, he saw the crystal dragon’s pupils suddenly turn blood red. A dangerous warning suddenly appeared in his heart.

The poison dragon didn’t dare to let his guards down. He immediately gathered his strength and waited defensively. The crystal dragon spat out a round light red bead which instantly bloomed into a strange flower shape. Its color changed from light red to blood red, even the [Poison Territory] could not cover the light of the round bead.

The 2 moons seen in the space turned from the original alternate purple-green to a completely blood-red color due to the effect of the bead.

Under the moonlight, the strange red flowers suddenly split. A red mist with powerful breath covered the appearance of the crystal dragon’s body. He began to distort and swell rapidly, causing abnormal changes.

The crystal dragon’s entire body size had doubled. He appeared stronger, and he had 3 heads like a hydra with sharp and huge bone spurs all over his body. His body exuded strange flames from time to time. Wherever the flame went, it absorbed the green mist in the [Poison Territory].

The crystal dragon felt that his body was full of unprecedented berserk power. With a wave of his hand, the ground containing the power of ancient rune enchantment actually cracked. His confidence was immediately boosted, and he shouted furiously, “Paglio! Your death is near!”

Paglio had extremely rich combat experience. He saw that the crystal dragon’s state was different, so this should be the final killing move. There must be something wrong with it, otherwise the crystal dragon would use this power earlier on.

“Poor guy, it’s just not your own power.” Paglio said disdainfully as a psychological tactic.

“ Hmph! Didn’t you also rely on that artifact armor? Victory is the final decider!” Jacob’s voice also became hoarse and weird, revealing a strange feeling.

“Want to defeat me?” Paglio sneered, “Using this power that you can’t even control yourself?”

Jacob did not talk any more nonsense. The blood-red flame on his body was blazing, and he rushed toward Paglio. His speed was actually much faster than before, and his attack and defense power was also greatly improved. It seemed that the effect of this mutation was very obvious.

Paglio, with the help of “Thunderous Sound” and “Overlord Armor” artifacts, tried his best to withstand Jacob’s tremendous pressure. Although the previous situation was reversed, Paglio’s tight defense and long endurance made Jacob only occupy the upper hand, but he couldn’t turn the advantage into a victory for a while.

Although the scene remained stable, only the poison dragon himself, who encountered the huge pressure, understood that if it weren’t for Overlord Armor’s super defensive power and its magical attributes of weakening and absorbing damage, turning the damage into physical strength, he would have been crushed long ago with his own strength.

However, Jacob’s situation was definitely problematic. He might not last long, so Paglio must hold on to these waves of attacks. When the temporary mutated power was weakened, he could counterattack to control the enemy in one fell swoop.

It was just that Jacob’s mutated time and effect seemed to exceed Paglio’s expectations. The violent and manic power seemed inexhaustible. Not only the flame could swallow poison, but it also carried a strange damage. Fortunately, he had the protection of Overlord Armor. Otherwise, he had suffered serious injuries.

Paglio also noticed that when his [Poison Territory] was being swallowed, Jacob’s [Crystal Territory] was also automatically disintegrating. It seemed that there was some kind of incompatibility between this abnormal force and his body. Paglio couldn’t help but to wonder.

He immediately activated the originally converged [Overlord Armor Reduction] and punched toward Jacob. The Thunderous Sound’s additional attribute, [Thunder], appeared. Jacob’s movements suddenly stopped as though he was paralyzed by [Thunder]. Paglio followed up with 2 lightning-like punches and hit the same part. The crystal dragon groaned and staggered back. His body turned green as the flame became weaker; he returned to normal immediately afterwards.

Paglio was crystal clear: The red bead made Jacob’s power soar. My poisonous fist that used physical force to spread poison was unable to work because the force was weakened, but because of the conflict with his own attributes, Jacob’s crystal body lost its function. In other words, he lost his greatest advantage of immunity to magical powers. Therefore, he was affected by the [Overlord Armor Reduction], even ordinary [Thunder] and poison have also played miraculous effects. Thinking of this, Paglio immediately began to change his tactics. He removed his territory power. Instead of recklessly fighting, he focused on using poison. Together with the special effects of [Overlord Armor Reduction] and [Thunder] attack, he gradually turned the situation around.

The crystal dragon was also miserable at the moment. He had only tried a little of the red bead power previously and was secretly wary of the danger. It was the first time he activated the red bead in such a desperate effort now. Although the outburst of the strange power was above imagination and he gained the upper hand for a while, there was a strange power in the red bead that was seemingly trying to completely transform him into a creature without consciousness. This feeling caused the crystal dragon to panic.

It could be said that while Jacob was fighting against Paglio, he was also fighting with “himself”.

“ Boom! ” The distracted crystal dragon was hit by Paglio again, but Paglio was knocked back by a more manic force. The crystal dragon’s body twisted violently again as if it was going to expand again.

The crystal dragon roared almost miserably. His blood-colored eyes were full of sparkles. His swollen and distorted “flesh” as well as bone spurs actually escaped from his body. A flower shape with a red core faintly appeared. It was flashing turbulent light, then all these things burst open.

Paglio had a bad feeling when the red bead flashed rapidly. He instantly reverted to human form and crossed his hands in front of him defensively. However, this explosive force was extremely powerful. Although he transformed into human form to greatly reduce the area of impact, he still flew back due to the tremor.

Even the Crystal Lair area which was blocked by the power of ancient runes experienced violent shakes. Huge cracks visible to the naked eye appeared in the space.

In fact, Jacob himself was the most disadvantaged. Just now, at the verge of death, he tried his best to get rid of the control of the red bead and finally regained his sobriety. However, as he was closest to the explosion plus the poison’s dragon’s powerful attack previously, his injuries were extremely serious. In addition to some side effects of activating the red bead, he almost collapsed on the spot.

After all, the crystal dragon was the peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouse. He roared wildly, ignoring the abnormalities and injuries of his body. He used his last bit of strength to flap his wings and rushed out of the space crack. He broke free from the restrain of the ancient runes and flew all the way. He disappeared into the night sky in an instant.

After the explosion, Paglio cleared away the smoke and realized that Jacob was nowhere to be found. There were actually a series of tiny cracks on the Overlord Armor. He was shocked. Fortunately, this armor had a self-healing effect, but he couldn’t use it again in a short time.

In this battle, Jacob escaped again luckily, but he was severely injured. Judging from the abnormality of the red bead, it seemed that he would be subjected to some terrifying recoil. His combat power should be greatly reduced and he would not appear again for the time being.

The entire battle was more intense than Paglio expected. The one that impressed him the most was the red bead that could induce some kind of terrifying mutated power. What exactly is this thing? By the way, I wonder how the cunning human is progressing. Thinking of the crystal dragon’s wealth, the dragon’s eyes suddenly brightened. The pain and wound that he suffered just now became insignificant.

Paglio didn’t know that just when Jacob had an abnormal change, the space entrance of the underground hall had already completed the reverse transmission. In other words, Chen Rui had already received all the wealth of the crystal dragon. The tremendous amount of wealth was even more valuable than the treasure of Paglio in the Silent Night Wetland. After all, the poison dragon was 2,000 years behind the “collection” of wealth.

After Chen Rui informed Paglio that day, he disguised as Rummenigge and began to quietly lead the miners to transform the magic circle of the hall. To prevent being exposed, he did not use the Dragon Inscription, but he used ancient runes combined with magic circles. The crystal dragon obviously didn’t take an ant like “Rummenigge”to heart, so he didn’t even check it once.

Chen Rui wiped out the remaining crystal men, placed the miners in a safe cave, then he gradually eliminated the Dragon Inscriptions set by the crystal dragon. The battle above him was not something that he could intervene with his current strength. If he appeared rashly, he would become Paglio’s burden instead.

Just when he came to the road intersection where he first encountered the crystal men, he suddenly had a strong feeling in his heart. It seems that the breath of the ancient runes suddenly became 10 times more intense! No, not only the ancient runes, but also a special power breath which seems to be calling me faintly. Perhaps the target of this power was not him initially, but he clearly sensed this calling now, or maybe that power had already noticed Chen Rui.

Chen Rui subconsciously began to walk toward the passage below.

Along the way, he could feel the strange breath from time to time. It seemed to carry a strong tempting force. He came to a place subconsciously.

This place seemed to be in the underground of the crystal mine. It seemed to be a separate space that could be entered through a certain underground passage. If it was not for the breath of the ancient runes suddenly amplifying; if it was not for the temptation force, he probably could not enter this place even if he searched the entire underground.

He saw only blood red which was actually lava, but the color gave people a sense of horror as if it was a hot blood river.

The whole space was a volcanic cave. The blood-red heat distorted the scenery in sight, and there was boiling magma everywhere. A dangerous and narrow passage led to an unknown depth in front.

The terrifying heat forced Chen Rui to channel his power for protection. He was still sweating all over as if he was in the furnace of hell.

Chen Rui carefully stepped on the black rock under his feet and walked forward step by step. After walking for a long time, at a corner, he found that the magma actually had a special thing which was floating up and down. It actually did not melt as if it was generated from the magma.

This was a strange flower which was about the size of 2 fists. Unlike the blood-red lava, a more enchanting red exuded a strange beauty.

Magma flower?? Could it be the place where Jacob got the red bead?

chapters.title: Chapter 432: Mysterious! The Disappearing Blood Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 432: Mysterious! The Disappearing Blood Sea

After just glancing at the strange flower in the magma, Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly couldn’t move. In an instant, he felt that everything around him became quiet, and he could clearly hear some abnormal breathing sounds.

The terrifying heat, steaming magma, and unknown dangers were all put aside as if the focus of the entire space was on this strange flower.

Chen Rui felt that his mind was completely attracted by this weird flower. He knew that something was amiss. He wanted to distract himself to get rid of this attraction, but he was unable to extricate himself. Not only that, even his soul felt eager to get out of his body.

After all, Chen Rui had experienced the test of [Refined Mind]. He immediately focused his heart. Like a leaf in a huge wave, he let the weird and powerful spirit power surge while he just kept his sense of self intact. He drifted with the wind effortlessly. Although in the stormy sea, his will become more and more determined.

Just as he was about to get rid of the magical power of that flower, the surrounding temperature suddenly rose in the blink of an eye. The terrifying heat shrouded Chen Rui from all directions. The originally relatively calm magma actually rolled like a raging wave. When the boiling magma splashed Chen Rui’s body, some green smoke emerged. Fortunately, his body was protected by the Mystic Jade Armor; there were only minor burns on his arm. The heart-wrenching pain caused him to wake up suddenly. This is definitely not an illusion! A blue translucent protective shield immediately appeared around Chen Rui to block the attack of magma. He soared into the air and quickly flew back toward the way he came. However, the surrounding scenes seemed to have changed. He couldn’t see any way to get out. It was just an endless boiling sea of blood.

“ Ka! ” The protective shield cracked as it couldn’t stand the intangible heat, and it collapsed after only holding for 2 seconds. As soon as the protective shield was broken, Chen Rui immediately felt that there was an extra special breath amidst the terrifying high temperature, and it was getting more intense. The pressure it brought was beyond the temperature and damage of the magma.

Destruction. World Destruction. An endless and powerful breath of destruction. It’s like the Demi-God territory space that I faced in the Rainbow Valley last time.

But the 2 are somehow different. The most obvious aspect is that the breath of destruction blooming in the sea of blood in front is 100 times more intense than that of the space territory. Moreover, it is becoming more and more intense! Back then, it was just a trace of Demi-God territory power. How much is this power now…? Chen Rui didn’t have the time to think about it or even activate the [Star Gate]. In the next blink of an eye, he would be completely swallowed by this breath of destruction.

Chen Rui almost instinctively channeled a kind of power. To be precise, this was not a kind of power, but a special state combined with realization.

There was a sudden redness in his pupils. In an instant, he seemed to have become a part of the breath of destruction and blended into it. Although the surfy sea-like breath of destruction was extremely powerful that it could destroy everything in it, it could not destroy itself.

Not only that, the power of destruction of the sea of blood seemed to be affected by the power of destruction that Chen Rui “realized” at this time. All of them poured toward his body not in an invasive way, but gathering together as if his body was some kind of destructive origin.

The turbulent sea of blood power of destruction became much weaker under this incredible devour.

The influx of a large amount of breath of destruction made Chen Rui’s power breath seem to have changed. The red color in his pupils became darker.

At this moment, there seemed to be a pair of eyes in the power of destruction of the magma watching him. The intangible gaze actually affected Chen Rui’s mysterious state of mind at the moment. With a shiver in shock, the red in his eyes suddenly receded, and he instinctively recovered. He felt the breath of destruction around him weakened, but he didn’t dare to slow down. He immediately activated the [Star Gate]. A flashing blue light gate appeared. In the burst of sound of [Sonic Boom], Chen Rui’s figure disappeared instantly. The magma which was rushing toward him hit nothing. Somewhere deep in the endless, there seemed to be a low roar.

In the Crystal Valley, a door appeared in the air, and Chen Rui’s figure charged out. It was exactly the star point he set above the ground.

After gently landing on the ground, he recalled the treacherous scene just now. The feeling of finally being on the ground made him feel more at ease. Paglio’s voice came from the side, “ Hey , you came at the right time. Jacob’s treasures are all in hand right? Hurry up and divide the spoils!”

It turned out that when Chen Rui came out from the [Star Gate], it was when the poison dragon happened to kill the crystal dragon, but Paglio was still a little guilty. Master Poison Dragon used to guarantee could definitely take down Jacob as long as the human set up a magic circle to prevent the crystal dragon from escaping. Alas, he almost failed miserably in a very easy task at first, then let Jacob escape again. His bragging was considered meaningless.

Humans made mistakes, and so do dragons.

In any case, the success or failure was temporary, but the treasures were the most important things, and the division of spoils was beyond everything.

Chen Rui was in shock. How could he have the mood to think about those treasures? He was about to reply agitatedly, but he heard a hint of surprise in Paglio’s voice, “What is in your hand?”

Chen Rui glanced subconsciously. He didn’t know when he was holding something; a flower.

The material seemed to be a carved crystal rock, but it totally looked like it was formed naturally without a hint of craftsmanship, but the blood-red color gave people a more mysterious feeling.

Chen Rui’s facial expression suddenly changed. It is actually this flower! When… Paglio frowned. This flower seems to be similar to the one that Jacob just used… After discussing for a while, the 2 people finally understood the accidents that each of them encountered. They were a little more vigilant while looking at the flower.

It can induce a mutation in the powerhouse like the crystal dragon, and it also grows in some kind of lava that exudes terrifying power of destruction. It is definitely not an ordinary magic plant! Paglio didn’t have the mind to think about the treasures anymore, and he said in a deep thought, “The terrifying place you said is in this underground? Let’s go and find out now.”

Chen Rui thought for a while and nodded. Both of them were bold, but preparations were still needed. Chen Rui immediately sorted out 2 sets of equipment to increase fire defense and spirit power defense.

Matching equipment needed considerable knowledge. Not every equipment worn on the body could exert all the attributes. If it was not matched properly, it would limit each other and offset each other, as well as unable to exert its maximum ability. Fortunately, Overlord Armor and Mystic Jade Armor were both artifacts of the Super System, so they didn’t conflict with other equipment. Soon, the heavily armed Chen Rui and Paglio reappeared in the crystal mine vein.

“Strange, there should be an entrance here…” Chen Rui looked at the location of the ancient runes breath. It was originally a crossroad which led step by step downward to the mysterious “sea of blood”. However, the crossroad became a three-way road now, and the downward passage actually disappeared into thin air.

It was not blocked or collapsed, but it disappeared just like this. He couldn’t see the slightest artificial traces nor even feel the ancient runes breath. If it weren’t for the strange flower that was still stored in the storage warehouse, Chen Rui also thought that all he had experienced were hallucinations.

The poison dragon did not question Chen Rui’s memory, but he showed a dignified expression, “According to the encounter you said, I had already beaten Jacob on the ground at that time, but I didn’t feel any special feeling. What you entered should be an independent space. Even the path that has disappeared is also part of the space camouflage. If this space is controlled by people… and Jacob is mutated into that form because of the strange flower, then the strength of this person… is probably beyond the ordinary category.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. The “ordinary” category that poison dragon said refers to the highest level of power commonly recognized in the Demon Realm. In other words, this “person” who may manipulate the “sea of blood” space has surpassed the Demon Overlord level.

At least Demi-God? It’s like the powerhouse that sealed Paglio back then? Thinking of those eyes that once seeped into Chen Rui’s consciousness, he couldn’t help but shudder. Is it an illusion? Or… Or as Paglio said, the manipulator has some concerns. Otherwise, even if Paglio and I invaded the space, it will be difficult to escape. I remember the last time in the Rainbow Valley, I cannot use the [Star Gate] in the Demi-God territory. It was pure luck that I can get out this time. I believe that if I encounter it again, the other party will not give me a chance to replay the old trick.

But why did that flower end up in my hand? Chen Rui’s memory in this aspect was a bit vague. I only remembered vaguely that I absorbed the power of destruction and escaped. I don’t know if I picked it by myself or someone deliberately “give” it to me. As for Jacob who has been staying in the Crystal Valley for many years, he has been using the crystal mine to heal his injuries and enhance his strength. He probably got this flower from occasional opportunities. Judging from the fact that he built the Crystal Lair above the crystal mine, his encounter may be a little different from me. It was not so dangerous. Chen Rui put away his thoughts and returned to the ground with the poison dragon. Since this was the current situation, it made no sense for him and Paglio to continue exploring. Now that Jacob had escaped, even if the mysterious space opened an entrance again, ordinary miners would probably not be able to sense it. This crystal mine should be able to resume its normal operation, and Master Rummenigge could return safely. It was considered a successful completion of Crawford’s entrustment.

“I will first order the army to escort Master Rummenigge, then go north across the Black Iron Mountain Range to the Bloody Empire to find Fertile Yuan Soil.”

“Do you want me to accompany you?”

“No need. I still need you to continue to protect Shea, her sister and Kia secretly. By the way, you have vast knowledge. Do you have any special impressions of that strange flower?”

“The origin of the strange flower is very mysterious, and I have not seen it too. Why don’t you bring it back to your madwoman… Uh, Zola later to study it,” Paglio changed the term temporarily, “I’ll rush back to the Bloody Vine Flower City, but before that, we should also talk about that important matter.”

“Oh?” “Don’t show me that damn expression!” Master Poison Dragon was in a bad mood when he looked at this “inheritance” from a lady’s signature expression, “Could it be that you want to swallow the treasures alone?”

“ What? ” “Greedy guy, still pretend to be dumb. I will go all in with you!” As the poison dragon was about to pounce toward Chen Rui, he saw a crystal light flying in. It turned out to be a very delicate transparent crystal chandelier. With just a glimpse, the dragon who was proficient in evaluating treasures had recognized it. This lamp was made of precious snowflake crystal and was extremely valuable. The snowflake crystal was able to emit a soft light naturally. It could also help the training of spirit power, but the material of this crystal was very fragile and easy to break, so it was usually matched with a protection magic circle. However, the one in front of him obviously had no protection.

Master Poison Dragon was startled, and he hurriedly came to a stop. He hastily activated his power to stabilize the treasure that almost shattered to the ground, but another precious blood-stripe magic glass ball flew over at the same time. This item was as big as a battle ball and sturdier than the snowflake crystal. Although it wouldn’t break into pieces, from the perspective of the flawless appearance, the value would drop as long as there was one crack. Paglio hastily protected the blood-stripe magic glass ball with his other hand. Chen Rui took the opportunity to knock his head.

“ Hehe , Master Poison Dragon, do you want me to continue to “divide” to you?”

“You bastard, these are the noblest works of art! Do you know what it means to respect art?” The poison dragon put up the look like a supreme master of art. He showed his distressed expression as if Chen Rui threw over his direct relatives.

“You know art too?” Chen Rui glanced at Paglio with contempt. He knew very well that if he put a pile of black crystal coins with a pile of items that only had artistic value, this guy would not hesitate to convert to a supreme gold worshiper.

“Of course! Every dragon is the best art respecter… Hey! Don’t throw it anymore, that black jade statue is a priceless thing! If it breaks a little, even your head can compensate for its price!”

No doubt, he showed his true character so quickly. Chen Rui seemed to recall, “ Oh , I remember, Betty and their Government Association seem to say that men’s wealth must be turned over? Zola took a lot of treasures from me!”

Paglio’s face stagnated when he heard the words, and his hand to collect those treasures stopped again. Master Poison Dragon’s eyes rolled for a while, “Are we the best partners and friends?”

Chen Rui thought for a while and nodded, “Barely.”

“What do you mean barely? You feel very wronged is it?” Paglio rolled his eyes and changed to a self-proclaimed friendly smile, “We only defeated Jacob today. As for the treasure, it seems that we didn’t get anything?”

“Nope, it seems that the harvest this time is huge…”

Chen Rui casually said a few major treasures, making Paglio’s eyes glow. Paglio smiled and said, “Sly… uh, clever partner, you should understand what I mean. I don’t have that kind of storage capacity like you. Even my space ring will be checked by Little Betty normally. I’m considered the poorest dragon in the Demon Realm now. Men have to have some private space and… savings, don’t you think? At most, I will give you more hush money. ”

Chen Rui nodded, and uttered 2 words in the midst of Master Poison Dragon’s touching gaze, “3:7.”

“You damn vampire! You even dare to suck the blood of a dragon!” Paglio almost threw the crystal lamp in his hand to the ground, “I am the one who contributed today. 7:3 is a reasonable split?!”

“I think Ms. Betty will be very excited to get a huge amount of new wealth.”

“Shameless guy! I take a step back, 6:4. Nothing more!”

In the noise of the meaningless bargaining, the figures of the 2 partners gradually disappeared into the quiet night.

Wasn’t the Demi-God powerhouse deliberately giving Chen Rui a test?

chapters.title: Chapter 433: The First General
chapters.body:
Chapter 433: The First General

As Paglio watched Chen Rui riding the wyvern away, he took out a bottle of emerald jade wine and took a sip, pleasantly spitting out a breath of heat. Indeed, Little Betty’s wine is the best. The share of the spoils with a cunning vampire human was ultimately just a change of numbers. Anyway, the private savings of Master Poison Dragon was deposited with the vampire human, and he didn’t know if he could retrieve them by then.

However, these didn’t seem to be important. The important thing was that Master Paglio was no longer a lone dragon fighting now. There was a cunning human around him, Little Betty who was barely considered the main wife, and several other credible accomplices.

He felt that his life and memory in these tens of thousands of years had become particularly clear only within this 1 year or so, although all he saw at birth was eggshells.

By the way, I need to go back as soon as possible to protect that guy’s women. Paglio bottomed up the wine and rose into the air. The huge black shadow flapped its wings and became a small black spot in an instant, then he disappeared into the night.

Chen Rui rode the wyvern all the way under the guidance of the magic map. It took 4 full days to cross the Black Iron Mountain Range to reach the border of the Bloody Empire.

Despite being separated by the Black Iron Mountain Range, the Bloody Empire still built the Morro Fortress at the other end of the Black Iron Mountain Range. Perhaps it was a protection against the Dark Shadow Empire or other intentions.

Chen Rui passed the fortress smoothly as the mechanic apprentice “Richard”. Mechanics had badges that were all unique. It could show the name under the special inspection item of the Mechanic Association. It would be awful if he carelessly exposed the identity of the missing Demon Realm genius master, “Arthur”.

Chen Rui’s goal was what Earth Elemental King Moore said, Fertile Yuan Soil in Mountain Seckred in the far north. This treasure not only could help Moore advance to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but it was also one of the missing materials to make the artifact wand, “Secret Shadow”.

Secret Shadow could double the magic power of all elements, double the casting speed, and grant immunity to soul attacks. It also comes a [Limit Break Territory] that had a chance to ignore the opponent’s magic defense or immunity. It was truly the strongest weapon tailored for Zola.

However, the Dark Demons that infiltrated the Bloody Empire had not found the whereabouts of Mountain Seckred so far; it was as if no one knew about the mountain.

Of course… Dark Demon was just established for a short time. At present, the main focus was placed on the Fallen Angel Empire. Both manpower and strength in the other 2 empires were quite insufficient. They could only grasp some relatively ordinary news at most. There was no way to access some core confidential intel.

Now that Chen Rui came to the Bloody Empire, he naturally didn’t want to go back empty-handed… He thought for a while and decided to go to the Bloody Empire first to see if he could get any useful news. If there was no gain, it would not be too late to explore in the north direction..

Chen Rui came to a small town through Morro Fortress. He took a horse-drawn carriage all the way to the west and finally reached the necessary place to the capital after a few days: Town Essidor.

Town Essidor was originally unknown. After a war thousands of years ago, it became almost a household name in the Demon Realm.

At that time, the Bloody Empire Army of the Mammon Royal Family invaded the Wrath Empire of the Samael Royal Family. The army was invincible previously, but when they reached this tiny town that was in between the path to the capital, they encountered stubborn resistance that was dozens of times more than the previous fortress or city.

The first general of the Wrath Royal Family, Serei, led 10,000 old, weak, sick and disabled to miraculously block the onslaught of the 300,000 main force of the Bloody Empire. However, due to the lack of backup, the entire army was killed after 10 days.

Although the Bloody Empire Army conquered Town Essidor, it paid 4 times the price of the enemy. Then the Bloody Empire Army charged all the way and broke through the capital. The emperor burned himself to death. The Wrath Empire became history, but General Serei won the respect of everyone including the enemy. The Bloody Empire Lord even personally built a bronze statue for him.

To commemorate Serei’s bravery, later generations wrote the song, “Song of Essidor”, that had been circulated to this day. Last time, Athena sang this song to Chen Rui when they were facing a desperate situation in the Blue Lava Estate.

There was persistence and unyielding amidst the grief and desolation. This showed her state of mind at that time.

That scene, like the confession in the underground flames of Mountain Xilang, had been deeply engraved in Chen Rui’s heart. Athena was not as seductive and charming as Kia; not as strong and knowledgeable as Zola; and she did not have the beauty of Shea or Catherine, but there was no doubt that she was Athena; the one and only unique Athena. She was also the woman that he loved most.

Then, I shall continue to become stronger, not for power, not for fame and fortune, but to protect. Chen Rui took a deep breath, and his eyes became more determined.

The carriage did not directly reach the station, but it stopped at the entrance of the Town Essidor. The people in the carriage went down. It was not that the services were improper, but there was a large number of troops at the entrance of the town to check the population who entered the town. There were also several staff who were responsible for registration.

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. In the previous town and even fortress, there isn’t such strict checking. Could it be something that happened? It was his turn to be interrogated soon. The soldiers around were staring at him, and the lich registrant asked without raising his head, “Name, race, identity, destination.”

“Richard, Great Demon, mechanic apprentice, intends to go to the capital to test for mechanic qualifications.”

When the lich heard that he was going to take the mechanic test, he couldn’t help but raise his head and glanced at him more, “If you have nothing special to do here, it is best to go to the capital through Essidor as soon as possible.”

“Why?” Chen Rui asked curiously, but the lich waved his hand impatiently, motioning him to pass quickly.

Chen Rui felt suspicious. He followed the person in front of him all the way into Town Essidor.

He saw a huge bronze statue which was personally built by the Bloody Empire Lord at that time for Serei. Samael. The sculpture had a square face and a firm expression. He wore a broken armor, and he supported his body with a long and sharp sword. It was said that when General Serei died, this was his posture. A death with open eyes and in an upright stance. None of the soldiers of the Bloody Empire touched his body, they all detoured respectfully.

There were piles of fresh flowers in front of the statue today. It seemed that many people came to pay homage. There were plenty of people in the town. Moreover, Town Essidor’s guard force was several times larger than that of ordinary towns. Patrols move around from time to time.

Chen Rui wanted to find a bar to inquire about the news. Unexpectedly, all the bars in the town were closed. After spending a little money, he learned from an imp that today was the 2,370th year since the death of General Serei… also known as the Essidor Day.

Originally, this kind of death day did not require the army to make a big fuss, but since the Bloody Empire invaded and occupied the Wrath Empire, they encountered various resistant forces.

The Wrath Royal Family was the bravest and the best royal family in fighting of the Demon Realm. Although the emperor had fallen, they had never really succumbed. Especially on the death day of General Serei, many riots in the name of Serei caused a huge headache for the Bloody Empire. Every time during this day, the whole empire was under urgent martial law as the army interrogated and searched for suspicious people.

This situation was maintained until the current Bloody Empire Lord Raizen ascended the throne. Raizen also adopted brutal suppression from the beginning. It was Young Prince Teris who changed all of these. More than 100 years ago, Teris somehow actually convinced Raizen the Great to invite Gustav, the young patriarch of the Wrath Royal Family at that time, to be the first general of the empire. Raizen also named General Serei’s death day as the Essidor Day. Every 10 years, a memorial ceremony would be organized officially. Anyone was allowed to come to Town Essidor to mourn the hero general.

Sure enough, after coordinating with this conciliation policy, the turmoil of the Bloody Empire finally calmed down. Raizen the Great also showed extraordinary courage and entrusted Gustav with important tasks which made him the first general in a true sense.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. Teris’ means of “dispersing instead of blocking” was used effectively. Today happened to be the “official” memorial ceremony held every 10 years. No wonder there were so many troops to “maintain order”. As for the suspension of alcoholic beverages, firstly, it was to commemorate Serei, and secondly, it was to prevent drunk accidents.

At this moment, many people quickly gathered on the street. Chen Rui heard someone whisper, “General Gustav is here!”

The Wrath Royal Family, the first general of the Empire? Chen Rui curiously followed the crowd to the entrance of the town. He saw a tall and thin man in armor riding a black war horse. Under the escort by a small group of cavalry in red armor, he passed the checkpoint, then they all dismounted and walked in the direction of Serei’s statue.

Chen Rui’s eyesight was extraordinary. He had already seen Gustav’s appearance clearly. He had a long and thin body, high brow bones, and his facial features were as sharp as a knife, giving a sense of coldness.

It’s him! Chen Rui was taken aback. Gustav was none other than the Demon Overlord powerhouse next to the Bloody Empire’s Young Prince Teris at the Dark Moon auction last time!

At this time, Gustav had already walked toward this side. Many of the onlookers were from the Wrath Royal Family who came to attend the memorial ceremony. They bowed and saluted Gustav. Many of them followed Gustav’s guards and walked toward the statue.

Chen Rui’s mind moved, and he mixed amongst the crowd that was moving forward. In his mind, he always had a doubt, or it should be called speculation. Now, he could activate his [Analytical Eyes] to confirm it.

Gustav came to the bronze statue, stopped, took the fresh flowers from the hands of the guard, and placed it in front of the statue. Then he knelt down on one knee, closed his eyes, and many people behind followed suit. However, the guards didn’t stop these people who followed. Perhaps they were used to it.

Chen Rui slowly approached closer and squeezed into the front row of the crowd. He finally entered the effective range of the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Wrath Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A + (S). Physique: A (S), Strength: A + (S), Spirit: B (A), Agility: A (S).

[Analysis]: Fire attribute.

No doubt, the data was exactly identical.

This “exactly identical” person was the mysterious Demon Overlord powerhouse from Town Lupin in the Blue Lava Estate who almost killed Chen Rui, then gave Athena a pair of legendary grade wristbands- Bridget!

This may explain why Bridget “liked” Athena’s singing at the time.

The Song of Essidor. The first general of the Bloody Empire is actually from the Bloodfall! Water Elemental King Lambost once said that the sacrifice of so many lives in Town Lupin was not only for the recovery of Dark Elemental King Hegel, but also for someone who needed dark power to break through the bottleneck. Dark power… Dark mastery?

Also, breakthrough the bottleneck… devil fruit?

Looking at the Wrath Royal Family powerhouse, who once used the name “Bridget,” a new bold guess gradually became clear in Chen Rui’s mind. At this moment, Gustav had already finished his mourning. He stood up, and he suddenly looked back in the direction of Chen Rui. It seemed that this Demon Overlord powerhouse had keenly sensed the gaze behind him.

Chen Rui was taken aback. After determining the identity of “Bridget”, his gaze just now involuntarily carried a trace of hostility. Gustav actually discovered him among so many people. The opponent’s spirit power sensation is surprising. The [Analytical Eyes] shows that Gustav is a strength trainer, and his spirit power is only merely at the Demon Emperor level! Perhaps, this is not only the sensing of the spirit power, but also a kind of subtle instinct after experiencing numerous battles. He is really a difficult enemy to deal with.

With Gustav’s gaze, everyone around him immediately cast their gazes along. Soon, Chen Rui was “discovered” and became the focus of everyone’s attention.

A guard immediately caught Chen Rui over. Gustav took a look at Chen Rui, “Who are you?”

Although this voice was different from Bridget, the feeling made Chen Rui more certain. His voice can be changed with a certain skill or item just like masking the true face, but my intuition cannot be wrong. It is him! Chen Rui showed an extremely nervous look, “General forgive me! I’m a mechanic apprentice, and I was going to the capital to take the mechanics test. I happened to be here to mourn General Serei, and I was a little curious about the general…”

Gustav didn’t give him a chance to explain, and he said coldly, “Tell the people behind you, don’t affect my mood on this day, otherwise…”

Chen Rui only felt that the 2 sharp rays of light penetrated his entire being. He was indeed a little nervous. His heart immediately matched with the violent beating. It seemed that Gustav had misunderstood that he was some kind of watcher.

Perhaps the life of Gustav, the first general of the empire, was not as good as outsiders imagined. Chen Rui immediately lowered his head and did not speak again. This coincidentally diverted his gaze so as not to arouse suspicion.

Many contemptuous, angry, and hateful gazes around him immediately cast over him, making Chen Rui feel uncomfortable.

“Throw him out of the town,” Gustav gave an order to the guards, ignored Chen Rui, and continued to turn around to face the bronze statue.

The guard violently grabbed Chen Rui’s neck and dragged him toward the entrance of the town. Chen Rui naturally did not resist. He just lamented his unluckiness: I just came in from here and I was thrown out again. Why don’t you throw me toward the capital direction? After Chen Rui “landed” smoothly, singing sounded in the direction of the town. The tragic Song of Essidor echoed in the sky; it was utterly desolate.

Feeling the sorrowful atmosphere, Chen Rui’s heart was touched as if he was still in Town Lupin. He couldn’t help closing his eyes slowly just like Bridget did that day.

Teris must be the mastermind of the Bloodfall without doubt…

chapters.title: Chapter 434: New Test
chapters.body:
Chapter 434: New Test

Despite the misunderstanding interlude, Chen Rui almost became a public enemy. However, after the storm, the misunderstood “apprentice” finally passed through the Town Essidor and got on the carriage to the capital.

The journey along the way was the most boring, but since it was a horse-drawn carriage hired separately at the station, he was the only one in the carriage. Therefore, he could take advantage of this to enter the Super System for training.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, some changes had taken place in the Super System recently.

By just the look of some data, he should be happy.

Title: Star Lord; Evolution Level: Five-star; Experience Value: 1%

Aura Value: 26.3 million; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-

His experience value had risen by 1%. Don’t underestimate this 1% as it had always been zero. This represented that his “Phecda” had truly taken a crucial first step.

This 1% should appear after the battle between Paglio and the crystal dragon which was also after the sea of blood space incident. He did not train during this period of time. Could it be related to the realization of integrating with the power of destruction? Not only had his experience changed, the faith crystal in Tower of Faith had soared to more than 2,500. Before coming to the Bloody Empire, there were only more than 900. This increase was still rising. 1,000 faith crystals was sufficient to activate the five-star strongest combat technique [Royal Star Transformation]. When it reached 10,000, he could also use the spiritual link for permanent [Star-level Enhancement]. The growth of the faith crystals was a very gratifying phenomenon.

The reason for the rapid growth was because the population reproduction speed of the blue planet had been greatly accelerated. As the population had remarkably increased, the believers naturally increased greatly. The time of this solar system was different from the outer part. It felt like multiple times difference. Of course, it was relatively stable under normal circumstances. Only when Chen Rui’s perceptions and encounters undergo some abnormal changes would there be correspondingly greater changes.

The original 10 faiths were divided into 10 independent Pillars of Faith, but Chen Rui was shocked. Besides the pillar of war that Shura built, the new Pillars of Faith appeared like mushrooms after a rain: Wealth, lust, massacre, disaster, fear…

“Shura!” Chen Rui shouted angrily.

Shura’s figure was condensed in the Galaxy Divinity Temple. Chen Rui could feel that Shura’s seemed to have become a lot stronger. If there was any difference between that face that was exactly the same as Chen Rui, it was the blood color in the pupils. It was like… the sea of blood.

Chen Rui vaguely remembered when he blended with the “destruction” and absorbed its power in that strange space, he also seemed to have the similar pupils. This kind of temperament was not “seen” but “felt”.

Could it be …

“Like these Pillars of Faith?” Before he could speak, Shura’s voice had already sounded, “I know what you want to say… but these are not my masterpiece, but yours.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. Shura said, “The cause of the matter was the powerful breath that you swallowed that day. As you can see, my strength has also increased. As for these Pillars of Faith… Their appearance is a matter of time, but it is accelerated by this breath. Just like this planet illuminated by the sun’s rays, the front is bright and the back is dark. No matter which path it rotates to, it cannot avoid this.”

As Shura said, there was a sudden pause with a weird smile, “Do you want to be a god?”

“What do you mean?” Chen Rui frowned.

“You can eliminate all the faiths you don’t like from the source of faith, and turn these lives into puppets and toys that only live according to your will and provide a source of faith. Just like those living creatures in the [Kingdom of God]. These are some things I remember recently.” Shura pointed to his head, and his weird smile widened.

Chen Rui thought of the Water Elemental King’s words, “All lives are just toys in the eyes of the gods” and remained silent. He replied after a long while, “I want to have the power equivalent to god to protect the things I cherish, not to play with the will of all creatures arbitrarily.”

“According to the words in your memory, if you want to be a bitch, don’t even think about setting up a memorial to your chastity(meaning that if you want power, then don’t act like a saint!” Shura guffawed with disdain and ridicule.

Chen Rui calmed down. He looked directly at the other “self” and asked, “You seem like… you really want me to erase these sources of belief?”

“Very keen insight.” Shura did not conceal it and nodded, “I’ll simply tell you that the Tower of Faith represents some kind of mysterious supreme rule. Every time you erase a belief, you take a step in the direction I hope. It is equivalent to one step closer in the shortcut to the peak of power. As long as you go step by step like this, it will not take long before you can truly stand on the peak and look down at everything just like how you’re standing like this at the Galaxy Divinity Temple now!”

It turns out that there are such consequences. It seems that I cannot rashly move the faiths in the source of faith, otherwise I will easily lose myself. Chen Rui shook his head resolutely and said quickly and precisely, “I will definitely stand on top of the real peak stage, but I will go my own way.”

“Stupid! The world’s roads all lead to the same destination. You’re just stubbornly trying to detour like this.”

“It’s useless. No matter how you say it, you can’t shake my heart.” Chen Rui suddenly smiled, “I’m thinking that the only reason you want me to go according to your planned path is to hope that I will lose my heart step by step. If I keep holding on to my heart, does it mean that you will eventually fail and disappear completely?”

“ Hmph! ” Shura’s facial expression became gloomy, and a cold glow appeared in his red pupils, “Trying to act like a smart guy! Let me tell you, you have no choice. If you erase these dark faiths, then I will use the power of law to occupy your mind and soul step by step; but if you don’t, my power will also become stronger and stronger due to the dark faiths!”

Chen Rui remained silent. Shura’s voice became more and more manic, “It may not be long before the dark power will completely cover the entire solar system, then everything will be wiped out in the destruction.

Just like that Norse myth, “Twilight of the Gods”, in your memory.”

Chen Rui frowned even more. Twilight of the Gods is Norse’s most famous myth. Not only was the human world destroyed, but all the gods and their homes were also completely destroyed in this tragic and cruel war. The burning of the world tree even destroyed the entire universe. It was not until a long time later that a new order would begin to reestablish with the rebirth of the world tree. Chen Rui couldn’t help but ask, “Why destroy everything? Isn’t your purpose to occupy my will or the entire Galaxy Divinity Temple?”

“Occupy your will… is also for the destruction of not only this Super System, but also the outside world… This is the meaning of my existence….” In the laughter, Shura’s shadow became thinner and thinner, and he eventually disappeared.

Chen Rui seemed to realize something. He took a deep breath and exhaled slowly… I didn’t expect the experience in the sea of blood space would actually become a new huge test. Shura is by no means an alarmist. Furthermore, even if I did not swallow the horrifying breath, this day will come sooner or later as long as Shura does not really disappear.

[Refined Mind]. It’s still [Refined Mind]. It has nothing to do with realm and strength, but my own internal war. This time Chen Rui did not hesitate or linger… Human growth is originally a process of constantly fighting with oneself. Maybe this kind of battle with myself will go on for life, but after this “war” is over, there should be a real resolve between Shura and me. This is also the last battle with Shura. Chen Rui thought of the strange flower obtained at the sea of blood. With a shift of mind, he moved into the Galaxy Garden.

This kind of strange flower should have powerful energy. Why don’t I try to plant it in the Galaxy Garden? However, when Chen Rui put the sea of blood flower (temporary name) into the Galaxy Garden, there was no prompt about the new plant discovery. Instead, another prompt appeared: “Unidentified erosion energy found… If you plant it forcibly, it can cause bad effects to the existing plants in the garden, especially the aura fruit plants… In severe cases, it can cause yield reduction or withering and death.”

Erosion energy? Chen Rui was surprised. This sea of blood flower may be similar to the realm king fruit. It is not a real plant, but its attributes are quite strange. It can actually affect the aura fruit. Aura was the basic power of the Super System, so it was very important. Besides, if the sea of blood flower couldn’t be planted, there was no point in putting it in the Galaxy Garden. So, Chen Rui put the sea of blood flower back into the storage warehouse immediately. The storage warehouse was amazing; all different types of items were separated by special spaces. It couldn’t affect other items.

Chen Rui didn’t care about this mystical strange flower anymore. He entered the training ground and started a long training session.

After several days of rushing, the carriage reached the destination this time, the Bloody Empire.

If only 1 word was used to briefly describe the 3 capitals, the Fallen Angel Capital could be described as “solemn”; the Dark Shadow Empire could be described as “prosperous”; then the Bloody Empire in front was “somber.” Although there were no iconic buildings such as the huge fallen angel statue in the Fallen Angel Capital, one could feel the cold deterring temperament from the blood-red wall alone.

The Criminal Law of the Bloody Empire was the harshest compared to the other 2 empires: Those who disturb the law and order, die; those who go against superiors, die; those who do not respect superiors, die…

Despite the cruel punishment, except for some previous Samael Royal Family rebellions, the commoners were basically relatively safe and guarded. They dare not make any changes or resistance. After a long time, they became accustomed to it.

The Demon Realm’s respect for power was the deterrence of the top powerhouses.

Since the death of the Lord of Midnight Sun 300 years ago, the original candidate for the top powerhouse was still quite controversial. Raizen summoned various peak stage powerhouses to hold a martial arts conference, and he had 7 consecutive victories. He killed 4 of the same level Demon Overlords, making all the powerhouses feel deterred. Then only he became the top powerhouse of the Demon Realm after Lord of Midnight Sun without any criticism.

Chen Rui asked all the way and found a “Tess Hotel” in the southern part of the city. The proprietress, Tess, was a charming and plump succubus. After receiving the purple crystal coin from Chen Rui and a few chats, she immediately took him to choose a room. She was so close as if her whole person was going to stick to his body.

This hotel was actually the base of the Dark Demon, and the person in charge was this succubus, Tess.

Chen Rui chose a secluded room, and Tess followed him in. However, she put aside her flattery and respectfully saluted. Among the purple crystal coins passed by Chen Rui just now, there was a special mark that could only be recognized by the Dark Demon members. In addition to the incision in the dialogue, the succubus had verified the identity of this “little apprentice”.

“No news about Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil?”

“Yes, sir.” Tess lowered her head in shame as if she was waiting for punishment. Although she didn’t know the identity of this person, she could only be “absolute obedience” for someone who could come up with that kind of mark.

Chen Rui was also mentally prepared for this. He shook his head and said, “Don’t be impatient, the Dark Demon is only in the initial stage now. Build a steady foundation first and slowly stand on the heels. By the way, has there been anything special occurring in the capital recently?”

“There are 2 news. The first one was that Second Prince Edmund was assassinated the day before yesterday, and the assassin failed and escaped…” Tess saw that the man did not blame her, so she cheered up and spoke gently.

The Bloody Empire had always admired martial art, advocating the supremacy of the powerhouses. The first heir of the royal family was called the great prince, but it was not fixed. Instead, several princes would fight each other to select a new “great prince” every once in a while.

There were many powerful and talented princes in the Bloody Empire. The 2 most promising to succeed to the throne were Aleus and Edmund.

Edmund was Aleus’ elder brother according to his age, but the rule of the Bloody Empire was that the winner takes all. Since Aleus first broke through to the Demon Overlord realm and defeated Edmund in a battle, Edmund had to respect and call Aleus as the great brother.

Just a year ago, Edmund suddenly “strengthened” and advanced to the Demon Overlord in one fell swoop. This narrowed the distance between the 2 once again. Next year was the time to battle again to rearrange the ranking, so Aleus and Edmund had been fighting continuously in secret. When Edmund was suddenly assassinated, people couldn’t help but doubt the direct beneficiary, Aleus.

Chen Rui secretly thought: There are not many Demon Overlord powerhouses in the Fallen Angel Empire, but most of them are members of the elder families. Therefore, to a certain extent, the unjustified Regent Obsidian still has to respect the elder families. Although I am not clear about the situation in the Dark Shadow Empire, the Dark Shadow Empire almost completely lost its elite during the royal rebellion. The entire Asmodeus Royal Family is basically supported by Catherine alone now. However in the Bloody Empire, two princes alone are already at the strength of Demon Overlord level, and the rest of the princes are also very talented, let alone the top powerhouse emperor. According to the development of this structural level, the Bloody Empire will be an insurmountable power for quite some time in the future. Tess’ second news was that the prestigious and respected empire general, Bubowa, had passed away. Adelaide from the royal family and Gordon, Bubowa’s lieutenant, would compete for the vacant third general position.

The Bloody Empire Lord Raizen would witness these 2 people in the center of the capital’s martial arts field tomorrow night. They would compete for the position of general in front of all the audience.

Chen Rui nodded slightly. In any case, I should watch the battle even if it is just to take a look at Raizen who may be my strongest enemy in the future.

Just as Shura said, everything has two sides 🎭. He will never leave…

chapters.title: Chapter 435: Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 435: Competition

The training field of the Bloody Empire was actually an arena, but it was much larger than the ancient arena of the Dark Moon.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, 4 huge magic crystal screens were actually hung around the training field. They could show the battle in the field from 4 angles.

Live TV broadcast? When Chen Rui just saw the 4 magic crystal screens, the first idea that came to his mind was that he met a fellow crossover. However, he quickly rejected this idea himself because these 4 screens were the very common magic circle, [Mirror Image], and there was no sound. The principle was similar to the recording stone, but there were no more “modern” elements.
