Since the number of faith crystals had reached 6,000, it was enough to activate the 5-star skill that he had never tried.

[Royal Star Transformation] (active skill): Powerful combat form transformation. There was a time limit; The specific form was unknown. Required 100,000 aura value and 1,000 faith crystals.

Since it was “powerful combat form transformation,” the power must be above the 4-star [Scorching Dragon Possession].

Adelaide had used the strongest [Black Evil Territory] power as he secretly estimated that he should be able to catch this opponent of the early stage of the Demon Emperor in a few minutes regardless how difficult it was. However, a faint sense of crisis rose in his heart.

He never expected that with such a big difference in strength between them, he would still have such a sense of crisis even when he had gone all out!

Adelaide had gone through many battles. He did not ignore this sense of crisis because of the weak opponent’s strength. Without any hesitation at the moment, he maximized his territory power. The steaming black evil power appeared on his fist as he attacked Chen Rui with all his strength.

At this moment, Adelaide saw the light. The star-like light flashed on the enemy’s body and became more and more dazzling. It even covered the [Black Evil Territory]. If it weren’t for the general mansion’s magic circles shielding, perhaps the brilliant light would have penetrated through the territory and shone through the night. The people in this area would be able to see the extreme brilliance of the light.

In the general’s mansion, some of the dark guards who had retreated to the distance saw this light which penetrated part of the magic circles. However, due to the isolation of the magic circles, they could not hear any sound. Furthermore, Adelaide had previously given his order, so no one violated the command to approach.

The sense of crisis in Adelaide’s heart became stronger and stronger. His eyes were dazzled, and he could only rely on his feeling to madly attack the source of the light. It felt like his fist was hitting on some kind of external expanding energy. He was unable to hit the enemy within.

The expansion of the terrifying energy became more intense. Adelaide felt a near-irresistible force oncoming. His whole body suddenly lost its balance and flew backward. He barely managed to stabilize himself using the territory power.

At this time, the bright light finally began to converge. The figure in it gradually became clear.

This was a complete and gorgeous set of armor, suit, helmet, mask, boots, wristband gloves, and so on.

There were hardly any adjectives that could accurately describe the magnificent, elegant, and dignified of the blue, white, and gold armor set… Perhaps in the end, it could only be expressed with the word “perfect”.

Chen Rui looked at the armor that appeared on his body in surprise. He could hardly feel the weight of the armor that flashed with a little stardust-like glow, but he felt merged with it. It was not simply an artifact or armor, but a form which perfectly integrated and qualitatively changed his Star Power, strength, will, and even the attributes of the items originally equipped on his body.

It was not the same as the manic and violent [Scorching Dragon Possession] at all, but it was a kind of tranquility with infinite splendor. It could be as beautiful and silent as a starry sky, and it could also burst out the super new star explosion that was gorgeous and dazzling bright.

Compared with the simple yet splendid appearance of the armor, Chen Rui was even more surprised that the power flowing in his body was no longer a human body circulation, but the real galaxy territory. It was just like the Super System’s galaxies in motion.

This is the [Royal Star Transformation]? Adelaide yelled, and the [Black Evil Territory]’s power had risen to the apex. It was even more powerful than the battle with Bubowa. A spear appeared in his hand. He was obviously going all out. This “early stage of the Demon Emperor” gave him a terrifying feeling. His power was still being suppressed just now, but now I can hardly feel his specific level of strength! Adelaide’s long spear waved at Chen Rui in the air. A large amount of condensed dark power burst out. The black evil power of the entire territory turned into countless black thunders which bombarded Chen Rui one after another.

Chen Rui had been thinking about something. Just as he was about to be hit by the thunder of the [Black Evil Territory], a strange black hole suddenly appeared in front of him. As soon as this black hole appeared, the entire territory space began to become distorted. It seemed to be affected by some terrifying absorption force. Adelaide felt that the force he emitted was uncontrollably venting toward the black hole. He actually couldn’t stop it. What kind of terrifying talent or secret technique is this? If this goes on, my power will be all devoured! Chen Rui just tried the function of the [Royal Star Transformation]. The [Star Devouring], which could only be used in the Super System initially, could actually be activated in reality.

Adelaide made a resolute decision. He exploded the power that he channeled over. However, the terrifying matter was that the huge power and shock of the territory explosion did not actually shake the terrifying black hole. Even the light of the explosion was devoured.

Fortunately, Adelaide finally cut off his power from continuously depleting through this explosion, but the recoil caused by the self-explosion severely injured him. Even with the [Immortal Body], he could not help but to spit a mouthful of blood under the high speed recoil.

Adelaide did not retreat despite this. He charged his power once again. With a tap on his feet, he actually rushed directly toward the black hole. The enemy’s strongest point would sometimes be the weakest. He had no other better way at the moment, so he might as well try his luck.

At this moment, the black hole disappeared again. Adelaide thought he succeeded and was able to force the opponent to put away his secret skill. Adelaide immediately flicked his spear and attacked Chen Rui with all his strength. The sky was full of whistling sounds.

Adelaide attacked vigorously for a while. He seemed to firmly suppress the enemy, but he gradually realized that something was wrong. The opponent only used one hand.

Adelaide was utterly shocked. What concept is this? The Demon Emperor-level opponent can use one hand to parry this level of onslaught in my territory? Chen Rui was only trying to adapt and use the power of [Royal Star Transformation] just now. He was also secretly surprised. If it were not for the display in the [Analytical Eyes], he would think that the enemy with the peak stage of the Demon Emperor power opposite him had weakened. The [Royal Star Transformation] can actually be so powerful! This overwhelming feeling of controlling the overall situation is simply a real qualitative change! Adelaide felt that the weapon in his hand was tight. It had been grabbed by the opponent with one hand, and he could not shake it off with all his strength. When Chen Rui shook his hand, Adelaide felt that he could no longer hold the spear. He flew out involuntarily. Before his body landed, the whole [Black Evil Territory] had become starry sky. In the next second, the stars actually burst apart. In an instant, Adelaide seemed to have an illusion in which his limbs and even his soul completely collapsed with this burst. Not only that, it seemed that the whole world was disintegrating in the terrifying breath of destruction.

This “illusion” became Adelaide’s last consciousness before he fainted.

The standby dark guards who had retreated outside saw the strange light gradually faded and returned to normal.

After a long time, Adelaide’s figure reappeared in their sight. He issued a command: Clear the securities; everyone retreat.

Only then did the dark guards truly disarm their securities and disappear into the darkness. However, they never noticed that there was already a faint yellow light in the general’s eyes at this time. To be precise, this Adelaide was no longer the same Adelaide.

Puppet.

The 2 puppets of the God-Eating Mask were finally full again.

Initially with Adelaide’s strength, Chen Rui could not make him a puppet, but Adelaide was severely injured by his last big move. Moreover, Chen Rui completely suppressed Adelaide’s strength when he was in the state of [Royal Star Transformation]. Therefore, just after resisting for a while, Adelaide’s will collapsed, and he became a puppet whose mind was completely controlled.

The effect of the [Royal Star Transformation] was far beyond imagination. If the [Scorching Dragon Kill] could make Chen Rui, an early stage of the Demon Emperor, invincible among the peak stage of the Demon Emperor realm, then [Royal Star Transformation] gave him the power to truly challenge those at higher levels.

In fact, Chen Rui did not fully activate the power of the [Royal Star Transformation], but he only tried [Star Devouring] and the basic power. The last move was [Star Explosion]. If he didn’t try to suppress his power, perhaps Adelaide would have truly been crushed.

After becoming a puppet, Adelaide completely obeyed Chen Rui. After ordering the dark guards to leave, he began to lead Chen Rui to the house and told Chen Rui everything he knew.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, Adelaide was also a part of the “Bloodfall”! Except for the mysterious Second General Meister, among the 3 generals of the empire, First General Gustav and Third General Adelaide are actually from the Bloodfall. It seems that the Bloodfall’s infiltration of the Bloody Empire is much higher than the other 2 empires. If the leader of the Bloodfall is Raizen, then this kind of infiltration throughout the empire that he firmly controls is completely unnecessary. Therefore, Raizen, the biggest suspect, can basically be ruled out. Adelaide has not joined the Bloodfall for too long. As a condition of joining, the Bloodfall promised that he would be the third general. As expected, Adelaide has become a popular contender for the third general. His biggest opponent was also Bubowa whose personal strength is below-par, so he finally realized his wish. Adelaide actually joined the Bloodfall upon recommendation by Third General Gordon who has passed away. As he didn’t join for long, he had limited knowledge of the organization. The instructions are also conveyed by people. He has sent someone to follow the mysterious person who delivered the order several times, but they either disappeared or died. The source cannot be found at all. After becoming the third general, Adelaide felt that the power of this organization is even more mysterious. It was the order of Second Prince Edmund to kill the people who are too close to noble Ms. Tiffany. He even gave Adelaide the authority to mobilize some of the secret intelligence department power.

This made Chen Rui more certain that Second Prince Edmund had covet intent or a special motive for Tiffany. Edmund used the privilege of hosting the trade fair to specially prepare that kind of “special trade fair” for Tiffany. It was likely to please her. Otherwise, there wouldn’t be promises like tenfold rewards. However, by coincidence, Adelaide also received an order from the Bloodfall which asked him to clear all the characters close to Tiffany as well as kill any people related to them.

This command was more vicious than Edmund’s. Although Adelaide was confused, the 2 commands were roughly the same, so he mobilized the secret intelligence department to execute the order. This not only caused “Simon” who was Chen Rui’s disguise to be in danger, but it also affected Tess’ hotel.

Why is the goal of the Bloodfall the same as Edmund? If Edmund’s purpose is to get Tiffany, then what about the Bloodfall? By the way, there seems to be someone worthy of attention who also has “interest” in Tiffany. Young Prince Teris. Teris’ performance at the cocktail party tonight is intriguing. Such a smart and reasonable person showed obvious irrationality in this matter. Was he trying to become a scapegoat? A confession? A drama? But in the end, he “willingly” went to that so-called dangerous Dark Furnace to be punished. One thing for sure, Edmund, Teris and the Bloodfall are all concerned about Tiffany. Chen Rui had great doubts and curiosity about the mysterious noble lady of the Bloody Empire. It’s a pity that even royal family members like Edmund don’t know her well. They just know that Tiffany is a mysterious royal noblewoman who is very valued by Raizen. She only appears once in a while, and she rarely shows her face. One can hardly see her during normal days. Another “noble lady”? Tiffany and Christina are obviously different. Christina is Catherine’s disguise to act at special moments. So what is Tiffany’s identity?

Chen Rui learned about some intel from Adelaide. He felt that his body was gradually experiencing a strange fatigue. It seemed like the after-effect of the [Royal Star Transformation]’s “pumped up” state which overdrew his Star Power and physical strength. He used the [Star Gate] to rush back to the location of another star point which was his room in the Mechanic Association.

Although he had made Adelaide into a puppet, it was very likely to be exposed in the Bloody Empire where there were plenty of powerhouses and the Bloodfall was the most powerful. Therefore, Adelaide must be hidden.

Coincidentally, before Chen Rui’s arrival, Adelaide received an order from Edmund to let him, the third general, stay at home, temporarily ignore the military affairs, and cooperate with Edmund’s other actions to further pressure Raizen. Edmund would never give up until Great Prince Aleus suffered a severe setback.

Adelaide took this opportunity to go into hiding in order to avoid exposure. At least, he had to remain “normal” until Chen Rui completed the most critical matter.

As soon as Chen Rui returned to the room, the feeling of exhaustion became more prominent. Before he could take off his clothes, he fell asleep on the bed.

Another noble lady? Could she be Raizen’s daughter?

chapters.title: Chapter 447: World! The Mystery In The 4Th Floor Of The Book Collection Hall
chapters.body:
Chapter 447: World! The Mystery In The 4Th Floor Of The Book Collection Hall

Chen Rui slept for 2 days and 2 nights. After waking up, he found that there were 2 women taking care of him in the room. After seeing him wake up, a maid ran out of the room immediately.

Soon, Nate appeared in front of Chen Rui.

“Richard, what’s the matter with you? You suddenly fell asleep for so long. I can’t even wake you up by shouting.” Nate’s tone was filled with blame-like care. Before Chen Rui matured as a prey, Nate naturally had to take care of him. He took the porridge that was handed over by the maid. He looked at the 2 maids and only drank the porridge without saying anything. Nate understood, and he immediately told the maids to leave. Then Chen Rui spoke. His first sentence was, “Teacher, it seems like my hunch is accurate. My magic eyes are really going to mutate!”

“Really?” Nate’s eyes flashed with extreme excitement. This excitement seemed to contain an odd heat.

Chen Rui noticed it. He nodded affirmatively, “Deep sleep is one of the signs. It’s the same as last time. What about teacher’s preparations? If I can go to the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall and get a lot of new information, it should be an opportunity to induce the mutation!”

“I am almost ready. Tell me in detail about the last magic eyes mutation. Let’s see what other conditions are needed. This time we must succeed!” Nate emphasized the word “we” like they were a family. If Chen Rui hadn’t known his background a long time ago, he might have been moved.

“ Um … Let me think about it. After meeting the requirements, I need some rare magic materials. After absorbing those materials, the mutation should be truly completed. The more complete and rarer the materials, the higher the success rate of the mutation. My ability after the mutation will be stronger.” Chen Rui was not only eyeing for the 4th floor mystery, but also the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association’s material. According to his plan, the “magic eyes” would soon be mutated. His act of becoming Nate’s apprentice was also coming to an end. This should be the last chance. He definitely would try to get something out of it.

“Did the same thing happen in the past?” Nate was a little suspicious when he heard that a lot of precious materials were needed.

Chen Rui was long-prepared, “My teacher used to help me in this way. Initially, I had several mutation failures due to insufficient materials and it almost took my life. Later, after selling everything and exerting a lot of effort to gather the materials, my mutation finally succeeded.

Nate was thinking that Chen Rui was just a little apprentice who had just barely become a mechanic, and he respected Nate normally, plus the Mechanic Association was his base. Even if Chen Rui wanted to play some tricks, he wouldn’t succeed. Nate put aside his suspicions immediately. He nodded, “The magic materials are not a problem. The preparations for entering the 4th floor are almost done. it depends on your physical condition now. As long as you recover your strength, you can enter.”

“I probably will take about 3 days to recover to the best condition.” Chen Rui wanted to say that he could go immediately, but on a second thought, he changed his mind.

“ En , the talent mutation is a serious matter. You must be cautious. Then you should take a good rest now and adjust your spirit power to the optimal state. After 3 days, I will take you to the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall.” After reminding him of some matters, Nate left the room.

Time passed quickly. 3 days passed in a flash.

In the past 3 days, Chen Rui sometimes recuperated in his room, and sometimes he went out to get some air and go shopping which made him seem like adjusting his state.

“Are you sure you’re almost ready?” Nate looked at Chen Rui, who was full of energy, and asked again worriedly.

“ Yup , teacher, let’s go.”

Nate gave Chen Rui a cloak and a pair of glasses. Nate told him to wear them before entering the 4th floor, otherwise he would encounter terrifying dangers.

Chen Rui saw Nate’s cautious look, so he didn’t dare to be negligent too. The two of them went straight through the magic circles of the first 3 floors of the Book Collection Hall and came to the entrance of the 4th floor… This was a heavy door with countless ancient patterns. It seemed to be locked, but this door did not have anything like a keyhole.

Bright red blood appeared on Nate’s fingertips, and he pressed it toward the door. The blood flew out automatically and landed on a few specific positions on the door. The patterns began to automatically undergo strange changes, and they finally combined into 18 circular luminous imprints. There were rumbling sounds as the door slowly opened.

Chen Rui’s pupils shrank slightly. Others might not understand these 18 imprints, but he was familiar with them. These were the exact basic rune signs engraved on the 18 ancient runes slabs in Zola’s hands!

The 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall is actually related to the ancient runes? Chen Rui immediately thought of the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire which he still didn’t have the opportunity to go again. It seems like the background of both empire’s Mechanic Associations are extraordinary. In comparison, the Fallen Angel Empire looks rather inferior. The door opened, and there was a large hall inside, but there was nothing else except for an aperture exuding blue light on the ground in the center.

Chen Rui knew that the 4th floor was not so simple, so he didn’t ask or act rashly. He honestly followed Nate.

“Quickly put on those 2 items and walk in. Otherwise, as soon as the light of the symbols on the door disappears, the door will be closed. It cannot be opened again within 7 days.”

Chen Rui hastily put on his cloak, glasses, and walked into the door. Then Nate took out some materials and set them into the groove around the aperture. The aperture suddenly became dazzling, and a blue space door appeared in the center. This should be the real entrance.

After stepping into the space door, there was a shake in his mind, and he appeared in another place.

To be precise, this was a world.

There were countless small worlds in this world. They constantly changed into various images or glosses like each of them was an entrance.

Chen Rui was obviously floating in the air, and he had no place to stand, but with every step he took, a translucent step would automatically appear to allow him to step on it. It was very strange.

“Richard, there are countless mysterious knowledge and power in this space. You can choose these entrances to observe or comprehend. No matter what you see, as long as you can remember or comprehend a trace of its mystics, you can greatly benefit from it. But there are also great dangers inside. The cloak and glasses that you are wearing are for protective purposes. Remember, no matter when it is, you can’t take them off! These 2 items also have a time limit. Once the glasses give off a red warning light, you must not hesitate to smash the red jade lock on your cloak immediately. You will be sent directly to the entrance door. There is more than one master who died here. You must remember this! ”

After speaking, Nate chose an entrance. Using some means, the image of the world’s entrance suddenly paused at a scene. Nate immediately entered it, and the image resumed the rapid “refresh”.

The sir “teacher” apparently went to comprehend on his own. It seemed that Nate was “using power for personal gain”. His previous closed door cultivation was also conducted on this mysterious 4th floor.

Chen Rui used the [Analytical Eyes] to appraise the cloak and glasses on his body and found that there was no special attribute, but the materials were quite special. There were some strange patterns in it. It seemed to exude mysterious functions. For instance, the material of the glasses had some kind of “filtering” function. However, for the sake of safety, he better be careful.

He approached those small worlds curiously. He chose one at random and walked in. Suddenly, he felt that the space was distorted, and he had entered a new world.

This was an endless ocean which was beautiful and mysterious. From time to time, weird fishes jumped out and glided at low altitude. Then it dived into the water, splashing some water. The amazing thing was that when Chen Rui’s consciousness was fixed on that fish, he felt that his perspective changed suddenly, and he became this fish. He was gliding in the air and swimming in the water.

At the same time, some information appeared in Chen Rui’s mind: Missile fish. Dead Sea’s specialty fish with a lifespan of 50 years. Features: Bounce and low-altitude gliding.

Chen Rui was truly amazed by this discovery. Then he saw half-naked female sea monsters, water elementals and other exotic marine creatures. There were even huge, terrifying deep-sea demonic beasts.

Chen Rui could not only obtain the information of each creature, but he also transformed into these species with his consciousness. He could act as well as feel their habits and living in the sea from a first-person perspective.

This “small world” was exactly the database about the Dead Sea. Although it was not particularly comprehensive and there would be some “unknown” prompts, Chen Rui was greatly impressed in his heart. It’s the first time I have encountered this kind of knowledge or information acquisition method. Such learning is much better than the ordinary book reading. If the learning in my world can be carried out in this first-hand method, the education world may have a qualitative breakthrough. Although Chen Rui liked this “Dead Sea” world very much, he knew that his purpose today was to find Fertile Yuan Soil. Furthermore, the cloak and glasses he was wearing still had a time limit, so he didn’t stay too much and left.

Next, Chen Rui entered a world of lightning and thunder. There were palaces with strange styles in the clouds. All the creatures here had a whirlwind-like lower bodies: Wind elementals.

Wind elementals: Elementals condensed by the power of wind elements. They live somewhere in the human world. Their nest is called the Cloud Palace. Wind elementals are good at flying, characterized by their fast action. They have weak physique and defense. They have powerful thunder and storm magic.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, the thunder flying in disorder near the Cloud Palace didn’t actually feel like an illusion, but they had a real damage effect. However, when the thunder hit his body, it slipped away. It should be the effect of that special cloak on his body.

Chen Rui was not very interested in the wind elementals. He immediately left the world of the Cloud Palace and began his search. The world in the 4th floor space was by no means what one saw on the surface. The entrance of every world would change images, and each image represented a new space. Some were not even repeated up till now. No one knew how many “worlds” were there specifically on the 4th floor.

Fortunately, Chen Rui had the skill of [Deep Analysis]. Those changing images or glosses of the world were actually a kind of “preview”. Although they changed rapidly, in the “eyes” of the [Deep Analysis] which had high-speed computing equivalent to computers, it was not much faster than the slow motion playback. Chen Rui noted the changes in various worlds, then he began to screen quickly. After repeated trials, Chen Rui finally found a mountain in a “world”.

Although it looked like an ordinary white mountain range, several words that made Chen Rui uplifted appeared in his consciousness.

Sacred Mountain: Seckred.

Hmm the 4th floor, it feels like Google with 5D experience 🎥…

chapters.title: Chapter 448: Law! Encountering The Demi-God Territory Again
chapters.body:
Chapter 448: Law! Encountering The Demi-God Territory Again

It turned out that Seckred also was also known as the “Sacred Mountain”, but the information in this “world” was much simpler than others. There were only introductions of some special flora and fauna.

Blast bird: Mutated bird with a quick temper; strong feelings of likes and dislikes; toxic beak and claws; has self-explosion attribute.

Gargoyle: Ancient alchemy product with flying ability; some mutated ones have independent thinking; strong defense; immune to spiritual magic; halves magic damage.

Manticore: Mutated demonic beast with a lion’s body and a scorpion’s tail; moves fast. The claws are highly poisonous which can paralyze the enemy. The poisonous needles in the tail are 10 times more poisonous than the claws. The demonic beast is powerful and fierce. It will actively attack the invaders. Chen Rui frowned. He once witnessed the intensive battle between Sabrina and the manticore in the Crystal Valley. This kind of demonic beast was very difficult to deal with. Furthermore, the manticore’s combat power had been greatly reduced at that time after the tortures and experiments. Perhaps ordinary Demon Emperor level might not be its opponent.

At this moment, a huge black shadow appeared in the sky of the white mountain range. Chen Rui was instantly surprised when he saw it.

This was a giant dragon which was about 10 meters in length. It had a hideous appearance and a jet-black body with dark scales like armor. It reflected the black gem-like luster under the light.

Black Dragon: Dark Breath. Immune to low rank magic. Reduces the damage of high rank magic by 90%. The stronger the talent, the higher the immunity with the highest up to 99%. Compared with other dragons, it is slightly inferior in endurance and speed.

The talents of the black dragon and the crystal dragon were very similar. They were both the nemesis of the magic. Compared with the crystal dragon which was completely immune to magic, the black dragon was immune to low rank magic and reduced the damage of high rank magic by 90% (It was just the base number; the highest was up to 99%). It was almost equivalent to complete immunity. The black dragon also had a feature that the crystal dragon didn’t have. It could use high grade medicine.

Chen Rui was secretly surprised to see that Mountain Seckred not only had beasts like manticore, but also black dragons! No wonder Tiffany said that it was not where he (the businessman Simon) could go.

In the introductions of the other species that followed, Chen Rui finally found Fertile Yuan Soil that he had been searching for a long time.

Fertile Yuan Soil: A wonderful item with the power of the earth element source. It can greatly increase the earth element power, and it can even trigger some unknown mutation. However, it has a strong solidification effect on the body; it is not suitable for use by non-special creatures.

Chen Rui nodded. Fertile Yuan Soil is indeed a wonderful thing. The only “side effect” is solidifying the body, but for the earth elementals, there should be only benefits and no harm. No wonder there is such a remark at the end. According to this information, Mountain Seckred is located in the Saxphil Mountain Range in the northern part of the Bloody Empire. The exact location is unknown, but I already have the rough location. Plus, I know the appearance of Mountain Seckred. It is much better than searching it cluelessly. Mountain Seckred has terrifying creatures such as the manticore or even black dragon, and the specific location of Fertile Yuan Soil is unknown, but since I have already reached this point, how can I give up? I must go there to take a look anyway. After finding the information on Fertile Yuan Soil, Chen Rui finally relaxed. There should still be some time left. I can walk around and collect more valuable information. There was indeed much good information in the “world” on the 4th floor. Many of them were experiences or knowledge that had been lost. They were even beyond the scope of the mechanic masters. No one knew who left them. They were extremely profound, which were comparable to the Dark Shadow Empire’s ancient magic tower.

Chen Rui used the [Deep Analysis] to enter the non-repetitive “worlds” to obtain information and knowledge, but a strange feeling in his heart gradually became clear. This feeling was somewhat familiar. It was like the breath that permeated in the “worlds” in the entire 4th floor. It was continuous and endless. Perhaps this was the source and driving force of these “worlds”.

The more he went “in and out” of these “worlds,” the stronger the feeling. It seemed vast and boundless, and it was like changing seasons. He couldn’t express it with accurate language. Even the Star Power in his body began to fluctuate uncontrollably. It was probably led by unknown forces.

Chen Rui felt the strange fluctuations in his body. He suddenly had an idea, and he boldly took off the pair of glasses.

Although Nate repeatedly explained that he should not take off his glasses at any time, Chen Rui inexplicably just took them off as if everything was instinctive.

As soon as Chen Rui took off his glasses, Chen Rui felt an impact in his head. All the scenes had changed drastically. All the worlds and materials were gone. There were only large and small symbols flashing and rotating all over the sky.

Chen Rui was shocked when he saw those symbols. Ancient runes! All of them are ancient runes. They are not single texts or radicals; the entire “world” is made up of ancient runes! If what Zola and I studied previously are words, short sentences, and paragraphs at best, then these ancient runes in front of me are a coherent and complete masterpiece! The wonders of the entire 4th floor and the strange feeling that you will forget many secondary memories when you go out are all the effects of the ancient runes!

All ancient runes are derived from those 18 basic runes, just like the radicals of Chinese characters, but literacy is only the first step. Zola and I have not even fully understood the basic rune signs derived from the 18 stone slab. Even if we know all the words, it does not mean we can write an article, let alone a complete work. And the “world” in front of me is obviously a perfect and gorgeous “work”!

If Zola is here, she would definitely be super excited. There are countless unknown ancient runes phrases, radicals and even paragraph connectors. Not to mention the “worlds” created in it, these ancient runes alone are priceless treasures. Although Chen Rui activated his [Deep Analysis], it was too late to take a closer look at these “priceless treasures” because the force that was originally only flowing slowly in his body had already boiled under the effect of this “visual”. It was almost to the point where it couldn’t be suppressed.

With this boiling, the ancient runes in the entire space began to change. Waves of strong dangerous breath spread all over the sky. Compared with this vast and boundless power, Chen Rui felt that he was only equivalent to an insignificant dust in the space. There was no possibility of resisting at all. If that breath was a living body, it only needed a thought to annihilate him completely!

Chen Rui could neither activate teleportation or [Star Gate] at that moment. He was shocked as he finally understood what was the familiar breath contained in this mysterious space.

Territory! This kind of territory is by no means an ordinary level of power. In contrast, the territory of Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord is as small as a stream in front of a surging river. Demi-God territory! The 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall in the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association is actually a Demi-God territory constructed by ancient runes! It was not the first time Chen Rui had faced a Demi-God territory. The last time was in the Rainbow Valley experiment. Although the trace of Demi-God territory breath was also the Demi-God territory, the complete territory in front of him was obviously not comparable to “a trace” of breath. It was not exactly the law of destruction. Chen Rui couldn’t even use some power to assimilate or evade it even if he wanted to.

He was about to be wiped out in an instant, but when the overwhelming terrifying power hit him, it seemed to “slip away” because of a certain rule. It was as if Chen Rui was an “exceptional” existence.

This phenomenon was of course not due to Chen Rui’s insignificant power, but the function of the cloak on his body.

The shocked Chen Rui finally recovered his senses. He suddenly understood the purpose of the cloak and glasses: This Demi-God’s territory space can obviously sense abnormal emotional fluctuations or active attacks. The function of the glasses is to shield the user’s emotional fluctuations and filter out the form of the ancient runes source so that the visitor cannot see these symbols with a strange energy. One can only see what the ancient runes express which are the “worlds”. The cloak should contain a certain “special rule” in the territory. In the absence of anyone deliberately presiding over the situation, this “special rule” can protect users from ordinary infringements of the territory power. This is a bit similar to a high grade VIP account with corresponding privileges. After Chen Rui figured out these things, he calmed down. The fluctuations in the territory really began to calm down a lot, but the tide-like power still rushed toward him. Fortunately, the special rule of the cloak still existed, so he was not injured.

As expected, Demi-God territory was not that simple. When Chen Rui just wanted to put on his glasses, suddenly his mind moved. He allowed the Demi-God-level power to continue to rush toward him. He did not control the surging power in his body, but he just relaxed his mind. He turned on the [Analysis] skill of the [Analytical Eyes]. With that huge force fluctuations, he experienced a mysterious feeling.

Last time in the Demi-God space of the Rainbow Valley, Chen Rui once felt a trace of the basic law. This greatly improved his territory power. Now, in this more complete and powerful Demi-God territory world, it happened to further strengthen his understanding of the basic law to make it more complete.

As expected, under the data collection of [Analysis], this kind of sentiment became deeper. It seemed that there were many things that were not available previously. It was like some kind of paper window had been pierced. Chen Rui had an inspiration. The power in his body immediately began to match with the external force. It even caused a certain resonance.

This was a kind of precious sudden realization.

However, the surrounding environment was not a joke. Once the resonance surpassed the protective power of the cloak, then the terrifying breath in the territory could instantly turn Chen Rui into flying ash. Although it was quite life-threatening, perhaps Chen Rui was the first in the Demon Realm to use the Demi-God territory power to train and realize the law as a Demon Emperor.

Chen Rui didn’t want to understand the mystery of the Demi-God territory as all changes would not deviate from its core principle. What he wanted to do was to use the Demi-God territory to consolidate and deepen his own basic law so that he could use it to derive his own power in the future.

In a certain “world”, Nate, who had been meditating and comprehending, suddenly felt the strangeness around him. It seemed that the scene of the world was changing and trembling violently like it was strongly disturbed. This was undoubtedly very abnormal. Nate did not dare to stay for a long time. He quickly withdrew from this “world.” However, when he came to the “big menu” of worlds that they first entered, he was suddenly startled.

He saw “Richard” hovering in the air. He was being thrown high in the air for a while, then crashing down again. What shocked him was that Richard’s face seemed to have no “glasses.” His closed eyes and uncontrollable body made it seem like he was dead!

Stupid thing, I told him previously, but he actually took off his glasses! Even me, the top master of the Demon Realm, will not dare to do that. This kid actually…

If it weren’t because “Richard” still had the greatest utilization value, Nate couldn’t wait to personally tear this fellow to pieces for interrupting his comprehension.

At this moment, Nate’s glasses suddenly lit up in red. The time limit for staying here is approaching! Danger!

Could Chen Rui comprehend a new territory from this “world”?

chapters.title: Chapter 449: Nate'S True Colors
chapters.body:
Chapter 449: Nate'S True Colors

In the face of the alert from the glasses, Nate looked at Chen Rui who was still flying up and down in the air. He gritted his teeth and crushed the red lock on his cloak without hesitation. His figure disappeared instantly, and he appeared outside the gate on the 4th floor.

When Nate came out, Chen Rui had already felt it. He even clearly felt Nate’s hateful emotion. His current senses had been in line with the rhythm of the entire Demi-God territory to a very subtle level. His comprehension of law was also approaching the end.

However, Chen Rui also felt the alert from the glasses. Judging from the fact that Nate gave up his “prey” and escaped without hesitation, it was indeed urgent.

Nate’s statement that “more than a master died on the 4th floor” was by no means just to scare him. Chen Rui had sensed that a certain “law” on his cloak was fading. The sense of crisis transmitted through the “law” had suddenly increased. The time is almost up!

The protection of the cloak was almost on the verge of disintegration. Once it disintegrated, just a little breath could wipe him, the “foreign unit”, out.

This was a complete obliteration. Even with the [Regeneration] feature, he couldn’t be resurrected. Chen Rui couldn’t help holding the red lock.

However, the comprehension was almost close to completion. This kind of epiphany opportunity was really rare. Judging from the attitude that Nate had just left, even if what Chen Rui expected did not happen this time, he would probably not be allowed to come to the 4th floor next time. Even if he could come here, he might not have this kind of spiritual epiphany again.

More importantly, after learning about Fertile Yuan Soil, Chen Rui should leave the Bloody Empire capital and head to the Saxphil Mountain Range in the north to look for the Mountain Seckred.

The law of the cloak further faded, and there was a danger of collapse at any time. At the moment of life and death, Chen Rui became calm instead. He continued to maintain the mysterious state of the epiphany. The wonderful insights that it brought were condensed with unprecedented clarity. The external waves’ impact on the power within his body had reduced. It gradually formed a separate cycle like a game of its own in a chess game.

To be precise, it was a territory within a territory! And it was within the Demi-God-level territory!

Just when the last glimmer of insight was about to be completed, a “ beep ” lightly sounded. The whole cloak began to decay and disappear quickly at a speed visible to the naked eye. Just when the power of the territory madly annihilated the cloak and was about to wrap Chen Rui, there was an inexplicable pause suddenly. If the owner of the Demi-God-level territory could see this situation, he would be surprised: A little ant at Demon Emperor-level can actually stop such a manic Demi-God territory power?

This pause only lasted less than 2 seconds. It then surged with greater acceleration in an instant, and it “swarmed” the target’s location immediately.

At the same time, Chen Rui’s figure suddenly appeared outside the gate on the 4th floor as he gasped for breath. It could be said to be a close call just now, but he finally used that precious second to crush the lock and successfully escaped. If he was 1 second slower, even if he had Demon Overlord-level power now, he definitely couldn’t escape his fate of being annihilated.

However, he finally managed to escape. Not only that, he also gained an extremely precious insight of the basic law. There were countless Demon Overlord-level powerhouses who could not comprehend the Demi-God-level law in their lifetime. Chen Rui definitely encountered a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity this time. Coupled with the massive amount of information and materials including the whereabouts of Fertile Yuan Soil, this trip to the Book Collection Hall was a huge reward.

As Chen Rui laughed loudly, his gaze turned to the gloomy Nate at the side, and his laughter did not stop.

When Nate was about to speak with a sullen face, Chen Rui had already walked over in abruptly. He said with an excited expression, “Teacher! My magic eyes are about to be mutated soon!”

There was a glimmer of light in Nate’s eyes, and he couldn’t reprimanding Chen Rui. His surprised expression was beyond words, “Really?”

“It’s true!” Chen Rui looked extremely excited. “Teacher, I sensed the magic eyes mutation signal. In addition to the original materials, I also need fire crystal sand, the best borscht rock, Fertile Yuan Soil…”

“What is Fertile Yuan Soil?” Nate frowned.

Chen Rui’s move was deliberately testing Nate. Seeing that Nate didn’t know it, he immediately changed his words, “It’s okay to lack a couple of materials. It’s just that the more materials, the chance of mutation success would be higher. They will also make the mutated magic eyes more powerful. It should be the ultimate form of magic eyes this time!”

“Except for Fertile Yuan Soil, I have the others!” Nate replied without hesitation. He was the president, so he could use privileges to retrieve 3 materials every month, but now there were so many materials that were rare. No matter how many materials they exclude, a lot of contribution points were needed. However, these were “external objects.” The value was much smaller compared with the “ultimate form” of the magic eyes.

“Great, teacher, I will wait for you in my own room. I may need some help from you in a while.”

“Okay! I’m going to the warehouse to exchange the materials now!” Nate turned around and left. He suddenly remembered something and added, “You go back to the room immediately. Just to be on the safe side, don’t tell anyone before the magic eyes are really mutated! Don’t get in contact with anyone too much on the way!”

If Master Turia said this sentence, Chen Rui would surely not have a second thought on it, but it was Nate who said this. Besides, Chen Rui also sensed some special emotional fluctuations which were intriguing.

“Don’t worry, teacher, I won’t let anyone disturb me!” Chen Rui turned around and left with the same intriguing smile on his face.

Soon after, Nate brought all the materials he could get. To be on the safe side, he also placed a “disturbance prevention” magic circle near his room.

Under Nate’s gaze, Chen Rui placed the one after another magic material in front of him. Chen Rui placed his hands on them and stared at them. In the blink of an eye, the magic materials disappeared, followed by another piece…

Nate was sure that Chen Rui didn’t have any space items in his hands. Unless it was a space magic that had been lost for many years, it was really “absorbed” by the magic eyes.

This question had an obvious answer. If this apprentice of Intermediate Demon knew space magic, wouldn’t Nate be a God powerhouse?

——The fact was that Nate was indeed not a God powerhouse, but that “apprentice” was really capable of space “magic”.

After Chen Rui “absorbed” the last piece of material, he closed his eyes. Strange fluctuations appeared in his body. Even Nate, the Great Demon King, felt very mysterious. After a long time, the fluctuations finally gradually calmed down, and “Richard” slowly opened his eyes.

“How’s it going?” Nate was holding his breath just now, and he didn’t dare to interrupt. He stepped forward and asked loudly now.

Chen Rui’s eyes glowed with scorching light, “Teacher, your power is at the intermediate stage of the Great Demon King? Oh , your strength and spirit power are both at the intermediate stage of the Great Demon King. Your speed and physical strength are at the early stage of the Great Demon King.”

Nate was shocked. My power and characteristics are actually seen through by an Intermediate Demon. So, the mutation was a complete success? After mutating, the magic eyes actually can see the power of the target!

“This should only be part of the mutated function of the magic eyes. Teacher, can you show me your space ring?” Right after he said it, Nate took it off and gave it to him without thinking. Chen Rui pretended to look at it for a while, “This ring’s baseline should be made using Prota technique. Firstly, melt it with a low-point flame, then mold it with ice jade… Finally, use the drip potting method to enchant. By the way, what are this Prota technique and drip potting method? Why do they automatically appear in my mind?”

He can even see through the production method and process? Nate’s eyes flashed with a strange light.

Although he was lacking in terms of proficiency in accessories, he was not unfamiliar with the production methods of magic items. He knew that it was not fabricated when he heard it. The excitement in his heart was simply beyond the limit: It is worthy of being the ultimate form of magic eyes. It is simply too damn good! If I can get this skill, wouldn’t I be able to directly see through any mechanics? Not only that, I can also improve my accessories skill that I have always felt difficult to master by leaps and bounds, then I can become a trio-specialized master on par with the young genius, “Arthur”?

Nate, who had already lost his mind in greed now, would never think that the so-called “ultimate mutation” was simply a lie. The previous strength [Analysis] was the “normal” function of [Analytical Eyes] while the production process behind it was real learning experiences. The poor duo-specialized master was fooled by the liar trio-specialized master.

After trying several times, Nate had no doubt about the power of the “magic eyes”.

“Awesome! I’ll go out and tell everyone!” Chen Rui showed a surprised look. Just after walking a few steps, his body suddenly softened, and he fell to the ground. “Teacher, why do I feel that my body suddenly loses strength?”

“Really?” Nate’s eyes flashed a hint of joy, “Maybe it’s over fatigue. Come, I’ll help you sit down and rest for a while.”

“Thank you, teacher.” Chen Rui allowed Nate to help him sit on the sofa slowly.

“How do you feel?”

“It seems to be getting worse. I have no strength at all. My head starts to feel dizzy…” Chen Rui leaned softly on the sofa.

Nate’s heart was determined. His voice began to change slowly, “Soon, you won’t be so uncomfortable anymore. I will free you from it.”

“Teacher, why does your smile feel terrifying…”

“All thanks to your magic eyes,” Nate suddenly laughed with an unabashed pride in his voice, “However, it will soon be mine. As long as I can have these magic eyes, I, Nate. Mammon will not only be the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master, but also the Demon Realm’s top appraisal master. In the future, I’m very likely to become the top mechanics grand master to appear in the Demon Realm for thousands of years!

Nate smiled knowingly: It’s finally the harvest time for this carefully raised prey.

Chen Rui also took a deep breath: After acting for so long, it’s time for the finale.

Just don’t let Nate die so fast 😤

chapters.title: Chapter 450: Everyone Knew
chapters.body:
Chapter 450: Everyone Knew

Chen Rui seemed to be in disbelief as he exclaimed, “Teacher, you…”

“You should be honored to be part of your teacher’s ability, my student. Just like the talented student, Vanim, I accepted 20 years ago. Horford is actually pretty good too now. He is able to understand duo-specialized, but it’s a pity that he’s still not good enough. He also has Gustav supporting him, otherwise he would have become my ‘food’. There are also many guys like you including the masters of the association who have become part of my ability. However, compared to them, you are the real feast!” Nate’s smile became more wicked, and he revealed all the words in his mind.

“Teacher, what do you want? Don’t come over or I will yell!” Chen Rui shouted, but he felt very awkward in his heart. This line seems too easy for people to misunderstand.

Nate laughed more creepily, “No matter how loud you yell, it’s useless. I have set layers of magic circles here. Even the masters of the nearby Mechanic Association cannot hear any sound.

Don’t worry, you won’t have any pain soon after I steal your magic eyes talent with my secret method.”

With that, Nate approached Chen Rui step by step. He looked like a hunter looking at a prey that successfully fell into a trap.

Chen Rui was unable to struggle. He said angrily, “Unexpectedly, the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master, the president of the Mechanic Association, is such a despicable villain! Those mechanics who have gone through hardships to become masters or geniuses actually died because of your despicable means to steal their talents or skills. Are you not afraid that you will be cast aside and boycotted by the association and even all the Demon Realm’s mechanics when matters fail?”

“Who would know?” Nate laughed unscrupulously, “Those who know the truth no longer exist in this world like Master Fonerro 20 years ago. Everyone thought he died on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall. In fact, I killed him. To put it bluntly, the mechanics or masters in this Mechanic Association are actually the food I raised in captivity. The more talented and outstanding the person is, the faster he will die because only me alone can be the strongest!”

Chen Rui gritted his teeth and said, “This is how you became the top master? Shameless!”

“So what if I’m shameless… I’m the top master now!” Nate laughed loudly, “Unfortunately, there are too few skilled or talented people left now. If there are no special abilities, it is not worth taking the risk. But you are different. Your magic eyes talent is too great. It has reached the ultimate form now. As long as I get your magic eyes, my mechanics can rise to a higher level. I can even have accessories proficiency, then I will become a trio-specialized super master who far surpasses the recent genius, Arthur! You are simply a delicious food bestowed by Demon God! Your real power is at best at Higher Demon… Don’t try to resist or delay time, no one will come to save you.”

Nate’s footsteps suddenly stopped because Chen Rui’s gaze suddenly changed. It was a special calmness or even coldness.

“You talk so much nonsense just to destroy my will. Your secret technique should be a combination of dark power and talent that can devour the memory and skills of others.” Chen Rui sneered, “Unfortunately, you need to pay a considerable price to activate your secret technique. Besides, the stronger the opponent’s will, the harder it is to be successful. There will even be recoil unless the subject is willing to surrender. This is perhaps why many masters can temporarily survive, right?

Nate’s body trembled slightly. The smile on his face stiffened. Disbelief appeared in his gaze, “You… How do you know?”

“If you don’t want people to know it, then don’t do it!” Chen Rui said coldly, “Do you remember Master Fonsaq who was held hostage by you with despicable means? You used tricks to secretly poison and imprison him for his strongest leather skills. In order to force Master Fonsaq to submit, you took his wife and daughter to threaten him. Finally, his wife committed suicide. After he escaped with his daughter under the cover of his apprentice, he was betrayed by Young Prince Teris. In the end, he was surrounded by your chasers and fell into the abyss of Poison Cloud!”

Nate was extremely surprised, “You… So you are Fonsaq’s apprentice! Isn’t he dead?”

Master Fonsaq was one of the most respected senior masters in the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. He had the reputation of being the best in leather proficiency in the Demon Realm. His current identity was Skye of the Cloak Gang. He had the grace of teaching Chen Rui indeed, so Chen Rui did not deny the “master and apprentice” relationship. He shouted, “Today I will expose your true colors in front of everyone as a revenge for my teacher!”

Nate had recovered from the shock. He gritted his teeth and said, “I didn’t think you were actually Fonsaq’s apprentice. Hmph! He was lucky to escape back then. Everyone knew that Fonsaq is dead now. Even if there is a fake one who wants to come back and take me down. I have a way to deal with him! Besides, you can’t even protect yourself now, how can you expose me? Since you came to me today, don’t think of leaving alive. I’m surely going to take your magic eyes!”

“I didn’t plan to leave alive. I came to the capital just to expose your true colors!” Chen Rui laughed loudly, “Your true colors have been exposed to everyone now!”

Nate snorted, “I have laid out magic circles around here. The laboratory you live in is a separate small building. No matter how loud the sound is, it will not be heard at all!”

“I forgot to tell you that I made a small item called a microphone. It can magnify and transmit the sound. The source is located in this room. As for the sound transmission location, there are office buildings, laboratories, dormitories as well as the streets and alleys of the capital…” Chen Rui’s laughter was full of disdain, “I knew you would harm me. You know why I have to go out and walk around these 3 days?”

Nate was utterly shocked, “Impossible!”

“There is nothing impossible. What you just said is not only heard in the Mechanic Association, but even the entire capital. Everyone on the street is a witness to your numerous crimes!”

What Chen Rui said was not an exaggeration. The current activities in the Mechanic Association and even the capital’s streets had almost stopped. They were all surprised to listen to the clear voices from all corners of the streets, including Beluan beside Turia and Mavinna.

In fact, most of these loudspeakers were prepared previously by the Dark Demon members. They distributed the loudspeakers immediately after receiving some kind of signal. Chen Rui went out in the past 3 days for the purpose of avoiding detection.

Nate’s body trembled violently. This Richard definitely doesn’t seem to be lying. Then wouldn’t the true colors I have hidden for so many years be…

“Nate! I know that I’m not your opponent. Now that my goal has been achieved, Teacher Fonsaq will rest in peace! Judging from your raging look, you want to break my body into pieces? Unfortunately, you don’t have this chance as I never plan to leave alive. I forgot to tell you one last thing. The magic eyes have another talent which is self-explosion.”

Self-explosion! Nate saw Chen Rui’s “crazy” gaze that gave him chills, and a strong sense of crisis surged in his mind. He turned around and ran without bothering the exposure of his misdeeds.

Immediately afterward, the people on various streets heard an explosion sound. At the same time, Nate’s screams appeared in the broadcasted sound.

Meanwhile, they no longer hear “Richard’s” voice.

That’s right, Chen Rui had “self-exploded” while Nate was seriously injured because of this “self-explosion”. However, no one would imagine that the moment Nate turned to escape, the martyr who “self-exploded” just quickly put down the corpse and explosive item which he had prepared in advance. Then, he opened the [Star Gate] and calmly escaped.

Even if Nate didn’t look back, it was easy to play blindfolds or knock him off with Chen Rui’s strength in order to complete the act.

When Beluan heard the word “self-explosion”, she rushed to the laboratory building where Chen Rui lived. Turia and Mavinna were even faster. However, the sound of the explosion completely destroyed the hope of the 3 people.

Beluan staggered and almost collapsed to the ground. Thanks to Mavinna’s quick move, she turned around and grabbed her daughter’s body. Beluan’s glasses fell to the ground and shattered. Tears flowed from her eyes uncontrollably.

The resolute words when he left the Whispering Manor last time echoed in her ears again, “We are not people of the same world.”

“Richard” was determined to die long ago. No wonder…

Master Turia’s eyes were a little red… There was a sudden expression of pain on his face: It turns out that everyone has misunderstood “Richard”! He is an apprentice of Master Fonsaq! The truth about Fonsaq’s “death” is actually killed by the shameless man, Nate!

It’s no wonder that even someone with Richard’s temperament would “betray his teacher”. His real purpose is to sacrifice his life to avenge his teacher by exposing Nate’s true colors!

At this time, one hand was holding Turia’s slightly trembling hand. It was his wife, Mavinna. She was still holding her daughter who couldn’t stop crying in her arms.

“Go to the laboratory building immediately! Call all the masters and mechanics! We can’t let our apprentice die in vain!”

Mavinna’s tone was filled with emotion and anger. At this time, they could still hear Nate’s wailing through the loudspeakers. This damn fellow is not dead yet!

Mavinna’s words were undoubtedly re-acknowledging the identity of “Richard” as an apprentice. This was exactly what Master Turia thought. Turia took a deep breath and nodded. He showed a very firm expression while holding his wife’s hand. They strode toward the already boiling Mechanic Association building.

The speakers disseminated by Dark Demon were in the right place. In addition to some small incitement, Nate’s affairs had created a sensation in the blink of an eye. Those who heard the sound and those who haven’t heard were discussing the matter.

Soon, Raizen the Great was also alarmed. When Great Prince Aleus was ordered to rush to the Mechanic Association, Nate was at his last gasp. He was surrounded by angry masters and mechanics.

No one knew if Nate’s injury was caused by “Richard”‘s self-explosion, or the hands of these onlookers out of righteous indignation. If it weren’t for some life-saving items on his body, I’m afraid that the top master would have been trampled into meatloaf.

Up to now, the cause of the whole incident was already clear. Especially with all the mechanics of the Mechanic Association and almost half of the people in the capital as witnesses, Nate could not deny it.

This might be the “doubtful case” with the most witnesses in the history of the Demon Realm. The mystery of the strange disappearance and death of geniuses or masters such as Fonsaq, Fonerro, and Vanim had finally been revealed. The exposure of true colors of “the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master” caused a great clamor. The news spread to the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association. They were filled with indignation as they issued public condemnations.

The only pity was that “Richard”, the apprentice of Master Fonsaq, exploded and died bravely. The people lamented: A future first appraisal master of the Demon Realm just died like that! However, he will not sacrifice for nothing!

Raizen the Great had ordered the removal Nate as the president of the Mechanic Association and announced that he will be imprisoned for life. The president of the Mechanic Association was temporarily vacant. After a while, all masters would openly vote for a new president.

Nate still had a certain value. In addition to his own mechanics, only the president knew how to enter the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, so they tried to interrogate him by force. Before that, it should be fine for Nate to save his life. However, this kind of survival “treatment” for this “top master,” who had always been respected by thousands of people, was simply living death.

A few days later, the news reached the Dark Moon’s Cloak Gang. Master Fonsaq, whose alias was Skye, trembled with excitement. His 2 daughters, Alian and Eve, cried in Lisa’s arms. The harm many years ago caused the father and daughters to lose their dearest wife and mother. Not only did they hide and fled, they also suffered from curse and poison.

The bad days were gone and they could finally see hope now. Not only had the curse and poison were eliminated, but Nate had finally gotten his retribution.

Master Xingxing on the side showed relief and comforted, “Finally, the truth is revealed! I really envy you for having such a loyal and righteous apprentice.”

Master Skye finally suppressed his excitement and shook his head, “My direct apprentice died at the beginning, and his name was not Richard. This is the first time I have heard of that magic eyes talent.”

Master Xingxing was dumbfounded for a moment as if he thought of something, and Master Skye did the same. The 2 masters looked at each other and smiled knowingly.

“It turns out to be him!” Tears of gratitude flashed in Skye’s eyes. Detoxification, curse dispel, shelter, and revenge of enemies are all the help from that man.

Xingxing’s eyes were full of unconcealable appreciation, but he muttered in dissatisfaction, “ Hmph, I knew this guy likes to be in the limelight. Even if he ‘dies’, he must ‘die’ with the top appraiser title!”

“By the way, if you return to the Bloody Empire now, you will definitely be the president of the Mechanic Association with your reputation and abilities.” Xingxing suddenly said. This was also the truth. Fonsaq was the senior master with the strongest proficiency in leather in the Demon Realm. He also had high prestige in the Bloody Empire. Now that Nate was down, as long as he returned, he would definitely be valued by Raizen.

Skye looked at Lisa and his daughters, then he looked at Master Xingxing. He shook his head and said, “Fonsaq is dead. I’m Skye now. This is my home. My most important relatives and friends are here. I’m not going anywhere.”

Lisa held Skye’s hand with tenderness in her eyes while Master Xingxing nodded and smiled.

The hearts of the 2 masters were clear: Since “Richard” is the guy who has the ability to defeat the Demon Emperor powerhouse, then the so-called “self-explosion sacrifice” is just a trick to hide from the people.

The “top” indeed, top criminal… just hope he didn’t get to come back through the help of “someone”…

chapters.title: Chapter 451: Gustav'S Punch
chapters.body:
Chapter 451: Gustav'S Punch

Master Fonsaq and Master Xingxing of the Dark Moon learned of the news from the Bloody Empire only a few days later. At the time of the incident, no one could guess the true mastermind of this event.

No one would have imagined that the heroic “Richard” who sacrificed himself courageously would become a passerby after his “self-explosion sacrifice”. He walked leisurely in the city of the Bloody Empire and participated in some fierce discussions among the people from time to time. He even cursed at Nate and praised “himself”.

In fact, with Chen Rui’s power, it was not difficult to kill Nate. The difficulty was to let this top master lose his reputation and be completely ruined. Otherwise, even if Nate died, he would still be a martyr who would be respected for ages, but now it was different. This perfect trick of ‘everyone knows’ made the martyr become a “bad guy” with a bad reputation for ages.

Chen Rui imitated this strategy from the plots in the comics and movies he had seen before. In the end, he did not kill Nate, but he gave Nate a “survival route”.

However, this survival route was not smooth. Nate who survived had to face all the people who knew his conspiracy, including all the masters and mechanics in the association.

Nate had himself to blame because he arrogantly said so many words in order to crush Chen Rui’s will. Especially the sentence, “The mechanics or masters in this Mechanic Association are actually the food I raised in captivity.” All the mechanics had felt the crisis and indignation.

What is a public enemy? Now is the time for this guy to face all the anger of his “food”.

Even if Raizen did not order the execution of Nate, who was a royal family member, the notorious president would be ashamed to set foot in the mechanic world again, let alone serve as the president. However, Raizen would definitely calm the public’s anger, unless he wanted the entire Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association to become void without any masters or talents.

When Chen Rui revealed Nate’s crime of harming Fonsaq just now, he deliberately added the sentence betrayed by Teris. This was not a lie. Master Fonsaq once said that when he asked for help from Teris, his whereabouts were exposed to Nate. The reason why Chen Rui emphasized this sentence was obviously to drag Teris into the trouble.

At Adelaide’s birthday party, Teris confessed to the “crime” of assassinating Second Prince Edmund with an almost absurd reason, and he took the initiative to go to the Dark Furnace to be punished. It temporarily resolved the dispute, but Chen Rui always felt that this man was not simple. He is not just talented, he is also good at scheming. Every step seems to be deliberate. Could it be he deliberately wanted to go to that Dark Furnace?

In other words, the Dark Furnace is originally a place he had to go just like the Town Lupin of the Blue Lava Estate? So he just took this opportunity to go there with a sound reason

?

Chen Rui thought for a long time and had a spontaneous plan to go to Teris’ house before leaving the capital to rush to Saxphil Mountain Range.

Under the purple moonlight, when people were still eagerly talking about the major events of the Mechanic Association during the day at the night market, Chen Rui had appeared silently in Teris’ mansion in the inner city.

This time, the royal mansion was incomparable to the last time in the general’s mansion. Last time, Chen Rui used the birthday party to enter the general’s mansion. He set a star point and used the [Star Gate]. It was obviously not feasible this time.

In order to prevent assassinations and prying eyes, most of the houses of the nobles in the inner city were equipped with layers of magic circle protection. The royal mansion was no exception. However, Chen Rui came to explore the truth, so it was impossible for him to barge in. He knocked off a maid when she was going out, then he used [Camouflage] technique to transform into the appearance of the maid to enter the mansion.

What surprised Chen Rui was that although he successfully entered Teris’ mansion, and he hadn’t acted abnormally like the rest of the maid until now, he had an instinct that he was being followed. He didn’t know why.

The difference from his imagination was that Teris’ mansion looked minimal and even frugal. There were no extravagant furnishings at sight. Compared with the Third General Adelaide, it could be described as “poor”.It was unlike a prince’s residence.

As Teris was currently being punished in the Dark Furnace, and the young prince, who was unmarried so far, had no wives and concubines, so the housekeeper was responsible for normal affairs in the royal residence. The maid and the servants mainly do some cleaning and maintenance work. Chen Rui, who disguised as a maid, had been sent to clean the study room. It was exactly as he wished.

Chen Rui wiped the desk while observing the scene in the study room. The study room was very large and lacked any gorgeous furnishings as well. The most eye-catching item was the enormous bookshelves which listed all kinds of books such as military, politics, history, and so on. Even the Demon Realm’s very rare economic books were in it. Judging from the wear and tear of the corners of the books, they were by no means for display, but publications that were really frequently read.

Chen Rui compared his study room in the Dark Moon with the otaku room in his previous life. He was deeply ashamed. Perhaps only the hundreds of “literary and artistic films” in my hard disk can be compared with the number of books in front of me.

Chen Rui couldn’t help admiring Teris’ fondness for learning. It seems that this genius has extraordinary diligence besides his extraordinary talent. While wiping slowly, he tried to move some books, but unfortunately there was no hidden door as he imagined.

His action suddenly stopped. A strong sense of crisis of being targeted by a powerful force suddenly rose in his heart.

Race: Wrath Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A+ (S-). Physique: A (S-), Strength: A+ (S), Spirit: B+ (A-), Agility: A (S-).

[Analysis]: Fire attribute.

With this data, Chen Rui could guess who the opponent was even without looking back. The first general of the Bloody Empire, Gustav. He should have another name, Bridget.

The first general actually appeared in Teris’ mansion in person.

“What are you looking for?” Gustav’s voice sounded…

Chen Rui knew that his actions were exposed. The maid’s body quickly changed to become a man. Of course, it would not be Richard’s appearance.

“I haven’t found it yet, but unfortunately, I have no time to find it anymore now.” Chen Rui turned his head slowly. His voice was dull as if he was facing an old friend opposite him. In fact, he was indeed an “old friend”.

Gustav’s gaze was fixed on the unfamiliar man. He did not let down his guards at all because the opponent’s strength only showed the Higher Demon power. The powerful Demon Overlord breath gave Chen Rui a shuddering feeling like he was a frog stared at by a poisonous snake.

In the Town Lupin of the Blue Lava Estate, Bridget, whom Gustav had disguised as, showed unbelievably terrifying power. Not only did he withstood Chen Rui’s biggest killing move, [Scorching Dragon Kill], forcefully, he also withstood the powerful blow of the Dark Elemental King Hegel which Chen Rui diverted by using [Star Diversion]. That was a powerful attack of the peak stage Demon Overlord!

Gustav’s Comprehensive Strength Assessment, which seemed to be similar to the emerald dragon Krobelus, was the strength of the early stage of the Demon Overlord. However, Chen Rui could be sure that Krobelus was definitely not Gustav’s opponent.

Chen Rui once used God-Eating Mask’s special effect, [Demonic Flies Transformation], to avoid Gustav’s punch. However, [Demonic Flies Transformation] could only be used once, and [Star Diversion] only lasted for 10 seconds. In terms of head-on battle, he couldn’t match Gustav even with the [Scorching Dragon Possession].

Then what about [Royal Star Transformation]? To what extent can [Royal Star Transformation] do?

Chen Rui adjusted his Star Power secretly as he asked indifferently, “One last question. I feel that I have been exposed at the moment I entered the palace. Can I understand it before I die? Sir general?”

Gustav looked at Chen Rui with a calm smile. For some reason, this low-powered person gave him an unfathomable feeling, “You’re very calm, but you can’t escape the fate of death just like this. Nonetheless, I can give you the last answer in your life. The entire prince’s mansion is equivalent to a strange and huge magic circle. The breath of life of every maid, including the mark of their body, is a part of the magic circle. Once there is a difference, any transformation technique or disguise will be immediately noticed.”

Chen Rui then understood why he felt stared at when he came in. The protection of this seemingly ordinary prince’s mansion is so well-prepared. It is likely that this is just the tip of the iceberg.

“Now you know the answer, then, pay the price of death.” Gustav slowly raised his hand.

Chen Rui knew that he could not delay any longer. His body disappeared instantly, and he had come to the courtyard from the room. Gustav had already targeted him with breath and immediately chased him. However, the enemy did not run away, but he stood in the courtyard instead. Facing him from a distance, Chen Rui’s body suddenly lit up with an extremely bright light.

The dazzling degree of that light made it difficult for Gustav to look directly at Chen Rui for a while. While blocking his eyes, he began to charge his power quickly.

After a while, a man in a gorgeous armor, helmet and mask appeared in front of Gustav.

Except for the [Royal Star Transformation], no other skills could match Gustav. Moreover, in order to avoid unnecessary trouble, Chen Rui did not want to expose the identity of “Aguile”. Now the faith crystals of the Super System were enough to use the [Royal Star Transformation] several times. Furthermore, this skill was not revealed in front of Gustav last time, so he used this strongest “transformation” from the beginning.

The [Royal Star Transformation] state could activate various skills including [Scorching Dragon Kill]. The only conflict was the enhanced possession skill of [Scorching Dragon Possession]. It couldn’t be used with the [Royal Star Transformation].

Facing the dazzling “armored man,” Gustav was not too surprised. With a cold snort, he struck the man with a punch.

There was no change or after-trick in this punch. It was a simple blow, but there was an artistic conception of reducing the complexity to simplicity. Chen Rui actually couldn’t think of dodging at that moment.

Before the fist had reached his body, he could feel the oncoming whistling wind pressure. It was a pretty terrifying power!

Chen Rui didn’t withstand it forcefully. The space in front of him suddenly distorted, and a deep black hole appeared.

[Star Devouring].

In an instant, Gustav felt that his power was uncontrollably surging toward the black hole like a wave. The more he restrained his power, the swallowing power became stronger. He couldn’t help but to have a surprised expression in his eyes.

The power of this guy is even higher than I expected!

According to the normal frequency of [Star Devouring], no matter how strong Gustav was, his continuous output of power would be completely absorbed by the black hole at some point of time. Nevertheless, people were not dead objects. Especially Gustav, a Demon Overlord powerhouse who had extremely rich combat experience.

When Gustav shouted, his body shone with red light, and the muscles of his arms swelled tremendously. Chen Rui felt that the frequency of the “black hole” swallowing power suddenly accelerated. This acceleration was not the black hole’s function, but it automatically accelerated with the opponent’s surge of power.

The devouring frequency was getting higher and higher. Soon, it had surpassed the limit that the black hole itself could withstand. With an explosion sound, the space was distorted strangely, and the black hole actually disappeared without a trace. Gustav also staggered under the repulsive force field. There was a touch of redness in his eyes. A terrifying power was steaming on his swollen arm. It seemed that the blow just now cost him a larger amount of power beyond his expectation.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: There is not too much skill to break the [Star Devouring], it is purely unreasonable “brute force”! You devour the power? Just burst your digestion limit!

Chen Rui had used [Star Devouring] numerous times in the Super System space. It had devoured the soul of Glorfin, the peak stage Demon Overlord. Although in reality it was no better than the Super System that controlled everything, Gustav’s power was evident since he could break the black hole in the most direct way.

On the surface, the 2 sides were evenly matched. Gustav even suffered some injuries, but Chen Rui knew in his heart. Judging from the punch that exploded the black hole alone, I am not Gustav’s opponent even if I have used the [Royal Star Transformation]. The first general of the Bloody Empire really deserves to be the ruler of the Wrath Royal Family.

Since the night spy failed this time, and the opponent was Gustav, whom he couldn’t defeat, it was no longer suitable to stay here. Chen Rui had the intention to leave, and he began to plan quickly.

“I seem to have underestimated you, it seems that I have to be a little serious.” The bloodthirsty red began to appear in Gustav’s eyes again, “As an opponent who barely deserves my true strength, I can tell you one thing, I’m not a mutated bloodline. Among the 3 bloodline talents of the Samael Royal Family, I have only awakened 1 which is [Bloodfury]. My innate talent is not good, so I can only improve my only talent ability through constant battles. Now I can control the blood in my body at will and bring [Bloodfury] into the strongest state. I will use my real power in my next punch. I hope you won’t let me down.”

Gustav was not talking nonsense. While saying this, the red light of his body began to revolve quickly. The undulating blood vessels resembled the racing stream of the Salween River , the muscles of his arms began to swell abnormally. His terrifying power breath instantly skyrocketed to the top, and he punched again.

This punch contained an unrelenting determination. The terrifying pressure tore the air and even the space. The power contained in it was far greater than the punch that exploded the [Star Devouring] just now.

Chen Rui couldn’t dodge further. The dazzling stars on his body shone to the limit in an instant. Suddenly, Gustav felt a vast breath rushing toward his face as if he was surrounded by the ancient stars that travelled in time. There was a kind of unspeakable law in the stars all over. His action inexplicably slowed down. At this moment, all the “stars” burst open suddenly.
