[Star Explosion]!

If Chen Rui was still repressing when he battled against Adelaide previously, then he used all his strength this time in the [Star Explosion]. The 2 forces collided impactfully.

In an instant, the ground where the entire prince’s mansion was located shook violently. Even the defensive magic circle could not suppress such strong fluctuations. The figure with the flashing stars flew back, and he just fell into a strange light gate. He instantly disappeared without a trace.

Gustav still maintained the simple movement of punching. He was standing still like a mountain, but the whole arm that punched was badly mutilated. His bones could be fairly seen.

The most conspicuous was that the power of the stars lingered on his arm. They seemed to contain countless rampant sharp forces which caused the wound to spread rapidly at a speed visible to the naked eye. This was not just a phenomenon on the surface. What really couldn’t be seen was the weird Star Power that rushed into his body was wildly destroying the entire internal tissues and cells.

Gustav let out a low groan. His eyes became more red, and his entire arm swelled again. The blood that was forced out turned into a wisp of blood mist. In the midst of the blood mist, the stars finally dimmed and disappeared without a trace.

“Very good!” Gustav looked at his bloody arm. He seemed a little surprised by his injury with a trace of appreciation in his eyes, “Next time, I will keep your corpse.”

At the same time, in a house on the outskirts of the city, Chen Rui’s figure appeared out of thin air. He fell straight to the ground.

The originally gorgeous and star-shrouded armor became dimmer. There was a shocking fist mark on the chest. With this fist mark as the center, countless cracks extended to all directions.

As the Star Power in his body dissipated, the armor gradually disappeared, but Chen Rui could not stand up.

Despite the mighty power of the [Star Explosion], Gustav’s fist, which directly endured the power of the [Star Explosion], still got past [Star Explosion] and hit him. Chen Rui felt as if he was being penetrated by an indescribable force. In the penetration, there was also “shattering”.

“Boom! Boom! Boom!” A series of low explosion sounds sounded on Chen Rui’s body. His blood suddenly flooded to the ground. His internal organs had been severely damaged; some even shattered. If it was an ordinary person, he would be dead already. Fortunately, he had characteristics such as [Regeneration] and [Astral Form]. Although he was seriously injured, it was only a matter of time before he recovered.

Having said that, if it weren’t for the [Royal Star Transformation]’s armor and a layer of Mystic Jade Armor which would offset a part of the deadly power, perhaps the punch just now would punch a big hole in his chest. It would definitely be life-threatening.

What a Gustav! In particular, the absolute fist power of pure power can’t be matched with ordinary skills unless one has a similar level of power.

A thought came to Chen Rui. The true combat power of the first general of the Bloody Empire is perhaps higher than the early stage of the Demon Overlord!

In any case, I must overcome such terrifying punch power! Gustav is the next goal to surpass!

One punch man?

chapters.title: Chapter 452: Turbulence And Search
chapters.body:
Chapter 452: Turbulence And Search

The Bloody Empire Capital.

This period of time could be described as turbulent.

The genius prince Teris was severely punished for some unknown reasons. He could not see any outsiders for 6 months.

The Demon Realm’s top mechanic master and Mechanic Association’s president, Nate, used special talents to absorb other people’s skills. His evil deeds toward Master Fonsaq and others were exposed. The whistleblower was the future top appraisal master of the Demon Realm and emerging genius, Richard. Richard had another identity as a secret disciple of the dead Master Fonsaq. After exposing Nate’s true colors, he exploded himself with indignation. Nate was removed from office and imprisoned.

Second Prince Edmund and several ministers impeached Great Prince Aleus for acting arbitrarily and perversely. The important members of the second prince’s forces, including the third general of the empire, Adelaide, claimed they were ill to put pressure on Raizen the Great.

Raizen the Great scolded Second Prince Edmund’s impeachment and ordered Aleus to stay behind closed doors to reflect his wrongdoings.

When the dispute between the 2 great princes gradually subsided under Raizen the Great‘s equalization method punishing both parties, a big event suddenly happened. If the Nate incident shocked the mechanic world, then this incident shocked the entire Bloody Empire and even the Demon Realm.

The newly appointed third general, Bloodwave Legion’s commander, Adelaide, died at his home a few days ago!

The general of the Demon Realm’s strongest empire, one of the military’s 3 major leaders, actually died just like that; not on the battlefield, but in his own home!

Adelaide initially stayed at home following his illness claim in order to support Second Prince Edmund’s impeachment action, but this “disease” had become the real end!

General Adelaide was a Demon Emperor powerhouse. There must be a special reason for this inexplicable death. The leaders of the capital strictly blocked the news, and the people had different opinions. They were all guessing that Adelaide’s death must be related to the conflicts of the several princes.

In fact, Raizen the Great now had at least 2 of the most important related reports. The first was a secret memorandum by Adelaide. This secret memorandum was for Raizen in which Adelaide confessed some important things. It was worth noting that this secret memorandum had not been completed. Even so, the information revealed in it was enough to surprise Raizen. Perhaps this was the true cause of Adelaide’s death.

The second report was about a team leader of the secret intelligence department. This team leader was called Mentila. As he discovered some suspicious things about Adelaide, he was found and imprisoned by Adelaide, and he even disappeared for a period of time. When he was discovered, he had been dead for a long time. The team leader only left a special imprint when he was dying. This word appeared frequently in Adelaide’s secret memorandum as well.

This word was: “Bloodfall”.

This incident made Raizen very angry. He ordered a large-scale search of suspicious people throughout the capital and even the entire empire. Many nobles were even implicated. Judging from the unprecedented large scale hunting and striking on suspicious people, Raizen the Great was really serious this time.

In an instant, the Bloodfall organization was wiped out and bashed by the Bloody Empire, Dark Shadow Empire, and the Fallen Angel Empire at the same time. It was caught off guard and suffered heavy losses.

Perhaps even the Bloodfall did not understand why they were suddenly bashed at such a thunderous level. The Bloodfall even did not expect that the initiator of all this was a person who was “dead”.

This person was now rushing to Mountain Saxphil at the back of the Bloody Empire.

At this time, Chen Rui had almost fully recovered from all the injuries he suffered during the battle with Gustav. Through this time of recuperating, he had a further understanding of the basic law power he had realized on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, and his territory power changed correspondingly. In addition, the precious information and experiences in mechanics obtained from the 4th floor also benefited him a lot.

Adelaide certainly couldn’t live on. The position of the third general of the empire allowed Adelaide to provide more intel, convenience and even further spy on the secrets of the Bloodfall, but also due to the special status, the chance of Adelaide being exposed was too high. It was almost 100%. Chen Rui didn’t think he could get past the eyes of Raizen.

Therefore, after Chen Rui’s repeated consideration, he decided to let Adelaide die abruptly. He did not want Raizen or the Bloodfall to detect the involvement of third parties. Chen Rui also made use of the previously dead secret intelligence department team leader, Mentila. “

Mentila was just a minor character, even if 100 of him died, it would not attract too much attention. However, with Adelaide’s death, his “identity” would undoubtedly rise according to the situation. In fact, there was not much information about the Bloodfall revealed by the 2. Especially Mentila only left a word, but it was enough to attract Raizen’s attention.

As for the special imprint of the secret intelligence department used in Mentila’s “last words”, it was the result of Dark Demon’s investigation. “

Perhaps Raizen had known and paid attention to the force of the “Bloodfall” long ago. The death of Third General Adelaide was just a trigger for him to eliminate the Bloodfall aggressively now. At the same time, he could shift the focus and relatively play down the contradiction between Edmund and Aleus. It could be said to kill two birds with one stone.

The turmoil of the Bloody Empire had nothing to do with Chen Rui now. He pretty much avenged for Fonsaq, and he had inflicted heavy damage on the Bloodfall. When he found the Fertile Yuan Soil, he would return to the Dark Moon Estate.

As planned, Shea who visited the Dark Shadow Empire returned to the Dark Moon earlier. The cooperation between Bloody Vine Flower Estate and the Dark Moon had reached a stable stage now. The thousand-person magician legion promised by General Crawford should be in place already. This was a huge gain.

Along the way, Chen Rui encountered a lot of the Bloody Empire Army that “was striking down” on suspicious people. Not only the army, but almost all of the secret intelligence department were also dispatched. They struck together overtly and secretly. The extent of attack was even above the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire. This was Raizen’s style. He wouldn’t simply make a move, but when he did, he would go all out.”

Fortunately, Chen Rui ordered the Dark Demon to stop spying activities long ago to avoid the limelight temporarily so as not to harm the innocent ones.

After going through many investigations along the way, Chen Rui finally entered Mountain Saxphil in the northernmost part of the Bloody Empire. Saxphil Mountain Range was originally a sparsely populated and desolate mountainous area. Further north was an undeveloped land with no people. The same was true on the edges of other empires. For instance, the Dead Sea in the southernmost part of the Blue Lava Estate. The Dead Sea still had regions to the south. The Demon Realm was very large which was far beyond the reach of the 3 empires. However, unless the empire’s population soared, their border would not expand into this area.

Chen Rui had seen the appearance of Mountain Seckred on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, but because the Saxphil Mountain Range was too vast, and there were many lofty mountains and ridges were surrounded by clouds and fog, it could not be spotted clearly even via flying. Chen Rui had a feeling of finding a needle in a haystack.

Chen Rui wandered around the Saxphil Mountain Range for nearly half a month without any results. He had travelled for some time now. Even if Shea used various reasons for dispatches to cover him up, he, the financial officer, couldn’t go “missing” for a long time.

These days were not for nothing. The Saxphil Mountain Range contained rich resources. Chen Rui couldn’t detect the underground mine. However, with the help of the [Analytical Eyes] and [Deep Analysis] information, many rare plants and most of the medicinal materials were transplanted into the Star Garden. Some were stored in the storage warehouse.

In addition, he also encountered a lot of fierce and dangerous demonic beasts. The stronger the demonic beasts, the higher the wisdom. Since Chen Rui’s body exuded Demon Emperor-level breath,he could deter most demonic beasts. Although some fights did happen, there were not too many dangers in general.

On this day, Chen Rui found a purple bloodberry at the foot of the mountain. This plant had certain toxicity, but it was also a rare medicinal material. Chen Rui transplanted this purple bloodberry into the Star Garden and continued to move forward. He found out that such poisonous plants gradually increased, then he heard an abnormal sound from the front.

Chen Rui followed the source of the sound and approached over. The sound became louder and louder. The sound of fighting? It seems to be… a group fighting?

Sure enough, he saw a lot of black shadows flying across the sky. When he looked closely, it was a group of birds fighting. The larger ones were the more common black eagles. There were 4 of them in total. They were powerful predator birds. They were fast, and their claws’ strength was particularly outstanding.They could grab and fly freely with 300 kilograms of prey.

The other was a thin bird with yellow pointed beaks and claws. There were about a dozen of them. Even ordinary ground beasts were slightly deterred by predator birds like black eagle, but this kind of bird was not afraid to attack.

After all, power had the absolute advantage. Several of the little red birds were injured. Chen Rui gradually noticed that the black eagles’ target was a few nests on a big tree below where the frightened cries of the young birds were faintly heard.

Putting the black eagle aside, the little red bird caught Chen Rui’s attention. This kind of bird is a bit like…

The little red birds gradually couldn’t hold their defense, and they suddenly mutated. One of the birds’ bodies instantly swelled into a ball, then it burst apart. The force of self-explosion was very violent. The black eagles growled as their feathers scattered around. They were obviously severely injured. “

It’s really them! Even if the little red birds were still outside the range of the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could already affirm their name: blast bird!

According to the information on the 4th floor of the Mechanic Association’s Book Collection Hall, the blast bird is a special species in the Mountain Seckred area!

However, he had been around this area for 2 or 3 days, and he did not see the trace of the white mountain in the data.

At this time, the black eagles changed their strategy and stopped fighting. They rushed toward the nest on the tree separately. As their speed was very fast, even if the blast bird behind self-exploded, it couldn’t keep up. In an anxious moment, 1 black eagle had swooped above the nest. Those baby birds were about to be caught.

Suddenly, its movements stagnated. Its wings fluttered, and it changed its direction abruptly. It actually fled without looking back. Not only this one, but also the other 2.

The blast birds also appeared more panicked because the dangerous breath that suddenly appeared in the nest below was far beyond the level they could match, but the explosion birds still shrieked and rushed down recklessly.

That kind of breath suddenly changed. Although it was still very powerful, it was filled with a trace of friendliness. The human figure emitting the breath appeared in front of the nest. The baby bird’s thinking was quite simple. After feeling the friendly and cordial breath, there was no longer panic and fear in their sound. Some even opened their mouths and began to fight for the food in the hands of the human figure.

The wisdom of the blast birds was not very high, but it had the characteristics of distinct likes and dislikes. After seeing this human figure drove away the black eagles and protected the young birds, their sharp shriek gradually turned into peaceful chirping.

Would the blast birds show him the way to the Mountain Seckred?

chapters.title: Chapter 453: Seckred! Floating Mountain
chapters.body:
Chapter 453: Seckred! Floating Mountain

Chen Rui’s action of saving the young birds and his communication with the [Analytical Eyes] succeeded in getting the favor of this flock of blast birds.

Now that the blast birds had appeared, then Mountain Seckred should be nearby. The wisdom of the blast birds was not high, so the intel they could provide was limited.

During the communication, Chen Rui learned that there was a bizarre “mountain summit” here. At the time of breeding, many blast birds fly out from the “mountain summit” and come here. The temperature and poisonous plants here were quite conducive to the breeding of the blast bird. There were not many natural enemies. The black eagles today were an exception because the number of blast birds in this flock was relatively small. Generally speaking, even the black eagles would not dare to interrupt a big flock.

After breeding to a certain number, the blast birds would fly to the “mountain summit” again. However, it was easy to get out, but it was much more difficult to get in. They could only enter again occasionally, so there were groups of blast birds flying back and forth all day long.

In fact, there were more powerful natural enemies in the “mountain summit”. The degree of danger was much greater, but the blast birds had the instinct that there was a force in the “mountain summit” that could evolve them to be more powerful, so they still insisted on entering it. As they were being preyed on and eaten by stronger demonic beasts after entering, their population would greatly reduce. Then, they fly out to breed and enter again. They formed a strange migration and food chain relationship with this continuous cycle.

Under the lead of the blast birds, Chen Rui found the “mountain summit”. It was a towering peak surrounded by clouds and mist. He could see flocks of blast birds constantly flying in the air. They looked like they wanted to get into an invisible entrance.

With so many blast birds, even those demonic beasts such as black eagles did not dare to come close. From a distance, the large number of blast birds were like dark clouds surrounding the peak. It was a spectacular sight.

Wait, why doesn’t it look the same at all? Judging from the appearance, the color and shape of the mountain are completely different. Chen Rui was puzzled. He looked at the blast birds that were constantly flying in the air.

The flying height of these blast birds are much higher than that of the top of the mountain. It is also higher than that of ordinary birds. Could it be said that the mountain beneath is not Mountain Seckred, but it’s in the air instead?

Chen Rui’s mind moved, and his body gradually flew up. The powerful breath he exuded and some “harmonious” signals released by the blast birds around him prevented him from being attacked by the “dark clouds”. He soon flew to the top of the mountain.

Chen Rui didn’t stop. He kept flying upward, but it was empty; there was nothing there. Looking down, he could only see the sea of clouds, mountains and fog. However, the higher he went, the stronger was a feeling in his heart. It was like the feeling he had when he was outside the Rainbow Valley for the first time.

At that time, he did not know ancient runes. He did not have the great achievement of the magic circles and Dragon Inscriptions that he had currently. Now that Chen Rui’s magic circle had reached almost the highest level of the Demon Realm, his basic knowledge of ancient runes was basically complete, second only to the fairy dragon Zola, but when facing this empty sky, he still felt the same hazy and even blurry feeling.

He was like a primary school student with excellent math grades who suddenly came to the world of advanced math before he entered junior high school.

Chen Rui faintly “sniffed” the breath of ancient runes. The more so, the more surprised he was. Suddenly, he thought of an old saying: There is no limit in the universe. (Meaning however strong you are, there is always someone stronger.)

In terms of strength, due to the large number of powerhouses, Chen Rui had perceived himself at a low position. He had set one after another goals for him to surpass as a driving force to advance and become stronger. From Arux at the beginning to Gustav now, he was able to soar in such a short period of time not only with the help of the Super System, his own understanding and opportunity, but more importantly, the heart of a powerhouse that kept forging ahead and surpassing himself.

But what about the other fields?

Trio-specialized genius mechanic master, magic circle genius, ancient runes genius, economic genius, strategy genius, grand master level black potion owner, artifact maker… In these aspects, there were indeed very few people who could match him. However, it also made him feel complacent unconsciously.

This kind of complacency was not just about self-confidence, but more about pride. In many cases, “complacency” and “stagnation” were equal.

When Chen Rui turned his head suddenly now, he realized that at some point of time, he had become so complacent. The trio-specialized master and magic circle genius rely more on the [Deep Analysis] function of the Super System; the black potions and artifacts are simply the products of the Super System; in terms of economy and planning, they are basically plagiarised from the experience of my previous life. I am just lucky and a slightly clever crossover. What if I don’t have the Super System?

In fact, even with the assistance of the Super System, I still end up in such a situation today.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui suddenly felt sweaty and suddenly enlightened. That’s right. I can only further improve by clearly recognizing myself. To know oneself and the enemy would one win the battle. First of all, I must “know myself”.

With a short thought, Chen Rui seemed to have awakened after thousands of years of thinking. His mind had undergone some subtle changes accordingly. Although his strength had not risen significantly, he felt that the road in front of him was broader and clearer. The strength could be continuously increased by hard training, but the improvement of this state of mind was mainly based on the word “enlightenment” which needs opportunities. It can be met but not sought.

As Chen Rui’s mind improved, he became calm. He began to use the knowledge he had learned. He tried to test and magnify the “feeling” of the ancient runes.

After he calmed down completely, the feeling became stronger and stronger. The stronger it was, the more the mystery he felt. Initially with Chen Rui’s current ability, he could not enter forcefully as he did when he was at the Rainbow Valley. However, due to the entry and exit of the blast birds, a “flaw” deliberately appeared; perhaps for the purpose of maintaining a certain biological chain. Therefore, the original “entrance” that was originally unreachable became faintly traceable.

However, he couldn’t unlock this “flaw” to enter it in a short time.

Chen Rui had an idea. He summoned the blast birds that he was close to. He imitated the blast bird to test the “first person” method, and he finally made breakthrough progress.

If he was an ordinary Demon Emperor, perhaps it was hard to stay suspended in the air, but Chen Rui’s [Flying] skill was by no means comparable to the ordinary Demon Emperor powerhouses. After repeated experiments, Chen Rui finally felt dazzled and dizzy. The transparent “air” in front of him was suddenly replaced with another completely different scene.

Although he was mentally prepared, this dizzy feeling still caused a strong visual impact. It was not only abrupt, but it was also because of that mysterious power.

There was a white mountain which seemed to be no different from the rest. However, the mountain was actually floating in the air. Chen Rui’s first impression was not familiar, but the kind of momentum, the ancient feeling and desolation that came to his face which he did not sense in that small world on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall. Then, the second feeling was familiarity. Mountain Seckred!

Mountain Seckred, which is called the sacred mountain in the information on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall, is actually such a mysterious mountain floating in the air!

The blast birds next to Chen Rui saw Mountain Seckred and chirped happily. They fluttered their wings and flew forward. They soon submerged in the mist-shrouded forest.

Chen Rui flew toward this white floating mountain. As soon as he landed, he felt a strange feeling in his heart. No matter where he was, no matter who he disguised as, he was the “external element” of the whole mountain. His every move seemed to be extremely eye-catching. If there was someone in the mountain, he could be found without any effort.

This was somewhat similar to the feeling of being in Teris’ mansion, but Teris relied on strategy and tricks, whereas this place had real mysterious runes and laws.

The range of this mountain was much larger than the area that he saw from the outside. After Chen Rui walked for a long time, he was only at the foot of the mountain. Chen Rui had a hunch that its true range would exceed the entire huge Saxphil Mountain Range! It was like a “world”.

Territory! The entire Mountain Seckred is a territory that incorporates the ancient runes!

Being able to cover such a huge mountain range with territory and having that kind of strange feeling is no longer within the ability of Demon Overlord powerhouses.

Could this be what a Demi-God powerhouse left behind?

He only knew that there was Fertile Yuan Soil from the information he had, but he didn’t know the specific location, so he could only explore it step by step.

After Chen Rui walked for a long time, he finally found a white step leading to the front. The step was clean and spotless. There was not even a moss. Perhaps someone was cleaning or it was the magic effect of the territory.

Chen Rui walked up the steps. As he walked, he suddenly stopped.

A ghostly black figure swooped down from the sky.

Race: Gargoyle.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C

Strength: C, Physique: C-, Spirit: E, Speed: C.

Attribute: Dark attribute.

The information immediately surfaced in Chen Rui’s mind. Gargoyle: Ancient alchemy product with flying ability; some mutated ones have independent thinking; strong defense; immune to spiritual magic; halves magic damage.

To be precise, the gargoyle was a kind of semi-“mechanical” semi-living creature which was quite similar to the crystal men. It completely ignored the Demon Emperor-level threat breath that Chen Rui exuded and still rushed down.

It was just a Demon King-level gargoyle. Chen Rui just raised his hand into the air, and the gargoyle was controlled by a force that was 3 meters away. This gargoyle had the same appearance as the 4th floor data. Its whole body was jet-black with a beast head and human body. It had red eyes and sharp claws on its hands and feet. There was a pair of bat wings on its back. The material of the whole body seemd to be some kind of stone.

Although the gargoyle was under control, it still moved its claws fiercely in this direction like it would not give up until death.

Chen Rui frowned suddenly. There was already a group of black shadows in the sky forming a huge circle. They surrounded his location, and the number of shadows kept on increasing.

Just by looking at the number of shadows in the current group, there were as many as tens of thousands. If they were all of Demon King level or even higher level, even if Chen Rui was a Demon Emperor, he would definitely be exhausted to death. He suddenly had goosebumps.

“Intruder of the sacred mountain, die.”

This was a cold female voice. Her voice was a bit familiar, but her tone was full of unfamiliar coldness and murder intent.

Ehh, must be woman???

chapters.title: Chapter 454: Tiffany? A Familiar Yet Unfamiliar Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 454: Tiffany? A Familiar Yet Unfamiliar Girl

Chen Rui raised his head, and his gaze turned to a woman who appeared out of nowhere on the stairs in the distance. This woman was dressed in a white shirt. She was well-proportioned with long light blue hair and a veil on her face. A cold and mysterious temperament exuded from her entire body.

Chen Rui was taken aback and blurted out, “Tiffany?”

When the woman heard the name Chen Rui shouted, her eyes flashed. The aura she exuded was even colder.

Chen Rui immediately rejected this assumption. The woman in front of him was exactly the same in figure, voice or attire, but that kind of temperament was too far apart. In his impression, Tiffany was an innocent, cute, and no-scheming girl while the woman in front of him, despite the extremely similar appearance, had a completely different temperament. Especially the piercing cold murderous intent made him shudder.

Based on her tone, this woman is actually the owner of this Mountain Seckred? Or maybe she got something left by a Demi-God?

By the way, Tiffany seems to be familiar with Mountain Seckred previously. She even knows who is in it. Does she have a close relationship with this similar woman? Or is Tiffany also a person from the “sacred mountain”?

It had 90% possibility, but Chen Rui didn’t have much time to think about it because the gargoyles in the air had already swooped down one after another.

“Wait, miss. I’m here…”

The woman was not affected or hesitant at all, but she looked at him coldly. Seeing that gargoyles were coming fiercely, Chen Rui knew that the fight was unavoidable. Once he moved his hand, the red light in the controlled gargoyle’s eyes extinguished instantly. Its black body became grey. It turned into a real stone in an instant, and it fell to the ground and broke apart.

Almost at the same time, the dozens of gargoyles that swooped down suddenly reflected in white. The light source was a dazzling and huge light ball. Wherever the light ball passed, the gargoyles turned into ashes and shattered. There were 7 light balls which shot out like shot bullets. One after another gargoyles fell to the ground. Rubbles were scattering everywhere.

However, these deaths were nothing to the huge number of gargoyles. Just as Chen Rui blasted the [Aurora Shot], more gargoyles rushed down from all directions at a fast speed. This made Chen Rui didn’t even have the time to control the directions of the [Aurora Shot].

A faint light lit up in Chen Rui’s hand. The countless black shadows that charged downward were blasted apart before they could get close. Chen Rui’s 2 blades were like lightning. He fought while progressing forward. Along the way, there were shattered gargoyle corpses. He was still paying attention to that woman, staying away from her as much as possible.

Although there were so many gargoyles in the sky, he felt that the woman in white clothes was far more dangerous than the gargoyles. It was only due to her location that the [Analytical Eyes] couldn’t sense the woman’s specific information. Chen Rui eventually didn’t have much time to pay attention to the woman because there were too many gargoyles.

The gargoyle’s highest strength consisted only of the dozens Great Demon Kings. Some even had certain consciousness. These were not really frightening. The most terrifying thing was the overall number and fearlessness of death. Under wave after wave of rampant attack, Chen Rui finally felt a little overwhelmed. The ground was already covered with shattered gray stones. There were also several scars on his body.

This kind of scar was not a big deal, but the current number of gargoyles wiped out was less than one tenth. They were still densely packed which caused a severe headache to Chen Rui. Chen Rui’ had greatly exhausted his physical strength. If he continued to fight like this, he would definitely die of exhaustion.

Of course, Chen Rui’s trump cards were much more than these. There were Northsea Excalibur, Scorching Dragon, [Royal Star Transformation], and the ultimate escape skill [Star Gate]. However, the mysterious woman was watching him. There were even many more unknown dangers. He couldn’t show his cards all at once. The most important matter that he came here with all the hard work was for the biggest goal: Fertile Yuan Soil.

In any case, this batch of gargoyle must be solved first. He still had not activated the most powerful group attack skill, [True Destructive Aura Blow].

[True Destructive Aura Blow] could instantly split all hostile creatures within 30 meters in diameter by the high-speed sword qi, but he could only use it once per hour. If the number of gargoyles was 1,000, Chen Rui was absolutely sure to destroy all of them, but there were thousands of gargoyles in front of him. Moreover, they were widespread, and they flew fast. Even if he used this powerful skill, [Destructive Aura Blow], he couldn’t completely destroy all of them at once.

Chen Rui shifted his mind and jumped into the air with a tap on the feet. He actually took the initiative to rush toward the gargoyle group. The gargoyles immediately surrounded him from all directions. Chen Rui’s flying skill was stronger than the average Demon Emperor, but in terms of speed, he was still slightly inferior to these speedily flying monsters. As they were about to surround him, suddenly there was a strange sound of [Sonic Boom]. The “target” suddenly sped up, then slowed down after going around. The gargoyle continued to surround him, then the [Sonic Boom] sounded again. The dense black shadows quickly changed formations, looping into a circle. In this roundabout “flee”, the vast majority of gargoyle was gathered together.

This is the time! Chen Rui’s eyes flashed brightly. In an instant, all the gargoyles felt their bodies sank, and their weight suddenly increased. This was the only magic Chen Rui knew, [Gravity] which was blessed by the Earth Elemental King.

With his Demon Emperor-level spirit power plus element blessing, the black shadows within the radius of tens of meters all fell simultaneously. It was like a pouring rain. Chen Rui flew down too. When he rushed to the most suitable position in the range, his hand lit up with a strange light. In the blink of an eye, many golden lights flashed from the falling black shadow at the same time which looked like jumping texts. In fact, they were actually cut by countless fine and sharp sword qi at high speed.

It started to rain in the sky; rubbles rain.

The tens of thousands of gargoyles that were fierce and ruthless just now turned into countless lifeless fragments that scattered on the ground. Even the white-clothed woman couldn’t help but to have a surprised expression in her eyes: This invader only has Demon Emperor level strength. That kind of killing move is obviously not a territory power, but it can kill tens of thousands of powerful gargoyles in a flash. The power of this move is really amazing!

Chen Rui’s figure slowly landed on the ground. His face was pale, and his breathing seemed a bit rapid. The power of this [Destructive Aura Blow] was indeed amazing, but the greater the number of group attackers, the greater the power consumed. He also consumed additional aura value. Since he killed thousands of them in an instant which consumed a lot of Star Power, even with [Astral Form] and 3 Spirits, he still felt hard to sustain. A Yuan Recovery Tree appeared in front of Chen Rui. Coupled with his body’s characteristic of automatic recovery, he quickly recovered the lost physical strength.

Although the previous move was very successful, there were still nearly half of the black shadows in the sky. He had considered the maximum enemies that the space could hold just now. Unfortunately, the range of the [Destructive Aura Blow] was limited, and he could no longer use it within an hour. Just as he was about to take out the Northsea sword, the woman’s voice sounded again, “Invader, how dare you kill so many servants of the sacred mountain. Death alone cannot offset your crime.”

The white-clothed woman slowly walked down the stairs. Initially, the distance between the 2 was more than 100 meters, but the woman just moved her feet lightly like a stroll in the garden, and she had reached Chen Rui’s eyes rapidly.

Race: Greed Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+ (S)

Physique: C- (S-), Strength: C (S-), Spirit: C (S), Agility: C (S)

[Analysis]: Dark attribute, light attribute.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: Her attribute is exactly the same as Tiffany! If race, power level, and quality characteristics are just a coincidence, what about that unique light and dark attribute?

The woman in front of her was exuding icy breath. Her black eyes were particularly full of real murderous intent. Chen Rui even sensed a kind of disgust and hatred. It was difficult to connect her with that innocent and approachable girl. Could it be that Tiffany is…

Without waiting for Chen Rui to react, an extremely dangerous omen rushed into his mind. Chen Rui initiated a teleport without hesitation.

The ground was trembling! A huge hole had appeared in his original location. The nearby steps had collapsed. In this place full of mysterious territory breath and ancient runes protection, she actually caused such terrifying damage. It could be seen that the other party did not hold back at all.

Terrifying speed! Terrifying attack power!

If he used his eyesight, he wouldn’t be able to see the movement of “Tiffany” just now. He could only use his senses. Since the opponent had the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord’s power, he couldn’t match with her even if he used the [Royal Star Transformation].

The teleportation skill did not have much function in high-level battles because the teleport distance was limited. The speed at which the powerhouses move within this distance was actually not much different from teleport. When Chen Rui just escaped the blow, he immediately felt that he was targeted by a grim murderous intent. The next blow would definitely be remarkably shocking.

“Wait a minute!”

“Tiffany, I’m your friend, Simon!” Chen Rui knew that the situation was critical, so he immediately shouted. In fact, he and Tiffany had only met each other at best.

“Remember the crystal board? The game item that can eliminate the cubes?”

Tiffany paused and frowned. However, she only paused for 2 seconds, then she punched mercilessly. Chen Rui cursed in his heart. In desperation, he had to teleport again to avoid it. There was no longer a third teleport. If he didn’t use the [Royal Star Transformation], the next blow would be life-threatening, Even running away would be a problem.

I didn’t expect I would inexplicably fight this terrifying woman before I see the Fertile Yuan Soil that I am looking for, so. The most troublesome thing is that I am not her opponent.

At this moment, the gargoyles circling in the sky dispersed as if they suddenly received some instructions. At the same time, a voice sounded, “Wait a minute.”

The voice was indifferent and ethereal. It was heard from the sky, but it seemed to be sounded in his ear.

“Tiffany” appeared almost instantaneously not far in front of Chen Rui’s right, but she withdrew her fist abruptly.

Chen Rui’s pupils suddenly shrank. The voice just now seemed far away. A profile of a person appeared in the [Analytical Eyes]. The person was right behind the woman in front of him.

If it weren’t for the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui would not have felt that there was another man in his sight. He looked young with handsome features. He didn’t exude any strong breath, but he seemed to have merged with the world.

Chen Rui clearly stood on a higher ground, but in his eyes, he could only look up at the man. The information displayed by the [Analytical Eyes] made him almost unable to suppress the horror in his heart.

Race: Unable to determine!

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine!

[Analysis]: Extremely dangerous!

Is the man “Tiffany’s” master who had the Demi-God power?

chapters.title: Chapter 455: Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 455: Conditions

If Raizen gave people the unfathomable feeling of being entirely proficient without revealing his breath, then the man in front of him felt “natural”. He integrated with the entire Mountain Seckred, which was the world, as a whole. His breathing or his gaze could affect the power of the “world”.

From this point alone, the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse Raizen had fallen behind.

In other words, this man had long surpassed the category of ordinary powerhouses.

Chen Rui finally understood that he was wrong at the beginning! This is not a ruin! It’s simply… the place where the super powerhouse lives in seclusion!

No matter from his feeling or the data of the [Analytical Eyes], the power of this man is at least Demon Supremo level, which is Demi-God!

This man was the most powerful presence whom Chen Rui had ever seen since he crossed over to this world!

Just as the middle-level Great Demon King and Demon King needed to look up to the existence of the high-level Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord, there was a huge gap between Demon Overlord and Demon Supremo as well. Even the powerful Paglio in the peak stage in the past was sealed by just a simple gesture of the Demon Supremo powerhouse.

Beyond the level of Demon Overlord, he could already be regarded as a super powerhouse!

Above the super powerhouse, there were still gods. However, the silent gods had not shown miracles for some tens of thousands of years. Compared with the gods who had become legends, the Demi-God super powerhouse that occasionally showed up was the supreme existence on this plane!

According to this situation, the power of the man should probably be Demi-God level.

“Teacher.” “Tiffany” showed respect and retreated behind the man. This title surprised Chen Rui. It turned out that Tiffany was a disciple of this powerhouse!

The man didn’t look at Tiffany. His gaze turned on Chen Rui with a strange look, “You can actually sense my existence so quickly? Also, it seems that you understand something?”

The man had already noticed when Chen Rui noticed the man. The man also grasped a trace of his emotional fluctuations.

“Respected powerhouse, my name is Simon.” Chen Rui had recovered from the shock and bowed sincerely. If he wanted to take a risk with the [Royal Star Transformation] just now, there was completely no fluke now. In front of this level of powerhouse, there was no fluke at all.

“Simon?” The man’s eyes circled around Chen Rui’s body. Chen Rui suddenly felt like he was naked with almost no secrets at all.

“I haven’t seen a stranger for a long time. Whether it is strength or luck, it is a rare opportunity that you can come here. If you are ordinary demons, you should get a precious gift. Unfortunately, you have a kind of smell that I hate. I’ll give you a minute to grasp your destiny, maybe you can change the ending of your annihilation.”

The man’s plain tone carried an unquestionable affirmation as if he was the god who has the power to decide life and death, arbitrarily deciding the ending of an ant.

Without seeing the other party’s actions, Chen Rui felt tense. He was already locked in by a strange force. For a while, he could not actually activate any skills. He couldn’t help but recall the scene in the Rainbow Valley Demi-God space back then. The current situation is much worse than it was, because he is a real Demi-God powerhouse!

Chen Rui said quickly, “Respected powerhouse, please forgive me for invading here. I was commissioned by a partner to find something extremely important to him and his ethnic group. This thing is called Fertile Yuan Soil.”

The man nodded slightly, “Fertile Yuan Soil is of vital importance to the earth elementals. You should not be lying. But if I didn’t see it with my own eyes, it would be hard to believe that the Kings of Darkness would actually choose someone like you for element blessing.”

It seems that this man saw the [Gravity] that I used to destroy the gargoyles. He not only saw it, but he also saw through many things. Chen Rui was no stranger to the term “King of Darkness”. The Water Elemental King mentioned similar terms in Town Lupin. Obviously, the Kings of Darkness refers to the 3 kings of dark element, earth element and water element.

It was just that Chen Rui faintly felt that the man had a particular prejudice against him from the beginning because of a certain “nasty smell”?

“The Elemental War may be a reason to let you survive today, but it’s just ‘maybe’.” The man groaned a little and put away the coldness in his eyes, “I will give you 2 choices now. First, I can give you Fertile Yuan Soil, but you must join my territory kingdom to become the eternal servant of Mountain Seckred. The reason for giving you such a gift is purely because of ‘something’ in you. Of course, there was also an outstanding performance that made me feel a little bit unexpected.”

The man’s words made Chen Rui bow his head and remain silent. The so-called territory kingdom should be the entire Mountain Seckred. This might be the territory mystery of the Demi-God powerhouse. It could also be regarded as the prototype of the [Kingdom of God].

Chen Rui certainly didn’t want to be an eternal servant, but it was obviously quite difficult to entertain the super powerhouse in front of him. Even if he could escape Mountain Seckred by chance, he might also bring terrifying disasters to his friends and lovers.

“You actually wanted to refuse?” The man understood Chen Rui’s thoughts immediately. A strange smile appeared on his face, “You may have guessed my level, but you don’t know how great a gift I can give you which others didn’t get to have. I can increase your lifespan by at least 200 years. As a servant of the sacred mountain, you will also have special abilities such as…”

When the man glanced at “Tiffany” behind him, the body of “Tiffany” immediately emitted a strange light. A small set of half maroon armor appeared on her body. It emitted a jewel-like light. Her momentum became stronger.

“The [Armor of Faith] can merge and greatly enhance the power of the user. It can also enhance the power of dark magic. The stronger my territory kingdom is, the stronger the power of this [Armor of Faith]. Once my territory kingdom is promoted to the true Kingdom of God, then the armor will undergo greater changes. At the same time, those who have the [Armor of Faith] will be directly promoted to oracles who will spread faith and hold important positions in the Kingdom of God.

Chen Rui fixed his eyes on Tiffany’s armor. The shock in his heart was beyond the limit. It was not because of the special ability of the [Armor of Faith], but because he also had a similar “armor”——[Royal Star Transformation]!

The [Royal Star Transformation] also requires faith crystals to be activated. Is it the same principle? This man’s territory was just this Mountain Seckred while Chen Rui’s own “kingdom” was a complete solar system!

Although the current life is only a blue planet, and the number is limited, it will definitely continue to expand in the future. Consequently, the power of faith will become stronger and more. This seems to represent that the [Royal Star Transformation] armor will also become more powerful?

Chen Rui thought of “spiritual link” and [Link Enhancement] and had a thought. Not only can the [Royal Star Transformation] be further strengthened, if my strength reaches a certain level in the future l, can I also bestow the [Armor of Faith] to others like this man?

The mighty man could only sense Chen Rui’s ecstasy. He didn’t know that this guy’s “body” actually had an existence similar to the real God’s Kingdom which was far beyond his current territory kingdom of the “sacred mountain”. The so-called ecstasy was completely different from what he expected.

“Respected powerhouse, can I listen to the second option?”

Chen Rui’s question caused the man to frown slightly, then he sneered, “Very well. I didn’t like a servant like you very much anyway. It’s just because… If that’s the case, then it means you have given up your first choice.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect the man to be so merciless. Before he could explain it, the man had already spoken, “The second option is to exchange the equivalent items for Fertile Yuan Soil. You have 3 chances. If you can’t take out an item that interests me within 10 minutes, I don’t mind exchanging it with your lowly life.”

The threat of death at every turn made Chen Rui secretly furious, but the man’s strength was too terrifying, and he didn’t have the slightest ability to resist. In the face of this absolute strength, no matter how clever he was, he had no choice but to obey honestly to the game’s rules.

Strength is the utmost rule in the world.

After Chen Rui thought for a while, he pretended to take out a handful of fruits from the space ring, “These are my treasures. I don’t know if I can exchange them for sir’s Fertile Yuan Soil?”

The man glanced at them, “Devil fruit, devil pomeg… and that kind of unknown exotic fruit. If they are in the empires outside, they should cause a sensation. Unfortunately, here and the outside world are 2 concepts. They have no value at all.”

In addition to rare fruits such as devil fruit, Chen Rui also had fruits that would increase aura. Unfortunately, the other party was too lazy to even take a look. He was obviously not interested.

What is interesting for a Demi-God powerhouse? Artifact?

Exposing artifacts would cause unknown troubles, but at present, survival was the priority. It was just that he had not yet collected or refined some relatively common materials, even though he had gained a lot in the Mechanic Association. Therefore, Chen Rui had never produced the new artifacts. The ready-made artifacts had already recognized their owner, so he certainly couldn’t take them out to perfuse the man. Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he took out a round bead which was glowing with a blue light.

This was a treasure previously offered by Dodo. It contained powerful water elements. The Earth Elemental King once said that this was not an elemental heart, but it seemed to be a rare treasure.

“Crown of Wave?” The man still glanced at it, “You should take it to the Water Elemental King, not here. You have 1 last chance, perhaps the last time in your life.”

Chen Rui just learned that this “bead” was actually called the Crown of Wave. Judging from the man’s tone, it should be something that the Water Elemental King attached great importance to, but he had no time to think about it now because he only had one last chance.

The man’s voice was still very calm. The surrounding breath had no murderous intent. Chen Rui did not think this was a joke at all. If he couldn’t show an item that would interest the man next, then he would definitely end up being killed instantly.

At the juncture of life and death, Chen Rui took a deep breath. There is only the black potion left. Although this may expose a lot of matters, in order to save my life, I cannot care about so much. I don’t know if the Demi-God powerhouse is interested in black potions. If even this can’t attract him, then there is really only a dead end.

The moment Chen Rui wanted to take out the black potion, he suddenly thought of something. There was already something in his hand: A “flower”.

This flower seemed to be formed by some kind of crystal. It was about the size of 2 fists, and it exuded an alluring red.

As soon as he took it out, the man’s gaze changed. Chen Rui felt dizzy, and he was instantly shrouded in a terrifying breath. In an instant, he had an illusion of being annihilated. A ghastly voice that penetrated his soul came to his ear, “Flower of Abyss! Where did this come from?”

chapters.title: Chapter 456: The Black Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 456: The Black Dragon

The huge sense of crisis made Chen Rui dare not hesitate. He immediately told what happened at the crystal mine underground in the Crystal Valley that day. After a while, the feeling of terror gradually faded.

The alluring red flower called the “Flower of Abyss” was already floating on the man’s palm. It was covered with a transparent round light film. The man seemed to be cautious.

Looking at the Flower of Abyss, the man fell into deep thought. After a long time, he finally said, “The true value of the Flower of Abyss is more than Fertile Yuan Soil. Fertile Yuan Soil is at the Blackwood Cliff to the west. You can find and take it away by yourself. I will not interfere with any of your actions. I need to remind you that this is also a test. If you can successfully obtain Fertile Yuan Soil, I will give you a precious gift and let you leave safely.”

Chen Rui didn’t say much. He bowed, turned to the west, and disappeared into the forest in the blink of an eye.

“After so many years, the Abyss Family is still thinking about resurgence?” The light film in the man’s hand suddenly turned red, and the Flower of Abyss within it began to tremble. It actually let out a miserable howl, and the flower was quickly annihilated. It finally turned into a pile of ashes.

“Tiffany” behind the man said, “Teacher, do you want me to kill that person?” The man shook his head, “I said this is a test. If he can retrieve Fertile Yuan Soil from Ozpheus, it will be enough to prove his worth. He may become a very useful piece in the plan… Even if I estimated wrongly, at least he can be used as a toy to pass the time.

Chen Rui didn’t know that the Flower of Abyss had been destroyed. After leaving the man’s line of sight, he felt that the entire tense nerves finally relaxed. The man only released a trace of breath when he saw the Flower of Abyss, and he did not exert more pressure; but standing opposite the man, his life was like a candle light in the opponent’s hand. It would be blown out with the man’s single breath.

Demi-God Demon Supremo was indeed not comparable to Demon Overlord, let alone Chen Rui’s current level.

Although the man did not say what would happen if he “failed the test”, Chen Rui knew very well that this trip was not easy and even his life would be in danger. But at this point, there was no looking back. He must get Fertile Yuan Soil at all costs.

As for the “precious gift”, he didn’t dare to expect it. Obviously, this Demi-God-level powerhouse was extremely dangerous. In front of him, there was almost a feeling that his soul had been peeped through. It would be a fluke for him to leave safely.

The scope of Mountain Seckred was quite broad. According to the man, this was his “territory kingdom”. It seemed that the Demi-God powerhouse’s territory was no longer limited to the combat category, but it was somewhat like the prototype of the [Kingdom of God].

The flora and fauna of Mountain Seckred, including the blast bird previously seen, should be able to provide a power similar to the power of faith. They played a very important role in enhancing the strength of the man, but this kind of “faith” was more like dependent survival. It was still very different from true faith. This might be one of the fundamental differences between Demi-God and God.

With Chen Rui’s speed, he actually couldn’t found the Blackwood Cliff that the man said I after walking for 3 hours. He saw a lot of strange flowers and precious medicinal materials on the way. However, Chen Rui didn’t dare to act rashly. He just concentrated on finding Fertile Yuan Soil.

Finally, in front of a hillside, Chen Rui saw a misty black cliff from a distance. When he was accelerating forward, a warning sign appeared in his heart. With a tap on his feet, he had appeared 10 meters away.There was already a sturdy monster with a lion head appearing at the place where he was originally standing. The monster had a strong body about the size of a buffalo with a pair of wings. It had a 2-meter-long scorpion tail behind its hip, and the stinger at the end emitted a blue cold light .

Manticore!

Manticore was a kind of powerful demonic beast which moved quickly. Its claws were highly poisonous, and it could paralyze the enemy. The poisonous needles in the tail were especially venomous. This manticore was a mutated bloodline, and its strength had reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. The combat power of demonic beasts was even higher than that of ordinary demons of the same level. Coupled with the terrifying combat talent of the manticore, the actual combat power should be close to the peak stage of the Demon Emperor.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to let down his guards. He secretly charged his power. He used a lot of power to deal with gargoyles previously, but fortunately, he had mostly recovered due to the characteristics of [Astral Form]. Also, he could use skills such as [Destructive Aura Blow] again.

In addition to being a terrifying predator, manticore was also a kind of demonic beast with a very strong territory concept. It would relentlessly attack the intruder who broke into their “domain”. Chen Rui felt a strong killing intent in the [Analytical Eyes]. He was unable to communicate with it at all.

Amidst the roar, this manticore had already rushed toward Chen Rui. Its speed was astonishing. Stars suddenly appeared around Chen Rui’s body. He had already activated the [Galaxy Territory].

Affected by the [Galaxy Territory], the manticore’s speed suddenly slowed down. Chen Rui, who was waiting for the enemy to be exhausted, moved to the side. While avoiding, he punched the manticore’s abdomen at lightning speed. As the manticore’s strength, speed and other qualities were weakened a lot by the [Galaxy Territory], the manticore was not prepared. Its huge body was blown back by this punch.

Before the manticore’s body touched the ground, a light ball had already rushed toward its face; [Aurora Shot]!

With a “ bang “, [Aurora Shot] had hit the manticore. The white light plunged into the forest aside at a fast speed. Many trees were destroyed by the shot.

Chen Rui knew that although this attack was unexpected, it was obviously impossible to destroy this powerful manticore. His goal was the Blackwood Cliff, and he didn’t want to have a long fight with the demonic beast here. He didn’t chase or check. He already appeared in the opposite direction with a teleportation. As he was about to accelerate away, he halted suddenly and stopped.

A deep roar sounded in front of him. One after another manticore appeared. 3, 4… A total of 11 appeared.

Even though Chen Rui already had many adventures, he still felt terrified: I actually broke into the manticores’ nest!

Most of these manticores were mutated bloodlines. The lowest strength was also at the peak stage of the Great Demon King while the highest strength had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. It seemed that the species of Mountain Seckred were really much stronger than the average level due to the effect of a certain kind of territory power. No wonder the blast birds were so desperate to get into this mountain.

The manticore that had been knocked off earlier also flew over. It formed an encirclement with its companions. This manticore’s face was bloody with one eye shut. The fur on its body was also damaged. It seemed that the sudden attack had severely injured it, but its violent demeanor grew stronger. Its ferociousness was obviously aroused by its injuries.

The manticore’s speed was extremely fast. It also flew far faster than the gargoyle. Chen Rui could only fight as he couldn’t escape. Since Mountain Seckred is the territory kingdom of the mysterious man, every living being in the “kingdom” should be under the sense of that mysterious man. I must not easily activate the [Royal Star Transformation]. Then, I can only use Scorching Dragon…

At this moment, there was a long howl in the distance.

This long howl faintly carried a special kind of deterrence. The manticores showed fearful expression. None of them dared to roar as they did previously; it was as if they did not even dare to take a deep breath.

The howling sound got closer, and a black spot in the sky quickly magnified. It was already in the sky in the blink of an eye. Chen Rui suddenly gasped. This was a dragon about 7 or 8 meters long with a pair of wings on its back. It was covered with black scales. Only its abdomen was slightly dark red. The ends of the claws and horns emitted a pale silver light.

Race: No Race (Black Dragon)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Strength S, Physique S-, Spirit S-, Speed S-.

[Analysis]: Dark attribute.

The surrounding manticores had lost their composure, fleeing in shock.

Chen Rui also wanted to escape, but he felt that he was firmly locked in by a terrifying breath. If he moved rashly, he had no doubt that this black dragon would immediately launch a fierce attack on him. If it was the manticores just now, he could still fight against them. The black dragon of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord now was not what he was capable of fighting against.

Damn Demon God! Chen Rui couldn’t help but curse. Manticores! Black dragon! These are the most terrifying creatures in Mountain Seckred, and I encountered all of them! Today I really got the jackpot!

The black dragon flapped its wings, and it landed in front of Chen Rui. It faintly glared at Chen Rui, and uttered human words. It turned out to be a female voice, “How dare you?! You actually disturb my nap! If you want to survive, you should pay a huge sum of money as compensation immediately!” Chen Rui was a bit speechless. It is almost night now. How much noise is this? She is clearly planning to rob…

Ms. Black Dragon said viciously, “You are an unfamiliar face. Don’t tell me that you have no money! Otherwise I will lock you in the Blackwood Cliff and starve you for a month!”

Blackwood Cliff? Chen Rui shifted his mind, and he said, “This beautiful and powerful lady dragon, my name is Simon. I came to the Blackwood Cliff to obtain Fertile Yuan Soil on the order of the owner of Mountain Seckred. Please excuse me.”

“Sir Satan wants Fertile Yuan Soil?” Ms. Black Dragon’s tone became surprised. Chen Rui just only knew the name of the mysterious powerhouse. Satan? I seem to have heard it on Earth before just like the terms Lucifer and Mammon, but here is obviously another unrelated plane. Therefore, there is no Invincible East, Renwoxing or Brother Lian [1] in the Blackwood Cliff, but there are only Ms. Black Dragon and the Fertile Yuan Soil.

At this time, the black dragon’s body changed rapidly into a woman’s appearance. This woman was full of black hair. She was young, attractive and dressed in a black robe. She had a slender figure, especially her legs which were perfect. The only imperfection was that her chest was a bit flat. Uhm , that’s right. Compared with the emerald dragon and fairy dragon who Chen Rui had seen, she could only be described by the word “pancake”.

Chen Rui took the opportunity to say, “Yes, if it weren’t for Sir Satan, how would I know that Blackwood Cliff has…” “We’ll talk about Fertile Yuan Soil later!” Ms. Black Dragon interrupted Chen unceremoniously. She stared straight at him, and she was almost hysterically yelling, “Money! Give me the money first! Otherwise, even if I disobey Sir Satan’s order, I will fight to death with you!” In that moment, the momentum on Ms.Black Dragon was more powerful. A monstrous dragon breath suppressed him. Fortunately, Chen Rui and Paglio signed an equality contract, and he had many encounters, so although this dragon breath was terrifying, he was not substantially affected. It was just that her hungry eyes made him break into a cold sweat.

“Mom said that interrupting people’s nap is the most abominable behavior. Anyhow, you have to hand over 50… No! 100 black crystal coins!” This “much”? Are you sure there are no extra zeros behind it?

Chen Rui almost choked on his saliva. She made such a big big fuss. She was shouting about fighting to death, and she is even willing to fight against a Demi-God powerhouse just for 100 black crystal coins?

[1] Characters in Jin Yong’s novel, The Legendary Swordsman, who appeared in Blackwood Cliff.

This Ms. Black Dragon must not know about the market price out there 🤑… Perhaps it was adverse environmental effect 🤔. You just can’t robe the manticores right?

chapters.title: Chapter 457: Olypheus And Fertile Yuan Soil
chapters.body:
Chapter 457: Olypheus And Fertile Yuan Soil

Mountain Seckred, Blackwood Cliff, a cave.

Chen Rui was speechlessly looking at Ms. Black Dragon who was sitting on the ground while counting the 100 black crystal coins as though she had just received some valuable treasure.

I didn’t expect to encounter such a superb miss dragon in Mountain Seckred today. The robbery is fine, but the superb thing is that number which is really… too little.

It was as if someone kidnapped a billionaire just to blackmail him 100 yuan. This was the most thrifty dragon Chen Rui had encountered.

“It’s really black crystal coins. So many of them! I finally have money!” Ms. Black Dragon shone with tears of excitement. She almost buried her entire face in the small pile of black crystal coins.

“Ms. Olypheus” Chen Rui had learned the name of this lady, “These money…”

“Mine!” Ms. Black Dragon grabbed the small pile of black crystal coins as she looked at him vigilantly. The hostility that was extinguished just now rose again.

“Yes, the money already belongs to miss.” Chen Rui quickly calmed down Olypheus’ heart. “Since I have paid, Fertile Yuan Soil…”

Olypheus shook her head repeatedly. She replied firmly, “No! Fertile Yuan Soil is the most important part of my life. I will never hand it over!”

Chen Rui was initially just testing her, but now he confirmed that Fertile Yuan Soil was in the hands of Ms. Black Dragon. He added, “But Sir Satan asked me…”

“Sir Satan won’t grab my rations!” Olypheus still shook her head, “Besides, if you were really sent by Sir Satan, how could you be attacked by those manticores?”

This Ms. Black Dragon is quite quick-witted. Chen Rui noticed something. Ms. Black Dragon called Fertile Yuan Soil as “rations”?

Olypheus was obviously a miser, but her standard of wealth measurement seemed to be quite low. He could settle her using money, but Chen Rui intended to figure out some matters first, “Ms. Olypheus, pardon my rudeness, but may I ask what do you use Fertile Yuan Soil for?”

“It’s very useful! That’s the most delicious seasoning. 2 pieces of Lala Potato with a little Fertile Yuan Soil in the middle. It’s just like the legendary barbecue!” Olypheus frowned, “The only flaw is that after eating, my stomach will become hard for a while. It will take a long time to recover.”

Chen Rui was shocked again. This Miss Olypheus is simply the legendary raptor!

What is Fertile Yuan Soil? She actually eats it as a sandwich!

This is also the special physique of the black dragon. If it is other demons or demonic beasts, I’m afraid they will become a stiff stone long ago!

Olypheus seemed to have thought of something. She held the 100 black crystal coins tightly with her hands, but she stretched her feet. With a very indecent posture, she picked up a stone with a light pastel color in the corner, and she covered it together with the black crystal coins. She didn’t even care about demeanor or revealing her underwear.

Chen Rui’s eyes immediately focused on the palm-sized stone. He sensed the strong earth element’s breath. Yes, this is Fertile Yuan Soil! It can greatly improve the strength of the Earth Elemental King and the entire earth elementals!

“Ms. Olypheus, why don’t I exchange the ‘legendary’ barbecue for your Fertile Yuan Soil.” Chen Rui rolled his eyes. He took out a few barbecues from the storage warehouse. Before he could say another sentence, a breeze blew past, and the barbecue had fallen into the hands of Ms. Black Dragon. After smelling it, she revealed a longing appearance.

“It turns out that this is the legendary barbecue. It is hundreds of times better than the garbage I made! Just smelling the scent makes me fascinated… Ow …” Olypheus burst into tears, then she gobbled up.

Chen Rui looked at the cave where he and Ms. Black Dragon were located. Although it was clean and spacious, it was the standard poverty with a stone bed, simple tables and stools.

There was nothing on Olypheus’ hands and neck. She didn’t even have a piece of jewelry or space equipment. The “big pile” of black crystal coins and Fertile Yuan Soil were just placed there.

Chen Rui finally understood. This Ms. Black Dragon not only lived in poverty, but she also has never seen anything in the outside world at all!

Olypheus finished the barbecue in the blink of an eye. She stuck out her little tongue to lick the bamboo sticks. That kind of “licking” posture and the infatuation look could easily make many males’ imagination run wild, but soon the desire would disappear because Ms. Black Dragon actually chewed up the bamboo stick!

This action would definitely make the males who had wild imagination just now clamp their legs and shudder. In fact, Ms. Olypheus just wanted to chew it up in order to smell the alluring fragrance.

Although Chen Rui didn’t think anything indecent, he still sweated profusely with Ms. Black Dragon’s action. What exactly does this lady eat usually?

“That, Simon… Is there any more barbecue?”

“ Uh …”

“Relax, as long as you give me barbecue, I swear by my mother’s name, I will never mess with you, never force you, never…”

Under Olypheus’ ardent eyes, Chen Rui took out a lot of barbecues. Ms. Black Dragon was overjoyed. Her liking for this guy who wanted to rob his rations rose sharply. At least, the previous murderous intent and hostility that she had was gone.

Ms. Black Dragon’s appetite was quite big. She ate all the barbecue stock in Chen Rui’s storage warehouse, only then she rubbed her round belly with satisfaction.

“It’s so comfortable. I never thought… Sobs , I never thought there would be such a wonderful life.” Ms. Olypheus seemed to be moved to tears again. “That… Simon, where do you live on the mountain? I will look for you every day in the future… to discuss life and ideals.”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes: You just want to look for barbecue every day to discuss your life right? You really think I’m a long-term meal ticket?

“Ms. Olypheus, you have eaten enough of the legendary barbecue. Let’s discuss the issue of Fertile Yuan Soil.”

Olypheus immediately guarded the Fertile Yuan Soil which was placed with the black crystal coins in front of her vigilantly, “No! It’s mine!”

Chen Rui knew that Olypheus could not be forced, so he had to take a softer approach, “Since I have let miss eaten so many delicious barbecues, the Fertile Yuan Soil that tastes much worse than the barbecue has lost its value. Miss, didn’t you just swear not to mess with me? You are probably not the kind of despicable person who doesn’t keep her word after getting the benefit, right?”

“Of course not, but I’m not a fool. Although Fertile Yuan Soil is unpalatable, it can grow out after I eat a piece of it. It will last me tens of thousands of years. If you want to take it away, at least you have to give me ten thousand years of barbecue, or help me cook for tens of thousands of years!”

A cook for tens of thousands of years? Chen Rui was speechless again. Olypheus had never seen anything in the outside world, but she calculated meticulously, so he had to use his trump card, “I urgently need Fertile Yuan Soil to help a friend. I can’t stay here forever. Why don’t I convert it into black crystal coins for you?”

When Olypheus heard the words “black crystal coins”, her eyes lit up. When he was about to nod her head, she appeared thoughtful again, “You are very rich?”

You guessed it right. Not just ordinary rich. However, Chen Rui knew the greed of dragons and replied perfunctorily, “Not too bad, my entire net worth is only 20,000 to 30,000 black crystal coins. These days, prices are soaring, there’s inflation, and life is tough…”

The amount of shrinkage of this number to act poor was simply too huge. Any item that he took out casually would be worth more than this. Excluding the odds and ends, just the major portion included Paglio’s treasure, the fundraising money of the Fallen Angel Empire, the crystal dragon’s treasure, and the harvest of the Crystal Valley crystal mine; he could at least be described by the words “filthy rich”.

However, the impact of the number of “20,000 to 30,000” on Olypheus was beyond Chen Rui’s imagination. Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes suddenly lit up. They seemed to become green which made one cringe.

“I’ve decided! I can give Fertile Yuan Soil to you, but…” Hearing this, Chen Rui was ready to be robbed of “all wealth”, but Olypheus’s tone changed, “You must hire me as your bodyguard for. 100 black crystal coins every year. I will protect you… for about 300 years! By the way, the daily meal must be barbecue. There must also be legendary fruit wine, butter bread, meat steak…”

Speaking till the end, Ms. Black Dragon couldn’t help but swallow her saliva. She didn’t look like she was full. Chen Rui was speechless: This chick is too cunning. After beating around the bush, not only did she not give up the idea of the long term meal ticket. She also still wants to scheme “all my wealth”!

If you didn’t swear in the name of your mother when you first ate barbecue, I’m afraid you have already snatched it by force!

But having said that, 100 black crystal coins per year to hire a Demon Overlord black dragon is a super bizarre price. Where can I find such a good thing?

Chen Rui was about to agree, only to hear Ms. Black Dragon adding another sentence, “But well, I promised my mother before that I will not leave Mountain Seckred until I get to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Sir Satan will also not make things difficult by then. Now I’m just in the intermediate stage, so you must wait for me to meet this requirement before I can leave here with you!”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded. It will take decades or even hundreds of thousands of years for an intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord to reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. How can I afford to wait? He had to take out a handful of black crystal coins, “Ms. Olypheus, shall I just give you the money…”

“No, who do you think I am!” Ms. Olypheus said, but she subconsciously snatched the black crystal coins. “I want the money, and the good food… No wait, I’m a credible person. I actually swore in my mother’s name, and I must never renege…”

Seeing Fertile Yuan Soil close at hand, yet it was gripped tightly by Ms. Black Dragon with the black crystal coins. Chen Rui felt quite helpless, and he immediately asked tentatively, “Your mother?”

Olypheus’ mood suddenly became depressed, “Mom… was buried behind the Blackwood Cliff. She took me to escape from the enemy while I was a baby. She was seriously injured and fled here. Soon…”

Chen Rui understood a little more. No wonder Olypheus is so poor. She could be regarded as the poorest dragon I have ever seen.

It is pitiful that a person lives alone and cannot go out of this small isolated world.

“Well, Miss Olypheus, I do have an urgent matter. I can’t stay here, so I’ll just compromise.” Then Chen Rui took out a space ring. “In this space ring, there are 10,000 black crystal coins. It’s my advance payment for 100 years. There’s also a magic crystal for communication. I will give them to you with this ring. In the future, when you become the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, you can go to the Fallen Angel Capital’s Walong Hotel to contact me. I will hire you as agreed.”

10,000 black crystal coins! Olypheus didn’t hesitate to stuff Fertile Yuan Soil into Chen Rui’s hand. She grabbed the space ring, touched it, looked at it, then she burst into tears, “This is the legendary space ring!”

This is the legendary Fertile Yuan Soil! Chen Rui looked at the heavy stone in his hand, and he almost burst into tears: It’s not easy!

Chen Rui and Olypheus just met briefly. No matter what promises they had, the Dark Moon’s secrets couldn’t be revealed. Walong Hotel was a point of contact for the Dark Demon. If Olypheus really looked for him one day, the Dark Demon would also act appropriately. However, that might be decades or hundreds of years away.

Chen Rui was about to leave here when the [Analytical Eyes] suddenly gave a prompt. There was another person in the cave. It was the mysterious man, Satan.

Facing Satan, Olypheus looked a lot more honest, but she clenched the space ring tightly in her hand and saluted, “Sir Satan.”

Satan nodded and set his eyes on Chen Rui, “In any case, you have passed the test and got Fertile Yuan Soil. Then, you will also get the generous rewards you deserve.”

As he said, a red light shot from his fingertips. Chen Rui only felt that there was a strange and mysterious breath in his body. At the same time, a red badge appeared in his hand with a strange snake-like pattern engraved on it.

Satan said, “If you can digest the power of this territory kingdom, your power should have a leap. As for the badge, you can summon me with it. If you encounter the sea of blood, the abyss or other similar scenes you mentioned again, focus your power on the snake head and crush the badge. However, except for the things that interest me, I will not pay attention to any affairs pertaining to the Demon Realm’s empires or even the rise and fall of an empire. If you dare to use it to simply summon me, then you are only calling for death and destruction.”

Chen Rui subconsciously squeezed the snake-pattern badge in his hand. He asked tentatively, “That underground crystal mine…”

“There is no need to go to the crystal mine anymore. The entrance to the abyss is not fixed. Once it is exposed, it will never be repeated in the same place.”

“Understood! Thank you, Sir Satan!” Chen Rui nodded. There was an uncontrollable exhiliration in his heart. Not only did I successfully obtain Fertile Yuan Soil this time, I also received a trace of power bestowed by a Demi-God powerhouse!

Don’t underestimate this “trace” of power. In the Rainbow Valley, the trace of Demi-God territory power caused him and the fairy dragon Zola to suffer hardships and almost lost their lives.

“Maybe we will have the opportunity to meet again in the future. As long as you are willing to put in the effort, you can get abundant returns.” Satan said calmly. It seemed to have a profound meaning.

Chen Rui felt that the space was distorted, and he was already outside of Mountain Seckred. The voice of Ms. Black Dragon could still be heard in his ears, “I will look for you soon. At that time, remember to prepare the legendary fruit wine, butter bread, steak…”

Satan’s body appeared in the sky above Mountain Seckred. He looked at the human in the distance, “[Body of Light Blessing]… Hehe !”

Suddenly, Chen Rui felt dizzy, and the white sacred mountain in front of him had disappeared. The original emptiness was restored.

Perhap this was the only righteous dragon who honoured her words🧐, just hope she won’t be polluted by the outside world…

chapters.title: Chapter 458: Meeting Father-In-Law Again
chapters.body:
Chapter 458: Meeting Father-In-Law Again

Although Chen Rui still had doubts about Tiffany’s identity, he still left Mountain Seckred with satisfaction. In addition to the biggest gain of Fertile Yuan Soil, he also unexpectedly got a trace of Demi-God power. As for the badge, it could also play an unexpected role at a certain time.

Satan once said that he would not care about the rise and fall of the Demon Realm empires. This statement did not seem to be false because the Demi-God powerhouse was a legendary existence beyond the mortal world.
