Therefore, Chen Rui should not be worried that his [Gravity], element blessing and other skills would be leaked as this would arouse the suspicion of ill-intentioned people.

However, Chen Rui did not relax his vigilance on Satan because of the benefits he got. He faintly felt that Satan had an instinctive rejection or aversion to him. Despite this, Satan still actually gave him such a great benefit. He definitely had a more far-reaching purpose.

Who knows whether there is any trickery in this kind of gifted power?

Give first if you wish to get. Since the entrance to the abyss is extremely difficult to come across, then the requirement of searching is just “by convenience”. The real purpose should be something else. However, it is useless to think too much now. To put it bluntly, I am just a chess piece. It’s useless to escape. I can only act according to the situation before I am qualified to be a player of that level.

In the whole world, everyone is a chess piece, but the chess game is different. Now I need to return to my own game.

Leaving aside the benefits he got from the Mountain Seckred, this trip to the Bloody Empire itself was fruitful. First, he exposed Nate’s true colors, avenged Master Fonsaq, then he used Adelaide’s death to escalate the disputes between several princes. He further muddled the situation of the Bloody Empire, and at the same time, he made the Bloodfall as the scapegoat. This made the Bloodfall suffer a severe setback after being struck by Raizen. Of course, there were also the valuable basic law insights gained from the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall.

However, Chen Rui still felt suspicious about Young Prince Teris. The spying that night failed, and he was injured by Gustav. However, the fact that Gustav appeared in the Teris’ mansion so quickly, and he also understood the characteristics of the magic circles in the mansion, was enough to explain some problems.

I have been in the Bloody Empire for more than 2 months. I must rush back to the Dark Moon as soon as possible. It is not only to avoid doubts among ill-intentioned people, but there must be a lot of things waiting to be resolved. It is a pity that the maximum limit of star points is 2. Due to temporary needs, I have changed both star points to the Bloody Empire. Otherwise, I can return to the Dark Moon in the blink of an eye.

Chen Rui did not choose to cross from the Black Iron Mountain Range of the Dark Shadow Empire to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate and then detour from Town Leia to enter the west of the Dark Moon Estate because that would be a big detour. Furthermore, the wyvern he rode last time had automatically returned to the Dark Moon under his order long ago.

Chen Rui chose to go south from the Bloody Empire. He would enter the Fallen Angel Empire border through the Warlock Fortress. It was much faster.

After making up his mind, Chen Rui immediately returned to the Bloody Empire Capital with the [Star Gate]. At this time, the capital was at a tense time. Not only the Bloodfall, but also some spies and forces in other empires were also affected to varying degrees. Since the Dark Demon received Chen Rui’s notice in advance, their loss was minimized. The Mechanic Association was currently running for a new president. The 2 most popular candidates were Chen Rui’s old rival and duo-specialized master, Horford, and the other was Master Turia.

Turia’s wife, Mavinna, was also a master. He was also one of the leaders who organized the masters to settle the accounts with Nate. Most importantly, Turia was the former teacher of the late “genius” Richard who exposed the true colors of Nate.

Horford’s talent and skills were higher, but his temperament was weird, so his popularity was lower. In contrast, Turia’s popularity was much higher, so he was also the most promising candidate to become the president.

Chen Rui didn’t stay in the Bloody Empire to watch the excitement of the campaign. He went straight south. As for Ms. Beluan who is still sad… Maybe “Richard” was just a passer-by in her life. Besides, “Richard” is already dead. We’ll see each other again if we are destined.

Chen Rui asked the Dark Demon to get a mutated griffin. He went from the Bloody Empire all the way south, and he reached the Iron Fist Estate at the fastest speed. Then he transferred to a carriage to cross the border toward Warlock Fortress.

Although there was a peace agreement between the Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire, small conflicts continued on the border. Fortunately, the main road was relatively safe. Due to the recent rise of the Dark Moon, business exchanges between the 2 empires had been increasing. Merchants from the Bloody Empire entered the Fallen Angel Empire through this road. Chen Rui mixed in a merchant group, and he successfully passed the investigation to enter Town Nimbus within the Fallen Angel Empire border.

Town Nimbus was the place where Athena and Roman got acquainted back then. It had a larger scale than Town Leia. You could see soldiers of Warlock Fortress from time to time. Behind Town Nimbus was the Fallen Angel Empire’s strongest barrier against the Bloody Empire, Warlock Fortress. It was guarded by the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, George. Wales. This time Chen Rui not only wanted to use the fastest route to return to the Dark Moon, but he also wanted to pay a visit to his father-in-law.

Compared with the captured “father”of Kia, Azgalor, Athena’s father, General George, was truly his father-in-law. Whether it was bloodline or the love and care for his daughter, he was not comparable to ordinary fathers.

General George had once visited the Dark Moon to inspect his son-in-law. When he thought Chen Rui was just a somewhat intelligent and powerless human, the first general still did not oppose Athena and Chen Rui from being together. The reason was simple, his daughter liked him.

With George’s identity as the number one military figure, his daughter, Athena, should have been destined for a political marriage. However, George did not hesitate to reject all family marriage requests. He was still unwavered by the so-called “continuation of the Wales surname” threats. This was courage.

Chen Rui still clearly remembered his father-in-law once said those powerful sentences, “Will I sacrifice the happiness of my daughter in exchange for the benefit of the family? If I am reduced to this point, the surname of Wales will also lose its meaning. If Athena disagrees, it means that I do not agree too. Those who object may come to Warlock Fortress to fight with me. I’ll kill anyone that comes and even destroy his whole family! So what about the Obsidian who stole the empire of the Lord of Midnight Sun? If he offends me, I will also rebel against him!”

Now when he reminisced about this, he still had an urge to take off his hat to salute the first general. With such a personality charm, no wonder even the poison dragon hit it off at once with General George.

Chen Rui did not stay in Town Nimbus. He left the merchant group and went straight to Warlock Fortress.

Warlock Fortress was a large fortress built against a mountain. The terrain was extremely dangerous. It was the only way to go to the White Feather Estate. The fortress was not equivalent to a castle. The structure inside was extremely compact. They could provide more intensive crossfire support. The unit area could accommodate more soldiers and provide stronger defense capabilities. Except for the main road for normal traffic, there were no civilian facilities or civilians in the fortress.

The only passage was actually opened from the mountainside. There were heavily guarded mountain walls and various military installations on both sides. Above them were heavily armed soldiers and magic weapons which were condescending. Once the passers-by had any abnormal behavior, they would launch an attack immediately. This long passage was actually a powerful armed cordon. No one knew how much power was hidden in it.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. It is indeed one of the most powerful fortresses in the Demon Realm. The soldiers’ mental outlook and equipment are beyond the average army. They are not inferior to the several elite legions of the Bloody Empire. The entire fortress shows a kind of unbreakable and powerful momentum. No wonder father-in-law can always occupy the position of the first general. Whether it is defense or soldiers deployment, he has his own uniqueness.

General George, the command center of the central fortress of Warlock Fortress, was carefully watching the magic military map. This map was three-dimensional which was somewhat similar to the sand table. It had more comprehensive functions than the ordinary sand table. It could even simulate offense and defense. General George frowned tightly. He looked worried. He had been frowning like this for several days.

A guard came to report, “General! A businessman named Simon from the Dark Moon brought you a letter from Ms. Athena.”

When General George heard the name of his beloved daughter, he suddenly felt a little more energetic, “Where’s the letter?”

The guard immediately delivered a letter. George knew that if the letter could be delivered directly to his hand in this way, it must have been effectively validated to confirm that it did not contain traps or poisons.

When he opened it, there was only one sentence inside, “Request to see you, sir general. From a man who once gave sir general 5 bottles of potions and a fruit in the Dark Moon.”

The text of this sentence was shorter than the signature, but George’s eyes lit up. He said, “Bring this person here immediately!”

Soon, Chen Rui appeared at the command center of the central fortress. George took a few glances at him, and he ordered his guards to retreat.

When the guards left, Chen Rui’s face changed rapidly. He transformed back to the human face that was familiar to George.

“Transformation technique?” George’s eyes flashed with surprise, “Why didn’t I feel any magical fluctuations just now?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I guess it can be said to be a kind of talent similar to the transformation technique. We haven’t seen each other for a long time, sir general.”

“In terms of time, it is not too long.” George said emotionally, “According to what happened, it makes people feel that a long time has passed. I thought I had put enough value to you back then. I never expect your ability is still above what I expected.”

Since George left the Dark Moon, there had been too many changes. The most prominent was the rise of the Dark Moon. From a declining estate controlled by the capital to the largest estate with rising military and economic power. In contrast to the capital, Regent Obsidian had been questioned by many families of the capital and large estates across the country due to the issue of “fundraising money”. He was in a terrible condition now while the Dark Moon’s momentum and prestige have increased. It has become more prosperous, and it established a cooperative relationship with the Dark Shadow Empire. It had faintly overshadowed the capital.

The outside world might have guessed that this was the human financial officer’s credit, but George knew that all of this was the result of his “son-in-law” planning.

Chen Rui replied humbly, and George asked again, “I heard that at the last auction, 2 Demon Overlord assassins wanted to assassinate the Lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate of the Dark Shadow Empire, but they were captured and killed in an instant. What I want to know now is, has my dragon friend, Paglio, recovered his power?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui nodded and smiled, “Paglio also has a deep impression of sir general. I should be able to tell Paglio good news this time. His friend who is far away in Warlock Fortress has successfully broken through to the Demon Overlord level.”

George didn’t expect that his level of power would be seen through by this human. He looked at Chen Rui a little bit more strangely, “Is this talent… or power?”

“I said that I would take care of Athena for the rest of my life and prevent her from being harmed. For this, I have to prove something and even reveal some secrets to her most beloved father.” General George was his father-in-law. At the same time, he was also Shea’s most steadfast supporter. Besides visiting George, Chen Rui wanted to give him some important resources this time. Sooner or later, some things would be revealed. “Very good! I already felt that you have the ability to take care of Athena back then.” George didn’t ask much. He just nodded in relief, “However, my Wales Family’s daughter is not a vase. Athena is a very independent girl, and she is quite talented in military affairs. She should be a good helper for you.”

“Of course, she is now the legion commander of the Flame Legion. She is also one of the talented people that Princess Royal Highness relies on the most.” When it comes to Athena, Chen Rui expressed unabashed love in his words, “She is also the best wife.”

“Of course, Athena is my daughter!” Speaking of his daughter, George couldn’t help but turn from an vigorous general to a proud father. “However, the title wife can only be used after your official wedding. Remember what I said to you when I left last time? No matter how many women you marry, Athena must be the most loved. Otherwise, I will…”

“Of course!” Chen Rui didn’t wait for his father-in-law to say the threat of castration, and he quickly responded. After all, father-in-law is indeed very reasonable, but it seems that he has about a dozen of mother-in-laws.

George looked solemn, “Well, I have a headache now. It just happens that you, the famous and capable minister of the Demon Realm, can help me figure out a solution.”

“General please speak.”

George sighed, “Some time ago, the major estates and families of the empire jointly asked the regent for the fundraising money. Obsidian reluctantly adopted the installment repayment method to temporarily stabilize the major estates and families, but then he sharply cut the expenditures on all parties, including military expenses and munitions. The magic circles and defense facilities of Warlock Fortress are in urgent need of renewing and repairing now. A large number of soldiers’ weapons and armors also need to be replaced. A lot of money is urgently needed. However, the capital has even cut the military expenditure and ration by nearly half. If this continues, not only the military spirit will be shaken, but once the Bloody Empire launches a formal attack, it will be difficult to defend.”

Chen Rui had been in the Bloody Empire, but he didn’t know that such a large-scale “payment demand” incident occurred in the Fallen Angel Capital. Obsidian’s delay was also within his expectation. It would be more unsustainable toward the end. Everything went on smoothly as he planned.

As for General George’s problem, Chen Rui showed a confident smile. He lacked everything except money.

Hmm, not only money, he was also proficient in mechanics… Wonder what General George would look like if he knew about this? 😲?

chapters.title: Chapter 459: Rush To Assist In The Border
chapters.body:
Chapter 459: Rush To Assist In The Border

A spacious warehouse was filled up with bulging bags of black crystal coins in the blink of an eye.

Even General George who had always been calm couldn’t help but be dumbfounded at the sight of this. Then his expression changed to ecstatic. He didn’t know what space magic or means that Chen Rui used to take out so many black crystal coins, and he didn’t know how his son-in-law had such a huge sum of money, but he was certain that with this sum of money, his biggest problem at the moment could be successfully solved.

George’s surprise was still to come. In addition to funding, Chen Rui also provided a complete set of defensive magic circle drawings. It was said that it could triple the defense of the entire fortress with various traps too. At the same time, he promised George that after returning to the Dark Moon this time, he would send people to secretly transport a large number of sophisticated weapons, armors and the most advanced magic weapons. This would greatly enhance the overall combat effectiveness of Warlock Fortress’ Red Dragon Legion.

There was also another purpose. In case the capital had any actions or changes, he could also launch a corresponding military action to support the Dark Moon.

Chen Rui’s gift was not only for the entire legion, but it was also his father-in-law individually. There was no resurrection potion in the last 5 bottles of potion, so Chen Rui deliberately exchanged 2 bottles and gave them to George this time just in case. There was also a set of legendary grade equipment.

George was very satisfied. Compared with these materials, he was more satisfied with Chen Rui’s ability. With such a man to take care of Athena, he could really rest assured.

At this moment, a person barged into the command center without notification. Chen Rui didn’t even have time to activate [Camouflage]. However, George prevented him from hiding because only one person could “barge in” like this here.

It was a beautiful woman with short red hair. She was wearing auburn leather armor. Her hairstyle and attire were actually very similar to Athena, but with a little more mature charm.

“George!” In this kind of barrack, the women’s address was actually quite casual.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A +

Strength: A+ ; Physique: A + ; Spirit: A – ; Speed: A.

[Analysis]: Fire attribute.

Chen Rui thought of what Athena said before about her “aunty” who was closest to her, and he suddenly understood.

General George smiled slightly, “Come on, Gloria. Meet our guest.”

“Guest?” Gloria looked at Chen Rui a few times. She made no secret of her disdain, “Just this weak guy?” “Gloria, a dragon. The Red Dragon Legion deputy legion leader. My 13th wife, and Athena’s favorite aunty.”

George introduced both parties to each other, “Chen Rui, our daughter’s most beloved man. The famous Dark Moon Estate’s financial officer and the capable officer of the Demon Realm… Uh, at least it’s just like that on the surface.”

“Are you the human?” Gloria showed an unexpected look. She looked at Chen Rui, and she suddenly said coldly, “A weak and feeble guy. I really don’t understand why our little princess would like a man like you?! What if one day, an intimate hug can accidentally cause this guy to break his muscles, let alone… Hehe !” The hint of boldness of this passage made Chen Rui a little sweaty, but George laughed without saying anything. He didn’t intend to help his son-in-law at all. It seems like I need to pass my mother-in-law’s level by myself.

“Beautiful Madam Gloria, Athena once said that you are her favorite and most respected woman. She is even imitating you in many ways. Then, please accept a small gift from me.”

Chen Rui’s eyes rolled, and there was a fist-sized fiery red gem in his hand. The flawless edges reflected the magnificent light.

“This is… Is it the legendary Eye of the Scarlet Emperor?” Gloria was obviously a dragon who knew how to distinguish quality goods. Her red eyes suddenly glowed with fiery light. After receiving the gem, she praised him for a while, then she made a decision. With a certain determination, she reluctantly handed the gem to General George, “The soldier’s salary should not be a problem with this.”

This action made Chen Rui in awe. As dragons, this madam indeed made an unimaginable and difficult decision. George smiled and shook his head, “This weak fellow that you mentioned has successfully solved our biggest problem. This is a personal gift he gave you, so you can safely accept it.”

“The biggest problem has been successfully solved?” Gloria showed a pleasant surprise. She quickly clenched the Eye of the Scarlet Emperor and changed her tone, “It seems that our little princess still has a good taste. At least you are a little capable and not a stingy guy.”

As expected, dragons are still dragons. Their benchmark for judging likes and dislikes is a bit biased. Chen Rui was secretly amused. George asked, “By the way, you rushed here like this. Is there any special situation?” When George mentioned this, Gloria immediately kept the ruby. She said solemnly, “There is probably something wrong with Francis. I can’t get in touch with him until now.”

George frowned, “Although he did not bring much manpower this time, they are all elite. Could it be the other party…” “According to the latest intel, the Bloody Empire’s Rage Flame Legion seems to have a newly transferred commander. The previous tricks were all designed by this person. Francis’ set up this time would probably be self-defeating.”

It turned out that the border conflict between the Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire had never stopped. The most common one was the border problem. The border monument that represented the border had been moved back and forth by both sides numerous times. They were really fighting for every inch of land.

Because of this, small-scale battles often occur between both sides, but the 2 countries were “friendly neighbors.” This kind of battle was carried out in the name of bandit groups. Of course, this kind of bandits group had a tacit understanding that was to never rob merchants or civilians. It was just a deadly fight between each other, and the losing party would not publicly criticize in the name of the empire. This was equivalent to a kind of “unwritten rule.”

Recently, the Rage Flame Legion on the opposite side had a lot of actions and battles were more frequent. Lieutenant Francis personally led a team to set up an ambush to ambush the opponent. However, after setting off in the morning, there was still no news. He was likely to be in danger.

“I think I know who the new commander is.” Chen Rui thought of the Bloody Empire people’s intel provided by Dark Demon not long ago. He interjected, “Bubowa.”

George didn’t question the accuracy of this intel. He frowned even more tightly, “The deputy leader of the original Bloodwave Legion’s leader, Gordon? Although I have never fought against this person, I heard that he is a difficult opponent. Since this is the case, it seems that we must support Francis immediately. “

Francis was one of George’s most powerful assistants. He possessed the strength of the early stage of the Demon Emperor. He was extremely prestigious in the army. If he encountered any unexpected events, it would be an immeasurable loss for both Red Dragon Legion and Warlock Fortress.

“The place where Francis set up ambush is in Weiju Valley. I will go and save him now.”

Gloria said without hesitation. She explained the deployment of scout and intel in detail.

George thought for a moment and shook his head, “Your previous injury has not recovered. It is probably Bubowa’s trick this time. If you rush rashly, there may be even greater danger. I decided to go there myself. The enemy didn’t know that I have reached the Demon Overlord level. It can also have unexpected effects.”

“No!” Gloria immediately raised an objection, “You’re the highest commander of legion. How can you take the risk personally! If there is a danger or accident, the legion simply cannot afford this loss! It’s better for me to go. With my flying speed, I should be able to get there as fast as possible. “

During the dispute, a voice sounded, “I’ll go.”

The voice was from Chen Rui who was observing the magic sand table. George and Gloria were both taken aback. Gloria said irritatingly, “Stop giving me more troubles! This is the border where everywhere is the battlefield. It is not a safe amusement park like the Dark Moon.”

Chen Rui said lightly, “General, I have a proposal. Our strategy needs to be redeployed.”

Gloria was about to speak, but the disdain on her face suddenly turned into surprise. She saw Chen Rui’s face changing rapidly, instantly turning into a strange face. The breath on his body began to change. Even Gloria felt a threat that couldn’t be ignored.

“Madam Gloria, please accept these potions. Although they can’t fully heal your injuries, they can play a role that ordinary potions cannot. At the same time, this operation needs to rely on your strength. At least, when madam is the main attacker on the surface, it can attract most of the enemy’s attention.”

Chen Rui had heard the intel narrated by Gloria just now, and he found the location and coordinates on the magic sand table.

Before he could finish talking, George’s eyes brightened, “Decoy tactic?” “Yes.” Chen Rui praised the old man’s quick response. “I think I still need something that can prove that I’m the enemy.”

George pulled out the sword from his waist, “This Lion Tooth Sword is for you. You can use it to order Francis and his people if… they are still alive.”

Chen Rui took the Lion Tooth Sword and kept it in the storage space, “Without further delay, I will set off now.”

George nodded, and he suddenly asked, “Did you defeat Josh and Rus?” Chen Rui smiled slightly, but he did not answer. He turned and left the command center.

George stared at Chen Rui’s distant figure, “How is Athena’s taste?” Gloria nodded appreciatively. She suddenly revealed a hint of wisdom, “Much better than me.”

“…” The father-in-law made a rare choke.

After Chen Rui left Warlock Fortress, he headed toward the Weiju Valley.

The border conflict between the Bloody Empire Army and the Fallen Angel Empire Army generally occured in remote areas far away from the main road. The Weiju Valley was a remote valley with dangerous terrain.

Somewhere hidden.

“General Pamir! The people of the Red Dragon Legion have been hit hard by the magic submerged mine and are now trapped in the cave. Francis is there too. Why didn’t you concentrate on destroying these guys? See what happened now, the Flying Squadrons are all urgently transferred away. Once these guys become desperate, it will be difficult to wipe them out!” A general of the Mammon Royal Family on the side screamed, “Rochester, you hot-headed fellow, what are you worried about? Francis is just a small fish, our goal this time is a big fish… At least the deputy legion leader of the Red Dragon Legion! Can you see the magic circle in front? It was meticulously designed by General Bubowa. It consumes a lot of materials and effort. General Bubowa has already accurately foreseen that the enemy will play tricks in this area long ago. After the submerged mine explodes, the magic circle has automatically turned on, waiting for the big fish to be hooked.

The magic circle can only be activated once. If we use it against Francis now, what should we do when the big fish will come? Now we can just besiege Francis. Furthermore, if the big fish doesn’t come, isn’t Francis still there? At that time, we can use him to trigger the magic circle. Even if they are not dead, can’t we deal with a group of severely injured trash?” Rochester chuckled, “I see! General Bubowa is really cunning… Uh, well planned! “At this moment, there was a faintly dense and irregular voice in the distance. Some soldiers exclaimed, “General Pamir! Look, what is that?” “It’s demonic beasts!” Pamir had a bad feeling about it.

A group of demonic beasts rushed toward them hurriedly. Many actually consciously slam into several key trigger points of the magic circle.

Pamir saw it clearly, and he was taken aback, “Damn it! Stop those demonic beasts! Shoot them with bows and arrows!” However, it was too late, the powerful magic circle had triggered all its power. There were electric sparks and explosions suddenly. There was one after another tremendous shake. The power of the magic circle was extraordinary. The eruption lasted for more than 10 minutes. The surrounding soldiers of the Bloody Empire laid down and hid themselves in the shelter to avoid being affected.

No one saw that when a figure with a light blue mask flying at high speed rose and dived in an instant, he had appeared in the cave behind the magic circle.

After a long time, when the smoke was cleared, the ground was full of the bodies of demonic beasts. A few survivors had already escaped.

Pamir was furious. He didn’t expect that the careful planning would actually be destroyed by a group of sudden demonic beasts. Without this magic circle, and the Flying Squadrons were urgently transferred away just now, even if the enemy’s “big fish” came, they would be helpless.

At this moment, there was clamor amongst the soldiers. It turned out that a group of enemies suddenly appeared nearby. All of them were covered in dirt. The leader was the old opponent Francis. What Pamir noticed was that there was an unfamiliar face with a distinctive attire, and there was no dust on his body. He looked particularly eye-catching in the crowd.

This was not the first time Pamir and Francis had fought against each other. Now that the magic circle had been broken and their own power had been transferred away, the “big fish” who came here would likely become reinforcements. Therefore, the two sides started the fight directly without any nonsense.

Although Pamir did not have the strongest Flying Squadrons, Pamir himself was the early stage of the Demon Emperor powerhouse. Besides, the number and status of the Bloody Empire Army were better more than Francis’ side who were severely damaged by magic mines which resulted in a plunge in combat power. Pamir was confident that he would wipe out all of the opponents.

At this moment, a faint red light appeared at the feet of all the Fallen Angel Empire soldiers. Their speed and attack power suddenly increased. Especially the speed, which was improved by folds.

This was exactly the role of Mystic Jade Armor’s [Hot Blood Halo] as well as Bestow fruit + Stridebug’s Potent function. The situation changed drastically for a while. The soldiers of the Red Dragon Legion actually suppressed the enemies of the Rage Flame Legion with outnumbered enemies. Under Francis’ leadership, they slayed the enemy, and the Rage Flame Legion’s casualties increased rapidly.

Pamir wanted to get rid of Francis himself, but Francis didn’t plan to battle one-on-one with him at all. Instead, he rushed directly to the Rage Flame soldiers with weak strength levels. He was killing them with a breeze.

Pamir was furious. As he was about to intercept Francis, a voice sounded, “Your opponent is me, General Pamir.”

He finally could show how powerful was he in front of his father-in-law…

chapters.title: Chapter 460: Surprise Ambush And [Summer Territory]
chapters.body:
Chapter 460: Surprise Ambush And [Summer Territory]

Pamir looked at this strange guy wearing a cloak who exuded the early stage of the Demon Emperor’s breath. He knew that this person must be the cause of the failure. Even the “red light enhancement” magic that had never been seen before was cast by this enemy. He shouted angrily, and a black breath appeared on his fist. It was the royal family talent, [Light of Sin]. Pamir’s strength was also the early stage of the Demon Emperor. He thought that the strength of the 2 sides was equal. As long as he used the advantage of the royal family’s talent to win this person, the enhanced magic of the Red Dragon Legion would definitely disappear. Then it would not be difficult to deal with Francis and others.

Since General Bubowa’s magic circle and the fishing plan has failed, I must at least kill Francis and these people!

The [Light of Sin] had various negative weakening effects, but what made Pamir horrified was that before he had the time to weaken the opponent’s strength, stars suddenly appeared around him. It weakened his strength by nearly half. Following that, a figure had rushed in front of him in a flash. It was the strange enemy whom he thought was “equal in strength”.

“Bang!” Before Pamir had time to react, Chen Rui’s fist had already hit his abdomen. A swirling dent appeared on the tough leather armor, and the corresponding part at the back was pushed back by some air flow. It was as if the punch had penetrated through his abdomen.

Pamir felt that his internal organs seemed to be tumbling. Even if he was strong-willed, he couldn’t help crying out in pain. His whole body staggered back, and the opponent had appeared ghostly behind him. “Boom! Boom! Boom!” The smashing sound was endless. The surrounding soldiers could hardly see the movement. After hearing only the dense sound, Pamir’s body was thrown into the air with a strong force. Then, with a strange [Sonic Boom] sound, the figure had caught up with Pamir’s uncontrollable body at an unimaginable speed. He clasped his fists with both hands at a higher point, and he slammed Pamir’s body that was flying upward.

With these 2 forces, Pamir crashed to the ground like a meteor. A huge pothole appeared on the ground. Pamir’s body was embedded in the soil. Various parts of the leather armor had been distorted. His whole person was as weak as a limp. He no longer had the power to climb up.

For a while, not only the soldiers of the Bloody Empire’s Rage Flame Legion, but even Francis of the Red Dragon Legion, were dumbfounded. The Demon Emperor powerhouse, Pamir of the Mammon Royal Family bloodline, the general who has experienced many battles, is completely defeated in such a short time? Is Pamir weakened?

Francis and Pamir were old rivals who were evenly matched. He clearly knew Pamir’s strength. Pamir did not become weaker at the slightest, but that his opponent is too strong!

If Francis himself confronted Pamir, it would be impossible to tell the outcome for a long time. Now, this unfamiliar comrade who was also in the “early stage of the Demon Emperor”…

In the awe of the surrounding eyes, Chen Rui’s body slowly descended. After getting the epiphany of the law on the 4th floor of the Book Collection Hall and digesting a little bit of the great power given by Satan, not only his territory had a new breakthrough, his combat effectiveness of the normal state was also greatly enhanced. Coupled with the improvement in the [Galaxy Territory] and Mystic Jade Armor, it was indeed a bit unfair to Pamir.

Pamir’s defeat caused the morale of the rest of the soldiers to drop sharply, but most of them still chose to fight to the death. Only a small group of people escaped. The Red Dragon Legion, which turned defeat into victory, cheered.

Chen Rui asked, “General Francis, is your injury okay?”

Francis originally had some doubts about this unfamiliar comrade holding the Lion Tooth Sword, but at this time it was replaced by admiration. He seemed guilty, “I’m fine, but this time, my plan to set an ambush was outsmarting myself. I lost many brothers. I really feel ashamed to go back to face General George .”

“What I want to ask is whether you still have the power to continue fighting?”

There was a strange light in Francis’s eyes, “You mean…”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I have a spontaneous plan. Isn’t your purpose today to ambush the opponent’s leader? Madam Gloria on the other side should have attracted the opponent’s main force now. Do you dare to change your ambush plan to a long-range raid?”

“Right, we can unexpectedly attack the opponent while they are unprepared! These defeated soldiers will definitely flee to their temporary contact point, and the enemy will never think that we, the remnants, have such guts!”

Francis was obviously a general who was also proficient in military strategy. He immediately understood the meaning at the slight mention of it. He looked at the soldiers around him who were eager to try. He saluted Chen Rui, “I’m willing to follow after you, Lion Tooth Sword bearer. Before we set off, I would like to know what I should call the leader who will lead us to complete this surprise raid?”

“General doesn’t need to be polite, I’m just an anonymous ‘military supplies officer’.” Chen Rui was also worthy of the title of the “military supplies officer”. The money he supplied for the military needs was actually “scammed” from Obsidian.

Francis knew that Chen Rui did not want to reveal his name, but this powerhouse who could hold the Lion Tooth Sword was definitely the most trusted person by General George. He immediately stopped asking questions and took out the magic shackles to imprison Pamir. He quickly selected more than 100 soldiers who were in the best physical condition while the rest escorted Pamir back to the Warlock Fortress.

The soldiers that Francis led this time were all the Red Dragon Legion’s elites. After taking the recovery potion, the remaining soldiers recovered a lot. Under the leadership of Chen Rui and Francis, they secretly caught up with those defeated Rage Flames Legion soldiers.

The Rage Flame Legion soldiers fled all the way and left Weiju Valley. About 2 hours later, they came to the Sabok Lake.

There was a hillside there. There were hundreds of large tents on the hillside. It seemed like the temporary base of the “bandits”. The Warlock Fortress faced the Iron Fist Estate of the Bloody Empire. There was no independent fortress that stood against it. It also meant that the Bloody Empire army had no fixed defensive points. Although it was relatively weak in terms of supply, it was quite mobile, and it was not an official large-scale war now. The Rage Flame Legion’s elite of the Bloody Empire, led by Bubowa, changed to another place after fighting in one place which was resembling a guerrilla style. This gave George’s Red Dragon Legion a headache. That was why Francis deliberately set up an ambush in order to try to trap the opponent’s elite, but he was seen through and almost lost all his soldiers.

“This should be the enemy’s base camp, but the manpower we brought is not enough.” Francis looked at them from a distance, and he roughly estimated the strength of both sides.

Chen Rui thought for a while, “I will go in first to attract the enemy’s attention, then you act accordingly at the side.”

Francis frowned and said, “Although your strength is strong, the situation of the enemy is unknown now. I’m afraid that it is dangerous to rush in.”

“According to the intel I got, Gustav, the legion leader of the Rage Flame Legion, is currently in the Bloodfall capital. He is not in the front line, so…” Chen Rui didn’t say anything. He just smiled confidently.

“So?” Francis added puzzledly.

“So, let’s do it.” Chen Rui stood up, “But before that, I must first prepare.”

In the base camp on the hillside of Sabok Lake.

Bubowa, the deputy legion leader of the Rage Flame Legion, was listening carefully to the report of the defeated army, “That person controlled the demonic beasts and broke my magic circle? He saved Francis and captured General Pamir?”

“Gloria is now marching east with a great fanfare. Are you sure that the man is not George himself? Other enemies who are capable of rescuing should not be able to participate,” Mecek, the military staff officer on the side frowned, “A person who can capture Pamir, when did the Red Dragon Legion have such a powerful enemy?”

Bubowa’s expression also appeared very solemn, “It seems that we overlooked a strong opponent. From this point of view, Gloria’s rescue was just a bluff. No wonder there is such a big fanfare. They have not entered our ambush circle yet. It’s my mistake, I shouldn’t transfer the Flying Squadrons away. I think we have only one way now which is to trap Gloria with all our strength. This woman is a bit impatient. If we make good use of this, it may be the only way to return to turn the tables. However, since she is bluffing, she will definitely not rush forward. When necessary, Mecek…”

Mecek nodded, “I understand. I will act as a bait myself.”

At this moment, the expression of Bubowa and Mecek changed at the same time. Both of them were of Demon Emperor level strength, and they had sensed an extremely violent breath nearby.

A few seconds later, the soldiers began to scream outside the camp. Bubowa and Mecek rushed out and saw a person floating in the air. The man’s whole body was wrapped in a cloak, but it could not hide his terrifying ferocity. The arrows fired by the soldiers below had already turned to ashes in the air before they even touched the man.

Pamir’s defeated soldier exclaimed, “General, he… It’s him!”

Bubowa’s pupils shrank. I didn’t expect the other party to be so bold. After saving Francis and capturing Pamir, he actually launched a counterattack without stopping!

The person in the air slowly landed. A cold voice sounded, “Bubowa… die!”

“How dare you?!” When Mecek saw that the other party was still so arrogant in his own base camp, he raised his hand, and a large number of flaming meteors appeared in the sky. They smashed down one after another. The ground was shaking. There were dozens more huge holes with burning flames in the center. The man seemed to have been smashed into shattered coke by the meteor fire shower.

“Be careful!” Bubowa’s voice suddenly sounded. Mecek reacted extremely quickly. With a tap on his feet, he flew toward Bubowa’s voice. At the same time, his hand raised and launched another great magic, [Flame of Hell]. There was no need to chant. He had mastered Samael Royal Family’s mutated talent, [Fire Mastery], to its extreme.

The confidence on Mecek’s face quickly turned into horror as he saw the figure walking toward him from the sea of fire. The man seemed like he was walking leisurely in the garden. There seemed to be a strange force field around him that distorted the space. The horrifying high temperature and flame power of [Flame of Hell] were assimilated and absorbed by this force field, and it became another rampaging breath.

Mecek felt that the opponent was approaching step by step, and he seemed to have lost the courage to resist or even escape. It was as if he was in some kind of nightmare which he was unable to get rid of. When he was struggling desperately, he heard Bubowa’s scream. At the same time, the flames were fervent and the man’s figure flickered. Mecek felt that the power of the “nightmare” had been weakened a lot. He desperately unleashed his spirit power and finally broke free from the terrifying feeling. Only then did he discover that Bubowa had already activated the territory power to fight the enemy.

Bubowa’s [Flame Territory] seemed to be firmly suppressed by the opponent’s strange territory. If it weren’t for Mecek who activated the fire magic to assist, it would have been a complete loss. Even when the 2 of them teamed up, they were still in a disadvantage and were in a dangerous situation several times.

When Mecek was anxious, he heard a commotion from the soldiers. It turned out that the military tents were all caught on fire at some point of time. There was also the sound of fighting in the midst of the thick smoke. They didn’t know how many ambush soldiers there were.

With this distraction, Mecek felt a sharp qi close to his body. Fortunately, Bubowa pulled him immediately. His body dodged in time. He felt his left arm was light, and his elbow was actually cut off. Blood spurted out suddenly like he was cut by an extremely sharp weapon.

When Mecek screamed, Bubowa made a decisive decision. He withstood a heavy punch forcefully and borrowed the force to fly out with Mecek. At the same time, there was a scroll in his hand.

Bubowa vomited a mouthful of blood on the scroll, and it shone in blue light. In the blink of an eye, he and Mecek disappeared at the same time.

Scrolls were used quite frequently in the human world, but it was very rare in the Demon Realm due to material limitations. Besides, the magic power and success rate of the scroll seals would be discounted. Especially this kind of teleportation magic, if it was not for the low interference of the surrounding magic in the wilderness, it was very likely that there would be a chance of failure like when Chen Rui was using Dark Will.

Although the soldiers of the Bloody Empire fought bravely, they suddenly fell into chaos when they lost their leader. They were in disorder due to the deadly onslaught led by Francis. They finally began to retreat.

“General Francis, it’s almost time. Let’s go back!”

This voice made Francis stop chasing immediately. At this time, Francis and the soldiers looked at Chen Rui not only in respect, but also in awe. This sir who was holding General George’s Lion Tooth Sword was wise and brave. He miraculously led the defeated troops to do a major comeback successfully by defeating the enemy.

Especially Francis who had clearly felt Bubowa’s level of strength just now. It should be the powerhouse of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. Mecek was also the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, and this comrade who called himself the “military supplies officer” fought the 2 opponents alone. He even cut off Mecek’s arm. If Bubowa didn’t escape with his secret technique, perhaps both of them would have been “held” there.

In fact, Chen Rui still held back his power. He didn’t really intend to kill. The Fallen Angel Empire and the Bloody Empire were friendly allies on the surface after all. This conflict was more like a small-scale game or even military training. If it was just an individual casualties like a lieutenant or a team leader, it was all right. The more powerful one would have the say. Both sides would tacitly swallow the bitter pill. However, this tacit understanding also had a limit. For example, Bubowa’s current status as the deputy legion leader of the Rage Flame Legion had exceeded the limit. Once the situation escalated, it was likely to trigger greater military operations and even war. At present, the overall combat power and empire strength of the Fallen Angel Empire were not the opponents of the Bloody Empire. They belonged to the weaker side, So they must be tolerant and not let the conflict evolve into a real war. General George had specifically advised him before he came.

However, this battle effectively crushed the Bloody Empire’s arrogance. Bubowa would most probably pay close attention to this mysterious enemy who caused him a great setback, and he would not act rashly for a long time.

Chen Rui’s gains this time were not limited to this. When fighting the 2 Demon Emperor level enemies, he not only used [Scorching Dragon Possession], but he also used a new kind of territory that he learned through the basic law, [Summer Territory].

Could it be that his territory has four seasons?

chapters.title: Chapter 461: Being Unjustly Attacked! The Misunderstanding When Returning
chapters.body:
Chapter 461: Being Unjustly Attacked! The Misunderstanding When Returning

[Summer Territory] was the third kind of territory that Chen Rui had realized. This kind of “territory” was not equivalent to the [Galaxy Territory] skill of the Super System. Instead, it was a real territory that Chen Rui realized based on his own insights from the basic “law”. In other words, even if he did not activate the skill of the Super System, these 3 territories could still be used.

[Autumn Territory]——The territory power realized from the dark energy left by Shura. It could weaken and age enemies as well as add various debuffs.

[Spring Territory]—— The territory power realized from the power of Nirvana and the [Astral Form] characteristics. It could heal his and his allies’ wounds and speed up recovery.

[Summer Territory]—— The territory power realized from the Scorching Dragon breath and Star Conversion skill. It could absorb the enemy’s power and turn it into his own use. It could also generate various attacks and supernatural powers that affect the soul.

[Summer Territory] was Chen Rui’s biggest gain this time. Although it was still in its initial form, when he tried activating it in the state of the [Scorching Dragon Possession] this time to trap the 2 extraordinary Demon Emperor powerhouses, the effect was still quite satisfactory. As he further deepened his understanding of the “basic law”, this territory would also be further improved and strengthened.

Soon, Chen Rui returned to the Warlock Fortress with Francis and the soldiers.

Rescuing Francis, capturing Pamir, and ambushing the enemy’s base camp, defeating Bubowa, and cutting off Mecek’s arm. This battle result surprised General George and Gloria. Previously, I just wanted Chen Rui to rescue Francis. I didn’t expect he could go to this extent!

“Marvellous! It seems that our family’s Athena didn’t pick the wrong guy,” Gloria patted Chen Rui’s shoulder carefreely. “If anyone dares to go against your relationship with Athena, I will beat him! If George doesn’t agree, then don’t even think about going to my bed!”

The last sentence almost made Chen Rui choke to death. His father-in-law also showed embarrassment and yelled, “Don’t mess around, Gloria. Chen Rui’s identity is a secret. He did not hide us as he treats us as his family. This matter must be kept secret anyway!”

Gloria was not an insensible person. Just now, she spoke so casually because she didn’t treat Chen Rui as an outsider. She immediately nodded to express her understanding.

“You really made me look at you in a different light, Chen Rui,” George did not hide his admiration, “Francis is not a guy that is easy to persuade. I can see that he is completely convinced of you. If you can stay in the army for further training, you will definitely become a dazzling star of the generation in the future. You may consider it.”

“The general has overpraised me,” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “Actually, I was just lucky. Thanks Madam Gloria who created a diversion. As for the future, we will talk about it in the future. I must hurry back to the Dark Moon now.”

“Please send my greetings to Princess Royal Highness. Take good care of Athena. I can be rest assured with you around.”

If the father-in-law came to the Dark Moon last time to recognize the identity of Chen Rui as his daughter’s “boyfriend”, then this sentence was equivalent to officially entrusting Athena to Chen Rui.

“Please be rest assured, general. I once vowed to make Athena safe and happy all her life. I will do it.”

General George nodded with a relief on his face.

Chen Rui did not stop at the Warlock Fortress, he went straight across the fortress, and he continued south toward the Dark Moon. Before leaving, he gave Gloria a set of black potions. The red dragon madam was so happy and excited that she blurted: If I have a daughter in the future, she will marry her “brother-in-law” too. This made his father-in-law speechless again.

Sisters duo? It sounds wonderful, but this empty check wife is too far away…

Chen Rui passed the White Feather Estate, then he went through the capital and the Blue Lava Estate before finally reaching the Dark Moon Estate. He went to the 3 empires of the Demon Realm in this trip. It lasted for nearly 3 months. When he returned to the Dark Moon border now, a sense of intimacy surged in my heart.

It felt like home.

Suddenly, he wanted to see his lovers, friends, and many people.

At present, Town Dico, Town Leith, and Town Jumo on the back of the Dark Moon had become prosperous and lively towns driven by the rapid economic growth of the Dark Moon City. Their population had also greatly increased. After Chen Rui passed through these towns, he reminiscenced the past events in his heart. Shea’s last “order”, the assassination of Josh, and the decisive battle in the wilderness seemed like they just happened yesterday.

Unknowingly, he had arrived in the Dark Moon City. The strange thing was that as soon as Chen Rui entered the city, he immediately felt that he was being watched. To be precise, the businessman, “Simon”, was being watched.

The stalkers were quite good. They had changed several people and positions continuously, but they could not escape from Chen Rui’s eyes and ears. This level of surveillance was probably not what ordinary gangsters could do. Chen Rui did not know the current situation of the Dark Moon. He didn’t know what reason Shea used to conceal him, the financial officer, who “evaporated” for more than 2 months, so he didn’t dare to show his true colors hastily.

Just as Chen Rui was passing a street, he was intrigued by the 2 demons chatting.

“ Hey, haven’t you heard of recent news that Aguile of the Cloak Gang is the remnant of Beelzebub Royal Family. He was publicly wanted by Princess Royal before…”

“It’s impossible. Aguile is the biggest hero who defeated the Red Spirit Estate Army in the wilderness of Town Leith…”

“I don’t know. If it is true, isn’t the Cloak Gang a force of the Beelzebub Royal Family?”

“It is rumored that the Cloak Gang is now controlled by Princess Royal. Many members have already quitted…”

When Chen Rui heard this conversation, he frowned. “Aguile”‘s “Beelzebub” identity is only officially revealed in front of Joseph, but the Dark Moon City actually has such rumors, so there should be only 1 possibility.

Chen Rui was almost killed by Bridget when he was in Town Lupin of the Blue Lava Estate. He had no choice but to activate the God-Eating Mask’s [Demonic Flies Transformation] to escape the catastrophe. Bridget mistakenly believed that this secret technique belonged to the Beelzebub Royal Family. This could be the only way of the “news” leakage. Then this rumor should come from the Bloodfall.

The Beelzebub Royal Family is the old enemy of the Fallen Angel Empire. The purpose of the Bloodfall must be to cause chaos within the Dark Moon and to arouse the conflict between the Dark Moon and the Fallen Angel Empire in order to reap the benefits in between.

While he was thinking, the sense of crisis became stronger. Chen Rui suddenly realized that there was no one around him. Not long ago, there were still a lot of people. At this time, a woman suddenly appeared in front of him.

The woman was veiled, and her figure was familiar.

Race: Sloth Royal Family (mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-.

[Analysis]: Wind attribute.

There was only one person in the Dark Moon who matched this attributes, Roman’s aunty, Isabella, but Ms. Yini now exuded a faint murderous intent.

“You have 2 choices. First, follow me honestly. Second, I will take you, or your corpse, with me.” The cold voice sounded. Even though she deliberately used a magic sound mixer, Chen Rui still recognized that it was Ms. Yini.

“This lady, did you recognize the wrong person? My name is Simon, a businessman. I just came to the Dark Moon from outside.”

Chen Rui understood a little bit. Ms. Yini really recognized the wrong person this time. It should be the Dark Demon trying to capture some enemy, and his changed attire and appearance should be very close to their target. It was definitely a misunderstanding.

In other words, the Dark Demon’s intel ability is too inferior, right? They even got the wrong target?

At this time, a voice behind him sounded again, “Don’t talk nonsense with him, just grab him back first!”

Without looking at the prompts in the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could guess who was this familiar voice behind him. It was Isabella’s best friend, Krobelus.

Krobelus was a little anxious. She didn’t give Chen Rui a chance to explain at all. With a flash, she appeared behind Chen Rui. She reached out and clasped his shoulders. Just as she was about to exert force, the enemy’s low voice sounded in her ears, “Betty, don’t do it. It’s me!”

Just in case, there were many things that had been hidden from Isabella including Chen Rui’s strange powers. Especially the identity of the “Charles” which even Krobelus didn’t know, Chen Rui did not want to expose more matters in front of Isabella in order to avoid unnecessary misunderstandings and troubles.

Krobelus was taken aback. Only my closest friends know the name “Betty”. How could this enemy know it too? Also, that voice seems a bit familiar?

When Isabella saw Krobelus’ movements suddenly stopped, she thought that she had been tricked. She shouted and activated the [Flash] attribute. She instantly rushed in front of Chen Rui with a dim dagger in her hand. It was the legendary grade weapon, Searing Shadow, that Chen Rui’s disguise, Charles, gave her back then.

Being attacked by the weapon he gave, Chen Rui really felt like an arrow in his knee. He instantly activated teleportation to dodge it. It is inconvenient to explain in front of Isabella now. It is better that I escape here quickly and change my identity to resolve the misunderstanding.

“Betty, are you okay?” Isabella worriedly asked Krobelus who was in a daze at this critical moment.

“I’m okay,” Krobelus shook her head, and she pointed at Chen Rui, “That person…”

Chen Rui knew that if he showed his identity to Krobelus, Krobelus would definitely not attack him, but Isabella would have doubts. The best way now was to leave here as soon as possible. Just as he wanted to slip away, another feeling came into his mind. Spiritual link! The linked target was approaching quickly, and the target appeared in front of him in the blink of an eye.

“Little Betty, why haven’t you settled it yet? Didn’t you say that you will let me try those new emerald jade wines today?” The loud voice sounded heart-warming to Chen Rui. Who else is it besides Paglio? Great, I saw the 2 of them before I went back.

“Such trash is also worth delaying your time?” Paglio raised his hand, and a magnificent force came toward Chen Rui.

“Wait a minute! I’m Chen…” Chen Rui hastily gathered his strength and shouted, but the poison dragon was not moved at all. Instead, he attacked with more force.

Paglio’s seal was now fully dispelled, so his strength had returned to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Chen Rui was definitely unable to contend with him. It would even be a problem for him to escape, so he had to teleport away again. Before he could stand firmly, he was firmly locked in by a terrifying breath. He was unable to avoid it at that moment. The surrounding air produced a strange twisting and tearing feeling. It seemed that this guy was rushing back to drink, so he was going all out.

If I am really caught, I’m afraid I will suffer a big loss. Chen Rui couldn’t avoid it. It was too late to gather his strength and whisper the sound transmission. He shouted, “Didn’t I say wait a minute? Dead duck dragon!”

The twisting and tearing force in the air stopped instantly. Paglio’s 5 fingers stopped 10 centimeters in front of Chen Rui’s face. The expression in his eyes suddenly changed, “You…you…”

“You, you dumbass!” Chen Rui glanced at Isabella whose eyes were full of suspicion. He frustratedly smacked away poison dragon’s paw, “Let’s leave this place first.”

Who exactly were they tracking which caused such a misunderstanding?

chapters.title: Chapter 462: Women After Farewell
chapters.body:
Chapter 462: Women After Farewell

The Dark Moon City, the residence of sheriff & financial officer.

Chen Rui put his arms around Athena and Kia. Lying on the bed, under the purple moonlight from the top window, he told his story after parting.

“Nate is really famous now. This despicable villain finally got his retribution.” Athena snuggled into Chen Rui’s arms as she said angrily.

“But even when the despicable villain meets our liar, he will be framed tragically.” Kia took the other side of Chen Rui’s arms, and she suddenly added, “By the way, Athena, I heard Delia said that the daughter of Master Turia, the current president of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association, seems to have a soft spot for ‘Richard’. It seems that she still remembers ‘Richard’ after he died? Did our Mr. Liar go out and add a ‘good sister’ for us?”

This sour remark made Chen Rui speechless. Delia was one of the 2 leaders of the Dark Demon. She knew a lot about the intel of the Bloody Empire. As a member of the Governance Association, she would naturally share those “gossip” with the sisters of the association. But this matter was really unjust. He really had nothing with Beluan. Instead, there might be some problem on Isabella’s side.

The previous misunderstanding incident was quickly clarified. It turned out that Isabella and Krobelus were targeting the leader of the secret intelligence from the Fallen Angel Capital who was a Demon Emperor-level elite of the elder family. In an operation shortly after the misunderstanding, Isabella and Krobelus finally succeeded in capturing the leader of the secret intelligence. What made Chen Rui speechless was that this enemy was very similar to his disguise of “Simon” in appearance, clothing, and height. The leader also used the same merchant’s identity as a disguise. In addition, this misunderstanding timing was also related to Chen Rui’s journey which was from the capital to the Red Spirit Estate to the Dark Moon. No matter what, he was really being attacked for no reason.

Isabella scolded the Dark Demon’s spies, but when she looked at Chen Rui, she looked at Chen Rui with a strange suspicion which made the liar secretly nervous.

During the days when Chen Rui left, Shea announced that Master Aldas needed to conduct an important pharmaceutical experiment, and his apprentice, Chen Rui, had to assist him. Therefore, the financial officer’s position was temporarily assigned to the Old Gauss. This excuse was indeed reasonable, but the Dark Moon’s economy was currently developing rapidly, so the financial officer was no better than before. Old Gauss was still incapable of solving many of the problems encountered, so most of them were solved by Isabella.

Isabella not only controlled the secret intelligence department of the Fallen Angel Empire, but she also was the financial adviser of the empire. She had been in power for many years. Whether it was ability or experience, she was regarded as a top talent. She was increasingly trusted by Shea.

Chen Rui expressed his gratitude to Isabella for doing the financial affairs on behalf of him, but facing the strange gaze of Ms. Yini, he always felt a little guilty. Thinking about it now, Isabella must be suspicious of him. Compared with the distant Beluan, Ms. Yini was the real difficulty.

While thinking about it, he felt a pain in his waist on the left. He was pinched badly by Athena. Immediately after that, the little maid secretly pinched on the right in response to the main wife’s action to balance it off.

“If you miss her, why do you come back in such a hurry?” Athena’s words were obviously jealous.

“This is a misunderstanding.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “I was thinking about another thing just now, so I was a little lost. Ms. Beluan and I didn’t have anything, otherwise I wouldn’t fake death.”

“Maybe you want to fake death to escape certain things that you have done…” The little maid added, worsening the tense situation. Chen Rui was filled with annoyance when he heard her. He smacked her bouncy hip.

With this smack, the little maid suddenly stopped talking, but her body started to get a little hot. She rubbed her body gently on the man’s chest, making Chen Rui almost lose control. His hand went down smoothly, realizing that even her underwear had already wet.

When the man’s hand touched the rippling spring water, Kia’s gasping sound began to become a little heavier. Her body twisted slightly like a snake. Athena sensitively noticed something was wrong. She blushed and was about to sit up, but she was pulled by the little maid, “We agreed on being together tonight. Taking advantage of Zola’s long-term closed-door experiment, let’s squeeze the liar first!”

Athena hesitated for a moment, and she was hugged by Chen Rui. Her body became soft as she suddenly lost her strength. The little maid on the other side had actually taken off the man’s pants and leaned down and began to serve. Although it wasn’t the first time Athena saw it, it still made her blush.

Although the legion leader and madam sheriff was generous, she couldn’t catch up with the little maid when in bed. Especially when she was “tackling” the man with the little maid. Chen Rui knew Athena’s temperament. In a proactive way, he unceremoniously stripped her off. “Now I let you check for yourself whether your man is cheating outside. Tomorrow, I will ask for leave for both of you.” The man grinned, then the women’s groaning sounded. The interlaced and seductive groans began to drift in the room.

The next day, Chen Rui appeared in front of the Dark Moon’s palace. He looked refreshed.

The desire that he had held back for a few months was completely released last night. The attributes of [Dual Training] were brought to the fullest. He couldn’t describe the various tastes to outsiders, but the 2 female “quality inspectors” had consumed a lot of mental and physical strength due to excessive orgasm. They were still lying in bed. It seemed like they really needed to take a leave.

Shea, who learned the news, immediately put down the work at hand and summoned Chen Rui alone in the council hall.

As the lord of the Fallen Angel Empire’s largest estate and also the Princess Royal of the empire, Shea’s responsibility and pressure were quite huge, but this was completely different from the pressure when the Dark Moon was suppressed and controlled by the capital. The slightly thinner face was still as icy as before, but with a more confident temperament. She looked more beautiful and attractive.

Shea’s purple eyes showed a faint warmth. She watched Chen Rui who had disappeared for nearly 3 months, but what she said was the standard lord’s tone, “You are back? You handled the crystal mine matter perfectly, and you also rescued Master Rummenigge safely. The Lord of Bloody Vine Flower Estate, General Crawford, expressed his most sincere gratitude to us. The 1000-person magician legion has already arrived, but Monroe, the son of Crawford who was originally going to join the Flame Legion, has not come to the Dark Moon to report…”

Before she finished, Chen Rui interrupted her, “You have lost weight.”

Shea moved her eyes slightly. She took a deep breath, and she continued saying, “I also heard about your performance in the Bloody Empire this time. It can be said to be quite…”

“I miss you very much when I’m away.”

Shea’s mouth moved and her voice became quieter, “Have you heard? The people have been spreading about Beelzebub in the Dark Moon City…”

“I just want to hug you now.”

Chen Rui arrived in front of Princess Royal Highness and stretched out his hands. Shea did not move all this while, so he hugged her directly. She looked calm and expressionless, but her heartbeat betrayed her real mood.

“You came back yesterday afternoon.” This time, Shea finally stopped talking about official business. Her voice contained a trace of dissatisfaction.

Chen Rui was stunned, then he understood the subtext of this sentence: Why did you only come to me now?

Or there were more subtexts.

All in all, it was a word: Jealousy.

At this moment, Princess Royal Highness was not a lord, but a little woman who got jealous.

Care was naturally behind the jealousy.

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui touched her forehead with his forehead. The noses of the 2 touched gently; they were able to breathe each other’s breathing. This was Shea’s favorite intimacy action.

“ Hmph! Duplicity!” Shea’s dissatisfaction seemed to have disappeared with this snort. Although this was the council hall, she did not break free as before. Instead, she gently hugged his back. She hadn’t felt the warmth of this embrace for 2 months and 23 days.

The two quietly hugged and felt each other’s warmth and heartbeat until the male characteristic began to get aroused because of the attractive female body in his embrace. The warm embrace was released following the destroyed atmosphere.

Shea’s blushed. She glanced at Chen Rui angrily, “Disrespectful guy! Are these things in your mind all day?”

In fact, there was one more thing she hadn’t said yet: Maybe you haven’t had enough with Athena and Kia last night?

Athena had to take “leave” from the lord which was the Princess Royal Highness. Although she hadn’t experienced that matter, Shea was very clear about what happened. To describe it in 1 sentence: I have never eaten pork, but does it mean that I have never seen a pig running?

This was also one of the real reasons why Princess Royal Highness was jealous.

Chen Rui laughed embarrassingly and felt very innocent. If he ignored the beautiful women and had no special reaction at all, then it was truly “disrespectful”.

In order to avoid the embarrassment of the atmosphere, he immediately changed the topic, “My business is basically completed during this trip. The Dark Moon should focus on the development of military forces. Being in the Bloody Empire this time, I have seen the strength and mental outlook of the Bloody Empire Army. It can be regarded as the top of the 3 empires. There are many things to learn by the Dark Moon Army.”

In the small battle of Warlock Fortress, Chen Rui was deeply impressed by the performance of the Bloody Empire soldiers who were still fighting after the leader’s defeat. In fact, he could see it from the determination and unyielding spirit of the Bloody Empire soldiers during the battle ball match on the training field when he first arrived in the Bloody Empire.

Relatively speaking, the Dark Moon and even the Fallen Angel Empire and even the Dark Shadow Empire army were inferior in this respect. Therefore, Chen Rui wanted to further strengthen training on the will to improve the cohesion and combat effectiveness of the entire team.

“ En .” Shea also diverted her attention very cooperatively, but obviously she really attached great importance to Chen Rui’s opinion. “The Dark Moon’s recruitment and training some time ago has shown some results. Now the Red Blood Legion has expanded to 70,000 people; the Flame Legion 80,000 people; the western’s Moon Shadow Legion 50,000 people. There are also the wyvern legion with 1,200 riders, magician legion with 1100 people, tauren legion with 2,400 people, and medusa legion with 2,500 people.”

Shea did not look at any information for the details of military strength and classification of her estate. This was a quality a good lord should possess.

Chen Rui looked up, “Our current biggest enemy is the capital’s Obsidian. The current 200,000 military strength, coupled with the demand for rations and equipment, is almost the limit of the Dark Moon Estate at this stage. There is no need to increase the quantity of troops at the moment. The next important thing is quality. Quality is more important than quantity when it comes to soldiers. We must try to build a truly elite army. When necessary, we can also consider disarmament or adjustment of the army…”

Shea listened carefully and asked, “Is there any specific plan?”

“There is no specific plan for the time being, but I have discussed this matter with Athena; I already have a rough outline. The main content is tentatively set for military competition and confrontation exercises…”

Chen Rui thought for a while, and he said, “In the war of lords, the wyvern legion and medusas have been exposed. The magician legion should be kept secret for the time being as a surprise weapon. Meanwhile, the taurens have mastered advanced enchanting technology. Each of them is a precious forging master and mechanic master. We should focus on building ordnance and equipment at present, and they should not be easily dispatched. Don’t forget that in Town Yankou, we also have an undead army with an astonishing number and equally amazing combat effectiveness. Obsidian has no time to do other matters because of the fundraising money. We just take advantage of the precious opportunity to recuperate and reinforce our strengths to further accumulate our strength. For the next step, I have almost got some plans…”

Shea kept nodding her head. When she heard that Chen Rui suddenly lost his words, she couldn’t help asking, “What plans?”

Chen Rui smiled mysteriously, “This plan is very important. I decided to report to Princess Royal Highness alone.”

“Aren’t we alone now?”

“Don’t you think this council hall is too wide? The place I want is relatively small. It’s even better with mirror and wind chimes. We can dance to the music together while discussing, talk about life intimately on the chair… If it’s here, I can’t guarantee whether I will miss any key parts.

Shea flushed again, and she said coldly, “Are you threatening me?”

“So… be it!” Chen Rui grinned without any remorse for threatening his female boss.

“Since you refuse to say, you can leave now.” Shea’s face turned cold.

The same move is useless to the wretched crossover. Chen Rui said in his heart and saluted Shea, “The time is really not suitable. The night atmosphere is the best… Then, see you at the same place tonight, my dear Royal Highness.”

Before Shea could react, Chen Rui bowed quickly and flashed to the door, “ Oh , I remember it will be your birthday at the beginning of next month. I will give you an unforgettable gift by then.”

After speaking, he disappeared at the door.

Birthday? Shea was startled. She almost forgot it herself, but he actually remembered it.

Princess Royal Highness gently covered her face. She seemed to be feeling the suppressed heat and joy. Slowly, she let go of her hands, and her feet began to dance lightly and cheerfully.

Is this the night👀?

chapters.title: Chapter 463: “Interrogation”? Yini'S Suspicion
chapters.body:
Chapter 463: “Interrogation”? Yini'S Suspicion

A few days later, in the Dark Moon City, the rumors of Aguile and Beelzebub were still pervasive. However, after Shea announced that the Red Blood Legion deputy legion leader Aguile would also serve as the deputy guard leader of the palace, it had faded a lot.

What is the deputy guard leader of the palace? A confidant second only to Guard Leader Kaguli! Not to mention about mobilizing the palace guards, the privilege of entering and leaving the palace anytime is enough to prove the trust of Princess Royal Highness. Would Princess Royal place a suspected and dangerous person like a Beelzebub Royal Family member near her?

Chen Rui came up with this idea. Resolving the rumors was surely part of the purpose. On the other hand, it was taking advantage of official matters for personal gain so that he could freely change his identity and have a date with Princess Royal Highness.

During these days, the relationship between the 2 had steadily warmed up. Except for the last line of defense, Shea’s defenses were breached. Chen Rui could clearly feel her long-suppressed gentleness under the indifferent lord’s mask, and she was gradually intoxicated.

Under the ruthless beauty appearance, she actually had a deep fear of loneliness, but she had to face loneliness. Fortunately, she was no longer alone now. She had a shoulder that she could lean on or “bite on.”

In the previous incident that Chen Rui was being mistaken as someone else, the capital’s secret intelligence leader, who was captured, finally confessed under Isabella’s secret technique. His main purpose of coming to the Dark Moon this time was to investigate the details of the Cloak Gang’s “Aguile”. If he confirmed that Aguile was a descendant of the Beelzebub Royal Family, then he could try to approach Aguile and even represent the Regent Obsidian with a corresponding commitment. This even included assigning the Dark Moon to the Beelzebub Royal Family. The conditions were to overthrow Shea and obey the capital.

This intention was quite sinister. Obsidian was stuck in the fundraising issue. He was eager to raise money to pay off his debts, so he had no time to concentrate on dealing with Shea. Watching the Dark Moon’s power and influence power growing, he couldn’t feel at ease, so he used this insidious trick to entice an internal strife within the Dark Moon. He would even assign the Dark Moon to the Beelzebub Royal Family who was originally a mortal enemy.

Of course, this “assignment” was probably just a short promise. At least, it would at least slow down the Down Moon. As long as the Beelzebub Royal Family and Shea started a fierce battle, the development of the Dark Moon would definitely stagnate or regress. Obsidian was happy to watch the fire from the shore while they were fighting. At the same time, he tried to solve the big problem of the fundraising money before freeing up to deal with Shea or Beelzebub.

However, Obsidian never expect that the secret intelligence leader he sent would fall into the hands of the enemy so quickly; he also didn’t expect that the current head of the Dark Moon’s secret intelligence department, “Dark Demon”, was his former powerful subordinate who knew the capital’s secrets well, the Devil’s Snare’s flower, Isabella. What was more unexpected was that the so-called “Aguile. Beelzebub” was simply Shea’s “confidant”.

This intel made Chen Rui feel a little pity because, before that, Shea had announced that Aguile would serve as the chief guard of the palace. If he learned from the head of the secret intelligence earlier that he would contact “Aguile”, Chen Rui could use another identity to talk to Obsidian. Perhaps he could trick the Royal Highness Regent again.

Of course, Obsidian did not know that the leader of the secret intelligence had been captured. Therefore, Chen Rui could consider using some more strategies, but he had no time to think about this issue because this intel was personally conveyed by the leader of the Dark Demon, Isabella, who “invited” him to the Dark Demon headquarters in the name of Delia. Ms. Yini was now in front of him. She looked at the sir financial officer with a scrutinizing gaze.

There were only 2 people in the entire room which were Isabella and Chen Rui. The rest of the Dark Demon members had consciously left long ago when the madam boss signaled them.

Chen Rui was a little guilty under her watch. Isabella said, “There are several important questions which are likely to be related to the future development of the Dark Demon. Sir financial officer, please clarify my doubts.”

Chen Rui also wanted to find a topic to distract her, but when he heard that it was important, he nodded quickly.

“The first question, how much do you know about Roman?”

The first question surprised Chen Rui. Does Isabella suspect that there is a problem with her nephew? Perhaps as the head of a secret intelligence department, she has reason to doubt anyone. Although Roman was lusty, alcoholic and frivolous, Chen Rui could safely hand over his back to him without being wary.

“Although Roman and I have not known each other for a long time, no matter what is the reason or evidence, I only have 2 words: Absolute trust.

Isabella nodded slightly, and she asked again, “Paglio, are these 2 words too for you. I heard from Betty that the relationship between both of you is extraordinary.”

Ms. Yini deliberately emphasized the word “extraordinary”. Chen Rui felt a little awkward. There is nothing but innocence between me and the dead duck dragon.

“I’m very curious about one thing now.” Isabella frowned slightly, “That day, how could the businessman named ‘Simon’ escape the blow of Paglio and I?”

The magnitude of this thinking jump was very large. She immediately brought in “Simon”. Chen Rui quickly explained, “This is the case. I was fortunate to have a grand master inheritance in the human world, and I later awakened some mechanic and life-saving skills, but it is only life-saving. There is no fighting power. If I didn’t stop Paglio after that, I would have been killed by my own people.”

Chen Rui had been thinking about this explanation for a long time. He hoped to fool Isabella, but she was not an ordinary woman. She was so savvy that she was almost on par with Teris. She once exposed his fundraising scam when he was pretending to be “Charles”. She was also the first “rival” to see through Chen Rui’s layout.

This time, can I really fool her?
