Fini asked curiously, “Since we have decided to go north, why must we go to the Dark Moon? Isn’t the Red Spirit Estate closer?”

Monroe explained, “Due to the murder of the former mayor of Town Leia, the entrance examination of the Red Spirit Estate is very tight while the Dark Moon trade road is much more lenient. Although going to the Dark Moon is a long detour, it is safer.”

At this moment, footsteps sounded at the door. They were actually heading this way. The strongest Calder and Feyman were the first to look vigilant. Monroe quickly noticed it, and he lightly held Fini’s hand. He assured her to not worry when there was a knock on the door.

“Guests, the food you want is here.”

They looked at each other and were on guard. When Calder slowly opened the door, he saw that it was not a waiter at the door, but a man in a cloak.

“You…” Calder seemed to be stunned with his eyes widened. When he was about to make a move, the man in the cloak had disappeared in an instant and appeared in front of Fini. Feyman’s reaction was quick. His fist appeared silently behind the man in the cloak. The man in the cloak disappeared again in an instant with just a flick. This time he landed beside Monroe, and he grabbed the shoulder of the young general.

“Stop!”

With this scream, Calder and Feyman stopped their movements together. It could be seen that the young general was already under the control of the other party. If there was any reckless action, Monroe would be killed by the other party immediately.

The cloak man spoke, “Don’t worry, I’m not a chaser of the Dark Shadow Empire, nor do I have any malice intent toward Young General Monroe. This impolite move is just for you to calm down and listen to me.”

Calder and Feyman looked at each other. They sensed that the man in the cloak just had the breath of Higher Demon, but from the way he evaded the attack of the 2 and controlling Monroe with lightning speed, it could not be a Higher Demon strength. He should be at a higher level.

“Who are you exactly?”

“I’m not an enemy. Speaking of which, the young general should call me a deputy legion commander since he has joined the Dark Moon Army.” The man in the cloak unexpectedly slowly released grasp on Monroe’s shoulder, “My name is — Aguile.”

Elopement + encountering good guy= ? 🤨

chapters.title: Chapter 469: Broc'S Plot
chapters.body:
Chapter 469: Broc'S Plot

As soon as the cloak man said so, the 4 people in the house were shocked.

“Young General Monroe, do you remember the Flame Legion’s sword match? That time, you lost to Legion Commander Athena within a minute, so you chose to go to Flame Region instead of our Red Blood Region.”

The match was conducted internally. Only a few leaders knew it. Monroe looked at the cloak man and nodded slightly.

Chen Rui glanced at Fini again, “Ms. Fini, how is your father, Master Rummenigge? I rescued him from the Crystal Valley last time.”

Even fewer people knew about this. Fini was taken aback, and then she saluted earnestly, “It seems that it is really Sir Aguile. Thank you for saving his father’s life. Unfortunately, I can only express my gratitude in this way. ”

With Monroe and Fini’s confirmation, at least the man in cloak in front of them was not a chaser of the Dark Shadow Empire. Feyman’s vigilant expression eased a bit, “You’re Aguile, the powerhouse who defeated the Red Spirit Lord Josh and killed the capital envoy, Rus, in the Dark Moon’s war of lords?”

Chen Rui nodded, “Sir has overpraised me. My strength has not yet reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. That battle was just a fluke.

An odd expression appeared in Calder’s eyes, “Why are you here?”

Chen Rui glanced at Fini, “I came to escort Young General Monroe and Ms. Fini on the order of Princess Shea. The Dark Moon will provide shelter for both of you.”

The so-called “Princess Shea’s order” was naturally false, but with Chen Rui’s current relationship with Shea, this level of doing before informing was not a problem. Not to mention that it was beneficial to the Dark Moon.

Monroe was taken aback, “How did Princess Shea know I’m here?”

“Don’t underestimate the ability of the Dark Moon.” Chen Rui said lightly, “Your empire will not want an incompetent ally.”

Chen Rui’s words had directly elevated the Dark Moon to the status of an ally of the Dark Shadow Empire. Calder was the first to express his opposition, “If this is the case, then Princess Shea will definitely hand over the young general and Ms. Fini to Her Majesty Empress as a so-called ally gift!”

“Young General Monroe is currently a wanted criminal in the Dark Shadow Empire. If Princess Shea is the lord of the Dark Shadow Empire, then she can only agree to arrest all of you like General Crawford. However, Princess Shea is the top lord in the Fallen Angel Empire who is also the future controller of the Lucifer Royal Family. She is not subject to your country’s restraint. Sir Monroe is now the high rank counselor of the Flame Legion and the commander of the magician legion. This appointment is still not revoked after Princess Shea received news that the young general was wanted.”

Chen Rui’s words were obviously half-truth and half-false, and he added a sensational sentence, “What’s more, in addition to the cooperation of the estate, Princess Shea and General Crawford have deep personal relationships. After all, your father only has one son.”

Monroe trembled. He held Fini’s hand tightly again. Feyman was silent, but Calder still said in disbelief, “These are just fancy words. Don’t think about deceiving the young general. How do guarantee our safety?”

“I’m here with the greatest sincerity.” Chen Rui snorted and said, “If Princess Shea doesn’t really attach importance and respect to young general, it is not me who came here, but a Demon Overlord powerhouse to capture you.”

These words were not bragging. During the auction in the Dark Moon, 2 Demon Overlord powerhouses were captured and killed in the blink of an eye. The Dark Moon definitely had such background and strength.

Chen Rui immediately said, “Princess Shea had always done what she said. There is no doubt of her sincerity. However, this matter should not be revealed because it is the key moment of cooperation between the Dark Moon Estate and the Dark Shadow Empire. It is also not suitable for young general to immediately return to the Flame Legion in the Dark Moon City. It’s better for all of you to follow me to the Walan Fortress, the base of Mountain Xilang’s Moon Shadow Legion, to hide for a while, and wait for the situation to calm down.”

Even Feyman nodded as soon as he said this. If Shea really wanted to please her allies, she would send a Demon Overlord powerhouse directly to catch the 4 of them. There was no need for such troubles.

Monroe was initially desperate. When he heard that the Dark Moon was willing to take him in during the times of crisis, he immediately showed gratitude, “Then thank you, Sir Aguile! Since Princess Royal Highness has not given up on me, an outsider, in such critical times, then I will swear to officially join the Dark Moon and shed my last drop of blood for Princess Royal!”

“Don’t worry.” Chen Rui nodded, “I have a relationship with the Legion Commander Tim of Walan Fortress. I will ask him to take special care of you. Take a rest for a while first.”

There were several considerations for Chen Rui to take in Monroe. Not only was he the only commander that could mobilize the magician legion, but Catherine’s order of granting Fini to Btoc was really intended to deal with Broc. Broc would be eliminated sooner or later. By that time, Monroe’s incident would definitely be downplayed or even “redressed.” Regardless of whether Crawford’s only son would return to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, he would give the Dark Moon more support and help.

Monroe’s own potential was extraordinary, coupled with Fini’s father, Rummenigge, this effort was still very worthwhile.

In addition to these interests, Chen Rui also had the will to pair up this loving couple deep down.

When Calder saw Monroe and Feyman both agreed, he no longer opposed it. Fini also felt relieved. Chen Rui learned from the 4 that when Monroe “kidnapped” Fini, their whereabouts were somehow exposed. They were chased by the Fire Blade Legion’s General Loki. If it weren’t for Crawford who arranged his 3 strongest subordinates to secretly protect Monroe, Monroe had died in Loki’s hands.

Loki’s strength was very powerful. He had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He had the strongest combat power under Broc. The 3 guards teamed up and still lost to him. Torres of the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor died. Feyman, who was also the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, was seriously injured, and the remaining Calder at the early stage of the Demon Emperor was also slightly injured. Finally, they desperately protected Monroe and Fini from the danger.

After deciding to set off in the night time, Chen Rui found Celine and settled in Alice ahead of time. He just sent the 4 to the Walan Fortress this time. It was inconvenient to take Alice along, and he could not reveal the princess identity of the little loli. After the 4 were settled, he would rush back to the Town Leia from the Walan Fortress to obtain those seeds, then he brought the little loli back to the Dark Moon City.

As the night fell, there was a deep chill in the whining night wind. The purple moonlight stretched the shadows of the 5 people on the road.

These people were Chen Rui, Monroe and others. They successfully passed the border checkpoint and entered the Fallen Angel Empire border. Although the road in front of them was a bustling trade route, there were no other people during late night. It looked extremely quiet.

At this moment, Chen Rui, at the end of the team, suddenly stopped and pulled Monroe as well as Fini. Feyman and Calder at the front were also alert. A figure was blocking the way ahead.

This figure was burly and vicious-looking. He wore a black half-body metal armor, and the cloak behind him fluttered in the cold wind.

Feyman shook, and there were flames all over his body. With a scream, he was on fire. Calder had already drawn out his long sword and said furiously, “Loki!”

Race: Envy Royal Family (mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A＋

Physique: A +; Strength: A +; Spirit: A -; Speed: A. Analysis: Water attribute.

It turns out that this is Loki. I didn’t expect him to actually appear here at this moment to block everyone!

Feyman gritted his teeth and said, “Aguile, Calder, you protect the young general and the young lady and go first, I will hold him!”

As soon as he finished speaking, a sudden change occurred. Feyman’s figure trembled, and a bloody sword tip protruded from his right chest. Fortunately, his instinctive reaction caused him to avoid the vital points at the critical moment. His heart was not injured, but this lung lobe was severely injured from this stab.

Feyman swung back with all his strength while roaring, and the tip of the sword in his chest as well as the sword user disappeared in an instant. Feyman’s furious hit missed, and he suffered even more serious injuries. He knelt on the ground unsteadily as the blood constantly overflowed from his chest with a hint of purple. This was not the effect of the moonlight, but it was poison!

Calder’s figure appeared in front of Loki. With a strange smile on his face, the sword in his hand was dripping with blood— the blood of his “partner”.

“Calder!” Feyman yelled with hatred. He finally understood why their escape route was exposed to Loki which cost Torres’ life. Loki once again appeared on their only way “in time” and stopped everyone now.

The change was too abrupt. Even Chen Rui didn’t have the time to rescue Feyman. It turns out that Calder is a spy. No wonder he opposed Monroe staying in the Dark Moon.

“Calder!” Until now, Monroe still didn’t understand the reason. He gritted his teeth and helped Feyman up, “You ungrateful shameless man! My father even saved your life and treated you like a confidant.”

“The so-called confidant is just a guard with no future. It is different if I follow General Broc.” Calder sneered, “So, I’ve already belonged to General Broc’s side long ago.”

“Even if I die, I won’t let you take Fini away!” Monroe guarded Fini with a greatsword in his hand.

“In the beginning, I didn’t intend to keep you alive including Fini.” Loki spoke up. His gaze showed a bloodthirsty cruel expression, “Poor little bug, you don’t understand yet that marrying Fini is a trap. It is part of the general’s smart trick to dissolve the emperor’s plan. “Calder deliberately instigated you to take this woman away. Not only will your old father, Crawford, be affected by this, but as long as your body appears in the Dark Moon, then the cooperation between the Dark Moon and Bloody Vine Flower Estate and even the Dark Shadow Empire will be severely impacted…”

Chen Rui frowned. It seems that all of this is Broc’s plot. He actually wants to take advantage of the situation to make the Dark Moon a scapegoat.

Loki turned his gaze to the frightened Fini. There was a hint of licentiousness in his gaze, “Although I’m not interested in marrying this woman, I don’t mind playing with her before killing her.

Monroe was furious while Fini was trembling with fright. She held an item in her hand, ready to commit suicide at any time. She would rather die than to be tainted by the enemy.

Feyman was heavily injured and eroded by that poison. Knowing that his words would fall to deaf ears at this time, he just accumulated his strength to prepare for the final dying blow.

“Wait a minute,” Chen Rui said, “You guys seem to forget something?”

“ Oh? ” The breath of power in Loki’s body gradually spread out. The strong pressure made Monroe, who was only Higher Demon, almost breathless, “Are you emphasizing your existence? You are just a garbage at the early stage of the Demon Emperor. Soon, you will turn into flying ash. If it weren’t for you, I wouldn’t have attacked in advance here.”

Once Chen Rui and the others returned to the fortress or the Dark Moon City, they were likely to be protected by a Demon Overlord powerhouse. Even Loki dare not simply make a move.

“Really?” Chen Rui remained calm. There were any signs of power fluctuations.

“It’s useless to be mysterious. I have already seen through your strength. You are just an early stage of the Demon Emperor.” Calder smiled disdainfully, “General Loki is not comparable to Josh, the pampered aristocratic master. He is the strongest Demon Emperor in the Fire Blade Legion. He has a lot of combat experience. Even if 2 peak stage of the Demon Emperors of the same realm join forces, they are not his opponents! Maybe there is no need for General Loki to fight personally, even I can turn you into a corpse.”

“The strongest Demon Emperor? So Broc has now surpassed the Demon Emperor level? I’m surprised that after the previous injury, he was still alive. He even had a breakthrough? Maybe there is a special reason…” Chen Rui said lightly, “In any case, the intel you revealed has a certain reference value.”

The previous injury? Loki and Calder looked at each other. They were secretly surprised, and they asked, “Who on earth are you?”

Chen Rui did not answer, but he suddenly flicked his hands. Monroe and Fini felt a strong force and passed out. Chen Rui then appeared in front of Feyman instantly. Feyman thought Chen Rui was also a spy, but he was helpless since he was severely injured. His ability was greatly reduced, and he was stunned by a single blow.

This move was far beyond the expectations of the 2 enemies. Calder snorted, “What are you up to? Even if it is so, don’t dream of surviving!”

“I just don’t want them to see some things, but both of you are exceptions because… the dead will not reveal any secrets.”

“Shameless bullshit!” Calder rushed toward Chen Rui. At this moment, his line of sight suddenly burst into light. The man in the cloak flashed with incomparably dazzling light. Even the 2 purple moons paled in comparison to this star-like brilliance.

Calder’s thrusting figure was repelled by a powerful force. His body flew back upside down uncontrollably, and he fell to the ground haggardly.

The light gradually diminished. A figure wearing a full set of armor appeared in front of Calder and Loki. This armor had a simple appearance with a little soft light flowing like a stardust.

When Loki felt the strength of that breath, he seemed vigilant. He gathered the power in his body frantically.

As soon as Calder got up from the ground, he felt a spark in front of him. The armored man had appeared in front of him, and his throat was tightened. He was already held by the opponent. With the strength of his early stage of the Demon Emperor, he did not have the strength to resist.

A large number of flowing fiery clouds appeared around Calder. The surrounding space seemed to turn into a burning world. Calder obviously activated his trump card territory power at a critical juncture.

However, it was still useless.

The fiery clouds seemed to be impacted by some kind of scorching force, and they suddenly became very weak. Then, the palm covered with armor just applied a little force, and Calder heard the sound of his neck being snapped. Almost at the same time, a terrifying force penetrated through his body. Not only that, his will instantly collapsed; he completely lost his consciousness.

Chen Rui let go of him, and Calder collapsed to the ground like the mud. In the [Summer Territory] activated with the [Royal Star Transformation], the soul of the villain who betrayed his benefactor and brothers was completely annihilated in the blink of an eye.

Wasn’t Broc severely injured by Chen Rui and Isabella back then? He got even more powerful again?

chapters.title: Chapter 470: Danger Behind?
chapters.body:
Chapter 470: Danger Behind?

“It’s your turn.” Chen Rui glanced back at Loki who exuded cold breath all over his body, and he walked over step by step.

The quick-kill of Calder made Loki no longer dare to underestimate this “Aguile”. An early stage of the Demon Emperor? What a joke! This idiotic Calder actually provided me the wrong intel. He deserved to be killed!

But Loki was not fearful at all. Chen Rui’s instant kill just now was more of a surprise. Loki’s strength was accumulated from experiences of countless deadly battles. He became stronger when facing against the stronger one. The combined record of defeating 2 peak stages of Demon Emperor mentioned by Calder earlier was by no means an exaggeration.

As long as this Aguile is not a Demon Overlord, it is possible to win!

Loki’s fighting spirit was booming. His power suddenly burst out as he punched. This powerful punch contained a strong chill. Even the ground was covered with frost.

However, this punch stopped before it hit Chen Rui. In front of the fist was a palm covered with armor. This punch was actually controlled by the power of this palm. No matter how Loki burst his power, he was unable to advance for an inch. Chen Rui’s wrist flicked, and Loki was knocked back with a strong force. He turned a somersault in the air. Finally, he gathered his strength and stabilized his body on the ground without falling.

Loki looked at his arm in horror. It had actually frozen. This was because his power was completely suppressed by the opponent.

The opponent’s voice sounded, “Use all of your true strength. If you dare to reserve your power, you really have only one way today which is death.”

Loki snorted. His momentum soared again. The ice on his arms was atomized by the steaming cold air. There was a pair of gloves in his hands, and he slowly put it on. His whole body began to flash with a faint blue light. In an instant, the entire avenue turned into a frosty world. Even the 2 purple moons in the sky were frozen.

Obviously, this was the anomaly seen in the territory space. Chen Rui nodded slightly, “You should be a trainer who directly integrates water element proficiency into power. This territory alone is very close to Demon Overlord’s territory. It’s a bit surprising, but it’s a pity that your power is far from the Demon Overlord level.”

The corner of Loki’s eyes flicked. His heart palpitated as he was thoroughly seen. In order not to continue to be disturbed by the opponent’s psychological tactics, he shouted as his swift fists turned into countless sharp icy debris. They formed a storm and swept toward Chen Rui.

There seemed to be countless illusory attacks in the storm, but these attacks were not entirely illusions. The reality and the illusion were mixed. Chen Rui responded calmly and adopted a tight defense, but Loki’s attacks were extremely berserk. The intensive hitting sound never stopped. Chen Rui gradually couldn’t hold on to his defense. He was struck from time to time and his feet began to retreat.

Loki’s fierce attack was so smooth that he was so proud. Suddenly, he felt his territory was different. It seemed to be filled with a strange heat. His vision began to appear distorted like an illusion.

Loki hurriedly increased the output power of his [Absolute Ice Territory], and the chill instantly climbed to the apex. The chaotic snowstorm in the territory turned into countless sharp ice blades that completely surrounded Chen Rui. He was gradually frozen into an ice sculpture.

Although Loki had controlled the opponent, an ominous feeling grew stronger in his heart. He flew up and punched toward the ice sculpture with all his strength to crush the enemy. However, the burning and distorted feeling instantly became intense. The ice sculpture quickly melted away at a speed that was visible to the naked eye. Before Loki’s fist touched the ice sculpture, it was solidified by the intangible force from all directions. The fist actually couldn’t advance or retreat. He was frozen in place with his attacking motion.

Seeing Chen Rui unscathed, Loki’s heart trembled. He finally understood something. He gritted his teeth and said, “You… you have been teasing me!”

It’s too terrifying. Is Aguile’s strength really…

“Not exactly, I’m just using your power to experiment a new skill that I just realized,” Chen Rui said calmly, “It’s almost done now, so you are useless to me. I will give you the last way to survive – surrender.”

Actual combat was the best teacher. By using Loki’s territory to train, Chen Rui’s understanding of [Summer Territory] had been further improved. Not only could he absorb attacks, but he was getting more familiar with the other “dissolve” function. This power could remove the buff status of the opponent.

“In your dreams!” Loki’s gloves suddenly emitted a strong blue light, then it burst open. His whole arm became bloody, but he got rid of control through the self-explosion power of this quasi-legendary grade equipment. His body flew back like an arrow. He chanted a spell quickly, and a blue light gate faintly began to take shape behind him. It was the most mysterious teleportation magic of the water element, [Time and Space Gate].

Although Loki was a power trainer, and he was weak in spirit power, his proficient talent of water element allowed him to use this life-saving teleportation magic freely.

I must go into the [Time and Space Gate] quickly and escape from this terrifying enemy!

At this moment, Loki suddenly felt that his spirit power fluctuated abnormally. All the spirit power and magic power in the vicinity were flooding toward the enemy like a tide. In the blink of an eye, they had been swallowed up. The initial [Time and Space Gate] that was about to take shape suddenly disintegrated without a trace.

This time, even the last escape route was gone.

When Loki suddenly thought of the special skill of a famous artifact in the Demon Realm, he was shocked. Before he recovered his senses, there were already stars around him. Loki knew that it was a matter of life and death, so he activated [Absolute Ice Territory] with all his strength, but it was still futile.

In Loki’s eyes, the stars burst open in an instant. The destructive light filled his entire senses. The [Absolute Ice Territory] instantly collapsed like a ruin. His consciousness also collapsed together.

[Star Explosion]!

Chen Rui just used the God-Eating Mask’s skill to swallow the nearby magic power and cut off Loki’s final escape route. Then, he activated [Star Explosion] with reduced power- As Broc’s strongest subordinate, a living Loki was more valuable than a corpse before revealing the corresponding intel.

Chen Rui walked toward Loki. The visor of his helmet opened automatically, revealing the God-Eating Mask inside. The eyes of the mask flashed with a weird faint yellow light.

With the experience of the Bloody Empire’s Third General Adelaide, Chen Rui spent a lot of effort in the state of the [Royal Star Transformation]. He successfully turned Loki of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor into the second puppet of the God-Eating Mask .

Before Chen Rui rescued Loki to ask the related intel, a new information appeared in the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Lust Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S.

Physique: S-, Strength: S, Spirit: S, Speed: S.

[Analysis]: Wind attribute.

Asmodeus Royal Family at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord! Chen Rui was secretly stunned: I’m so focused on the gains ahead that I am unaware of danger behind? I haven’t noticed this mysterious Demon Overlord before this!

Judging from the initial confrontation with Gustav, the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord is probably not what the [Royal Star Transformation] can fight with. Moreover, the time left for the [Royal Star Transformation] is running out…

The [Star Gate] currently has 2 star points. One is in the Dark Moon City and the other is in Town Leia. Chen Rui’s mind shifted and said, “Come out.”

The surroundings were still silent. Chen Rui snorted as he slowly turned around, “Friend of the Dark Shadow Empire royal family, don’t hide anymore. That dark stone doesn’t suit your Demon Overlord identity.”

At this time, a man’s voice just sounded, “I didn’t expect you to really see through my location. It’s really an amazing perception.”

On a rock near the mountain wall, a wisp of smoke rose up and solidified into a figure.

This was a man in his thirties. Because of Nirvana, the appearance of Asmodeus Royal Family members was very beautiful for both men and women. This man was no exception. No matter his appearance or temperament, they were one of the best. If his nephew was here, he would scold this handsome man jealously.

“I just noticed you just now.” Chen Rui looked at the man, “The Dark Moon Estate’s Red Blood Legion deputy legion commander, Aguile.”

“The Dark Shadow Empire’s Terdila. Asmodeus.” The man also politely introduced himself while looking at Chen Rui.

“You have been following Loki or Monroe?” Chen Rui asked tentatively. With Empress Catherine’s wisdom and methods, even if she didn’t see through Broc’s plot at the beginning, she wouldn’t be unprepared.

This Terdila is probably the last move that Catherine prepared.

“You guessed it right. Although Loki played a little trick to pretend to return to the Jergal Fortress, then he went to ambush Monroe and the others, but he still couldn’t hide his whereabouts from me. As for Monroe… it is much simpler, I just put a seed with a trace of spirit power on Fini, then I can use the secret technique to easily monitor her all the way.” Terdila’s eyes fell on the unconscious Fini, “However, not long ago, the power of the magic seed suddenly disappeared, so I came here, but I didn’t expect to be noticed by you so quickly. It seems that all of this is related to you, the unexpected factor. Your power is very strange, but it should not be as good as mine. I’m surprised that you can do this.”

The spiritual seed should have been swallowed by the God-Eating Mask. Chen Rui knew in his heart and asked, “Then, Sir Terdila, are you planning to take them all away?”

To Chen Rui’s surprise, Terdila shook his head, “My task is just to monitor. Unless it is a special situation ordered by Her Majesty, I will not make a move easily. Even if Crawford’s subordinates are killed by Loki, I still did not stop him… Therefore, you can bring these people away including that… Loki who should be controlled by the God-Eating Mask.”

Chen Rui’s pupils shrank slightly. This Terdila recognized the God-Eating Mask at a glance!

The patriarch Azgalor of the Beelzebub Royal Family has been captured by “Isis”. His current situation is unknown. If the fact that the God-Eating Mask may be related to Master “Arthur” is revealed, then Catherine will definitely confirm that Master Arthur is “Aguile” immediately. In fact, “Isis” had suspected Aguile in the beginning. It seems that Brother Mask can only continue to pretend to be mysterious.

As for the identity of the Beelzebub Royal Family, it just happened to confuse Catherine’s intel to avoid involving the human sheriff.

“Then, thank you very much.” Chen Rui did not explain. He nodded to Terdila, and he walked toward Monroe and the others.

“Wait a minute.” The breath on Terdila’s body slowly changed. The cold night breeze suddenly felt hot. A halo suddenly encircled the 4 people who were unconscious on the ground. It seemed to be some kind of protective power.

“Sir Terdila,” Chen Rui felt Terdila’s burning intent to fight. He stopped and frowned slightly, “Didn’t you say that you will not make a move easily? Is this a special situation that Her Majesty Empress ordered?”

“No.” Terdila replied indifferently. At this time, the night wind had changed the direction of its flow and turned into a huge whirlpool. The center of the whirlpool was the Demon Overlord of the Asmodeus Royal Family.

Although this kind of power seemed not as good as Loki’s [Absolute Ice Territory], the “quality” contained in it was not what Loki, the Demon Emperor level, could match at all.

Chen Rui’s Star Power was also rapidly gathering. He still asked, “So, does your personal hostility represent the will of the entire Dark Shadow Empire?”

Terdila shook his head, “The Dark Shadow Empire and the Dark Moon still has a cooperative and friendly relationship. I only represent myself. You previously dispelled the spiritual seed I put on Fini and saw through my location. You are considered an interesting opponent. Even if there is no order from Her Majesty, even if…”

Chen Rui nodded to express his understanding, then he followed up, “A general will not take an order from his ruler when he is on the field?”

“Well said!” Terdila raised a finger, “As long as you withstand my one blow, you can take these people away. Don’t worry, I won’t use territory power.”

Although it was only a blow, and it was not a territory, the power of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord was not trivial. This blow must be massive.

“Okay!” Chen Rui knew that even if he refused, the other party would attack. “There is an old saying that ’it is impolite to not reciprocate.’ I can take your blow, but you will also take mine afterward. Likewise, I won’t use territory either.”

“Interesting guy! Let’s see if you can take my blow first!” Terdila groaned. The ground around him suddenly cracked, and a great power was brewing in his breath. Chen Rui felt that the sky was dim, then countless roars of wind sounded. The surrounding space seemed to be torn apart. In the center of the terrifying power was a fist; Terdila’s fist.

Without the [Royal Star Transformation] that boosted Chen Rui’s power, he might not see the trajectory of this punch at all. Perhaps more precisely, it was the trajectory of countless punches which finally settled in this single punch.

Before the punch touched Chen Rui, the wind sound in the sky had surrounded his figure. There was no way to retreat; no way to avoid it!

Swoosh…

The whistle that was enough to split the space finally calmed down. The ground was ravaged, and the nearby rock wall looked like a fragile wood. The surface was cut off by a layer. If it weren’t for the protection set by Terdila in advance, Loki and the others who were unconscious would have been wiped out long ago like Calder’s body in this catastrophe.

After the smoke and dust settled, the 2 figures in the field gradually became clear. They had already moved apart.

There was a disbelief look on Terdila’s face. This opponent actually endured a punch with 80% of my power forcefully, and he is unscathed!

To be precise, his attack was drawn and diverted away by a strange force field. Terdila’s eyes fixed on Chen Rui’s faintly radiant hand, “What… secret technique is this?”

Chen Rui did not explain, but he took a deep breath, “Whatever it is, I have taken your blow. Now, it’s my…”

The skill of [Star Diversion] was indeed incomparably mysterious. It could even divert a blow from the Dark Elemental King at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Along with the God-Eating Mask’s [Demonic Flies Transformation], they could be called the 2 great defensive skills. Now what Chen Rui wanted to try was to attack.

Terdila’s eyes narrowed slightly, “Okay! Let me see how far you can do it!”

When Chen Rui took 2 steps forward, a black flame burned up with a whirr.

Terdila raised his brows, and his eyes brightened because the breath of this flame made him feel so familiar: The bloodline talent unique to the Asmodeus Royal Family-Nirvana!

This should be Aguile of the Beelzebub Royal Family. How could he have the power of Nirvana?! And Nirvana is only used during transformation unless he has a special mutated talent. Otherwise, a typical Lust Royal Family member absolutely cannot use the power of Nirvana like this…

Terdila was in shock. The familiar Nirvana breath suddenly changed. It was full of violence and mania. The ground began to shake slightly under this charging power.

The violent breath had already climbed to the apex after a while. A huge, winding red dragon appeared and rushed toward Terdila ferociously. The ground along the way sunk and cracked. A corresponding snake-shaped trench appeared quickly.

The [Scorching Dragon Kill] of [Royal Star Transformation]!

The strongest killing move in his strongest state. The power of this move was even above [Star Explosion]!

A golden figure appeared out of thin air in front of Terdila. It opened its arms against the Scorching Dragon. Once the 2 met, the golden figure was already under terrifying pressure and made a gurgling sound. Terdila showed a solemn face. When he formed a hand gesture with both hands, the golden figure suddenly lit up with a strong runic light, but its body was still pushed back involuntarily under the impact of the Scorching Dragon. 20 meters, 50 meters, 100 meters…

Terdila retreated with the golden figure while swiftly forming another hand gesture. There was another layer of red light around the golden figure’s body. It seemed that its strength had skyrocketed. The pace of its retreat started to slow down, but it still did not stop. Not far behind was a mountain. The golden figure had been embedded into the mountain wall by the power of the Scorching Dragon. After some massive shakes, the violent red light dimmed and disappeared.

In the rock wall penetrated by the Scorching Dragon, the golden figure maintained the pose of reaching out to withstand the attack. It came out mechanically step by step, and it returned to Terdila.

Terdila saw the terrifying damage and distorted arms on the golden figure, and a horror expression flashed by his eyes: This is the strongest gold rank [War Puppet]. It is actually destroyed like this!

The power of the blow just now was far above my expectations. It is enough to deter the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord… No matter whether it is caused by secret skills or not, the real combat power of this Aguile is at least equal to the early stage of the Demon Overlord. It is definitely not the Demon Emperor level as per the intel!

A deputy legion commander has Demon Overlord-level combat power. The Krobelus who surrendered to the opponent after the war of lords is also at Demon Overlord-level strength, plus the stronger Demon Overlord who secretly made a move at the auction, the Dark Moon probably has 3 Demon Overlord powerhouses! Not to mention the Dark Shadow Empire, even the strongest Bloody Empire, does not have an estate with such a strong power!

Terdila’s gaze turned to the opposite side. He frowned. The mysterious “Aguile” and the initially unconscious Loki as well as the others were gone, but a lingering sound similar to [Sonic Boom] came from a distance.

So fast!

At this speed, I’m afraid it will be difficult to catch up.

Terdila didn’t know that this kind of speed could not last, but he had no intention of chasing after him. He just made a gesture, and the golden puppet had become a small palm-sized golden man in his hand. With a cold snort, his body flickered and disappeared.

He was approaching the top, but this was still not entirely his own strength but the Super System…

chapters.title: Chapter 471: Return And Scissors
chapters.body:
Chapter 471: Return And Scissors

2 days later, Chen Rui who was lying on the bed finally opened his eyes. The first person he saw was Alice. The little loli’s big eyes were shining with tears of joy, and she jumped onto him, “Brother, you finally woke up!”

It turned out that after Chen Rui exhausted all the remaining power of the [Royal Star Transformation] to send Monroe and others to Tim’s hands in the Walan Fortress that night, he was about to collapse, so he quickly launched the [Star Gate] to return to Town Leia. He told the little loli that he was about to sleep for 2 days, and he dozed off.

Judging from the haggard face of the little loli, she should have been taking care of him for the past 2 days. Chen Rui did not break free from her hug and touched her head, “Don’t worry, I’m fine. This room is…”

“It was arranged by Celine. Due to the trade fair, the hotel is full…”

Chen Rui nodded. When his stomach groaned suddenly, Alice grinned, “You slept for 2 days and haven’t eaten anything. Even your stomach is protesting. I’ll go out and order something for you to eat.”

Soon, the food came, but Celine personally delivered it. The little loli grabbed the bowl first and brought it in front of Chen Rui. She ignored her outstretched hardworking hands and took the spoon to feed him.

Celine just watched Alice’s actions with a smile with a carefree and generous appearance. The difference in age between the 2 was 1 or 2 years old, but Alice seemed too immature in front of her. She was like a child.

The more calm Celine was, the less convinced the little loli was. She kept looking back to demonstrate her strength, but her unyielding psychology was directly reflected in the frequency of the spoon. Chen Rui almost choked.

“Okay…” Chen Rui finally couldn’t stand the little loli’s quick feeding. He grabbed the spoon and ate by himself.

When the little loli lost her weapon to demonstrate in front of the enemy, she pouted her mouth in dissatisfaction.

Chen Rui finally persuaded Alice to go out. Celine rolled her eyes and turned on a certain soundproof item, then she stepped forward and respectfully offered a space ring, “Master, all the seeds and materials that you want are all inside.”

Chen Rui took the space ring and checked it with his mind. All were inside indeed. He slightly nodded.

“For the past 2 days, master’s sister who claims to be your ‘fiancee’ has been taking care of master. Even if I sent a maid to come, she refused it.”

When Chen Rui heard Celine personally said that the little loli took care of him all day, his heart was warm. Celine asked carefully, “May I ask master, that matter…”

“You don’t have to worry about Monroe’s matter.”

“Thank you, master!” Joy flashed in Celine’s eyes. She asked tentatively, “Did master get rid of them? Also, is your injury healed? I have a high-purity healing potion configured by Master Angegille…”

Before she finished speaking, she felt that 2 sharp knife-like gazes directed into her heart. At the same time, a terrifying coercion came. Celine felt dizzy. Immediately after that, she felt as though she was in the furnace of the refinery where her soul might be wiped out at any time. She freaked out and hurriedly begged for mercy, “Master, please forgive me!”

The terrifying feeling gradually disappeared. Chen Rui’s cold voice sounded, “Don’t ask more about matters that should not be asked. Otherwise, there will be no next time, understand?”

Celine was drenched in sweat. She hurriedly bowed and said, “Celine understands.”

According to a plan in Chen Rui’s mind, the Custer Family would still be of great use in the future. Meanwhile Celine, the heir, looked young, but her scheme was too deep. Even with the constraints of the master-servant contract, she must be taught a good lesson.

“Have you heard of the name Terdila?”

Celine was stunned. She replied, “I once learned from the occasional opportunity that Terdila is one of Catherine the Great’s close guards. His strength is unfathomable. It is said that he has reached the Demon Overlord level.”

“Intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord.” Chen Rui corrected her.

Celine was a smart woman. She immediately reacted, showing a look of horror, “Did the master run into Terdila that day…”

In Celine’s memory, Master “Arthur’s” strength was the Great Demon King. How can he possibly survive in the hands of Terdila at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord? By the way, even the Great Demon King level guards are afraid of the powerhouses next to Monroe. Master has actually solved this matter. Could it be the master’s strength…

“Terdila is indeed a terrifying opponent, but I inflicted heavy damage on his golden puppet. It will probably take a while to recover.”

This sentence made Celine even more shocked: He fought with Terdila, and even heavily damaged the Asmodeus Royal Family’s highest rank gold [War Puppet]!

There was more genuine respect in Celine’s expression. If she was forced to become a Great Demon King servant, she still felt a little dissatisfied, but now a Demon Overlord master was enough to make her truly surrender.

Anyway, the master-servant contract couldn’t be changed. The stronger the master, the greater the benefits for the Custer Family and herself in the future.

Chen Rui felt the change in Celine’s heart. He knew that the effect had been achieved. He immediately took out one more thing, “This devil fruit is for you. It’s up to you whether you want to eat it or auction it.”

The devil fruit! Celine was shocked again. This is the treasure that all demons besides the royal family dream of! It even triggered the war of lords back then. There were 3 in the Dark Moon auction last time, and they were sold at a sky-high price. I didn’t expect my master to actually give it to me casually!

Celine’s goal was not power but business. Catherine the Great promised that as long as the collection of devil pomeg was completed, the newly opened auction house of the capital would be managed by the Custer Family.

With this devil fruit, it would be possible to hold an auction that would cause a sensation in the Demon Realm like the Dark Moon. By then, the Custer Family would benefit a lot in terms of interest and status.

Celine tremblingly took the devil fruit. She carefully placed it in the space ring, and she bowed earnestly, “Thank you, master.”

This was exactly the effect Chen Rui wanted. Although the method of carrot after stick was old, it was extremely effective.

Celine didn’t know that although the devil fruit was a treasure in the outside world, in Chen Rui’s Galaxy Garden, the quantity was calculated by kilograms.

“I will be lurking in the Dark Moon for the time being. You try to collect this part of the mechanics material and pass it to me through the Custer Family in the Dark Moon’s joint chamber of commerce. Also, if you find this kind of map fragment in the future, you must keep it…” Chen Rui specifically gave her some instructions, then he signaled her to leave. This time Celine did not make any more scheming requests for service. She retreated respectfully.

“Okay, Alice, come in.” Chen Rui had sensed that the little loli was eavesdropping at the door long ago, but Celine was prepared. She turned on the soundproof item during the conversation, so the little loli’s efforts were futile.

“ Hmph! What in the world are both of you talking about?” The little loli looked suspicious.

“I’m consulting Ms. Celine about where else can I take my sister to have fun for a few days in Town Leia.”

“It’s fiancée!” The little loli seriously corrected the sentence. After confronting Celine, it was now logical and granted for her to say this word as if she had realized her identity. Nonetheless, after the little loli heard that she could have fun for a few days, her eyes couldn’t hide the joy.

Chen Rui had to pretend to be silly like he didn’t hear it. He added, “But before that, you must have a good sleep. Otherwise, you won’t have the energy to go out and have fun.”

“ En en! ”

For the next 2 days, the little loli wandered around with Chen Rui all day long. She was all smiles. However, the good day came to an end earlier. Chen Rui received an urgent notice from the Dark Demon that the White Feather Estate Lord Sicali was about to visit, and Shea asked Chen Rui and Alice to rush back to the Dark Moon in advance.

The White Feather Estate was 1 of the 4 major estates. Lord Sicali was the Lucifer Royal Family member. He was once one of Shea’s admirers, at least on the surface. In fact, Sicali was good at fawning on whoever he came across. On one hand, he got close to Shea on a personal level. On the other hand, he supported the capital’s decision in order to please Regent Obsidian. His visit this time was based on the reason for Shea’s birthday celebration. This was the first time he took the initiative to visit after Shea became the lord for several years.

Needless to say, it must be related to the current flourishing development of the Dark Moon.

The little loli was the little princess and Chen Rui was the financial officer. Besides etiquette, Shea mainly summoned Chen Rui’s return to discuss Sicali-related matters.

As the little loli saw that her “honeymoon trip” (self-regarded) was actually interrupted because of Sicali, she hated him so much. She cursed the lord of White Feather Estate thousands of times in her heart, and she finally helplessly followed Chen Rui to return to the Dark Moon City.

In addition to Chen Rui who returned to the Dark Moon this time, there was Loki who was a puppet.

In the past few days, Loki came to Town Leia in disguise. Monroe, Fini and Feyman didn’t know about Loki. They only learned from Tim that the three of them were brought to the fortress by Aguile who was injured. They were all grateful to “Aguile”. They listened to Tim’s suggestion to secretly recuperate in Walan Fortress.

Chen Rui got an important intel related to Broc from Loki.

After falling into “Charles’” trap in the Fallen Angel Capital last time, although Broc had a chance to escape from the hands of Obsidian, he was seriously injured and his lower body was gone. Later, he found a mysterious mechanical master. They spent countless efforts and materials to specially modify Broc’s body to turn him into a “half-robot”.

Half of him was flesh while the other half was items, or it should be called weapons. Loki explained that for some unknown special reason, Broc did not weaken in strength after repairing his body. Instead, he had already surpassed the peak stage of the Demon Emperor and advanced to the Demon Overlord level.

Due to Empress Catherine’s means, the Fire Blade Legion in Broc’s hands experienced a lot of turmoil. Especially the “spiritual officer” responsible for psychological work. Broc’s control of the military’s mind was greatly reduced, and his network within the Dark Shadow Empire was also weakening step by step. This was exactly the plan of Chen Rui and Catherine at that time.

The reason why Broc brought his wife and father-in-law to Jergal Fortress was also to let Catherine spare him in consideration of the good people. After all, Broc’s father-in-law, Frentz, was Catherine’s uncle. He earned the top merit during the capital rebellion. He was once the number one man in the military, and his prestige in the military was extremely high. With Frentz’s presence, Catherine couldn’t do anything to Broc directly.

The current situation was that Broc was constantly being weakened by Catherine, but Catherine couldn’t launch the biggest blow at the moment. According to Loki’s understanding, Broc would never just sit back and wait for his death. On the surface, he tolerated and retreated, but he must be preparing something big secretly.

These were just Loki’s inferences. Even if Loki was Broc’s diehard confidant, he wouldn’t know the specific actions. Broc would not trust anyone except himself, let alone revealing any key intel.

Jergal Fortress was the strongest fortress in the Demon Realm. Its defense force was extremely sturdy. At present, Broc couldn’t get out of Jergal Fortress. Although Chen Ru did not need to worry about the safety of Delia and Roman, he did not have an optimal solution for now.

However, Catherine was also dealing with Broc currently. Let her cut off Broc’s power one by one first. It would not be too late to choose a suitable time to attack and kill Broc by then.

Loki’s identity as a puppet was seen through by Terdila. As a chess piece that might be useful in the future, it was not suitable for him to return to Jergal Fortress at present. Instead, he changed Loki’s face and brought him back together. At the very least, the peak stage of the Demon Emperor strength could also play some role.

Back in the Dark Moon City, Shea was watching the Flame Legion’s martial arts competition organized by Athena. Chen Rui sent the reluctant little loli back to the palace, temporarily arranged Loki in the Dark Moon’s hotel, and returned to his house to rest.

There was no one in the house. Even Paglio and Krobelus weren’t there. They might have gone to watch the martial arts competition, but even the little black horse was gone. Chen Rui felt a little strange. Suddenly, a familiar feeling came out, and the ground suddenly collapsed into a huge pit. Chen Rui’s figure flashed to the side of the pit instantly. If he didn’t react quickly just now, he would have fallen into the pit.

At this time, a large amount of white mist that quickly evaporated from a small puddle had wrapped around him. The overwhelming white mist exuded a terrifying chill. It was even superior to Loki’s territory. Everywhere the mist passed through was frozen into ice.

Chen Rui’s figure teleported again to avoid the white mist, but before he could stand firm, all kinds of traps such as ice, snow, thunder and sharp blades were fully activated. Chen Rui did his best to shift and dodge, and he finally managed to avoid it. In the blink of an eye, the grass under his feet grew more than 10 meters. They were like living arms which entangled him tightly. His limbs were stretched out in all directions in the air. He was unable to move.

“Spare me, Zola!” Chen Rui blurted out without hesitation. In this house, the person who could turn a simple environment into such a powerful trap and use the ancient runes that even he knew little about, was none other than Zola.

When he came back last time, Zola was experimenting behind closed doors. It did not end even when he brought Alice out. She should have come out from the closed doors experiments now. Speaking of it, he missed Ms. Fairy Dragon very much after not seeing her for a long time.

At this moment, the green grass in front was covered with a layer of white mist. It quickly froze into the shape of a pair of scissors.

Chen Rui had goosebumps for a while. If that part was really “snipped”, even if it could regenerate, it would leave an everlasting trauma in him.

“Zola, stop playing around…”

“ Snip snip …”

“Zola, I have something important to tell you!”

“ Snip snip snip snip …”

“Dear Zola, I have the most precious gift for you!”

The “scissors” stopped abruptly. A figure gradually became clear. She was purple-haired in a long dress, a slender figure, and a pair of glasses on her perfect face. It was Ms. Scientist.

However, the word “unhappy” was obviously on Ms. Scientist’s face.

What did he plan on comforting Ms. Scientist?

chapters.title: Chapter 472: Spiritual Imprint! The Demi-God'S Secret Trick
chapters.body:
Chapter 472: Spiritual Imprint! The Demi-God'S Secret Trick

“Zola, I can finally see you.” Chen Rui really burst into tears when he saw the scissors stopped. “My dear, I almost miss you to death.”

“What?” Ms. Zola didn’t seem to be touched. In contrast, the ice scissors made a few sounds as though to protest.

(Hmph! I was just doing an experiment, but before I came out, you had already taken Alice out for a trip alone!)

Chen Rui broke out in a cold sweat, “Zola, I really miss you. Even when I’m dreaming! There are so many things that I want to say to you.”

“ Oh. ” The lady continued to fake daze.

(Liar! Still talking sweetly! You won’t sneak out and have fun with a girl if you miss me! I even rushed out happily to find you once the experiment was over!)

Chen Rui clearly felt the displeasure of Ms. Fairy Dragon. He quickly said, “I went to Mountain Xilang this time especially to prepare a unique gift for you.”

This sentence was really not a lie. With the Fertile Yuan Soil, the materials of the artifact “Secret Shadow” were complete. He happened to finish creating it during the days when he was out. In his heart, he still thought of Zola.

The Secret Shadow was a short-handled wand that could double the power of the entire magic of all elements. It could double the casting speed and grant immunity to soul attacks. The most powerful was the supplementary skill, [Limit Break Territory]. There was a chance to dismiss the opponent’s magic defense or immune body. It could only be used once an hour.

Zola was about to continue with her attributes of fake daze when her eyes were suddenly attracted by the magic wand that appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. The shape of this magic wand was simple, but it exuded elegant and classy breath. She was attracted by it at a glance.

(He really has a gift?)

Ms. Fairy Dragon grabbed the wand directly. She didn’t feel any special fluctuations, and her mind moved, “An artifact?”

“Yes! I have worked so hard…”

Zola’s eyes lit up, directly filtering those boasts about his contribution. She dropped a drop of blood on it, and the wand suddenly emitted a strong colored light which was brilliant and dazzling. After a long time, it converged into a faint fluorescent light.

After becoming the owner of the Secret Shadow, Ms. Fairy Dragon instinctively sensed the attribute of this artifact, and she was stunned. She had guessed that it was an amazing wand, but she didn’t expect it to be more powerful than she had imagined!

Secret Shadow (wand type)- Doubles the magic power of all elements, doubles the casting speed, and immunes to soul attacks. Supplementary skill: [Limit Break Territory]. There is a chance to dismiss the opponent’s magic defense or immunity. Can only be used once per hour, and it can automatically repair the damage.

Zola was a pure magical trainer. With the powerful talent of the fairy dragon coupled with her own talent and research, she should be the most powerful magician of the Demon Realm. Even if there were other fairy dragons, they couldn’t compare to Zola. Now with this magic wand artifact, her combat effectiveness was greatly enhanced. It could be described as double the power.

The top magician and powerhouse mentioned here referred to the powerhouses in the ordinary sense within the scope of Demon Overlord. The Demi-God and God powerhouse were not included.

What was the nemesis of the magic element? It was not close combat or strength, but some kind of immunity or high element resistance physique. For instance, the [Anti-Magic] body of the crystal dragon, black dragon, or even Chen Rui. To deal with this kind of enemy, she could only use magic to control foreign objects to inflict damage, so the power was undoubtedly greatly reduced. However, with the [Limit Break Territory], there was a chance to ignore this resistance. If that was the cae, even the black dragon or crystal dragon would also be damaged by magic. This was a super skill in the magic element that could go against the norm.

(Hmph, it seems like this bastard is really thinking about me. I’ll just barely accept this artifact.)

“I made this myself. It took a lot of effort to go out and collect all the materials in this trip. Do you like it?”

“ Yup! ”

Zola couldn’t hide her joyful expression. When Chen Rui noticed it, he breathed a sigh of relief, then he saw Ms. Fairy Dragon’s eyes sharpened again, “During this trip, did you and Alice…”

“We did nothing! I can guarantee it!” Chen Rui hurriedly yelled for being wronged. Seeing Ms. Fairy Dragon’s beauty that he had not seen for a long time, his heart suddenly became hot, “If you don’t believe it, you can check it!”

Check? Zola was taken aback, then she understood and her face blushed.

(A bastard man thinking with his lower body!)

(As soon as we meet, he is just thinking about that kind of thing without saying any nice words…)

(I would not…)

Although she thought so, her hand was waving the newly acquired artifact wand. A space door opened out of thin air in front of them. A man whose all limbs were stretched out and a blushing woman who fake daze disappeared in the door.

The small storm was over, but some kind of “battle” had just begun.

When Chen Rui came out of the Rainbow Valley, it was already noon on the third day. When he returned to the house, almost everyone looked at him with a peculiar expression.

Appearance features: Messy hair, disheveled clothes, lip prints on the face, finger marks on the shoulders, one hand was still holding the waist.

Inference: One could tell he was raped by a female gangster at first glance, and it lasted for 2 days.

The little maid greeted him first. She wiped his non-existent sweat thoughtfully, and said sourly, “It must be tough for you.”

Chen Rui, “…”

Athena also walked up to him. Under the cover of the little maid, she considerately helped him to massage a little soft flesh on his waist, but she used a “special” technique that mainly consisted of pinch. She snorted, “Tough indeed.”

Chen Rui, “ Ouch …”

In desperation, he held the 2 women with his hands and hurriedly fled into the room. The ridicule laughter of his 2 unscrupulous friends, the dead duck dragon and the cheap nephew, sounded behind him.

“Godly human, 2 full days…”

“Leader, you are my idol from now on…”

Chen Rui, “@#￥%……”

Inside the room.

“Don’t be angry, Athena, Kia. These 2 days, I just researched some very important things with Zola.”

“Research?” Athena gave him a blank look, and she said unpleasantly, “Are you that busy? You just came back with Alice. You didn’t even watch my most important martial arts performance. You just cared about ‘researching’ with Zola!”

“Why do you only research with Zola? Does she have anything particularly worthy of ‘research’ while we don’t?” Obviously, it was the little maid who rubbed it in. As soon as this was said, Athena added more force to the massage. The expression on the man’s face was even more interesting.

After comforting the main wife and suppressing the notorious little maid with much difficulty, Chen Rui sat down with the 2 women, “Don’t be jealous, at most I’ll risk my cheap life to accompany both of you to ‘research’ at night. But this time we really have an accidental discovery. If it weren’t for Zola, I might have become someone else’s puppet.”

Athena and Kia were surprised to see that he was not joking.

Chen Rui’s accidental discovery was naturally related to “research”. Yesterday, he was really dragged into the Rainbow Valley by Zola for “checking”. They also had sex. It was just that in that infatuation, Zola accidentally discovered a strange power breath in Chen Rui’s body. It was exactly the trace of “benefits” that the Demi-God powerhouse, Satan, left in Chen Rui’s body.

This trace of the Demi-God’s power was very powerful. It could only automatically digest and absorb in training gradually. If he could really absorb as much as possible, the benefits he would get were unimaginable. It could even make Chen Rui directly climb to the real Demon Overlord level. However, things were far more complicated. There was a spiritual imprint in this trace of power. The role of this imprint was not only to keep track, but it also strengthened with the growth of strength. As long as that trace of Demi-God’s power was completely digested, this spiritual imprint would be completely dissipated and control his body as well as soul. By that time, he would likely become a servant whose life and death were controlled by the other party.

Despite being wary of Satan’s “kindness”, Chen Rui was shocked in a cold sweat. Damn! I knew that this person was not well-intentioned. His intention is actually so sinister!

It would be unimaginable if I really become Satan’s servant or puppet without knowing it.

The problem was that Satan was too powerful. With Zola’s strength, it was impossible to get rid of this trace of power. As long as Chen Rui’s strength increased, that imprint would expand step by step. Even if he deliberately didn’t train to make his strength stagnate, this power would slowly disperse into his body to attain an “enhancement” effect, but the speed was relatively slower.

Fortunately, Zola accidentally discovered that Chen Rui’s body also had a special power. While absorbing the power of the Demi-God, his body melted and resolved the “side effects” of the imprint. However, the resolving was very slow. Together with the power of ancient runes, he could completely eliminate the spiritual imprint.

This success was also thanks to the discovery and research of the “aphrodisiac” runes. If Zola had not completely mastered the basic rune signs of the 18 ancient runes during this period of closed door research, she would not be able to find a corresponding complementary method so quickly.

After experimentation, this kind of “extraordinary power” only appeared during sex. Chen Rui finally understood, [Dual Training]!

No doubt, the more wretched, the stronger! I didn’t expect [Dual Training] has such a strange effect!

In fact, [Dual Training] had no special effect on the spiritual imprint, it just accelerated the digestion of the Demi-God power during sex, then it removed the spiritual imprint when it was turned into his own use.

“Starting from today, I will teach you some basic ancient runes which will facilitate… Uh , for ‘research’ together.”

The little maid was the fastest to react. She was the first to agree while Athena frowned, “Runes incantation is too difficult to learn. I used to doze off when reading such books in college…”

Before she finished speaking, she was pulled by the little maid who whispered to her. Chen Rui could vaguely hear, “Are you foolish… If you don’t learn it, he will be monopolized by Zola.” Athena blushed, and she immediately had a strong momentum, “Okay! I learn!”

This situation was expected by Chen Rui long ago. He smiled and kissed Athena’s hot face. The benefits of the [Dual Training] were mutual. In other words, when Athena and the others were in the [Dual Training], they would also be a beneficiary of the Demi-God power.

Athena suddenly thought of something, and she sat up from his embrace, “By the way, the White Feather Estate Lord Sicali will arrive at the Dark Moon tomorrow. Princess Royal has been eager to discuss with you in the past 2 days but she can’t find you.”

Chen Rui slapped his forehead, “ Oh no, I almost forgot about it. Sicali will be here tomorrow? I must go to the palace to meet Princess Royal right now.”

“Freshen up and change your clothes first. It’s not appropriate for you to meet Princess Royal like this…” The little maid kindly tidied his hair, but she did not forget to stir up the trouble, “ Oh , that runes… Are you going to teach Princess Royal Highness too?”

What a little demon girl who fears that the world will not be chaotic! At this time, she is still instigating! Chen Rui was so angry that he slapped hard on that curvy butt. However, the little demon was flattered as a result. It was overwhelming for him.

“ Oh right, Alice is still young, you are not allowed to teach her!”

In the warning tone of Athena’s righteous words, someone who was suspected of being a weird uncle covered his face and crept away.

Satan would never think he had such a convenient skill 😏…

chapters.title: Chapter 473: Lord Of The White Feather Estate
chapters.body:
Chapter 473: Lord Of The White Feather Estate

Chen Rui rushed to the palace, then he was summoned by Shea into the council hall for a secret meeting. He only returned late at night.

When he returned, there was a figure at the door of the house who seemed to be waiting for him. It was not Athena or Kia, but Roman.

“Leader, that…” Roman looked hesitant. It was completely different from the usual cheeky rascal.

Chen Rui wiped his eyes. I am not mistaken, it is indeed Roman. This guy usually can speak everything. When did he become so reserved?

“ Hey, you fellow, just tell me if you have anything. Don’t put up a front.”

Roman’s eyes were a little guilty, “I’m sorry, actually I…”

Chen Rui saw him hesitating for a long time, then asked, “Did you hook up with some widow and was discovered by Delia, and you want me to intercede?”

“That… It’s not this matter. Bah! There is no such thing!” Roman gave himself a slap, and he spoke a lot more directly, “I got a good thing… Starting from tomorrow, I will train for a period of time behind the closed doors to advance to the real Demon Emperor level.”

“Really?” Chen Rui was surprised, “Good guy, you’re about to advance to the Demon Emperor silently! Is there anything you want me to help with? Go to the Trevante underground cave again?”

“No!” Roman shook his head, and he suddenly showed his usual smile, “It’s just… Hehe , leader, I shall apologize to you first. Remember you said before, if you live a life of crime, sooner or later you’ll pay for it. “

Chen Rui was clueless after listening to him. Roman had already changed the subject, “By the way, if my training is successful this time, it will not only be an advancement of the big realm, but also a high probability of surpassing a small realm and go directly to the intermediate stage or peak stage of the Demon Emperor. Leader, you should be careful by then. Hehe, I may even surpass you if you don’t work hard.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Really? Even the peak stage of the Demon Emperor iss nothing great. It’s just like the grasshopper after autumn that won’t last long.”

“The Demon Realm does not have distinct 4 seasons like the human world. The Demon Realm’s grasshopper can actually eat people.” In Roman’s sinister laugh, the power of [Flash] erupted, and he had disappeared. In the afternoon the next day, the Dark Moon Estate welcomed a group of guests from the north. They were led by Sicali, one of the 4 lords of the Fallen Angel Empire.

Shea was not arrogant because the Dark Moon became the strongest power in the Fallen Angel Empire. She still led a team outside the city to welcome them in accordance with the highest etiquette for the equal lords.

Sicali was the Lucifer Royal Family member. He appeared to be in his twenties with blonde hair and a long robe. He seemed well-mannered and extraordinarily handsome. He was also surrounded by a gorgeously dressed girl and a fierce mutated hellhound.

“Princess Royal Highness, we meet again.” Sicali bowed slightly. There were not too many courtesy or compliments, but a familiar and intimate tone like an old friend who had met and chatted all day long.

Shea bowed back, “Welcome to the Dark Moon, Lord Sicali, Ms. Palando.”

Palando was Sicali’s sister. Without paying attention to Shea, she turned her gaze to Alice who was next to Shea, “Isn’t this my good friend, Princess Alice? Uh… you seem to be dressed a little bit more decently than the last time.”

In the past few years, Shea had visited the White Feather Estate for more than once. Due to the distress of the Dark Moon at the time, Shea mostly sought assistance. Therefore, apart from Sicali who was personally friendly or had some intention to Shea, many people treated her with an attitude of contempt. Among them, Sicali’s sister, Palando, was one of the representatives.

Shea tried her best to maintain the Dark Moon Estate in that situation before, but it was really not easy.

Alice was made fun of more than once when followed her sister to the White Feather Estate. Especially this Palando, who made things difficult and ridiculed her. She was simply the enemy of the little loli.

“This material looks a bit high quality, but the patterns are really ugly. Also, the crappy bracelet… Tsk tsk , your taste is still so bad.”

The little loli had been tolerating because of her sister’s orders back then. With the strength of the Dark Moon now, there was no need to endure it from any estate. Not to mention that this was the little loli’s favorite clothes and jewelry. Just as she was about to retort, a voice sounded from behind Palando, “The craftsmanship of the bracelet is almost perfect, and the magic circle pattern of the skirt is unfathomable. May I know which senior master made it?”

The speaker was an old man with white beard and hair. Although his appearance was old, he felt full of energy. One could see that he was an extraordinary person at a glance.

If someone from the Dark Moon said this, Palando would definitely dismiss it. However, this comment came from the old man next to her, so Palando couldn’t help being surprised, “Master Tetenis! Did you see it correctly? This kind of clothes and jewelry are actually…”

This name surprised Shea: Master Tetenis?

Amongst the mechanic master in the Demon Realm, in addition to the metal and leather duo-specialized Master Nate who used the rule in the masters’ competition to obtain the top title, the 3 masters were the ones who were truly recognized as the best in individual categories.

The master of metal was Master Anderson of the Dark Shadow Empire; master of leather was the former Master Fonsaq of the Bloody Empire who was now Skye; and master of jewelry items was the stateless free man, Master Tetenis, in front of them. Even Xingxing, an arrogant senior master, was also convinced when he mentioned Master Tetenis.

The whereabouts of Master Tetenis is so elusive. I didn’t expect that he would be in White Feather Estate!

As soon as this comment came out, no one else dared to question at all. Palando felt like being slapped in the face, and she was speechless for a while. There was a bit more jealousy in her eyes when she looked at Alice. The skirt and the bracelet were also extra unique, chic and noble. These are actually 2 pieces of legendary grade top equipment. They are so unique and beautiful!

The little loli’s eyes were bright. Palando’s expression made her feel proud. Both of the items were designed by Kia and made by Chen Rui. At the beginning, he only told me that there is a little magical protection, but I didn’t expect that they are legendary grade equipment!

Brother is so kind!

Shea spoke, “I have heard the master’s famous name for a long time…”

“I just stopped by the Dark Moon to visit a friend.” Tetenis directly interrupted what Shea wanted to say, “Who can tell me where is Master Xingxing’s Cloak Magic Shop?”

Chen Rui learned from the [Analytical Eyes] that this Tetenis was a mutated great demon. His strength actually reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He couldn’t help but be surprised secretly. As the saying goes, anyone will know something you don’t. Generally, those who focused on alchemy had no time or interest to train. Even a Great Demon King like Nate was rare, let alone Tetenis, who was only one step away from the Demon Overlord.

It seemed that Tetenis was Xingxing’s old friend and he had no direct relationship with the White Feather Estate. They just happened to come here together when they met on the way. He should not be malicious toward the Dark Moon.

Shea obviously noticed this. She nodded, “Well, I will send someone to send master there.”

Tetenis nodded, and he followed Shea’s designated guard away.

“What’s so great. It’s just an old-fashioned nouveau riche.” Although Palando seemed to be talking about Master Tetenis, her eyes kept looking at the little loli disdainfully.

The little loli heard her, and her eyes rolled, “It’s really nothing great. The real nobles do not need flashy luxury and vanity, but they need noble qualities of being brave, upright, not afraid of hardships and dangers, courageous to take responsibility, and sacrificing life for faith. Those indulging in luxurious and prominent costumes or some meaningless balls or banquets all day are the real shameful nouveau riche.”

These words made Palando’s eyes green, but she couldn’t find words to refute. Even Shea and Chen Rui looked at Alice with admiration. When did she learn this principle?

When the little loli noticed the surprise of her sister and Chen Rui, she raised her head triumphantly. In fact, she learned these words in Town Leia when was debating with Celine. She just copied it, but she choked Palando to be speechless.

Sicali narrowed his eyes, “Palando, why are you so rude! Hurry up and apologize to Princess Alice!”

Palando had an arrogant temperament. She was used to poking fun at Alice and being superior in the past. Not only was she speechless by the other party’s sarcasm, but she also had to apologize, so her face suddenly turned pale.

Shea spoke up, “It’s just some small chatter between the girls to enhance the relationship. Why so serious? I have prepared the best room in the royal inn. Please come with me to take a rest. After the dinner, there is a ball dedicated to welcoming the White Feather Estate.”

Sicali smiled slightly, “Thank you, Your Highness.”

“It’s just a countryside that held an auction before. How classy can it be?” Palando murmured.

Soon after entering the city, Palando was dazzled. The flat and wide roads, the tall and majestic buildings, all kinds of shops, and the endless stream of pedestrians. This “countryside” was almost comparable to the capital. It was not what the White Feather Estate could compare with at all.

“This is the joint chamber of commerce of the Custer Family, the top business family of the Dark Shadow Empire. It is surrounded by stores directly under the chamber of commerce which sells special products of the Demon Realm including the Dark Shadow Empire. On the other side is the Potioneer Association. Apart from the chairman, Master Aldas, there are already 4 potion masters there. Next up is the night market. At night, there are 3 times more people than now. There are various snacks, specialty goods and entertainment performances. The largest and most conspicuous store is the Princess Retail Store which was founded by Princess Alice. Now there are 4 branches in the 4 blocks of the Dark Moon. In addition, there are branches opened in the 3 major capitals of the Demon Realm and several large estates. It is currently the No. 1 brand among the Demon Realm nobles…”

It was Financial Officer Chen Rui who was in charge of eloquently explaining some of the Dark Moon’s development. Not only Palando, even Sicali was shocked. Although it was the first time he officially came to the Dark Moon, he had been to the Dark Moon several times before Shea took over as the lord.Even after Shea took over, he knew that the Dark Moon was suppressed and controlled by the capital. He did not expect it to take off in just a few years.

Seeing is believing. I heard about the rapid development of the Dark Moon before, and I thought that at best it was just barely recovering. I didn’t expect that in just a few years, it actually developes to such a degree. Even its prosperous past 400 years ago was not comparable to this! If this continues, it is only a matter of time before it surpasses the capital. Sicali looked at Chen Rui who was commenting, and he thought secretly : If the military take-off is due to the Dark Shadow Empire’s secret help and Shea’s concealment, then the economic qualitative change is planned by this powerless human!

This human has been popular and mentioned by more and more demons. He is hailed as the Demon Realm’s first minister of internal affairs. It seems that he is worthy of the title. If I can use such a person myself…

However, this idea was only fleeting. Compared with the Dark Moon, the White Feather Estate had no advantage. I heard that this human sheriff is even an admirer of Princess Royal Shea. Even after receiving the love of Athena, the daughter of the first general of the empire, he is still the same. After that, the capital has sent assassins to try to assassinate or abduct this human many times without success. There is the presence of mysterious Demon Overlord powerhouse in the Dark Moon. Furthermore, there is more than one.

Chen Rui also secretly looked at Sicali. Before the rise of the Dark Moon, the White Feather Estate was ranked second behind the Red Spirit Estate, but according to Dark Demon’s intel, the economic and military of the White Feather Estate was actually beyond the Red Spirit Estate. Sicali himself was at early stage of the Demon Emperor strength on the surface, but in fact, he concealed it with a certain secret method. His true strength had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. This could not be hidden from the [Analytical Eyes].

Sicali’s scheming is not inferior to Josh. He has always been friendly to both sides. I’m afraid he is truly leaning more toward Obsidian currently. Once the Dark Moon can really show the momentum of surpassing the capital or even replacing it, Sicali will definitely be the first person who can act according to the situation to rebel.

For this kind of fence-sitter, it is necessary to properly show him toughness, and not to completely be hostile. At present, the ‘stable’ relationship has to be maintained. This was the consensus reached between Shea and him last night.

Sicali suddenly asked, “By the way, Princess Royal Highness, why didn’t I see Kia?”

Chen Rui raised his brows slightly. A murderous intent appeared in his heart. The last time Shea visited the White Feather Estate, Sicali expressed a strong “interest” in Kia who accompanied her. At that time, Shea avoided the topic because she had given Kia to Chen Rui.

Sicali had always admired Shea, but Shea’s identity was special. Even if the 2 parties were really interested in each other, Obsidian would not allow the forces of the 2 estates to unite, so this “admiration” was more of a superficial gesture. However, Kia was different. Let alone she was just an insignificant maid, even if she was the daughter of a great family, she could only make sacrifices for politics.

The reason why Sicali revisited the old matters was that on one hand, he really coveted Kia’s beauty. On the other hand, he was also testing Shea’s attitude toward the White Feather Estate.

Shea glanced at Chen Rui, “As early as a year ago, I have granted Kia to Financial Officer Chen Rui.”
