Sicali was stunned for a moment, then he turned his gaze to Chen Rui. He shifted his mind, “Sir Chen Rui, I have heard of your name for a long time. Please forgive me for being rude, I have always liked Kia, I wonder if you can bear the pain to give her up? I will give sir 10 beauties as a gift of friendship.”

As a royal family lord, he asked a financial officer to transfer a mere maid. He also asked in exchange of 10 beautiful women. He even mentioned the word “friendship” with dignity. It should be the honor of the financial officer.

“Kia is already my woman.” Chen Rui’s answer made Sicali’s facial expression slightly changed. The human financial officer continued, “We humans have a saying, “Friends are like brothers, women are like clothes…”

Just as Sicali’s expression eased, the human spoke again, “But we humans have a more important saying…”

“Whoever dares to snatch my clothes, I will break his hands and feet!” The little loli was the one who intercepted triumphantly.

Even if Chen Rui was willing to give her out, Sicali wouldn’t be able to withstand Kia’s ‘power’…

chapters.title: Chapter 474: Ball
chapters.body:
Chapter 474: Ball

These words made Sicali’s expression freeze. He looked at Alice and Chen Rui again, “Sir Chen Rui, is that true?”

“Little Princess Royal Highness is just joking.” Chen Rui secretly gave Alice a thumbs up, and he shrugged, “The original saying is, I would rather break my hands and feet than to run naked.”

Sicali’s eyes narrowed slightly, “So… Sir Chen Rui is refusing?”

Chen Rui ignored the chill in Sicali’s eyes, and he smiled slightly, “I’m just a financial officer of the Dark Moon. Sir lord is of noble status and a royal family member, so why would you haggle with me.”

Although his tone was quite euphemistic, he was obviously rejecting Sicali.

Even if Chen Rui’s enemy was the peak of the Demon Emperor, he wouldn’t be afraid. He had already killed 2 peak stages of the Demon Emperors, and they were all actual combat types. None of them was worse than Sicali.

Anyone who dared to have a thought to touch his woman would only have one ending: Kill!

Chen Rui’s obvious disregard made Sicali’s eyes twitch. He was about to speak when a nonchalant voice sounded, “Stop talking nonsense. Kia is my good sister. If anyone dares to have ill intentions, I, the old mother will directly wipe out his whole family!”

On this occasion, the one who claimed to be an old mother was none other than Ms. Emerald Dragon. Today, Ms. Betty was pulled over by Chen Rui to “welcome the guests”. His original intention was to act as a deterrent at some point. When she heard Sicali was interested in Kia, her “Governance Association” good sister and chief costume designer, she immediately yelled at him unceremoniously.

Palando exclaimed, “How daring! Who are you? How dare you…”

Before she finished speaking, a terrifying pressure came over. Palando felt that she was falling into the ice cellar, and she couldn’t say anything. The initially threatening mutated hellhound that she was holding lied on the ground while trembling as if it saw something terrifying.

A Demon Overlord-level power breath! Sicali’s face changed suddenly. He hurriedly said, “Princess Shea, Palando has always been immature. You know it. It was just a misunderstanding just now. Please be merciful, madam.”

Krobelus withdrew her breath upon Chen Rui’s hint. She sneered at Palando with disdain, then she talked and laughed with Alice as though no one else was around.

Palando was drenched in cold sweat. She didn’t dare to say a word. That hellhound had long lost its prestige. It was hiding behind her with its tail tucked between its legs. Krobelus’ breath carried a terrifying dragon demeanor. If she did not hold back, this dog already had loose stools.

“This is our Dark Moon’s guest, Madam Krobelus.” Shea said calmly, “It was just a misunderstanding just now. Sir Sicali doesn’t need to worry about it.”

Sicali nodded, and he never mentioned about Kia anymore. Countless thoughts ran through his mind: It turns out that this woman is Krobelus who betrayed the capital and turned to the Dark Moon’s side. She is indeed a Demon Overlord powerhouse. Besides, the Dark Moon seems to have more powerful hidden Demon Overlord powerhouses…

The interlude subsided quickly. Shortly after the dinner, the palace held a welcome ball.

Although Chen Rui disliked this kind of socializing the most, as the most important financial officer of the Dark Moon, he could not be absent from banquets or balls, so he had to bring Athena with him. Kia would definitely not show up to avoid causing more trouble.

Sicali’s coveting of Kia had caused Chen Rui to have a strong hostility in his heart. If he accepted Krobelus’ warning and retreat, then all was good. If he didn’t give up and had other intentions, Chen Rui would kill him without hesitation.

Athena wore a pink orange dress with a set of red gemstone-based jewelry that was designed by Kia. She was beautiful and elegant with self-confidence and heroic spirit. She attracted a lot of attention when she appeared.

Sicali looked at Chen Rui who was intimately held by Athena. An unusual expression flashed in his eyes. It was more of a kind of jealousy. However, Athena was not Kia. Not only was she one of the 3 legion commanders of the Dark Moon and sheriff, but her father, George. Wales, was also the first general of the empire. The Warlock Fortress was strong and sturdy. It was located in the north of the White Feather Estate. It was also the strongest barrier against the Bloody Empire in the north. He could provoke Kia, but he wouldn’t dare to provoke Athena. If there was any dispute, the entire White Feather Estate couldn’t bear the rage of General George.

Compared with Athena’s elegance, Shea who was in a white dress, looked cold and arrogant like snow lotus on an ice peak which was beautiful but unapproachable. There seemed to be a little more warmth only when she was standing with her cute and lovely sister, Alice.

There was also a beautiful woman who sat isolated at a large table full of food. She gobbled the plates of delicacies at an astonishing speed without any demeanor as if this was the only meaningful matter in the ball. It seemed that she was not full at all after the previous dinner. In fact, she happened to be the one who ate the most at the time. Needless to say, it was none other than Ms. Betty.

In fact, Palando’s appearance was also good, but her temperament was much inferior. She looked arrogant and confident as if she was the most beautiful and noble woman in the world.

The ball had began. Out of courtesy, Shea accepted Sicali’s invitation for her first dance. However, Shea had already prepared earlier. She chose the original court dance song of the Demon Realm which was also a very formal court dance. After it ended with a short song, the task was completed.

Sicali was about to invite her again, but he was surrounded by some noble ladies of the Dark Moon. To be honest, Sicali’s appearance was quite suave. He was also a royal family member and a lord. There were quite a lot of ladies who were social climber.

Chen Rui’s first dance was with Athena, but soon, Athena gave the opportunity of the second dance of waltz to her best friend, Alice. It was the first time the little loli danced with Chen Rui in a public ball since the previous Isabella ball incident. It could be said to be a dream come true. She was blushing with excitement.

However, Alice was not very tall. When the two waltzed, it looked a little weird. In addition to Alice’s excitement, there was still a lack of cooperation. Even so, Alice was quite satisfied.

When Shea watched her sister and Chen Rui danced closely together, she suddenly felt an unspeakable feeling in her heart. However, when she saw Alice happily waving to her, her gaze softened again.

After dancing 2 dances, Chen Rui finally got rid of the clinging little loli. He came to Shea and gently stretched out his hand.

“Can I have the honor to dance with Your Highness?”

Chen Rui was not the first person to invite Shea to dance. After dancing the first dance with Sicali. Many nobles and royal family members from the White Feather Estate including Sicali came to invite her, but they were declined without exception. As for the people on the Dark Moon side, they all knew the temperament of this lord, so none of them were willing to suffer setbacks until the sir financial officer appeared.

In Shea’s eyes, she was too familiar with this action of Chen Rui. In the underground secret room of the palace, and even in the council hall, the two had danced numerous times. Just as she was about to refuse with a cold face, her hands subconsciously reached out under everyone’s surprised gaze.

In the midst of the dance music, the princess in the white dress and the man in the black attire began to dance gracefully. They immediately became the focus of the audience. Whether it was the elegant dancing posture or the tacit understanding of cooperation, it was enough to overshadow others. Many people stopped their dance and watched their movements.

“Sister dances really well!” The little loli’s two big eyes were glimmering with a look of admiration, “I will learn from my sister another day.”

Athena pouted. She had to admit that Shea’s dance was indeed much better than her: Hmph! Is she practicing with this guy every day?!

However, except for Athena, most people didn’t think that this was the result of their regular practice. They only thought that Shea’s talent was extraordinary. After all, this Princess Royal was a well-known iceberg beauty who never gave face to any man. Whoever dared to offend her would only end up dead.

The jealousy in Sicali’s eyes was even stronger. He secretly thought: Chen Rui must be one of Shea’s suitors, and Shea has noticed this, so she uses her beauty to firmly control this extraordinarily talented human. From his previous attitude toward Kia, it can be seen that this human has a very strong possessive desire for females. This may be a very important breakthrough.

Sicali walked to his sister and whispered a few words. Palando sneered with dissatisfaction, but she finally nodded.

One dance was finally finished. Shea ignored Chen Rui’s further request to dance for a second time, and she went straight back to her seat. Some people immediately gathered around her and imitated his invitation, but they were all rejected…

Chen Rui was about to walk toward Athena and Alice when a figure suddenly blocked in front of him. It was Ms. Palando, the sister of the White Feather Estate’s lord.

“Chen Rui, aren’t you inviting me for a dance?” Palando showed a smile which looked a little pretentious.

Chen Rui frowned, “I’m sorry, Ms. Palando, I’m very tired. I want to take a rest.”

“Okay, I’ll rest with you.” It seemed that Palando was really clinging to him.

“Ms. Palando, I’m sorry, I want to be alone for a while… You also don’t want to disappoint the men who are eagerly waiting to dance with you.” Chen Rui turned toward the males who were making eye contacts not far away as he tilted his head.

“Them?” Palando showed disdain, but she changed to a delighted expression when she turned to Chen Rui, “They are just a bunch of incompetent people who flatter those in power. I don’t like weaklings!”

“I’m also a weak person. Any Higher Demon can knock me down now.” Chen Rui said lightly. He turned to leave, but he was stopped by Palando again.

“You’re really not good at fighting, but in some aspects, you are a well-deserved powerhouse. Without you, it is absolutely impossible for the Dark Moon’s economy to have its current development and qualitative change. The reputation of the Demon Realm’s top minister of internal affairs is definitely not in vain. Wherever you go, you will be the most valued talent!” Palando seemed to be arrogant, but she was also a bit eloquent. “It’s just that the Dark Moon is already at its limit. Don’t you think you are more able to unleash your talent if you change to another environment? We can give you what Shea can give you. We can also give you what Shea can’t give you…”

While speaking, Palando’s body got closer. Chen Rui took 2 steps back, “I think you have misunderstood, Ms. Palando. Thank you very much for your appreciation and kindness, but I don’t want to change the environment.”

Palando still didn’t give up. She leaned slightly, and the cleavage on her chest appeared instantly. She said in a flirty tone, “With you wit, don’t you know that Shea is just luring you and capitalising your value step by step? I am different; I will give you something substantial, or… I can also give in advance…”

Chen Rui sneered in his heart, but he looked indifferent on the surface, “I will act like I have never heard these words before. Excuse me, I’m going to take a rest.”

“Insensible guy!” Palando’s face turned gloomy, “You must have lost your mind by the bitch named Kia! Hmph . Let me tell you, I’m going to marry the Iron Fist Lord of the Bloody Empire. At that time, I will propose to the capital to let that little bitch be a dowry and go to Iron Fist Estate with me. I will let her be countless men’s toys and give her a living death! This is an important diplomatic marriage between empires. Even Shea will not dare to object to this!”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Palando to be so insidious. A strong murderous intent surged in his heart. Even if he failed in the rivalry of strategic planning, he could accept it, but touching his woman had already touched his trigger point. No matter what Palando’s motive was, she had been included in the to-kill list.

Seeing Palando’s sinister gaze, Chen Rui took a deep breath and calmed down. He said coldly, “Really? Then, I can’t stay in the Dark Moon anymore. I can only go to the capital to serve the regent or go to the Bloody Empire to join Raizen the Great. As a bargaining chip for allegiance, I will propose a condition which is to send you to the most dangerous border or mining area to be the most inferior camp prostitute. Most of the border residents there are exiled prisoners. They did not take a bath in almost 3 months. Just the smell is enough for you to enjoy. You will drink the sewage with sedimentation, and eat dry, hard and moldy bread. It’s been a long time since they have touched a woman, I believe you get the “best” treatment. But don’t worry, someone with a little beauty like you is the most popular. They won’t just do it one-off like they usually do. They will keep you to enjoy you slowly…”

Palando’s face turned pale while Chen Rui smiled more calmly. He approached Palando and pretended to be affectionate, “Don’t doubt my ability and determination. You are just a whore whose marriage to the Iron Fist Estate is just a betrayal of your body for political purposes and you still feel self-righteous. To put it bluntly, you are just a pawn that can be discarded at any time, but I’m different. You said it yourself, I’m the Demon Realm’s top minister in internal affairs. Wherever I go, I will be the most valued talent! If you want to be a whore for a lot of people, you might as well try it.”

Palando’s body shivered, and her gaze toward Chen Rui was full of fear, “You…you evil!”

“I’m just a powerless weak human. The word “evil” should be given to you as a self-righteous and vicious woman.” Chen Rui smiled kindly, “If you are prepared for a living death, then just come and provoke me. I can guarantee that they won’t kill you at once; they will make you ‘enjoy’ slowly.”

When Palando saw his smile, she felt as if she saw a vicious ghost in the abyss of hell. She shuddered suddenly, and she did not dare to utter a word.

Chen Rui straightened his collar as he glanced into the distance at the little loli who was waving at him constantly, motioning him to “come here”, and he strode over. This time Palando didn’t dare to stop him any more. Instead, she just stood there in silence, not even daring to look at the “evil” again.

Hmmm, would Sicali just give up like this?

chapters.title: Chapter 475: Coercion
chapters.body:
Chapter 475: Coercion

After coming to Alice and Athena’s side, the little loli said unhappily, “What are you talking about with that nasty woman that you are so happy?”

“Happy? No, I’m threatening her.”

Athena looked at Palando in the distance curiously, “Indeed, she seems very scared…”

When Alice saw the look of the enemy, she couldn’t help but smile. She hurriedly asked, “What is the threat?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I told her not to mess with our little princess, otherwise I will feed her a big mouse, so it scared her.”

“Brother is not telling the truth, but Palando is frightened anyway.” Alice’s eyes brightened as she mischievously smiled, “Actually, you don’t need to waste your ‘big mouse’… Calculating the time, it should be coming soon… Uh, our location is not safe. Let’s stay away and go to Sister Krobelus.”

The little loli’s words made Chen Rui a little confused. He followed her and Athena to the table where Krobelus was at.

At this time, many men had come to invite Palando to dance. Palando finally calmed down. She forced a smile and was about to agree. Suddenly an exaggerated voice sounded, even overshadowing the sound of the music. The sound seemed to be from her hips.

It was hard to imagine that there was such a loud… sound, and it came from such a noble lady. Is she deliberately releasing it…

The men around Palando frowned at the same time. Palando’s face turned red in an instant, then there was another sound. The volume of this sound was lower, but the quality was higher. The men finally couldn’t help but cover their noses. Palando herself almost fainted due to the foul smell. She quickly took out her handkerchief and pinched her nose tightly.

Seeing the peculiar gaze around, Palando’s face flushed, but she couldn’t help it. She made “unrestrained” sounds continuously just like a machine gun.

The men could no longer bear the horrible stench, and they retreated. Palando didn’t expect that she would be so embarrassed under the eyes of everyone. She was so embarrassed and angry that she couldn’t wait to dig a hole and hide inside. She covered her face and ran all the way to the hall, leaving a series of unrestrainable explosive sounds along the way. It made countless people cover their noses.

Chen Rui was dumbfounded at the scene. He suddenly remembered the mutated Lala Potato powder bought by the little loli at the plants trade fair, and he could not help but wipe the cold sweat on his forehead… No doubt, she is still the blackhearted little loli back then.

Putting the mutated Lala Potato powder in the food could make people constantly fart. The little loli probably used it during the dinner, and he didn’t know how she did it… But this time Chen Rui completely supported the little loli ‘s approach. Palando is unruly on the surface, but she is venomous deep down. It is gratifying to see her being embarrassed.

When Sicali saw this, he continued to talk to the surrounding nobles calmly. He was heavy in his heart: I just sent my sister to test the human, and she encountered such an inexplicable trick. This is undoubtedly a warning. It seems like Shea is more difficult to deal with than I expected.

Despite the slight accident that Ms. Palando left the venue after feeling “unwell”, the banquet continued. Almost everyone treated as if nothing had happened, including the guys who smelled bad stench in their noses.

Palando was the younger sister of the lord of White Feather Estate. No one wanted to offend the lord. Moreover, this incident may involve the rivalry between the 2 lords. Therefore, these educated and distinguished nobles acted like nothing happened, but the thoughts in their mind were a different matter.

In fact, these people including Sicali had complicated a simple problem. The truth was just a prank of a blackhearted little loli.

There were already many empty plates stacked in front of Krobelus. With the appearance of Ms. Emerald Dragon, some people came to invite her, but they were either scared off by her gluttony or their belongings were all looted. As a result, no one dared to approach this dangerous area again.

While Chen Rui was chatting with Ms. Emerald Dragon and the others, a guard came and handed him a note. Chen Rui opened the note and read it. It was written with: “Urgent intel, come to the side hall.”

The note was signed by the Dark Demon’s mark. Chen Rui knew that an emergency happened, so he quickly informed Athena as well as the others, and he came to a side hall not far away.

There was only one woman in the side hall with brown curly hair and a black veil covering her face. It was Isabella, the master of Dark Demon and the head of secret intelligence of the Dark Moon.

Today, Ms. Yini was not as tightly wrapped as usual, but she was dressed gorgeously as if she was going to participate in the ball. A blue long skirt with a black silk shawl, showing the deep cleavage between the full peaks. Her noble temperament exuded sexiness and charm which made people have an uncontrollable impulse.

Despite feeling guilty when facing Ms. Yini, Chen Rui knew that the matter was serious, so he forced himself to walk in. Just as he walked in, the door of the side hall closed automatically. This was a normal method to maintain confidentiality, but it made someone nervous for some reason.

In order to resolve this tension, Chen Rui immediately spoke, “Madam Isabella, what is the emergency intel?”

Isabella stretched out her hand and opened her palm. There was an oval object with the size of an egg in her snow-white jade-like palm. Chen Rui was immediately attracted to it. He took a few steps forward and looked at the object carefully. Although there was nothing special about the appearance, Chen Rui keenly felt the “breath” of ancient runes. This “breath” carried a dangerous breath.

The [Analytical Eyes] only identified its material, but this thing was not equipment, so its specific function could not be detected. However, the word “danger” was stated in the column of [Analysis].

“This is called ‘Soul Destroyer’. It can turn everything within 100 meters into ashes. ”

“Soul Destroyer” reminded Chen Rui of Zeray. He only had 1 left in the storage warehouse. He was now considered a great expert in the ancient runes and mechanics. He could judge that the craftsmanship and runes level of this Soul Destroyer were very sophisticated, but due to the material and other reasons, it was much less powerful than “Zeray”. However, it was far from comparable to ordinary magic bombs. Destroying everything within 100 meters was not an exaggeration.

“This kind of object can be detonated at a fixed time by mind control. 10 of them were buried in the palace area. Once they erupt at the same time, even the magic circle of the palace cannot completely reduce this power.”

Chen Rui shocked: Almost all the high-class nobles of the Dark Moon gathered in the palace including the lord and VIPs of the White Feather Estate. If 10 Soul Destroyers erupted at the same time, aside from Krobelus, Shea and Sicali who have extraordinary power, plus Athena, the little loli, and others who have special item protection can be spared, I’m afraid the rest will either die or be injured. Putting aside the impact to the White Feather Estate or the outside world, the vitality of the Dark Moon itself will suffer an unimaginable setback.

Chen Rui asked hurriedly, “Which force did it? This dangerous item should not be able to be placed in the palace. It will be rejected by the magic circle. Not only the magic circle, we also rearranged the traps in the palace, plus the Dark Demon’s secret monitoring and protection… The palace layout is one of the biggest secrets. No one except us should know it.”

“Yes,” Isabella gently held the Soul Destroyer, “Because I was the one who placed the Soul Destroyers.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. He couldn’t believe his ears and thought he had heard her wrongly.

“So surprised?”

Isabella asked indifferently, and she suddenly threw the “Soul Destroyer” at Chen Rui. When the object was thrown over, the ancient runes, which had been activated, would explode within 10 seconds. He was shocked— This woman is actually serious!

Chen Rui didn’t care about hiding anything. He channeled his territory power in his hand to wrap the “Soul Destroyer”, then he quickly turned his fingers. One after another jumping runes condensed by power appeared. After a great effort, he finally used the power of ancient runes to stabilize the Soul Destroyer and resolved the explosion crisis.

During the whole process, Isabella just watched him calmly and did not intervene, “I asked Zola to make the Soul Destroyer. There are 11 of them. 10 more to go. As long as I activate them with my mind, they will be detonated. You don’t have the time to dispel them like just now.”

“Why?” Chen Rui frowned. Isabella didn’t lie, this thing should be made by Zola and it can be operated with mind. Even if I choose to kill her, I can’t keep up with the speed of her mind. I am unable to resolve this crisis. The lives and deaths of most people in the entire palace completely lies in her hand now.

“Because I’m Devil’s Snare Flower.” Isabella smiled lightly, “Since you dare to use me, you must be prepared to be poisoned to death.”

Chen Rui was startled, “Just for this reason?”

“Yes.” Isabella stepped forward, “At this last moment, dance with me. This is what you promised back then.”

This “back then” referred to the time when Isabella served as the capital envoy to sanction the Dark Moon, Chen Rui and Shea’s dance of waltz shocked the audience. Then Isabella intended to recruit Chen Rui to learn the waltz.

With a wave, Isabella turned on some sort of eavesdrop magic circle. The sound of music from the main hall sounded.

Chen Rui looked at her vigilantly with countless thoughts in his mind. Isabella’s voice was a bit cold and sinister, “10 seconds. Dance or explode, you have only one choice. 10, 9, 8…”

Chen Rui couldn’t bet on this, so he gritted his teeth and made an inviting gesture. Isabella stretched out her hand and held his hand. It was not the first time Chen Rui held Isabella’s hand. In the capital, when he was “Charles”, the 2 had once intimately interlocked their fingers.

But now, when he gently held the weak and soft hand just to dance, there was a subtle feeling in his heart that was completely different from the previous acting. Isabella’s body leaned over, and Chen Rui could smell the faint fragrance in his nose. However, under this kind of coercion, he dared not have any wild imagination in his heart.

The ball in the main hall was happening. Many men and women were dancing in pairs, but they didn’t know that in the side hall next door, a man and a woman were embracing and dancing “intimately”. However, the dance was about the life and death of almost everyone.

At the end of the song, Chen Rui, whose movements seemed stiff, quickly let go. Judging from Isabella’s blue eyes, he could see that she was very dissatisfied.

“Now close your eyes and don’t move!” Isabella’s cold voice sounded.

Chen Rui closed his eyes helplessly. In the [Analytical Eyes], he felt Isabella approaching, and her faint fragrance lingered in his nose. His heartbeat speeded up inexplicably. Her face got closer and her warm breath was clearly audible. It seemed that she had taken off her veil.

Chen Rui instinctively felt something was going to happen, so his body moved slightly, but Isabella shouted, “Don’t move. Just a movement and I will explode them!”

There was a hint of panic in this voice. Chen Rui sighed secretly and did not move any more. Immediately after that, her soft lips were pressed on his lips with a tremor. The moment their lips touched, the 2 of them trembled at the same time. A strange sensation quickly spread to the brain from the contact area. Isabella’s arm hooked around his neck as if she was afraid of him fleeing.

It looked like a standard posture for an intimate couple to kiss. If you include the threat of explosion, it should be called a kiss of death.

This is actually not the first time the two kissed. At the Fallen Angel Capital, “Charles” had a real deep kiss with Ms. Yini. Although it was a means used by Isabella to poison him at that time, from the initial contact, he could feel that this famous social butterfly of the capital was actually a rookie with unfamiliar kissing skills.

What is the reason this time?

Chen Rui opened his eyes secretly and saw Isabella, who had lifted her veil, closing her eyes. It seemed that she was completely immersed in the kiss. He suddenly understood. Perhaps this time, there is no reason…

Some matters do not need a “reason”.

At such a close distance, Chen Rui could clearly see the sparkle at the corners of her eyes under her long eyelashes. He suddenly thought of that day when he was struggling to escape Broc’s territory, the weak back that sacrificed herself to block the fatal blow for him. He recalled her last sentence when she was seriously injured, “I would rather run into you at that time…”

Chen Rui’s heart gradually softened, and his hands gently embraced her waist. When Isabella felt this movement, her arms tightened. Her warm and plump body was completely close to his body. The moist lips and tongues entangled further. Their breathing became more and more heavy.

After a long time, Isabella suddenly pushed Chen Rui away. She turned her back as she panted lightly.

“Isabella…”

“Shut up. Who are you to call me Isabella?” Isabella’s voice was a little hoarse, “You liar! Liar! Liar!”

“I’m sorry…” Chen Rui sighed secretly. If he still didn’t understand something, he was truly an idiot. No wonder that Roman stuttered like that last night. I am betrayed by this guy after all!

Roman once said that there was a kind of Inheritance Rock in the hands of Isabella. Isabella seemed to be dissatisfied with his strength and had been honing him. Now, Roman said that he was about to advance to the Demon Emperor and even leap a small realm. It should be because of the Inheritance Rock.

The real flaw should be revealed in the last misunderstanding incident. At that time, Isabella started to become suspicious. Chen Rui knew her wisdom and methods very well. Probably Student Nephew was forced to tell the truth by her precise inference and the lure of the Inheritance Rock.

I don’t know how much Roman has explained, but I’m sure that the identity of “Charles” has been exposed.

The truth will come to light sooner or later. If you live a life of crime, you really have to pay back. (To be continued)

This wasn’t the first time he played with the fire and burned himself…

chapters.title: Chapter 476: Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 476: Conditions

The Dark Moon palace, side hall.

Neither of them spoke. The atmosphere was silent for a while.

“I won’t ask you anything, and you don’t need to explain.” Isabella finally broke the silence. Her voice was extremely cold, “You only need to know that I can threaten you. You must do as I say in the future.”

Is this coercion?

Chen Rui secretly smiled bitterly and sighed, “Zola really made the ‘Soul Destroyer’, but this one should be the only one, right? You didn’t place any of them near the palace.”

“Sure enough, you guessed it,” Isabella turned around. She had put on her veil, and threw a stone over, “So… what about this?”

Chen Rui took the stone and looked at it. It turned out to be a recording stone. The scenes of the two dancing and kissing just now were all recorded. What made him more stunned was that the “coercion” plots in the middle had been removed. It looked like the two danced together, then they hugged and kissed each other.

(Wh, when…) If this stone falls in the hands of Athena and the others… Chen Rui suddenly broke into cold sweats. This series of tactics is too vicious. First, she used suicide bombings, and now she recorded secretly… Isabella took out another recording stone which was exactly the same and shook it. There was more than one copy, “The things inside, I think, you don’t want anyone to know right?”

Chen Rui nodded quickly.

“I only have one condition. You must come to my place every night after you come out of the palace. Don’t talk to me about conditions. You have no choice. If you don’t come, you will bear the consequences.”

Chen Rui was in a cold sweat again. It seems that she has guessed my secret meeting with Shea too. She deserves to be the head of Dark Demon’s secret intelligence!

Although it was a cold tone and sinister coercion, he could clearly feel her hot lips and racing heartbeat just now.

After stating this condition, Isabella stopped pestering him. She opened the door and walked out without looking back.

Chen Rui followed a few steps, and opened his mouth, but finally, he did not say it. It only turned into a sigh. He watched the lonely figure getting further and further away under the moonlight.

The next day, Shea and Sicali had a formal meeting in the council hall of the palace.

The attendees included the Flame Legion’s commander and Sheriff Athena, Financial Officer Chen Rui, and the representatives of the Dark Moon’s families. It was worth noting that the Red Blood Legion’s commander, Kaguron, did not attend it because of his busy military affairs. The deputy legion commander of the Red Blood Legion was present on his behalf. Aguile, the leader of the Cloak Gang, was still dressed in a cloak even in this kind of meeting. He did not show his true face. As for the White Feather Estate, Palando didn’t show up, probably because of the embarrassment at the ball last night.

“So… Is Princess Royal Highness not planning to hold a birthday celebration?” Sicali frowned slightly and asked. This time, his reason for visiting was to celebrate Shea’s birthday. Wasn’t he politely turned down now?

“It’s just a fractional birthday(less than 10). It’s not worthy of celebration. The Dark Moon has made some gains, but due to the comprehensive transformation and construction of the city some time ago, plus the cooperation with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, it has cost a lot of money. We are currently raising money to pay off debts, so I don’t intend to be lavish and waste it. I appreciate Sir Sicali’s kindness. As for those valuable gifts…”

Sicali nodded and said, “Princess Royal’s frugality is admirable, but since I have brought those gifts, how can I take them back? Take them as a gift of the friendship between the 2 estates.”

Shea thought for a while and nodded, “Thank you so much then.”

Sicali took advantage of the situation and said, “Your Highness, to be honest, I came to the Dark Moon this time, in addition to celebrating Your Highness’ birthday, there are some… Uh , difficulties that I need help from the Dark Moon. For the sake of the many years of friendship between the 2 estates, please help us, Your Highness.”

Shea said indifferently, “What’s the difficulty? Sir Sicali can just say it.”

Sicali was hesitant at first, but he finally “gathered up the courage” to speak, “Because I participated in the fundraising during the lord meetings, and the capital has not yet repaid, this results in a large deficit in the current White Feather Estate. There is a serious shortage of expenses in many aspects, and the estate is almost unable to function. For the sake of the past friendship, please help me to relieve my urgent needs, Your Highness.”

Sicali’s request was within Shea’s expectation long ago. The Dark Moon was a treasure land that was extremely wealthy. Which estate would not be jealous? If it weren’t for the Dark Moon’s powerful military’s deterrence ability, the estates would have used all kinds of methods to steal it.

Shea turned to Financial Officer Chen Rui, and Chen Rui immediately got up and said, “As Princess Royal Highness just said, the financial situation of the Dark Moon is very tight now. Firstly, there is a large number of debts left over from the renovation and expansion of the urban area; the modification of sewage and water supply systems; the road renovation; the repair and construction of various towns. Secondly, there was a loss from the cooperation with the Dark Shadow Empire’s Bloody Vine Flower Estate, and the funding expenditures of the Blue Lava Estate and surrounding estates. Thirdly, the military expenditure which includes the cost of the expansion of the 3 legions, military supplies as well as the construction and repair of the Walan Fortress and Town Walan, etc. These 3 parts of the cost are like the 3 big mountains weighing on the Dark Moon. Although the Dark Moon’s construction and economy have achieved a certain success, it is still unable to make ends meet. However, this is mainly caused by the large amount of funds required in the initial stage of construction; it will stabilize in the later stage. It happens to be the most critical moment now, so we cannot reduce expenditure as a complete framework must be established. Otherwise, a careless mistake will produce a butterfly effect which will affect us in the long run. For some things, you can consider using crocodiles rule. Cut decisively as appropriate…”

Sicali and the people from the White Feather Estate could fairly understand. His lengthy introduction was just saying that they were poor, but some of them didn’t understand the later part well. Sicali couldn’t help but say, “Sir Chen Rui, what is the butterfly effect? What is the crocodiles rule?”

This question was what Chen Rui was waiting for. He immediately explained, “It’s just some economic terms. The butterfly effect refers to the result of economic development having a great dependence on the initial conditions. Small deviations may cause a huge difference. For example, there is a folk song:

Miss a nail, spoil a horse shoe;

Spoil a horse shoe, cripple a war horse;

Cripple a war horse, injure a knight;

Injure a knight, lose a battle;

Lose a battle, lose an empire.

Then, we can regard it as a change in the nail that led to the demise of an empire…”

Whether it was the people of the White Feather Estate or the Dark Moon, they listened to this wonderful remark with interest. Especially the people of the White Feather Estate whose gaze toward Chen Rui had changed. Whether it was the enemy or friend, capable people were always worthy of respect.

When Chen Rui noticed the expressions of these people, he secretly laughed. In fact, he bluffed people on many matters using the theories of another world. After eloquently explaining the theory for a long time, he finally went back to the topic of Sicali’s request to borrow money, “Therefore, according to my analysis, it will take at least 15 years for the Dark Moon to completely stabilize the entire revenue and expenditure structure and truly start to make a profit. For now, it is not appropriate to increase the debt. Therefore, Princess Royal’s decision not to hold a birthday celebration this time is very appropriate. The current economic structure is the most critical moment. Any decision is likely to affect the economic development situation for hundreds of years in the future. In view of that, under the current debt situation, I think it’s quite unwise if we still force ourselves to provide foreign aid! We can’t destroy our hard-worked plan because of reputation or so-called friendship. If these words are offensive, I beg for Princess Royal Highness and Sir Sicali’s understanding.”

“15 years?” Shea frowned slightly as she sighed and said to Sicali, “Sir Sicali, you also heard Chen Rui’s analysis. What do you think?”

Sicali was a little dumbfounded for a while. Chen Rui’s lengthy economic theory was indeed wonderful. He cited classics, and his analysis was incisive and impressive. He was worthy of being the Demon Realm’s first internal affairs’ talent. Many professional vocabulary were simply unheard of. How could Sicali find a loophole?

Facing Shea’s question, Sicali wanted to refute, but he was speechless for a while.

Shea sincerely admired Chen Rui’s wisdom. He used a set of righteous analysis to put an end to the other party’s idea of ”borrowing money.” She added, “How about this? I will personally give the White Feather Estate some material support. The amount is not much. I hope Sir Sicali doesn’t mind.”

This sentence completely blocked the possibility of Sicali borrowing money. The Dark Moon was clearly stating that they were poor and unwilling to borrow money, but he could only express his gratitude. It was like swallowing a bitter pill in silence.

Sicali changed his mind and said, “Since the Dark Moon has its own difficulties, I don’t want to make things difficult for Princess Shea, so let me change my request. The White Feather Estate has a large area of barren soil that cannot be cultivated. The people can only make a living on the small amount of land that can be cultivated. I heard that the Dark Moon obtained the secret method of soil modification in the treasures of the Blue Lake Mountain Range which has achieved remarkable results. You have also helped the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, the twin town in the Dark Shadow Empire, and successfully improve a large area of barren land. I have a shameless plea for Your Highness to send people to modify the land of the White Feather Estate so that the people can live a subsistence life.”

Sicali deliberately mentioned the cooperation between the Dark Moon and Bloody Vine Flower Estate. It was to imply that since Shea even helped foreign estates like the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, she should help the Fallen Angel Empire’s White Feather Estate. Furthermore, the two estates had always maintained a “good” relationship.

Shea nodded slightly, “Please go on.”

Sicali noticed that it seemed plausible, so he was secretly delighted, then he said, “Sir Financial Officer Chen Rui is recognized as a key figure for the current development of the Dark Moon. He can be hailed as the top internal affairs’ talent in the Demon Realm. Sir Chen Rui certainly had contributed to the current prosperity of the Blue Lava Estate which was originally chaotic. I would like to invite Sir Chen Rui to work as an economic consultant for the White Feather Estate for a period of time to help the White Feather Estate to solve some important problems.”

Shea got to know of Palando’s threat and seduction at the ball from Chen Rui’s report before the start of today’s meeting. Sicali personally offered an “invitation” again today. It seemed that the true purpose of this trip to the Dark Moon was to poach the human financial officer.

Once Chen Rui goes there, it is likely to be gone forever. Even if he does not go, Sicali may still assassinate him like Isabella’s evil voodoo at that time, but now the Dark Moon is no longer the Dark Moon in the past. The current human is also no longer the original human. Chen Rui’s strength alone is enough to destroy Sicali and the others.

Shea sneered secretly as her face showed a thoughtful look.

😏…

chapters.title: Chapter 477: Who Was The One Scheming Now
chapters.body:
Chapter 477: Who Was The One Scheming Now

Sicali’s 3 requirements, money, land improvement, and Chen Rui, were intended to seize the important resources of the Dark Moon. The Dark Moon’s attitude would directly affect the future “diplomatic” relationship with the White Feather Estate.

The previous money request had been resolved by Chen Rui’s reasonings, but it was difficult to reject the land improvement. As for the hiring of Chen Rui… someone had already stepped up to oppose it. It was the mysterious “Aguile”.

“Princess Royal Highness, I don’t understand about the economics and land, but I don’t think it is right for Sir Chen Rui to go to the White Feather Estate. Sir Chen Rui is talented, but he does not have the strength to protect himself. Even in the Dark Moon, he has also experienced many assassinations. If he goes to the White Feather Estate, it is like courting death due to the lack of protection.

Sicali frowned. A nobleman beside him had already spoken, “What qualifications do you have to say that our White Feather Estate is not capable of protecting this human?”

“Strength is qualification!” Aguile stood up suddenly and exuded a terrifying pressure. The people around suddenly shuddered. The one who felt it most was the nobleman of the White Feather Estate who was directly targeted by the momentum. His feet became soft, and he actually fell to the ground. He was trembling and unable to get up.

Sicali’s facial expression changed. The momentum from this Aguile is actually the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. It is definitely not the early stage of the Demon Emperor or the intermediate stage as rumored by the outside world. The violent murderous intent seems to be trained from countless battles. Even if I burst out all my hidden powers, I may not be able to win against him. No wonder Josh will lose to him! From this point alone, I probably need to review the strength of the Dark Moon.

“Trash!” Aguile glanced at the nobleman with disdain and took back his momentum. “If the White Feather Estate has 10 Demon Overlords to protect Chen Rui, forget what I said!”

10 Demon Overlords? The White Feather Estate people looked at each other. Are you kidding? Do you think the White Feather Estate is the capital?

“Don’t be rude.” Shea spoke out. Aguile, who seemed unruly just now, immediately kept quiet and sat down obediently. Sicali was secretly shocked by this scene.

“Aguile’s words are a bit over, but they are also true. Chen Rui had been assassinated no less than 10 times in the Dark Moon alone. If it were not for the protection of the Demon Overlord powerhouses, he would have died.” The battle at the auction house had revealed part of the Dark Moon’s power. Moreover, there were also Demon Overlord powerhouses like Krobelus, so Shea’s words intentionally or unintentionally revealed the deep background of the Dark Moon.

When this condition was rejected, Sicali sighed as expected, “I see. Princess Royal Highness, I have gone overboard. Forget about Sir Chen Rui’s matter, then the land improvement…”

This was the key request besides borrowing money. Since the first 2 were rejected, it was hard for the Dark Moon to refuse this last request regardless of the reason.

“Sir Sicali, please forgive my interruption. There is one thing that must be reported to Princess Royal Highness.” Chen Rui stood up and saluted the 2 lords. “Due to the previous cooperation with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, there are only 23 magic soil crystals left. Even the Dark Moon itself has a lot of lands that cannot be guaranteed…”

“23?” Shea frowned.

Seeing the puzzled look of Sicali, Chen Rui explained that the magic soil crystal was a treasure made according to the secret recipe of the Blue Lake Mountain Range treasure. It could be directly used for soil improvement. 1 crystal could transform 2 acres of land. It was just that the most important material of magic soil crystal was the crystallized essence of Blue Lake Mountain Range’s Fountain of Resurrection. This kind of crystals had all been collected and it would take at least 50 years to generate next time, so 23 was the final quantity.

“Sir Sicali came from afar. We couldn’t help with the fund borrowing previously… so now we will give 15 to the White Feather Estate and the Dark Moon will keep 8 for our own use.”

Sicali could not say much about this allocation, but the 15 crystals could only improve 30 acres of land. The White Feather Estate’s need for land improvement was not calculated in units of 10 acres or 100 acres. It seemed that the Dark Moon had given quite a lot. However, for the White Feather Estate, it was just a drop in the bucket.

Sicali’s eyes rolled, “I’ve heard about the Fountain of Resurrection for a long time. I happen to be looking for a potion master. I wonder if Your Highness can send me some fountain water?”

“Princess Royal, no!” It was Aguile who opposed it again, “‘Even in our collaboration with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, the Dark Moon sent someone to use the crystals. People from the Bloody Vine Flower Estate were not allowed to touch the magic crystals. If we give both the water of the Fountain of Resurrection and magic soil crystal to the White Feather Estate, in case…”

Although Aguile did not go on, the discerning people present knew what he was going to say. If the formula of the magic crystals was cracked, then the Dark Moon’s greatest advantage compared to the outsiders would be gone. Chen Rui also agreed to it.

“Your Highness, I want the water of the Fountain of Resurrection for the sake of the senior master. It is not for another purpose. If Your Highness doubts the friendship of the White Feather Estate, then we don’t need the magic crystals and fountain water.”

Aguile sneered coldly, “ Hmph! Is this a threat? With the Dark Moon’s current power, we are not afraid of any threats, even the capital! I have heard of the extraordinary power of Lord Sicali for a long time, and I saw that you are indeed powerful. You have about the same power as me. I wonder if I have the honor to have a practice match with Sir Lord?”

Sicali raised his eyebrows. I didn’t expect Aguile to actually see through my hidden strength!

“Aguile, mind your manners! Sir Sicali is our important guest!” Shea reprimanded Aguile and said, “White Feather Estate and the Dark Moon are friends for generations. Sir Sicali is a royal family member like me. I trust Sir Sicali. The water of the Fountain of Resurrection is a bit special. It will expire after a period of time. It needs to be kept in the magic container of the potioneer association. I can give sir 10 bottles of water of the Fountain of Resurrection.”

“Your Highness!” This time Aguile and Chen Rui shouted at the same time.

“Stop talking, I’ve decided.” Shea glanced at Sicali lightly with strong confidence in her eyes. “‘As Aguile said, the current Dark Moon is not afraid of any threats, so what is there to be worried about?”

This kind of demeanor made everyone’s heart tremble. Sicali moved slightly. More of it was a shock in his heart. He could hear that Shea’s words were also a vague warning: I have absolute strength. I’m not afraid of you playing tricks. I’m just afraid that you will not play tricks!

With this feeling, Sicali was much more cautious in his following moves. After Shea put forward some suggestions on resources to make the best of both worlds, Sicali did not refuse it and showed a positive attitude.

The friendly meeting, which was full of verbal arguments and schemes, ended in a seemingly friendly atmosphere.

After the friendly meeting, Sicali did not stay in the Dark Moon for too long. On the excuse that he still had some matters in the estate, he took the “magic soil crystals” as well as the water of the Fountain of Resurrection and left the Dark Moon in a hurry with Palando and the others.

Both Shea and Chen Rui knew that Sicali left in a hurry, lest the promise of “magic soil crystals” and Fountain of Resurrection changed. He was eager to return to the estate to call people to study and crack the mystery of the soil improvement. Perhaps some crystals and water of the Fountain of Resurrection would also end up in Obsidian’s hands.

However, no matter how much Obsidian and Sicali racked their brains, it was impossible to crack the mystery of the “crystal” because the core of that kind of crystal was a little refined magic dust. Meanwhile, the remaining 99% was a dilute mixture to confuse the people. There were all kinds of mess. A palm-sized crystal was not even comparable to a handful of the lowest grade of refined magic dust, so the effect of improvement was naturally very limited. This was also the origin of “a crystal can only improve 2 acres of land”.

Sicali thought his plan was successful, but he didn’t know that he was being schemed. All the 3 requests were ultimately futile.

“Aguile,” who continuously played the role of the bad guy at the meeting, was Chen Rui’s puppet, Loki. Anyway, Aguile’s appearance was the outfit of the cloaked man. Since he could attend this kind of occasion, who would dare to doubt him? It turned out that Loki, the peak stage of the Demon Emperor strength, really had the expected deterrent effect on Sicali.

Looking at the overall situation, the “magic soil crystal” was just an unexpected harvest for Sicali. Whether it was Shea’s birthday, improving the soil or inviting Chen Rui, it was just a cover. Sicali’s real intention of visiting the Dark Moon was to test.

This test was not only for Obsidian of the capital, but it was also for Sicali himself. The White Feather Estate was undoubtedly a fence-sitter. Chen Rui and Shea’s plan was to use force and favor at the same time. They might also receive certain benefits by not becoming hostile with the White Feather Estate, but these were based on their own toughness and self-confidence. If they could make the White Feather Estate continue to be a fence-sitter in the battle between the Dark Moon and the capital, it would be a success.

From the perspective of the visit, both parties were considered winning from it.

Chen Rui initially had the idea of killing Sicali on the way, but Sicali would probably go to the capital to meet Obsidian first. There should be a powerhouse to greet and protect him in secret. Furthermore, Sicali had his own plan. If he was killed and replaced with a lord who completely obeyed the capital, it would be self-defeating.

The 2 puppets of the God-Eating Mask were already full. Even if he destroyed one and turned Sicali into a puppet, it was difficult to guarantee that it would not be exposed by the capital. After all, the God-Eating Mask was not omnipotent. Once the overall situation was set, the first person Chen Rui wanted to annihilate was the fence-sitter, White Feather Estate. It was not only for official but also for private reasons. Not only Sicali, but also the woman, Palando, who had a vicious intent for Kia. He wanted to annihilate them completely, but these were for later time.

Regent Obsidian was already facing a predicament. As time went by, this predicament would become more and more obvious. If nothing happened, the Dark Moon did not need to directly have a conflict with the capital, they could drag down the opponent step by step. Therefore, causing more problems would be inappropriate at this time.

At this time, Loki, who pretended to be “Aguile”, suddenly sent a message that Master Xingxing had an urgent need to meet Aguile.

Since the last time Chen Rui returned to the Dark Moon Estate from the Bloody Empire after defeating Nate, he had not appeared as “Aguile”. The most important thing was to avoid Catherine’s attention. In addition to this Loki incident, Her Majesty Empress’ suspicion about “Aguile” would definitely increase, so it was better to keep him mysterious. However, in the meeting between the Dark Moon and White Feather Estate this time, Aguile showed up again. This would definitely attract attention from all parties, but he never thought that Master Xingxing would be so anxious to see him.

Chen Rui remembered there was a famous mechanic master, Tetenis, who came to the Dark Moon along with the White Feather Estate Lord Sicali. Tetenis seems to be a friend of Xingxing. I don’t know if the so-called “urgency” is related to this master.

Actually, Xingxing didn’t know that he had already seen the “real” Aguile when Alice had a dispute with Eve and her sister last time.

Chen Rui thought for a while and decided to go to the Cloak Gang anyway.

Was Xingxing going to introduce “Aguile” to Master Tetenis?

chapters.title: Chapter 478: Quasi-Grand Master Of All Fields
chapters.body:
Chapter 478: Quasi-Grand Master Of All Fields

Arriving at the ancient house of the Cloak Gang base, Chen Rui, who was in a cloak outfit, saw Eve, Alian and Ms. Sasa walking out of the house. When Alian saw him, she jumped over happily and said with joy, “It’s Sir Aguile!”

“Alian, it’s been a long time.” Chen Rui habitually petted her head. He didn’t feel it during the dispute in the magic shop last time, but when he did this action now, he realized that Alian had grown a lot taller.

Not only Alian, but Eve also became more graceful. She was still shy as usual. She bowed to him with a blushing face and a faint glow of joy in her eyes.

Ms. Sasa had always maintained a sense of respect for the sir leader. She took the initiative to report that the 3 of them had an appointment with little princess Alice to go to the night market. They were now going to the Princess Retail Store to wait for Alice to “get off work”.

Chen Rui nodded. It seems that the little loli has really turned these 3 “enemies” into friends. With these friends, at least her future life and emotions will be enriched a lot. It’s much better than daydreaming of becoming a fiancee and reading romance novels every day.

He had assigned the puppet, Loki, who was at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, to secretly protect Alice and Kia. Coupled with the imperial guards and Alice’s own protective equipment, there shouldn’t be much safety issues.

After saying goodbye to the 3 girls, Chen Rui walked all the way into the backyard and met the 3 mechanic masters who had been waiting for him for a long time: Xingxing, Skye, and Tetenis.

Seeing the appearance of this long-lost mysterious figure, the 3 reacted differently. Master Xingxing still had a stern face with some warmth in his eyes, Skye’s face was full of gratitude and joy, and Master Tetenis was even more exaggerated. He walked up a few steps, and his eyes were glimmering. It was like he saw some incredible novelty.

If Chen Rui didn’t hide his true face in a cloak, he would be defeated by this glass-like gaze.

“Are you the trio-specialized genius mechanic master who caused a sensation in the Demon Realm?”

The first sentence of Tetenis surprised Chen Rui. There was strong discomfort in the heart. This is an extremely important secret. Xingxing and Skye actually revealed it to Tetenis, whom I have never met before, without my permission!

“You are also proficient in magic circles? You also have the talent of magic eyes?” Tetenis got more and more excited as he said. When Chen Rui had calmed down, he glanced at Xingxing and Skye faintly without responding. This is no longer just the secret of the trio-specialized master. The “magic eyes” involve the identity of “Richard” at the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. Xingxing and Skye probably guessed it, they actually revealed that too!

In any case, this incident must not be leaked out. Even if Tetenis is the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, he must be killed.

As he was thinking, Tetenis’s third sentence had already popped out, “Would you like to become my apprentice?”

Chen Rui was stunned again. Seeing the smiles shown by Xingxing and Skye, he seemed to understand a little bit. The depression in his mind was suddenly relieved. It is not betrayal. It’s kindness.

However, he frowned again: I am at least a trio-specialized master. With the help of various experience materials and refinery experiments, I have now reached the level of a senior master. My mechanic skills are not inferior to anyone in the Demon Realm. This Tetenis in front of me is known as the master who is most proficient in jewelry items. Maybe I can discuss and make progress with him, but to become his apprentice, I’m afraid this old man is not qualified enough.

Although Tetenis could not see Chen Rui’s expression, he could see through his mind at a glance. His eyes widened, “Do you think me, the old man, is not qualified to teach you?”

This old man is quite straightforward. He seems to be a straightforward person who is worthy to become an acquaintance. Otherwise, with the temperaments of Master Xingxing and Master Skye, they would definitely not reveal such important secrets easily. Maybe this Master Tetenis really has some secret skills?

Chen Rui quickly thought about it, but he nodded, knowing that the old man must have something to say next. No doubt, Tetenis really showed a look of “I knew it” and smiled confidently, “Since I know your secret, I will also tell you 2 of my secrets now. The first secret, whatever you are capable of, I’m basically also capable and even stronger than you; yet what I am capable of, you are not capable of it. That’s why I can be your teacher.”

This was quite a huge claim. In terms of just the apparent “talent”, Chen Rui was the trio-specialized master, magic circle genius and magic eyes talent. Could it be this old man who is only proficient in jewelry items is a trio-specialized grand master and magic circle grand master?

A trace of sorrow flashed across Tetenis’s eyes, “The second secret is that I have only 1 year left to live. I want to pass down my knowledge before I die. It is precisely in response to the old saying of the Demon Realm, “pass on the torch of knowledge.” If it is not because my fate is coming soon, even if you are well-qualified, I may not be interested. With your talent and level, you can somewhat gain something… Well, let’s cut the nonsense. My time is getting less second by second. We can skip the superfluous formalities of the apprenticeship ceremony. You bow to me 3 times. ”

3 bows? Then a minute of silence? Chen Rui murmured secretly. Why did this old man directly regard himself as a teacher without asking if I agree to it?

“What if I don’t agree?”

“ Hmph! ” Tetenis rolled his eyes, “I have the strength of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor which is a level above you, and I still have so many secrets of you. If you don’t agree, I will spread your secrets everywhere!”

Chen Rui was a bit speechless. What is this called? Forced buying and selling + unscrupulous threats? I have never seen anyone accepting apprentice with such a way!

Seeing that the atmosphere was a little tense, Skye said, “Aguile, just agree to it. Actually, we only learned a few days ago that Master Tetenis is actually a trio-specialized mechanics quasi-grand master! Not only that, he is also a pharmaceutics quasi-grand master! This is indeed a golden opportunity for you.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: I didn’t expect that my random guess is not far from the truth. I didn’t expect the Demon Realm actually to have an extraordinary alchemist of all fields and also proficient in pharmaceutics and mechanics at the same time. Moreover, he has reached the realm of quasi-grand master!

The quasi-grand master is a level between the grand master and the master. It is infinitely close to the grand master; only one step away. Although he is still called a “master”, his standard is much higher than the level of senior masters. Even in the Mechanic Association of the 3 empires, there is no quasi-grand master of one field. How did a quasi-grand master of all fields pop out suddenly?

“Don’t question it, Master Tetenis has fully proved this to us,” Master Xingxing also spoke up, “He initially wanted to pass on his skills to me, but I think you are more suitable than me, so I recommended you in front of the master.”

Then only Chen Rui knew why Tetenis was looking for Xingxing. Seeing Master Xingxing’s stern face, there was a warmth in his heart.

Skye lamented, “There are a lot of hidden geniuses in the Demon Realm. Not every alchemist is willing to attach under a certain force. Especially the struggles related to power and desire could easily distract people. This makes one unable to focus on skills to reach a higher level. For the past 2 years I have held myself aloof from the world in the Cloak Gang, my mentality is very different from before. Instead, I feel that my mentality has improved. I have realized some matters that I could not see previously.”

When Chen Rui thought of the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master, Nate, who had indulged in fame and fortune, and finally embarked on an evil path, he nodded knowingly.

“Master Fonsaq is right. If it wasn’t for the prize of materials for the second place in the masters contest, I wouldn’t bother to make this unnecessary fame. In fact, Tetenis is just a pseudonym. I have many other names. Anyway, it’s just a representation.”

Judging from Tetenis’ words, he actually deliberately became the runner up, and Skye obviously also revealed his true identity and experience.

The old quasi-grand master looked at Chen Rui with undisguised approval, “Your aptitude is excellent. What is more valuable is your character. You can help Master Fonsaq in times of crisis and avenge him without hesitating to go deep into the danger; I admire you for that.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “To be honest, I just casually helped Master Fonsaq when I was doing other mission. It is not necessarily without the purpose of using his value.”

Skye and Xingxing looked at each other and smiled.

“ En , honesty can be added to your qualities.” The more the old man looked at Chen Rui, the more pleasing he seemed. If he had a daughter, he would definitely force Chen Rui to marry her now.

Honesty? My biggest skill is to fool, isn’t this accusing me? Uh… This is a beautiful misunderstanding! Chen Rui caught a glimpse of the old man’s eager eyes. He knew that the more he explained, the situation would be worse, so he simply did not explain.

“However, you still need to sharpen your character! I suggest you immediately give up the position of the Cloak Gang leader and that legion commander, then you leave the Dark Moon with me to study for a year. As long as you put aside your heart full of desires, you will definitely surpass me to reach the perfect realm in the future. Okay, so long-winded. Back to the topic, hurry up and bow to your teacher!”

It seemed that this “teacher” had even arranged the future for him. Chen Rui shook his head secretly and smiled bitterly, “With the current situation, it is impossible for me to leave the Dark Moon. Why not I find an apprentice with better qualifications for the master if I have the chance.”

The old man suddenly became furious, “ Hmph! You know my level, yet you are still refusing with excuses. Who is better than you in the entire Demon Realm? Besides, I don’t have much time, so I can’t wait for so long. Today, you have to agree whether you agree or not! If you think it’s troublesome, skip the formalities too. In short, you are my apprentice from now on.

Okay, now he’s directly forcing an innocent person… Chen Rui rolled his eyes, but he knew that the old man had kind intentions, and this was a rare opportunity that should not be missed, but the request to leave the Dark Moon was a bit overwhelming. He was thinking quickly.

“ Um , Master Tetenis, you 2 master and apprentice talk slowly. Xingxing and I will go out for a walk.” Skye’s thoughts turned. He stood up and pulled Xingxing.

Xingxing rolled his eyes and uttered a sentence to Chen Rui, “Boy, if my kindness is wasted, I will get you for that!”

After speaking, he left the backyard with the dark elf master. (To be continued)

Maybe set a [Star Gate] and teleport back and forth?

chapters.title: Chapter 479: The Secret Of 10,000 Years
chapters.body:
Chapter 479: The Secret Of 10,000 Years

Chen Rui knew that the two masters had kind intentions. This Tetenis obviously could be trusted, then only Skye and Xingxing revealed the trio-specialized master and other secrets. Their purpose was to let him get the inheritance from this quasi-grand master so that his alchemy could take a step forward.

Chen Rui thought for a while and said to Tetenis, “Master, I can learn from you, but I do have the reasons for not being able to leave the Dark Moon…”

“Wait until you have listened to my choices for you, then you make the decision.” Tetenis looked serious, “You have 2 choices. Firstly, in the next few days, I can teach you knowledge including pharmaceutics and mechanics. Due to the limited time, I can only teach for 1 year at most. How much you can learn depends on your understanding. Secondly, you can accept a special inheritance imprint. As long as I die, you will directly get all the knowledge. This inheritance will allow you to see the road ahead in advance and avoid detours, but there is also a drawback. The experience of the predecessors is likely to form a certain fixed framework that will restrict your future development. Therefore, the most important thing is to transform them into knowledge that you can control. I must remind you that if you choose the second option, I will not only pass on my knowledge and memory, but a kind of destiny… It will let you face very terrifying opponents in the future, or you will also walk a path similar to mine… You must consider carefully.”

Chen Rui heard that there seemed to be some hidden matters in between, and he asked, “Master… please forgive me. Before making a choice and calling you my ‘teacher’, I want to know what kind of destiny I will encounter if I choose the second one. Also, the current state of master does not seem to be the time when the lifespan is exhausted. Why do you say that there is only one year left?

Tetenis sighed, “Even if you don’t ask me this question, I will tell you. My life will be lost to someone else in the gambling agreement a year later! Once you choose the second way to accept the inheritance imprint, you will also become a party in a certain contract to continue this gambling game.”

This answer was far beyond Chen Rui’s expectations. He asked, “What is the gambling game?”

Tetenis sighed, “It’s an alchemist’s 10,000 years gambling game. It involves secrets from more than 9,000 years ago. The content is a comprehensive test of mechanic skills and pharmaceutics. The opponent is the enemy of my lineage. Although the second method allows you to get all the inheritance without omission, you also have to bear greater responsibilities and risks. The gambling game is held once every 100 years with life as the bet. The loser immediately dies and the winner gets 100 years of life. My teacher lost his life in the hands of the opponent, and now I can’t escape this misfortune… If you accept my inheritance, including my guidance this year, the total is 101 years. During this period, you must use all methods to digest and absorb the inherited knowledge. You have to break through my original level by turning it into your own use. Only if you reach the real grand master level that it is possible to compete with the other party.”

Chen Rui was really shocked this time. There is such a gambling game! With Tetenis’ proficiency in mechanics in all fields plus the standard of pharmaceutics quasi-grand master, he is still undoubtedly going to be defeated! The phrase “Only if you reach the real grand master level that it is possible to compete with the other party” shows that the other party is… a grand master level all-round mechanic and potioneer!

There is actually such a character in the Demon Realm! And the person has always been unknown!

The so-called trio-specialized genius master was not worth mentioning in front of the real grand master. Even Chen Rui, who had experienced the mental transformation at the Mountain Seckred back then, was a little depressed at this time, but he was not discouraged. There was an opportunity to go further now. However, he must make a choice.

“Master, do you mean that if you participate in the gambling game 1 year later, you will definitely lose?”

“I know my state very well. Let alone 1 year, even 10 years, I still can’t break through to the grand master realm. After 1 year, the winning rate of the gambling game is zero, and there is only one dead end. So I want to find an apprentice to pass on my knowledge. No matter which one you choose, you need to devote yourself to learning. That is why I suggested you leave the Dark Moon.”

Chen Rui finally understood, “Master, what is the origin of the other party? What is with the gambling agreement?”

Tetenis was silent for a moment. He stared into Chen Rui’s eyes, “Call me teacher.”

Chen Rui understood that this deeper secret must be learned through the relationship between teacher and apprentice. To be able to have such a quasi-grand master teacher was definitely an opportunity that all alchemists dreamed of. Even if he did not choose that dangerous inheritance, he could also benefit a lot by just choosing the first one and getting the teachings of Tetenis.

Judging from Tetenis’s ardent eyes, being his inheritor could also fulfill the old man’s biggest and last wish.

“Teacher.” Chen Rui made up his mind and made a grand salutation to Tetenis.

Tetenis seemed relieved as he nodded, “Very good! I will tell you the whole story first. The choice is all up to you.”

The matter dated back 9,000 years ago when the Demon Realm had 2 grand masters. One was the pharmaceutical grand master, Rosenberg, and the mechanics grand master, Lolo.

Rosenberg was a dark elf with many apprentices. Lolo was a dark goblin. In addition to the amazing grand master trio-specialized mechanic skills, he was also proficient in ancient runes, but he had never accepted any apprentices in his life.

The two masters were located south and north respectively. One was the pharmaceutics grand master and the other was the mechanic grand master. There seemed to be no intersection, but no one knew that these 2 grand masters actually had a friendship that went through life and death. Lolo was seriously injured in his early years, and Rosenberg tried his best to save Lolo, but Lolo was still left with incurable side effects.

In his later years, Lolo found Rosenberg when he realized that he had a short amount of time remaining to live. Rosenberg was also in his twilight years and was trying to determine the final inheritor. In this case, the two grand masters worked together to create an Inheritance Crystal that encompassed both of their life learnings.

After Lolo finished creating the Inheritance Crystal, his injuries relapsed and he died due to energy exhaustion. Rosenberg’s vitality was also severely injured. Soon after, a batch of apprentices with excellent qualifications were selected for an assessment competition to determine the inheritor.

In the end, an apprentice named Dawor won. However, at this time, the elder apprentice, Saman, who failed in the competition suddenly made a move. He used a trick to severely injure Dawor and Rosenberg, seize the Inheritance Crystal, and tried to kill the two.

Rosenberg was originally injured severely, and now he was even more seriously injured and dying, but after all, he was a grand master and one of the crystal makers. He immediately activated a special contract in the Inheritance Crystal to divide the inheritance imprint into half which went to Dawor and Saman respectively. This made both of them the inheritor of the crystal at the same time.

The inheritance obtained by the two was incomplete. Due to the contract, they could only use the rule to defeat the other to completely get rid of the contract and obtain all the inheritance. If they killed each other by other means, they would not get the complete inheritance and even suffer a terrifying recoil.

Therefore, Saman could not kill Dawor or even let others do it, otherwise he would not be able to obtain a complete inheritance. This kind of imprint was very wonderful whereby they could pass on from generation to generation using the method of inheritance within the contract period of 10,000 years.

Not only that, Rosenberg, who hated Saman, the traitor, did not hesitate to sacrifice his life as a medium to cast a curse that disabled Saman’s imprint from being passed on. This meant that if Saman failed once, he would truly die.

However, the fact was that Saman had some mysterious encounters which rendered him to actually miraculously remain undefeated and lived to the present. After so many years, he had truly reached the grand master level. In the last competition, he also produced a full set of eternal potions. His achievements even surpassed Rosenberg back then. Putting together a complete inheritance imprint had little meaning to him. In a sense, this gambling game could be a way to extend his life.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. It turns out that there is such a secret. The opponent is actually an old monster who has lived for nearly 10,000 years. After thinking about it, he asked, “How much is the remaining time for this 10,000-year inheritance contract?”

“If you accept the inheritance, then your 100 years is the final deadline.” Tetenis sighed, “To be honest, Saman’s strength is already higher than that of Rosenberg. Unless a miracle occurs, otherwise even if you break through to the grand master level, the chance of winning is also quite small. So I give you two choices. Even if you choose the first one, it doesn’t matter. As long as Saman wins the final victory, he will be able to get rid of the various restrictions of the contract to openly appear in the Demon Realm. With his dual-grand master identity, he will surely be protected by the strongest force. By then, it will be impossible to kill him for revenge by other methods.”

“Teacher, I think I will choose the first way.” Chen Rui considered for a while and made a decision. “My goal is to learn mechanic skills from teacher. As for pharmaceutics… I hope I can learn from teacher with a potion master friend. Uh, I can ask him to be your apprentice too.”

Chen Rui was talking about Aldas. At present, Aldas’ strength had reached the senior master level. With the guidance of this quasi-grand master, it was highly probable to take the next step. Just in case, Chen Rui did not intend to reveal the black potions in his hand for the time being. He intended to take a look first while studying with Tetenis for a period of time

This choice was expected by Tetenis. Although it is a bit regrettable, it is understandable. Who wants to bet against the strong grand master who has lived for 10,000 years? The old man thought for awhile. Anyway, I only have one year of life left. Aguile seems to be only specializing in mechanic skills, so the knowledge of pharmaceutics should be passed on to the other potion master. If he is a good friend of my apprentice, I should not have to worry about his character.

“Alright, then our learning will start now…”

“Wait a minute, teacher, it’s getting late now. I have to go to the palace to inform the potion master, then I have some matters to report to Princess Royal Highness. Let’s just start tomorrow. I will bring that friend to do the formalities of being an apprentice.”

“Report? Those boring political affairs again!” The old man said in dissatisfaction, “Don’t you know that skills have to be specialized? Don’t waste your talent!”

“Teacher, don’t worry, I know what to do. My talent and ability may be beyond your imagination… Don’t be too surprised by then.”

“Surprised my ass. You can get lost now.” The old man scoffed and didn’t bother about him. Chen Rui smiled and left.

Hmmm, Chen Rui seemed to already have the set of Eternal potions long ago right?

chapters.title: Chapter 480: Her Sentiment
chapters.body:
Chapter 480: Her Sentiment

The outer courtyard of the palace; Master Aldas’ exclusive laboratory.

The dark elf master stared at the cloaked man in front of him in amazement. This cloaked man was the famous powerhouse of the Dark Moon Estate, the Red Blood Legion’s deputy legion commander, the palace guard deputy commander, and the Cloak Gang’s leader, Aguile. However, when “Aguile” took off the mask in front of him, the true face that had been kept secret was actually…
