The previous Megrez training may be faster and stronger than expected due to the appearance of the accidental factor like Shura, but Shura deliberately avoided a key factor which is even more dangerous. The same applied to Phecda now. If I continue to train according to Shura’s method, I’m afraid that there will be unpredictable results.

However, the change in the Experience Value in the status bar shows that there is at least some truth in Shura’s words. I must seize this opportunity to comprehend Phecda, to become stronger, to fulfill my wish, and to protect the people I cherish no matter how dangerous it is.

Embody destruction?

Chen Rui’s gaze became more resolute.

How did he want to train without the help of Shura?

chapters.title: Chapter 486: Goldman And Tea Leaf
chapters.body:
Chapter 486: Goldman And Tea Leaf

After the misunderstanding with Olypheus was resolved, another occupant was added to the house. According to Ms. Black Dragon’s own words: If the bodyguard is not with the employee, what is a bodyguard?

The key point was that this was a paradise for eating and drinking for free. There were so many delicious things such as the emerald jade wine in the hands of Paglio which made people salivate by just smelling it. This good stuff couldn’t even be bought outside.

Chen Rui considered it again and again, and he still agreed to Olypheus’ request. This chick is too weird and seriously unreliable. She can burn the forest when roasting a piece of meat. Unluckily, her strength is the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. If she stays outside, she may cause some huge troubles. I managed Dark Moon City with much effort, and I don’t want any accidents to happen.

Athena and Kia had known the existence of Ms. Bodyguard from Chen Rui a long time ago, so there was no misunderstanding. However, after seeing Olypheus’ unexpected beauty, there was a vague vigilance in their eyes. Fortunately, this kind of vigilance soon loosened up a lot because, during their interaction in the past few days, they found that Olypheus was a very simple girl, perhaps you could say a very simple miser. The relationship between men and women was purely a blank paper; she did not have too much thought about it.

In addition to being a miser, this chick was also an out-and-out foodie who was comparable to Krobelus. She could eat as much as she could. She claimed, “Mum said it is for puberty.”

This time, in addition to the “turkey” necklace given to Chen Rui, Zola also had a very important research result which was the puppet’s heart that Chen Rui gave her. The puppet’s heart was the secret treasure of the Beelzebub Royal Family. It had a great effect on making puppets. Back then, the crystal dragon Jacob forcefully got it from Azgalor because he could use it to create more and stronger crystal men. Later, Chen Rui got it by scheming. Chen Rui then gave it to Zola to research, and now this research had finally achieved great success. She created a peculiar puppet.

This kind of puppet was somewhat similar to the crystal men created by the crystal dragon with talent and other power. However, the material was not crystal, but alloy, and a lot of ancient runes was added into it. Zola named it goldman.

The material of the goldman itself was extremely sturdy. It was assembled from small components similar to building blocks. It could freely control every part of its body just like the human body controlling the muscles. The “core” of its brain was made by using the highest refined substance and the power of the puppet’s heart provided by Chen Rui. It was made through the process of initiation of the ancient runes and compound magic.

The role of the ancient runes was very wonderful. From the moment it was initiated as the finished product, the core and components of goldman would become integrated. It was extremely hard; even the powerful magic elements couldn’t change or reverse it. Therefore, this goldman’s defense power or magic resist ability was quite amazing. In terms of attack, it had also reached the Demon King level.

Zola had another important purpose of making the goldman. Besides using it as an assistant to conduct dangerous experiments and exploration work, it still had one more important function.

There were no outsiders in this house except the new little black dragon (Zola thought so). There were no servants or maids. Everyone usually had their own matters. It was very inconvenient in terms of hygiene and cleaning, so this kind of goldman could be used as a servant.

The goldman didn’t have independent consciousness. Without manual control, it just worked like a robot according to the “program” entered such as cleaning and guarding. After inserting a certain spiritual imprint according to Zola’s secret method, the goldman could be controlled to perform various actions. The emergence of the goldman solved a big living problem, but Chen Rui thought of a more important strategic significance.

Compared with the crystal men made by crystal dragons, the goldman not only had no inferior magic resist characteristics, but it also had better physical defense and attack power than the crystal men. The same disadvantage was that its speed was relatively slow. Of course, compared with Asmodeus Royal Family’s [War Puppet] with pure combat instincts, it was still incomparable, but according to Zola, as long as the materials were sufficient, it could be produced in batches. She had already produced 3 of them.

Chen Rui asked whether it was possible to try to use the assembly line process to produce those combination accessories. This would not only greatly reduce Zola’s workload, but also increase the production speed by multiple times. By that time, Zola could also assign puppets or special personnel to assemble them. Finally, Zola only needed to be in charge of producing the core and complete the most important initiation.

Zola thought for a while. This method should be feasible, but in the process of accessories production, she used extraordinary magic power in many aspects. If it was made by ordinary craftsmen, even if the initiation in the end succeeded, perhaps the goldman’s combat effectiveness would also decline a lot. It would probably be hard for the goldman to reach Demon King level.

Athena intervened at this time. Even if it was the strength of a higher demon, as long as it could reach a certain amount, the goldman could definitely become the most terrifying team on the battlefield with the characteristics high defense, high offense and fearlessness.

That night, Chen Rui brought a goldman to the palace and reported the incident to Shea.

Shea looked at the goldman presented by Chen Rui with surprise. She knew very well the combat power that would be created if the goldman was mass-produced and put on the battlefield.

Shea also expressed considerable interest in the assembly line production proposed by Chen Rui. The assembly line referred to the production process in which the item continuously passed through each workstation where the parts were added in sequence according to a certain process route and a uniform production speed until the final assembly was produced.

Shea was a quick-witted person. She suddenly thought of the advantages of this production method, “This will not only greatly improve efficiency, but it also has a very effective confidentiality effect. Each team of craftsmen only produces one or several components and the final assembly is also done by a separate team. Even if someone leaks the secrets, they will not really obtain the complete goldman production method.”

“Yes, I plan to leave the making of the goldman’s alloy and the most important part to the tauren, so that it will be foolproof.”

Shea looked supportive, “This assembly line production is wonderful. It can be promoted in many production industries. We can immediately send people to buy the goldman’s various production materials, but your report yesterday stated that our recent capital expenditure is relatively large especially for the military expenses. Let’s make a budget plan first.”

“Money is not a problem.” Chen Rui smiled flirtatiously, “However, that is my private asset. I plan to use it to marry my wife in the future. If I use everything now, what should I do if no one wants to marry me then?”

Shea’s face blushed slightly, “Don’t you have Athena and the others? With your cunningness and tricks, even if you have nothing in the future, they will still be by your side.”

Chen Rui got closer and looked straight into her beautiful eyes, “What about you?”

Shea’s tone was a little cold, “As a lord, those who are worthless naturally lose their role.”

“Really?” Chen Rui scratched his head and asked again, “Then what about as a woman?”

“Regardless of poverty, high, low, aging, sickness or death, I will be by his side.” Shea’s purple eyes were intertwined with gentleness and firmness, “I shoulder the destiny of all people in an estate, and perhaps an empire in the future. If I can get rid of this heavy burden by then, then even life and death cannot separate me and him. If I can’t let go of the responsibility, then I can’t sacrifice the entire estate or even the entire empire for my selfishness. However, from that moment on, my soul and emotion will be completely annihilated with his death.”

Chen Rui took two steps forward and hugged her tightly.

There was no kiss, no sweet words, but only a hug where the figure and the soul combined.

Just like that agreement. Never separate forever and ever.

After a long time.

“Okay, you should go now. Alice is coming back from shopping at the night market.”

“ En , I will arrange the goldman’s matter immediately. Your birthday is only a few days away, but this is not my birthday gift. The birthday gift that I’m giving you is not so valuable.”

Shea looked at him and didn’t say words like “I like it as long as it’s from you.” She just smiled slightly like the snow that was beginning to melt.

Leaving the palace, Chen Rui subconsciously turned to the northeast block.

Am I used to coming here already? Chen Rui couldn’t help but smile bitterly when he arrived in front of the house.

As before, the door opened automatically, and his feet walked in subconsciously.

The yard looked clean and tidy today. The two flame grass in the corner glowed with brilliant light, making the yard overflowing with warmth. No additional lighting facilities were needed.

Isabella sat on the chair in the middle of the yard. She was wearing a short robe and looked a little idle. A part of the two white lumps of snow on her chest was revealed, and the deep ditch in between the fullness made his heart race. Chen Rui didn’t dare to look longer. He sat on the opposite side while looking straight.

Isabella didn’t bother about exposing her private part. There was something in her hand. Chen Rui was no longer a rookie who just came to the Demon Realm. He knew that this was called Quqin. The sound and playing method were very similar to harmonica.

“I’m bored today, so I found out a little hobby from the past. Listen to me playing a song first.”

The music sounded gently, and the melodious and beautiful tunes lingered in the courtyard like a colorful dream. The source of the dream was an idle and elegant beautiful woman which was equally fascinating.

“Very beautiful tune.” Chen Rui praised sincerely.

Those blue eyes looked at him faintly as she threw over the Quqin to him.

“You also play a song for me.”

“Me?” Chen Rui just caught Quqin, and he was surprised when he heard that. He shook his head, “I really don’t know how to.”

“Then I will wait until you learn it.” Isabella added directly, “It’s harder to be a liar, but you learn well.”

“…” Chen Rui was speechless. He had to keep the Quqin which was still warm.

The two talked for a while. Chen Rui told Isabella about goldman, and Isabella naturally knew the value of this, so she nodded slightly.

“Did you get Olypheus by lying?”

“Can be considered so.” Chen Rui knew that if there were no accidents, he could not take off the “liar” hat in front of Ms. Yini for a lifetime, so he helplessly said, “She has signed an equality contract with me. Currently, the Dark Moon has an extra powerful combat power at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord.”

“I thought you would say that there would be an extra woman for you.”

“You misunderstood…” Chen Rui was embarrassed. I’m really wrong.

“Whether it is a misunderstanding or not, ask your Ms. Bodyguard to follow you closely these days. I have received news that the capital may send someone to harm you.”

“Me?” Chen Rui frowned, However, this was not the first time the capital tried to harm him. He had been assassinated several times before. His identity was different from Shea. Shea and Alice were the only descendants of the Lord of Midnight Sun. Once Shea encountered any accident, the main military forces led by General George would cause large-scale turmoil and even betray the Fallen Angel Empire to turn to the other 2 empires. Therefore, before Obsidian had the confidence to control this situation, he not only couldn’t assassinate Shea, but he also had to pray for her to live well. Especially now that the capital was plagued by the fundraising scandals, he couldn’t afford this change.

“They are probably not going to kill you this time, but to bring you back alive. I guess the powerhouse who is coming here is not simple.” Isabella’s lips curled up, “You should be grateful for the long reasoning that you made during your meeting with the White Feather Estate. Such a talent is more useful when alive. Maybe you can deliberately be taken away and use deception to scheme the capital again.”

“I’m not free now, so I can’t be taken away.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “I will be careful. Thank you for your intel.”

Isabella nodded, and she did not mention this matter again. She took out a small bag from the space ring, “This is the leaf you brought back last time. Delia tried several times and failed to get it right. I got it from her since I’m bored. I made it according to the method you said. I don’t know if it has reached the level you said.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. The “leaf” that Isabella said was the one he accidentally found and bought last time when he took Alice to participate in Town Leia’s plants trade fair in the Dark Shadow Empire. These spirit purifying leaves were a kind of medicinal material that had detoxification, mind purification and calming effect. They were beneficial to the training of magic power, but what Chen Rui valued was not their function, but… the taste.

This kind of spirit purifying leaf was very similar to the tea he liked in the previous life, but the people of the Demon Realm only kept it in the mouth, or at most it was directly soaked in water for drinking. He wondered if the spirit purifying leaf would produce that kind of taste and feeling when it was made according to the method of tea.

Chen Rui didn’t like wine very much before the crossover, but he had a soft spot for tea. Due to economic constraints, he only drank some low and medium-grade bulk tea. He once wanted to sell tea on Taobao, but there was always a gap between reality and ideals. He finally chose to sell clothing due to the relatively low cost risk.

He was quite clear about some processes such as withering and fermentation of tea, but his time schedule was too tight these days to try them step by step. Athena was a legion commander who dealt with swords and guns. Kia was keen on costume design. Zola had even more scientific research projects while Krobelus was too busy with wine-making, so he passed it to Delia who was a little interested. He didn’t expect Isabella to take over, and she actually produced some finished products in such a short time.

“Let me do it!” Chen Rui was suddenly in the mood. He took out his usual outdoor utensils, boiled the water with a magic stove, and picked out two small cups from the treasures of the storage warehouse, “Making tea is a deep knowledge. The water, utensils, and tea-making methods are very particular. Unfortunately, there are too few things now… You can’t drink the first round of tea. These leaves will have fine debris on the surface during the process of growing and picking. They are also not rinsed before they are roasted. Therefore, this is the role of tea washing. These are relatively tender tea leaves, so the boiling temperature should not be too high…”

Isabella listened attentively as she watched him speak endlessly while making tea, and a strange feeling suddenly surged in her heart – very warm and peaceful.

Chen Rui made a cup of tea and tasted it by himself. His eyes lit up slightly, and he licked his lips indulgently, “Very good. Come on, you try it.”

“ En , it really doesn’t feel the same as the one I made.” In fact, the “feeling” that Isabella said was not just the taste.

Under the moonlight.

The man and the woman sipped the tea quietly like a peaceful and natural picture.

Tea lover here too 🤤🍵…

chapters.title: Chapter 487: Spy And Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 487: Spy And Crisis

In the blink of an eye, another 3 days passed.

The Dark Moon City became more and more lively because Princess Royal Highness’ birthday was around the corner.

Although Princess Royal did not hold a corresponding celebration, the people of the estate took the initiative to organize numerous celebrations. In the eyes of the people of the Dark Moon Army, although the Dark Moon’s current development and prosperity were due to Chen Rui, Aguile, and Tim’s help, the most important central figure was Lord Shea.

Without Shea’s strenuous support, under Obsidian’s oppression and control over the years, the Dark Moon would not have the glory today. Fortunately, her persistence and hard work had finally paid off. The Dark Moon had become the most prosperous estate in the Fallen Angel Empire and even the Demon Realm. This was an outright miracle, but it did happen.

Those merchants were the happiest. Each of them offered discounts and promotions in conjunction with Princess Royal’s birthday. The people naturally went on a shopping spree happily, and everyone was delighted. The entire Dark Moon Estate was like celebrating a festival. It was almost comparable to the lively scene of the previous trade fair.

However, Krobelus, who liked the liveliness the most, couldn’t see this kind of scene for the time being as she was “behind closed doors”. When she researched the goldman with Zola last time, she got a lot of pointers. Her water element magic power had become more and more refined, and there were signs of improvement in her territory power. Since Chen Rui’s identity of “Charles” had been exposed to Isabella, there was no need to hide the black potions from Krobelus. He gave her a set of Eternal Potions. Ms. Emerald Dragon, who was overjoyed, was full of ambition. With the encouragement of Paglio, she decided to train behind closed doors again to advance a small realm to the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord.

Chen Rui knew why the dead duck dragon encouraged Krobelus to do closed training so much. Isn’t it to pursue the so-called “freedom”?

In fact, after knowing that Olypheus and Chen Rui were only employer-bodyguard relationship, this guy showed great hospitality to Ms. Black Dragon.

It was a pity that Ms. Black Dragon was not only unflattered, but she also asked a few fatal questions such as “What is a date; can I eat it?” and “Are you rich?” in front of Ms. Emerald Dragon.

Master Poison Dragon was stunned at that time. The most important thing was the financial problem. He did have treasures, and he also had a share of the “fundraising money” as well as a share of the Crystal Valley’s crystal mine, but these were all with Chen Rui. The human had already sold many Master Poison Dragon’s treasures to Ms. Emerald Dragon. Now that he decided to have a private small vault, he was naturally unwilling to reveal it. Therefore, he could only retreat in the innocent eyes of Ms. Black Dragon.

What made Paglio speechless was that this incident caused Ms. Emerald Dragon to be highly vigilant. Before she went behind closed doors, she took away all the money from him. Even the gold crystal bed was taken away. Female’s sensitivity was quite amazing indeed.

In order to prevent the guy from hooking up outside, Krobelus also made a killing move which was to spend money to hire Olypheus to spy on Paglio secretly.

Of course, Ms. Miser was always willing to accept this kind of easy-pay work. She secretly followed the poison dragon every day and carefully recorded his every move. Even if Paglio slipped away, she would stop at every place that he would possibly appear. Sometimes, she even asked for Zola’s help. After a period of time, she was thoroughly familiar with the Dark Moon City, but Master Poison Dragon sighed all day long. He was really caught in his own trap.

Chen Rui had no time to bother about Paglio. During this time, he was busy with learning mechanic skills and the goldman production related matters. The production line was divided into several parts. Chen Rui had arranged the taurens and the Cloak Gang, and now he was looking for the Terry Family.

The Terry Family was one of the several major families of the Dark Moon, second only to the Saiful Family. They had always been on Shea’s side previously. They now controlled more than half of the Dark Moon’s production industry. There were a large number of skilled craftsmen under their hands which would be the backbone of the goldman’s parts manufacturing.

The Terry Family received an order from Princess Royal Shea. They attached great importance to this matter and sent Jason, the main person in charge of the family’s manufacturing industry, to contact Chen Rui.

Jason was of the Lucifer Royal Family, and his wife was the eldest daughter of the Terry Family’s patriarch. This was equivalent to marrying into the bride’s family. This kind of marriage was very common in the Demon Realm. It was mainly a political marriage that deepened relationships and controls. They could give birth to a royal family member or become a family heir.

Jason’s appearance was about 30 years old. His facial features were well-shaped, and his brows revealed shrewdness and capability. Chen Rui had seen him several times previously, but it was the first time that he really contacted Jason.

Accompanied by Jason, Chen Rui came to an exclusive workshop of Terry Family in the mountains outside the Dark Moon City.

“Sir Chen Rui, what is the project assigned to be produced this time?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “It’s a special component. Princess Royal has ordered that this matter is classified as highly confidential, so please forgive me for not being able to say more. Also, the craftsman must be instructed to keep it strictly confidential.”

Jason nodded, “Understood, how about sir meet Terry Family’s craftsmanship director, Sarandi, first? You can tell him any technical requirements or questions. Sarandi has served the Terry Family for 150 years. He is absolutely trustworthy.”

“Ok.”

Jason immediately asked the people around to leave. Soon, a great demon walked into the room.

This great demon was tall and stern with a scar on his brow bone. Chen Rui only glanced at him, and his pupils suddenly shrank. An odd expression flashed past his eyes.

“Jason, this is Director Sarandi?”

Jason nodded, “Sarandi, this is Sir Chen Rui, the top minister of the Demon Realm whom you have long admired. From now on, you must unconditionally obey all his orders.”

“Jason, go down first. For the sake of confidentiality, ask the irrelevant people to leave this place. By the way, please go to the Flame Legion again and pass this letter to the legion commander Athena for me as quickly as possible. Also, tell her that I will be coming back a bit later today.” Chen Rui took out an envelope and handed it to Jason.

Sarandi stopped Jason unexpectedly and said, “Wait, show me that letter.”

Jason paused. He actually did not dare to disobey, and he handed the letter to Sarandi respectfully. Chen Rui slightly squinted his eyes; he calmly placed his hands behind his back.

Sarandi opened the letter, but nothing was written in it. It was just a blank sheet of paper.

“Is this a warning of some kind of danger?” Sarandi gave a faint smile, “Sir Chen Rui seems to have spotted some kind of flaw. It’s really surprising. You’re worthy of being a rare sage minister of the Demon Realm. Unfortunately, even if there is no problem with the letter, I will not let it go. My trip to the Dark Moon must be successful this time; no mistakes are allowed. I advise sir to give up unrealistic delusions. In the face of absolute strength, neither wisdom nor strategy has any effect.”

“Really?” The reason Chen Rui found the flaw was simple. Intuition. Sarandi made him feel a kind of danger instinctively when he first came in, and the [Analytical Eyes] clearly explained the reason for this danger.

Race: Pride Royal Family (mutated), Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C (S+).

He is actually of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord from the Lucifer Royal Family! Apart from the Fallen Angel Capital, Chen Rui couldn’t think of a place that could send such a top-level Lucifer Royal Family. When he thought of the intel that Isabella said a few days ago, he suddenly understood that this Demon Overlord of the peak stage came for him, and he came faster than expected.

The previous assassins were only the Great Demon King or Demon Emperor. They actually sent the strongest Demon Overlord this time. It seemed that “the Demon Realm’s No. 1 Minister of Internal Affairs” was really quite prestigious.

The letter just now was indeed a warning that only he and Athena could understand, but to his surprise, the royal family member, Jason, whom Shea had always valued, was actually a spy!

“Sir Chen Rui is overthinking. Other than sir, we do not intend to do anything to Ms. Athena for our trip to the Dark Moon this time. General George has great control over the military and is the most prestigious general in the military. Even the capital is also fearful of him.”

We? Chen Rui’s heart moved: It’s not just Sarandi who came here!

“Jason, before I am killed, answer my last few questions.” Chen Rui looked like he was taking death calmly, “Did you or the entire Terry Family betrayed Princess Royal?”

“I’m not the only one who has betrayed, but it’s not the entire family. However, it is not only the Terry Family who has someone like me.” Jason’s spooky sneer shocked Chen Rui secretly, “I’m a royal family member. I should have the qualification to inherit an estate initially. However, I was suppressed by the Crown Prince Grimm at that time, so I was married into a family with a very small influence. Because of the blood relationship, I can’t even inherit this family despite my outstanding talents! Not only that, the Dark Moon seems to be stronger step by step now, but the stronger it is, the closer it is to destruction. Once you exceed the bottom line of the capital, do you think that the Dark Moon can really rival the entire Fallen Angel Empire?”

“The capital does not represent the entire Fallen Angel Empire. The Blue Lava Estate, one of the four major estates, is already under the control of the Dark Moon. The Dark Moon also has a secret agreement with the White Feather Estate already. There is only the Red Spirit Estate left who has suffered a huge setback.” Chen Rui deliberately discredited the White Feather Estate to confuse Sarandi again and again. As expected, Sarandi showed confusion and did not stop him from continuing.

“Besides, how can you know that it’s not going to work if you never try it? Every possibility has been conceived from the impossible.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Are you sure that you see the future of the empire clearly before betraying? We are now developing swiftly while the capital is struggling in a predicament. One is going down and the other is getting stronger. It’s clear at a glance. Not only the economy, the Dark Moon has unlimited potential even in the military. The capital has the peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouses, we have it too! Moreover, do you think the Demon Overlords of the capital are loyally siding around Obsidian? Do you think Obsidian can mobilize those elder Demon Overlords of the elder family at will? I’m afraid Obsidian has exerted a lot of effort to ask Sir Sarandi to come here! Besides, even if Obsidian defeats the Dark Moon, do you think you will gain power and be valued? You’re just a chess piece of temporary value. You can betray Shea for profit this time, it is possible that you will betray Obsidian for profit; who will keep a dog that may bite his owner at any time?”

With the last sentence, Jason’s face turned pale. Sarandi said: “As expected of Sir Chen Rui, just a few words made this betrayer hesitate. Furthermore, being in the Dark Moon, you actually know the situation and interest of the capital so well. You can even see through my strength, but you can rest assured that my purpose this time is not to kill you, but to invite you to the capital as a financial officer.”

Chen Rui had guessed that Sarandi’s purpose was to capture him to the capital, otherwise he would not talk nonsense for so long.

However, Sarandi’s next sentence made Chen Rui’s expression suddenly change, “Your wisdom is extraordinary. My trip is not in vain. Unfortunately, it’s useless to delay time. Don’t expect the Dark Demon will send a message to the Dark Moon to send a powerhouse to save you. The capital has already sensed the threat of the Dark Moon. Our purpose this time is not only to take you away, but also to uproot the annoying Dark Demon.”

Chen Rui’s thoughts quickly shifted: The Dark Demon’s contact point is extremely secretive, and there are various magic circles. However, Jason said just now, “It’s not only the Terry Family who has people like me.” Then, someone in the Dark Demon must have chosen the same path as Jason!

Delia is in danger! And Isabella!

In fact, the Dark Moon has eliminated many dissidents and families that are on the capital’s side this year. With the rapid development of the power, the top management can be described to reach an unprecedented cohesion, but this situation has occurred. This is my negligence!

The people’s mind is indeed the most unpredictable thing.

No matter how flexible Chen Rui’s brain was, no matter how he had knowledge of another world, his intelligence and energy were limited after all. It was impossible to be proficient in all aspects. This eventually led to such mistakes.

At this moment, Sarandi’s face suddenly changed. Another person appeared in the room out of thin air.

A man with short hair and tawny skin. As soon as this man appeared, Sarandi immediately developed an instinctive sense of vigilance. The strength of this man was definitely not simple. Even his peak stage of the Demon Overlord had a palpitations feeling.

It must be the hidden powerhouse of the Dark Moon. He is even comparable to my level of strength. There is indeed a powerhouse of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord in the Dark Moon! How did this person find this place? Has he been protecting Chen Rui closely?

It was just that the man didn’t have the demeanor of a powerhouse at all. He took a sip from the wine bottle and snorted with an alcohol breath, “That chick really has a good sense of smell. I finally got rid of her tracking, but I was summoned before I could sit still. I want to see which blind fellow disturbed my free time!”

“Free your ass. Something is going to happen to Delia!” Chen Rui had no time to deal with the complaints of this guy.

Catch alive? Kill? Hostility flicked through Sarandi’s eyes. The peak stage of the Demon Overlord’s power quickly charged. Just as he was about to take Chen Rui first, the man instantly blocked in front of him, and the terrifying fierce light in his eyes made Sarandi shudder. He had to go with all his strength.

Just when Sarandi focused completely on Paglio, there was a faint light flashing behind this powerful enemy. When he looked again, the human had actually disappeared!

Sarandi was taken aback. Before he had time to investigate the whereabouts of the human, the man in front of him had already taken advantage of his distraction. In an instant, his fist turned into hundreds of black shadows that struck at various vital points. His body was wrapped inside in the blink of an eye. The strength of the onslaught and the fierce attack in this round suppressed Sarandi firmly even though he had charged his strength and defense long ago. He was in a disadvantage situation for a while.

Chen Rui had already crushed a piece of Paglio’s dragon scale when he put his hands behind his back just now. This allowed the poison dragon to come quickly within an effective range. That was the reason he kept delaying Sarandi. He did not ignore Isabella’s warning a few days ago, and he prepared the corresponding precautions. It really came in handy now.

Chen Rui used the [Star Gate] to leave the room just now because the star point set by the [Star Gate] was much closer to the contact point of the Dark Demon than this place. Although it might be seen by Sarandi, he could not be bothered about it now.

I must be at the Dark Demon’ headquarters as soon as possible!

‘To uproot the Dark Demon’, who was the terrifying enemy being sent?

chapters.title: Chapter 488: Nero
chapters.body:
Chapter 488: Nero

Chen Rui came to the Dark Demon’s headquarters at the fastest speed and saw casualties all around. Many of the original magic circles were either stopped or destroyed. They were destroyed from the inside. It seemed that this spy was very familiar with the magic circles. It should be the person responsible for controlling the magic circles.

A big hole was broken apart at the entrance of the underground base. Chen Rui rushed in all the way to the hall.

The hall was in a mess. A few people were lying on the ground. Among them was Delia with her eyes closed. Chen Rui’s heart suddenly felt tense. He hurried forward and found that Delia’s face was green. She seemed to be unconscious from being poisoned. The same goes for several members of the Dark Demon around.

Chen Rui was now quite proficient in the knowledge of pharmaceutics. He could see that these people were poisoned by a very powerful soul-dispersing poison. Fortunately, the poisoning was not too deep yet, and the storage warehouse happened to have a lot of herbs for learning purposes. He immediately took out a spirit purifying leaf and placed it on the tip of her nose. At the same time, he activated his power to suppress the poison. He made a small cut on Delia’s finger, and the cyan poisonous blood flowed out immediately.

This <a href=”https://www.wordnik.com/words/heteropathy”>heteropathy </a>method was very effective. Delia had the strength of the Great Demon King level. She gradually opened her eyes. Chen Rui immediately fed her a bottle of detoxification potion. The green color on Delia’s face finally disappeared, but her body was still very weak.

“Quick! Go save Isabella…”

It turned out that the poisoning was done by the dark elf Tara, Delia’s trusted assistant. Last time, she took Chen Rui to the communication magic circle. Tara was the elite of the dark elves, and she was proficient at using poison. This time, she mainly poisoned the drinking water. This poison itself was very venomous. In addition, Tara did something to the late night wave flower in the underground base in order to catalyze the toxin.

Isabella was the only one who was alert of this because she was also an expert in poison, but due to the sudden incident, Delia and the others had been poisoned when she found out something was amiss. At this time, there was a warning of a powerful enemy invasion. They appeared in the lobby with ease. Isabella didn’t have time to rescue everyone. She killed Tara decisively, then she led away the powerful enemy.

After listening to Delia’s short narrative, Chen Rui’s figure flickered and disappeared.

A figure moving at lightning speed in the eastern suburbs suddenly stopped. It staggered a few steps and almost collapsed. This was a woman wearing a long blue dress. The white gauze on her face was stained red with blood. She was obviously severely injured.

Suddenly, a light was shining brightly behind her. The light condensed into the figure of a man. The man was not tall with an average appearance. He had very special silver hair.

“Finally, you can’t run anymore.” The man’s eyes looked like a cat playing with a mouse. “The talent of the royal family of demons is really amazing. A Demon Emperor can actually persist for so long in my hands, but unfortunately, your escape directions are intercepted by me. You can only escape outside the city. Even if the support could find this place, they can only get a corpse. Am I right? The leader of the Dark Moon Estate’s Dark Demon, or I should call you… Miss Isabella ?Although you are wearing a veil, you can’t hide from me, your admirer.”

“Nero!” Isabella gritted her teeth and uttered a man’s name.

This person was actually the human who ventured into the Demon Realm for training to become the Demon Overlord, the royal family of the Blue Glory Empire, Nero. For some reasons, he had not returned to the human world, and he even became the assassin sent by Prince Obsidian to the Dark Moon.

The change in the Dark Demon’s headquarters was too sudden, so Isabella had no time to make more response. She knew that Krobelus was in closed training, and her initial attempt to escape to Chen Rui’s house in the east to seek protection from Zola or Paglio was also seen through and blocked by the other party. She was forced to escape from the city gate. There were dangers along the way, and her injuries were not minor. She was almost in a dead end now.

“It’s really an honour to be remembered by Ms. Isabella.” Nero smiled presumptuously, “It turns out that you faked death last time and hid in such a place to secretly go against Prince Obsidian. If I take you to Royal Highness Obsidian, I believe I will get a more generous reward.”

As Nero said, there was suddenly a kind of lust in his eyes, “I have always wanted you, but unfortunately there was the eyesore, Krobelus, previously. I suffered a few setbacks and I still couldn’t get you. Unexpectedly, just before I leave the Demon Realm, I can actually realize my wish. It is really Light God’s blessing. Before I hand you over to Prince Obsidian, I will let a wicked demon like you have a taste of the real Light Family’s punishment with your body.”

Isabella’s eyes were ice-cold, “All you can get is a corpse.”

“I don’t mind even if it’s a corpse.” Nero’s smile became more and more perverted.

Isabella clenched her fist, gritted her teeth and said, “This is the so-called Light Family?”

“In the face of darkness, everything in the light is righteous. I’m just purifying your soul and body.” Nero smiled shamelessly, and his spirit power was locking at Isabella, “Don’t try to delay the time, now your strength is running out now. If you are smart, obey me obediently, so as not to suffer more by then!”

Isabella suddenly radiated a strong light, turned into lightning, and instantly appeared in front of Nero. The dagger in her hand turned into phantoms which surrounded Nero.

However, Nero smashed all the phantoms with just one punch, and the dagger fell to the ground with a clang . Isabella’s figure quickly retreated. The blood stains on her veil continued to expand.

“A Demon Emperor has no chance of winning against a Demon Overlord, even if you exhaust your vitality. You have tried several times along the way.”

Isabella was unmoved. Her left eye suddenly turned golden, and a destructive beam of light burst out from it. However, a set of armor loomed on Nero’s body. The beam from Isabella could not penetrate the armor. Instead, her eyes suffered some kind of recoil and started bleeding. She finally couldn’t stand still and fell to the ground. “This is Holy Magic Armor. Your attack of this level is just injuring yourself. You can’t even hurt my skin. I’ll give you one last chance to be my servant. I will not hand you over to Obsidian and will even take you back to the human world to enjoy the light of the human world.” Nero walked over step by step, deliberately disintegrating Isabella’s psychological defense.

Isabella suddenly laughed; her laughter was filled with hatred. Back to the human world? Didn’t that human say the same thing back then?

It seems that I will definitely be defeated today, but even if I die, I will not fall into the hands of this pervert!

Her blue eyes became decisive. As the head of the secret intelligence department, she had more than one way to end her life, including 2 ways that would not even let the other party get her corpse. Unfortunately, she couldn’t see that man for one last time…

She didn’t understand what was the relationship between herself and this man, but before she died, she had a very strong desire to see him, even if she just glanced at him. When she was about to use the secret technique to explode, suddenly there was a strange sound of sonic boom. Nero frowned. The low-altitude flying figure rushed at high speed, and it immediately landed after noticing the 2 people below.

It’s him! Isabella’s blue eyes flickered, but her voice became extremely cold and murderous, “Simon, it turns out you have betrayed Princess Royal too! You want to take advantage of the current turmoil?”

Chen Rui originally guessed that Isabella would escape to the sheriff residence, but from the signs along the way, it seemed that she had been intercepted and escaped from the east gate, so he chased her all the way. He finally found Isabella now, but he didn’t expect her first sentence was this.

Nero looked at the man suspiciously. He felt some familiarity : Is it someone from the Dark Moon? Judging from Isabella’s attitude, he should be.

“I happen to lack a guy to accompany my death.” Isabella’s power began to surge again. She slowly stood up as if she was burning her last vitality, but she had no regrets.

Chen Rui immediately understood Isabella’s intentions. The enemy is very strong, run away! I will cover you!

The anxious expression in the blood-dripping eyes of this woman who did not hesitate to burn her life to let him escape. Behind her cold and murderous tone was a deep affection.

When Chen Rui suddenly thought of the last scene of the battle with Broc back then, his heart trembled. A certain part of his mind was truly moved. Even if it had been sealed tightly, a crack was opened up in front of this flame after all.

Although this kind of movement would bring more troubles and trivial things in the future, he was indeed moved, and he could no longer suppress his feelings.

“Go get Sir Sarandi; leave it to me here.” Nero had been coveting Isabella’s beauty for a long time. Now that he finally had a chance, he naturally didn’t want someone to ruin his plan.

Isabella was secretly relieved, but Chen Rui didn’t move. He just shook his head at her, “Yini.”

Isabella was shocked. It was the first time this man called her like this since that time. Furthermore, it felt very natural. This was a real affectionate nickname, unlike the previous pretentious courtesy.

Chen Rui appeared in front of Isabella in an instant. He put a hand on her shoulder, preventing the burning of vitality, “I’m no longer who I was. I will never let the same scene happen again. Trust me, okay?”

Isabella trembled slightly while looking at the determination in his eyes. She felt that there seemed to be something in him that he didn’t usually have, and her eyes became gentle as she nodded, “ En .”

Nero came with an angry voice, “So you… Oh , I remember, you are the human Chen Rui!”

Chen Rui gave Isabella a bottle of healing potion, and he turned his head fiercely. His two murderous eyes glared at Nero.

Even Nero had a tingling sensation in an instant. Seeing Chen Rui and Isabella’s intimate scene, he roared, “Damn it! You are just a mere Demon Emperor, yet you are so arrogant! Hmph! I don’t care what Obsidian orders, I will kill you first, then rape this woman first before killing her!”

As soon as he finished speaking, Chen Rui’s body lit up with a brilliant light. Even in this kind of daytime, one could feel the brilliance like countless stars, and his breath skyrocketed correspondingly.

The sense of crisis in Nero’s heart became stronger and stronger. When he felt that the breath surpassed the Demon Emperor’s level and was still increasing, he finally couldn’t help making a move. He came to the light in an instant and punched it. The punch didn’t have the slightest effect, but the expansion inside the light became more intense.

After a few punches in a row were futile, Nero was astounded. He instantly moved for some distance. A light burst out in an instant, revealing the enemy in full body armor in the center.

Nero looked at the star-shining armor warily. When he felt the noble and elegant breath, suddenly his complexion changed greatly, “[Armor of Faith]! You’re… a holy envoy of the Light Divinity Temple?”

Chen Rui frowned slightly: [Armor of Faith]? Holy envoy of Light Divinity Temple? Right! At the Mountain Seckred, the Demi-God Satan mentioned the concept of [Armor of Faith]. Tiffany owns Satan’s [Armor of Faith]. It seems that behind the Light Divinity Temple, there must be a Demi-God powerhouse!

“No! This armor seems to be stronger than the armor of the ordinary holy envoy…” Nero’s face was even more horrified, “Who are you!”

Chen Rui, the famous internal affairs genius of the Demon Realm, is actually a powerhouse similar to the light holy envoy. Could he be a hidden chess piece of the temple?

“I am the person who wants your life!” As the [Royal Star Transformation] had limited time, Chen Rui didn’t want to be long-winded. His figure flashed and appeared in front of Nero, there was a faint sword light on his palm, striking toward Nero.

Nero felt that there was a change in the opponent’s strength, so he didn’t dare to forcefully withstand it. He dodged, and the sword qi in the air left a deep trench which was more than 10 meters long on the ground. Nero was shocked, and he no longer dared to underestimate the enemy. A bident appeared in his left hand. As he waved it, numerous sharp qi was launched atChen Rui. His right hand was holding a round shield with a griffin pattern on it.

Chen Rui launched several [Aura Blades], but they were actually blocked by the round shield. Even the intangible sword qi could not penetrate through. Instead, he was almost injured by the bident. He knew that this set of weapons was not trivial. The artifact, “Northsea”, had appeared in his hand. He slammed the bident aside, and the sword turned into a gleam of light, flashing toward Nero’s throat like lightning.

Nero raised his right hand, the round shield blocked the sword, but the tip of the sword actually pierced the shield. When it was retracted, there was a transparent sword hole on the shield. Nero was taken aback. This shield is a masterpiece of the hobbit mechanic master, Dowa. It has amazing defensive power and has been following me for many years. I never thought that the opponent’s sword is so sharp that it can actually pierce through the shield.

The two men fought while moving forward. The unprotected ground was cracking and twisting due to the terrible pressure. Nero was actually suppressed in a disadvantageous situation.

Seeing that the opponent’s attack was getting more and more fierce, Nero couldn’t bother more. Even if the opponent’s background is not trivial, I can’t just wait for him to kill me. Besides, the Demon Realm is not a human world. Even if I killed him, the Light Divinity Temple also won’t know about it!

Thinking of this, Nero didn’t have the kind of restraint that he had previously: This “Chen Rui” obviously used some secret technique to forcibly increase his strength to the Demon Overlord level. He is surely not my opponent as a real Demon Overlord powerhouse. As long as I kill him with all my strength, not only I will get Isabella, I will also get that sharp sword!

Of all the opponents, I thought Nero was an op character🙄. How could he not be able to fight back?

chapters.title: Chapter 489: Destruction And Black Hole
chapters.body:
Chapter 489: Destruction And Black Hole

As soon as Nero thought of this, he no longer had any scruples. He completely burst out the Demon Overlord power. Chen Rui felt the pressure doubled. Nero slammed his opponent away with his shield, and the light charging in his body suddenly shone. When the bident pointed to the sky, the 2 moons actually gradually moved and overlapped, the light became more and more dazzling that one could not look directly. It became a… sun!

Within the scope of the light, the temperature suddenly became much higher. Chen Rui knew that Nero had activated the territory power, so he did not rush in. He blocked with the Northsea and waited with a focused mind.

The biggest difference between the Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor lied in the understanding of power which was apparent in the territory. The Demon Emperor just barely used the power to imitate the power of nature while Demon Overlord uses himself as a guide to truly utilize the massive power of the world. The change of the 2 moons was an illusion in the territory. Isabella who was outside the territory only saw the space around Chen Rui and Nero was surrounded by a fiery light emitting a terrifying power; she was not particularly affected.

“Since you want my life, you must be prepared to die!” Nero’s voice sounded, “After killing you, that sword will be mine, and that woman will be mine. I want to possess her cruelly in front of your corpse! Trample on her!”

These few words made Chen Rui’s anger and killing intent surged to the extreme, but his gaze looked tranquil, revealing an almost cold calmness. This was the first time he had fought a real Demon Overlord powerhouse since he mastered the [Royal Star Transformation]. It was crucial not to be hot-headed at such a time.

As soon as the territory was cast, the situation was immediately reversed. Chen Rui felt that his power was suppressed to the lowest point in this sunny “world”, and even the activation of the skill became a lot slower. The Demon Overlord territory and the Demon Emperor were really a world different. Moreover, Nero would never restrain his power like when Chen Rui usually trained with Paglio and the others. Nero immediately used his killing move with all his strength. Chen Rui was suppressed for a while, and there were even life dangers several times.

Nero launched a barrage of attack, intending to defeat the opponent in one go, but he suddenly felt that his strength had inexplicably reduced a lot while the pressure from the opponent had greatly increased. Seeing stars were revolving around the opponent, he was immediately vigilant. He lifted the shield to cover his whole body and stretched the distance between them.

It turned out that Chen Rui had activated the [Galaxy Territory] skill. The current [Galaxy Territory] could enhance his full attributes by 50% and reduce opponent’s attributes by 50% for an hour.

Nero didn’t know the mystery of the Super System. Seeing that this Demon Emperor was able to activate the territory in his own territory, and was not suppressed by his own Demon Overlord territory, he was shocked, but his killing intent intensified. It was only the ordinary effect of suppressing the other territory, but the magical effect of the [Scorching Sun Territory] was much more than that. The sun’s rays flashed one after another in the sky, and there was a faint colorful light on the bident and the round shield. At the same time, all kinds of lights flashed on his body.

“Holy weapon! Holy Magic Armor! [Divine Blessing]! [Light Enchantment]!” For a while, Nero’s strength increased again, and the weakening effect of the [Galaxy Territory] was greatly reduced. Various buffs were added to the attack and defense attributes. “Although your territory is peculiar, in this [Scorching Sun Territory], I can have unlimited buffs and an immortal body, so you will undoubtedly lose today!”

Chen Rui had a few bottles of black potions in his hand. He uncovered his visor and drank them all. This was a complete set of “true” black potions which could greatly increase strength and other attributes in a short period of time, and there are no after-effects. In order to completely kill Nero, he had gone all out.

Nero was not very surprised or worried because there were pharmaceutics grand masters in the human world, so the black potions were not surprising. Furthermore, the difference between the realm and territory couldn’t be solved by simply taking potions. But Nero didn’t want to waste the time. It would be bad if the Dark Moon’s Demon Overlord powerhouse rushed over. At the moment, he rushed forward without waiting for Chen Rui to finish drinking the potion.

Chen Rui teleported again, then he drank all the potions during the interval of the next attack. At the same time, a faint red light appeared under his feet. He threw the empty bottle to face Nero’s attack. Nero did not lie indeed. Due to the colorful light, Northsea could only leave a shallow mark on the shield this time. However, Chen Rui consumed the true black potions, plus Mystic Jade Armor’s [Hot Blood Halo], so his strength and other attributes were greatly enhanced. He gradually got rid of Nero’s territory suppression.

In a sense, the two were back to square one.

Both were in a stalemate for some time. Nero did not want to prolong the battle, so he took advantage of his strength and flew into the air. With a flicker of his body, he actually disappeared.

Immediately after that, the “sun” emitted a terrifying bright light. The nearby ground quickly became scorched and cracked. Many creatures in the territory withered and died in an instant.

The Northsea sword in Chen Rui’s hand turned into a purple light, covering his whole body, but no matter how much he waved the sword, it could not stop the light. Fortunately, he immediately cast a protective shield to block the sunlight.

Chen Rui leaped up and urgently rushed toward the “sun” in the air. Several light balls were ejected from his hands and flew quickly into the “sun”. However, they disappeared without a trace.

The “sun” sent out a majestic force field, and the intangible field force pushed Chen Rui’s figure which was in the sky to the ground. It was just like a real sun that could only be looked up from the ground.

Chen Rui noticed that the protective shield had become very thin at this time. It seemed that it wouldn’t last long. At the moment when the protective shield disappeared, a mask suddenly appeared on his face. As soon as this mask appeared, the majestic spirit power nearby quickly moved toward the mask; even the “sunlight” was rapidly weakening. Nero’s figure was revealed gradually.

“What secret technique is this? It can actually swallow my magic and spirit power!” Nero’s voice was mixed with surprise and rage, “Unfortunately, my territory is not only based on spirit power! Try this strongest trick, [Light Shadow Clone]!”

Countless figures jumped out from the sun; all of them were buffed. In Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes], each of them was actually real. Although the strength of the clone was much weaker than the real person and the duration was also limited judging from the blinking state, but the number was very alarming.

Chen Rui slashed with his [Aura Blade] and cut a clone in half. However, the 2 clones burst apart, and the force was very strong. Even the Star Armor shook violently. Chen Rui’s qi and blood were churning due to the explosion. He immediately retreated for a distance.

“Forgot to remind you that they will blow themselves up.” Nero’s arrogant voice sounded.

With so many “Nero”, once he was jointly attacked or they blew up together, even if Chen Rui had reached the strength of Demon Overlord, he would inevitably be severely injured.

Chen Rui did not panic. His figure appeared in the air instantly, attracting the clones to chase after him, then he suddenly launched [Sonic Boom] and flew toward the ground. At the moment he was about to land, he forcibly turned his body and pointed above at the clones with Northsea. The purple sword body instantly emitted dazzling light, bursting countless meteor-like beams which spread rapidly upward in a fan shape.

This was the powerful charge skill of the Northsea, [Flow Back to Origin]!

Previously, Chen Rui used Northsea to deliberately resist the power of the sun in order to complete the charge. His original intention was to seize the opportunity to launch the big move to hit the “sun.” But unexpectedly Nero used this clone technique. The [Flow Back to Origin] happened to be the nemesis of this technique.

The attack range of this trick was extremely large, and its power was terrifying. Wherever they went, the “Nero(s)” were penetrated and burst open; none of them were spared.

After the clones were eliminated, the power of [Flow Back to Origin] still did not weaken. Countless meteors gathered into a huge sword shape and flew toward the “sun”.

“ Ah! ” A scream sounded, and the “sun” in the sky was cut in half, but the two halves of the sun did not disappear. Instead, weird changes took place slowly. They separated again and became two complete suns.

Nero’s hateful voice echoed in the territory, “The terrifying sword actually has double damage of light element and water element! You made me suffer this kind of injury! No matter who is behind you, I will break you into pieces today ! [Great Extinction Light]!” The two suns emitted strong rays of light at the same time which shone toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s figure scattered into countless flies in an instant. When the light shone on the flies, it actually couldn’t inflict any harm. However, the time of the [Demonic Flies Transformation] was limited, and the light would shine for a long time. When the flies combined into a human form in an instant, he couldn’t escape and was directly shone.

An extra large round shield appeared in Chen Rui’s hand to protect his head and other vitals. Suddenly, Nero felt that the other parts illuminated by the rays of light were very strange. Chen Rui’s body actually absorbed most of his attack power and transformed it into its own power. The remaining destructive power couldn’t penetrate the Mystic Jade Armor’s Star Armor at all.

“What kind of shield is this!” Nero was horrified, and he immediately reacted, “No! Not the power of a shield! It is [Body of Light Blessing]! A holy envoy with [Body of Light Blessing]… Is it Saint of Light? ! Impossible!”

Saint of Light is known as God’s chosen one. There are a total of 12 and they are the representative of the Light Divinity Temple. The 2 notable features are the strongest [Armor of Faith] and [Body of Light Blessing]. The mysterious Chen Rui in front of has both features. Could it be…

No wonder he has all kinds of treasures. It turns out that he is actually 1 of the 12 saints!

Saint of Light is better than ordinary saints as they have the [Body of Light Blessing] which is almost invincible in this kind of battle. Besides, he has the terrifying killing move just now! Nero couldn’t help but feel timid when he thought of the might of the temple. He no longer dared to continue the fight. He glanced at Isabella in the distance. As his mind shifted, the [Scorching Sun Territory] spread rapidly, and the light instantly spread to the location of Isabella. Although Isabella was alert, she was exhausted and injured at the moment, so it was too late to dodge. She was trapped in the light curtain, unable to move.

“Don’t move! If you move, I will kill this woman!”

Chen Rui’s figure stopped, and Nero became more sure that the relationship between Chen Rui and Isabella was not simple. He channeled the territory power, and the scorching sun was locked on Isabella, “If you want her to live, hand over your sword first!”

Nero believed that Chen Rui’s strongest reliance was the sword that could emit the power of light element and water element, so he first forced him to hand over his most powerful weapon.

“Okay! You let her go first!”

Isabella didn’t say anything like “leave me alone”, but she just glanced at Chen Rui. From that gaze, Chen Rui saw a strong determination and death intent, plus a touch of gentleness before the farewell.

“No!” Chen Rui knew what she was going to do, and the boiling blood instantly concentrated on his brain. The territory power that had already reached the maximum burst out suddenly. In an instant, everything except him paused. Chen Rui didn’t know why this happened, but he felt that the territory power was being exhausted exponentially. He didn’t have the time to think much about it. He tapped his foot, came to Isabella’s side and hugged her tightly.

In an instant, the static time resumed its flow again. Neither Isabella nor Nero seemed to feel anything abnormal just now. It was just inexplicable that Chen Rui “crossed” hundreds of meters and held Isabella in his arms; even she herself thought that it was an illusion.

Nero was also taken aback. The purpose of this threat came to no avail. He smiled bitterly, “Although I can’t kill you today, you can’t kill me either! In the [Scorching Sun Territory], you can’t give I’m a fatal blow! I will definitely announce your identity as the Saint of Light to the Demon Realm. At that time, I don’t need to do anything, and you will be beheaded by the Demon Realm’s powerhouse! Even if you didn’t die, I will spread the news that the Saint of Light has an affair with the demon from the Demon Realm everywhere when I return to the human world. No matter where you are, there will be no place for you!”

Chen Rui guarded Isabella behind his back and stared directly at the dazzling “sun” in the sky. The burning power on his body did not reduce, but became manic instead. He uttered 2 words, “[Star Devouring]!”

A huge black hole appeared in the air. At the moment the black hole appeared, everything in the territory rushed toward the black hole, including the rays of the two “suns” that were distorted by the terrifying swallowing force.

Isabella looked terrified. If Chen Rui hadn’t deliberately allocated his strength to protect her, she would have been swallowed by this terrifying “hole”.

Chen Rui’s gaze gradually changed, exuding a hint of destruction and fierceness. There was red color in his black pupils, and the power of the black hole suddenly increased several times. Not only the light, but even the two “suns” themselves slowly moved toward the black hole involuntarily.

Nero felt like he was a frog stared at by a viper. He did his best to resist the engulfing black hole full of breath of destruction. Chen Rui suddenly leaned forward and actually jumped toward the black hole. His body became a black smoke and merged into the black hole. The terrifying devouring power rose again, and the two “suns” finally couldn’t resist. They were dragged into the black hole step by step.

After a while, Isabella felt dizzy. The radiant territory, the suns, and the black hole disappeared in the blink of an eye. The 2 moons were still high up in the sky as if nothing had happened.

There were two people in the field.

The person with a dark red armor was Chen Rui. His five fingers were holding Nero’s head, and Nero’s eyes had rolled up. His body was actually shriveled to bones as if his blood and power had all been sucked out. His mouth made a trembling sound.

“Don’t kill me! I’m the royal family member of the Blue Glory Empire…”

The blood-red pupils flashed, and the five fingers exerted force without hesitation. With a “click”, the head broke apart.

Did Chen Rui finally accept the power of Shura because of anger?

chapters.title: Chapter 490: Space Seed! The Key To The Human World
chapters.body:
Chapter 490: Space Seed! The Key To The Human World

In the mountains outside the city, the entire factory building of the Terry Family had become a ruin. There were terrifying force fields within hundreds of meters of radius. Many people desperately fled to the nearby mountains and stared in horror at the distant scenes.

There were blue mist and black flame in that area from time to time. They twisted into a ball and repeatedly entangled; even the line of sight became distorted.

“ Boom! Boom! Boom! ” With a few deafening sounds, everyone felt that there were waves of fluctuation in the initially distorted line of sight which rippled outward, then the space finally returned to calmness.

In the dense smoke and dust, they couldn’t see the scene inside, but some demons with special eyesight could faintly see the traces of the terrifying power rampaging in it. Suddenly, a figure flew out from the thick smoke. He looked haggard with a few wisps of green mist on his body, and a faint laughter sounded behind him.

Jason, who was hiding in the crowd, recognized that the figure was the capital’s powerhouse Sarandi, and he was secretly shocked. Isn’t Sarandi a royal family powerhouse at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord? How could he be defeated?!

“Sir Sarandi!” Jason yelled in a panic. Since Sarandi had failed, Jason would be doomed if he stayed in the Dark Moon. He must act decisively and escape to the capital with Sarandi and surrender to Regent Obsidian.

When Sarandi heard Jason’s voice, his flying direction changed and turned back. Jason was overjoyed and hurriedly greeted him. Sarandi arrived in an instant, but what Jason saw was his ghastly and murderous gaze. He knew that something was amiss. Before he could say “Spare me,” he had lost consciousness.

The people nearby only saw the swift figure passing by Jason. Jason’s body was already stained with a kind of green smoke, then he turned into ashes.

Since Jason knew a lot of secrets, Sarandi didn’t want this survivor to fall into the hands of the Dark Moon, so he killed Jason. Then, he fled forward without stopping all the way.

After flying for a while, he dived into the jungle. Feeling that he had lost the enemies who were chasing behind him, and the poison invading his body became more and more intense, Sarandi slowly stopped. He found a hidden stone pile in front of a big blue lake and sat down.

Sarandi tried to use his power to get rid of the poison, but those poison seemed to have stuck to his bones, viscera and even every blood vessel like a glue. He couldn’t remove them in a short time.

Sarandi’s brows wrinkled tightly. He didn’t expect that he would encounter such a terrifying enemy during this trip to the Dark Moon. Not only he possessed great power, there was also the terrifying poison technique which even the body of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord couldn’t resist!

Just now he obliterated Jason, in addition to avoiding leakage, another purpose was to use the power of the [Heart of Light and Dark] to transfer part of the poison on his body surface in order to reduce his burden. But the poison in his body couldn’t be removed in this way. If it stayed in his body for a long time, there would perhaps be a big obstacle.

I must find a safer place as soon as possible. With the talent of the [Dark Flame], I’ll see if I can completely remove it.

At this moment, Sarandi suddenly had a bad omen. As soon as he raised his head abruptly, he saw a huge black shadow in the opposite sky.

This was a giant dragon that was tens of meters long. Its whole body was tawny, and its scales faintly glowed with a metallic luster. It had a ferocious appearance with a single horn on its head. There were fin-like things on its cheeks. The dark golden vertical pupils flashed with a frightening cold light. When its huge wings spread out, even the light of 2 moons was blocked.

Sarandi was very surprised. Where did this terrifying dragon come from? I didn’t even notice it flying. That familiar breath… is the opponent who hurt me!

It turns out that it is an extremely rare poison dragon among dragons!

“ Hmph, you still want to run away after being poisoned by me? This is my nest. I know where you are even with my eyes closed!” A familiar voice sounded from the poison dragon’s mouth. It was the enemy named Paglio!

Sarandi sighed. My skills are not as good as others, I am poisoned, and the other party is a dragon who is good at flying. There is no hope of escaping now. He simply gave up resistance, patted the dust on his body and stood up gracefully. His expression became very calm, “I admit my failure. Before I die, I ask to see Princess Royal Shea of the Dark Moon.”

As soon as he finished speaking, the giant dragon shook his body and turned into a human form as he flew over. With a punch, Sarandi, who didn’t defend, was knocked out. Paglio cursed and said, “Just admit you lost. Don’t put up a manner in front of me.”

While Paglio knocked down Sarandi, Chen Rui was loosening his fingers that crushed Nero’s skull in another place.

The shriveled body suddenly stiffly scattered to the ground. An object with a green halo flew out from the corpse slowly. Chen Rui’s red eyes flashed, and he grabbed it.

This was a lush green item the size of a jujube seed. It was flowing with strange energy fluctuations in his palm.

“This is…” A certain memory segment in Chen Rui’s mind instantly became clear, and a sparkle flashed in his blood-red pupils, “Space seed!”

Humans came to the Demon Realm generally by opening the space channel which was relatively risky. As for returning, there was no danger. They just needed to rely on a kind of “seed” that was implanted into the body in the human world in advance. This was the space seed in Chen Rui’s hands.

The human entering the Demon Realm could activate the space seed through some special conditions, then return to the coordinates specified at the human world. It was equivalent to a one-time fixed coordinate teleportation.

“With this thing, I can go to interesting places even like the human world.” Chen Rui laughed loudly, and his laughter was full of sinister. When his mind moved slightly, the seed had been integrated into his body. He thought of something suddenly, and he glanced at Isabella next to him.

Facing the fierce and bloodthirsty red pupils, Isabella did not panic or avoid him, but she just looked at him quietly.

Chen Rui’s eyes were narrowed, and he snorted coldly. The blood in his pupils gradually disappeared, and they returned to the original black. The red of the armor on his body also faded, changing into its original form and luster. It was just that he seemed to exhaust a lot of energy as he was gasping for breath.

When Chen Rui was in extreme anger just now, he accidentally merged Shura’s power of destruction into the black hole of the [Star Devouring], and he finally absorbed all the power and flesh of Nero.

Although Nero was wiped out, the brutal and violent power and means still horrified him. Is this the embodiment of “destruction”?

In the status bar of the Super System, the Experience Value had changed again, 2%.

This is Phecda? Do I really want to do this in the future?

The way of training is dangerous and risky. How can I advance without going through obstacles.

Chen Rui took a deep breath, and his will became firm again. The armor on his body gradually disappeared as he looked at Isabella who was staring at him, “Isabella, how is your injury?”

When Isabella heard her name, her gaze became cold suddenly, “Your strength is beyond imagination. It seems that I outsmarted myself just now.”

After she finished speaking, she turned around and wanted to leave. However, at this time, her physical condition was extremely weak due to the serious injury and the exhaustion of strength. She staggered and collapsed forward. A figure appeared in time to hold her.

“Drink it.” Chen Rui had a bottle of black potion in his hand.

Isabella saw that he took out black potions this time without hiding, and she said coldly, “What kind of potion is this?”

“Longevity potion. In addition to prolonging life, it has the magical effect of restoring injuries.” Chen Rui helped her sit down slowly on the ground. “Don’t simply burn your vitality in the future. This potion can only be used once.”

Looking at this bottle of grand master-level’s highest achievement potion that could drive the Demon Realm’s countless powerhouses crazy, Isabella coldly replied, “No, isn’t it just right for me to die? Dead people won’t reveal secrets.”

“You really don’t want to drink it?”

Isabella said nothing and glanced aside.

“I have only one way to deal with a sulky woman.” Chen Rui uncorked the bottle, focused his power in his mouth and drank the longevity potion gruntly, then he held the face of the sulky woman and passed it mouth to mouth.

Isabella struggled desperately, but now she had no strength at all. She was forced to kiss him face to face. Gradually, her struggling strength diminished, and her beating hand wrapped around the man’s neck. Even after the longevity potion was “transferred”, both of their lips still did not separate, but they greedily searched for each other’s lips in each other’s heartbeat.

This was the first time that Chen Rui took the initiative to kiss Isabella so boldly, instead of being “coerced” as before. This kiss was likely to have endless troubles. However, regardless of whether it was because the woman diverted the enemy for him or committing suicide, it was worth it.

After a long time, the two finally separated.

Isabella stared at him, feeling the wonderful feeling in her heart that was almost forgotten. Suddenly, she put away the tenderness in her eyes and said viciously, “Don’t tell anyone about the matter just now!”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “It’s this kind of threat again… I don’t seem to have any other choice, Madam Yini.”

Hearing that satisfactory address, Isabella’s face suddenly blushed; not sure if she was shy or it was the effect of the potion. She snorted coldly and said, “Are you going to the palace tonight?”

“Palace” was almost like the secret sign between the two of them. Chen Rui shook his head with an extremely exhausted look on his face, “I want to go, but unfortunately I can’t because I just used some secret technique. I will enter the sleeping state soon… This time, the Dark Demon has suffered a heavy loss. It is probably also very difficult to keep the capital’s contact point. We suffered a defeat. In any case, you should heal your injury first…”

At the mention of the Dark Demon, Isabella’s eyes suddenly dimmed.

Chen Rui’s eyelids had already begun to shut. The exhaustion after fully activating the [Royal Star Transformation] was hard to resist, not to mention that he also merged with Shura’s power of destruction. His body slowly softened, and Isabella quickly put him down, resting his head on her lap.

Chen Rui stretched out his hand, trying to touch her face, but his vision was blurry. He was out of energy when he stretched out halfway. He held on to the last trace of consciousness before falling asleep and said, “I like the flower…”

When he uttered the last word, he was already asleep.

Although the sentence was vague, Isabella heard it.

Staring at the face of the man who was sleeping like a baby, a drop of tear slowly slipped from her blue eyes. It dripped onto his face. Her lilac cherry lips formed a shallow smile like a quietly blooming fresh flower. It was beautiful and intoxicating.

Now that he had made up his mind, would he introduce her to the Governance Association ‘again’?

chapters.title: Chapter 491: Gambling Agreement! Midnight Sun'S Apprentice
chapters.body:
Chapter 491: Gambling Agreement! Midnight Sun'S Apprentice

The assassination of Financial Officer Chen Rui occurred a few days before Shea’s birthday, and it caused a fierce storm among the upper class of the Dark Moon.

The result of this storm was 2 words: great purge.

A considerable number of people from almost every family were taken away for investigation, and many of them never returned. The 2 legions, Red Blood Legion and Flame Legion, joined forces to conduct a raid on the whole city and impose a curfew.

Shea used the <a href=”https://www.historydiscussion.net/history-of-india/the-policy-of-blood-and-iron-followed-by-balban/2660″>Blood and Iron Policy</a> which she rarely revealed normally. Any suspicious persons, regardless of family or identity, would be beheaded without the slightest mercy. Those who pleaded for leniency were treated as accomplices. In just a few days, a bloody storm swept through many families of the Dark Moon.

This incident added a bloody accent to the upcoming 25th birthday of Princess Royal Highness. At the same time, it also further established Shea’s prestige.

To fight against the capital, the internal plague must be removed first.

——The real executive person in charge of the Blood and Iron Policy was Isabella. She fully utilized Shea’s authorization. Suspicious people were imprisoned if they were not killed. None of them were spared.

The decisiveness and fierceness of the intel boss made even the second boss, Delia, shocked. But Delia also knew that these people were tumors of the Dark Moon. The deeper and the longer they stayed, the greater the harm to the Dark Moon. The painful lesson of the Dark Demon’s headquarters was her personal experience, and she would never allow it to occur again.

The deterrence effect was quite obvious. Now the upper family of the Dark Moon trembled when they heard the name of the Dark Demon. Isabella was originally the controller of the capital’s secret intelligence department. Her method was not limited to the massacre. With the utmost authority from Princess Royal, it was <a href=”https://idioms.thefreedictionary.com/chop+and+change”>chop and change.</a> The political families were very obedient. The people would not dare to have ill-intentions for the time being.

In the palace’s secret prison, the captured peak stage Demon Overlord, Sarandi, was imprisoned.

Sarandi was now poisoned by Paglio, so his power had greatly reduced, but even if he was not poisoned, it was also impossible to break away from the seal of the Secret Prison because that was the ancient runes seal that Zola personally placed. Nowadays, very few people below the Demi-God could escape this seal. Sarandi was obviously not one of them.

Sarandi was not subjected to any special abuse or torture. He was just staring at Chen Rui and Shea who appeared in front of him with a cold gaze.

“Sir Sarandi.” Chen Rui said, “Please forgive me. Your power is too strong. Just in case, we have to use a little imprisonment method.”

“ Hmph! human. I have to admit your luck and cunning. There is actually such a dragon powerhouse protecting you.” Sarandi’s gaze turned to Shea who was behind him, “Don’t you want to say something? Madam lord?”

“Uncle Sarandi…” Shea sighed softly.

Sarandi. Lucifer, one of the royal family’s geniuses back then. He was the secret apprentice of the Lord of Midnight Sun. He was seriously injured after following the Lord of Midnight Sun to crusade the human world for 300 years. After Midnight Sun died, Obsidian took the opportunity to seize the power of the Fallen Angel Empire and chased the Crown Prince Grimm established by the Midnight Sun to the Dark Moon. At that time, Sarandi was recuperating. However, after he recovered from injury, he did not help the Dark Moon, but turned to Obsidian’s side.
