“Kill!” The two square formation scattered into a series of columns, rushing toward the Moonlight Fortress with a loud cry in the rushing dust.

“It has started.” Obsidian said with a bit of eagerness in his seemingly calm eyes. As long as the Dark Moon was eliminated in one fell swoop, it would not only relieve his biggest trouble, but it could also solve the previous difficulties.

“It has finally started.” Shea said the same in the palace in the Dark Moon City as she stared at the crystal ball quietly.

“Team 1 of magic crystal cannon, launch!”

“Team 2 of magic crystal cannon, launch!”

Under Athena’s order, several light balls launched out in batches and landed on the battlefield. Numerous enormous pits appeared. The soldiers within the power range instantly exploded into powder. There were many people with broken limbs nearby. It was a horrible sight. Nevertheless, the others were still advancing fiercely while shouting and killing. As the formation was rather scattered, the casualties were much lesser than before.

The stronger the magic crystal cannon, the longer the cooling time. Gerant had precisely calculated the cooling time of the Moonlight Fortress’ magic crystal cannon during the 2 previous launches. As the opponent’s magic crystal cannon had just been launched, it would definitely be unusable. He could take this opportunity to dispatch a more powerful army.

“Magician legion, speed enhancement magic! The third army formation and the Demon Equip Legion, charge!”

The combat power this round was stronger than the first round. The Demon Equip Legion was equipped with siege ladders and large shields which could effectively resist the enemy’s arrows. Together with the speed magic that made up for the weakness of poor mobility, the legion would be a powerful weapon for siege and close combat.

Just as the third army and the Demon Equip Legion were advancing quickly, several white lights shot out from the wall of the Moonlight Fortress. If the previous red flame magic crystal cannon was a parabolic shot, then this white beam of light was a straight line that cut directly into the enemy’s formation like a destructive greatsword. It was even moving slowly. As the enemy forces along the way didn’t have the time to resist or evade, they were broken down into particles and dispersed. Several fan shapes were cleared out of the charging army in the second round.

“Damn it!” Gerant didn’t expect the Dark Moon to have another magic crystal cannon, and it was also equally terrifying. He had thought that this battle would definitely be strongly resisted by the Dark Moon, but he didn’t expect the resistance was actually much stronger. Before he touched the Moonlight Fortress, his side had already suffered a lot. In any case, there was no way out. He could not hesitate even the slightest.

Although the magic crystal cannons wiped out many soldiers, as Gerant expected, once they crossed the shooting range, they would be useless. The coalition army that had crossed the death line rushed toward the fortress aggressively.

Although the magic traps and magic circle along the way played a role, they were covered by the huge number of people in an instant.

Loki calmly watched the approaching enemy while secretly calculating the distance. Pointing the long sword in his hand, the messenger immediately sent a signal. Behind the stretch of city wall, several rows of archers pulled their bows together and began to shoot arrows into the air!

These archers shot arrows very quickly after being equipped with Chen Rui’s “invention,” thumb ring . The rain of arrows splattered down from above the fortress. Under such an undifferentiated range of blows, the capital coalition army at the forefront fell one after another onto the ground.

On the wall of the fortress, a number of graceful female figures appeared. Each of them were holding bows and giant quivers. The “graceful” here referred to the upper body. The lower body could only be described as “wriggly”- Medusa warriors!

This group of Medusas were originally members of the Moon Shadow Legion. They were transferred here this time. As Loki shouted, the Medusas dressed in light armor pulled their bows in a neat and uniform motion. They aimed right at the target and launched. Medusa’s shooting skills were among the best in the Demon Realm. Especially after being enhanced by the devil fruit, almost every arrow could take a life.

However, the coalition army had a large number of people, and many people had approached the city wall under the rain of arrows. The Demon Equip Legion relied on the cover of the shield and the heavy armor to block many arrows. One after another siege ladders were set up and were about to be erected on the city wall.

Suddenly, numerous giant green vines with thorns appeared on the ground. The terrifying plants were intertwined, growing and spreading rapidly like giant snakes. They entwined the approaching siege ladder and the enemy.

The vines were powerful and seemed to carry some special attributes. Even if the entangled enemies were not broken like a siege ladder, they soon lost resistance and were strangled to death.

What shocked the coalition army even more was that the cut-off part of this kind of terrifying plant could still regenerate as if it were endless.

Guardian Vines- Large protective plants. Attribute: Regeneration, coma and restraint. It began to germinate 10 seconds after sowing. Takes 24 hours to mature. It could grow in any quality of soil. Automatically attacks hostile creatures and the degree of hostile attack could be adjusted.

Would the Dark Moon win this war with all the advanced weapons they had?

chapters.title: Chapter 508: The Aerial Legion Of The Capital
chapters.body:
Chapter 508: The Aerial Legion Of The Capital

Before Chen Rui left the Dark Moon, he planted a large number of Guardian Vines seeds on the walls of the Moonlight Fortress. Now, they appeared as a surprise factor which had received unexpected results.

With the assistance of Guardian Vines and the powerful shooting of Medusas and other archers, all the approaching enemy forces were cleared. Several army formations and the Demon Equip Legion suffered heavy injuries. Their pace of advancement involuntarily slowed down.

Gerant, the commander of the front army of the capital coalition army, looked a bit unsightly. He could almost feel the angry gaze coming from the large tent of the central army in the distance without turning his head.

Before the battle was over, the casualties were already far beyond expectation. The enemy only suffered a few casualties because the approaching archery on his side only managed to kill a handful of soldiers. By visual estimation, the number of people killed in battle was tens of thousands.

Gerant sighed secretly. In fact, his command had no mistake this time, but the Dark Moon brought too many “sudden changes” to the coalition army. These “sudden changes” were not accidental, but inevitable. Not to mention the Dark Moon, the fortress in front of me cannot be easily defeated.

Although encountering the present obstacles, it is not a problem for the army to conquer the Moonlight Fortress. It is just that Royal Highness Obsidian once said, we either don’t fight or wipe out the enemy with thunderous momentum. The casualties and battle conditions are so unexpected now. It is about the reputation of Royal Highness Regent. Even if we take down the fortress by then, it will be difficult to keep my position as the front commander and deputy commander of the coalition army.

However, Gerant quickly dispelled these distracting thoughts and focused his attention on the battlefield. He was a soldier. No matter what happens after the war, I will do my best to defeat the enemy on the battlefield!

“The fourth formation, prepare to dispatch! The Blood Flag Legion, Sharo Legion, standby! Messenger, immediately go to the central army’s tent to report to the Royal Highness Regent, requesting to dispatch the Flying Cloud Legion to quickly resolve the battle.”

Dispatch all main forces of the first army. Also, requesting for air support. Gerant was going all out this time. He wanted to break through the Moonlight Fortress’ defense in the shortest time.

The messenger’s request quickly reached the coalition army’s central commander’s tent. Obsidian sneered, “The Flying Cloud Legion? I’m afraid it’s not enough, right? Why not dispatch the Dragon Rider Legion too? With these strongest aerial legion support, I want to see how long it will take for the sir deputy commander to take down this little fortress?”

Obsidian knew clearly in his heart that Gerant’s command was not too much of a problem. It was just that Obsidian himself had stated publicly before the expedition that he would send troops to wipe out the Dark Moon this time. It was only the first checkpoint now, the Moonlight Fortress, but they had already lost so many soldiers before even going up the walls. Most of them were the army of the lords. Whether it was his reputation as the regent or his account to the lords, it was impossible to justify, so there must be someone to bear this responsibility.

If it was Shea, she would take the initiative to take the responsibility, but Obsidian was not Shea. What he needed was the prestige he believed, so this scapegoat could only be Gerant.

The 3 army formations and the Demon Equip Legion that initially attacked the city suddenly slowed down the attack after several failed attempts to climb the city wall. At this moment, the defenders of the Moonlight Fortress saw numerous dense black spots in the sky far away.

“The enemy’s aerial legion!” Athena’s expression became solemn, “There are so many of them!”

“This is the Flying Cloud Legion!” Nesta was the most familiar with the capital’s legion. While staring at it, he exclaimed, “ Oh no! At the back… they even dispatched the Dragon Rider Legion! “

The Flying Cloud Legion was an air force composed of a large number of demonic beasts consisting mainly of mutated griffin. The number was more than 5,000 riders. They had superb combat skills and were good at siege. The Dragon Rider Legion was the dragon rider that rode on the wyverns. The combat effectiveness of 1,500 riders was very strong.

Athena frowned and said, “The Wyvern Legion has been standing by on the mountain behind. Our wyverns are similar to the enemy, but the griffin has only 1,000 riders which is an absolute disadvantage in terms of numbers.”

Nesta nodded, “The Dragon Rider Legion’s commander is called Salgar, who specializes in magic and martial arts. He is at the early stage of the Demon Overlord. His character is violent, and his combat power is strong. The Flying Cloud Legion’s commander is called Rometty, whose power level is similar to me. She is quite scheming and very difficult to deal with. There is also a very powerful manticore team under his command.”

“Why do you say so much?” A firm voice said, “Leave these guys to me.”

As soon as Athena and others turned their heads, they saw the beautiful girl’s firm eyes and resolute expression. The most resolute… was her tone, “Athena, remember to count the money for me.”

This sentence made Athena speechless, but she still knew the truth that there would be courageous dragons if there was a hefty reward. She nodded, “Then you go ahead and fight first. The Wyvern Legion will be here soon. The air force is difficult to deal with, I will double the price.”

The girl’s cool expression suddenly turned into a cheerful smile. She held Athena’s hand, “Athena, I know you are the best!”

“Be careful.” Athena knew that Olypheus was very powerful, but there were too many enemies. There was also the Demon Overlord powerhouse whom Ms. Black Dragon could not handle by herself. “Don’t be too greedy for more credits. Remember that the riders in black are on our side; don’t mix them up. Paglio, please go to the back mountain immediately.”

“Your money will be deducted if you attack the wrong side! If you really can’t hold on, I will go to the back mountain first. At that time, I may save your life for the sake of Little Betty.” Paglio, who had never spoken, uttered a sentence while holding a wine bottle. That casual expression didn’t seem to be bothered about the “black spots” that were gradually magnifying in the distant sky.

Previously, Olypheus was simply the nightmare of Master Poison Dragon. Paglio was really tense due to the godly stalking technique. It is rare that I can have a happy life since Little Betty is in closed doors training, but it is ruined in the claws of this Ms. Miser. I get all kinds of disturbances before even getting a treat. The relationship between Little Betty and Olypheus is getting closer and closer like good sisters and partners. There is also a terrifying madwoman behind them. The life of Master Poison Dragon is as bitter as it is. Now that I seize the opportunity, I naturally have to avenge my personal grievances, lest this chick still thinks that I am a doormat !

Ms. Black Dragon snorted to Master Poison Dragon and ignored him. Meanwhile, Roman who whispered to Nesta said, “I’ll deal with that Rometty later!”

Olypheus glanced at Roman with professional suspicion, “You seemed to be asking Nesta, is Rometty a beauty?”

This chick is too terrifying! It’s no wonder that Paglio treats her like an enemy. Roman’s cold sweat broke out. He quickly changed the subject by pointing to the approaching demonic beasts in the air and said, “They are here!”

The demonic beasts flying all over the sky were like a fast-moving black cloud, almost covering the light of the 2 moons. The sky was full of clamors. Before they flew over, they had caused heavy psychological pressure on the Dark Moon defenders.

The emergence of the “air force” caused the morale of the capital coalition army to skyrocket. Gerant immediately ordered the fourth army formation and the Blood Flag Legion to attack. The attack in front of the city wall began to become unprecedentedly fierce. Guardian Vines was no longer able to suppress them. The speed of regeneration couldn’t keep up with the speed of destruction, and their vitality gradually dried up.

Obsidian eyes narrowed slightly as he watched this scene from a distance. Based on the intel, the Dark Moon’s air force is at most 2,000 people. How could it compete with the 7,000 soldiers of the capital? There were 5 army formations on the ground, plus 2 major legions. With the two-way attack, the collapse of the Moonlight Fortress is a matter of time.

There was a figure in the sky above the Moonlight Fortress appeared in front of the black patch of “dark cloud” in an instant. The figure rushed up without fear. Compared with the “dark cloud”, this figure was insignificant. However, after the figure rushed in, the “dark cloud” was torn apart like a splitting wave. Along the way, the wyverns and griffins continued to fall down. Most of them were frightened by the breath exuded from this figure, so they dared not approach.

Standing on a mutated wyvern king without any armor was the Dragon Rider Legion commander, Salgar. He saw that the opponent was a young girl. He flew over with the mount, and channeled the magic power as he shouted, “Leave this woman to me. Everyone, attack the fortress!”

The surrounding dragon riders heard the order, divided into several teams and flew toward the Moonlight Fortress. Making money was Olypheus’ top priority, so she was not bothered to pay attention to Salgar at all as she followed the dragon riders. She flew much faster than the wyverns. Wherever she went, the wyverns were falling like rain.

These dragon riders and wyverns were all trained by Salgar. Seeing that the girl was killing them all the way, causing many casualties, he couldn’t help being furious. Several red fireballs appeared in his hands and they followed Olypheus as if they had eyes.

Olypheus was grabbing a wyvern’s wing which seemed to be caught off guard. Its back got burnt by the continuous fireball attacks. After the shock and sparks dispersed, the wyvern, whose wings were torn, burst into flames. Amidst the wailing, it directly plummeted with the dragon rider on its back.

Olypheus didn’t seem to see Salgar; she flew to another wyvern.

Salgar’s speed had always been a bit slower. Watching the dozen riders being slashed down by the girl, and she simply ignored him, a Demon Overlord powerhouse, he was even more in rage. The magic was coming out one after another from his hands, but unfortunately, they were futile.

In a hurry, Salgar launched a chain lightning. As a result, Olypheus was unscathed, but the 2 wyverns next to her were killed by the lightning.

Olypheus unceremoniously counted these 2 on her own account. Salgar was pissed off. Fortunately, the dragon rider team which was being chased by Olypheus was very quick-witted. They took Ms. Black Dragon around in a circle with the risk of being beheaded on the way to appear in front of Salgar.

When Salgar saw Olypheus finally approaching, he roared and rose into the air from the Wyvern King while waving his hands repeatedly. The riders in the distance only saw strange changes in the space near Salgar and Olypheus. It was like shattered pieces of glass forming a bizarre three-dimensional cube which enclosed both of them. The situation inside couldn’t be seen from the outside, and even the sound was cut off as if a translucent cube appeared out of thin air.

“The territory of space power?” Olypheus was slightly surprised as she looked at this strange space which was completely isolated from the outside. Countless translucent mirrors floated in the air inside.

“This is the space realm created with my talents and territory. In this territory, you will see powerful compound magic and even the long lost space magic.” Salgar sneered, “I used this to kill the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord’s opponent before. Even if you are slightly stronger than me, you are not my opponent.”

“It’s just magic, why so much nonsense. Don’t delay me from making money!”

Olypheus’s disdainful contempt made Salgar furious. Countless flames burst out of his body. He wasn’t finished yet. In an instant, lightning, hurricanes, flames, ice and snow filled the entire territory. After these magics were refracted and reflected when they hit the “mirror”, their speed and magnitude suddenly increased; all the magics shot toward Olypheus.

Boom boom boom! There were violent impacts and explosion sounds. A figure shot out and punched Salgar. The punch hit Salgar who then shattered suddenly, but the broken one was just… a mirror!

“You can actually withstand my magic head-on. You are indeed a powerhouse of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. You should have a special talent for defense right? Unfortunately, in this territory, you can’t touch me.” Salgar’s figure appeared on the other side again. Olypheus reacted extremely quickly. She appeared in front of Salgar abruptly. With another blow, the mirror shattered again.

“It’s useless!” Salgar’s laughter echoed in the territory. For a while, countless figures appeared around Olypheus. While moving, the initially shattered mirrors were restored, and various powerful attack magic appeared again. “The magic will get stronger and stronger in this space. When your talents are exhausted, you will be crushed!”

When Olypheus was trapped in Salgar’s territory, the Flying Cloud Legion and the Dragon Rider Legion had already reached the city wall. The arrows was shot upward like rain, but the demonic beasts in the air were flying fast. Therefore, even if the Medusas were equipped with armor-piercing arrows, it was not so easy to shoot a griffin with a few arrows.

The soldiers on the griffin started shooting arrows downward while the wyverns directly attacked the defending soldiers with their claws and teeth. The capital coalition army under the city launched a fierce attack at the same time. A siege ladder successfully appeared on the wall, and the soldiers below braved the Guardian Vines and rain of arrows to climb the ladder desperately.

When a great demon was halfway up the ladder, he activated his teleport talent and instantly appeared on top of the wall. As soon as he stood firm, he was directly facing a pair of snake-like vertical pupils. He felt his body was numb and began to stiffen up quickly. Before he completely turned into a stone, he was cut in half by the minotaur beside the Medusa with an axe.

The number of siege ladders being erected gradually increased, and more and more enemy troops were on the wall. The archers were forced to retreat and focused on throwing projectiles. The melee soldiers charged bravely and started hand-to-hand combat. The most troublesome was the attacks from the air which was difficult to defend against.

“Hold the line!” Athena threw the Judgement Greatsword in her hand which drew an arc in the air and cut off the left wing of a wyvern that was about to attack the soldiers. When it flew back, she grasped and slashed it again quickly. A griffin that was approaching was cut into half, “Our Wyvern Legion is coming!”

As soon as she finished, there was a vague hissing sound of wyvern from the rear. The reinforcements finally came!

A huge figure which was faster than these wyverns suddenly appeared in the sky. This figure suddenly let out a roar which sounded through the entire battlefield. Above the Moonlight Fortress, the wyverns and griffins, who were flaring their teeth and claws, trembled at the same time. They scattered all around in shock. The weaker griffins that were closer were even frightened by the roar that their wings became feeble and fell to the ground from mid-air.

In the coalition army far away, Obsidian’s complexion changed slightly. Dragon! And its strength is quite strong!

The peak stage of the Demon Overlord!

Could Olypheus find a way to breach the opponent’s mirror territory?

chapters.title: Chapter 509: Fierce Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 509: Fierce Battle

What appeared in front of everyone was a huge dragon with tawny scales, two cheeks with fin-like things, and a row of short horns on the top of the head. He was covered with a layer of black armor. His dark golden snake eyes glowed with a ghastly light.

Just now, the dragon roar contained a powerful dragon demeanor, and its lethality was indiscriminate. Regardless of the demonic beasts in the air or the attacking and defending sides on the ground, they were all shocked out of their senses and their limbs became feeble. Many enemy troops on the siege ladder were shaken to the ground. The only thing that was not impacted was the Guardian Vines. Taking advantage of this opportunity, they regenerated quickly and shredded the siege ladder one by one.

The petrified griffins retreated in terror and dared not step forward. The wyverns were strictly trained pseudo-dragons after all. Although they were afraid of the dragon demeanor, under the command of the dragon rider’s beast taming skill, many of them turned around, flew back and rushed toward the dragon cautiously.

As the wings of the giant dragon flicked, painful screams sounded endlessly. Even without attacking with the dragon’s claws or teeth, the wyverns that were touched lost their balance and fell to the ground. Many wyverns’ bodies were puffing with green smoke. They were corroded by some kind of terrifying poison, and soon their bones were exposed.

Meanwhile, the attack of the wyverns couldn’t penetrate or even leave a mark on the black armor on the dragon’s body at all. As for the poison of wyvern, it was a joke in front of the poison ancestor, poison dragon.

At this time, the wyverns and griffins in black armor behind the Dark Moon rushed to the battlefield. These demonic beasts of the Wyvern Legion had faced Paglio many times in the training base of the black rainforest. Although feeling fearful in their hearts, their performance was better than the capital’s aerial legion. They avoided the poison dragon and rushed toward the capital’s aerial legion that was in panic.

A thrilling air battle began. The air was full of the roar and biting of demonic beasts, and countless flying and hovering shadows dimmed the light of the 2 moons.

The Dark Moon’s aerial legion was at an absolute disadvantage in terms of numbers, but its strength far exceeded the expectation of its opponents. Equipment-wise, in addition to the necessary long spears, the aerial riders of the Dark Moon also had throwable short spears and the armor-piercing crossbow that could shoot explosive bolts. They could launch powerful attacks from a distance.

The difference in equipment was also evident on the demonic beasts. Even the weakest griffin of the Dark Moon was covered with armor. This armor was made of a special material and craftsmanship. It was light and tough, so it had little impact on their flying speed. On the other hand, the capital’s aerial legion, except for some elite wyverns and manticores who had armor, the rest were almost naked, having only the flying bridle that assisted the rider’s control.

These equipment were actually a battle of wealth. Putting aside the quantity and just looking at the equipment, one would think that the aerial legion of the Dark Moon was the strongest regular army of the empire’s capital. This was undoubtedly a blow to their self-esteem. In this real battlefield of life and death, it was not just the self-esteem at stake, but life as well.

The Dark Moon was not only superior in equipment, but also in the wyvern’s individual strength. The power of the wyverns were obviously stronger than that of the capital’s wyverns. Many also had special abilities such as spurting flames, freezing poison breath, doubling the fortitude, doubling the flight speed and so on. If it was a one-to-one battle, they could abuse their opponents to death.

The capital’s Flying Cloud Legion commander, Rometty, who was riding behind a mutated double-headed manticore, looked a little startled. She thought she saw it wrongly. Damn. Are these still the wyvern? It’s okay if it’s only a couple of them, but why are all of them so vigorous?

If Rometty knew what the wyverns of the Dark Moon had eaten, she wouldn’t be so surprised… No, this answer should make her even more shocked- Someone would feed the demonic beasts? And there are hundreds and thousands of them?

But Rometty didn’t have time to think about it. What she needed to concentrate on now was the terrifying dragon. Although the breath that she sensed from the dragon was far better than her Demon Emperor level, under her command, dozens of members of the manticore team led the Flying Cloud Legion’s most elite 1,000 griffins to surround the dragon.

These griffins had all activated some kind of magic tattoo. The mysterious power generated by the interlaced flying and transposition could barely offset the terrifying attack from the dragon. However, it was barely restrained only because the dragon’s power and the dragon’s demeanor was too terrifying.

Even this kind of formation could not last long. There would be griffins seriously injured or killed with every blow. All they could do was to trap their opponents as much as possible in order to buy time for the siege troops on the ground while waiting for reinforcements from their powerhouses.

Rometty launched her power to disrupt the dragon at critical moments from time to time. She tried her best to minimize the loss of the elites, but the defense power of the dragon was too amazing. Not to mention the armor, even the wings were impenetrable after being hit by her magic arrow.

“Beauty, are you free? Why don’t we find a quiet place to talk about our ideals and life?” A clear and powerful voice pierced into Rometty’s ears. Rometty turned her head sharply and saw a wyvern carrying a man on its back rushing toward her.

Rometty could see that the wyvern was definitely a mutated king. Its strength has reached the Demon Emperor level which is comparable to my double-headed manticore. So… the enemy behind the wyvern should be the commander of the enemy’s aerial legion?

If I can kill the opponent, it should be able to smash the Dark Moon Army’s morale. When Rometty thought of this, she urged the double-headed manticore to fly at the opponent without a second thought.

The moment both of them passed by each other, the 2 demonic beasts of the Demon Emperor level had already exchanged a few hits. As soon as they had moved apart, Rometty behind the manticore suddenly turned back. She shot 7 magic arrows which contained powerful powers almost instantly. The target was the rider behind the wyvern king.

That rider also turned around, and the 7 magic arrows suddenly stopped the moment they approached him, then they broke into half almost simultaneously and fell to the ground.

Rometty’s pupils contracted slightly. Her archery skill was the best in the capital. Just now, this [7 Flashy Sparks] contained 4 changes. The 3 arrows would speed up suddenly, and 1 of them would draw an arc and attack from the side. However, in the blink of an eye, the arrows were cut off by the opponent without exception; not avoiding, but cut off!

The passing by, shooting and breaking the arrows happened in a split second. The wyvern king and the double-headed manticore hovered and turned back again.

“Beauty, I have received your love. I think we have the hope to develop ‘further’.”

This frivolous voice did not arouse Rometty’s special anger. On the contrary, the sexy lavender lips curled slightly, and her powerful combat intent surged. The quasi-legendary grade weapon Purple Electric Bow in her hand began to make a buzzing electric current sound.

The addition of the aerial legion boosted the morale of the Dark Moon’s defending soldiers. They could finally free their hands to concentrate on the enemy troops’ siege, but the pressure was still enormous. After the capital army formations and regular legion joined the siege, the ground’s attack became fiercer. Fearless battles could be seen everywhere on the city wall. Before the original enemies were cleared, a new siege ladder had been erected.

In front of the huge iron gate of the fortress, several charger demonic beasts had already approached step by step due to the Demon Equip Legion’s hustle. This kind of beast’s skin was tough. They had 3 hard blunt horns on their forehead, and they had great incomparable strength. Their ramming ability was particularly amazing. It was a nightmare for all defense facilities.

The fortress soldiers desperately fired arrows at the charger demonic beasts, but the Demon Equip Legion was prepared long ago. Not only were the huge beasts covered with armor, but there were also soldiers on both sides and behind holding huge shields to protect them. Even armor-piercing arrows could not penetrate it.

On the other side, the Blood Flag Legion’s goblin warriors, that had crossed the Dark Moon’s magic crystal cannon’s attack range, began to quickly set up the siege equipment. Now that their allies had climbed into the city, using magic crystal cannon would easily hurt their own people. Therefore, the goblins were setting up catapults.

The Dark Moon City was in a fierce battle now. It was very difficult to even launch the magic crystal cannon, not to mention it took a lot of time to adjust the angle to attack these catapults. The crisis had become more and more intense.

The aerial battle was also very intense. The Dark Moon had an advantage in individual strength, but the number was much smaller than that of the opponent. Moreover, the rider’s experience was inferior to that of the opponent. They were often besieged by double or triple the enemy. They were just barely holding on with the opponent.

The charger demonic beasts approached closer, and their bodies were filled with arrows. Many defense soldiers with huge shields were also shot down by the Medusas, but they still couldn’t stop the charger demonic beasts’ footsteps. With the efforts of the goblin warriors, the catapults in the distance were quickly assembled, and the boulders poured with magic oil were set. The minotaurs pushed the winch hard to press the catapult’s spring to the lowest point. When the goblin warriors saw the boulder was set on fire, they pulled the launcher, “ Teng! Teng! Teng …”

Several “meteors” carrying flames flew high, dragging a trail of thick smoke in the air as they flew toward the Moonlight Fortress. They smashed the fortifications or the ground behind the city wall with terrifying power. The burning gravel splashed, and exaggerated burnt flame pits appeared.

An arrow tower was hit, and half of it collapsed. The archers inside screamed and fell down. The lethality of these flame slings was really strong. The thick smoke began to emerge from the Moonlight Fortress.

At the critical moment, another dragon sounded. The elite griffins besieging the dragon fell down like hailstones. Many of them became skeletons before falling to the ground due to some terrifying power.

Rometty’s dual-headed manticore was fighting the wyvern king fiercely, and it was shocked by the dragon’s roar. Although the wyvern king was also shocked, it recovered much faster. When it bit the manticore’s head, the manticore struggled desperately to break free. It fluttered its wings and left. Its armor was completely torn, and there were 4 shocking bloody marks left by the wyvern king’s claws.

Rometty was about to draw the bow and shoot at the wyvern king that was chasing her. Suddenly, she felt cold on her shoulders. Her shoulder armor had been split into half and fell. There was a blade mark on her shoulder that was gushing out blood. She was secretly surprised: The hit exchanges were just a moment,, but… that guy’s speed is actually so quick!

What surprised her even more was that the giant dragon broke through the encirclement of the elite legion faster than she expected. Now, she must quickly get rid of the enemy behind her and command the army to hold the giant dragon again.

Roman was riding the wyvern king. In fact, the commander of the Wyvern Legion was someone else. Roman just wanted to hold back Rometty. After seeing through Rometty’s motive, he chased her closely, not giving her a chance to catch a breath.

After getting rid of the siege, Paglio spread his wings and swooped down. His target was the capital coalition army on the ground that were swarming and charging toward the fortress. When the poison dragon opened his huge mouth, he sprayed clouds of dragon’s breath. The speed of these dragon’s breaths was not very fast, spreading a green mist along the way.

However, something terrible happened. Wherever the mist went, whether it was the soldier or the horse, they turned into green smoke and dissipated. A criss-cross line of death was drawn in the crowd, and the battlefield was full of smoke. The soldiers at the back could not see the situation in front of them, so they just rushed forward blindly. Many soldiers in the front row were pushed into the mist and were gone before they could scream. When they reacted, countless lives were already lost. Many soldiers were in a huge panic.

The poison dragon was a kind of rare dragon. Its strength and talent were not the most powerful dragons, but in terms of war or mass killing, it was definitely the most terrifying dragon.

Paglio saw the crisis of the city gate and was about to fly away. Suddenly, he sensed a warning sign. His huge body twisted, and his long tail waved behind him like a whip.

A figure flashed behind him for an instant and avoided it.

“Powerful dragon,” the figure appeared in front of Paglio. He was a middle-aged man with 3 pairs of light wings behind him. He also exuded the breath of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. “I’m Disyaro. Lucifer of the Fallen Angel Empire, this should not be a battlefield for the dragons. If sir leaves now, our Royal Highness is willing to pay a large fortune as compensation.”

The answer to Disjaro was a cloud of poisonous dragon’s breath. Disjaro frowned and dodged with his [Holy Wings]. He bowed slightly, “Sir, please don’t make a move first. I’m a friend of Elder Sosgalla of Dragon Island. Sir, for the sake of…”

Before he finished speaking, there was another clear dragon roar coming from the cube space made by Salgar’s territory. Sound was impossible to get out from this territory space initially, but the dragon roar came out. Then, in the next blink of an eye, the translucent cube space shattered like glass, and a huge figure appeared in it.

Disjaro’s face changed drastically. Another huge dragon!

This dragon was much smaller than the poison dragon. She was about 8 meters long. It was covered with black scales. Only the abdomen was slightly dark red. The claws and the ends of the horns glowed with pale silver light. She flapped her wings as she roared ferociously.

In the shattered space, a figure flew out unstably. It was Salgar, the commander of the Dragon Rider Legion. Judging from that look, he was obviously seriously injured. The wyvern king under Salgar was extremely spiritual. It immediately caught its master, and desperately fled toward its camp.

Don’t mention the regret in Salgar’s heart. That girl is actually a dragon! And she’s a black dragon, the nemesis of magic!

The strongest part of his space realm was infinite magic and magic power buffing. However, the prolonged reflections and refractions were simply tickling for her body. Finally, this chick was annoyed and transformed into her real body. A so-called [Black Dragon Cannon] ruined the whole space, and he was severely injured.

When Disjaro felt the breath of the black dragon, he felt even more shocked. The intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord black dragon! The peak stage of the Demon Overlord poison dragon! Krobelus, who has betrayed the Dark Moon, seems to be a dragon as well. An estate actually has 3 Demon Overlord dragons. Could it be that the Dragon Island is backing the Dark Moon Estate? How could this be possible?

Just as Disjaro was distracted, a terrifying force had hit from the side. It turned out that the giant dragon had turned into a man, taking advantage of his carelessness to launch a sneak attack. Disjaro parried in a hurry, but it was futile. The fist took a strange turn and hit his ribs. Disjaro felt a sharp pain, and he could already hear the sound of his bone breaking. He bore the pain while shouting, “Wait a minute!”

I need to stop just because you said to wait? Bah! Paglio had never been a gentleman. Besides, on the battlefield, he turned a deaf ear to Disjaro’s words. After his punch succeeded, he immediately launched a fierce attack.

Disjaro was put into a passive position. He had always cherished his reputation. The opponent’s power was stronger than he thought. Even under normal circumstances, he would not be an opponent. Besides, the other black dragon was nearby. If he stayed to fight, he would likely be dead.

Thinking of this, Disjaro took another 2 punches, and he took advantage of the force to fly. Finally, he escaped the stormy attack. Paglio’s disdainful voice came from behind, “I am a lonely spirit. What relationship do I have with the Dragon Island?! Even if you sell your ass to that Sosgalla, it’s useless!”

I’ve never seen such a despicable, shameless and rude dragon! The last sentence of the poison dragon made Disjaro almost spit out another mouthful of blood. He dared not stay, and he activated the [Holy Wings] to retreat toward the coalition army camp.

“ Hey … chick! Don’t pursue too much! Get rid of the catapults below! That’s valuable!”

Olypheus was chasing Salgar after she just broke free from the residual power of the space realm. Hearing the last 2 words of the poison dragon, she immediately flew toward the flame sling catapults below. Facing the power of Ms. Black Dragon, those catapults were simply vulnerable. They were destroyed like they were extremely fragile.

Olypheus was very clever. She didn’t dare to attack the base camp of the capital coalition army, but she followed Paglio to bully the attacking enemy army on the front line.

In the fortress area, due to the deterrence of the poisonous fog, the attack from the capital coalition army’s had been significantly slower. Athena’s figure appeared on the city gate. With a clear scream, she leaped high and aimed her Judgement Greatsword in her hand and slashed toward the charger demonic beasts.

A fiery red light appeared on the greatsword. With Athena as the center, flesh and blood flew up in a fan-shaped area of about 70 meters. The enemy’s bodies were shattered as if they were crushed by some terrifying force. Even the huge beasts were no exception; the armor on their bodies was torn apart.

Artifact greatsword’s own skill, [Judgement]!

Athena’s move successfully cleared the biggest threat at the city gate. She took the rope thrown by Nesta and rose rapidly. She teleported on the way and reached the city wall, dodging those arrows flying toward her.

Due to the rampage of the 2 giant dragons, the capital’s aerial legion had begun to collapse. The destruction of the catapults and the charger demonic beasts boosted the morale of the defending soldiers. The situation suddenly reversed.

The front army commander, Gerant, watched carefully. Rometty was entangled, Salgar was seriously injured, and Disjaro, who was unwilling to prolong the fight, was defeated and left. At this time, the sky started to darken. The night battle was even more unfavorable for the coalition army. If this continued, the loss would become greater and greater. He sighed immediately and blew the horn of retreat.

In the coalition army camp, all the soldiers looked at each other. No one thought that the first battle against the Dark Moon would actually end in failure.

Seeing the demonic beasts flying away in the air and the enemy troops retreating like a tide on the ground, the Dark Moon’s defending soldiers cheered loudly.

Hearing the distant cheers, in the capital’s central army camp, the regent and coalition army commander, Obsidian’s hazy purple pupils seemed even more gloomy.

What’s next? Would Obsidian command the army personally now?

chapters.title: Chapter 510: X-Rated Projection
chapters.body:
Chapter 510: X-Rated Projection

White Feather City, city lord’s mansion.

Lord Sicali was about to entertain a distinguished guest whose name was Fako.

“Sir lord, please forgive me for the presumptuous visit.” Chen Rui smiled generously and bowed.

Sicali also smiled, “If every visitor is ‘presumptuous’ like Sir Fako, I can’t wait to welcome them, but sir’s continuous spending makes me uneasy.”

Chen Rui activated the [Star Gate] from the Warlock Fortress and instantly returned to the White Feather Estate. The [Star Gate] could set 2 star points. 1 was set after he came to the White Feather Estate, the other was in the Dark Moon City.

If he wanted to go back to the Dark Moon City now, it could be done in the blink of an eye, but he couldn’t go back as he still had a lot of matters to be done.

Chen Rui knew his abilities very well. He was quite quick-witted with some planning and adaptability. As for creativity, it was basically the plagiarism benefit of crossovers. However, he definitely had a shortcoming in large-scale military operations and on-the-spot command. In this regard, both Athena and Shea were far stronger than him. If he rushed back now, he was just an individual with strong combat power in the war (There were several Demon Overlords with combat powers); he could not play a key role. The Dark Moon was probably already in a tough battle now. He was surely concerned as his lovers, partners, and friends were there, but he must also trust their strength. Once he could complete the planned mission outside, then the effect was definitely stronger than going back.

When Chen Rui left the White Feather City to go to the Warlock Fortress, he instructed the Dark Demon to send a generous gift to the city lord’s mansion in the name of “Fako” every day. In these 3 days, he gave 3 gifts. When Chen Rui personally visited now, Sicali, who was impressed, naturally showed considerable hospitality.

In Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes], Sicali’s real strength was an intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. This meant that the Sicali in front of him was still the person playing in the arena, not the Sicali who had visited the Dark Moon.

Chen Rui suddenly had a bold assumption in his mind: Must the Sicali who visited the Dark Moon be the real Sicali?

These psychological changes were only fleeting. Chen Rui maintained a smile on his face and said, “Sir lord is too polite. It’s just a show of sincerity as a compensation for my presumptuousness in the arena lounge. I said that I would visit at a time that is not presumptuous in accordance with the formal etiquette as the beginning of a friendship. Then, as a witness of our friendship, please accept this gift again.”

Chen Rui took out a small box and opened it. Inside was a golden ring with a dragon style. It was exquisite and elegant, “This is a legendary grade magic ring called the ‘Magic Track Ring’. It amplifies magic and spirit power by 35% and increases movement speed by 30%. It also comes with a protective magic, [Magic Power Shield], that can be used twice a day.”

Sicali’s gaze flickered and his gaze couldn’t move away from the “Magic Track Ring”. Amplify magic and spirit power! Increase speed! This was simply a tailor-made equipment for him. It also came with life-saving protective magic. For him, the value of this ring was far above the general legendary grade equipment!

“Sir might as well put it on and try it.” Chen Rui handed the box to the maid on the side and presented it to Sicali.

Sicali took out the ring and put it on his index finger. He felt that his spirit power and magic power were really surging. Then, according to Chen Rui’s instructions, after activating a certain pivot point of the ring with spirit power, a transparent magic shield appeared around his body. This shield was the magic that came with the ring itself which would not deplete the owner’s magic power. It was definitely a good item to save his life at critical moments.

“This gift is too expensive, I’m ashamed to accept it.” Sicali was amazed, but he didn’t mean to take the ring off in the slightest.

“The more precious, the more sincere our friendship is.” Chen Rui said as he looked at the maids around. Sicali understood and ordered them to retreat.

“Sir Fako, I have already felt your sincerity and… patience.” Sicali recovered his calmness, “It’s just that recently something happened in the northern part of the estate… You should know it too. Therefore, my mind has been uneasy, and my patience is limited. My friend, if you have any intentions, please say it clearly. As long as the situation permits, I will try my best to help.”

The meaning of Sicali was very simple. I will accept the gift, and you directly say what you have in mind. I don’t have the time to entertain you.

“Any kind of help?” Chen Rui asked back.

“The gain is often equivalent to the effort,” Sicali thought for a moment and said cautiously, “It’s just that my ability as the lord is limited. If it is a special request that exceeds the range of my ability, I’m afraid it will be difficult to achieve.”

Chen Rui deliberately asked tentatively, “For example?”

“Frankly speaking, although I’m a royal family, I’m just a hereditary lord who wants to keep this hard-won estate,” Sicali spread his hands. “I’m a person who abides by my duty, and I dare not have any wild ambitions.”

“Why would sir think I would make such a request?”

Sicali frowned, “Sir Fako, since we are friends, don’t beat around the bushes. Even if your request is too much, I will not hold you accountable for the sake of our friendship. Even if… you are a member of a certain force who is wanted by the capital now. I have already made my words clear. If you still beat around the bush, then I can only question your sincerity.”

The patience of this Sicali seems to be worse than that of the one that visited the Dark Moon. He seems a bit impetuous. I don’t know if he’s really frustrated due to the northern White Feather Estate’s Warlock Fortress or something else. However, his words made Chen Rui’s heart move, and his mind quickly turned – The force wanted by the Fallen Angel Capital? Could it be… the Bloodfall!

From this point of view, Sicali had misunderstood him as a person of the Bloodfall. Indeed, Chen Rui’s lavish gifts were somewhat similar to the last time Broc approached him. Judging from Sicali’s tone, he was either in contact with the Bloodfall organization before or he was inspired by some kind of “wild ambitions”.

The Bloodfall has great ambitions. The so-called “wild ambitions” must be related to the subversion of the 3 empires…

“I don’t understand what sir is talking about,” Chen Rui decided to go along with the misunderstanding. “What I can tell sir is that the force that I belong to is very large and the members are complex. They include royal family members, giant dragons, and descendants of the fallen royal families… It is inevitable that there will be many factions. I can’t tell sir more things, and I don’t know if sir has contact with other factions, or even joined a certain faction… But what I can tell sir lord is that the faction that I belong to is the most powerful one. As long as sir is willing, we can satisfy any of your wishes!”

“Any wish?” Sicali’s eyes flashed and asked back just like Chen Rui just now.

“Of course, such as… sir’s ‘uneasiness’.” Chen Rui nodded firmly, “However, friendship is mutual, just like giving and rewarding in a proportional relationship.”

Sicali nodded slightly. He seemed to be thinking about something.

Chen Rui keenly caught the fleeting light in Sicali’s eyes, and he stood up, “I am staying in the White Armor Hotel in the west of the city during this period. If necessary, sir can summon me at any time. Then… I shall not disturb sir and leave now.”

Sicali nodded. He revealed a thoughtful look as he watched at Chen Rui’s back.

In the middle of the night, in a secret room in the city lord’s mansion.

The sorrowful cry of the woman faintly sounded.

Under the bright magic lamp light, sets of torture instruments were seen hanging on the wall.

A naked fair-skinned woman was confined in the center of the room by a strange instrument of torture. She leaned down, and her body was lowered. Her head and hands were fixed on the shackles. Her buttocks were raised. The sexy hip of a woman was visible. This pose could undoubtedly accelerate the secretion of hormones in many males.

A man was standing behind the woman, waving a strange whip in his hand. In the woman’s screams, criss-crossing welt marks appeared on the white back and hip.

This image and sound appeared in a room of the White Armor Hotel at the same time. The room had been covered with a magic circle. Just like the secret room of the city lord’s mansion, the sound would not leak out.

As the only audience member, Chen Rui frowned when looking at this “holographic image”.

The source of this image was the “Magic Track Ring” given to Sicali. The “Magic Track Ring” was a legendary grade magic ring indeed, but there was a hidden function that Chen Rui did not tell Sicali. A six-yuan ancient runes image sending magic circle was added. It could penetrate magic circle interference within the effective distance and transmit the wearer’s shadow and sound to a certain medium such as the crystal ball in Chen Rui’s hand to form a projection.

Chen Rui’s main purpose was to find out the real Sicali, but what he didn’t expect was that he actually saw such an X-rated blockbuster, and it was a live broadcast.

In the crystal ball, Sicali had finished the beating. He took off his pant, pinched the woman’s snow-white buttocks, and stuck in ruthlessly. He began a brutal movement without gentleness.

Due to the omni-directional projection, Chen Rui saw clearly that the sir lord did not seem to enter via the ordinary “passage.”

In fact, the little charming girl at home occasionally used a certain part to serve him in this way. The unusual and novel taste was really exciting. Thinking of the charming little charming girl, Chen Rui who had watched the erotic movie for so long couldn’t help but lick his dry lips- Let’s monitor another time. I can’t stand it anymore if I continue watching this.

The candle in Sicali’s hand was still dripping, and the woman’s back and buttocks were full of wax marks. The strange thing was that the screams in the woman’s mouth seemed to be more exciting than painful. Some of the slutty groans made Chen Rui’s heart horrified. He canceled the idea of turning off the projection.

“I’m not reconciled!” Sicali screamed wildly while doing the piston movement frantically. His distorted and indulgent expression was unlike the usual gracefulness Sicali.

“I want to be the real master!”

“There is only one Sicali. Lucifer; it’s me!”

“Damn Wheel of Hera…”

Sicali shuddered violently for a while. He threw away the burning candle in his hand, came to the woman, grabbed her hair, pulled her face up, and placed her under his waist. The woman’s body was full of scars, but she showed a coquettish gaze. She swallowed the object on the man’s lower body and worked hard to serve him.

Although the makeup on the woman’s face had been washed away by tears and sweat, Chen Rui recognized the face and was shocked. It’s really her!

Damn your sister! (A curse word)

Bah! It’s literally your sister!

The content of this film is not only SM, but also the damn messy relationship…

Sicali did not pity the beauty at all. He grabbed the woman’s hair and shook vigorously. The object that went deep was even pushing out her gastric juice. The woman felt uncomfortable several times and was about to vomit, but the coquetry in her eyes became stronger and stronger. In the end, Sicali vented out all the desire with his anger. He seemed to be worn out and fell to the ground, gasping for breath.

The torture instrument was automatically unlocked, and the woman was also exhausted and lay on the floor.

After a long time, the woman bent her body and crawled over like a snake. She put her head on Sicali’s weakened lower body, “Good brother, give me one more time…”

“Bitch! You know how to be cheap!” Sicali sat up suddenly and grabbed her hair. He squeezed the woman’s throat like crazy, “I’ll just drag you to death together!”

Suddenly, a person appeared out of thin air in the secret room. With a wave of his hand, Sicali immediately released the woman’s hand. At the same time, his body flew out several meters involuntarily and smashed the wall.

This person’s height and face were exactly the same as Sicali. Chen Rui’s eyes were slightly raised. Judging from the power he has just released, this may be the “Sicali” of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor.

The woman coughed a few times. She touched her neck and stood up slowly. She twisted her waist while walking toward Sicali of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor without hiding her naked body at all, “It turns out that this brother is greater.”

“Go away, don’t call me brother!” The eyes of Sicali of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor were like cold electricity. After glaring at her, the woman shuddered, and she dared not come closer for a while.

Sicali of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor turned his gaze over the woman, and fixed on Sicali who was opposite him. He said coldly, “I don’t want to take care of your affairs, but everything has a limit. You should understand that!”

Sicali, who fell on the ground, seemed to regain his sanity. He slowly stood up, gritted his teeth and said, “Why are you pretending to be serious? Today’s me is tomorrow’s you! Do you think you can escape the fate of the Wheel of Hera?”

Sicali of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor was silent for a moment. He ignored the “self” at the opposite and said to the woman, “Follow me.”

“Didn’t you tell me to go away?” The woman sneered, but she walked toward Sicali who was at the opposite, “My brother and sister game is not over yet.”

Sicali of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor snorted, turned around and disappeared quickly.

“Let’s continue, good brother. I know your time is running out…” The woman came to Sicali and knelt down to start to flatter him.

Sicali’s eyes became more blood red. He watched the direction where the peak stage of the Demon Emperor disappeared and suddenly roared while grabbing the woman and pressing her against the wall. The room was full of screaming and moaning again.

Chen Rui’s mind moved. He turned off the projection and did not watch any further. He fell into contemplation in the room…

The Wheel of Hera? Was the Sicali cursed by something? Who was the one who cursed him? The sister?

chapters.title: Chapter 511: Wheel Of Hera
chapters.body:
Chapter 511: Wheel Of Hera

Dark Moon City, the Cloak Gang’s base ancient house.

It was late at night. Chen Rui entered the backyard of the ancient house unimpededly using the identity of “Aguile”. The Dark Moon City was one of the star points. Based on the [Star Gate]’s marvelous function, it only took a moment to return.

Skye and Xingxing had fallen asleep. Only Tetenis’ laboratory was still lit.

Knocking on the door, Chen Rui saw potion bottles and instruments inside, many of which were filled with boiling solutions that were bubbling.

“You are back?” Tetenis asked casually. The old man thought Chen Rui had returned from the front line of the Moonlight Fortress.

Of course, Chen Rui would not explain. He nodded, “I’ll be back for 1 night for now and leave after finishing my work.”

“I am experimenting with the black potions’ ingredients. Do you have any familiar memories when you look at these potions and formulas?”

The black potions that Chen Rui gave to Tetenis were redeemed from the Super System. The “grand master inheritance configuration” was purely fictitious. How would he possibly know any formulas or the like? He pretended to look at it and shook his head, “My consciousness was guided by the grand master at that time, so I don’t have any memory.

“The black potions are so mysterious. Now I just grasp the edge a little bit, but unfortunately, I still can’t get in.” The old man sighed regretfully.

Chen Rui thought of the conditions when he had taken the black potions in the past and said, “Teacher, you can try drinking potion and taste the wonderful feeling, maybe you can make new discoveries.”

“Of course, I thought about it, but these black potions are too precious. I need to keep them for analyzing…”

Before he finished speaking, the old man’s eyes suddenly widened. Black potions appeared in Chen Rui’s hands as he placed them on the table, “These are all True series potions that were configured some time ago. Teacher can try it. Don’t save them.”

“Good guy!” Tetenis’ eyes suddenly burst into fiery light as if these cold potion bottles were his old lovers who had been gone for a long time.

Seeing that the old man was about to throw himself into experimenting enthusiastically, Chen Rui quickly protected the potion and said his intention first, “I rushed back to the Dark Moon overnight because I have an urgent matter to ask teacher.”

“Long story short!” The old man replied briefly. His eyes were fixed on the potions behind Chen Rui’s hand.

“Teacher, have you heard of the Wheel of Hera?”

“Wheel of Hera?” Tetenis was startled. “This is an ancient pseudo-artifact. Why are you asking this?”

“Pseudo-artifact?” Chen Rui seems to have heard this term in some classics. “Teacher, to be honest, this time I went out for a secret mission, not to be at the front line. In this mission, I found some key clues which involve the Wheel of Hera, so I specifically returned to ask teacher for advice.”

Tetenis recalled it for a moment and explained it.

In the concept of general mechanics, magic equipment was divided into 3 levels: high grade, excellent grade, and legendary grade. Above the legendary grade was the artifact. In fact, there were some powerful equipment that exceeded the level of the legendary grade, but they did not reach the standard of the artifact. These were called pseudo-artifacts.

Pseudo-artifact was quite close to an artifact in some attributes. It was no longer what a mechanic master could make. At least, one had to be a quasi-grand master like Tetenis to craft it. Even Tetenis would find it quite difficult to make a pseudo-artifact successfully.

“At the level of pseudo-artifact and above, the percentage of equipment buff is no longer the largest measure of value, but an attribute that undergoes qualitative changes. For example… I remember that there is a Life Necklace that can increase lifespan by 20% and delay aging. The actual meaning of this ‘20%’ was far from those buff of the attack and defense by 40%.” Speaking of these, Tetenis talked eloquently with great familiarity.

Chen Rui couldn’t help nodding. His God-Eating Mask actually had no such a buff, but its powerful function was by no means comparable to the legendary grade equipment.

“Just as there are good and bad legendary grade equipment, there are strong and weak pseudo-artifact and artifacts also. Wheel of Hera is said to be a failed ancient artifact. Although it is only a pseudo-artifact, it contains powerful power that is far beyond the ordinary pseudo-artifact. In a sense, it can even be comparable to an artifact. Wheel of Hera also has another name called the Wheel of Faith. The strongest function is to absorb the faith power and transform it into the user’s own strength!”

Faith power? The familiar term surprised Chen Rui. The Wheel of Hera can absorb and transform faith power. Isn’t it similar to the Tower of Faith of the Super System? The Demon Realm even has such a thing!

Chen Rui suddenly remembered the nearly fanatical admiration of Lord Sicali by the people of the White Feather Estate. He vaguely understood some reasons now.

Tetenis continued to explain that in the inheritance memory he accepted, the “faith power” could only be possessed by God. Even a Demi-God powerhouse could only accumulate and comprehend the faith power in a certain territory or kingdom.

Therefore, the faith power absorbed by the Wheel of Hera could not be directly absorbed by people who were below the Demi-God powerhouse and needed a special medium. The owner of the Wheel of Hera could use this pseudo-artifact’s senses to find people with the most suitable physique among the believers. Then, the Wheel of Hera would transform these people into clones that retained independent consciousness and power.

After these clones absorbed the faith power, their strength would grow rapidly. In this growth process, the owner of the Wheel of Hera would also benefit at the same time. After reaching a certain limit, the owner of the Wheel of Hera would absorb all the vitality and power of the clone through the swallowing method in order to obtain all the power transformed by the faith power.

The clones and the owner were equivalent to an irreversible relationship of the master-subordinate contract which could not resist or even escape from the swallowing of the owner.

Chen Rui finally figured out the function of the Wheel of Hera- Just like MLM , the benefits earned by the retailers will be distributed to the distributor. Not only that, the latter will finally swallow his downlines as a tonic. In terms of the strength enhancement function, the Wheel of Hera is indeed comparable to an artifact.

In this way, the 2 Sicali whom I encountered are not the real lord of the White Feather Estate, but “tonics” waiting to be swallowed. The guy who was playing brother and sister SM in the secret room should be a clone that is about to be swallowed. No wonder he had that kind of hysterical madness. Then, the real Sicali should be even above the peak stage of the Demon Emperor’s clone. The Demon Overlord level!

What a lord of the White Feather Estate, he hides it so well! If not for the rise of the Dark Moon, the White Feather Estate would be the most powerful estate of the Fallen Angel Empire!

“Teacher, take a look at this sword.” Chen Rui thought of something, “Is this a pseudo-artifact or an artifact?”

After Tetenis answered the Wheel of Hera’s question, he originally wanted to continue researching the potions. Once he heard the words, he turned back immediately. Seeing the Northsea Sword in Chen Rui’s hand, his eyes became wide open again.

After listening to Chen Rui’s description of its function, the old man took out an instrument to make a careful evaluation. He was full of praises, “This kind of craftsmanship is simply flawless, it is even comparable to the artifact! And the ceremony of dripping blood to recognize the owner already belongs to the artifact category. Unfortunately, it still cannot reach the real artifact level. It can only be regarded as a pseudo-artifact; a very powerful pseudo-artifact.”

Chen Rui nodded. After listening to Tetenis explaining the concept of pseudo-artifact in detail earlier, he had already guessed the answer. The system-produced equipment like the Northsea, Judgment, and Thunderous Sound should all belong to the category of pseudo-artifact. He immediately shifted his mind and asked, “Then what about the 7 artifacts of the Demon Realm? Are they real artifacts?”

“Of course!” The old man said without hesitation, “The 7 artifacts are of course the real artifacts, and they are the most powerful artifacts. According to some fragments of the ancient books, even God fears them… It’s just that the 7 artifacts can only unleash the real power when being assembled together. If it is just a single piece, it may be similar to a normal artifact or even a pseudo-artifact. The problem is that the 7 artifacts can only be activated when they correspond to the royal bloodline. The Demon Realm has no mixed bloodline. Naturally, no one can use more than 1 kind of 7 artifacts at the same time, so this has always been a mystery.”

Chen Rui suddenly had a great realization. The 7 artifacts need to be used together to be the real strongest artifact!

No wonder the Sword of Fallen Angel, Illusive Demon Shield, Dark Shadow Cape… All these happen to be a complete set of equipment. As long as I gather the 7 artifacts, I can have the power to counter God. Tetenis said that no one could use more than 1 artifact which was not the biggest problem for Chen Rui because he already had 2 artifacts now. Uh, 1.5 artifacts to be precise.

I wonder if the use of artifacts cracked by the Super System meets the standards for the integration of the 7 artifacts? It is actually a kind of cheating.

Chen Rui shook his head. This was not the time to think about this. Now that he got the answer about the Wheel of Hera, it seemed that some corresponding preparations needed to be made.

“Teacher, don’t look at this sword anymore. This is my life-saving item. You can study the black potions first!”

“ Hmph! Secretive kid, just get out of here if you have no business here!”

Chen Rui returned to the house and saw a delicate figure sitting in the garden under the purple moonlight. She was holding a plucked flower in her hand.

The soft muttering voice of the maid succubus sounded, “I wonder how he is out there. Does he miss me more, or Athena and Zola? Or… is he thinking about Princess Royal?”

“Kia, Athena, Zola, Princess Royal, Kia, Athena…” The forlorn petals fell one by one in the hands of the little maid, and finally, it was bald with only 1 petal. The little maid was startled, “Princess Royal? No!”

As a result, another innocent flower was plucked, and its petals slowly fell in the hands of the little maid.

“Athena, Kia, Zola, Princess Royal…”

“Athena?” The little maid looked depressed, “If I knew earlier, I wouldn’t change the positions…”

As she was about to continue to pluck the flowers, she suddenly turned her head back vigilantly, and she saw a smiling face that she was thinking day and night appearing behind her.

The little maid couldn’t believe her eyes. She rubbed her eyes hard, and her gaze became more and more surprised. She threw herself into the arms of the man, “Chen Rui, you are back!”

“I have something important, so I came back for a while. I’ll leave soon.” Chen Rui stroked the little maid’s soft wings. “Did the capital’s army begin to attack the Dark Moon? Athena and the others are not here.”

“ En , Athena, Paglio, Olypheus and Roman went to the Moonlight Fortress. Krobelus and Delia are in the palace. Oh , I just received the news that the capital army was forced to withdraw after suffering a big loss in the first battle at the Moonlight Fortress. Athena has made a great contribution this time.”

“It doesn’t matter if she made a contribution, the more important thing is to be safe.” Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief and asked, “Where is Zola? Is she in the Rainbow Valley?”

“You only know to ask for Athena and Zola once you return. I know that my status is low and my strength is not good enough compared to them…” The little maid’s eyes were brimming with tears, and she looked lovely.

“Stop making trouble.” Chen Rui knew the little maid’s mischievous character. He gently pinched that delicate face, “I have an urgent matter to find Zola, and I need to go back soon.”

The little maid asked coyly, “It’s so late already. Just leave tomorrow, I’m a little scared by myself…”

It was obviously a bad excuse…

Seeing the expectant face of the succubus maid, Chen Rui was softhearted and nodded. All the time, in order to gain recognition, Kia is willing to be a small follower by Athena’s side, often “advancing and retreating together”. Now there is a rare chance to accompany her alone. Anyway, returning to the White Feather Estate is a matter of activating the teleportation portal. There should be sufficient time.

Chen Rui suddenly remembered watching some kind of X-rated scenes in the projection not long ago, and his heart felt hot. He couldn’t help but grabbed her elastic buttocks while saying something in the ear of the little maid.

The little maid’s buttocks trembled slightly and firmed up. Her face was blushing with a seductive light in her flattering eyes. She bit her lip and said, “ En “.

“Go take a fragrant shower and wait for me in the room.” Chen Rui grinned and touched it again before he walked toward the teleportation portal to the Rainbow Valley.

The little maid blushed and delightfully pulled the innocent petals. When the last petal was left, she smiled triumphantly, “Kia!”

Chen Rui entered the Rainbow Valley and found Zola in the laboratory.

When Ms. Fairy Dragon saw Chen Rui, she was also surprised. Chen Rui said briefly, “Can you please help me to improve the runes item last time. It may be useful at some critical moments. “

“Please?” There seemed to be a ray of dissatisfaction behind Zola’s glasses. Do you need to be so polite?

“Yes, my beloved Zola, please do it personally.” Chen Rui winked and hugged Ms. Fairy Dragon’s slender waist from behind.

“ Oh. ” Ms. Fairy Dragon responded gleefully in her heart. The little dissatisfaction disappeared instantly, “If you are in a hurry, I will start to do it now, and it will be successful overnight, but this kind of item can only be used once. You have to pay attention to it.”

Chen Rui nodded, “Time is tight now, so you will have to work hard. Remember not to work too hard on research. When the capital matter is over, I will be your assistant again, and we will experiment together.”

“ En. ” Ms. Fairy Dragon nodded, feeling warm and nice.

“How was the Zeray’s research last time?”

“Zeray” was the item that Chen Rui bought at the Red Spirit Estate’s Town Mordo trade fair. The power was astonishing. 2 of them had been used, and the remaining one was given to Zola for research, hoping to imitate more.

“There have been some results. In addition to the Dragon Inscription that was triggered, there are actually at least 12 yuan of ancient runes in it. Due to material restrictions, I only succeeded in making 5 imitations which are much less powerful. You can use them first…”

Ms. Fairy Dragon was obviously not satisfied with her own results. She took out the imitation products and took the item that Chen Rui handed over. Her waist broke free from his hug. “Okay, now I have to concentrate on making it. You go and have a rest first.”

Zola was quite dedicated to the research work. Chen Rui did not disturb her, and quietly exited the Rainbow Valley to return to the yard. He happened to see the light in the little maid’s room, apparently waiting for him. His eyes lit up as he walked toward the house.

Stop the excuse, he must be aroused by the x-rated projection 😒. The Wheel of Hera actually had such a function, could Chen Rui beat the real one?

chapters.title: Chapter 512: Empty City
chapters.body:
Chapter 512: Empty City

The next morning, Chen Rui appeared at the White Armor Hotel in the White Feather Estate.

“Sir Fako,” the waiter at the hotel saluted him respectfully, “The person sent by sir lord is waiting for sir in the room.”

“ Oh? ” Chen Rui’s heart moved, and he walked straight to the room.

In the room, a man dressed as a servant was waiting.

Chen Rui noticed the information displayed by the [Analytical Eyes]. He raised his brows slightly and closed the door first. Before the man could speak, he bowed and said, “I’m really sorry for actually making sir lord wait for a long time..”

The man didn’t expect that his disguise would be exposed so quickly. An odd expression flashed across his eyes, and his face changed quickly to restore his appearance, “Sir Fako has good eyesight! My visit is abrupt. I made a fool of myself.”

“Sir lord is too serious. It is my honor to have sir to visit me personally.” Chen Rui secretly thought that he was lucky. Originally, he wanted to find an excuse to look for Sicali, but he unexpectedly took the initiative to come personally.

This Sicali was the protagonist of the secret room’s X-rated SM movie last night, but strictly speaking, this “Sicali” was originally a member of the believers. Due to the power of the Wheel of Hera, he was transformed into a clone of the main body, Sicali. He had no blood relationship with Palando which was worthy of the SM name indeed.

Sicali sat down and said with a smile, “Sir Fako is in high spirits. You seem to be in a good mood.”

—— Of course, I’m in high spirits. I had a good time with my beloved little charming girl last night, and I also enjoyed a special service in a different way. Because I was a little excited, the little maid was holding her hips and kept screaming. There was another round of pity and love and stormy rain. The little fairy below had experienced a few climaxes before we hugged together and slept.

Let alone the benefits of [Dual Training], the love between man and woman is normal. Besides, we are even a young couple who like each other. When it comes to sex, there should not be selfishness. Mutual pleasure and satisfaction are the most important factors. As for matters like moral values, wait for me to put on the clothes and reset it.

“How can I be comparable to sir lord. Sir seems to be truly vigorous.” Chen Rui smiled slightly. The protagonist of the movie has an acquired taste. Whip, wax, torture equipment, and so on. Who is more ferocious than sir?

Sicali naturally didn’t know what Chen Rui was thinking. After a few courteous greetings, Sicali said, “Sir Fako is a discerning person, so I won’t go around in circles. I came here today in disguise to confirm 1 matter.”

Chen Rui knew that the show’s main point was coming, so he didn’t talk any more nonsense. He was all ears.

“Sir Fako said yesterday that you can satisfy any of my wishes. I don’t know how credible this sentence is? I came here with sincerity, hoping to hear the truest answer.”

Chen Rui was secretly delighted. If he hadn’t witnessed the X-rated blockbuster last night, especially the dialogue between the 2 Sicalis, he would have doubted about the sudden visit of the “sir lord” today. Now that he understood the mystery of the Wheel of Hera, he had a plan in his mind.

There was a saying called trying everything in desperate situations. This Sicali should be a clone that was about to be swallowed. Since it was a matter of life and death, he was naturally difficult to calm down. It could be seen from the conversations in the meeting yesterday, not to mention the hysterical tyranny and venting in the secret room.

Chen Rui was still smiling, “Paying and rewarding are often equal. It depends on how much sir lord can pay. For example… even if the sir wants to have a lifespan of tens of thousands of years, it is not a problem. As long as you can afford a sufficient price, you can impress a giant dragon to sign a symbiotic contract with you.”

If this sentence was heard by Master Poison Dragon, he would definitely be remorseful that he was sold at a low price back then.

Sicali nodded noncommittally, “It’s not that I don’t believe in sir’s ability, but facts are more convincing than empty talk. What do you think?”

Chen Rui asked calmly, “Yes, I just don’t know what kind of ‘fact’ does sir need? After this fact is confirmed, what kind of answer will sir give me?”

Sicali said solemnly, “To be honest, sir, I have a very urgent thing to ask for your help, but before that, I need sir to prove your ability!”

This time, Chen Rui did not beat around the bushes again, “Sir, please say.”

“There have been some accidents in the Loeb Mine in the Cold Mist Swamp east of the White Feather Estate. I want to trouble the sir to solve it. If sir can solve this problem within 10 days, I will not only pay a satisfying price, but this will also be the beginning of our true cooperation.”

Chen Rui was not sure whether this matter was related to the Wheel of Hera. Now the Dark Moon was fighting fiercely. Although they won a small victory at the Moonlight Fortress, it was mostly due to Obsidian’s underestimation of enemies. In the next battle, the pressure on the Moonlight Fortress would definitely be greater. With the existing defense and military strength, it was impossible to stop the fierce attack of a million troops, so he must speed up his plans as soon as possible.

However, Chen Rui believed that there was not much time left for this “Sicali”. Even if the Loeb Mine was only a test, as long as this was completed, he would definitely become Sicali’s life-saving straw and touch the biggest secret of the White Feather Estate.

“Okay! Sir, please provide the detailed information on Loeb Mine.”

The other party’s non-hesitant reply pleased Sicali. He took out a ring, “The information is in the ring. Due to some special circumstances, the lord’s mansion is not suitable for us to meet. If sir completes the task, you can take this ring to the arena battle ball merchandise store to find the owner, Tracy. She will arrange everything.”

“I will complete this task as soon as possible, don’t worry.” Chen Rui nodded and took the ring.

“Then I’ll wait for sir’s good news.” Sicali stood up, activated a certain magic item to change back to the appearance of a servant, and left the hotel.

The Loeb Mine was located in the Cold Mist Swamp in the west of the White Feather Estate. It was a dangerous place that was rich in rare minerals. It would take at least 2 days to reach by carriage and only 1 day with the aerial demonic beast.

Chen Rui rode on the griffin he got, looked back at the southern sky, and gently stroked a red rope on his wrist.
